Genesis1:1 aadi men parameshvar ne akash aur prathvee kee srashtti kee.
Genesis1:2 aur prathvee bedaul aur sunasan padee thee aur gahare jal ke upar aandhiayara tha: tatha parameshvar ka atma jal ke upar mandlata tha.
Genesis1:3 tab parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:4 aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko dekha ki achchha haai aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko andhiayare se alag kiya.
Genesis1:5 aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko din aur andhiayare ko rat kaha. tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar pahila din ho gaya..
Genesis1:6 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:7 tab parameshvar ne aek antar karake usake neeche ke jal aur usake upar ke jal ko alag alag kiya aur vaaisa hee ho gaya.
Genesis1:8 aur parameshvar ne us antar ko akash kaha. tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar doosara din ho gaya..
Genesis1:9 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:10 aur parameshvar ne sookhee boomi ko prathvee kaha tatha jo jal ikattha hua usako us ne samudr kaha: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai.
Genesis1:11 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:12 to prathvee se haree ghaas
Genesis1:13 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar teesara din ho gaya..
Genesis1:14 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:15 aur ve jyotiyan akash ke antar men prathvee par prakash denevalee bhee ttharen aur vaaisa hee ho gaya.
Genesis1:16 tab parameshvar ne do badee jyotiyan banain un men se badee jyoti ko din par prabhuta karane ke liye
Genesis1:17 parameshvar ne unako akash ke antar men isaliye rakha ki ve prathvee par prakash de
Genesis1:18 tatha din aur rat par prabhuta karen aur ujiyale ko andhiayare se alag karen: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai.
Genesis1:19 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar chautha din ho gaya..
Genesis1:20 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:21 isaliye parameshvar ne jaati jati ke bade bade jala-jantuon kee
Genesis1:22 aur parameshvar ne yah kahake unako ashaeesh dee
Genesis1:23 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar panchavan din ho gaya.
Genesis1:24 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:25 so parameshvar ne prathvee ke jaati jati ke vanapashuuon ko
Genesis1:26 fir parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis1:27 tab parameshvar ne manushy ko apane svaroop ke anusar utpann kiya
Genesis1:28 aur parameshvar ne unako ashaeesh dee: aur un se kaha
Genesis1:29 fir parameshvar ne un se kaha
Genesis1:30 aur jitane prathvee ke pashu
Genesis1:31 tab parameshvar ne jo kuchh banaya tha
Genesis2:1 yon akash aur prathvee aur unakee saree sena ka banana samapt ho gaya.
Genesis2:2 aur parameshvar ne apana kam jise vah karata tha sataven din samapt kiya. aur us ne apane kiae huae sare kam se sataven din vishraam kiya.
Genesis2:3 aur parameshvar ne sataven din ko ashaeesh dee aur paavitra ttharaya kyonki us men us ne apanee srashtti kee rachana ke sare kam se vishraam liya.
Genesis2:4 akash aur prathvee kee utpaati ka vrattant yah haai ki jab ve utpann huae arthata jis din yahova parameshvar ne prathvee aur akash ko banaya:
Genesis2:5 tab maaidan ka koi paudha boomi par n tha
Genesis2:6 taubhee kuhara prathvee se uttta tha jis se saree boomi sinch jatee thee
Genesis2:7 aur yahova parameshvar ne adam ko boomi kee mittee se racha aur usake nathno men jeevan ka shvas foonk diya aur adam jeevata praanee ban gaya.
Genesis2:8 aur yahova parameshvar ne poorva kee or adan desh men aek baattkai lagai aur vahan adam ko jise us ne racha tha
Genesis2:9 aur yahova parameshvar ne boomi se sab bhanati ke vraksha
Genesis2:10 aur us baattkai ko seenchane ke liye aek mahanadee adan se nikalee aur vahan se age bahakar char dhaara men ho gai.
Genesis2:11 paahilee dhaara ka nam peeshaena haai
Genesis2:12 us desh ka sona chokha hota haai
Genesis2:13 aur doosaree nadee ka nam geehona haai
Genesis2:14 aur teesaree nadee ka nam hiekela haai
Genesis2:15 jab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko lekar adan kee battkai men rakh diya
Genesis2:16 tab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko yah agyaa dee
Genesis2:17 par bhle ya bure ke gyaan ka jo vraksha haai
Genesis2:18 fir yahova parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis2:19 aur yahova parameshvar boomi men se sab jati ke banaaile pashuuo
Genesis2:20 so adam ne sab jati ke ghareloo pashuuo
Genesis2:21 tab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko bharee neend men dal diya
Genesis2:22 aur yahova parameshvar ne us pasulee ko jo us ne adam men se nikalee thee
Genesis2:23 aur adam ne kaha ab yah meree haddiyon men kee haddee aur mere mans men ka mans haai: so isaka nam naree hoga
Genesis2:24 is karan puroosh apane mata pita ko chhodkar apanee patnee se mila rahega aur ve aek tan banen rahenge.
Genesis2:25 aur adam aur usakee patnee donon nange the
Genesis3:1 yahova parameshvar ne jitane banaaile pashu banaae the
Genesis3:2 sree ne sarpa se kaha
Genesis3:3 par jo vraksha battkai ke beech men haai
Genesis3:4 tab sarpa ne sree se kaha
Genesis3:5 varan parameshvar ap janata haai
Genesis3:6 so jab sree ne dekha ki us vraksha ka fal khane men achchha
Genesis3:7 tab un donon kee ankhe khul gai
Genesis3:8 tab yahova parameshvar jo din ke ttnde samay baattkai men firata tha usaka shabd unako sunai diya. tab adam aur usakee patnee battkai ke vrakshaen ke beech yahova parameshvar se chhpai gaae.
Genesis3:9 tab yahova parameshvar ne pukarakar adam se poochha
Genesis3:10 us ne kaha
Genesis3:11 us ne kaha
Genesis3:12 adam ne kaha jis sree ko too ne mere sang rahane ko diya haai usee ne us vraksha ka fal mujhe diya
Genesis3:13 tab yahova parameshvar ne sree se kaha
Genesis3:14 tab yahova parameshvar ne sarpa se kaha
Genesis3:15 aur maai tere aur is sree ke beech me
Genesis3:16 fir sree se us ne kaha
Genesis3:17 aur adam se us ne kaha
Genesis3:18 aur vah tere liye kantte aur unttkattare ugaaegee
Genesis3:19 aur apane mathe ke paseene kee rottee khaya karega
Genesis3:20 aur adam ne apanee patnee ka nam havva rakha kyonaki jitane manushy jeevit haain un sab kee aadimata vahee hui.
Genesis3:21 aur yahova parameshvar ne adam aur usakee patnee ke liye chamade ke angarakhe banakar unako pahina diae.
Genesis3:22 fir yahova parameshvar ne kaha
Genesis3:23 tab yahova parameshvar ne usako adan kee battkai men se nikal diya ki vah us boomi par khetee kare jis me se vah banaya gaya tha.
Genesis3:24 isaliye adam ko us ne nikal diya aur jeevan ke vraksha ke marga ka pahara dene ke liye adan kee battkai ke poorva kee or karubon ko
Genesis4:1 jab adam apanee patnee havva ke pas gaya tab us ne garbhvatee hokar kaain ko janm diya aur kaha
Genesis4:2 fir vah usake bhai haabil ko bhee janmee
Genesis4:3 kuchh dinon ke pashchata kaain yahova ke pas boomi kee upaj men se kuchh bhentt le aya.
Genesis4:4 aur haabil bhee apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke kai aek pahilautte bachche bhentt chaddhane le aya aur unakee charbee bhentt chaddhai tab yahova ne habil aur usakee bhentt ko to grahan kiya
Genesis4:5 parantu kaain aur usakee bhentt ko us ne grahan n kiya. tab kaain ati krodhait hua
Genesis4:6 tab yahova ne kaain se kaha
Genesis4:7 yaadi too bhla kare
Genesis4:8 tab kaain ne apane bhai haabil se kuchh kaha: aur jab ve maaidan men the
Genesis4:9 tab yahova ne kaain se poochha
Genesis4:10 us ne kaha
Genesis4:11 isaliye ab boomi jis ne tere bhai ka lohoo tere hath se peene ke liye apana munh khola haai
Genesis4:12 chahe too boomi par khetee kare
Genesis4:13 tab kaain ne yahova se kaha
Genesis4:14 dek
Genesis4:15 is karan yahova ne us se kaha
Genesis4:16 tab kaain yahova ke sammukh se nikal gaya
Genesis4:17 jab kaain apanee patnee ke pas gaya jab vah garbhvatee hui aur hanok ko janmee
Genesis4:18 aur hanok se irad utpann hua
Genesis4:19 aur lemek ne do striayan byah lee: jin men se aek ka nam ada
Genesis4:20 aur ada ne yabal ko janm diya. vah tambuon men rahana aur janavaron ka palan in dono reeatiyon ka utpadak hua.
Genesis4:21 aur usake bhai ka nam yoobal haai: vah veena aur bansuree aadi bajon ke bajane kee saree reeti ka utpadak hua.
Genesis4:22 aur silla ne bhee toobalkaain nam aek putra ko janm diya: vah peetal aur lohe ke sab dhaaravale hathaiyaron ka gaddhnevala hua: aur toobalkaain kee baahin nama thee.
Genesis4:23 aur lemek ne apanee patnaiyon se kaha
Genesis4:24 jab kaain ka palatta sataguna liya jaaega. to lemek ka sataharaguna liya jaaega.
Genesis4:25 aur adam apanee patnee ke pas fir gaya aur us ne aek putra ko janm diya aur usaka nam yah kah ke shot rakha
Genesis4:26 aur shot ke bhee aek putra utpann hua aur us ne usaka nam aenosh rakha
Genesis5:1 adam kee vanshaavalee yah haai. jab parameshvar ne manushy kee srashtti kee tab apane hee svaroop men usako banaya
Genesis5:2 us ne nar aur naree karake manushyon kee sraashtti kee aur unhen ashaeesh dee
Genesis5:3 jab adam aek sau tees varsha ka hua
Genesis5:4 aur shot ke janm ke pashchata adam att sau varsha jeeavit raha
Genesis5:5 aur adam kee kul avastha nau sau tees varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:6 jab shot aek sau panch varsha ka hua
Genesis5:7 aur aenosh ke janm ke pashchata shot att sau sat varsha jeevit raha
Genesis5:8 aur shot kee kul avastha nau sau barah varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:9 jab aenosh nabbe varsha ka hua
Genesis5:10 aur kenan ke janm ke pashchata aenosh att sau pandrah varsha jeeavit raha
Genesis5:11 aur aenosh kee kul avastha nau sau panch varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:12 jab kenan sattr varsha ka hua
Genesis5:13 aur mahalalel ke janm ke pashchata kenan att sau chalees varsha jeeavit raha
Genesis5:14 aur kenan kee kul avastha nau sau das varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:15 jab mahalalel paainsatt varsha ka hua
Genesis5:16 aur yered ke janm ke pashchata mahalalel att sau tees varsha jeevit raha
Genesis5:17 aur mahalalel kee kul avastha att sau panchanave varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:18 jab yered aek sau basatt varsha ka hua
Genesis5:19 aur hanok ke janm ke pashchata yered att sau varsha jeevit raha
Genesis5:20 aur yered kee kul avastha nau sau basatt varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.
Genesis5:21 jab hanok paainsatt varsha ka hua
Genesis5:22 aur matoosholah ke janm ke pashchata hanok teen sau varsha tak parameshvar ke sath sath chalata raha
Genesis5:23 aur hanok kee kul avastha teen sau paainsatt varsha kee hui.
Genesis5:24 aur hanok parameshvar ke sath sath chalata tha fir vah lop ho gaya kyonaki parameshvar ne use utta liya.
Genesis5:25 jab matoosholah aek sau sattasee varsha ka hua
Genesis5:26 aur lemek ke janm ke pashchata matoosholah sat sau bayasee varsha jeeavit raha
Genesis5:27 aur matoosholah kee kul avastha nau sau unahattr varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:28 jab lemek aek sau bayasee varsha ka hua
Genesis5:29 aur yah kahakar usaka nam nooh rakha
Genesis5:30 aur nooh ke janm ke pashchata lemek panch sau panchanave varsha jeeavit raha
Genesis5:31 aur lemek kee kul avastha sat sau satahattr varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya..
Genesis5:32 aur nooh panch sau varsha ka hua aur nooh ne shom

Genesis11:1 saree prathvee par aek hee bhasha
Genesis11:2 us samay log poorva kee aur chalate chalate shainar desh men ek maaidan pakar us men bas gae.
Genesis11:3 tab ve apas men kahane lage
Genesis11:4 fir unhon ne kaha
Genesis11:5 jab log nagar aur gummatt banane lage tab inhen dekhne ke liye yahova utar aya.
Genesis11:6 aur yahova ne kaha
Genesis11:7 isaliye ao

Genesis11:9 is karan us nagar ko nam babul pada kyonki saree prathvee kee bhasha men jo gadbadee haai

Genesis23:3 tab ibraaheem apane murde ke pas se uttkar hitiayon se kahane laga
Genesis23:4 maain tumhare beech pahun aur paradeshaee hoon: mujhe apane madhy men kaabirstan ke liye aeesee boomi do jo meree nij kee ho jaa
Genesis23:5 hitiayon ne ibraaheem se kaha
Genesis23:6 he hamare prabhu
Genesis23:7 tab ibraaheem uttkar khda hua
Genesis23:8 yaadi tumharee yah ichchha ho ki maain apane murde ko gadke apanee ankh kee ott karoo
Genesis23:9 ki vah apanee makapelavalee gufaa
Genesis23:10 aur aepraen to hitiayon ke beech vahan baaitta hua tha. so jitane hittee usake nagar ke faattk se hokar bheetar jate the

Genesis23:12 tab ibraaheem ne us desh ke nivaasiyon ke samhane dandvat kee.

Genesis23:14 aepraen ne ibraaheem ko yah uttr diya
Genesis23:15 ki

Genesis23:18 jitane hittee usake nagar ke faattk se hokar bheetar jate the
Genesis23:19 isake pashchata ibraaheem ne apanee patnee sara ko

Genesis24:1 ibraaheem vraddh tha aur usakee ayu bahut bhee aur yahova ne sab baton men usako ashaeesh dee thee.
Genesis24:2 so ibraaheem ne apane us das se
Genesis24:3 aur mujh se akash aur prathvee ke parameshvar yahova kee is vishay men shapath kha
Genesis24:4 parantu too mere desh men mere hee kuttumbaiyon ke pas jakar mere putra isahak ke liye aek patnee le aaega.
Genesis24:5 das ne us se kaha
Genesis24:6 ibraaheem ne us se kaha
Genesis24:7 svarga ka parameshvar yahova
Genesis24:8 aur yaadi vah sree tere sath ana n chahe tab to too meree is shapath se choott jaaega: par mere putra ko vahan n le jana.
Genesis24:9 tab us das ne apane svamee ibraaheem kee jangha ke neeche apana hath rakhkar us se isee vishay kee shapath khai.
Genesis24:10 tab vah das apane svamee ke untto men se das untt chhnattkar usake sab uttm uttm padarthon men se kuchh kuchh lekar chala: aur masopottamiya men nahor ke nagar ke pas pahuncha.
Genesis24:11 aur us ne untton ko nagar ke bahar aek kuaen ke pas baaittaya
Genesis24:12 so vah kahane laga
Genesis24:13 dekh maain jal ke is sote ke pas khda hoon aur nagaravasiyon kee beattyaien jal bhrane ke liye nikalee atee haain:
Genesis24:14 so aeesa hone de
Genesis24:15 aur aeesa hua ki jab vah kah hee raha tha ki ribaka
Genesis24:16 vah aati sundar
Genesis24:17 tab vah das us se bhentt karane ko dauda
Genesis24:18 us ne kaha
Genesis24:19 jab vah usako pila chukee

Genesis24:21 aur vah puroosh usakee or chupachap achambhe ke sath takata hua yah sochata tha
Genesis24:22 jab untt pee chuke
Genesis24:23 aur poochha
Genesis24:24 us ne uttr diya
Genesis24:25 fir us ne us se kaha
Genesis24:26 tab us puroosh ne sir jhukakar yahova ko dandvata karake kaha
Genesis24:27 dhany haai mere svamee ibraaheem ka parameshvar yahova
Genesis24:28 aur us knya ne daudkar apanee mata ke ghar men yah sara vrattant kah sunaya.
Genesis24:29 tab laban jo ribaka ka bhai tha
Genesis24:30 aur aeesa hua ki jab us ne vah natth aur apanee baahin ribaka ke hathon men ve kangan bhee dekhe
Genesis24:31 us ne kaha
Genesis24:32 aur vah puroosh ghar men gaya aur laban ne untton kee kaattyaian kholakar pual aur chara diya aur usake

Genesis24:34 tak us ne kaha

Genesis24:36 aur mere svamee kee patnee sara ke buddhape men us se aek putra utpann hua haai. aur us putra ko ibraaheem ne apana sab kuchh de diya haai.
Genesis24:37 aur mere svamee ne mujhe yah shapath khailai
Genesis24:38 maain usake pita ke ghar
Genesis24:39 tab maain ne apane svamee se kaha
Genesis24:40 tab us ne mujh se kaha
Genesis24:41 too tab hee meree is shapath se choottega
Genesis24:42 so maain aj us kuen ke nikatt akar kahane laga
Genesis24:43 to dekh maain jal ke is kuen ke nikatt khda hoon so aeesa ho

Genesis24:45 maain man hee man yah kah hee raha tha

Genesis24:62 isahak jo daakkhian desh men rahata tha

Genesis31:16 so parameshvar ne hamare pita ka jitana dhan le liya haai
Genesis31:17 tab yakoob ne apane ladkebalon aur striayon ko untton par chaddhaya
Genesis31:18 aur jitane pashuuon ko vah panaram men ikattha karake dhanaddhy ho gaya tha
Genesis31:19 laban to apanee bhedon ka un katarane ke liye chala gaya tha. aur rahel apane pita ke grahadevataon ko chura le gai.
Genesis31:20 so yakoob laban aramee ke pas se choree se chala gaya
Genesis31:21 vah apana sab kuchh lekar bhaga: aur mahanad ke par utarakar apana munh gilad ke pahadee desh kee or kiya..
Genesis31:22 teesare din laban ko samachar mila
Genesis31:23 so us ne apane bhaiyon ko sath lekar usaka sat din tak peechha kiya

Genesis31:25 aur laban yakoob ke pas pahunch gaya
Genesis31:26 tab laban yakoob se kahane laga
Genesis31:27 too kyon chupake se bhag aya
Genesis31:28 too ne to mujhe apane bette beattyaien ko choomane tak n diya? too ne moorkhta kee haai.
Genesis31:29 tum logon kee hani karane kee shaktai mere hath men to haai par tumhare pita ke parameshvar ne mujh se beetee hui rat men kaha
Genesis31:30 bhla ab too apane pita ke ghar ka bada aabhailashaee hokar chala aya to chala aya
Genesis31:31 yakoob ne laban ko uttr diya
Genesis31:32 jis kisee ke pas too apane devataon ko paa
Genesis31:33 yah sunakar laban
Genesis31:34 rahel to grahadevataon ko untt kee kattee men rakhke un par baaittee thee. so laban ne usake sare tamboo men ttttolane par bhee unhen n paya.
Genesis31:35 rahel ne apane pita se kaha
Genesis31:36 tab yakoob krodhait hokar laban se jhgadne laga
Genesis31:37 too ne jo meree saree samagraee ko ttttolakar dekha
Genesis31:38 in bees vasharen se maai tere pas raha un men n to teree bhed-bakaariyon ke garbh gire
Genesis31:39 jise banaaile jantuon ne faad dala usako maain tere pas n lata tha
Genesis31:40 meree to yah dasha thee
Genesis31:41 bees varsha tak maain tere ghar men raho chaudah varsha to maai ne teree dono beattyaien ke liye
Genesis31:42 mere pita ka parameshvar arthata ibraaheem ka parameshvar

Genesis31:44 ab a maain aur too donon apas men vacha bandho
Genesis31:45 tab yakoob ne aek patthr lekar usaka khmbha khda kiya.

Genesis41:3 aur
Genesis41:4 tab ye kuroop aur durbal gayen un sat sundar aur mottee mottee gayon ko kha gai. tab firaun jag utta.
Genesis41:5 aur vah fir so gaya aur doosara svapn dekha
Genesis41:6 aur

Genesis50:12 aur israael ke putraen ne us se vahee kam kiya jisakee us ne unako agyaa dee thee:
Genesis50:13 arthata unhon ne usako kanan desh men le jakar makapela kee us boomivalee gufaa me
Genesis50:14 apane pita ko mittee dekar yoosufa apane bhaiyon aur un sab samet
Genesis50:15 jab yoosufa ke bhaiyon ne dekha ki hamara pita mar gaya haai
Genesis50:16 isaliye unhon ne yoosufa ke pas yah kahala bheja
Genesis50:17 ki tum log yoosufa se is prakar kahana
Genesis50:18 aur usake bhai ap bhee jakar usake samhane gir pade
Genesis50:19 yoosufa ne un se kaha
Genesis50:20 yadhypi tum logon ne mere liye burai ka vichar kiya tha parantu parameshvar ne usee bat men bhlai ka vichar kiya
Genesis50:21 so ab mat dro: maain tumhara aur tumhare bala-bachchon ka palan poshan karata rahoonga is prakar us ne unako samajha bujhakar shaaantai dee..
Genesis50:22 aur yoosufa apane pita ke gharane samet misr men rahata raha
Genesis50:23 aur yoosufa aepraaim ke parapoton tak dekhne paya: aur manashsho ke pote
Genesis50:24 aur yoosufa ne apane bhaiyon se kaha maain to marane par hoon parantu parameshvar nishchay tumharee suadhai lega
Genesis50:25 fir yoosufa ne israaeliyon se yah kahakar
Genesis50:26 nidan yoosufa aek sau das varsha ka hokar mar gaya: aur usakee loth men sugandhadravy bhre gaa

Exodus2:1 levee ke gharane ke aek puroosh ne aek levee vansh kee sree ko byah liya.

Exodus20:2 ki maai tera parameshvar yahova hoo
Exodus20:3 too mujhe chhod doosaron ko ishvar karake n manana..
Exodus20:4 too apane liye koi moorti khodakar n banana
Exodus20:5 too unako dandvata n karana

Exodus20:10 parantu satavan din tere parameshvar yahova ke liye vishraamadin haai. us men n to too kisee bhanti ka kam kaj karana
Exodus20:11 kyonaki chh: din men yahova ne akasha
Exodus20:12 too apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana
Exodus20:13 too koon n karana..

Exodus28:28 aur chaparas apanee kaadiyon ke dara aepod kee kaadiyon men neele faeete se bandhaee jaa
Exodus28:29 aur jab jab haroon pavitrasthan men pravesh kare
Exodus28:30 aur too nyay kee chaparas men ureem aur tummeem ko rakhna

Exodus28:32 aur usakee banavatt aeesee ho ki usake beech men sir dalane ke liye chhed ho
Exodus28:33 aur usake neechevale ghore men charon or neeele

Exodus28:35 aur haroon aek bage ko seva tthal karane ke samay pahina kare
Exodus28:36 fir chokhe sone ka aek tteeka banavana
Exodus28:37 aur use neele faeete se bandhana aur vah pagadee ke samhane ke hisse par rahe.
Exodus28:38 aur haroon ke mathe par rahe
Exodus28:39 aur angarakhe ko sooksham sanee ke kapade ka charakhana bunavana

Exodus36:1 aur basalel aur oholeeab aur sab buddhmaian jinako yahova ne aeesee buaddh iddh aur samajh dee ho
Exodus36:2 tab moosa ne basalel aur oholeeab aur sab buddhmaianon ko jinake day men yahova ne buaddh ika prakash diya tha
Exodus36:3 aur israaelee jo jo bhentt pavitrasthan kee sevakai ke kam aur usake banane ke liye le aae the
Exodus36:4 aur jitane buddhmaian paavitrasthan ka kam karate the ve sab apana apana kam chhodkar moosa ke pas aa
Exodus36:5 aur kahane lage
Exodus36:6 tab moosa ne saree chhavanee men is agyaa ka prachar karavaya
Exodus36:7 kyonaki sab kam banane ke liye jitana saman avashyak tha utana varan usase aadhaik banane valon ke pas a chuka tha..
Exodus36:8 aur kam karanevale jitane buddhmaian the unhon ne nivas ke liye battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ke
Exodus36:9 aek aek patt kee lambai atthais hath aur chaudai char hath kee hui sab patt aek hee nap ke bane.
Exodus36:10 us ne panch patt ek doosare se jod dia
Exodus36:11 aur jahan ye patt jode gaae vahan kee donon chhoron par us ne peelee neelee faaliyan lagain.
Exodus36:12 us ne donon chhoron men pachas pachas faaliyan is prakar lagai ki ve amhane-samhane hui.
Exodus36:13 aur us ne sone kee pachas ghaunadyaian banai
Exodus36:14 fir nivas ke upar ke tamboo ke liye us ne bakaree ke bal ke gyarah patt banaae.
Exodus36:15 aek aek patt kee lambai tees hath aur chaudai char hath kee hui aur gyarahon patt aek hee nap ke the.
Exodus36:16 in men se us ne panch patt alag aur chh: patt alag jod diae.
Exodus36:17 aur jahan donon jode gaae vahan kee chhoron men us ne pachas pachas faaliyan lagain.
Exodus36:18 aur us ne tamboo ke jodne ke liye peetal kee pachas ghaunadyaian bhee banai jis se vah aek ho jaae.
Exodus36:19 aur us ne tamboo ke liye lal rang se rangee hui menddhon kee khalon ka aek oddhna aur usake upar ke liye sooison kee khalon ka bhee aek oddhna banaya.
Exodus36:20 fir us ne nivas ke liye babool kee lakadee ke takhton ko khde rahane ke liye banaya.
Exodus36:21 aek aek takhte kee lambai das hath aur chaudai deddh hath kee hui.
Exodus36:22 aek aek takhte men aek doosaree se jodee hui do do choolen banee
Exodus36:23 aur us ne nivas ke liye takhton ko is reeati se banaya
Exodus36:24 aur in beeson takhton ke neeche chandee kee chalees kursiya
Exodus36:25 aur nivas kee doosaree alang
Exodus36:26 aur inake liye bhee us ne chandee kee chalees kursiya
Exodus36:27 aur nivas kee pichhlee alang
Exodus36:28 aur pichhlee alang men nivas ke konon ke liye us ne do takhte banaae.

Exodus37:18 aur deevatt se nikalee hui chh: daaliyan baneen teen daaliyan to usakee aek alang se aur teen daaliyan usakee doosaree alang se nikalee hui baneen.

Exodus38:1 fir us ne babool kee lakadee kee homabaali bhee banai usakee lambai panch hath aur chaudai panch hath kee thee is prakar se vah chaukor banee

Exodus40:11 aur paae samet haudee ka bhee abhaishok karake use pavitra karana.

Exodus40:28 aur us ne nivas ke dar par parde ko lagaya.

Leviticus1:4 aur vah apana hath homabaalipashu ke sir par rakhe
Leviticus1:5 tab vah us bachhde ko yahova ke samhane baali kare aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve lohoo ko sameep le jakar us vedee kee charon alangon par chhdike jo milapavale tamboo ke dar par haai.
Leviticus1:6 fir vah homabalipashu kee khal nikalakar us pashu ko ttukade ttukade kare
Leviticus1:7 tab haroon yajak ke putra vedee par ag rakhe
Leviticus1:8 aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve sir aur charabee samet pashu ke ttukadon ko us lakadee par jo vedee kee ag par hogee sajakar dharen
Leviticus1:9 aur vah usakee antaadiyon aur paairon ko jal se dhaeae. tab yajak sab ko vedee par jalaa
Leviticus1:10 aur yaadi vah bhedon va bakaron ka homabali chaddhaa

Leviticus2:3 aur annabali men se jo bacha rahe so haroon aur usake putraen ka tthare yah yahova ke havanon men se paramapavitra vastu hogee..

Leviticus4:19 aur vah bachhde kee kul charabee nikalakar vedee par jalaae.

Leviticus5:1 aur yaadi koi sakshaee hokar aeesa pap kare ki shapath khailakar poochhne par bhee
Leviticus5:2 aur yaadi koi kisee ashuuddh vastu ko agyaanata se choo le
Leviticus5:3 aur yaadi koi manushy kisee ashuuddh vastu ko agyaanata se choo le
Leviticus5:4 aur yaadi koi bura va bhla karane ko bina soche samajhe shapath khaa
Leviticus5:5 aur jab vah in baton men se kisee bhee bat men doshaee ho
Leviticus5:6 aur vah yahova ke samhane apana doshabali le aa
Leviticus5:7 aur yaadi use bhed va bakaree dene kee samathrya n ho
Leviticus5:8 aur vah unako yajak ke pas le aa
Leviticus5:9 aur vah papabaalipashu ke lohoo men se kuchh vedee kee alang par chhdike
Leviticus5:10 aur doosare pakshaee ko vah vidhaee ke anusar homabaali kare
Leviticus5:11 aur yaadi vah do pandukee va kabootaree ke do bachche bhee n de sake
Leviticus5:12 vah usako yajak ke pas le jaa
Leviticus5:13 aur in baton men se kisee bhee bat ke vishay men jo koi pap kare
Leviticus5:14 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus5:15 yaadi koi yahova kee paavitra kee hui vastuon ke vishay men bool se vishvasaghaat kare aur papee tthare
Leviticus5:16 aur jis pavitra vastu ke vishay us ne pap kiya ho
Leviticus5:17 aur yaadi koi aeesa pap kare
Leviticus5:18 isaliye vah aek nirdosh meddha doshabaali karake yajak ke pas le aa
Leviticus5:19 yah doshabaali tthare kyonki vah manushy ni:sandeh yahova ke sammukh doshaee ttharega..
Leviticus6:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus6:2 yaadi koi yahova ka vishvasaghaat karake papee tthare
Leviticus6:3 va padee hui vastu ko pakar usake vishay joott bole aur joottee shapath bhee khaae aeesee koi bhee bat kyon n ho jise karake manushy papee ttharate haai
Leviticus6:4 to jab vah aeesa kam karake doshaee ho jaa
Leviticus6:5 chahe koi vastu kyon n ho jisake vishay men us ne joottee shapath khai ho to vah usako poora poora lautta de
Leviticus6:6 aur vah yahova ke sammukh apana doshabaali bhee le aa
Leviticus6:7 is prakar yajak usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare
Leviticus6:8 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus6:9 haroon aur usake putraen ko agyaa dekar yah kah
Leviticus6:10 aur yajak apane sanee ke vasr aur apane tan par apanee sanee kee janghaiya paahinakar homabali kee rak
Leviticus6:11 tab vah apane vasr utarakar doosare vasr paahinakar rakh ko chhavanee se bahar kisee shuuddh sthan par le jaae.
Leviticus6:12 aur vedee par agnai jalatee rahe
Leviticus6:13 vedee par ag lagatar jalatee rahe vah kabhee bujhne n paae..
Leviticus6:14 annabali kee vyavastha is prakar haai
Leviticus6:15 aur vah annabali ke tel mile huae maaide men se mutthee bhr aur us par ka sab loban uttakar annabaali ke smaranarth ke is bhag ko yahova ke sammukh sukhdayak sugandha ke liye vedee par jalaae.
Leviticus6:16 aur us men se jo shosh rah jaae use haroon aur usake putra kha jaaen vah bina khmeer pavitra sthan men khaya jaa
Leviticus6:17 vah khmeer ke sath pakaya n jaae kyonaki maain ne apane havy men se usako unaka nij bhag hone ke liye unhen diya haai isaaliye jaaisa papabaali aur doshabali paramapaavitra haai vaaisa hee vah bhee haai.
Leviticus6:18 haroon ke vansh ke sab puroosh us men se kha sakate haain tumharee peeddhee-peeddhee men yahova ke havanon men se yah unaka bhag sadaaiv bana rahega jo koi un havanon ko chooae vah paavitra ttharega..
Leviticus6:19 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus6:20 jis din haroon ka aabhaishok ho us din vah apane putraen ke sath yahova ko yah chaddhava chaddhaae arthata aepa ka dasavan bhag maaida nity annabali men chaddhaa
Leviticus6:21 vah tave par tel ke sath pakaya jaae jab vah tel se tar ho jaae tab use le ana
Leviticus6:22 aur usake putraen men se jo bhee us yajakapad par abhaishaikt hoga
Leviticus6:23 yajak ke sampoorn annabaali bhee sab jalaae jaaen vah kabhee n khaya jaae..
Leviticus6:24 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus6:25 haroon aur usake putraen se yah kah
Leviticus6:26 aur jo yajak papabali chaddhave vah use khaae vah paavitra sthan me
Leviticus6:27 jo kuchh usake mans se choo jaa
Leviticus6:28 aur vah mittee ka patra jis men vah pakaya gaya ho tod diya jaae yaadi vah peetal ke patra men sijhaya gaya ho
Leviticus6:29 aur yajakon men se sab puroosh use kha sakate haain
Leviticus6:30 par jis papabalipashu ke lohoo men se kuchh bhee koon milapavale tamboo ke bheetar paavitrasthan men praayaashchaitt karane ko pahunchaya jaae tab to usaka mans kabhee n khaya jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae..
Leviticus7:1 fir doshabali kee vyavastha yah haai. vah paramapavitra haai
Leviticus7:2 jis sthan par homabaalipashu ka vadha karate haain usee sthan par doshabalipashu ka bhee bali kare
Leviticus7:3 aur vah us men kee sab charabee ko chaddhaa
Leviticus7:4 aur donon gurde aur jo charabee unake upar aur kamar ke pas rahatee haai
Leviticus7:5 aur yajak inhen vedee par yahova ke liye havan kare tab vah doshabaali hoga.
Leviticus7:6 yajakon men ke sab puroosh us men se kha sakate haain vah kisee paavitrasthan men khaya jaae kyonki vah paramapaavitra haai.
Leviticus7:7 jaaisa papabaali haai vaaisa hee doshabali bhee haai
Leviticus7:8 aur jo yajak kisee ke liye homabaali ko chaddhaae us homabalipashu kee khal ko vahee yajak le le.
Leviticus7:9 aur tandoor me
Leviticus7:10 aur sab annabali
Leviticus7:11 aur melabaali kee jise koi yahova ke liye chaddhaae vyavastha yah haai.
Leviticus7:12 yaadi vah use dhanyavad ke liye chaddhaa
Leviticus7:13 aur vah apane dhanyavadavale melabaali ke sath akhmeeree rottyaia
Leviticus7:14 aur aeese aek aek chaddhave men se vah aek aek rottee yahova ko uttane kee bhentt karake chaddhaae vah melabali ke lohoo ke chhdikanevale yajak kee hogee.
Leviticus7:15 aur us dhanyavadavale melabaali ka mans baalidan chaddhane ke din hee khaya jaae us men se kuchh bhee bhor tak shosh n rah jaae.
Leviticus7:16 par yaadi usake balidan ka chaddhava mannat ka va svechchha ka ho
Leviticus7:17 parantu jo kuchh balidan ke mans men se teesare din tak rah jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae.
Leviticus7:18 aur usake melabaali ke mans men se yaadi kuchh bhee teesare din khaya jaa
Leviticus7:19 fir jo mans kisee ashuuddh vastu se choo jaae vah n khaya jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae. fir melabali ka mans jitane shuuddh hon ve hee khaae
Leviticus7:20 parantu jo ashuuddh hokar yahova ke melabaali ke mans men se kuchh khaae vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaae.
Leviticus7:21 aur yaadi koi kisee ashuuddh vastu ko chookar yahova ke melabaalipashu ke mans men se khaa
Leviticus7:22 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus7:23 israaeliyon se is prakar kah
Leviticus7:24 aur jo pashu svayan mar jaa
Leviticus7:25 jo koi aeese pashu kee charabee khaaega jis men se log kuchh yahova ke liye havan karake chaddhaya karate haain vah khanevala apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega.
Leviticus7:26 or tum apane ghar men kisee bhanti ka loho
Leviticus7:27 har aek praanee jo kisee bhanti ka lohoo khaaega vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega..
Leviticus7:28 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus7:29 israaeliyon se is prakar kah
Leviticus7:30 vah apane hee hathon se yahova ke havy ko
Leviticus7:31 aur yajak charabee ko to vedee par jalaa
Leviticus7:32 fir tum apane melabaliyon men se daahinee jangha ko bhee uttane kee bhentt karake yajak ko dena
Leviticus7:33 haroon ke putraen men se jo melabali ke lohoo aur charabee ko chaddhaae daahinee jangha usee ko bhag hoga.
Leviticus7:34 kyonaki israaeliyon ke melabaaliyon men se hilane kee bhentt kee chhatee aur uttane kee bhentt kee jangha ko lekar maain ne yajak haroon aur usake putraen ko diya haai
Leviticus7:35 jis din haroon aur usake putra yahova ke sameep yajak pad ke liye aae gaae usee din yahova ke havyon men se unaka yahee aabhaishaikt bhag ttharaya gaya
Leviticus7:36 arthata jis din yahova ne usaka abhaishok kiya usee din us ne agyaa dee ki unako israaeliyon kee or se ye hee bhag nit mila karen unakee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye unaka yahee hak ttharaya gaya.
Leviticus7:37 homabaali
Leviticus7:38 jab yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas ke jangal men moosa ko agyaa dee ki israaelee mere liye kya kya chaddhave chaddhaae
Leviticus8:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus8:2 too haroon aur usake putraen ke vasre
Leviticus8:3 milapavale tamboo ke dar par le a
Leviticus8:4 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne kiya aur mandlee milapavale tamboo ke dar par ikatthee hui.
Leviticus8:5 tab moosa ne mandlee se kaha
Leviticus8:6 fir moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen ko sameep le jakar jal se nahalaya.
Leviticus8:7 tab us ne unako angarakha paahinaya
Leviticus8:8 aur us ne unake chaparas lagakar chamaras men ureem aur tummeem rakh diae.
Leviticus8:9 tab us ne usake sir par pagadee bandhakar pagadee ke samhane par sone ke tteeke ko
Leviticus8:10 tab moosa ne aabhaishok ka tel lekar nivas ka aur jo kuchh us men tha un sab ko bhee aabhaishok karake unhen paavitra kiya.
Leviticus8:11 aur us tel men se kuchh us ne vedee par sat bar chhdika
Leviticus8:12 aur us ne aabhaishok ke tel men se kuchh haroon ke sir par dalakar usaka abhaishok karake use pavitra kiya.
Leviticus8:13 fir moosa ne haroon ke putraen ko sameep le akar
Leviticus8:14 tab vah papabaali ke bachhde ko sameep le gaya aur haroon aur usake putraen ne apane apane hath papabali ke bachhde ke sir par rakhen
Leviticus8:15 tab vah baali kiya gaya
Leviticus8:16 aur moosa ne antaadiyon par kee sab charabee
Leviticus8:17 or bachhde men se jo kuchh shosh rah gaya usako
Leviticus8:18 fir vah homabali ke meddhe ko sameep le gaya
Leviticus8:19 tab vah baali kiya gaya
Leviticus8:20 kiya gaya
Leviticus8:21 tab antaadiyan aur panv jal se dhaeye gaa
Leviticus8:22 fir vah doosare meddhe ko jo sanskar ka meddha tha sameep le gaya
Leviticus8:23 tab vah baali kiya gaya
Leviticus8:24 aur vah haroon ke putraen ko sameep le gaya
Leviticus8:25 aur us ne charabee
Leviticus8:26 or akhmeeree rottee kee ttokaree jo yahova ke age rakhee gai thee us men se aek rottee
Leviticus8:27 aur ye sab vastuaen haroon aur usake putraen ke hathon par dhar dee gai
Leviticus8:28 aur moosa ne unhen fir unake hathon par se lekar unhen vedee par homabaali ke upar jalaya
Leviticus8:29 tab moosa ne chhatee ko lekar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke age hilaya aur sanskar ke meddhen men se moosa ka bhag yahee hua jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.
Leviticus8:30 aur moosa ne aabhaishok ke tel or vedee par ke loho
Leviticus8:31 aur moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen se kaha
Leviticus8:32 aur mans aur rottee men se jo shosh rah jaae use ag men jala dena.
Leviticus8:33 aur jab tak tumhare sanskar ke din poore n hon tab tak
Leviticus8:34 jis prakar aj kiya gaya haai vaaisa hee karane kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai
Leviticus8:35 isaliye tum milapavale tamboo ke dar par sat din tak din rat tthare rahana
Leviticus8:36 tab yahova kee inheen sab agyaaon ke anusar jo us ne moosa ke dara dee theen haroon or usake putraen ne unaka palan kiya..
Leviticus9:1 attven din moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen ko aur israaelee puraniyon ko bulavakar haroon se kaha
Leviticus9:2 papabaali ke liye aek nirdosh bachhda
Leviticus9:3 aur israaeliyon se yah kah
Leviticus9:4 aur melabaali ke liye yahova ke sammukh chaddhane ke liye aek baail aur aek meddha
Leviticus9:5 aur jis jis vastu kee agyaa moosa ne dee un sab ko ve milapavale tamboo ke age le aae aur saree mandlee sameep jakar yahova ke samhane khdee hui.
Leviticus9:6 tab moosa ne kaha
Leviticus9:7 aur moosa ne haroon se kaha
Leviticus9:8 isaliye haroon ne vedee ke sameep jakar apane papabaali ke bachhde ko baalidan kiya.
Leviticus9:9 aur haroon ke putra lohoo ko usake pas le gaa
Leviticus9:10 aur papabaali men kee charabee aur gurdon n aur kaleje par kee jhlilee ko us ne vedee par jalaya
Leviticus9:11 aur mans aur khal ko us ne chhavanee se bahar ag men jalaya.
Leviticus9:12 tab homabaalipashu ko balidan kiya aur haroon ke putraen ne lohoo ko usake hath men diya
Leviticus9:13 tab unhon ne homabaalipashu ka ttukada ttukada karake sir sahit usake hath men de diya aur us ne unako vedee par jala diya.
Leviticus9:14 aur us ne antaadiyon aur panvon ko dhaekar vedee par homabali ke upar jalaya.
Leviticus9:15 aur us ne logon ke chaddhave ko age lekar aur us papabaali ke bakare ko jo unake liye tha lekar usaka balidan kiya
Leviticus9:16 aur us ne homabaali ko bhee sameep le jakar vidhai ke anusar chaddhaya.
Leviticus9:17 aur annabali ko bhee sameep le jakar us men se mutthee bhr vedee par jalaya
Leviticus9:18 aur baail aur meddha
Leviticus9:19 aur unhon ne baail kee charabee ko
Leviticus9:20 aur unhon ne charabee ko chhaatiyon par rakha aur us ne vah charabee vedee par jalai
Leviticus9:21 parantu chhatiyon aur daahinee jangha ko haroon ne moosa kee agyaa ke anusar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilaya.
Leviticus9:22 tab haroon ne logon kee or hath baddhakar unahen ashaeervad diya aur papabaali
Leviticus9:23 tab moosa aur haroon milapavale tamboo men gaa
Leviticus9:24 aur yahova ke samhane se ag nikalakar charabee saahit homabali ko vedee par bhsm kar diya ise dekhkar janata ne jay jayakar ka nara mara
Leviticus10:1 tab nadab aur abeehoo namak haroon ke do putraen ne apana apana dhoopadan liya
Leviticus10:2 tab yahova ke sammukh se ag nikalakar un donon ko bhsm kar diya
Leviticus10:3 tab moosa ne haroon se kaha
Leviticus10:4 tab moosa ne meeshaaael aur aelasafaan ko jo haroon ke chacha ujjeeael ke putra the bulakar kaha
Leviticus10:5 moosa kee is agyaa ke anusar ve nikatt jakar unako angarakhon sahit uttakar chhavanee ke bahar le gaae.
Leviticus10:6 tab moosa ne haroon se aur usake putra aeleeajar aur itamar se kaha
Leviticus10:7 aur tum log milapavale tamboo ke dar ke bahar n jana
Leviticus10:8 fir yahova ne haroon se kaha
Leviticus10:9 ki jab jab too va tere putra milapavale tamboo men aaen tab tab tum men se koi n to dakhmadha piae ho n aur kisee prakar ka madh
Leviticus10:10 jis se tum pavitra aur apavitra me
Leviticus10:11 aur israaeliyon ko un sab vidhaiyon ko sikha sako jise yahova ne moosa ke dara unako sunava dee haain..
Leviticus10:12 fir moosa ne haroon se aur usake bache huae donon putra itamar aur aeleeajar se bhee kaha
Leviticus10:13 aur tum use kisee paavitrasthan men khao
Leviticus10:14 aur hilai hui bhentt kee chhatee aur uttai hui bhentt kee jangha ko tum log
Leviticus10:15 charabee ke havyon samet jo uttai hui jangha aur hilai hui chhatee yahova ke samhane hilane ke liye aya karengee
Leviticus10:16 fir moosa ne papabali ke bakare kee jo ddoonddh-ddhanddh kee
Leviticus10:17 ki papabali jo paramapaavitra haai aur jise yahova ne tumhe isaliye diya haai ki tum mandlee ke adharma ka bhar apane par uttakar unake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt karo
Leviticus10:18 dekho
Leviticus10:19 isaka uttr haroon ne moosa ko is prakar diya
Leviticus10:20 jab moosa ne yah suna tab use santosh hua..
Leviticus11:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Leviticus11:2 israaeliyon se kaho
Leviticus11:3 pashuuon men se jitane chire va fatte khur ke hote haain aur pagur karate haain unhen kha sakate ho.
Leviticus11:4 parantu pagur karanevale va fatte khuravalon men se in pashuuon ko n khana
Leviticus11:5 aur shaapan
Leviticus11:6 aur khraha
Leviticus11:7 aur sooar
Leviticus11:8 inake mans men se kuchh n khana
Leviticus11:9 fir jitane jalajantu haain un men se tum inhen kha sakate ho
Leviticus11:10 aur jalacharee praaanaiyon men se jitane jeevadhaaree bina pankh aur chonyette ke samudra va naadiyon men rahate haain ve sab tumhare liye gharanait haain.
Leviticus11:11 ve tumhare liye gharanait ttharen tum unake mans men se kuchh n khana
Leviticus11:12 jal men jis kisee jantu ke pankh aur chonyette naheen hote vah tumhare liye ashuuddh haai..
Leviticus11:13 fir pakshiayon men se inako ashuuddh janana
Leviticus11:14 shaahee
Leviticus11:15 aur bhanti bhanati ke sab kag
Leviticus11:16 shuuturmurga
Leviticus11:17 havasil
Leviticus11:18 rajahas
Leviticus11:19 lagalag
Leviticus11:20 jitane pankhvale char panvon ke bal charate haain ve sab tumhare liye ashuuddh haain.
Leviticus11:21 par renganevale aur pankhvale jo char panvon ke bal chalate haai
Leviticus11:22 ve ye haai
Leviticus11:23 parantu aur sab renganevale pankhvale jo char panvavale hote haain ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain..
Leviticus11:24 aur inake karan tum ashuuddh ttharoge jis kisee se inakee loth choo jaae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh tthare.
Leviticus11:25 aur jo koi inakee loth men ka kuchh bhee uttaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Leviticus11:26 fir jitane pashu chire khur ke hote haai. parantu n to bilakul fatte khur aur pagur karanevale haain ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi unhen chooae vah ashuuddh haain jo koi unhen chooae vah ashuuddh ttharega.
Leviticus11:27 aur char panv ke bal chalanevalon men se jitane panjon ke bal chalate haain ve sab tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi unakee loth chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Leviticus11:28 aur jo koi unakee loth uttaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe kyonaki ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain..
Leviticus11:29 aur jo prathvee par rengate haain un men se ye renganevale tumhare liye ashuuddh haai
Leviticus11:30 aur chhpaikalee
Leviticus11:31 sab renganevalon men se ye hee tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi inakee loth chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Leviticus11:32 aur in men se kisee kee loth jis kisee vastu par pad jaae vah bhee ashuuddh tthare
Leviticus11:33 aur yaadi mittee ka koi patra ho jis men in jantuon men se koi pade
Leviticus11:34 us men jo khane ke yogy bhojan ho
Leviticus11:35 aur yaadi inakee loth men ka kuchh tandoor va choolhe par pade to vah bhee ashuuddh tthare
Leviticus11:36 parantu sota va talab jis men jal ikattha ho vah to shuuddh hee rahe parantu jo koi inakee loth ko chooae vah ashuuddh tthare.
Leviticus11:37 aur yaadi inakee loth men ka kuchh kisee prakar ke beej par jo bone ke liye ho pade
Leviticus11:38 par yaadi beej par jal dala gaya ho aur peechhe loth men ka kuchh us par pad jaa
Leviticus11:39 fir jin pashuuon ke khane kee agyaa tum ko dee gai haai yadi un men se koi pashu mare
Leviticus11:40 aur usakee loth men se jo koi kuchh khaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe aur jo koi usakee loth uttaae vah bhee apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Leviticus11:41 aur sab prakar ke prathvee par renganevale jantu ghainaune haain ve khaae n jaaen.
Leviticus11:42 prathvee par sab renganevalon men se jitane pett va char panvon ke bal chalate haai
Leviticus11:43 tum kisee prakar ke renganevale jantu ke dara apane ap ko ghainauna n karana aur n unake dara apane ko ashuuddh karake apavitra ttharana.
Leviticus11:44 kyonaki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon is prakar ke renganevale jantu ke dara jo prathvee par chalata haai apane ap ko ashuuddh n karana.
Leviticus11:45 kyonaki maain vah yahova hoon jo tumhen misr desh se isaliye nikal le aya hoon ki tumhara parameshvar ttharoon isaaliye tum paavitra bano
Leviticus11:46 pashuuo
Leviticus11:47 ki shuuddh ashuuddh aur bhkshay aur abhkshay jeevadhaaariyon men bhed kiya jaae..

Leviticus12:2 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus12:3 aur attven din ladke ka khtana kiya jaae.
Leviticus12:4 fir vah sree apane shuuddh karanevale roodhair men tentees din rahe aur jab tak usake shuuddh ho jane ke din poore n hon tab tak vah n to kisee paavitra vastu ko chhua
Leviticus12:5 aur yaadi usake ladkee paaida ho
Leviticus12:6 aur jab usake shuuddh ho jane ke din poore ho
Leviticus12:7 tab yajak usako yahova ke samhane bhentt chaddhake usake liye praayaashchaitt kare aur vah apane roodhair ke bahane kee ashuuddhta se choottkar shuuddh ttharegee. jis sree ke ladka va ladkee utpann ho usake liye yahee vyavastha haai.
Leviticus12:8 aur yaadi usake pas bhed va bakaree dene kee poonjee n ho

Leviticus13:2 jab kisee manushy ke shareer ke charma men soojan va papadee va fool ho
Leviticus13:3 jab yajak usake charma kee vyadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:4 aur yaadi vah fool usake charma men ujala to ho

Leviticus13:6 aur sataven din yajak usako fir dekhe
Leviticus13:7 aur yaadi yajak kee us janch ke pashchata jis men vah shuuddh ttharaya gaya tha
Leviticus13:8 aur yaadi yajak ko dekh pade ki papadee charma men faail gai haai
Leviticus13:9 yaadi koddh kee see vyadhai kisee manushy ke ho
Leviticus13:10 aur yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:11 to yajak jane ki usake charma men purana koddh haai
Leviticus13:12 aur yaadi koddh kisee ke charma men foottkar yahan tak faail jaa
Leviticus13:13 jo yajak dhyan se dekhe
Leviticus13:14 par jab us men charmaheen mans dekh pade
Leviticus13:15 aur yajak charmaheen mans ko dekhkar usako ashuuddh ttharaae kayonaki vaaisa charmaheen mans ashuuddh hee hota haai vah koddh haai.
Leviticus13:16 par yaadi vah charmaheen mans fir ujala ho jaa
Leviticus13:17 aur yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:18 fir yadi kisee ke charma men faoda hokar changa ho gaya ho
Leviticus13:19 aur faode ke sthan men ujalee see soojan va lalee liye huae ujala fool ho
Leviticus13:20 aur yajak us soojan ko dekhe
Leviticus13:21 aur yaadi yajak dekhe ki us men ujale roaen naheen haai
Leviticus13:22 aur yaadi vah vyaadhai us samay tak charma men sachamuch faail jaa
Leviticus13:23 parantu yadi vah fool n faaile aur apane sthan hee par bana rahe
Leviticus13:24 fir yadi kisee ke charma men jalane ka ghaav ho
Leviticus13:25 to yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:26 aur yaadi yajak dekhe
Leviticus13:27 aur sataven din yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:28 parantu yadi vah fool charma men naheen faaila aur apane sthan hee par jahan ka tahan hee bana ho
Leviticus13:29 fir yadi kisee puroosh va sree ke sir par
Leviticus13:30 to yajak vyaadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:31 aur yaadi yajak senhuaen kee vyadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:32 aur sataven din yajak vyadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:33 to yah manushy moonda jaa
Leviticus13:34 aur sataven din yajak sehuen ko dekhe
Leviticus13:35 aur yaadi usake shuuddh ttharane ke pashchata senhuan charma men kuchh bhee faaile
Leviticus13:36 to yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:37 parantu yadi usakee drashtti men vah senhuan jaaise ka taaisa bana ho
Leviticus13:38 fir yadi kisee puroosh va sree ke charma men ujale fool ho
Leviticus13:39 to yajak dekhe
Leviticus13:40 fir jisake sir ke bal jhd gaae ho
Leviticus13:41 aur jisake sir ke age ke bal jhd gaae ho
Leviticus13:42 parantu yadi chandule sir par va chandule mathe par lalee liye huae ujalee vyaadhai ho
Leviticus13:43 isaliye yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:44 to vah manushy koddhee haai aur ashuuddh haai aur yajak usako avashy ashuuddh ttharaae kyonaki vah vyaadhai usake sir par haai..
Leviticus13:45 aur jis men vah vyaadhai ho us koddhee ke vasr fatte aur sir ke bal bikhre rahe
Leviticus13:46 jitane din tak vah vyaadhai us men rahe utane din tak vah to ashuuddh rahega aur vah ashuuddh tthara rahe isaliye vah akela raha kare
Leviticus13:47 fir jis vasr men koddh kee vyaadhai ho
Leviticus13:48 vah vyadhai chahe us sanee va un ke vasr ke tane men ho chahe bane me
Leviticus13:49 yaadi vah vyaadhai kisee vasr ke chahe tane men chahe bane me
Leviticus13:50 aur yajak vyaadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:51 aur sataven din vah us vyaadhai ko dekhe
Leviticus13:52 vah us vasr ko jisake tane va bane men vah vyaadhai ho
Leviticus13:53 aur yaadi yajak dekhe ki vah vyaadhai us vasr ke tane va bane me
Leviticus13:54 to jis vastu men vyaadhai ho usake dhaene kee agyaa de
Leviticus13:55 aur usake dhaene ke bad yajak usako dekhe
Leviticus13:56 aur yaadi yajak dekhe
Leviticus13:57 aur yaadi vah vyaadhai tab bhee us vasr ke tane va bane me
Leviticus13:58 aur yaadi us vasr se jisake tane va bane men vyaadhai ho
Leviticus13:59 un va sanee ke vasr men ke tane va bane me
Leviticus14:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus14:2 koddhee ke shuuddh ttharane kee vyavastha yah haai
Leviticus14:3 aur yajak chhavanee ke bahar jaa
Leviticus14:4 to yajak agyaa de ki shuuddh ttharane vale ke liye do shuuddh aur jeevit pakshae
Leviticus14:5 aur yajak agyaa de ki aek pakshaee bahate huae jal ke upar mittee ke patra men bali kiya jaae.
Leviticus14:6 tab vah jeeavit pakshaee ko devadaroo kee lakadee aur lal rang ke kapade aur joofaa in sabhon ko lekar aek sang us pakshaee ke lohoo men jo bahate huae jal ke upar baali kiya gaya haai duba de
Leviticus14:7 aur koddh se shuuddh ttharanevale par sat bar chhdikakar usako shuuddh ttharaa
Leviticus14:8 aur shuuddh ttharanevala apane vasren ko dhaea
Leviticus14:9 aur sataven din vah sir
Leviticus14:10 aur attven din vah do nirdosh bhed ke bachche
Leviticus14:11 aur shuuddh ttharanevala yajak in vastuon samet us shuuddh honevale manushy ko yahova ke sammukh milapavale tamboo ke dar par khda kare.
Leviticus14:12 tab yajak aek bhed ka bachcha lekar doshabali ke liye use aur us loj bhr tel ko sameep laa
Leviticus14:13 tab yajak aek bhed ke bachche ko usee sthan men jahan vah papabali aur homabali pashuuon ka baalidan kiya karega
Leviticus14:14 tab yajak doshabali ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar shuuddh ttharanevale ke dahine kan ke sire par
Leviticus14:15 aur yajak us loj bhr tel men se kuchh lekar apane baaen hath kee hathelee par dale
Leviticus14:16 aur yajak apane dahine hath kee ungalee ko apane bain hathelee par ke tel men dubakar us tel men se kuchh apanee ungalee se yahova ke sammukh sat bar chhdike.
Leviticus14:17 aur jo tel usakee hathelee par rah jaaega yajak us men se kuchh shuuddh honevale ke daahine kan ke sire par
Leviticus14:18 aur jo tel yajak kee hathelee par rah jaae usako vah shuuddh honevale ke sir par dal de. aur yajak usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare.
Leviticus14:19 aur yajak papabali ko bhee chaddhakar usake liye jo apanee ashuuddhta se shuuddh honevala ho praayaashchaitt kare aur usake bad homabaali pashu ka baalidan karake:
Leviticus14:20 annabali samet vedee par chaddhaae: aur yajak usake liye praayaashchaitt kare
Leviticus14:21 parantu yadi vah daridra ho aur itana lane ke liye usake pas poonjee n ho
Leviticus14:22 aur do panduk
Leviticus14:23 aur attven din vah in sabhon ko apane shuuddh ttharane ke liye milapavale tamboo ke dar par
Leviticus14:24 tab yajak us loj bhr tel aur dosh baalivale bhed ke bachche ko lekar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilaae.
Leviticus14:25 fir doshabali ke bhed ke bachche ka baalidan kiya jaae aur yajak usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar shuuddh ttharanevale ke dahine kan ke sire par
Leviticus14:26 fir yajak us tel men se kuchh apane baaen hath kee hathelee par dalakar
Leviticus14:27 apane daahine hath kee ungalee se apanee bain hathelee par ke tel meen se kuchh yahova ke sammukh sat bar chhdike
Leviticus14:28 fir yajak apanee hathelee par ke tel men se kuchh shuuddh ttharanevale ke daahine kan ke sire par
Leviticus14:29 aur jo tel yajak kee hathelee par rah jaae use vah shuuddh ttharanevale ke liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt karane ko usake sir par dal de.
Leviticus14:30 tab vah pandukon va kabootaree ke bachchon men se jo vah la saka ho aek ko chaddhaa
Leviticus14:31 arthata jo pakshaee vah la saka ho
Leviticus14:32 jise koddh kee vyaadhai hui ho
Leviticus14:33 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Leviticus14:34 jab tum log kanan desh men pahuncho
Leviticus14:35 to jisaka vah ghar ho vah akar yajak ko bata de
Leviticus14:36 tab yajak agyaa de
Leviticus14:37 tab vah us vyadhai ko dekhe aur yaadi vah vyaadhai ghar kee deevaron par haree haree va lal lal manon khudee hui lakeeron ke roop men ho
Leviticus14:38 to yajak ghar se bahar dar par jakar ghar ko sat din tak band kar rakhe.
Leviticus14:39 aur sataven din yajak akar dekhe aur yaadi vah vyaadhai ghar kee deevaron par faail gai ho
Leviticus14:40 to yajak agyaa de
Leviticus14:41 aur vah ghar ke bheetar hee bheetar charon or khurachavaa
Leviticus14:42 aur un patthron ke sthan men aur doosare patthr lekar lagaaen aur yajak taja gara lekar ghar kee judai kare.
Leviticus14:43 aur yaadi patthron ke nikale jane aur ghar ke khurache aur lese jane ke bad vah vyadhai fir ghar men foott nikale
Leviticus14:44 to yajak akar dekhe aur yadi vah vyaadhai ghar men faail gai ho
Leviticus14:45 aur vah sab gare samet patthr
Leviticus14:46 aur jab tak vah ghar band rahe tab tak yaadi koi us men jaae to vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe
Leviticus14:47 aur jo koi us ghar men soae vah apane vasren ko dhaeae aur jo koi us ghar men khana khaae vah bhee apane vasren ko dhaeae.
Leviticus14:48 aur yaadi yajak akar dekhe ki jab se ghar lesa gaya haai tab se us men vyaadhai naheen faailee haai
Leviticus14:49 aur us ghar ko paavitra karane ke liye do pakshae
Leviticus14:50 aur aek pakshaee bahate huae jal ke upar mittee ke patra men balidan kare
Leviticus14:51 tab vah devadaroo kee lakadee lal rang ke kapade aur joofaa aur jeevit pakshaee in sabhon ko lekar baalidan kiae huae pakshaee ke lohoo men aur bahate huae jal men ooba de
Leviticus14:52 aur vah pakshaee ke loho
Leviticus14:53 tab vah jeeavit pakshaee ko nagar se bahar maaidan men chhod de isee reeati se vah ghar ke liye praayaashchaitt kare
Leviticus14:54 sab bhanti ke koddh kee vyadhai
Leviticus14:55 aur vasr
Leviticus14:56 aur soojan
Leviticus14:57 shuuddh aur ashuuddh ttharane kee shaiksha kee vyavastha yahee haai. sab prakar ke koddh kee vyavastha yahee haai..
Leviticus15:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus15:2 ki israaeliyon se kaho
Leviticus15:3 aur chahe bahata rahe
Leviticus15:4 jisake prameh ho vah jis jis bichhaune par lette vah ashuuddh tthare
Leviticus15:5 aur jo koi usake bichhaune ko chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare
Leviticus15:6 aur jisake prameh ho aur vah jis vastu par baaitta ho
Leviticus15:7 aur jisake prameh ho us se jo koi choo jaae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Leviticus15:8 aur jisake prameh ho yaadi vah kisee shuuddh manushy par tooke
Leviticus15:9 aur jisake prameh ho vah savaree kee jis vastu par baaitte vah ashuuddh tthare.
Leviticus15:10 aur jo koi kisee vastu ko jo usake neeche rahee ho chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare
Leviticus15:11 aur jisake prameh ho vah jis kisee ko bina hath dhaeae chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare
Leviticus15:12 aur jisake prameh ho vah mittee ke jis kisee patra ko chooae vah tod dala jaa
Leviticus15:13 fir jisake prameh ho vah jab apane rog se changa ho jaa
Leviticus15:14 aur attven din vah do panduk va kabootaree ke do bachche lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke sammukh jakar unhen yajak ko de.
Leviticus15:15 tab yajak un men se aek ko papabali aur doosare ko homabaali ke liye bhentt chaddhaae aur yajak usake liye usake prameh ke karan yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare..
Leviticus15:16 fir yadi kisee puroosh ka veeyrya skhlit ho jaa
Leviticus15:17 aur jis kisee vasr va chamade par vah veeyrya pade vah jal se dhaeya jaa
Leviticus15:18 aur jab koi puroosh sree se prasang kare
Leviticus15:19 fir jab koi sree retumatee rahe
Leviticus15:20 aur jab tak vah ashuuddh rahe tab tak jis jis vastu par vah lette
Leviticus15:21 aur jo koi usake bichhaune ko chooae vah apane vasr dhaekar jal se snan kare
Leviticus15:22 aur jo koi kisee vastu ko chooae jis par vah baaittee ho vah apane vasr dhaekar jal se snan kare
Leviticus15:23 aur yaadi bichhaune va aur kisee vastu par jis par vah baaittee ho choone ke samay usaka roodhair laga ho
Leviticus15:24 aur yaadi koi puroosh us se prasang kare
Leviticus15:25 fir yadi kisee sree ke apane maasik dharma ke niyukt samay se aadhaik din tak roodhair bahata rahe
Leviticus15:26 usake retumatee rahane ke sab dinon men jis jis bichhaune par vah lette ve sab usake maasik dharma ke bichhaune ke saman ttharen aur jis jis vastu par vah baaitte ve bhee usake retumatee rahe ke dinon kee nai ashuuddh ttharen.
Leviticus15:27 aur jo koi un vastuon ko chhuae vah ashuuddh tthare
Leviticus15:28 aur jab vah sree apane retumatee se shuuddh ho jaa
Leviticus15:29 fir attven din vah do panduk ya kabootaree ke do bachche lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yajak ke pas jaae.
Leviticus15:30 tab yajak aek ko papabali aur doosare ko homabaali ke liye chaddhaae aur yajak usake liye usake maasik dharma kee ashuuddhta ke karan yahova ke samhane praayaashchaitt kare..
Leviticus15:31 is prakar se tum israaeliyon ko unakee ashuuddhta se nyare rakha karo
Leviticus15:32 jisake prameh ho aur jo puroosh veeyrya skhlit hone se ashuuddh ho
Leviticus15:33 aur jo sree retumatee ho aur kya puroosh kya sre
Leviticus16:1 jab haroon ke do putra yahova ke samhane sameep jakar mar gaa
Leviticus16:2 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus16:3 aur jab haroon pavitrasthan men pravesh kare tab is reeti se pravesh kare
Leviticus16:4 vah sanee ke kapade ka paavitra angarakha
Leviticus16:5 fir vah israaeliyon kee mandlee ke pas se papabali ke liye do bakare aur homabaali ke liye aek meddha le.
Leviticus16:6 aur haroon us papabali ke bachhde ko jo usee ke liye hoga chaddhakar apane aur apane gharane ke liye praayaashchaitt kare.
Leviticus16:7 aur un donon bakaron ko lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke samhane khda kare
Leviticus16:8 aur haroon donon bakaron par chitthiyan dale
Leviticus16:9 aur jis bakare par yahova ke nam kee chitthee nikale usako haroon papabaali ke liye chaddhaae
Leviticus16:10 parantu jis bakare par ajajel ke liye chitthee nikale vah yahova ke samhane jeevata khda kiya jaae ki us se praayashchaitt kiya jaa
Leviticus16:11 aur haroon us papabali ke bachhde ko jo usee ke liye hoga sameep le aa
Leviticus16:12 aur jo vedee yahova ke sammukh haai us par ke jalate huae koyalon se bhre huae dhoopadan ko lekar
Leviticus16:13 us dhoop ko yahova ke sammukh ag men dale
Leviticus16:14 tab vah bachhde ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar poorab kee or praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke upar apanee ungalee se chhdike
Leviticus16:15 fir vah us papabali ke bakare ko jo sadhaaran janata ke liye hoga balidan karake usake lohoo ko beechavale parde ke bheetar le aa
Leviticus16:16 aur vah israaeliyon kee bhanti bhanati kee ashuuddhta
Leviticus16:17 aur jab haroon praayashchaitt karane ke liye paavitrasthan men pravesh kare
Leviticus16:18 fir vah nikalakar us vedee ke pas jo yahova ke samhane haai jaae aur usake liye praayaashchaitt kare
Leviticus16:19 aur us lohoo men se kuchh apanee ungalee ke dara sat bar us par chhdikakar use israaeliyon kee bhanti bhanati kee ashuuddhta chhudakar shuuddh aur pavitra kare.
Leviticus16:20 aur jab vah paavitrasthan aur milapavale tamboo aur vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt kar chuke
Leviticus16:21 aur haroon apane donon hathon ko jeevit bakare par rakhkar israaeliyon ke sab adharma ke kamo
Leviticus16:22 aur vah bakara unake sab adharma ke kamon ko apane upar lade huae kisee nirale desh men utta le jaaega isaliye vah manushy us bakare ko jangal meen chhode de.
Leviticus16:23 tab haroon milapavale tamboo men aa
Leviticus16:24 fir vah kisee paavitra sthan men jal se snan kar apane nij vasr paahin le
Leviticus16:25 aur papabaali kee charabee ko vah vedee par jalaae.
Leviticus16:26 aur jo manushy bakare ko ajajel ke liye chhodkar aae vah bhee apane vasren ko dhaea
Leviticus16:27 aur papabaali ka bachhda aur papabaali ka bakara bhee jinaka lohoo paavitrasthan men praayaashchaitt karane ke liye pahunchaya jaae ve donon chhavanee se bahar pahunchaae jaaen aur unaka chamada
Leviticus16:28 aur jo unako jalaae vah apane vasren ko dhaea
Leviticus16:29 aur tum logon ke liye yah sada kee vidhai hogee ki sataven maheene ke dasaven din ko tum apane apane jeev ko du:kh dena
Leviticus16:30 kyonaki us din tumhen shuuddh karane ke liye tumhare nimitt praayashchaitt kiya jaaega aur tum apane sab papon se yahova ke sammukh paavitra ttharoge.
Leviticus16:31 yah tumhare liye paramaavishraam ka din tthare
Leviticus16:32 aur jisaka apane pita ke sthan par yajak pad ke liye aabhaishok aur sanskar kiya jaae vah yajak praayaashchaitt kiya kare
Leviticus16:33 paavitrasthan
Leviticus16:34 aur yah tumhare liye sada kee vidhai hogee
Leviticus17:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus17:2 haroon aur usake putraen se aur kul israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus17:3 ki israael ke gharane men se koi manushy ho jo baail va bhed ke bachche
Leviticus17:4 milapavale tamboo ke dar par
Leviticus17:5 is vidhai ka yah karan haai ki israaelee apane balidan jinako vah khule maaidan men vadha karate haai
Leviticus17:6 aur yajak lohoo ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova kee vedee ke upar chhdike
Leviticus17:7 aur ve jo bakaron ke poojak hokar vyaabhaichar karate haai
Leviticus17:8 aur too un se kah
Leviticus17:9 aur usako milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke liye chaddhane ko n le aae vah manushy apane logon men se nash kiya jaae..
Leviticus17:10 fir israael ke gharane ke logon men se va unake beech rahanevale paradeshaiyon men se koi manushy kyon n ho jo kisee prakar ka lohoo khaa
Leviticus17:11 kyonaki shareer ka praan lohoo men rahata haai aur usako maain ne tum logon ko vedee par chaddhane ke liye diya haai
Leviticus17:12 is karan maain israaeliyon se kahata hoo
Leviticus17:13 aur israaeliyon men se va unake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se koi manushy kyon n ho jo aher karake khane ke yogy pashu va pakshaee ko pakade
Leviticus17:14 kyonaki shareer ka praan jo haai vah usaka lohoo hee haai jo usake praan ke sath aek haai isee liye maain israaeliyon se kahata hoo
Leviticus17:15 aur chahe vah deshaee ho va paradeshaee ho
Leviticus17:16 aur yaadi vah unako n dhaeae aur n snan kare
Leviticus18:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus18:2 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus18:3 tum misr desh ke kamon ke anusar jis men tum rahate the n karana aur kanan desh ke kamon ke anusar bhee jahan maain tumhen le chalata hoon n karana aur n un deshaen kee vidhaiyon par chalana.
Leviticus18:4 mere hee niyamon ko manana
Leviticus18:5 isaliye tum mere niyamon aur meree vidhaiyon ko nirantar manana jo manushy unako mane vah unake karan jeeavit rahega. maain yahova hoon.
Leviticus18:6 tum men se koi apanee kisee nikatt kuttumbain ka tan ughaadne ko usake pas n jaae. maain yahova hoon.
Leviticus18:7 apanee mata ka tan jo tumhare pita ka tan haai n ughaadna vah to tumharee mata haai
Leviticus18:8 apanee sautelee mata ka bhee tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare pita hee ka tan haai.
Leviticus18:9 apanee baahin chahe sagee ho chahe sautelee ho
Leviticus18:10 apanee potee va apanee natinee ka tan n ughaadna
Leviticus18:11 tumharee sotelee bahin jo tumhare pita se utpann hui
Leviticus18:12 apanee foofaee ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare pita kee nikatt kuttumbain haai.
Leviticus18:13 apanee mausee ka tan n ughaadna kyonaki vah tumharee mata kee nikatt kuttumbain haai.
Leviticus18:14 apane chacha ka tan n ughaadna
Leviticus18:15 apanee bahoo ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare bette kee sree haai
Leviticus18:16 apanee bhaujee ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare bhai hee ka tan haai.
Leviticus18:17 kisee sree aur usakee bettee donon ka tan n ughaadna
Leviticus18:18 aur apanee sree kee baahin ko bhee apanee sree karake usakee saut n karana
Leviticus18:19 fir jab tak koi sree apane retu ke karan ashuuddh rahe tab tak usake pas usaka tan ughaadne ko n jana.
Leviticus18:20 fir apane bhai bandha kee sree se kukarma karake ashuuddh n ho jana.
Leviticus18:21 aur apane santan men se kisee ko molek ke liye hom karake n chaddhana
Leviticus18:22 sreegaman kee reeti purooshagaman n karana vah to ghainauna kam haai.
Leviticus18:23 kisee jaati ke pashu ke sath pashuugaman karake ashuuddh n ho jana
Leviticus18:24 aeesa aeesa koi bhee kam karake ashuuddh n ho jana
Leviticus18:25 aur unaka desh bhee ashuuddh ho gaya haai
Leviticus18:26 is karan tum log meree vidhaiyon aur niyamon ko nirantar manana
Leviticus18:27 kyonaki aeese sab ghainaune kamon ko us desh ke manushy to tum se pahile us men rahate the ve karate aae haai
Leviticus18:28 ab aeesa n ho ki jis reeti se jo jati tum se pahile us desh men rahatee thee usako us ne ugal diya
Leviticus18:29 jitane aeesa koi ghainauna kam karen ve sab praanee apane logon men se nash kiae jaaen.
Leviticus18:30 yah agyaa jo maain ne tumhare manane ko dee haai use tum manana
Leviticus19:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus19:2 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee se kah
Leviticus19:3 tum apanee apanee mata aur apane apane pita ka bhy manana
Leviticus19:4 tum mooraton kee or n firana
Leviticus19:5 jab tum yahova ke liye melabaali karo
Leviticus19:6 usaka mans balidan ke din aur doosare din khaya jaa
Leviticus19:7 aur yaadi us men se kuchh bhee teesare din khaya jaa
Leviticus19:8 aur usaka khanevala yahova ke pavitra padarth ko apavitra ttharata haai
Leviticus19:9 fir jab tum apane desh ke khet katto tab apane khet ke kone kone tak poora n kattna
Leviticus19:10 aur apanee dakh kee baree ka dana dana n tod lena
Leviticus19:11 tum choree n karana
Leviticus19:12 tum mere nam kee joottee shapath khake apane parameshvar ka nam apaavitra n ttharana maain yahova hoon.
Leviticus19:13 aek doosare par andhor n karana
Leviticus19:14 baahire ko shaap n dena
Leviticus19:15 nyay men kuttlaita n karana aur n to kangal ka paksha karana aur n bade manushyon ka munh dekha vichar karana us doosare ka nyay dharma se karana.
Leviticus19:16 lootara banake apane logon men n fira karana
Leviticus19:17 apane man men aek doosare ke prati baair n rakhna apane padosee ko avashy danttna nahee
Leviticus19:18 palatta n lena
Leviticus19:19 tum meree vidhaiyon ko nirantar manana. apane pashuuon ko bhainn jaati ke pashuuon se mel n khane dena apane khet men do prakar ke beej ikatthe n bona aur sanee aur un kee milavatt se bana hua vasr n pahinana.
Leviticus19:20 fir koi sree dasee ho
Leviticus19:21 par vah puroosh milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke pas aek meddha doshabali ke liye le aae.
Leviticus19:22 aur yajak usake kiye huae pap ke karan doshabaali ke meddhe ke dara usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare tab usaka kiya hua pap kshama kiya jaaega.
Leviticus19:23 fir jab tum kanan desh men panhuchakar kisee prakar ke fal ke vraksha lagao
Leviticus19:24 aur chauthe varsha men unake sab fal yahova kee stuti karane ke liye paavitra ttharen.
Leviticus19:25 tab panchaven varsha men tum unake fal khana
Leviticus19:26 tum lohoo laga hua kuchh mans n khana. aur n ttona karana
Leviticus19:27 apane sir men ghora rakhkar n mundana
Leviticus19:28 mudorn ke karan apane shareer ko bilakul n cheerana
Leviticus19:29 apanee beattyaien ko veshya banakar apavitra n karana
Leviticus19:30 mere vishraamadin ko mana karana
Leviticus19:31 ojhaon aur boot sadhane valon kee or n firana
Leviticus19:32 pakke balavale ke samhane utt khde hona
Leviticus19:33 aur yaadi koi paradeshaee tumhare desh men tumhare sang rahe
Leviticus19:34 jo paradeshaee tumhare sang rahe vah tumhare liye deshaee ke saman ho
Leviticus19:35 tum nyay me
Leviticus19:36 sachcha tarajo
Leviticus19:37 isaliye tum meree sab vidhaiyon aur sab niyamon ko manate huae nirantar palan karo maain yahova hoon..
Leviticus20:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus20:2 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus20:3 aur maain bhee us manushy ke virooddh hokar usako usake logon men se is karan nash karoonga
Leviticus20:4 aur yaadi koi apanee santan molek ko balidan kare
Leviticus20:5 tab to maain svayan us manushy aur usake gharane ke virooddh hokar usako aur jitane usake peechhe hokar molek ke sath vyabhaichar karen un sabhon ko bhee unake logon ke beech men se nash karoonga.
Leviticus20:6 fir jo praanee ojhaon va bootasadhanevalon kee or firake
Leviticus20:7 isaliye tum apane ap ko paavitra karo aur pavitra bane raho kyonaki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.
Leviticus20:8 aur tum meree vidhaiyon ko manana
Leviticus20:9 koi kyon n ho jo apane pita va mata ko shaap de vah nishchay mar dala jaae us ne apane pita va mata ko shaap diya haai
Leviticus20:10 fir yadi koi parai sree ke sath vyabhaichar kare
Leviticus20:11 aur yaadi koi apanee sautelee mata ke sath soa
Leviticus20:12 aur yaadi koi apanee patohoo ke sath soa
Leviticus20:13 aur yaadi koi jis reeti sree se usee reeati puroosh se prasang kare
Leviticus20:14 aur yaadi koi apanee patnee aur apanee sans donon ko rakhe
Leviticus20:15 fir yadi koi puroosh pashuugamee ho
Leviticus20:16 aur yaadi koi sree pashu ke pas jakar usake sang kukarma kare
Leviticus20:17 aur yaadi koi apanee baahin ka
Leviticus20:18 fir yadi koi puroosh kisee retumatee sree ke sang sokar usaka tan ughaade
Leviticus20:19 aur apanee mausee va foofaee ka tan n ughaadna
Leviticus20:20 aur yaadi koi apanee chachee ke sang soa
Leviticus20:21 aur yaadi koi bhaujee va bhyahoo ko apanee patnee banaa
Leviticus20:22 tum meree sab vidhaiyon aur mere sab niyamon ko samajh ke sath manana jisase yah n ho ki jis desh men maain tumhen liye ja raha hoon vah tum ko ugal deve.
Leviticus20:23 aur jis jati ke logon ko maain tumhare age se nikalata hoon unakee reeti rasm par n chalana kyonki un logon ne jo ye sab kukarma kiae haai
Leviticus20:24 aur maain tum logon se kahata hoo
Leviticus20:25 is karan tum shuuddh aur ashuuddh pashuuon me
Leviticus20:26 aur tum mere liye paavitra bane rahana kyonki maain yahova svayan paavitra hoo

Leviticus21:4 par yajak hone ke nate se vah apane logon men pradhaan haai

Leviticus21:6 ve apane parameshvar ke liye paavitra bane rahe

Leviticus21:12 aur vah paavitrasthan se bahar bhee n nikale
Leviticus21:13 aur vah kunvaree hee sree ko byahe.

Leviticus22:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus22:2 haroon aur usake putraen se kah
Leviticus22:3 aur un se kah
Leviticus22:4 haroon ke vansh men se koi kyon n ho jo koddhee ho
Leviticus22:5 aur jo koi kisee aeese renganehare jantu ko chooae jis se log ashuuddh ho sakate haai
Leviticus22:6 to vah praanee jo in men se kisee ko chooae sanjh tak ashuuddh tthara rahe
Leviticus22:7 tab soorya ast hone par vah shuuddh ttharega aur tab vah paavitra vastuon men se kha sakega
Leviticus22:8 jo janavar ap se mara ho va pashu se faada gaya ho use khakar vah apane ap ko ashuuddh n kare maain yahova hoon.
Leviticus22:9 isaliye yajak log meree saupee hui vastuon kee raksha kare
Leviticus22:10 paraae kul ka jan kisee paavitra vastu ko n khane paa
Leviticus22:11 yaadi yajak kisee praanee ko roopaya dekar mol le
Leviticus22:12 aur yaadi yajak kee bettee paraae kul ke kisee puroosh se byahee gai ho
Leviticus22:13 yaadi yajak kee bettee vidhava va tyagee hui ho

Leviticus22:15 aur ve israaeliyon kee paavitra kee hui vastuon ko
Leviticus22:16 ve unako apanee paavitra vastuon men se khailakar un se aparadha ka dosh n uttvaaen maain unaka paavitra karanevala yahova hoon..
Leviticus22:17 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus22:18 haroon aur usake putraen se aur israael ke gharane va israaeliyon men rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se koi kyon n ho jo mannat va svechchhabali karane ke liye yahova ko koi homabali chaddhaa
Leviticus22:19 to apane nimitt grahanyogy ttharane ke liye baailon va bhedon va bakariyon men se nirdosh nar chaddhaya jaae.
Leviticus22:20 jis men koi bhee dosh ho use n chaddhana kyonaki vah tumhare nimitt grahanyogy n ttharega.
Leviticus22:21 aur jo koi baailon va bhed-bakaariyon men se vishosh vastu sankalp karane ke liye va svechchhabaali ke liye yahova ko melabaali chaddhaa
Leviticus22:22 jo andha va ang ka tootta va loola ho
Leviticus22:23 jis kisee baail va bhed va bakare ka koi ang aadhaik va kam ho usako svechchhabali ki liye chaddha sakate ho
Leviticus22:24 jisake and dabe va kuchale va tootte va katt gaae hon usako yahova ke liye n chaddhana
Leviticus22:25 fir in men se kisee ko tum apane parameshvar ka bhojan janakar kisee paradeshaee se lekar n chaddhao kyonaki un men unaka bigad vartaman haai
Leviticus22:26 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus22:27 jab bachhda va bhed va bakaree ka bachcha utpann ho
Leviticus22:28 chahe gay
Leviticus22:29 aur jab tum yahova ke liye dhanyavad ka melabali chaddhao
Leviticus22:30 vah usee din khaya jaa
Leviticus22:31 aur tum meree agyaaon ko manana aur unaka palan karana maain yahova hoon.
Leviticus22:32 aur mere pavitra nam ko apavitra n ttharana
Leviticus22:33 jo tum ko misr desh se nikal laya hoon jis se tumhara parameshvar bana rahoon maain yahova hoon..
Leviticus23:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus23:2 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus23:3 chh: din kamakaj kiya jaa
Leviticus23:4 fir yahova ke pabrba jin men se aek aek ke ttharaye huae samay men tumhen paavitra sabha karane ke liye prachar karana hoga ve ye haain.
Leviticus23:5 paahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay yahova ka fasah hua kare.
Leviticus23:6 aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko yahova ke liye akhmeeree rottee ka pabrba hua kare us men tum sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana.
Leviticus23:7 un men se paahile din tumharee paavitra sabha ho aur us din parishram ka koi kam n karana.
Leviticus23:8 aur saton din tum yahova ko havy chaddhaya karana aur sataven din pavitra sabha ho us din parishram ka koi kam n karana..
Leviticus23:9 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus23:10 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus23:11 aur vah us poole ko yahova ke samhane hilaa
Leviticus23:12 aur jis din tum poole ko hilavao usee din aek varsha ka nirdosh bhed ka bachcha yahova ke liye homabaali chaddhana.
Leviticus23:13 aur usake sath ka annabali aepa ke do dasaven ansh tel se sane huae maaide ka ho vah sukhdayak sugandha ke liye yahova ka havy ho aur usake sath ka ardha heen bhr kee chauthai dakhmadha ho.
Leviticus23:14 aur jab tak tum is chaddhave ko apane parameshvar ke pas n le jao
Leviticus23:15 fir us vishraamadin ke doosare din se
Leviticus23:16 sataven vishraamadin ke doosare din tak pachas din ginana
Leviticus23:17 tum apane gharon men se aepa ke do dasaven ansh maaide kee do rottyaian hilane kee bhentt ke liye le ana ve khmeer ke sath pakai jaae
Leviticus23:18 aur us rottee ke sang aek aek varsha ke sat nirdosh bhed ke bachche
Leviticus23:19 fir papabali ke liye aek bakara
Leviticus23:20 tab yajak unako pahilee upaj kee rottee samet yahova ke samhane hilane kee bhentt ke liye hilaa
Leviticus23:21 aur tum us din yah prachar karana
Leviticus23:22 jab tum apane desh men ke khet katto
Leviticus23:23 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus23:24 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus23:25 us din tum parishram ka koi kam n karana
Leviticus23:26 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus23:27 usee sataven maheene ka dasavan din praayashchaitt ka din mana jae vah tumharee pavitra sabha ka din hoga
Leviticus23:28 us din tum kisee prakar ka kamakaj n karana kyonaki vah praayashchaitt ka din niyukt kiya gaya haai jis men tumhare parameshvar yahova ke samhane tumhare liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaega.
Leviticus23:29 isaliye jo praanee us din du:kh n sahe vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega.
Leviticus23:30 aur jo praanee us din kisee prakar ka kamakaj kare us praanee ko maain usake logon ke beech men se nash kar daloonga.
Leviticus23:31 tum kisee prakar ka kamakaj n karana yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men tumhare gharane men sada kee vidhaee tthare.
Leviticus23:32 vah din tumhare liye paramaavishraam ka ho
Leviticus23:33 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus23:34 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus23:35 paahile din pavitra sabha ho us men parishram ka koi kam n karana.
Leviticus23:36 saton din yahova ke liye havy chaddhaya karana
Leviticus23:37 yahova ke niyat pabrba ye hee haai
Leviticus23:38 in sabhon se adhaik yahova ke vishraamadinon ko manana
Leviticus23:39 fir sataven maheene ke pandrahaven din ko
Leviticus23:40 aur paahile din tum achchhe achchhe vrakshaen kee upaj
Leviticus23:41 aur praativarsha sat din tak yahova ke liye pabrba mana karana yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men sada kee vidhai tthare
Leviticus23:42 sat din tak tum jhonpadiyon men raha karana
Leviticus23:43 isaliye ki tumharee peeddhee peeddhee ke log jan rakhe
Leviticus23:44 aur moosa ne israaeliyon ko yahova ke pabrba ke niyat samay kah sunaae..
