Leviticus24:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa de
Leviticus24:3 haroon usako
Leviticus24:4 vah deepakon ke svachchh deevatt par yahova ke samhane nity sajaya kare..
Leviticus24:5 aur too maaida lekar barah rottyaian pakavana
Leviticus24:6 tab unakee do panti karake
Leviticus24:7 aur aek aek panti par chokha loban rakhna
Leviticus24:8 praati vishraamadin ko vah use nity yahova ke sammukh kram se rakha kare
Leviticus24:9 aur vah haroon aur usake putraen kee hongee
Leviticus24:10 un dinon men kisee israelee sree ka betta
Leviticus24:11 aur vah israaelee sree ka betta yahova ke nam kee ninda karake shaap dene laga. yah sunakar log usako moosa ke pas le gaae. usakee mata ka nam shalomeet tha
Leviticus24:12 unhon ne usako havalat men band kiya
Leviticus24:13 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus24:14 tum log us shaap dene vale ko chhavanee se bahar liva le jao aur jitanon ne vah ninda sunee ho ve sab apane apane hath usake sir par tteke
Leviticus24:15 aur too israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus24:16 yahova ke nam kee ninda karanevala nishchay mar dala jaae saree mandlee ke log nishchay usako patthravah karen chahe deshaee ho chahe paradeshae
Leviticus24:17 fir jo koi kisee manushy ko praan se mare vah nishchay mar dala jaae.
Leviticus24:18 aur jo koi kisee ghareloo pashu ko praan se mare vah use bhr de
Leviticus24:19 fir yadi koi kisee doosare ko chott pahunchaa
Leviticus24:20 arthata ang bhng karane kee santee ang bhng kiya jaa
Leviticus24:21 aur pashu ka mar dalanevala usako bhr de
Leviticus24:22 tumhara niyam aek hee ho
Leviticus24:23 aur moosa ne israaeliyon ko yahee samajhaya tab unhon ne us shaap denevale ko chhavanee se bahar le jakar usako patthravah kiya. aur israaeliyon ne vaaisa hee kiya jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee..
Leviticus25:1 fir yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas moosa se kaha
Leviticus25:2 israaeliyon se kah
Leviticus25:3 chh: varsha to apana apana khet boya karana
Leviticus25:4 parantu sataven varsha boomi ko yahova ke liye paramaavishraamakal mila kare us men n to apana khet bona aur n apanee dakh kee baree chhanttna.
Leviticus25:5 jo kuchh katte huae khet men apane ap se uge use n kattna
Leviticus25:6 aur boomi ke vishraamakal hee kee upaj se tum ko
Leviticus25:7 aur tumhare pashuuon ka aur desh men jitane jeevajantu hon unaka bhee bhojan boomi kee sab upaj se hoga..
Leviticus25:8 aur sat vishraamavarsha
Leviticus25:9 tab sataven maheene ke dasaven din ko
Leviticus25:10 aur us pachasaven varsha ko paavitra karake manana
Leviticus25:11 tumhare yahan vah pachasavan varsha jubalee ka varsha kahalaae us men tum n bona
Leviticus25:12 kyonaki vah jo jubalee ka varsha hoga vah tumhare liye paavitra hoga tum usakee upaj khet hee men se le leke khana.
Leviticus25:13 is jubalee ke varsha men tum apanee apanee nij boomi ko lauttne paoge.
Leviticus25:14 aur yaadi tum apane bhaibandha ke hath kuchh becho va apane bhaibandha se kuchh mol lo
Leviticus25:15 jubalee ke peechhe jitane varsha beete hon unakee ginatee ke anusar dam ttharake aek doosare se mol lena
Leviticus25:16 jitane varsha aur rahen utana hee dam baddhana
Leviticus25:17 aur tum apane apane bhaibandha par andhor n karana apane parameshvar ka bhy manana maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.
Leviticus25:18 isaliye tum meree vidhaiyon ko manana
Leviticus25:19 aur boomi apanee upaj upajaya karegee
Leviticus25:20 aur yaadi tum kaho
Leviticus25:21 to jano ki maain tum ko chhttven varsha men aeesee ashaeesh doonga
Leviticus25:22 tum attven varsha men booge
Leviticus25:23 boomi sada ke liye to bechee n jaa
Leviticus25:24 leakin tum apane bhag ke sare desh men boomi ko chhuda lene dena..
Leviticus25:25 yaadi tera koi bhaibandha kangal hokar apanee nij boomi men se kuchh bech dale
Leviticus25:26 aur yaadi kisee manushy ke liye koi chhudanevala n ho
Leviticus25:27 to vah usake bikane ke samay se vasharen kee ginatee karake shosh vasharen kee upaj ka dam usako jis ne use mol liya ho faer de tab vah apanee nij boomi ka adhaikaree ho jaae.
Leviticus25:28 parantu yadi usake itanee poonjee n ho ki use fir apanee kar sake
Leviticus25:29 fir yadi koi manushy shaharapanah vale nagar men basane ka ghar beche
Leviticus25:30 parantu yadi vah varsha bhr men n chhudaa
Leviticus25:31 parantu bina shaharapanah ke ganvon ke ghar to desh ke kheton ke saman gine jaaen unaka chhudana bhee ho sakega
Leviticus25:32 aur leaviyon ke nij bhag ke nagaron ke jo ghar hon unako leveey jab chahen tab chhudaaen.
Leviticus25:33 aur yaadi koi leveey apana bhag n chhudaa
Leviticus25:34 aur unake nagaron kee charon or kee charai kee boomi bechee n jaae kyonki vah unaka sada ka bhag hoga..
Leviticus25:35 fir yadi tera koi bhaibandha kangal ho jaa
Leviticus25:36 us se byaj va baddhtee n lena apane parameshvar ka bhy manana jis se tera bhaibandha tere sang jeevan nirvah kar sake.
Leviticus25:37 usako byaj par roopaya n dena
Leviticus25:38 maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon maain tumhen kanan desh dene ke liye aur tumhara parameshvar ttharane kee manasa se tum ko misr desh se nikal laya hoon..
Leviticus25:39 fir yadi tera koi bhaibandha tere samhane kangal hokar apane ap ko tere hath bech dale
Leviticus25:40 vah tere sang majadoor va yatraee kee nai rahe
Leviticus25:41 tab vah balabachchon samet tere pas se nikal jaa
Leviticus25:42 kyonaki ve mere hee das haai
Leviticus25:43 us par kattorata se adhaikar n karana apane parameshvar ka bhy manate rahana.
Leviticus25:44 tere jo dasa-daasiyan hon ve tumharee charon or kee jaatiyon men se ho
Leviticus25:45 aur jo yatraee log tumhare beech men paradeshaee hokar rahenge
Leviticus25:46 aur tum apane putraen ko bhee jo tumhare bad honge unake adhaikaree kar sakoge
Leviticus25:47 fir yadi tere samhane koi paradeshaee va yatraee dhanee ho jaa
Leviticus25:48 to usake bik jane ke bad vah fir chhudaya ja sakata haai usake bhaiyon men se koi usako chhuda sakata haai
Leviticus25:49 va usaka chacha
Leviticus25:50 vah apane mol lenevale ke sath apane bikane ke varsha se jubalee ke varsha tak hisab kare
Leviticus25:51 yaadi jubalee ke bahut varsha rah jaae
Leviticus25:52 aur yaadi jubalee ke varsha ke thode varsha rah gaae ho
Leviticus25:53 vah apane svamee ke sang us majadoor ke saman rahe jisakee vashairk majadooree ttharai jatee ho aur usaka svamee us par tere samhane kattorata se aadhaikar n jatane paae.
Leviticus25:54 aur yaadi vah in reetiyon se chhudaya n jaa
Leviticus25:55 kyonaki israaelee mere hee das haain ve misr desh se mere hee nikale huae das haain maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon..
Leviticus26:1 tum apane liye mooraten n banana
Leviticus26:2 tum mere vishraamadinon ka palan karana aur mere paavitrasthan ka bhy manana maain yahova hoon..
Leviticus26:3 yaadi tum meree vidhaiyon par chalo aur meree agyaaon ko manakar unaka palan karo
Leviticus26:4 to maain tumhare liye samay samay par menh barasaunga
Leviticus26:5 yahan tak ki tum dakh todne ke samay bhee davanee karate rahoge
Leviticus26:6 aur maain tumhare desh men sukh chaain doonga
Leviticus26:7 aur tum apane shatrauon ko mar bhga doge
Leviticus26:8 aur tum men se panch manushy sau ko aur sau manushy das hajar ko khdedenge aur tumhare shatra talavar se tumhare age age mare jaaenge
Leviticus26:9 aur maain tumharee or krapa drashtti rakoonga aur tum ko falavant karoonga aur baddhaunga
Leviticus26:10 aur tum rakhe huae purane anaj ko khaoge
Leviticus26:11 aur maain tumhare beech apana nivasasthan banaae rakoonga
Leviticus26:12 aur maain tumhare madhy chala fira karoonga
Leviticus26:13 maain to tumhara vah parameshvar yahova hoo
Leviticus26:14 yaadi tum meree n sunoge
Leviticus26:15 aur meree vidhaiyon ko nikamma janoge
Leviticus26:16 to maain tum se yah karoonga arthata maain tum ko bechaain karoonga
Leviticus26:17 aur maain bhee tumhare virooddh ho jaunga
Leviticus26:18 aur yaadi tum in baton ke uparant bhee meree n suno
Leviticus26:19 aur maain tumhare bal ka ghamand tod daloonga
Leviticus26:20 aur tumhara bal akarath ganvaya jaaega
Leviticus26:21 aur yaadi tum mere virooddh chalate hee raho
Leviticus26:22 aur maain tumhare beech ban pashu bhejoonga
Leviticus26:23 fir yadi tum in baton par bhee meree tadna se n sudharo
Leviticus26:24 to maain bhee tumhare virooddh chaloonga
Leviticus26:25 to maain tum par aek aeesee talavar chalavaunga
Leviticus26:26 aur jab maain tumhare liye ann ke adhaar ko door kar daloonga
Leviticus26:27 fir yadi tum isake uparant bhee meree n sunoge
Leviticus26:28 to maain apane nyay men tumhare virooddh chaloonga
Leviticus26:29 aur tum ko apane betton aur bettyaien ka mans khana padega.
Leviticus26:30 aur maain tumhare pooja ke unche sthanon ko ddha doonga
Leviticus26:31 aur maain tumhare nagaron ko ujad doonga
Leviticus26:32 aur maain tumhare desh ko soona kar doonga
Leviticus26:33 aur maain tum ko jati jati ke beech tittra-abittr karoonga
Leviticus26:34 tab jitane din vah desh soona pada rahega aur tum apane shatrauon ke desh men rahoge utane din vah apane vishraamakalon ko manata rahega.
Leviticus26:35 aur jitane din vah soona pada rahega utane din usako vishraam rahega
Leviticus26:36 aur tum men se jo bach rahenge aur apane shatrauon ke desh men honge unake day men maai kayarata upajaunga aur ve patte ke khdkane se bhee bhag jaaenge
Leviticus26:37 aur jab koi peechha karanevala n ho tab bhee manon talavar ke bhy se ve aek doosare se ttokar khakar girate jaaenge
Leviticus26:38 tab tum jaati jati ke beech pahunchakar nash ho jaoge
Leviticus26:39 aur tum men se jo bache rahenge ve apane shatrauon ke deshaen men apane adharma ke karan gal jaaenge aur apane purakhaon ke adharma ke kamon ke karan bhee ve unheen kee nai gal jaaenge.
Leviticus26:40 tab ve apane aur apane pitaron ke adharma ko man lenge
Leviticus26:41 isee karan vah hamare virooddh hokar hamen shatrauon ke desh men le aya haai. yaadi us samay unaka khtanarahit day dab jaaega aur ve us samay apane adharma ke dand ko angeekar karegen
Leviticus26:42 tab jo vacha maain ne yakoob ke sang bandhaee thee usako maain smaran karoonga
Leviticus26:43 aur vah desh un se rahit hokar soona pada rahega
Leviticus26:44 itane par bhee jab ve apane shatrauon ke desh men honge
Leviticus26:45 parantu maain unake bhlai ke liye unake pitaron se bandhaee hui vacha ko smaran karoonga
Leviticus26:46 jo jo vidhaiyan aur niyam aur vyavastha yahova ne apanee or se israaeliyon ke liye seenaai parvat par moosa ke dara ttharai theen ve ye hee haain..
Leviticus27:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Leviticus27:2 israaeliyon se yah kah
Leviticus27:3 isaliye yaadi vah bees varsha va us se aadhaik aur satt varsha se kam avastha ka puroosh ho
Leviticus27:4 aur yaadi vah sree ho
Leviticus27:5 fir yadi usakee avastha panch varsha va usase aadhaik aur bees varsha se kam kee ho
Leviticus27:6 aur yaadi usakee avastha aek maheene va us se aadhaik aur panch varsha se kam kee ho
Leviticus27:7 fir yadi usakee avastha satt varsha kee va us se adhaik ho
Leviticus27:8 parantu yadi koi itana kangal ho ki yajak ka ttharaya hua dam n de sake
Leviticus27:9 fir jin pashuuon men se log yahova ko chaddhava chaddhate haai
Leviticus27:10 vah use kisee prakar se n badale
Leviticus27:11 aur jin pashuuon men se log yahova ke liye chaddhava naheen chaddhate aeeson men se yaadi vah ho
Leviticus27:12 tak yajak pashu ke gun avagun donon vicharakar usaka mol ttharaae aur jitana yajak ttharaae usaka mol utana hee tthare.
Leviticus27:13 aur yaadi sankalp karanevala use kisee prakar se chhudana chahe
Leviticus27:14 fir yadi koi apana ghar yahova ke liye paavitra ttharakar sankalp kare
Leviticus27:15 aur yaadi ghar ka pavitra karanevala use chhudana chahe
Leviticus27:16 fir yadi koi apanee nij boomi ka koi bhag yahova ke liye paavitra ttharana chahe
Leviticus27:17 yaadi vah apana khet jubalee ke varsha hee men paavitra ttharaa
Leviticus27:18 aur yaadi vah apana khet jubalee ke varsha ke bad paavitra ttharaa
Leviticus27:19 aur yaadi khet ko pavitra ttharanevala use chhudana chahe
Leviticus27:20 aur yaadi vah khet ko chhudana n chahe
Leviticus27:21 parantu jab vah khet jubalee ke varsha men chootte
Leviticus27:22 fir yadi koi apana mol liya hua khet
Leviticus27:23 to yajak jubalee ke varsha tak ka hisab karake us manushy ke liye jitana ttharaae utana hee vah yahova ke liye paavitra janakar usee din de de.
Leviticus27:24 aur jubalee ke varsha men vah khet usee ke aadhaikar men jis se vah mol liya gaya ho fir a jaa
Leviticus27:25 aur jis jis vastu ka mol yajak ttharaae usaka mol pavitrasthan hee ke shokel ke hisab se tthare: shokel bees gera ka tthare..
Leviticus27:26 par ghareloo pashuuon ka pahilautta
Leviticus27:27 parantu yadi vah ashuuddh pashu ka ho
Leviticus27:28 parantu apanee saree vastuon men se jo kuchh koi yahova ke liye arpan kare
Leviticus27:29 manushyon men se jo koi arpan kiya jaa
Leviticus27:30 fir boomi kee upaj ka sara dashamansha
Leviticus27:31 yaadi koi apane dashamansh men se kuchh chhudana chahe
Leviticus27:32 aur gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaariya
Leviticus27:33 koi usake gun avagun n vichare
Leviticus27:34 jo agyaaaen yahova ne israaeliyon ke liye seenaai parvat par moosa ko dee thee ve ye hee haain..
Numbers1:1 israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikal jane ke doosare varsha ke doosare maheene ke paahile din ko
Numbers1:2 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ke kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar
Numbers1:3 jitane israaelee bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke ho
Numbers1:4 aur tumhare sath aek aek gotra ka aek aek puroosh bhee ho jo apane pitaron ke gharane ka mukhy puroosh ho.
Numbers1:5 tumhare un sathaiyon ke nam ye haai
Numbers1:6 shaimon ke gotra men se sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeaela
Numbers1:7 yahooda ke gotra men se ammeenadab ka putra nahashaena
Numbers1:8 issakar ke gotra men se sooa ka putra natanela
Numbers1:9 jabooloon ke gotra men se helon ka putra aeleeaba
Numbers1:10 yoosufavanshaiyon men se ye haai
Numbers1:11 binyameen ke gotra men se gidonee ka putra abeedana
Numbers1:12 dan ke gotra men se ammeeshaai ka putra aheeaeejera
Numbers1:13 ashor ke gotra men se okran ka putra pageeaela
Numbers1:14 gad ke gotra men se dooael ka putra aelyasapa
Numbers1:15 naptalee ke gotra men se aenam ka putra aheera.
Numbers1:16 mandlee men se jo puroosh apane apane pitaron ke gotraen ke pradhaan hokar bulaae gaae ve ye hee haai
Numbers1:17 aur jin purooshaen ke nam upar likhe haain unako sath lekar
Numbers1:18 moosa aur haroon ne doosare maheene ke paahile din saree mandlee ikatthee kee
Numbers1:19 jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko jo agyaa dee thee usee ke anusar us ne seenaai ke jangal men unakee ganna kee..
Numbers1:20 aur israael ke pahilautte rooben ke vansh ne jitane puroosh apane kul aur apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:21 aur rooben ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chhyaialees hajar the..
Numbers1:22 aur shaimon ke vansh ke log jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the
Numbers1:23 aur shaimon ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh unasatt hajar teen sau the..
Numbers1:24 aur gad ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:25 aur gad ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh paaintalees hajar saddhe chh: sau the..
Numbers1:26 aur yahooda ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:27 aur yahooda ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh chauhattr hajar chh: sau the..
Numbers1:28 aur issakar ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:29 aur issakar ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh chauvan hajar char sau the..
Numbers1:30 aur jabooloon ve vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:31 aur jabooloon ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh sattavan hajar char sau the..
Numbers1:32 aur yoosufa ke vansh men se aepraaim ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:33 aur aepraaim gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chalees hajar the..
Numbers1:34 aur manashsho ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:35 aur manashsho ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh battees hajar do sau the..
Numbers1:36 aur binyameen ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:37 aur binyameen ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh paaintees hajar char sau the..
Numbers1:38 aur dan ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:39 aur dan ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh basatt hajar sat sau the..
Numbers1:40 aur ashor ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va usase aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:41 aur ashor ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe aekatalees hajar the..
Numbers1:42 aur naptalee ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the
Numbers1:43 aur naptalee ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh tirapan hajar char sau the..
Numbers1:44 is prakar moosa aur haroon aur israael ke barah pradhaanon ne
Numbers1:45 so jitane israaelee bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke hone ke karan yuddh karane ke yogy the ve apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gine gaa
Numbers1:46 aur ve sab gine huae puroosh milakar chh: lakh teen hajar saddhe panch sau the..
Numbers1:47 in men leveey apane pitaron ke gotra ke anusar naheen gine gaae.
Numbers1:48 kyonaki yahova ne moosa se kaha tha
Numbers1:49 ki leveey gotra kee ginatee israaeliyon ke sang n karana
Numbers1:50 parantu too leviyon ko sakshaee ke tamboo par
Numbers1:51 aur jab jab nivas ka kooch ho tab tab leveey usako gira de
Numbers1:52 aur israaelee apana apana dera apanee apanee chhavanee men aur apane apane jhnde ke pas khda kiya karen
Numbers1:53 par leveey apane dere sakshaee ke tamboo hee kee charon or khde kiya kare
Numbers1:54 jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee theen israaeliyon ne unheen ke anusar kiya..
Numbers2:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Numbers2:2 israaelee milapavale tamboo kee charon or aur usake samhane apane apane jhnde aur apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke nishaan ke sameep apane dere khde karen.
Numbers2:3 aur jo apane poorva disha kee or jahan sooyorday hota haai apane apane dalon ke anusar dere khde kiya karen ve hee yahooda kee chhavaneevale jhne ke log honge
Numbers2:4 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh chauhattr hajar chh: sau haain.
Numbers2:5 unake sameep jo dere khde kiya karen ve issakar ke gotra ke ho
Numbers2:6 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh chauvan hajar char sau haain.
Numbers2:7 inake pas jabooloon ke gotravale rahenge
Numbers2:8 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh sattavan hajar char sau haain.
Numbers2:9 is reeati se yahooda kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar aek lakh chhyaiasee hajar char sau haain. paahile ye hee kooch kiya karen..
Numbers2:10 daakkhian alang par rooben kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe
Numbers2:11 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chhyaialees hajar haain.
Numbers2:12 unake pas jo dere khde kiya karen ve shaimon ke gotra ke honge
Numbers2:13 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh unasatt hajar teen sau haain.
Numbers2:14 fir gad ke gotra ke rahe
Numbers2:15 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh paaintalees hajar saddhe chh: sau haain.
Numbers2:16 rooben kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar deddh lakh aek hajar saddhe char sau haain. doosara kooch inaka ho.
Numbers2:17 unake peechhe aur sab chhavaaniyon ke beechonbeech leviyon kee chhavanee samet milapavale tamboo ka kooch hua kare jis kram se ve dere khde karen usee kram se ve apane apane sthan par apane apane jhnde ke pas pas chalen..
Numbers2:18 paachchhim alang par aepraaim kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe
Numbers2:19 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chalees hajar haain.
Numbers2:20 unake sameep manashsho ke gotra ke rahe
Numbers2:21 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh battees hajar do sau haain.
Numbers2:22 fir binyameen ke gotra men rahe
Numbers2:23 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh paaintees hajar char sau haain.
Numbers2:24 aepraaim kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar aek lakh att hajar aek sau puroosh haain. teesara kooch inaka ho.
Numbers2:25 uttr alang par dan kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe
Numbers2:26 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh basatt hajar sat sau haain.
Numbers2:27 aur unake pas jo dere khde karen ve ashor ke gotra ke rahe
Numbers2:28 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe ikatalees hajar haain.
Numbers2:29 fir naptalee ke gotra ke rahe
Numbers2:30 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh tirapan hajar char sau haain.
Numbers2:31 aur dan kee chhavanee men jitane gine gaae ve sab milakar deddh lakh sat hajar chh: sau haain. ye apane apane jhnde ke pas pas hokar sab se peechhe kooch karen.
Numbers2:32 israaeliyon men se jo apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar gine gaae ve ye hee haain aur sab chhavaniyon ke jitane puroosh apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar chh: lakh teen hajar saddhe panch sau the.
Numbers2:33 parantu yahova ne moosa ko jo agyaa dee bhee usake anusar leveey to israaeliyon men gine naheen gaae.
Numbers2:34 aur jo jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee israaelee un agyaaon ke anusar apane apane kul aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar
Numbers3:1 jis samay yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas moosa se baten kee us samay haroon aur moosa kee yah vanshaavalee thee.
Numbers3:2 haroon ke putraen ke nam ye haain: nadab jo usaka jetta tha
Numbers3:3 haroon ke putra
Numbers3:4 nadab aur abeehoo jis samay seenaai ke jangal men yahova ke sammukh uparee ag le gaae usee samay yahova ke samhane mar gaae the aur ve putraheen bhee the. aeleeajar aur itamar apane pita haroon ke samhane yajak ka kam karate rahe..
Numbers3:5 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers3:6 levee gotravalon ko sameep le akar haroon yajak ke samhane khda kar
Numbers3:7 aur jo kuchh usakee or se aur saree mandlee kee or se unhen saunpa jaae usakee raksha ve milapavale tamboo ke samahane kare
Numbers3:8 ve milapavale tamboo ke kul saman kee aur israaeliyon kee saunpee hui vastuon kee bhee raksha kare
Numbers3:9 aur too leaviyon ko haroon aur usake putraen ko saunp de aur ve israaeliyon kee or se haroon ko sampoorn reeti se arpan kiae huae hon.
Numbers3:10 aur haroon aur usake putraen ko yajak ke pad par niyukt kar
Numbers3:11 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers3:12 sun israaelee striayon ke sab pahilautton kee santee maain israaeliyon men se leaviyon ko le leta hoon so leveey mere hee hon.
Numbers3:13 sab paahilautte mere haain kyonaki jis din maain ne misr desh men ke sab paahilautton ko mara
Numbers3:14 fir yahova ne seenaai ke jangal men moosa se kaha
Numbers3:15 leaviyon men se jitane puroosh aek maheene va us se adhaik avastha ke hon unako unake pitaron ke gharanon aur unake kulon ke anusar gin le.
Numbers3:16 yah agyaa pakar moosa ne yahova ke kahe ke anusar unako gin liya.
Numbers3:17 levee ke putraen ke nam ye haai
Numbers3:18 aur gesharen ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai
Numbers3:19 kahat ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai
Numbers3:20 aur mararee ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai
Numbers3:21 gesharen se libnaiyon aur shaimiyon ke kul chale gesharenavanashaiyon ke kul ye hee haain.
Numbers3:22 in men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha aek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee
Numbers3:23 gesharenavale kul nivas ke peechhe pachchhim kee or apane dere dala karen
Numbers3:24 aur geshareaniyon ke moolapuroosh se gharane ka pradhaan laael ka putra aelyasap ho.
Numbers3:25 aur milapavale tamboo kee jo vastuen gesharenavanashaiyon ko saunpee jaaen ve ye ho
Numbers3:26 aur jo angan nivas aur vedee kee charon or haai usake parde
Numbers3:27 fir kahat se amraaamiyo
Numbers3:28 un men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha ek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee unakee ginatee att hajar chh: sau thee. ve paavitra sthan kee raksha ke uttradayee the.
Numbers3:29 kahatiyon ke kul nivas kee us alang par apane dere dala karen jo dakkhian kee or haai
Numbers3:30 aur kahatavale kulon se moolapuroosh ke gharane ka pradhaan ujjeeael ka putra aeleesapan ho.
Numbers3:31 aur jo vastuaen unako saunpee jaaen ve sandook
Numbers3:32 aur leaviyon ke pradhaanon ka pradhaan haroon yajak ka putra aeleeajar ho
Numbers3:33 fir mararee se mahaaliyon aur mooshaiyon ke kul chale mararee ke kul ye hee haain.
Numbers3:34 in men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha aek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee un sabhon kee ginatee chh: hajar do sau thee.
Numbers3:35 aur mararee ke kulon ke moolapuroosh ke gharane ka pradhaan abeehaail ka putra sooreeael ho ye log nivas ke uttr kee or apane dere khde karen.
Numbers3:36 aur jo vastuaen marareevanashaiyon ko saunpee jaaen ki ve unakee raksha kare
Numbers3:37 aur charon or ke angan ke khmbhe
Numbers3:38 aur jo milapavale tamboo ke samhane
Numbers3:39 yahova kee is agyaa ko pakar aek maheene kee va us se aadhaik avasthavale jitane leveey purooshaen ko moosa aur haroon ne unake kulon ke anusar gin liya
Numbers3:40 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers3:41 aur mere liye israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton kee santee leviyon ko
Numbers3:42 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton ko gin liya.
Numbers3:43 aur sab paahilautte puroosh jinakee avastha aek maheene kee va us se aadhaik thee
Numbers3:44 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers3:45 israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton kee santee leviyon ko
Numbers3:46 aur israaeliyon ke paahilautton me se jo do sau tihattr ginatee men leviyon se aadhaik haai
Numbers3:47 puroosh peechhe panch shokel le ve pavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se ho
Numbers3:48 aur jo roopaya un aadhaik pahilautton kee chhudautee ka hoga use haroon aur usake putraen ko de dena.
Numbers3:49 aur jo israaelee paahilautte leviyon ke dara chhudaae huon se aadhaik the unake hath se moosa ne chhudautee ka roopaya liya.
Numbers3:50 aur aek hajar teen sau paainsatt shaukel roopaya pavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se vasool hua.
Numbers3:51 aur yahova kee agyaa ke anusar moosa ne chhudaae huon ka roopaya haroon aur usake putraen ko de diya..
Numbers4:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Numbers4:2 leaviyon men se kahatiyon kee
Numbers4:3 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavalon kee sena me
Numbers4:4 aur milapavale tamboo men paramapaavitra vastuon ke vishay kahatiyon ka yah kam hoga
Numbers4:5 arthata jab jab chhavanee ka kooch ho tab tab haroon aur usake putra bheetar akar
Numbers4:6 tab ve us par sooison kee khalon ka ohar dale
Numbers4:7 fir bhenttvalee rottee kee meja par neela kapada bichhakar us par parato
Numbers4:8 tab ve un par lal rang ka kapada bichhakar usako suison kee khalon ke ohar se ddhape
Numbers4:9 fir ve neele rang ka kapada lekar deepako
Numbers4:10 tab ve sare saman samet deevatt ko sooison kee khalon ke ohar ke bheetar rakhkar dnde par dhar den.
Numbers4:11 fir ve sone kee vedee par aek neela kapada bichhakar usako sooison kee khalon ke ohar ke bheetar rakhkar dnde par dhar den.
Numbers4:12 tab ve seva tthal ke sare saman ko lekar
Numbers4:13 fir ve vedee par se sab rakh uttakar vedee par baainjanee rang ka kapada bichhaaen
Numbers4:14 tab jis saman se vedee par kee seva tthal hotee haai vah sab
Numbers4:15 aur jab haroon aur usake putra chhavanee ke kooch ke samay paavitrasthan aur usake sare saman ko ddhnap chuke
Numbers4:16 aur jo vastuaen haroon yajak ke putra aeleejar ko raksha ke liye saunpee jaaen ve ye haai
Numbers4:17 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Numbers4:18 kahatiyon ke kulon ke gotraiyon ko leaviyon men se nash n hone dena
Numbers4:19 usake sath aeesa karo
Numbers4:20 aur ve paavitra vastuon ke dekhne ko kshan bhr ke liye bhee bheetar ane n paae
Numbers4:21 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha

Numbers4:23 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavale

Numbers4:26 aur nivas
Numbers4:27 aur geshareaniyon ke vansh kee saree sevakai haroon aur usake putraen ke kahane se hua kare
Numbers4:28 milapavale tamboo men geshareniyon ke kulon kee yahee sevakai tthare aur un par haroon yajak ka putra itamar aadhaikar rakhe..
Numbers4:29 fir maraariyon ko bhee too unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gin len
Numbers4:30 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavale
Numbers4:31 aur milapavale tamboo men kee jin vastuon ke uttane kee sevakai unako mile ve ye ho
Numbers4:32 aur charon or angan ke khmbhe
Numbers4:33 marariyon ke kulon kee saree sevakai jo unhen milapavale tamboo ke vishay karanee hogee vah yahee haai vah haroon yajak ke putra itamar ke aadhaikar men rahe..
Numbers4:34 tab moosa aur haroon aur mandlee ke pradhaanon ne kahaatiyon ke vansh ko
Numbers4:35 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha kee avastha ke
Numbers4:36 aur jo apane apane kul ke anusar gine gaae ve do hajar saddhe sat sau the.
Numbers4:37 kahatiyon ke kulon men se jitane milapavale tamboo men seva karane vale gine gaae ve itane hee the jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ke dara dee thee usee ke anusar moosa aur haroon ne inako gin liya..
Numbers4:38 aur geshareaniyon men se jo apane kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gine gaa
Numbers4:39 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avastha ke
Numbers4:40 unakee ginatee unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar do hajar chh: sau tees thee.

Numbers4:43 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avastha ke
Numbers4:44 unakee ginatee unake kulon ke anusar teen hajar do sau thee.

Numbers9:1 israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikalane ke doosare varsha ke paahile maheene men yahova ne seenaai ke jangal men moosa se kaha
Numbers9:2 israaelee fasah nam pabrba ko usake niyat samay par mana karen.
Numbers9:3 arthata isee maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay tum log use sab vidhaiyon aur niyamon ke anusar manana.
Numbers9:4 tab moosa ne israaeliyon se fasah manane ke liye kah diya.
Numbers9:5 aur unhon ne pahale maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay seenaai ke jangal men fasah ko mana aur jo jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee theen unheen ke anusar israaeliyon ne kiya.
Numbers9:6 parantu kitane log kisee manushy kee loth ke dara ashuuddh hone ke karan us din fasah ko n man sake ve usee din moosa aur haroon ke sameep jakar moosa se kahane lage
Numbers9:7 ham log aek manushy kee loth ke karan ashuuddh haain parantu ham kyon rooke rahe

Numbers9:9 yahova ne moosa se kaha

Numbers9:12 aur us men se kuchh bhee bihan tak n rakh chhode
Numbers9:13 parantu jo manushy shuuddh ho aur yatra par n ho

Numbers9:15 jis din nivas jo sakshaee ka tamboo bhee kahalata haai khda kiya gaya

Numbers9:20 aur kabhee kabhee vah badal thode hee din tak nivas par rahata
Numbers9:21 aur kabhee kabhee badal keval sandhya se bhor tak rahata aur jab vah bhor ko utt jata tha tab ve prasthan karate the

Numbers10:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers10:2 chandee kee do turahiyan gaddhke banai jaaen too unako mandlee ke bulane
Numbers10:3 aur jab ve donon faookee jaae
Numbers10:4 aur yaadi aek hee turahee foonkee jaa
Numbers10:5 jab tum log sans bandhakar foonko
Numbers10:6 aur jab tum doosaree ber sans bandhakar foonko
Numbers10:7 aur jab logon ko ikattha karake sabha karanee ho tab bhee foonkana parantu sans bandhakar naheen.
Numbers10:8 aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve un turahiyon ko foonka karen. yah bat tumharee peeddhee-peeddhee ke liye sarvada kee vidhai rahe.
Numbers10:9 aur jab tum apane desh men kisee satanevale baairee se ladne ko nikalo
Numbers10:10 aur apane anand ke din me
Numbers10:11 aur doosare varsha ke doosare maheene ke beesaven din ko badal sakshaee ke nivas par se utt gaya
Numbers10:12 tab israaelee seenaai ke jangal men se nikalakar prasthan karake nikale aur badal paran nam jangal men tthar gaya.
Numbers10:13 unaka prasthan yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee thee arambh hua.
Numbers10:14 aur sab se pahale to yahoodiyon kee chhavanee ke jhnde ka prasthan hua
Numbers10:15 aur issakariyon ke gotra ka senapati sooar ka putra natanel tha.
Numbers10:16 aur jaboolooniyon ke gotra ka senapati helon ka putra aeleeab tha.
Numbers10:17 tab nivas utara gaya
Numbers10:18 fir rooben kee chhavanee jhnde ka kooch hua
Numbers10:19 aur shaimoniyon ke gotra ka senapati sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeael tha.
Numbers10:20 aur gaadiyon ke gotra ka senapati dooael ka putra aelyasap tha.
Numbers10:21 tab kahatiyon ne paavitra vastuon ko uttaae huae prasthan kiya
Numbers10:22 fir aepraaimiyon kee chhavanee ke jhnde ka kooch hua
Numbers10:23 aur manashshoiyon ke gotra ko senapaati padasoor ka putra gamleeael tha.
Numbers10:24 aur binyameeaniyon ke gotra ka senapati gidonee ka putra abeedan tha.
Numbers10:25 fir daniyon kee chhavanee jo sab chhavaniyon ke peechhe thee
Numbers10:26 aur ashoriyon ke gotra ka senapati okran ka putra pajeeael tha.
Numbers10:27 aur naptaaliyon ke gotra ka senapati aenan ka putra aheera tha.
Numbers10:28 israaelee isee prakar apane apane dalon ke anusar prasthan karate
Numbers10:29 aur moosa ne apane sasur rooael midhanee ke putra hobab se kaha
Numbers10:30 hobab ne use uttr diya
Numbers10:31 fir moosa ne kaha
Numbers10:32 aur yaadi too hamare sang chale
Numbers10:33 fir israaeliyon ne yahova ke parvat se prasthan karake teen din kee yatra kee aur un teenon dinon ke marga men yahova kee vacha ka sandook unake liye vishraam ka sthan ddoonddhta hua unake age age chalata raha.
Numbers10:34 aur jab ve chhavanee ke sthan se prasthan karate the tab din bhr yahova ka badal unake upar chhaya rahata tha.
Numbers10:35 aur jab jab sandook ka prasthan hota tha tab tab moosa yah kaha karata tha
Numbers10:36 aur jab jab vah tthar jata tha tab tab moosa kaha karata tha
Numbers11:1 fir ve log budbudane aur yahova ke sunate bura kahane lage nidan yahova ne suna
Numbers11:2 tab moosa ke pas akar chillaae aur moosa ne yahova se praarthna kee
Numbers11:3 aur us sthan ka nam tabera pada
Numbers11:4 fir jo milee-julee bheed unake sath thee vah kamukata karane lagee aur israaelee bhee fir rone aur kahane lage
Numbers11:5 hamen ve machhaliyan smaran haain jo ham misr men sentament khaya karate the
Numbers11:6 parantu ab hamara jee ghabara gaya haai
Numbers11:7 manna to dhaaniye ke saman tha
Numbers11:8 log idhar udhar jakar use battorate
Numbers11:9 aur rat ko chhavanee men os padtee thee tab usake sath manna bhee girata tha.

Numbers19:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Numbers19:2 vyavastha kee jis vidhai kee agyaa yahova deta haai vah yah haai ki too israaeliyon se kah
Numbers19:3 tab aeleeajar yajak ko do

Numbers19:5 tab koi us bachhyai ko khal
Numbers19:6 aur yajak devadaroo kee lakadee
Numbers19:7 tab vah apane vasr dhaeae aur snan kare
Numbers19:8 aur jo manushy usako jalaae vah bhee jal se apane vasr dhaeae aur snan kare
Numbers19:9 fir koi shuuddh puroosh us bachhyai kee rakh battorakar chhavanee ke bahar kisee shuuddh sthan men rakh chhode aur vah rakh israaeliyon kee mandlee ke liye ashuuddhta se chhudanevale jal ke liye rakhee rahe vah to papabaali haai.
Numbers19:10 aur jo manushy baachhyai kee rakh battore vah apane vasr dhaea
Numbers19:11 jo kisee manushy kee loth chooae vah sat din tak ashuuddh rahe
Numbers19:12 aeesa manushy teesare din us jal se pap chhudakar apane ko pavan kare
Numbers19:13 jo koi kisee manushy kee loth chookar pap chhudakar apane ko pavan n kare
Numbers19:14 yaadi koi manushy dere men mar jaae to vyavastha yah yah haai
Numbers19:15 aur har aek khula hua patra
Numbers19:16 aur jo koi maaidan men talavar se mare huae ko
Numbers19:17 ashuuddh manushy ke liye jalaae huae papabali kee rakh men se kuchh lekar patra men dalakar us par sote ka jal dala jaae
Numbers19:18 tab koi shuuddh manushy joofaa lekar us jal men dubakar jal ko us dere par
Numbers19:19 vah shuuddh puroosh teesare din aur sataven din us ashuuddh manushy par chhdike aur sataven din vah usake pap chhudakar usako pavan kare
Numbers19:20 aur jo koi ashuuddh hokar apane pap chhudakar apane ko pavan n karaa
Numbers19:21 aur yah unake liye sada kee vidhai tthare. jo ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal chhdike vah apane vasren ko dhaeae aur jis jan se ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal choo jaae vah bhee sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.
Numbers19:22 aur jo kuchh vah ashuuddh manushy chooae vah bhee ashuuddh tthare aur jo praanee us vastu ko chooae vah bhee sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe..
Numbers20:1 paahile maheene men saree israaelee mandlee ke log seenaai nam jangal men a gaa
Numbers20:2 vahan mandlee ke logon ke liye panee n mila so ve moosa aur haroon ke virooddh ikatthe huae.
Numbers20:3 aur log yah kahakar moosa se jhgadne lage
Numbers20:4 aur tum yahova kee mandlee ko is jangal men kyon le aae ho
Numbers20:5 aur tum ne ham ko misr se kyon nikalakar is bure sthan men pahunchaya haai? yahan to beech
Numbers20:6 tab moosa aur haroon mandlee ke samhane se milapavale tamboo ke dar par jakar apane munh ke bal gire. aur yahova ka tej unako dikhai diya.
Numbers20:7 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha
Numbers20:8 us lattee ko le
Numbers20:9 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne usake samhane se lattee ko le liya.
Numbers20:10 aur moosa aur haroon ne mandlee ko us chattan ke samhane ikattha kiya
Numbers20:11 tab moosa ne hath uttakar lattee chattan par do bar maree aur us men se bahut panee foott nikala
Numbers20:12 parantu moosa aur haroon se yahova ne kaha
Numbers20:13 us sote ka nam mareeba pada
Numbers20:14 fir moosa ne kadesh se aedom ke raja ke pas doot bheje
Numbers20:15 arthata yah ki hamare purakha misr men gaae the
Numbers20:16 parantu jab ham ne yahova kee dohai dee tab us ne hamaree sunee
Numbers20:17 so hamen apane desh men se hokar jane de. ham kisee khet va dakh kee baree se hokar n chalenge
Numbers20:18 parantu aedomiyon ne usake pas kahala bheja
Numbers20:19 israaeliyon ne usake pas fir kahala bheja
Numbers20:20 parantu us ne kaha
Numbers20:21 is prakar aedom ne israael ko apane desh ke bheetar se hokar jane dene se inkar kiya isaliye israael usakee or se mud gaae..
Numbers20:22 tab israaeliyon kee saree mandlee kadesh se kooch karake hor nam pahad ke pas a gai.
Numbers20:23 aur aedom desh ke sivane par hor pahad men yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha
Numbers20:24 haroon apane logon meen ja milega kyonki tum dono ne jo mareeba nam sote par mera kahana chhodkar mujh se balava kiya haai
Numbers20:25 so too haroon aur usake putra aeleeajar ko hor pahad par le chala
Numbers20:26 aur haroon ke vasr utarake usake putra aeleeajar ko pahina tab haroon vaheen marakar apane logon me ja milega.
Numbers20:27 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne kiya ve saree mandlee ke dekhte hor pahad par chaddh gaae.
Numbers20:28 tab moosa ne haroon ke vasr utarake usake putra aeleeajar ko pahinaae aur haroon vaheen pahad kee chottee par mar gaya. tab moosa aur aeleeajar pahad par se utar aae.
Numbers20:29 aur jab israael kee saree mandlee ne dekha ki haroon ka praan choott gaya haai

Numbers28:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa suna ki mera chaddhava
Numbers28:3 aur too un se kah
Numbers28:4 aek bachche ko bhor ko aur doosare ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana
Numbers28:5 aur bhed ke bachche ke peechhe aek chauthai heen koottke nikale huae tel se sane huae aepa ke dasaven ansh maaide ka annabaali chaddhana.
Numbers28:6 yah nity homabaali haai
Numbers28:7 aur usaka argha prati aek bhed ke bachche ke sang aek chauthai heen ho madira ka yah argha yahova ke liye paavitrasthan men dena.
Numbers28:8 aur doosare bachche ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana annabaali aur argha samet bhor ke homabali kee nai use yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy karake chaddhana..
Numbers28:9 fir vishraamadin ko do nirdosh bhed ke aek sal ke nar bachche
Numbers28:10 nity homabaali aur usake argha ke alava pratyek vishraamadin ka yahee homabaali tthara haai..
Numbers28:11 fir apane maheenon ke arambh men pratimas yahova ke liye homabaali chaddhana arthata do bachhde
Numbers28:12 aur bachhde peechhe tel se sana hua aepa ka teen dasavan ansh maaida
Numbers28:13 aur pratyek bhed ke bachche ke peechhe tel se sana hua aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida
Numbers28:14 aur unake sath ye argha hon arthata bachhde peechhe adha heen
Numbers28:15 aur aek bakara papabaali karake yahova ke liye chaddhaya jaae yah nity homabaali aur usake argha ke alava chaddhaya jaae..
Numbers28:16 fir pahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko yahova ka fasah hua kare.
Numbers28:17 aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko pabrba laga kare sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khai jaae.
Numbers28:18 paahile din pavitra sabha ho aur us din parishram ka koi kam n kiya jaae
Numbers28:19 us men tum yahova ke liye havy
Numbers28:20 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho bachhde peechhe aepa ka teen dasavan ansh aur meddhe ke sat aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida ho.
Numbers28:21 aur saton bhed ke bachchon men se praati aek bachche peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh chaddhana.
Numbers28:22 aur aek bakara bhee papabaali karake chaddhana
Numbers28:23 bhor ka homabaali jo nity homabaali tthara haai
Numbers28:24 is reeati se tum un saton dinon men bhee havy ka bhojan chaddhana

Numbers33:1 jab se israaelee moosa aur haroon kee aguvai se dal bandhakar misr desh se nikale
Numbers33:2 moosa ne yahova se agyaa pakar unake kooch unake padavon ke anusar likh diae aur ve ye haain.
Numbers33:3 paahile maheene ke pandrahaven din ko unhon ne ramases se kooch kiya fasah ke doosare din israaelee sab misriyon ke dekhte bekhttke nikal gaa
Numbers33:4 jab ki misree apane sab paahilautton ko mittee de rahe the jinhen yahova ne mara tha aur us ne unake devataon ko bhee dand diya tha.
Numbers33:5 israaeliyon ne ramases se kooch kare sukkot men dere dale.
Numbers33:6 aur sukkot se kooch karake aetam me
Numbers33:7 aur aetam se kooch karake ve peehaheerot ko mud gaa
Numbers33:8 tab ve peehaheerot ke samhane se kooch kar samudra ke beech hokar jangal men gaa
Numbers33:9 fir mara se kooch karake ve aeleem ko gaa
Numbers33:10 tab unhon ne aeleem se kooch kare lal samudra ke teer par dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:11 aur lal samudra se kooch karake seen nam jangal men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:12 fir seen nam jangal se kooch karake unhon ne dopaka men dera kiya.
Numbers33:13 aur dopaka se kooch karake aloosh men dera kiya.
Numbers33:14 aur aloosh se kooch karake rapeedeem men dera kiya
Numbers33:15 fir unhon ne rapeedeem se kooch karake seenaai ke jangal men dere dale.
Numbers33:16 aur seenaai ke jangal se kooch karake kibraethttava men dera kiya.
Numbers33:17 aur kibraethttava se kooch kare haserot men dere dale.
Numbers33:18 aur haserot se kooch karake ritma men dere dale.
Numbers33:19 fir unhon ne ritma se kooch karake rimmonaperes men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:20 aur rimmonaperes se kooch karake libna men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:21 aur libna se kooch karake rissa men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:22 aur rissa se kooch karake kahelata men dera kiya.
Numbers33:23 aur kahelata se kooch karake shoper parvat ke pas dera kiya.
Numbers33:24 fir unhon ne shoper parvat se kooch karake harada men dera kiya.
Numbers33:25 aur harada se kooch karake makhelot men dera kiya.
Numbers33:26 aur makhelot se kooch karake tahat men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:27 aur tahat se kooch karake terah men dere dale.
Numbers33:28 aur terah se kooch karake mitka men dere dale.
Numbers33:29 fir mitka se kooch karake unhon ne hashamona men dere dale.
Numbers33:30 aur hashamona se kooch karake moserot me dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:31 aur moserot se kooch karake yakaaniyon ke beech dera kiya.
Numbers33:32 aur yakaniyon ke beech se kooch karake horhaaggaidagad men dera kiya.
Numbers33:33 aur horhaggaidagad se kooch karake yotabata men dera kiya.
Numbers33:34 aur yotabata se kooch karake abraena men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:35 aur abraena se kooch karake aesyonageber men dere khde kiae.
Numbers33:36 aur aesyonageber ke kooch karake unhon ne seen nam jangal ke kadesh men dera kiya.
Numbers33:37 fir kadesh se kooch karake hor parvat ke pas
Numbers33:38 vahan israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikalane ke chaleesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke pahile din ko haroon yajak yahova kee agyaa pakar hor parvat par chaddha
Numbers33:39 aur jab haroon hor parvat par mar gaya tab vah aek sau teis varsha ka tha.
Numbers33:40 aur arat ka kananee raja
Numbers33:41 tab israaeliyon ne hor parvat se kooch karake salamona men dere dale.
Numbers33:42 aur salamona se kooch karake poonon men dere dale.
Numbers33:43 aur poonon se kooch karake obos men dere dale.
Numbers33:44 aur obos se kooch karake abareem nam deehon men jo moab ke sivane par haai
Numbers33:45 tab un deehon se kooch karake unhon ne deebonagad men dera kiya.
Numbers33:46 aur deebonagad se kooch karake almonadibalataaim se kooch karake unhon ne abareem nam pahadon meen nabo ke samhane dera kiya.
Numbers33:47 aur almonadibalataaim se kooch karake unhon ne abareem nam pahadon men nabo ke samhane dera kiya.
Numbers33:48 fir abareem pahadon se kooch karake moab ke araba me
Numbers33:49 aur ve moab ke araba men vetyashaeemot se lekar abelashaitteem tak yaradan ke teer teer dere dale..
Numbers33:50 fir moab ke araba me
Numbers33:51 israaeliyon ko samajhakar kah
Numbers33:52 tab us desh ke nivaasiyon ko unake desh se nikal dena aur unake sab nakkasho patthron ko aur ddhlee hui moortiyon ko nash karana
Numbers33:53 aur us desh ko apane adhaikar men lekar us men nivas karana
Numbers33:54 aur tum us desh ko chitthee dalakar apane kulon ke anusar bantt lena arthata jo kul adhaikavale haain unhen adhaik
Numbers33:55 parantu yadi tum us desh ke nivaasiyon ko apane age se n nikaloge
Numbers33:56 aur un se jaaisa bartav karane kee manasa maain ne kee haai vaaisa hee tum se karoonga.

Numbers34:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa de

Numbers34:4 vahan se tumhara sivana akrabbeem nam chaddhai kee dakkhian kee or pahunchakar mude
Numbers34:5 fir vah sivana asmon se ghoomakar misr ke nale tak pahunche
Numbers34:6 fir pachchhimee sivana mahasamudra ho tumhara paachchhimee sivana yahee tthare.
Numbers34:7 aur tumhara uttreey sivana yah ho
Numbers34:8 aur hor parvat se hamat kee ghaattee tak sivana bandhana
Numbers34:9 fir vah sivana jipraen tak pahunche
Numbers34:10 fir apana poorabee sivana hasarenan se shapam tak bandhana
Numbers34:11 aur vah sivana shapam se ribala tak
Numbers34:12 aur vah sivana yaradan tak utarake khare tal ke tatt par nikale. tumhare desh ke charon sivane ye hee ttharen.

Numbers34:18 aur desh ko banttne ke liye aek aek gotra ka aek aek pradhaan ttharana.

Numbers34:27 ashoriyon ke gotra ka pradhaan shalomee ka putra aheehood
Numbers34:28 aur naptaaliyon ke gotra ka pradhaan ammeehood ka putra padahela.

Numbers35:5 aur nagar ke bahar poorva

Numbers35:12 ve nagar tumhare nimitt palatta lenevale se sharan lene ke kam aaenge
Numbers35:13 aur sharan ke jo nagar tum doge ve chh: hon.
Numbers35:14 teen nagar to yaradan ke is par
Numbers35:15 ye chhhon nagar israaeliyon ke aur unake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon ke liye bhee sharansthan tthare
Numbers35:16 parantu yadi koi kisee ko lohe ke kisee haathaiyar se aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa

Numbers35:18 va koi hath men aeesee lakadee lekar

Numbers35:21 va shatrauta se usako apane hath se aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa
Numbers35:22 parantu yadi koi kisee ko bina soche
Numbers35:23 va aeesa koi patthr lekar
Numbers35:24 to mandlee maranevale aur lohoo ka palatta lenevale ke beech in niyamon ke anusar nyay kare
Numbers35:25 aur mandlee us koonee ko lohoo ke palatta lenevale ke hath se bachakar us sharannagar men jahan vah paahile bhag gaya ho lautta de
Numbers35:26 parantu yadi vah koonee us sharansthan ke sivane se jis men vah bhag gaya ho bahar nikalakar aur kaheen jaa
Numbers35:27 aur lohoo ka palatta lenevala usako sharansthan ke sivane ke bahar kaheen pakar mar dale
Numbers35:28 kyonaki koonee ko mahayajak kee mratyu tak sharansthan men rahana chaahiye aur mahayajak ke marane ke pashchata vah apanee nij boomi ko lautt sakega.
Numbers35:29 tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men tumhare sab rahane ke sthanon men nyay kee yah vidhai hogee.
Numbers35:30 aur jo koi kisee manushy ko mar dale vah sakshiayon ke kahane par mar dala jaa
Numbers35:31 aur jo koonee praandand ke yogy tthare us se praandand ke badale men juramana n lena vah avashy mar dala jaae.
Numbers35:32 aur jo kisee sharansthan men bhaga ho usake liye bhee is matalab se juramana n lena

Numbers35:34 jis desh men tum nivas karoge usake beech maai rahoonga
Numbers36:1 fir yoosufiyon ke kulon men se gilad
Numbers36:2 yahova ne hamare prabhu ko agyaa dee thee
Numbers36:3 to yaadi ve israaeliyon ke aur kisee gotra ke purooshaen se byahee jaae
Numbers36:4 aur jab israaeliyon kee jubalee hogee
Numbers36:5 tab yahova se agyaa pakar moosa ne israaeliyon se kaha
Numbers36:6 salofaad kee beattyaien ke vishay men yahova ne yah agyaa dee haai
Numbers36:7 aur israaeliyon ke kisee gotra ka bhag doosare ke gotra ke bhag men ne milane paae israaelee apane apane moolapuroosh ke gotra ke bhag par bane rahen.
Numbers36:8 aur israaeliyon ke kisee gotra men kisee kee bettee ho jo bhag panevalee ho
Numbers36:9 kisee gotra ka bhag doosare gotra ke bhag men milane n paaen israaeliyon ke aek aek gotra ke log apane apane bhag par bane rahen.
Numbers36:10 yahova kee agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee salofaad kee bettyaien ne kiya.
Numbers36:11 arthata mahala
Numbers36:12 ve yoosufa ke putra manashsho ke vansh ke kulon men byahee gai
Numbers36:13 jo agyaaaen aur niyam yahova ne moab ke araba men yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke teer par moosa ke dara israaeliyon ko diae ve ye hee haain..
Deuteronomy1:1 jo baten moosa ne yaradan ke par jangal me
Deuteronomy1:2 horeb se kadeshabarne tak seir pahad ka marga gyarah din ka haain.
Deuteronomy1:3 chaleesaven varsha ke gyarahaven maheene ke paahile din ko jo kuchh yahova ne moosa ko israaeliyon se kahane kee agyaa dee thee

Deuteronomy1:5 usake bad yaradan ke par moab desh men vah vyavastha ka vivaran yon karane laga

Deuteronomy16:1 abeeb ke maheene ko smaran karake apane parameshvar yahova ke liy fasah ka pavrva manana kyonkai abeeb maheene men tera parameshvar yahova rat ko tujhe misr se nikal laya.
Deuteronomy16:2 isaliye jo sthan yahova apane nam ka nivas ttharane ko chun lega
Deuteronomy16:3 usake sang koi khmeeree vastu n khana sat din tak akhmeeree rottee jo du:kh kee rottee haai khaya karana kyonaki too misr desh se utavalee karake nikala tha isee reeati se tujh ko misr desh se nikalane ka din jeevan bhr smaran rahega.
Deuteronomy16:4 sat din tak tere sare desh men tere pas kaheen khmeer dekhne men bhee n aae aur jo pashu too paahile din kee sandhya ko baali kare usake mans men se kuchh bihan tak rahane n paae.
Deuteronomy16:5 fasah ko apane kisee faattk ke bheetar
Deuteronomy16:6 jo sthan tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas karane ke liye chun le keval vahee
Deuteronomy16:7 tab usaka mans usee sthan men jise tera parameshvar yahova chun le boonjakar khana fir bihan ko uttkar apane apane dere ko lautt jana.
Deuteronomy16:8 chh: din tak akheemeeree rottee khaya karana aur sataven din tere parameshvar yahova ke liye mahasabha ho us din kisee prakar ka kamakaj n kiya jaae..
Deuteronomy16:9 fir jab too khet men hansua lagane lage
Deuteronomy16:10 tab apane parameshvar yahova kee ashaeesh ke anusar usake liye svechchha bali dekar attvaron nam pavrva manana
Deuteronomy16:11 aur us sthan men jo tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas karane ko chun le apane apane bette-bettyaie
Deuteronomy16:12 aur smaran rakhna ki too bhee misr men das tha isaaliye in vidhaiyon ke palan karane men chaukasee karana..
Deuteronomy16:13 too jab apane khalihan aur dakhmadha ke kund men se sab kuchh ikattha kar chuke
Deuteronomy16:14 aur apane is pavrva men apane apane bette bettyaie
Deuteronomy16:15 jo sthan yahova chun le us men tu apane parameshvar yahova ke liye sat din tak pavrva manate rahana kyonki tera parameshvar yahova teree saree baddhtee men aur tere sab kamon men tujh ko ashaeesh dega too anand hee karana.

Deuteronomy16:17 sab puroosh apanee apanee poonjee
Deuteronomy16:18 too apane aek aek gotra men se

Deuteronomy16:20 jo kuchh nitant tteek haai usee ka peechha pakade rahana

Joshua1:1 yahova ke das moosa kee mratyu ke bad yahova ne usake sevak yahoshoo se jo noon ka putra tha kaha
Joshua1:2 mera das moosa mar gaya haai so ab too ut
Joshua1:3 us vachan ke anusar jo maain ne moosa se kaha
Joshua1:4 jangal aur us labanon se lekar parat mahanad tak
Joshua1:5 tere jeevan bhr koi tere samhane tthar n sakega jaaise maain moosa ke sang raha vaaise hee tere sang bhee rahoonga aur n to maain tujhe dhaekha doonga
Joshua1:6 isaliye hiyav bandhakar draddh ho ja kyonaki jis desh ke dene kee shapath maain ne in logon ke poorvajon se khai thee usaka aadhaikaree too inhen karega.
Joshua1:7 itana ho ki too hiyav bandhakar aur bahut draddh hokar jo vyavastha mere das moosa ne tujhe dee haai un sab ke anusar karane men chaukasee karana aur us se n to dahine mudna aur n bana
Joshua1:8 vyavastha kee yah pustak tere chitt se kabhee n utarane paa
Joshua1:9 kya maain ne tujhe agyaa naheen dee? hiyav bandhakar draddh ho ja bhy n kha
Joshua1:10 tab yahoshoo ne praja ke saradaron ko yah agyaa dee
Joshua1:11 ki chhavanee men idhar udhar jakar praja ke logon ko yah agyaa do
Joshua1:12 fir yahoshoo ne roobeaniyo
Joshua1:13 jo bat yahova ke das moosa ne tum se kahee thee
Joshua1:14 tumharee striaya
Joshua1:15 aur jab yahova unako aeesa vishraam dega jaaisa vah tumhen de chuka haai
Joshua1:16 tab unhon ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya
Joshua1:17 jaaise ham sab baton men moosa kee manate the vaaise hee teree bhee mana karenge itana ho ki tera parameshvar yahova jaaisa moosa ke sang rahata tha vaaise hee tere sang bhee rahe.
Joshua1:18 koi kyon n ho jo tere virooddh balava kare
Joshua2:1 tab noon ke putra yahoshoo ne do bheadiyon ko shaitteem se chupake se bhej diya
Joshua2:2 tab kisee ne yareeho ke raja se kaha
Joshua2:3 tab yareeho ke raja ne rahab ke pas yon kahala bheja
Joshua2:4 us sree ne donon purooshaen ko chhpai rakha aur is prakar kaha
Joshua2:5 aur jab andhora hua
Joshua2:6 us ne unako ghar kee chht par chaddhakar sanai kee lakaadiyon ke neeche chhpai diya tha jo us ne chht par saja kar rakhee thee.
Joshua2:7 ve puroosh to yaradan ka marga le unakee khoj men ghaatt tak chale gaae aur jyon hee unako khojanevale faattk se nikale tyon hee faattk band kiya gaya.
Joshua2:8 aur ye lettne n paae the ki vah sree chht par inake pas jakar
Joshua2:9 in purooshaen se kahane lagee
Joshua2:10 kyonaki ham ne suna haai ki yahova ne tumhare misr se nikalane ke samay tumhare samhane lal samudra ka jal sukha diya. aur tum logon ne seehon aur og nam yaradan par rahanevale aemoriyon ke donon rajaon ko satyanash kar dala haai.
Joshua2:11 aur yah sunate hee hamara man pighal gaya
Joshua2:12 ab maain ne jo tum par daya kee haai
Joshua2:13 ki tum mere matapita
Joshua2:14 tab un purooshaen ne us se kaha
Joshua2:15 tab rahab jisaka ghar shaharapanah par bana tha
Joshua2:16 aur us ne un se kaha
Joshua2:17 unhon ne us se kaha
Joshua2:18 tum
Joshua2:19 tab jo koi tere ghar ke dar se bahar nikale
Joshua2:20 fir yadi too hamaree yah bat kisee par pragatt kare
Joshua2:21 us ne kaha
Joshua2:22 aur ve jakar pahad tak pahunche
Joshua2:23 tab ve donon puroosh pahad se utare
Joshua2:24 aur unhon ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua3:1 bihan ko yahoshoo sabere utta
Joshua3:2 aur teen din ke bad saradaron ne chhavanee ke beech jakar
Joshua3:3 praja ke logon ko yah agyaa dee
Joshua3:4 parantu usake aur tumhare beech men do hajar hath ke attkal antar rahe tum sandook ke nikatt n jana. taaki tum dekh sako
Joshua3:5 fir yahoshoo ne praja ke logon se kaha
Joshua3:6 tab yahoshoo ne yajakon se kaha
Joshua3:7 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua3:8 aur too vacha ke sandook ke uttanevale yajakon ko yah agyaa de
Joshua3:9 tab yahoshoo ne israaeliyon se kaha
Joshua3:10 aur yahoshoo kahane laga
Joshua3:11 suno
Joshua3:12 isaliye ab israael ke gatraen men se barah purooshaen ko chun lo
Joshua3:13 aur jis samay prathvee bhr ke prabhu yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale yajakon ke panv yaradan ke jal men padenge
Joshua3:14 so jab praja ke logon ne apane deron se yaradan par jane ko kooch kiya
Joshua3:15 aur sandook ke uttanevale yaradan par pahunche
Joshua3:16 tab jo jal upar kee or se baha ata tha vah bahut door
Joshua3:17 aur yajak yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttaae huae yaradan ke beechon beech pahunchakar sthl par sthiar khde rahe
Joshua4:1 jab us saree jati ke log yaradan ke par utar chuke
Joshua4:2 praja men se barah puroosha
Joshua4:3 ki tum yaradan ke beech me
Joshua4:4 tab yahoshoo ne un barah purooshaen ko
Joshua4:5 bulavakar kaha
Joshua4:6 jis se yah tum logon ke beech chinhanee tthare
Joshua4:7 tab tum unhen uttr do
Joshua4:8 yahoshoo kee is agyaa ken anusar israaeliyon ne kiya
Joshua4:9 aur yaradan ke beech jahan yajak vacha ke sandook ko uttaae huae apane panv dhare the vahan yahoshoo ne barah patthr khde karaae ve aj tak vaheen paae jate haain.
Joshua4:10 aur yajak sandook uttaae huae us samay tak yaradan ke beech khde rahe jab tak ve sab baten pooree n ho chukee
Joshua4:11 aur jab sab log par utar chuke
Joshua4:12 aur roobenee
Joshua4:13 arthata koi chalees hajar puroosh yuddh ke hathaiyar bandho huae sangraam karane ke liye yahova ke samhane par utarakar yareeho ke pas ke araba men pahunche.
Joshua4:14 us din yahova ne sab israealiyonke samhane yahoshoo kee mahima baddhai aur jaaise ve moosa ka bhy manate the vaaise hee yahoshoo ka bhee bhy usake jeevan bhr manate rahe..
Joshua4:15 aur yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua4:16 ki sakshaee ka sandook uttanevale yajakon ko agyaa de ki yaradan men se nikal aaen.
Joshua4:17 to yahoshoo ne yajakon ko agyaa dee
Joshua4:18 aur jyon hee yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale yajak yaradan ke beech men se nikal aa
Joshua4:19 paahile maahine ke dasaven din ko praja ke logon ne yaradan men se nikalakar yareeho ke poorvee sivane par gilagal men apane dere dale.
Joshua4:20 aur jo barah patthr yaradan men se nikale gaae the
Joshua4:21 tab us ne israaeliyon se kaha
Joshua4:22 tab tum yah kahakar unako batana
Joshua4:23 kyonaki jaaise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne lal samudra ko hamare par ho jane tak hamare samhane se hattakar sukha rakha tha
Joshua4:24 isaliye ki prathvee ke sab deshaen ke log jan len ki yahova ka hath balavant haai aur tum sarvada apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy manate raho..
Joshua5:1 jab yaradan ke paachchhim kee or rahanevale aemoriyon ke sab rajaon ne
Joshua5:2 us samay yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua5:3 tab yahoshoo ne chakamak kee chhuariyan banavakar khlaadiyan nam tteele par israaeliyon ka khtana karaya.
Joshua5:4 aur yahoshoo ne jo khtana karaya
Joshua5:5 jo puroosh misr se nikale the un sab ka to khtana ho chuka tha
Joshua5:6 kyonaki israaelee to chalees varsha tak jangal men firate rahe
Joshua5:7 to un logon ke putra jin ko yahova ne unake sthan par utpann kiya tha
Joshua5:8 aur jab us saree jati ke logon ka khtana ho chuka
Joshua5:9 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua5:10 so israaelee gilagal men dere dale huae rahe
Joshua5:11 aur fasah ke doosare din ve us desh kee upaj men se akhmeeree rottee aur usee din se bhuna hua dana bhee khane lage.
Joshua5:12 aur jis din ve us desh kee upaj men se khane lage
Joshua5:13 jab yahoshoo yareeho ke pas tha tab us ne apanee ankhen uttai
Joshua5:14 us ne uttr diya
Joshua5:15 yahova kee sena ke pradhaan ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua6:1 aur yareeho ke sab faattk israaeliyon ke dr ke mare lagatar band rahe
Joshua6:2 fir yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua6:3 so tum men jitane yoddha haain nagar ko ghor le
Joshua6:4 aur chh: din tak aeesa hee kiya karana.
Joshua6:5 aur jab ve jubalee ke narasinge der tak foonkate rahe
Joshua6:6 so noon ke putra yahoshoo ne yajakon ko bulavakar kaha
Joshua6:7 fir us ne logon se kaha
Joshua6:8 aur jab yahoshoo ye baten logon se kah chuka
Joshua6:9 aur haathaiyaraband puroosh naraasinge foonkanevale yajakon ke age age chale
Joshua6:10 aur yahoshoo ne logon ko agyaa dee
Joshua6:11 us ne yahova ke sandook ko ek bar nagar ke charon or ghaumavaya tab ve chhavanee men aa
Joshua6:12 bihan ko yahoshoo sabere utta
Joshua6:13 aur un sat yajakon ne jubalee ke sat narasinge liae aur yahova ke sandook ke age age foonkate huae chale aur unake age hathaiyaraband puroosh chale
Joshua6:14 is prakar ve doosare din bhee aek bar nagar ke charon or ghoomakar chhavanee men lautt aae. aur isee prakar unhon ne chh: din tak kiya.
Joshua6:15 fir sataven din ve bhor ko bade tadke uttkar usee reeti se nagar ke charon or sat bar ghoom aae keval usee din ve sat bar ghoome.
Joshua6:16 tab sataveen bar jab yajak naraasinge foonkate the
Joshua6:17 aur nagar aur jo kuchh us men haai yahova ke liye arpan kee vastu ttharegee keval rahab veshya aur jitane usake ghar men hon ve jeevit chhode jaaenge
Joshua6:18 aur tum arpan kee hui vastuon se savadhaanee se apane ap ko alag rakho
Joshua6:19 sab chandee
Joshua6:20 tab logon ne jayajayakar kiya
Joshua6:21 aur kya puroosha
Joshua6:22 tab yahoshoo ne un donon purooshaen se jo us desh ka bhed lene gaae the kaha
Joshua6:23 tab ve donon javan bheadiae bheetar jakar rahab ko
Joshua6:24 tab unhon ne nagar ko
Joshua6:25 aur yahoshoo ne rahab veshya aur usake pita ke gharane ko
Joshua6:26 fir usee samay yahoshoo ne israaeliyon ke sammukh shapath rakhee
Joshua6:27 aur yahova yahoshoo ke sang raha aur yahoshoo kee keearti us sare desh men faail gai..
Joshua7:1 parantu israaeliyon ne arpan kee vastu ke vishay men vishvasaghaat kiya arthata yahooda ke gotra ka akan
Joshua7:2 aur yahoshoo ne yareeho se aee nam nagar ke pas
Joshua7:3 aur unhon ne yahoshoo ke pas lauttkar kaha
Joshua7:4 isaliye koi teen hajar puroosh vahan gaae parantu aee ke rahanevalon ke samhane se bhag aa
Joshua7:5 tab aee ke rahanevalon ne un men se koi chhttees puroosh mar dale
Joshua7:6 tab yahoshoo ne apane vasr faade
Joshua7:7 aur yahoshoo ne kaha
Joshua7:8 hay
Joshua7:9 kyonaki kananee varan is desh ke sab nivasee yah sunakar ham ko ghor lenge
Joshua7:10 yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua7:11 israaeliyon ne pap kiya haai aur jo vacha maain ne un se apane sath bandhaai thee usako unhon ne tod diya haai
Joshua7:12 is karan israaelee apane shatrauon ke samhane khde naheen rah sakate ve apane shatrauon ko peett dikhate haai
Joshua7:13 ut
Joshua7:14 isaliye bihan ko tum gotra gotra ke anusar sameep khde kiae jaoge aur jis gotra ko yahova pakade vah aek aek kul karake pas aae aur jis kul ko yahova pakade so gharana gharana karake pas aae fir jis gharane ko yahova pakade vah aek aek puroosh karake pas aae.
Joshua7:15 tab jo puroosh arpan kee vastu rakhe huae pakada jaaega
Joshua7:16 bihan ko yahoshoo savere uttkar israaeliyon ko gotra gotra karake sameep liva le gaya
Joshua7:17 tab us ne yahooda ke parivar ko sameep kiya
Joshua7:18 tab us ne usake gharane ke aek aek puroosh ko sameep khda kiya
Joshua7:19 tab yahoshoo akan se kahane laga
Joshua7:20 aur akan ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya
Joshua7:21 ki jab mujhe loott men shainar desh ka aek sundar oddhna
Joshua7:22 tab yahoshoo ne doot bheje
Joshua7:23 unako unhon ne dere men se nikalakar yahoshoo aur sab israeliyon ke pas lakar yahova ke samhane rakh diya.
Joshua7:24 tab sab israaeliyon samet yahoshoo jerahavanshaee akan ko
Joshua7:25 tab yahoshoo ne us se kaha
Joshua7:26 aur unhon ne usake upar patthron ka bada ddher laga diya jo aj tak bana haai tab yahova ka bhdka hua kop shaant ho gaya. is karan us sthan ka nam aj tak akor tarai pada haai..
Joshua8:1 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua8:2 aur jaaisa too ne yareeho aur usake raja se kiya vaaisa hee aee aur usake raja ke sath bhee karana keval tum pashuuon samet usakee loott to apane liye le sakoge isaliye us nagar ke peechhe kee or apane puroosh ghaat men laga do.
Joshua8:3 so yahoshoo ne sab yoddhaon samet aee par chaddhai karane kee taaiyaree kee aur yahoshoo ne tees hajar purooshaen ko jo shooraveer the chunakar rat hee ko agyaa dekar bheja.
Joshua8:4 aur unako yah agyaa dee
Joshua8:5 aur maain apane sab sathaiyon samet us nagar ke nikatt jaunga. aur jab ve pahile kee nain hamara samhana karane ko nikale
Joshua8:6 tab ve yah sochakar
Joshua8:7 tab tum ghaat men se uttkar nagar ko apana kar lena kyonki tumhara parameshvar yahova usako tumhare hath men kar dega.
Joshua8:8 aur jab nagar ko le lo
Joshua8:9 tab yahoshoo ne unako bhej diya aur ve ghaat men baaittne ko chale gaa
Joshua8:10 bihan ko yahoshoo savere utta
Joshua8:11 aur usake sang ke sab yoddha chaddh gaa
Joshua8:12 tab us ne koi panch hajar puroosh chunakar betel aur aee ke madhyast nagar kee paashchaim kee or unako ghaat men baaitta diya.
Joshua8:13 aur jab logon ne nagar kee uttr or kee saree sena ko aur usakee pashchaim or ghaat men baaitte huon ko bhee ttkaiane par kar diya
Joshua8:14 jab aee ke raja ne yah dekha
Joshua8:15 tab yahoshoo aur sab israaelee un se mano har manakar jangal ka marga lekar bhag nikale.
Joshua8:16 tab nagar ke sab log israaeliyon ka peechha karane ko pukar pukar ke bulaae gaae aur ve yahoshoo ka peechha karate huae nagar se door nikal gaae.
Joshua8:17 aur n aee men aur ne betel men koi puroosh rah gaya
Joshua8:18 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua8:19 usake hath baddhate hee jo log ghaat men baaitte the ve jhttpatt apane sthan se utte
Joshua8:20 jab aee ke purooshaen ne peechhe kee or firakar drashtti kee
Joshua8:21 jab yahoshoo aur sab israaeliyon ne dekha ki ghaaatiyon ne nagar ko le liya
Joshua8:22 aur unaka samhana karane ko doosare bhee nagar se nikal aae so ve israaeliyon ke beech men pad gaa
Joshua8:23 aur aee ke raja ko ve jeevit pakadkar yahoshoo ke pas le aae.
Joshua8:24 aur jab israaelee aee ke sab nivaasiyon ko maaidan me
Joshua8:25 aur sree puroosha
Joshua8:26 kyonaki jab tak yahoshoo ne aee ke sab nivaasiyon ko satyanash n kar dala tab tab us ne apana hat
Joshua8:27 yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne yahoshoo ko dee thee israaeliyon ne pashu adi nagar kee loott apanee kar lee.
Joshua8:28 tab yahoshoo ne aee ko foonkava diya
Joshua8:29 aur aee ke raja ko us ne sanjh tak vraksha par lattka rakha aur soorya oobate oobate yahoshoo kee agyaa se usakee loth vrash par se utarakar nagar ke faattk ke samhane dal dee gai
Joshua8:30 tab yahoshoo ne israael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye aebal parvat par aek vedee banavai
Joshua8:31 jaaisa yahova ke das moosa ne israaeliyon ko agyaa dee thee
Joshua8:32 usee sthan par yahoshoo ne israeliyon ke samhane un patthron ke upar moosa kee vyavastha
Joshua8:33 aur ve
Joshua8:34 usake bad us ne ashaeesh aur shaap kee vyavastha ke sare vachan
Joshua8:35 jitanee baton kee moosa ne agyaa dee thee
Joshua9:1 yah sunakar hittee
Joshua9:2 ve aek man hokar yahoshoo aur israaeliyon se ladne ko ikatthe huae..
Joshua9:3 jab gibon ke nivaasiyon ne suna ki yahoshoo ne yareeho aur aee se kya kya kiya haai
Joshua9:4 tab unhon ne chhl kiya
Joshua9:5 apane panvon men puranee ganttee hui jootiya
Joshua9:6 tab ve gilagal kee chhavanee men yahoshoo ke pas jakar us se aur israaelee purooshaen se kahane lage
Joshua9:7 israaelee purooshaen ne un hivvaiyon se kaha
Joshua9:8 unhon ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua9:9 unhon ne us se kaha
Joshua9:10 aur jo kuchh us ne aemoriyon ke donon rajaon se kiya jo yaradan ke us par rahate the
Joshua9:11 isaliye hamare yahan ke vraddhlogon ne aur hamare desh ke sab nivaasiyon ne ham se kaha
Joshua9:12 jis din ham tumhare pas chalane ko nikale us din to ham ne apane apane ghar se yah rottee garam aur tajee lee thee parantu ab dekho
Joshua9:13 fir ye jo madira ke kuppe ham ne bhr liye the
Joshua9:14 tab un purooshaen ne yahova se bina salah liye unake bhojan men se kuchh grahan kiya.
Joshua9:15 tab yahoshoo ne un se mel karake un se yah vacha bandhae
Joshua9:16 aur unake sath vacha bandhane ke teen din ke bad unako yah samachar mila ki ve hamare pados ke rahanevale log haai
Joshua9:17 tab israaelee kooch karake teesare din unake nagaron ko jinake nam gibon
Joshua9:18 aur israaeliyon ne unako n mara
Joshua9:19 tab sab pradhaanon ne saree mandlee se kaha
Joshua9:20 ham un se yahee karenge
Joshua9:21 fir pradhaanon ne un se kaha
Joshua9:22 fir yahoshoo ne unako bulavakar kaha
Joshua9:23 isaliye ab tum shaapit ho
Joshua9:24 unhon ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya
Joshua9:25 aur ab ham tere vash men haai
Joshua9:26 tab us ne un se vaaisa hee kiya
Joshua9:27 parantu yahoshoo ne usee din unako mandlee ke liye
Joshua10:1 jab yarooshalem ke raja adoneesedek ne suna ki yahoshoo ne aee ko le liya
Joshua10:2 tab ve nipatt dr gaa
Joshua10:3 isaliye yarooshalem ke raja adoneesedek ne hebraen ke raja hoham
Joshua10:4 ki mere pas akar meree sahayata karo
Joshua10:5 isaliye yarooshalem
Joshua10:6 tak gibon ke nivaasiyon ne gilagal kee chhavanee men yahoshoo ke pas yon kahala bheja
Joshua10:7 tab yahoshoo sare yoddhaon aur sab shooraveeron ko sang lekar gilagal se chal pada.
Joshua10:8 aur yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua10:9 tab yahoshoo ratorat gilagal se jakar aekaaek un par toott pada.
Joshua10:10 tab yahova ne aeesa kiya ki ve israaeliyon se ghabara gaa
Joshua10:11 fir jab ve israaeliyon ke samhane se bhagakar bethoron kee utarai par aa
Joshua10:12 aur us samay
Joshua10:13 aur soorya us samay tak thma raha aur chandrama us samay tak tthara raha
Joshua10:14 n to us se pahile koi aeesa din hua aur n usake bad
Joshua10:15 tab yahoshoo sare israaeliyon samet gilagal kee chhavanee ko lautt gaya..
Joshua10:16 aur ve panchon raja bhagakar makkeda ke pas kee gufaa men ja chhpaie.
Joshua10:17 tab yahoshoo ko yah samachar mila
Joshua10:18 yahoshoo ne kaha
Joshua10:19 parantu tum mat ttharo
Joshua10:20 jab yahoshoo aur israaelee unaka sanhar karake nash kar chuke
Joshua10:21 tab sab log makkeda kee chhavanee ko yahoshoo ke pas kushala-kshom se lautt aae aur israaeliyon ke virooddh kisee ne jeebh tak n hilai.
Joshua10:22 tab yahoshoo ne agyaa dee
Joshua10:23 unhon ne aeesa hee kiya
Joshua10:24 jab ve un rajaon ko yahoshoo ke pas nikal le aa
Joshua10:25 tab yahoshoo ne un se kaha
Joshua10:26 is ke bad yahoshoo ne unako marava dala
Joshua10:27 soorya oobate oobate yahoshoo se agyaa pakar logon ne unhen un vrakshaen par se utarake usee gufaa men jahan ve chhpai gaae the dal diya
Joshua10:28 usee din yahoshoo ne makkeda ko le liya
Joshua10:29 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet makkeda se chalakar libna ko gaya
Joshua10:30 aur yahova ne us ko bhee raja samet israaeliyon ke hath me kar diya aur yahoshoo ne usako aur us men ke sab praanaiyon ko talavar se mara aur us men se kisee ko bhee jeeavit n chhoda aur usake raja se vaaisa hee kiya jaaisa us ne yareeho ke raja ke sath kiya tha..
Joshua10:31 fir yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet libna se chalakar lakeesh ko gaya
Joshua10:32 aur yahova ne lakeesh ko israael ke hath men kar diya
Joshua10:33 tab gejer ka raja horam lakeesh kee sahayata karane ko chaddh aya aur yahoshoo ne praja samet usako bhee aeesa mara ki usake liye kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda..
Joshua10:34 fir yahoshoo ne sab israaeliyon samet lakeesh se chalakar aeglon ko gaya aur usake virooddh chhavanee dalakar yuddh karane laga
Joshua10:35 aur usee din unhon ne usako le liya
Joshua10:36 fir yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet aeglon se chalakar hebraen ko gaya
Joshua10:37 aur unhon ne use le liya
Joshua10:38 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet ghoomakar dabeer ko gaya
Joshua10:39 aur raja samet use aur usake sab ganvon ko le liya aur unhon ne unako talavar se ghaat kiya
Joshua10:40 isee prakar yahoshoo ne us sare desh ko
Joshua10:41 aur yahoshoo ne kadeshabarne se le ajja tak
Joshua10:42 in sab rajaon ko unake deshaen samet yahoshoo ne aek hee samay men le liya
Joshua10:43 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet gilagal kee chhavanee men lautt aya..
Joshua11:1 yah sunakar hasor ke raja yabeen ne madon ke raja yobab
Joshua11:2 aur jo jo raja uttr kee or pahadee desh me
Joshua11:3 aur poorab paachchhim donon or ke rahanevale kananiyo
Joshua11:4 aur ve apanee apanee sena samet
Joshua11:5 tab ye sab raja sammati karake ikatthe hua
Joshua11:6 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha
Joshua11:7 aur yahoshoo sab yoddhaon samet merom nam tal ke pas achanak pahunchakar un par toott pada.
Joshua11:8 aur yahova ne unako israaeliyon ke hath men kar diya
Joshua11:9 tab yahoshoo ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar un se kiya
Joshua11:10 us samay yahoshoo ne ghoomakar hasor ko jo paahile un sab rajyon men mukhy nagar tha le liya
Joshua11:11 aur jitane praanee us men the un sabhon ko unhon ne talavar se marakar satyanash kiya aur kisee praanee ko jeeavit n chhoda
Joshua11:12 aur un sab nagaron ko unake sab rajaon samet yahoshoo ne le liya
Joshua11:13 parantu hasor ko chhodkar
Joshua11:14 aur in nagaron ke pashu aur inakee saree loott ko israaeliyon ne apana kar liya parantu manushyon ko unhon ne talavar se mar dala
Joshua11:15 jo agyaa yahova ne apane das moosa ko dee thee usee ke anusar moosa ne yahoshoo ko agyaa dee thee
Joshua11:16 tab yahoshoo ne us sare desh ko
Joshua11:17 halak nam pahad se le
Joshua11:18 un sab rajaon se yuddh karate karate yahoshoo ko bahut din lag gae.
Joshua11:19 gibon ke nivasee hivvaiyon ko chhod aur kisee nagar ke logon ne israaeliyon se mel n kiya aur sab nagaron ko unhon ne lad ladkar jeet liya.
Joshua11:20 kyonaki yahova kee jo manasa thee
Joshua11:21 us samay yahoshoo ne pahadee desh men akar hebraen
Joshua11:22 israaeliyon ke desh men koi anakee n rah gaya keval ajja
Joshua11:23 jaaisa yahova ne moosa se kaha tha

Joshua13:1 yahoshoo booddha aur bahut umra ka ho gaya aur yahova ne us se kaha
Joshua13:2 ye desh rah gaae haai
Joshua13:3 misr ke age shaeehor se lekar uttr kee or aekron ke sivane tak jo kanaaniyon ka bhag gina jata haai aur paalishiitayon ke panchon saradar
Joshua13:4 fir apek aur aemoriyon ke sivane tak kanaaniyo ka sara desh aur seedoniyon ka mara nam desha
Joshua13:5 fir gavaaliyon ka desha
Joshua13:6 fir labanon se lekar misrapotamaaim tak seedoniyon ke pahadee desh ke nivasee. inako maain israaeliyon ke samhane se nikal doonga itana ho ki too meree agyaa ke anusar chitthee dal dalakar unaka desh israael ko bantt de.
Joshua13:7 isaliye too ab is desh ko navon gotraen aur manashsho ke adho gotra ko unaka bhag hone ke liye bantt de..
Joshua13:8 isake sath roobeniyon aur gaadiyon ko to vah bhag mil chuka tha
Joshua13:9 arthata anorn nam nale ke kinare ke aroaek se lekar
Joshua13:10 aur ammoniyon ke sivane tak heshabot men virajanevale aemoriyon ke raja seehon ke sare nagara
Joshua13:11 aur gilad desha
Joshua13:12 fir ashatarot aur aedraei men virajanevale us og ka sara rajy jo rapaishon men se akela bach gaya tha kyonaki inhee ko moosa ne marakar unakee praja ko us desh se nikal diya tha.
Joshua13:13 parantu israaeliyon ne gashooriyon aur maakiyon ko unake desh se n nikala isaaliye gashooree aur makee israaeliyon ke madhy men aj tak rahate haain.
Joshua13:14 aur levee ke gotraiyon ko us ne koi bhag n diya kyonaki israael ke parameshvar yahova ke vachan ke anusar usee ke havy unake liye bhag tthare haain.
Joshua13:15 moosa ne rooben ke gotra ko unake kulon ke anusar diya
Joshua13:16 arthata anorn nam nale ke kinare ke aroaer se lekar aur usee nale ke beech ke nagar ko chhodkar medaba ke pas ka sara chauras desha
Joshua13:17 fir chauras desh men ka heshabon aur usake sab ganva fir deebon
Joshua13:18 yahasa
Joshua13:19 kiryataaim
Joshua13:20 bentapor
Joshua13:21 nidan chauras desh men base huae heshabon men virajanevale aemoriyon ke us raja seehon ke rajy ke kul nagar jinhen moosa ne mar liya tha. moosa ne aevee
Joshua13:22 aur israaeliyon ne unake aur mare huon ke sath bor ke putra bhavee kahanevale bilam ko bhee talavar se mar dala.
Joshua13:23 aur roobeniyon ka sivana yaradan ka teer tthara. roobeaniyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara..
Joshua13:24 fir moosa ne gad ke gotraiyon ko bhee kulon ke anusar unaka nij bhag karake bantt diya.
Joshua13:25 tab yah tthara
Joshua13:26 aur heshabon se ramataamispe aur batoneem tak
Joshua13:27 aur tarai men betharam
Joshua13:28 gaadiyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara..
Joshua13:29 fir moosa ne manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko bhee unaka nij bhag kar diya vah manashshoiyon ke adho gotra ka nij bhag unake kulon ke anusar tthara.
Joshua13:30 vah yah haai
Joshua13:31 aur gilad ka adha bhag
Joshua13:32 jo bhag moosa ne moab ke araba men yareeho ke pas ke yaradan ke poorva kee or bantt diae ve ye hee haain.
Joshua13:33 parantu levee ke gotra ko moosa ne koi bhag n diya israael ka parameshvar yahova hee apane vachan ke anusar unaka bhag tthara..
Joshua14:1 jo jo bhag israaeliyon ne kanan desh men paa
Joshua14:2 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ke dara saddhe nau gotraen ke liye dee thee
Joshua14:3 moosa ne to addhai gotraen ke bhag yaradan par diae the parantu leaviyon ko usane unake beech koi bhag n diya tha.
Joshua14:4 yoosufa ke vansh ke to do gotra ho gaae the
Joshua14:5 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usake anusar israaeliyon ne kiya aur unhon ne desh ko bantt liya..
Joshua14:6 tab yahoodee yahoshoo ke pas gilagal men aae aur kanajee yapunne ke putra kaleb ne us se kaha
Joshua14:7 jab yahova ke das moosa ne mujhe is desh ka bhed lene ke liye kadeshabarne se bheja tha tab maain chalees varsha ka tha aur maain sachche man se usake pas sandesh le aya.
Joshua14:8 aur mere sathee jo mere sang gaae the unhon ne to praja ke logon ko nirash kar diya
Joshua14:9 tab us din moosa ne shapath khakar mujh se kaha
Joshua14:10 aur ab dek
Joshua14:11 jitana bal moosa ke bhejane ke din mujh men tha utana bal abhee tak mujh men haai yuddh karane
Joshua14:12 isaliye ab vah pahadee mujhe de jisakee charcha yahova ne us din kee thee too ne to us din suna hoga ki us men anakavanshaee rahate haai
Joshua14:13 tab yahoshoo ne usako ashaeervad diya aur hebraen ko yapunne ke putra kaleb ka bhag kar diya.
Joshua14:14 is karan hebraen kanajee yapunne ke putra kaleb ka bhag aj tak bana haai
Joshua14:15 paahile samay men to hebraen ka nam kiryatarba tha vah arba anaakiyon men sab se bada puroosh tha. aur us desh ko ladai se shaantai milee..
Joshua15:1 yahoodiyon ke gotra ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar chitthee dalane se aedom ke sivane tak
Joshua15:2 unake bhag ka daakkhianee sivana khare tal ke us sirevale kol se arambh hua jo dakkhian kee or baddha haai
Joshua15:3 aur vah akrabbeem nam chaddhai kee daakkhianee or se nikalakar seen hote huae kadeshabarne ke dakkhian kee or ko chaddh gaya
Joshua15:4 vahan se ammon hote huae vah misr ke nale par nikala
Joshua15:5 fir poorvee sivana yaradan ke muhane tak khara tal hee tthara
Joshua15:6 bethogla ko chaddhte huae betaraba kee uttr kee or hokar roobenee bohanavale nam patthr tak chaddh gaya
Joshua15:7 aur vahee sivana akor nam tarai se dabeer kee or chaddh gaya
Joshua15:8 fir vahee sivana hinnom ke putra kee tarai se hokar yaboos jo yarooshalem kahalata haai usakee dakkhian alang se baddhte huae us pahad kee chottee par pahuncha
Joshua15:9 fir vahee sivana us pahad kee chottee se neptoh nam sote ko chala gaya
Joshua15:10 fir vah bala se paashchaim kee or mudkar seir pahad tak pahuncha
Joshua15:11 vahan se vah sivana aekron kee uttree alang ke pas hote huae shaikkaron gaya
Joshua15:12 aur paashchaim ka sivana mahasamudra ka teer tthara. yahoodiyon ko jo bhag unake kulon ke anusar mila usakee charon or ka sivana yahee hua..
Joshua15:13 aur yapunne ke putra kaleb ko usane yahova kee agyaa ke anusar yahoodiyon ke beech bhag diya
Joshua15:14 aur kaleb ne vahan se shoshau
Joshua15:15 fir vahan se vah dabeer ke nivaasiyon par chaddh gaya poorvakal men to dabeer ka nam kiryatseper tha.
Joshua15:16 aur kaleb ne kaha
Joshua15:17 tab kaleb ke bhai otneeael kanajee ne use le liya aur us ne use apanee bettee akasa ko byah diya.
