Joshua16:1 fir yoosufa kee santan ka bhag chitthee dalane se ttharaya gaya
Joshua16:2 vahan se vah looj tak pahuncha
Joshua16:3 aur paashchaim kee or yapaletiyon ke sivane se utarakar fir neechevale bethoron ke sivane se hokar gejer ko pahuncha
Joshua16:4 tab manashsho aur aepraaim nam yoosufa ke donon putraen kee santan ne apana apana bhag liya.
Joshua16:5 aepraaiamiyon ka sivana unake kulon ke anusar yah tthara arthata unake bhag ka sivana poorva se arambh hokar atraetadar se hote huae upar vale bethoron tak pahuncha
Joshua16:6 aur uttree sivana pashchaim kee or ke mikamatat se arambh hokar poorva kee or mudkar tanatashaeelo ko pahuncha
Joshua16:7 fir yanoh se vah atarot aur nara ko utarata hua yareeho ke pas hokar yaradan par nikala.
Joshua16:8 fir vahee sivana tappooh se nikalakar
Joshua16:9 aur manashshoiyon ke bhag ke beech bhee kai aek nagar apane apane ganvon samet aepraaiamiyon ke liye alag kiye gaae.
Joshua16:10 parantu jo kananee gejer men base the unako aepraaimiyon ne vahan se naheen nikala isaaliye ve kananee unake beech aj ke din tak base haai
Joshua17:1 fir yoosufa ke jette manashsho ke gotra ka bhag chitthee dalane se yah tthara. manashsho ka jetta putra gilad ka pita makeer yoddha tha
Joshua17:2 isaliye yah bhag doosare manashshoishon ke liye unake kulon ke anusar tthara
Joshua17:3 parantu heper jo gilad ka putra
Joshua17:4 tab ve aeleeajar yajak
Joshua17:5 tab manashsho ko
Joshua17:6 kyonaki manashshoiyon ke beech men manashshoi striayon ko bhee bhag mila. aur doosare manashshoiyon ko gilad desh mila.
Joshua17:7 aur manashsho ka sivana ashor se lekar mikamatat tak pahuncha
Joshua17:8 tappooh kee boomi to manashsho ko milee
Joshua17:9 fir vahan se vah sivana kana ke nale tak utarake usake daakkhian kee or tak pahunch gaya ye nagar yapi manashsho ke sivane par basa haai vah aepraaiamiyon ka tthara.
Joshua17:10 daakkhian kee or ka desh to aepraaim ko aur uttr kee or ka manashsho ko mila

Joshua18:1 fir israaeliyon ko saree mandlee ne shaeelo men ikatthee hokar vahan milapavale tamboo ko khda kiya kyonaki desh unake vash men a gaya tha.
Joshua18:2 aur israaeliyon men se sat gotraen ke log apana apana bhag bina paye rah gaae the.
Joshua18:3 tab yahoshoo ne israaeliyon se kaha
Joshua18:4 ab praati gotra ke peechhe teen manushy tthara lo
Joshua18:5 aur ve desh ke sat bhag likhe
Joshua18:6 aur tum desh ke sat bhag likhkar mere pas le ao aur maain yahan tumhare liye apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane chitthee daloonga.
Joshua18:7 aur leaviyon ka tumhare madhy men koi bhag n hoga
Joshua18:8 to ve puroosh uttkar chal diae aur jo us desh ka hal likhne ko chale unhen yahoshoo ne yah agyaa dee
Joshua18:9 tab ve puroosh chal dia
Joshua18:10 tab yahoshoo ne shaeelon men yahova ke samhane unake liye chitthiyan daleen aur vaheen yahoshoo ne israaeliyon ko unake bhagon ke anusar desh bantt diya..
Joshua18:11 aur binyameeaniyon ke gotra kee chitthee unake kulon ke anusar nikalee
Joshua18:12 aur unaka uttree sivana yaradan se arambh hua
Joshua18:13 vahan se vah looj ko pahuncha jo betel bhee kahalata haai
Joshua18:14 fir pashchaimee sivana mudke bethoron ke samhane aur usakee dakkhian or ke pahad se hote huae kiryatabal nam yahoodiyon ke aek nagar par nikala jo kiryatyareem bhee kahalata haai pashchaim ka sivana yahee tthara.
Joshua18:15 fir dakkhian alang ka sivana pashchaim se arambh hokar kiryatyareem ke sire se nikalakar neptoh ke sote par pahuncha
Joshua18:16 aur us pahad ke sire par utara
Joshua18:17 vahan se vah uttr kee or mudkar aenashomesh ko nikalakar us galeelot kee or gaya
Joshua18:18 vahan se vah uttr kee or jakar araba ke samhane ke pahad kee alang se hote huae araba ko utara
Joshua18:19 vahan se vah sivana bethogla kee uttr alang se jakar khare tal kee uttr or ke kol men yaradan ke muhane par nikala dakkhian ka sivana yahee tthara.
Joshua18:20 aur poorva kee or ka sivana yaradan hee tthara. binyameeaniyon ka bhag

Joshua20:2 israaeliyon se yah kah
Joshua20:3 jis se jo koi bool se bina jane kisee ko mar dale

Joshua21:1 tab leaviyon ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy puroosh aeleeajar yajak
Joshua21:2 kanan desh ke shaeelo nagar men kahane lage
Joshua21:3 tab israaeliyon ne yahova ke kahane ke anusar apane apane bhag men se leaviyon ko charaiyon samet ye nagar diae..
Joshua21:4 aur kahatiyon ke kulon ke nam par chitthee nikalee. isaaliye leaviyon men se haroon yajak ke vansh ko yahoodee
Joshua21:5 aur bakee kahaatiyon ko aepraaim ke gotra ke kulo
Joshua21:6 aur geshareaniyon ko issakar ke gotra ke kulo
Joshua21:7 aur kulon ke anusar maraariyon ko rooben
Joshua21:8 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa se dilai bhee usake anusar israaeliyon ne leaviyon ko charaiyon samet ye nagar chitthee dal dalakar diae.
Joshua21:9 unhon ne yahoodiyon aur shaimoniyon ke gotraen ke bhagon men se ye nagar jinake nam likhe haain die
Joshua21:10 ye nagar leveey kahatee kulon men se haroon ke vansh ke liye the kyonaki pahilee chitthee unheen ke nam par nikalee thee.
Joshua21:11 arthata unhon ne un ko yahooda ke pahadee desh men charon or kee charaiyon samet kiryatarba nagar de diya
Joshua21:12 parantu us nagar ke khet aur usake ganv unhon ne yapunne ke putra kaleb ko usakee nij boomi karake de diae..
Joshua21:13 tab unhon ne haroon yajak ke vansh ko charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar hebraen
Joshua21:14 yatteer
Joshua21:15 holon
Joshua21:16 yutta aur betashomesh diae is prakar un donon gotraen ke bhagon men se nau nagar diae gaae.
Joshua21:17 aur binyameen ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet ye char nagar diae gaa
Joshua21:18 anatot aur almon
Joshua21:19 is prakar haroonavanshaee yajakon ko terah nagar aur unakee charaiyan milee..
Joshua21:20 fir bakee kahatee leaviyon ke kulon ke bhag ke nagar chitthee dal dalakar aepraaim ke gotra ke bhag men se diae gaae.
Joshua21:21 arthata unako charaiyon samet aepraaim ke pahadee desh men koonee sharan lene ka shakem nagar diya gaya
Joshua21:22 kibasaaim
Joshua21:23 aur dan ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet
Joshua21:24 ayyalon
Joshua21:25 aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet tanak aur gaatraimmona ye do nagar diae gaae.
Joshua21:26 is prakar bakee kahatiyon ke kulon ke sab nagar charaiyon samet das tthare..
Joshua21:27 fir leviyon ke kulon men ke geshareniyon ko manashsho ke adho gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar bashaan ka golan aur beshatara ye do nagar diae gaae.
Joshua21:28 aur issakar ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet kishyon
Joshua21:29 yamroot
Joshua21:30 aur ashor ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet mishaal
Joshua21:31 helkat
Joshua21:32 aur naptalee ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar galeel ka kedesha
Joshua21:33 geshareaniyon ke kulon ke anusar unake sab nagar apanee apanee charaiyon samet terah tthare..
Joshua21:34 fir bakee leaviyo
Joshua21:35 dimna
Joshua21:36 aur rooben ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet beser
Joshua21:37 kedemot
Joshua21:38 aur gad ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar gilad men ka ramot
Joshua21:39 heshabon

Joshua21:41 israaeliyon kee nij boomi ke beech leviyon ke sab nagar apanee apanee charaiyon samet adtalees tthare.
Joshua21:42 ye sab nagar apane apane charon or kee charaiyon ke sath tthare in sab nagaron kee yahee dasha thee..

Joshua21:44 aur yahova ne un sab baton ke anusar
Joshua21:45 jitanee bhlai kee baten yahova ne israael ke gharane se kahee theen un men se koi bhee n choottee sab kee sab pooree hui..
Joshua22:1 us samay yahoshoo ne roobeaniyo
Joshua22:2 jo jo agyaa yahova ke das moosa ne tumhen dee theen ve sab tum ne manee haai
Joshua22:3 tum ne apane bhaiyon ko is mut men aj ke din tak naheen chhoda
Joshua22:4 aur ab tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhare bhaiyon ko apane vachan ke anusar vishraam diya haai isaaliye ab tum lauttkar apane apane deron ko
Joshua22:5 keval is bat kee pooree chaukasee karana ki jo jo agyaa aur vyavastha yahova ke das moosa ne tum ko dee haai usako manakar apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakho
Joshua22:6 tab yahoshoo ne unhen ashaeervad dekar vida kiya aur ve apane apane dere ko chale gaae..
Joshua22:7 manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko moosa ne basan men bhag diya tha parantu doosare adho gotra ko yahoshoo ne unake bhaiyon ke beech yaradan ke paashchaim kee or bhag diya. unako jab yahoshoo ne vida kiya ki apane apane dere ko jaae
Joshua22:8 tab unako bhee ashaeervad dekar kaha
Joshua22:9 tab roobenee
Joshua22:10 aur jab roobenee
Joshua22:11 aur isaka samachar israaeliyon ke sunane men aya
Joshua22:12 jab israaeliyon ne yah suna
Joshua22:13 tab israaeliyon ne roobeniyo
Joshua22:14 aur usake sang das pradhaanon ko
Joshua22:15 ve gilad desh men roobeaniyo

Joshua22:17 suno
Joshua22:18 ki aj tum yahova ko tyagakar usake peechhe chalana chhod dete ho? kya tum yahova se fir jate ho
Joshua22:19 parantu yadi tumharee nij boomi ashuuddh ho
Joshua22:20 dekho
Joshua22:21 tab roobeniyo
Joshua22:22 ki yahova jo ishvaron ka parameshvar haai
Joshua22:23 yaadi aj ke din ham ne vedee ko isaliye banaya ho ki yahova ke peechhe chalana chhod de
Joshua22:24 parantu ham ne isee vichar aur manasa se yah kiya haai ki kaheen bhavishy men tumharee santan hamaree santan se yah n kahane lage

Joshua23:2 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon ko

Joshua24:5 fir maain ne moosa aur haroon ko bhejakar un sab kamon ke dara jo maain ne misr men kiae us desh ko mara aur usake bad tum ko nikal laya.
Joshua24:6 aur maain tumhare purakhaon ko misr men se nikal laya

Judges1:1 yahoshoo ke marane ke bad israaeliyon ne yahova se poochha
Judges1:2 yahova ne uttr diya
Judges1:3 tab yahooda ne apane bhai shaimon se kaha
Judges1:4 aur yahooda ne chaddhai kee
Judges1:5 aur bejek men adoneebejek ko pakar ve us se lade
Judges1:6 parantu adoneebejek bhaga tab unhon ne usaka peechha karake use pakad liya
Judges1:7 tab adoneebejek ne kaha
Judges1:8 aur yahoodiyon ne yarooshalem se ladkar use le liya
Judges1:9 aur tab yahoodee pahadee desh aur dakkhian desha
Judges1:10 aur yahooda ne un kanaaniyon par chaddhai kee jo hebraen men rahate the hebraen ka nam to poorvakal men kiryatarba tha aur unhon ne shoshau
Judges1:11 vahan se us ne jakar dabeer ke nivaasiyon par chaddhai kee. dabeer ka nam to poorvakal men kiryatseper tha.
Judges1:12 tab kaleb ne kaha
Judges1:13 is par kaleb ke chhotte bhai kanajee otneeael ne use le liya aur us ne use apanee bettee akasa ko byah diya.
Judges1:14 aur jab vah otneeael ke pas ai
Judges1:15 vah us se bolee mujhe ashaeervad de too ne mujhe daakkhian desh to diya haai
Judges1:16 aur moosa ke sale
Judges1:17 fir yahooda ne apane bhai shaimon ke sang jakar sapat men rahanevale kanaaniyon ko mar liya
Judges1:18 aur yahooda ne charon or kee boomi samet ajja
Judges1:19 aur yahova yahooda ke sath raha
Judges1:20 aur unhon ne moosa ke kahane ke anusar hebraen kaleb ko de diya: aur us ne vahan se anak ke teenon putraen ko nikal diya.
Judges1:21 aur yarooshalem men rahanevale yaboosiyon ko binyameeaniyon ne n nikala isaaliye yaboosee aj ke din tak yarooshalem men binyameeaniyon ke sang rahate haain..
Judges1:22 fir yoosufa ke gharane ne betel par chaddhai kee aur yahova unake sang tha.
Judges1:23 aur yoosufa ke gharane ne betel ka bhed lene ko log bheje. aur us nagar ka nam poorvakal men looj tha.
Judges1:24 aur paharooon ne aek manushy ko us nagar se nikalate huae dekha
Judges1:25 jab us ne unhen nagar men jane ka marga dikhaya
Judges1:26 us manushy ne hitiayon ke desh men jakar ek nagar basaya

Judges4:9 us ne kaha

Judges6:2 aur midhanee israaeliyon par prabal ho gaae. midhaaniyon ke dr ke mare israaeliyon ne pahadon ke gahire khddo
Judges6:3 aur jab jab israaelee beej bote tab tab midhanee aur amalekee aur poorvee log unake virooddh chaddhai karake
Judges6:4 ajja tak chhavanee dal dalakar boomi kee upaj nash kar dalate the
Judges6:5 kyonaki ve apane pashuuon aur doron ko liae huae chaddhai karate

Judges6:9 aur maain ne tum ko misriyon ke hath se

Judges6:16 yahova ne us se kaha
Judges6:17 gidon ne us se kaha
Judges6:18 jab tak maain tere pas fir akar apanee bhentt nikalakar tere samhane n rakoo
Judges6:19 tab gidon ne jakar bakaree ka aek bachcha aur aek aepa maaide kee akhmeeree rottyaian taaiyar keen tab mans ko ttokaree me
Judges6:20 parameshvar ke doot ne us se kaha
Judges6:21 tab yahova ke doot ne apane hath kee lattee ko baddhakar mans aur akhmeeree rottyaien ko chooa aur chattan se ag nikalee jis se mans aur akhmeeree rottyaian bhsm ho gai tab yahova ka doot usakee drashtti se antaradhyan ho gaya.
Judges6:22 jab gidon ne jan liya ki vah yahova ka doot tha
Judges6:23 yahova ne us se kaha
Judges6:24 tab gidon ne vahan yahova kee aek vedee banakar usaka nam yahova shaalom rakha. vah aj ke din tak abeeaejeriyon ke opra men banee haai.
Judges6:25 fir usee rat ko yahova ne gidon se kaha
Judges6:26 aur us draddh sthan kee chottee par ttharai hui reeti se apane parameshvar yahova kee aek vedee bana tab us doosare baail ko le
Judges6:27 tab gidon ne apane sang das dason ko lekar yahova ke vachan ke anusar kiya parantu apane pita ke gharane aur nagar ke logon ke dr ke mare vah kam din ko n kar saka
Judges6:28 bihan ko nagar ke log savere uttkar kya dekhte haai
Judges6:29 tab ve apas men kahane lage
Judges6:30 tab nagar ke manushyon ne yoash se kaha
Judges6:31 yoash ne un sabhon se jo usake samhane khde huae the kaha
Judges6:32 isaliye us din gidon ka nam yah kahakar yaroobbal rakha gaya
Judges6:33 isake bad sab midhanee aur amalekee aur poorvee ikatthe hua
Judges6:34 tab yahova ka atma gidon men samaya aur us ne narasinga foonka
Judges6:35 fir us ne kul manashsho ke pas apane doot bheje aur ve bhee usake sameep ikatthe hue. aur us ne ashor
Judges6:36 tab gidon ne parameshvar se kaha
Judges6:37 to sun
Judges6:38 aur aeesa hee hua. isaliye jab us ne bihan ko sabere uttkar us un ko dabakar us men se os nichodee
Judges6:39 fir gidon ne parameshvar se kaha
Judges6:40 is rat ko paramashevar ne aeesa hee kiya arthata keval un hee sookhee rah gai
Judges7:1 tab gidon jo yaroobbal bhee kahalata haai aur sab log jo usake sang the savere utte
Judges7:2 tab yahova ne gidon se kaha
Judges7:3 isaliye too jakar logon men yah prachar karake suna de
Judges7:4 fir yahova ne gidon se kaha
Judges7:5 tab vah unako sote ke pas neeche le gaya vahan yahova ne gidon se kaha
Judges7:6 jinhon ne munh men hath laga chapad chapad karake panee piya unakee to ginatee teen sau ttharee aur bakee sab logon ne ghauttne ttekakar panee piya.
Judges7:7 tab yahova ne gidon se kaha
Judges7:8 tab un logon ne hath men seedha aur apane apane narasinge liae aur us ne israael ke sab purooshaen ko apane apane dere kee or bhej diya
Judges7:9 usee rat ko yahova ne us se kaha
Judges7:10 parantu yadi too chaddhai karate drata ho
Judges7:11 ki ve kya kah rahe haai usake bad tujhe us chhavanee par chaddhai karane ka hiyav hoga. tab vah apane sevak foora ko sang le un hathaiyara-bandon ke pas jo chhavanee kee chhor par the utar gaya.
Judges7:12 midhanee aur amalekee aur sab poorvee log to ttiiddayon ke saman bahut se tarai men faaile pade the aur unake untt samudrateer ke baloo ke kinakon ke saman ginatee se bahar the.
Judges7:13 jab gidon vahan aya
Judges7:14 usake sangee ne uttr diya
Judges7:15 us svapn ka varnn aur fal sunakar gidon ne dandvata kee aur israel kee chhavanee men lauttkar kaha
Judges7:16 tab us ne un teen sau purooshaen ke teen jhund kia
Judges7:17 fir us ne un se kaha
Judges7:18 arthata jab maain aur mere sab sangee narasinga foonken tab tum bhee chhavanee kee charon or naraasinge foonkana
Judges7:19 beechavale pahar ke aadi men jyonhee paharooon kee badalee ho gai thee tyoheen gidon apane sang ke sau purooshaen samet chhavanee kee chhor par gaya aur narasinge ko foonk diya aur apane hath ke ghadon ko tod dala.
Judges7:20 tab teenon jhundon ne naraasingon ko foonka aur ghadon ko tod dala aur apane apane baaen hath men mashaal aur daahine hath men foonkane ko narasinga liae huae chilla utte
Judges7:21 tab ve chhavanee ke charon or apane apane sthan par khde rahe
Judges7:22 aur unhon ne teen sau narasingon ko foonka
Judges7:23 tab israaelee puroosh naptalee aur ashor aur manashsho ke sare desh se ikatthe hokar midhaaniyon ke peechhe pade.
Judges7:24 aur gidon ne aepraaim ke sab pahadee desh men yah kahane ko doot bhej dia
Judges7:25 aur unhon ne oreb aur jeb nam midhan ke do haakimon ko pakada aur oreb ko oreb nam chattan par
Judges8:1 tab aepraaimee purooshaen ne gidane se kaha
Judges8:2 us ne un se kaha
Judges8:3 tumhare hee hathon men parameshvar ne orab aur jeb nam midhan ke haakimon ko kar diya tab tumhare barabar maain kar hee kya saka? jab us ne yah bat kahee
Judges8:4 tab gidon aur usake sang teenon sau puroosha
Judges8:5 tab us ne sukkot ke logon se kaha
Judges8:6 sukkot ke haakimon ne uttr diya
Judges8:7 gidon ne kaha
Judges8:8 vahan se vah panooael ko gaya
Judges8:9 us ne panooel ke logon se kaha
Judges8:10 jebah aur salmunna to kakorr men the
Judges8:11 tab gidon ne nobah aur yogbaha ke poorva kee or deron men rahanevalon ke marga men chaddhkar us sena ko jo nidr padee thee mar liya.
Judges8:12 aur jab jebah aur salmunna ko pakad liya
Judges8:13 aur yoash ka putra gidon heres nam chaddhai par se ladai se lautta.
Judges8:14 aur sukkot ke aek javan puroosh ko pakadkar us se poochha
Judges8:15 tab vah sukkot ke manushyon ke pas jakar kahane laga
Judges8:16 tab us ne us nagar ke vraddh logon ko pakada
Judges8:17 aur us ne panooael ke gummatt ko ddha diya
Judges8:18 fir us ne jebah aur salmunna se poochha
Judges8:19 us ne kaha
Judges8:20 tab us ne apane jette putra yatere se kaha
Judges8:21 tab jebah aur salmunna ne kaha
Judges8:22 tab israael ke purooshaen ne gidon se kaha
Judges8:23 gidon ne un se kaha
Judges8:24 fir gidon ne un se kaha
Judges8:25 tab unhon ne kapada bichhakar us men apanee apanee loott men se nikalakar baaliyan dal deen.
Judges8:26 jo sone kee baliyan us ne mang leen unaka taul aek hajar sat sau shokel hua aur unako chhod chandrahar
Judges8:27 unaka gidon ne ek epod banavakar apane opra nam nagar men rakha aur sab israel vahan vyaabhaichaarinee kee nain usake peechhe ho liya
Judges8:28 is prakar midhan israliyon se dab gaya
Judges8:29 yoash ka putra yaroobbal to jakar apane ghar men rahane laga.
Judges8:30 aur gidon ke sattr bette utpann hua
Judges8:31 aur usakee jo aek rakhelee shakem men rahatee thee usake aek putra utpann hua
Judges8:32 nidan yoash ka putra gidon poore buddhape men mar gaya
Judges8:33 gidon ke marate hee israaelee fir gaa
Judges8:34 aur israaeliyon ne apane parameshvar yahova ko
Judges8:35 aur n unhon ne yaroobbal arthata gidon kee us saree bhlai ke anusar jo us ne israaeliyon ke sath kee thee usake gharane ko praeeti dikhai..
Judges9:1 yaroobbal ka putra abeemelek shakem ko apane mamaon ke pas jakar un se aur apane nana ke sab gharane se yon kahane laga
Judges9:2 shakem ke sab manushyon se yah poochho
Judges9:3 tab usake mamaon ne shakem ke sab manushyon se aeesee hee baten kaheen aur unhon ne yah sochakar ki abeemelek to hamara bhai haai apana man usake peechhe laga diya.
Judges9:4 tab unhon ne balabareet ke mandair men se sattr ttukade roope usako dia
Judges9:5 tab us ne opra men apane pita ke ghar jake apane bhaiyon ko jo yaroobbal ke sattr putra the aek hee patthr par ghaat kiya parantu yaroobbal ka yotam nam lahura putra chhpaikar bach gaya..
Judges9:6 tab shakem ke sab manushyon aur betamillo ke sab logon ne ikatthe hokar shakem ke khmbhe se pasavale banjavraksha ke pas abeemelek ko raja banaya.
Judges9:7 isaka samachar sunakar yotam garijjeem pahad kee chottee par jakar khda hua
Judges9:8 kisee yug men vraksha kisee ka aabhaishok karake apane upar raja ttharane ko chale tab unhon ne jalapai ke vraksha se kaha
Judges9:9 tab jalapai ke vraksha ne kaha
Judges9:10 tab vrakshaen ne anjeer ke vraksha se kaha
Judges9:11 anjeer ke vraksha ne un se kaha
Judges9:12 fir vrakshaen ne dakhlata se kaha
Judges9:13 dakhlata ne un se kaha
Judges9:14 tab sab vrakshaen ne jhdberee se kaha
Judges9:15 jhdberee ne un vrakshaen se kaha
Judges9:16 isaliye ab yaadi tum ne sachchai aur khrai se abeemelek ko raja banaya haai
Judges9:17 mera pita to tumhare nimitt lada
Judges9:18 parantu tum ne aj mere pita ke gharane ke virooddh uttkar balava kiya
Judges9:19 isaliye yaadi tum logon ne aj ke din yaroobbal aur usake gharane se sachchai aur khrai se bartav kiya ho
Judges9:20 aur nahee
Judges9:21 tab yotam bhaga
Judges9:22 aur abeemelek israael ke upar teen varsha haakim raha.
Judges9:23 tab parameshvar ne abeemelek aur shakem ke manushyon ke beech aek buree atma bhej dee so shakem ke manushy abeemelek ka vishvasaghaat karane lage
Judges9:24 jis se yaroobbal ke sattr putraen par kiae huae upadrav ka fal bhoga jaa
Judges9:25 tab shakem ke manushyon ne pahadon kee chottyaien par usake liye ghaatakon ko baaittaya
Judges9:26 tab aebed ka putra gal apane bhaiyon samet shakem men aya aur shakem ke manushyon ne usaka bhrosa kiya.
Judges9:27 aur unhon ne maaidan men jakar apanee apanee dakh kee bariyon ke fal tode aur unaka ras raunda
Judges9:28 tab aebed ke putra gal ne kaha
Judges9:29 aur yah praja mere vash men hotee ho kya hee bhla hota! tab to maain abeemelek ko door karata. fir us ne abeemelek se kaha
Judges9:30 aebed ke putra gal kee ve baten sunakar nagar ke haakim jabool ka krodha bhdk utta.
Judges9:31 aur us ne abeemelek ke pas chhpaike dooton se kahala bheja
Judges9:32 isaliye too apane sangavalon samet rat ko uttkar maaidan men ghaat laga.
Judges9:33 fir bihan ko savere soorya ke nikalate hee uttkar is nagar par chaddhai karana aur jab vah apane sangavalon samet tera samhana karane ko nikale tab jo tujh se ban pade vahee us se karana..
Judges9:34 tab abeemelek aur usake sang ke sab log rat ko utt char jhund bandhakar shakem ke virooddh ghaat men baaitt gaae.
Judges9:35 aur aebed ka putra gal bahar jakar nagar ke faattk men khda hua tab abeemelek aur usake sangee ghaat chhodkar utt khde huae.
Judges9:36 un logon ko dekhkar gal jabool se kahane laga
Judges9:37 gal ne fir kaha
Judges9:38 jabool ne us se kaha
Judges9:39 tab gal shakem ke purooshaen ka aguva ho bahar nikalakar abeemelek se lada.
Judges9:40 aur abeemelek ne usako khdeda
Judges9:41 tab abeemelek arooma men rahane laga aur jabool ne gal aur usake bhaiyon ko nikal diya
Judges9:42 doosare din log maaidan men nikal gaae aur yah abeemelek ko bataya gaya.
Judges9:43 aur us ne apanee sena ke teen dal bandhakar maaidan men ghaat lagai aur jab dekha ki log nagar se nikale ate haain tab un par chaddhai karake unhen mar liya.
Judges9:44 abeemelek apane sang ke dalon samet age daudkar nagar ke faattk par khda ho gaya
Judges9:45 usee din abeemelek ne nagar se din bhr ladkar usako le diya
Judges9:46 yah sunakar shakem ke gummatt ke sab rahanevale aelabareet ke maandair ke gaddh men ja ghause.
Judges9:47 jab abeemelek ko yah samachar mila ki shakem ke gummatt ke sab manushy ikatthe huae haai
Judges9:48 tab vah apane sab sangiyon samet salamon nam pahad par chaddh gaya aur hath men kulhadee le pedon men se aek dalee kattee
Judges9:49 tab un sab logon ne bhee aek aek dalee katt lee
Judges9:50 tab abeemelek ne tebes ko jakar usake samhane dere khde karake us ko le liya.
Judges9:51 parantu aek nagar ke beech aek draddh gummatt tha
Judges9:52 tab abeemelek gummatt ke nikatt jakar usake virooddh ladne laga
Judges9:53 tab kisee sree ne chakkee ke upar ka patt abeemelek ke sir par dal diya
Judges9:54 tab us ne jhtt apane haathaiyaron ke ddhonevale javan ko bulakar kaha
Judges9:55 yah dekhkar ki abeemelek mar gaya haai israaelee apane apane sthan ko chale gaae.
Judges9:56 is prakar jo dushtt kam abeemelek ne apane sattr bhaiyon ko ghaat karake apane pita ke sath kiya tha
Judges9:57 aur shakem ke purooshaen ke bhee sab dushtt kam parameshvar ne unake sir par lautta dia
Judges10:1 abeemelek ke bad israael ke chhudane ke liye tola nam aek issakaree utta
Judges10:2 vah teis varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha. tab mar gaya
Judges10:3 usake bad giladee yair utta
Judges10:4 aur usake tees putra the jo gadaahiyon ke tees bachchon par savar hua karate the aur unake tees nagar bhee the jo gilad desh men haai
Judges10:5 aur yair mar gaya
Judges10:6 tab israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya
Judges10:7 tab yahova ka krodha israael par bhdka
Judges10:8 aur us varsha ye israaeliyon ko satate aur peesate rahe. varan yaradan par aemoriyon ke desh gilad men rahanevale sab israaeliyon par attarah varsha tak andhor karate rahe.
Judges10:9 ammonee yahooda aur binyameen se aur aepraaim ke gharane se ladne ko yaradan par jate the
Judges10:10 tab israaeliyon ne yah kahakar yahova kee dohai dee
Judges10:11 yahova ne israaeliyon se kaha
Judges10:12 fir jab seedonee
Judges10:13 taubhee tum ne mujhe tyagakar paraye devataon kee upasana kee haai isaliye maain fir tum ko n chhudaunga.
Judges10:14 jao
Judges10:15 israaeliyon ne yahova se kaha
Judges10:16 tab ve paraae devataon ko apane madhy men se door karake yahova kee upasana karane lage aur vah israaeliyon ke kashtt ke karan kheadit hua..
Judges10:17 tab ammoniyon ne ikatthe hokar gilad men apane dere dale aur israaeliyon ne bhee ikatthe hokar mispa men apane dere dale.
Judges10:18 tab gilad ke haakim aek doosare se kahane lage
Judges11:1 yiptah nam giladee bada shooraveer tha
Judges11:2 gilad kee sree ke bhee bette utpann hue aur jab ve bade ho gaae tab yiptah ko yah kahakar nikal diya
Judges11:3 tab yiptah apane bhaiyon ke pas se bhagakar tob desh men rahane laga aur yiptah ke pas luchche manushy ikatthe ho gaae aur usake sang firane lage..
Judges11:4 aur kuchh dinon ke bad ammonee israael se ladne lage.
Judges11:5 jab ammonee israael se ladte the
Judges11:6 aur yiptah se kaha
Judges11:7 yiptah ne gilad ke vraddh logon se kaha
Judges11:8 gilad ke vraddh logon ne yiptah se kaha
Judges11:9 yiptah ne gilad ke vraddh logon se poochha
Judges11:10 gilad ke vraddh logon ne yiptah se kaha
Judges11:11 tab yiptah gilad ke vraddh logon ke sang chala
Judges11:12 tab yiptah ne ammoniyon ke raja ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja
Judges11:13 ammoniyon ke raja ne yiptah ke dooton se kaha
Judges11:14 tab yiptah ne fir ammoniyon ke raja ke pas yah kahane ko doot bheje
Judges11:15 ki yiptah tujh se yon kahata haai
Judges11:16 varan jab ve misr se nikale
Judges11:17 tab israael ne aedom ke raja ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja
Judges11:18 tab us ne jangal men chalate chalate aedom aur moab donon deshaen ke bahar bahar ghoomakar moab desh kee poorva or se akar anorn ke isee par apane dere dale aur moab ke sivane ke bheetar n gaya
Judges11:19 fir israael ne aemoriyon ke raja seehon ke pas jo heshbon ka raja tha dooton se yah kahala bheja
Judges11:20 parantu seehon ne israael ka itana vishvas n kiya ki use apane desh men se hokar jane deta varan apanee saree praja ko ikatthee kar apane dere yahas men khde karake israael se lada.
Judges11:21 aur israael ke parameshvar yahova ne seehon ko saree praja samet israael ke hath men kar diya
Judges11:22 arthata vah anaun se yabbok tak aur jangal se le yaradan tak aemoriyon ke sare desh ka aadhaikaree ho gaya.
Judges11:23 isaliye ab israael ke parameshvar yahova ne apanee israaelee praja ke samhane se aemoriyon ko unake desh se nikal diya haai fir kya too usaka aadhaikaree hone paaega?
Judges11:24 kya too usaka adhaikaree n hoga
Judges11:25 fir kya too moab ke raja sippor ke putra balak se kuchh achchha haai? kya us ne kabhee israaeliyon se kuchh bhee jhgada kiya? kya vah un se kabhee lada?
Judges11:26 jab ki israael heshbon aur usake gavon me
Judges11:27 maain ne tera aparadha naheen kiya too hee mujh se yuddh chhedkar bura vyavahar karata haai isaaliye yahova jo nyayee haai
Judges11:28 taubhee ammoniyon ke raja ne yiptah kee ye baten n maneen jinako us ne kahala bheja tha..
Judges11:29 tab yahova ka atma yiptah men sama gaya
Judges11:30 aur yiptah ne yah kahakar yahova kee mannat manee
Judges11:31 to jab maain kushal ke sath ammoniyon ke pas se lautt aun tab jo koi mere bhentt ke liye mere ghar ke dar se nikale vah yahova ka ttharega
Judges11:32 tab yiptah ammoniyon se ladne ko unakee or gaya aur yahova ne unako usake hath men kar diya.
Judges11:33 aur vah aroaer se le minneet tak
Judges11:34 jab yiptah mispa ko apane ghar aya
Judges11:35 usako dekhte hee us ne apane kapade faadkar kaha
Judges11:36 us ne us se kaha
Judges11:37 fir us ne apane pita se kaha
Judges11:38 us ne kaha
Judges11:39 do maheene ke beetane par vah apane pita ke pas lautt ai
Judges11:40 ki israaelee striayan prativarsha yiptah giladee kee bettee ka yash gane ko varsha men char din tak jaya karatee theen..

Judges13:1 aur israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya isaliye yahova ne unako paalishtaiyon ke vash men chalees varsha ke liye rakha..
Judges13:2 daaniyon ke kul ka soravasee manoh nam aek puroosh tha
Judges13:3 is sree ko yahova ke doot ne darshan dekar kaha
Judges13:4 isaliye ab savadhaan rah
Judges13:5 kyonaki too garbhvatee hogee aur tere aek betta utpann hoga. aur usake sir par choora n fire
Judges13:6 us sree ne apane paati ke pas jakar kaha
Judges13:7 parantu us ne mujh se kaha
Judges13:8 tab manoh ne yahova se yah binatee kee
Judges13:9 manoh kee yah bat parameshvar ne sun lee
Judges13:10 tab us sree ne jhtt daudkar apane paati ko yah samachar diya

Judges13:13 yahova ke doot ne manoh se kaha
Judges13:14 yah koi vastu jo dakhlata se utpann hotee haai n khaa

Judges13:20 arthata jab lau us vedee par se akash kee or utt rahee thee
Judges13:21 parantu yahova ke doot ne manoh aur usakee patnee ko fir kabhee darshan n diya. tab manoh ne jan liya ki vah yahova ka doot tha.
Judges13:22 tab manoh ne apanee patnee se kaha
Judges13:23 usakee patnee ne us se kaha

Judges14:1 shaimashaen timna ko gaya
Judges14:2 tab us ne jakar apane mata pita se kaha
Judges14:3 usake mata pita ne us se kaha
Judges14:4 usake mata pita n janate the ki yah bat yahova kee or se hotee haai
Judges14:5 tab shaimashaen apane mata pita ko sang le timna ko chalakar timna kee dakh kee baree ke pas pahuncha
Judges14:6 tab yahova ka atma us par bal se utara
Judges14:7 tab us ne jakar us sree se batacheet kee aur vah shaimashaen ko achchhee lagee.
Judges14:8 kuchh dinon ke beetane par vah use lane ko lautt chala aur us sinh kee loth dekhne ke liye marga se mud gaya? to kya dekha ki sinh kee loth men madhaumakkhiayon ka aek jhund aur madha bhee haai.
Judges14:9 tab vah us men se kuchh hath men lekar khate khate apane mata pita ke pas gaya
Judges14:10 tab usaka pita us sree ke yahan gaya
Judges14:11 usako dekhkar ve usake sang rahane ke liye tees sangiyon ko le ae.
Judges14:12 shaimashaen ne us ne kaha
Judges14:13 aur yaadi tum use n bata sako
Judges14:14 us ne un se kaha
Judges14:15 sataven din unhon ne shaimashaen kee patnee se kaha
Judges14:16 tab shaimashaen kee patnee yah kahakar usake samhane rone lagee
Judges14:17 aur jevanar ke saton dinon men vah sree usake samhane rotee rahee aur sataven din jab us ne usako bahut tang kiya tab us ne usako pahelee ka arth bata diya. tab us ne use apanee jati ke logon ko bata diya.
Judges14:18 tab sataven din soorya oobane n paya ki us nagar ke manushyon ne shaimashaen se kaha
Judges14:19 tab yahova ka atma us par bal se utara
Judges14:20 aur shaimashaen kee patnee usake aek sangee ko jis se us ne mitra ka sa bartav kiya tha byah dee gai..
Judges15:1 parantu kuchh dinon bad
Judges15:2 aur usake sasur ne kaha
Judges15:3 shaimashaen ne un logon se kaha
Judges15:4 tab shaimashaen ne jakar teen sau lomaadiyan pakadee
Judges15:5 tab mashaalon men ag lagakar us ne lomaadiyon ko paalishtaiyon ke khde kheton men chhod diya aur pooliyon ke ddher varan khde khet aur jalapai kee baariyan bhee jal gain.
Judges15:6 tab paalishtee poochhne lage
Judges15:7 shaimashaen ne un se kaha
Judges15:8 tab us ne unako aati nitturata ke sath badee mar se mar dala tab jakar aetam nam chattan kee aek darar men rahane laga..
Judges15:9 tab paalishtaiyon ne chaddhai karake yahooda desh men dere khde kia
Judges15:10 tab yahoodee manushyon ne un se poochha
Judges15:11 tab teen hajar yahoodee puroosh aeetam nam chattan kee darar men jakar shaimashaen se kahane lage
Judges15:12 unhon ne us se kaha
Judges15:13 unhon ne kaha
Judges15:14 vah lahee tak a gaya tha
Judges15:15 tab usako gadahe ke jabade kee aek nai haddee milee
Judges15:16 tab shaimashaen ne kaha
Judges15:17 jab vah aeesa kah chuka
Judges15:18 tab usako badee pyas lagee
Judges15:19 tab parameshvar ne lahee men okhlee sa gaddhha kar diya
Judges15:20 shaimashaen to paalishtaiyon ke dinon men bees varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha..
Judges16:1 tab shaimashaen ajja ko gaya
Judges16:2 jab aajjaiyon ko isaka samachar mila ki shaimashaen yahan aya haai
Judges16:3 parantu shaimashaen adhaee rat tak pada rah kar
Judges16:4 isake bad vah sorek nam nale men rahanevalee daleela nam aek sree se praeeti karane laga.
Judges16:5 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradaron ne us sree ke pas jake kaha
Judges16:6 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha
Judges16:7 shaimashaen ne us se kaha

Judges16:9 usake pas to kuchh manushy kottree men ghaat lagaae baaitte the. tab us ne us se kaha
Judges16:10 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha
Judges16:11 us ne us se kaha
Judges16:12 tab daleela ne nai nai raassaiyan lekar aur usako bandhakar kaha
Judges16:13 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha
Judges16:14 so us ne use koonttee se jakada. tab us se kaha
Judges16:15 tab daleela ne us se kaha
Judges16:16 so jab us ne har din baten karate karate usako tang kiya
Judges16:17 tab us ne apane man ka sara bhed kholakar us se kaha
Judges16:18 yah dekhkar
Judges16:19 tab us ne usako apane ghauttnon par sula rakha aur aek manushy bulavakar usake sir kee saton latten mundva daleen. aur vah usako dabane lagee
Judges16:20 tab us ne kaha
Judges16:21 tab paalishtaiyon ne usako pakadkar usakee ankhen faod dalee
Judges16:22 usake sir ke bal mund jane ke bad fir baddhne lage..
Judges16:23 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradar apane dagon nam devata ke liye bada yagy
Judges16:24 aur jab logon ne use dekha
Judges16:25 jab unaka man magan ho gaya
Judges16:26 tab shaimashaen ne us ladke se jo usaka hath pakade tha kaha
Judges16:27 vah ghar to sree purooshaen se bhra hua tha palishtaiyon ke sab saradar bhee vahan the
Judges16:28 tab shaimashaen ne yah kahakar yahova kee dohai dee
Judges16:29 tab shaimashaen ne un donon beechavale khmbhon ko jin se ghar sambhla hua tha pakadkar aek par to daahine hath se aur doosare par baaen hath se bal laga diya.
Judges16:30 aur shaimashaen ne kaha
Judges16:31 tab usake bhai aur usake pita ke sare gharane ke log aa
Judges17:1 aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka nam aek puroosh tha.
Judges17:2 us ne apanee mata se kaha
Judges17:3 jab us ne ve gyarah sau ttukade chandee apanee mata ko faer diae tab mata ne kaha
Judges17:4 jab us ne vah roopaya apanee mata ko faer diya
Judges17:5 meeka ke pas aek devasthan tha
Judges17:6 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha jisako jo tteek soojh padta tha vahee vah karata tha..
Judges17:7 yahooda ke kul ka aek javan leveey yahooda ke betalehem men paradeshaee hokar rahata tha.
Judges17:8 vah yahooda ke betalehem nagar se isiliye nikala
Judges17:9 meeka ne us se poochha
Judges17:10 meeka ne us se kaha
Judges17:11 aur vah leveey us puroosh ke sang rahane ko prasann hua aur vah javan usake sath betta sa bana raha.
Judges17:12 tab meeka ne us leveey ka sanskar kiya
Judges17:13 aur meeka sochata tha
Judges18:1 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha. aur unheen dinon men daaniyon ke gotra ke log rahane ke liye koi bhag ddoonddh rahe the kyonki israelee gotraen ke beech unaka bhag us samay tak n mila tha.
Judges18:2 tab daaniyon ne apane sab kul men se panch shooraveeron ko sora aur aeshataol se desh ka bhed lene aur us men dekh bhal karane ke liye yah kahakar bhej diya
Judges18:3 jab ve meeka ke ghar ke pas aa
Judges18:4 us ne un se kaha
Judges18:5 unhon ne us se kaha
Judges18:6 purohit ne un se kaha
Judges18:7 tab ve panch manushy chal nikale
Judges18:8 tab ve sora aur aeshtaol ko apane bhaiyon ke pas gaa
Judges18:9 unhon ne kaha
Judges18:10 vahan pahunchakar tum nidr rahate huae logon ko
Judges18:11 tab vahan se arthata sora aur aeshataol se daniyon ke kul ke chh: sau purooshaen ne yuddh ke hathaiyar bandhakar prasthan kiya.
Judges18:12 unhonne jakar yahooda desh ke kiyryatyareem nagar men dere khde kie. is karan us sthan ka nam mahanedan aj tak pada haai
Judges18:13 vahan se ve age baddhkar aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka ke ghar ke pas aae.
Judges18:14 tab jo panch manushy laaish ke desh ka bhed lene gaae the
Judges18:15 ve udhar mudkar us javan leveey ke ghar gaa
Judges18:16 aur ve chh: sau danee puroosh faattk men haathaiyar bandho huae khde rahe.
Judges18:17 aur jo panch manushy desh ka bhed lene gaae the
Judges18:18 jab ve panch manushy meeka ke ghar men ghausakar khudee hui moorat
Judges18:19 unhon ne us se kaha
Judges18:20 tab purohit prasann hua
Judges18:21 tab ve mude
Judges18:22 jab ve meeka ke ghar se door nikal gaae the
Judges18:23 aur daaniyon ko pukara
Judges18:24 us ne kaha
Judges18:25 daaniyon ne us se kaha
Judges18:26 tab daaniyon ne apana marga liya aur meeka yah dekhkar ki ve mujh se adhaik balavant haain firake apane ghar lautt gaya.
Judges18:27 aur ve meeka ke banavaae huae padathorn n aur usake purohit ko sath le laaish ke pas aa
Judges18:28 aur koi bachanevala n tha
Judges18:29 aur unhon ne us nagar ka nam israael ke aek putra apane moolapuroosh dan ke nam par dan rakha parantu paahile to us nagar ka nam laaish tha.
Judges18:30 tab daaniyon ne us khudee hui moorat ko khda kar liya aur desh kee bandhauai ke samay vah yonatan jo gesharem ka putra aur moosa ka pota tha
Judges18:31 aur jab tak parameshvar ka bhvan shaeelo men bana raha
Judges19:1 un dinon men jab israeliyon ka koi raja n tha
Judges19:2 usakee suraaiatin vyaabhaichar karake yahooda ke betalehem ko apane pita ke ghar chalee gai
Judges19:3 tab usaka paati apane sath aek sevak aur do gadahe lekar chala
Judges19:4 tab usake sasur arthata us sree ke pita ne binatee karake use rok liya
Judges19:5 chauthe din jab ve bhor ko sabere utte
Judges19:6 tab un donon ne baaittkar sang sang khaya piya fir sree ke pita ne us puroosh se kaha
Judges19:7 vah puroosh vida hone ko utta
Judges19:8 panchaven din bhor ko vah to vida hone ko savere utta parantu sree ke pita ne kaha
Judges19:9 jab vah puroosh apanee suraaiatin aur sevak samet vida hone ko utta
Judges19:10 parantu us puroosh ne us rat ko ttkaina n chaha
Judges19:11 ve yaboos ke pas the
Judges19:12 usake svamee ne us se kaha
Judges19:13 fir us ne apane sevak se kaha
Judges19:14 aur ve age kee or chale aur unake binyameen ke giba ke nikatt pahunchate pahunchate soorya ast ho gaya
Judges19:15 isaliye ve giba men ttkaine ke liye usakee or mud gaae. aur vah bheetar jakar us nagar ke chauk men baaitt gaya
Judges19:16 tab aek booddha apane khet ke kam ko nipattakar sanjh ko chala aya vah to aepraaim ke pahadee desh ka tha
Judges19:17 us ne ankhen uttakar us yatraee ko nagar ke chauk men baaitte dekha aur us booddhe ne poochha
Judges19:18 us ne us se kaha
Judges19:19 hamare pas to gadahon ke liye pual aur chara bhee haai
Judges19:20 booddhe ne kaha
Judges19:21 tab vah usako apane ghar le chala
Judges19:22 ve anand kar rahe the
Judges19:23 ghar ka svamee unake pas bahar jakar un se kahane laga
Judges19:24 dekha
Judges19:25 parantu un manushyon ne usakee n manee. tab us puroosh ne apanee suraaiatin ko pakadkar unake pas bahar kar diya aur unhon ne us se kukarma kiya
Judges19:26 tab vah sree pah fattte huae jake us manushy ke ghar ke dar par jis men usaka pati tha gir gai
Judges19:27 savere jab usaka paati ut
Judges19:28 us ne us se kaha
Judges19:29 jab vah apane ghar pahuncha
Judges19:30 jitanon ne use dekha
Judges20:1 tab dan se lekar barshoba tak ke sab israaelee aur gilad ke log bhee nikale
Judges20:2 aur saree praja ke pradhaan log
Judges20:3 binyameeaniyon ne to suna ki israaelee misma ko aae haain. aur israaelee poochhne lage
Judges20:4 us mar dalee hui sree ke leveey pati ne uttr diya
Judges20:5 tab giba ke purooshaen ne mujh par chaddhai kee
Judges20:6 tab maain ne apanee suraaitin ko lekar ttukade ttukade kiya
Judges20:7 suno
Judges20:8 tab sab log aek man ho
Judges20:9 parantu ab ham giba se yah karenge
Judges20:10 aur ham sab israaelee gotraen men sau purooshaen men se das
Judges20:11 tab sab israaelee puroosh us nagar ke virooddh aek puroosh kee nain jutte huae ikatthe ho gaae..
Judges20:12 aur israaelee gotraiyon men kitane manushy yah poochhne ko bheje
Judges20:13 ab un gibavasee luchchon ko hamare hath kar do
Judges20:14 aur binyameenee apane apane nagar men se akar giba men isaliye ikatthe hua
Judges20:15 aur usee din gibavasee purooshaen ko chhod
Judges20:16 in sab logon men se sat sau baainhatthe chune huae puroosh the
Judges20:17 aur binyameeaniyon ko chhod israaelee puroosh char lakh talavar chalanevale the ye sab ke sab yoddha the..
Judges20:18 sab israaelee uttkar betel ko gaa
Judges20:19 tab israaeliyon ne bihan ko uttkar giba ke samhane dere dale.
Judges20:20 aur israaelee puroosh binyameeaniyon se ladne ko nikal gaae aur israaelee purooshaen ne us se ladne ko giba ke virooddh panti bandhaee.
Judges20:21 tab binyameeaniyon ne giba se nikal usee din bais hajar israaelee purooshaen ko marake mittee men mila diya.
Judges20:22 taubhee israaelee puroosh logon ne hiyav bandhakar usee sthan men jahan unhon ne paahile din panati bandhaee thee
Judges20:23 aur israaelee jakar sanjh tak yahova ke samhane rate rahe aur yah kahakar yahova se poochha
Judges20:24 tab doosare din israaelee binyameeaniyon ke nikatt pahunche.
Judges20:25 tab binyameeaniyon ne doosare din unaka samhana karane ko giba se nikalakar fir attarah hajar israaelee purooshaen ko marake
Judges20:26 tab sab israaelee
Judges20:27 aur israaeliyon ne yahova se salah lee us samay to parameshvar ka vacha ka sandook vaheen tha
Judges20:28 aur peenahas
Judges20:29 tab israaeliyon ne giba ke charon or logon ko dhaat men baaittaya.
Judges20:30 teesare din israaeliyon ne binyameeaniyon par fir chaddhai kee
Judges20:31 tab binyameenee un logon ka samhana karane ko nikale
Judges20:32 binyameenee kahane lage
Judges20:33 tab sab israaelee purooshaen ne apane sthan men uttkar balatamar men panati bandhaee aur ghaat men baaitte huae israaelee apane sthan se
Judges20:34 tab sab israaeliyon men se chhantte huae das hajar puroosh giba ke samhane aa
Judges20:35 tab yahova ne binyameeaniyon ko israael se harava diya
Judges20:36 tab binyameeaniyon ne dekha ki ham har gaae. aur israaelee puroosh un ghaatakon par bhrosa karake jinhen unhon ne giba ke sath baaittaya tha binyameeaniyon ke samhane se chale gaae.
Judges20:37 parantu ghaatak log faurtee karake giba par jhpatt gaae aur ghaatakon ne age baddhkar kul nagar ko talavar se mara.
Judges20:38 israaelee purooshaen aur ghaatakon ke beech to yah chinh ttharaya gaya tha
Judges20:39 israaelee puroosh to ladai men hattne lage
Judges20:40 parantu jab vah dhooaen ka khmbha nagar men se uttne laga
Judges20:41 tab israaelee puroosh ghoome
Judges20:42 isaliye unhon ne israaelee purooshaen ko peett dikhakar jangal ka marga liya parantu ladai un se hotee hee rah
Judges20:43 unhon ne binyameeaniyon ko ghor liya
Judges20:44 aur binyameeaniyon men se attarah hajar puroosh jo sab ke sab shooraveer the mare gaae.
Judges20:45 tab ve ghoomakar jangal men kee rimmon nam chattan kee or to bhag gaae parantu israaeliyon ne un se panch hajar ko beenakar sadkon men mar dala fir gidom tak unake peechhe padke un men se do hajar puroosh mar dale.
Judges20:46 tab binyameeaniyon men se jo us din mare gaae ve pachees hajar talavar chalanevale puroosh the
Judges20:47 parantu chh: sau puroosh ghoomakar jangal kee or bhage
Judges20:48 tab israaelee puroosh lauttkar binyaminiyon par lapake aur nagaron men kya manushy
Judges21:1 israaelee purooshaen ne to mispa men shapath khakar kaha tha
Judges21:2 ve betel ko jakar sanjh tak parameshvar ke samhane baaitte rahe
Judges21:3 aur kahate the
Judges21:4 fir doosare din unhon ne savere utt vahan vedee banakar homabali aur melabali chaddhaae.
Judges21:5 tab israaelee poochhne lage
Judges21:6 tab israaelee apane bhai binyameen ke vishay men yah kahakar pachhtane lage
Judges21:7 ham ne jo yahova kee shapath khakar kaha haai
Judges21:8 jab unhon ne yah poochha
Judges21:9 arthata jab logon kee ginatee kee gai
Judges21:10 isaliye mandlee ne barah hajar shooraveeron ko vahan yah agyaa dekar bhej diya
Judges21:11 aur tumhen jo karana hoga vah yah haai
Judges21:12 aur unhen giladee yavesh ke nivaasiyon men se char sau javan kumaariyan mileen jinhon ne puroosh ka munh naheen dekha tha aur unhen ve shaeelo ko jo kanan desh men haai chhavanee men le aae..
Judges21:13 tab saree mandlee ne un binyameeaniyon ke pas jo rimmon nam chattan par the kahala bheja
Judges21:14 tab binyameen usee samay lautt gaae aur unako ve striayan dee gain jo giladee yavesh kee striayon men se jeevit chhodee gain theen taubhee ve unake liye thodee theen.
Judges21:15 tab log binyameen ke vishay fir yah kahake pachhtaye
Judges21:16 tab mandlee ke vraddh gotraen ne kaha
Judges21:17 fir unhon ne kaha
Judges21:18 parantu ham to apanee kisee bettee ko unhen byah naheen de sakate
Judges21:19 fir unhon ne kaha
Judges21:20 isaliye unhon ne binyameeaniyon ko yah agyaa dee
Judges21:21 aur dekhte raho aur yadi shaeelo kee ladkiyan nachane ko nikale
Judges21:22 aur jab unake pita va bhai hamare pas jhgadne ko aaenge
Judges21:23 tab binyameeaniyon ne aeesa hee kiya
Judges21:24 usee samay israelee vahan se chalakar apane apane gotra aur apane apane gharane ko gaa
Judges21:25 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha jisako jo tteek soojh padta tha vahee vah karata tha..
Ruth1:1 jin dinon men nyayee log nyay karate the un dinon men desh men akal pada
Ruth1:2 us puroosh ka nam eleemelek
Ruth1:3 aur naomee ka paati aeleemelek mar gaya
Ruth1:4 aur inhon ne aek aek moabin byah lee aek sree ka nam orpa aur doosaree ka nam root tha. fir ve vahan koi das varsha rahe.
Ruth1:5 jab mahalon aur kilyon donon mar gaa
Ruth1:6 tab vah moab ke desh men yah sunakar
Ruth1:7 tab vah apanee donon bahuon samet us sthan se jahan rahatee theen nikalee
Ruth1:8 tab naomee ne apanee dono bahuon se kaha
Ruth1:9 yahova aeesa kare ki tum fir pati karake unake gharon men vishraam pao. tab us ne un ko chooma
Ruth1:10 aur us se kaha
Ruth1:11 naomee ne kaha
Ruth1:12 he meree bettyaie
Ruth1:13 taubhee kya tum unake sayane hone tak asha lagaae ttharee rahateen? aur unake nimitt pati karane se rookee rahateen? he meree beattyaie
Ruth1:14 tab ve fir se utteen aur orpa ne to apanee sas ko chooma
Ruth1:15 tab us ne kaha
Ruth1:16 root bolee
Ruth1:17 jahan too maregee vahan maain bhee maroongee
Ruth1:18 jab us ne yah dekha ki vah mere sang chalane ko sthiar haai
Ruth1:19 so ve donon chal nikaleen aur betalehem ko pahunchee. aur unake betalehem men pahunchane par kul nagar meen unake karan dhoom machee aur striayan kahane lagee
Ruth1:20 us ne un se kaha
Ruth1:21 maain bhree pooree chalee gai thee
Ruth1:22 is prakar naomee apanee moaabin bahoo root ke sath lauttee
Ruth2:1 naomee ke paati aeleemelek ke kul men usaka aek bada dhanee kuttumbee tha
Ruth2:2 aur moabin root ne naomee se kaha
Ruth2:3 so vah jakar aek khet men lavanevalon ke peechhe beenane lagee
Ruth2:4 aur boaj betalehem se akar lavanevalon se kahane laga
Ruth2:5 tab boaj ne apane us sevak se jo lavanevalon ke upar ttharaya gaya tha poochha
Ruth2:6 jo sevak lavanevalon ke upar ttharaya gaya tha us ne uttr diya
Ruth2:7 us ne kaha tha
Ruth2:8 tab boaj ne root se kaha
Ruth2:9 jis khet ko ve lavateen hon usee par tera dhyan bandha rahe
Ruth2:10 tab vah boomi tak jhukakar munh ke bal giree
Ruth2:11 boaj ne uttr diya
Ruth2:12 yahova teree karanee ka fal de
Ruth2:13 us ne kaha
Ruth2:14 fir khane ke samay boaj ne us se kaha
Ruth2:15 jab vah beenane ko uttee
Ruth2:16 varan mutthee bhr jane par kuchh kuchh nikal kar gira bhee diya karo
Ruth2:17 so vah sanjh tak khet men beenatee rahee tab jo kuchh been chukee use fattka
Ruth2:18 tab vah use uttakar nagar men gai
Ruth2:19 usakee sas ne us se poochha
Ruth2:20 naomee ne apanee bahoo se kaha
Ruth2:21 fir root moaabin bolee
Ruth2:22 naomee ne apanee bahu root se kaha
Ruth2:23 isaliye root jau aur gehoon donon kee kattnee ke ant tak beenane ke liye boaj kee dasiyon ke sath sath lagee rahee aur apanee sas ke yahan rahatee thee..
Ruth3:1 usakee sas naomee ne us se kaha
Ruth3:2 ab jisakee dasiyon ke pas too thee
Ruth3:3 too snan kar tel laga
Ruth3:4 aur jab vah lett jaa
Ruth3:5 us ne us se kaha
Ruth3:6 tab vah khalihan ko gai aur apanee sas kee agyaa ke anusar hee kiya.
Ruth3:7 jab boaj kha pee chuka
Ruth3:8 adhaee rat ko vah puroosh chaunk pada
Ruth3:9 us ne poochha
Ruth3:10 us ne kaha
Ruth3:11 isaliye ab
Ruth3:12 aur ab sach to haai ki maain chhudanevala kuttumbee hoo
Ruth3:13 so rat bhr ttharee rah
Ruth3:14 tab vah usake panvon ke pas bhor tak lettee rahee
Ruth3:15 tab boaj ne kaha
Ruth3:16 jab root apanee sas ke pas ai tab us ne poochha
Ruth3:17 fir us ne kaha
Ruth3:18 us ne kaha
Ruth4:1 tab boaj faattk ke pas jakar baaitt gaya aur jis chhudanevale kuttumbee kee charcha boaj ne kee thee
Ruth4:2 tab us ne nagar ke das vraddh logon ko bulakar kaha
Ruth4:3 tab vah chhudanevale kuttumbee se kahane laga
Ruth4:4 isaliye maain ne socha ki yah bat tujh ko jatakar kahoonga
Ruth4:5 fir boaj ne kaha
Ruth4:6 us chhudanevale kuttumbee ne kaha
Ruth4:7 agale samay men israael men chhudane ke badalane ke vishay men sab pakka karane ke liye yah vyavahar tha
Ruth4:8 isaliye us chhudanevale kuttumbee ne boaj se yah kahakara ki too use mol le
Ruth4:9 tab boaj ne vraddh logon aur sab logon se kaha
Ruth4:10 fir mahalon kee sree root moaabin ko bhee maain apanee patnee karane ke liye is manasa se mol leta hoo
Ruth4:11 tab faattk ke pas jitane log the unhon ne aur vraddh logon ne kaha
Ruth4:12 aur jo santan yahova is javan sree ke dara tujhe de usake karan se tera gharana peres ka sa ho jaa
Ruth4:13 tab boaj ne root ko byah liya
Ruth4:14 tab striayon ne naomee se kaha
Ruth4:15 aur yah tere jee men jee le anevala aur tera buddhape men palanevala ho
Ruth4:16 fir naomee us bachche ko apanee god men rakhkar usakee dhaai ka kam karane lagee.
Ruth4:17 aur usakee padosinon ne yah kahakar
Ruth4:18 peres kee yah vanshaavalee haai
Ruth4:19 aur hebraen se ram
Ruth4:20 aur ammeenadab se nahashaen
Ruth4:21 aur salmon se boaj
Ruth4:22 aur obed se yishau
1Samuel1:1 aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke ramataaim sopeem nam nagar ka nivasee aelkana nam puroosh tha
1Samuel1:2 aur usake do paatnaiyan theen aek ka to nam hanna aur doosaree ka paaninna tha. aur paninna ke to balak hua
1Samuel1:3 vah puroosh praati varsha apane nagar se senaon ke yahova ko dandvata karane aur melabali chaddhane ke liye shaeelo men jata tha aur vahan hopnee aur peenahas nam aelee ke donon putra rahate the
1Samuel1:4 aur jab jab aelkana melabali chaddhata tha tab tab vah apanee patnee paaninna ko aur usake sab bette-beattyaien ko dan diya karata tha
1Samuel1:5 parantu hanna ko vah doona dan diya karata tha
1Samuel1:6 parantu usakee saut is karan se
1Samuel1:7 aur vah to praati varsha aeesa hee karata tha aur jab hanna yahova ke bhvan ko jatee thee tab paninna usako chiddhatee thee. isaliye vah rotee aur khana n khatee thee.
1Samuel1:8 isaliye usake paati aelkana ne us se kaha
1Samuel1:9 tab shaeelo men khane aur peene ke bad hanna uttee. aur yahova ke mandair ke chaukhtt ke aek alang ke pas aelee yajak kursee par baaitta hua tha.
1Samuel1:10 aur yah man men vyakul hokar yahova se praarthna karane aur bilakh bilakhkar rone lagee.
1Samuel1:11 aur us ne yah mannat manee
1Samuel1:12 jab vah yahova ke samhane aeesee praarthna kar rahee thee
1Samuel1:13 hanna man hee man kah rahee thee usake hontt to hilate the parantu usaka shabd n sun padta tha isaliye aelee ne samajha ki vah nasho men haai.
1Samuel1:14 tab aelee ne us se kaha
1Samuel1:15 hanna ne kaha
1Samuel1:16 apanee dasee ko ochhee sree n jan jo kuchh maain ne ab tak kaha haai
1Samuel1:17 aelee ne kaha
1Samuel1:18 use ne kaha
1Samuel1:19 bihan ko ve savere utt yahova ko dandvata karake rama men apane ghar lautt gaae. aur aelakana apanee sree hanna ke pas gaya
1Samuel1:20 tab hanna garbhvatee hui aur samay par usake aek putra hua
1Samuel1:21 fir aelkana apane poore gharane samet yahova ke samhane praati varsha kee melabaali chaddhane aur apanee mannat pooree karane ke liye gaya.
1Samuel1:22 parantu hanna apane pati se yah kahakar ghar men rah gai
1Samuel1:23 usake paati elakana ne us se kaha
1Samuel1:24 jab us ne usaka doodha chhudaya tab vah usako sang le gai
1Samuel1:25 aur unhon ne bachhda bali karake balak ko aelee ke pas pahuncha diya.
1Samuel1:26 tab hanna ne kaha
1Samuel1:27 yah vahee balak haai jisake liye maain ne praarthna kee thee aur yahova ne mujhe munh manga var diya haai.
1Samuel1:28 isee liye maain bhee use yahova ko arpan kar detee hoon ki yah apane jeevan bhr yahova hee ka bana rahe. tab us ne vaheen yahova ko dandvata kiya..
1Samuel2:1 aur hanna ne praarthna karake kaha
1Samuel2:2 yahova ke tuly koi paavitra nahee
1Samuel2:3 foolakar ahankar kee or baten mat karo
1Samuel2:4 shooraveeron ke dhanush toott gaa
1Samuel2:5 jo pett bhrate the unhen rottee ke liye majadooree karanee padee
1Samuel2:6 yahova marata haai aur jilata bhee haai vahee adhaelok men utarata aur us se nikalata bhee haai..
1Samuel2:7 yahova nirdhan karata haai aur dhanee bhee banata haai
1Samuel2:8 vah kangal ko dhooli men se uttata aur daridra ko ghoore men se nikal khda karata haai
1Samuel2:9 vah apane bhkton ke pavon ko sambhale rahega
1Samuel2:10 jo yahova se jhgadte haain ve chakanachoor honge vah unake virooddh akash men garajega. yahova prathvee kee chhor tak nyay karega aur apane raja ko bal dega
1Samuel2:11 tab aelkana rama ko apane ghar chala gaya. aur vah balak aelee yajak ke samhane yahova kee seva tthal karane laga..
1Samuel2:12 aelee ke putra to luchche the unhon ne yahova ko n pahichana.
1Samuel2:13 aur yajakon kee reeati logon ke sath yah thee
1Samuel2:14 use kadahee
1Samuel2:15 aur charbee jalane se pahile bhee yajak ka sevak akar melabali chaddhanevale se kahata tha
1Samuel2:16 aur jab koi us se kahata
1Samuel2:17 isaliye un javanon ka pap yahova kee draashtti men bahut bharee hua kyonaki ve manushy yahova kee bhentt ka tiraskar karate the..
1Samuel2:18 parantu shamooael jo balak tha sanee ka aepod pahine huae yahova ke samhane seva tthal kiya karata tha.
1Samuel2:19 aur usakee mata prati varsha usake liye aek chhotta sa baga banakar jab apane paati ke sang praati varsha kee melabaali chaddhane atee thee tab bage ko usake pas laya karatee thee.
1Samuel2:20 aur aelee ne aelkana aur usakee patnee ko ashaeervad dekar kaha
1Samuel2:21 aur yahova ne hanna kee suadhai lee
1Samuel2:22 aur aelee to ati booddha ho gaya tha
1Samuel2:23 tab us ne un se kaha
1Samuel2:24 he mere betto
1Samuel2:25 yaadi aek manushy doosare manushy ka aparadha kare
1Samuel2:26 parantu shamooael balak baddhta gaya aur yahova aur manushy dono us se prasann rahate the..
1Samuel2:27 aur parameshvar ka aek jan aelee ke pas jakar us se kahane laga
1Samuel2:28 aur kya maain ne use israael ke sab gotraen men se isaliye chun naheen liya tha
1Samuel2:29 isaliye mere melabali aur annabaali jinako maain ne apane dhaam men chaddhane kee agyaa dee haai
1Samuel2:30 isaliye israael ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
1Samuel2:31 sun
1Samuel2:32 israael ka kitana hee kalyan kyon n ho
1Samuel2:33 maain tere kul ke sab kisee se to apanee vedee kee seva n chheenoonga
1Samuel2:34 aur meree is bat ka chinh vah vipaati hogee jo hopnee aur peenahas nam tere donon putraen par padegee arthata ve dono ke donon aek hee din mar jaaenge.
1Samuel2:35 aur maain apane liye aek vishvasayogy yajak ttharaunga
1Samuel2:36 aur aeesa hoga ki jo koi tere gharane men bacha rahega vah usee ke pas jakar aek chhotte se ttukade chandee ke va aek rottee ke liye dandvata karake kahega
1Samuel3:1 aur vah balak shamooael aelee ke samhane yahova kee seva tthal karata tha. aur un dinon men yahova ka vachan durlabh tha aur darshan kam milata tha.
1Samuel3:2 aur us samay aeesa hua ki aelee kee ankhe to dhaunghalee hone lagee theen aur use n soojh padta tha jab vah apane sthan men letta hua tha
1Samuel3:3 aur parameshvar ka deepak ab tak bujha naheen tha
1Samuel3:4 tab yahova ne shamooael ko pukara aur us ne kaha
1Samuel3:5 tab us ne aelee ke pas daudkar kaha
1Samuel3:6 tab yahova ne fir pukar ke kaha
1Samuel3:7 us samay tak to shamooel yahova ko naheen pahachanata tha
1Samuel3:8 fir teesaree bar yahova ne shamooael ko pukara. aur vah uttke aelee ke pas gaya
1Samuel3:9 isaliye aelee ne shamooael se kaha
1Samuel3:10 tab yahova a khda hua
1Samuel3:11 yahova ne shamooael se kaha
1Samuel3:12 us din maain elee ke virooddh vah sab kuchh poora karoonga jo maain ne usake gharane ke vishay men kaha
1Samuel3:13 kyonaki maain to usako yah kahakar jata chuka hoo
1Samuel3:14 is karan maain ne aelee ke gharane ke vishay yah shapath khai
1Samuel3:15 aur shamooael bhor tak letta raha tab us ne yahova ke bhvan ke kivadon ko khola. aur shamooael aelee ko us darshan kee baten batanen se dra.
1Samuel3:16 tab aelee ne shamooael ko pukarakar kaha
1Samuel3:17 tab us ne poochha
1Samuel3:18 tab shamooael ne usako rattee rattee baten kah sunai
1Samuel3:19 aur shamooael bada hota gaya
1Samuel3:20 aur dan se beshorba tak ke rahanevale sare israaeliyon ne jan liya ki shamooael yahova ka nabee hone ke liye niyukt kiya gaya haai.
1Samuel3:21 aur yahova ne shaeelo men fir darshan diya
1Samuel4:1 aur shamooael ka vachan sare israael ke pas pahuncha. aur israaelee palishtaiyon se yuddh karane ko nikale aur unhon ne to aebenejer ke asa-pas chhavanee dalee
1Samuel4:2 tab paalishtaiyon ne israael ke virooddh panti bandhae
1Samuel4:3 aur jab ve log chhavanee men lautt aa
1Samuel4:4 tab un logon ne shaeelon men bhejakar vahan se karoobon ke upar virajanevale senaon ke yahova kee vacha ka sandook manga liya aur parameshvar kee vacha ke sandook ke sath aelee ke donon putra
1Samuel4:5 jab yahova kee vacha ka sandook chhavanee men pahuncha
1Samuel4:6 is lalakar ka shabd sunakar palishtaiyon ne poochha
1Samuel4:7 tab paalishtee drakar kahane lage
1Samuel4:8 haya! aeese mahapratapee devataon ke hath se ham ko kaun bachaaega? ye to ve hee devata haain jinhon ne misriyon par jangal men sab prakar kee vipaatiayan dalee theen.
1Samuel4:9 he paalishtaiyo
1Samuel4:10 tab paalishtee ladai ke maaidan men toott pade
1Samuel4:11 aur parameshvar ka sandook chheen liya gaya aur aelee ke dono putra
1Samuel4:12 tab aek binyameenee manushy ne sena men se daudkar usee din apane vasr faade aur sir par mittee dale huae shaeelo men pahuncha.
1Samuel4:13 vah jab pahuncha us samay aelee
1Samuel4:14 chillane ka shabd sunakar aelee ne poochha
1Samuel4:15 ael to atthanave varsha ka tha
1Samuel4:16 us manushy ne elee se kaha
1Samuel4:17 us samachar denevale ne uttr diya
1Samuel4:18 jyonhee us ne parameshvar ke sandook ka nam liya tyonhee aelee faattk ke pas kursee par se pachhad khakar gir pada aur booddhe aur bharee hone ke karan usakee gardan toott gai
1Samuel4:19 usakee bahoo peenahas kee sree garbhvatee thee
1Samuel4:20 usake marate marate un striayon ne jo usake as pas khdee theen us se kaha
1Samuel4:21 aur parameshvar ke sandook ke chheen liae jane aur apane sasur aur pati ke karan us ne yah kahakar us balak ka nam ikabod rakha
1Samuel4:22 fir us ne kaha
1Samuel5:1 aur paalishtaiyon ne parameshvar ka sandook aebanejer se uttakar ashadod men pahuncha diya
1Samuel5:2 fir palishtaiyon ne parameshvar ke sandook ko uttakar dagon ke maandair men pahunchakar dagon ke pas dhar diya.
1Samuel5:3 bihan ko ashadodiyon ne tadke uttkar kya dekha
1Samuel5:4 fir bihan ko jab ve tadke utte
1Samuel5:5 is karan aj ke din tak bhee dagon ke pujaree aur jitane dagon ke maandair men jate haai
1Samuel5:6 tab yahova ka hath ashadodiyon ke upar bharee pada
1Samuel5:7 yah hal dekhkar ashadod ke logon ne kaha
1Samuel5:8 tab unhon ne paalishtaiyon ke sab saradaron ko bulava bheja
1Samuel5:9 jab ve usako ghaumakar vahan pahunche
1Samuel5:10 tab unhon ne parameshvar ka sandook aekron ko bheja aur jyonhee parameshvar ka sandook aekron men pahuncha tyonhee aekronee yah kahakar chillane lage
1Samuel5:11 tab unhon ne paalishtaiyon ke sab saradaron ko ikattha kiya
1Samuel5:12 aur jo manushy n mare ve bhee gilaattyaien ke mare pade rahe aur nagar kee chillahatt akash tak pahunchee..
1Samuel6:1 yahova ka sandook palishtaiyon ke desh men sat maheene tak raha.
1Samuel6:2 tab paalishtaiyon ne yajakon aur bhavee karanevalon ko bulakar poochha
1Samuel6:3 ve bole
1Samuel6:4 unhon ne poochha
1Samuel6:5 to tum apanee gilaattyaien aur apane desh ke nash karanevale choohon kee bhee mooraten banakar israael ke devata kee maahima mano sambhv haai vah apana hath tum par se aur tumhare devataon aur desh par se utta le.
1Samuel6:6 tum apane man kyon aeese hatteele karate ho jaaise misriyon aur firaun ne apane man hatteele kar diae the? jab us ne unake madhy men achambhiat kam kia
1Samuel6:7 so ab tum aek nai gadee banao
1Samuel6:8 tab yahova ka sandook lekar us gadee par dhar do
1Samuel6:9 aur dekhte rahana yaadi vah apane desh ke marga se hokar betashomesh ko chale
1Samuel6:10 un manushyon ne vaaisa hee kiya arthata do dudhaar gayen lekar us gadee men jotee
1Samuel6:11 aur yahova ka sandook
1Samuel6:12 tab gayon ne betashamesh ko seedha marga liya ve sadk hee sadk bambatee hui chalee gai
1Samuel6:13 aur betashomesh ke log tarai men gehoon katt rahe the aur jab unhon ne ankhen uttakar sandook ko dekha
1Samuel6:14 aur gadee yahoshoo nam aek betashomeshaee ke khet men jakar vahan tthar gai
1Samuel6:15 aur leveeyon ne yahova ke sandook ko us sandook ke samet jo sath tha
1Samuel6:16 yah dekhkar paalishtaiyon ke panchon saradar usee din aekron ko lautt gaae..
1Samuel6:17 sone kee gilaattyaian jo paalishtaiyon ne yahova kee haati bhrane ke liye doshabaali karake de dee thee un men se aek to ashadod kee or se
1Samuel6:18 aur vah sone ke choohe
1Samuel6:19 fir is karan se ki betashomesh ke logon ne yahova ke sandook ke bheetar jhanka tha us ne un men se sattr manushy
1Samuel6:20 tab betashomesh ke log kahane lage
1Samuel6:21 tab unhon ne kiryatyareem ke nivaasiyon ke pas yon kahane ko doot bheje
1Samuel7:1 tab kiryatyareem ke logon ne jakar yahova ke sandook ko uttaya
1Samuel7:2 kiryatyareem men rahate rahate sandook ko bahut din hua
1Samuel7:3 tab shamooael ne israael ke sare gharane se kaha
1Samuel7:4 tab israaeliyon ne bal devataon aur ashatoret deaviyon ko door kiya
1Samuel7:5 fir shamooael ne kaha
1Samuel7:6 tab ve mispa men ikatthe hua
1Samuel7:7 jab paalishtaiyon ne suna ki israaelee mispa men ikatthe huae haai
1Samuel7:8 aur israaeliyon ne shamooael se kaha
1Samuel7:9 tab shamooael ne aek doodhapiuva memna le sarvang homabali karake yahova ko chaddhaya aur shamooael ne israaeliyon ke liye yahova kee dohai dee
1Samuel7:10 aur jis samay shamooael homabali ho chaddha raha tha us samay palishtee israaeliyon ke sang yuddh karane ke liye nikatt a gaa
1Samuel7:11 tab israaelee purooshaen ne mispa se nikalakar paalishtaiyon ko khdeda
1Samuel7:12 tab shamooael ne aek patthr lekar mispa aur shon ke beech men khda kiya
1Samuel7:13 tab paalishtee dab gaa
1Samuel7:14 aur aekron aur gat tak jitane nagar paalishtaiyon ne israaeliyon ke hath se chheen liae the
1Samuel7:15 aur shamooael jeevan bhr israaeliyon ka nyay karata raha.
1Samuel7:16 vah praati varsha betel aur gilagal aur mispa men ghooma-ghoomakar un sab sthanon men israaeliyon ka nyay karata tha.
1Samuel7:17 tab vah rama men jahan usaka ghar tha lautt aya
1Samuel8:1 jab shamooael booddha hua
1Samuel8:2 usake jette putra ka nam yoel
1Samuel8:3 parantu usake putra usakee rah par n chale
1Samuel8:4 tab sab israaelee vraddh log ikatthe hokar rama men shamooael ke pas jakar
1Samuel8:5 us se kahane lage
1Samuel8:6 parantu jo bat unhon ne kahee
1Samuel8:7 aur yahova ne shamooael se kaha
1Samuel8:8 jaaise jaaise kam ve us din se
1Samuel8:9 isaliye ab too unakee bat mana taubhee too gambheerata se unako bhlee bhanati samajha de
1Samuel8:10 aur shamooael ne un logon ko jo us se raja chahate the yahova kee sab baten kah sunain.
1Samuel8:11 aur us ne kaha jo raja tum par rajy karega usakee yah chal hogee
1Samuel8:12 fir vah unako hajar hajar aur pachas pachas ke upar pradhaan banaaega
1Samuel8:13 fir vah tumharee beattyaien ko lekar un se sugandhadravy aur rasoi aur rottyaian banavaaega.
1Samuel8:14 fir vah tumhare kheton aur dakh aur jalapai kee baariyon men se jo achchhee se achchhee honge unhen le lekar apane karmachariyon ko dega.
1Samuel8:15 fir vah tumhare beech aur dakh kee baariyon ko dasavan ansh le lekar apane hakimon aur karmachaariyon ko dega.
1Samuel8:16 fir vah tumhare dasa-dasiyon ko
1Samuel8:17 vah tumharee bhed-bakaariyon ka bhee dasavan ansh lega nidan tum log us ke das ban jaoge.
1Samuel8:18 aur us din tum apane us chune huae raja ke karan dohai doge
1Samuel8:19 taubhee un logon ne shamooael kee bat n sunee aur kahane lage
1Samuel8:20 jis se ham bhee aur sab jatiyon ke saman ho jaae
1Samuel8:21 logon kee ye sab baten sunakar shamooael ne yahova ke kanon tak pahunchaya.
1Samuel8:22 yahova ne shamooael se kaha
1Samuel9:1 binyameen ke gotra men keesh nam ka aek puroosh tha
1Samuel9:2 usake shaaul nam ek javan putra tha
1Samuel9:3 jab shaaul ke pita keesh kee gadaahiyan kho gai
1Samuel9:4 tab vah aepraaim ke pahadee desh aur shaleesha desh hote huae gaya
1Samuel9:5 jab ve soofa nam desh men aa
1Samuel9:6 us ne us se kaha
1Samuel9:7 shaaul ne apane sevak se kaha
1Samuel9:8 sevak ne fir shaaul se kaha
1Samuel9:9 poorvakal men to israael men jab koi aeesa kahata tha
1Samuel9:10 tab shaaul ne apane sevak se kaha
1Samuel9:11 us nagar kee chaddhai par chaddhte samay unhen kai ek ladkiyan mileen jo panee bhrane ko nikalee theen unhon ne un se poochha
1Samuel9:12 unhon ne uttr diya
1Samuel9:13 jyonhee tum nagar men pahuncho tyonhee vah tum ko unche sthan par khana khane ko jane se paahile milega kyonki jab tak vah n pahunche tab tak log bhojan karenge
1Samuel9:14 ve nagar men chaddh gaae aur jyonhee nagar ke bheetar pahunche tyonhee shamooael unche sthan par chaddhne kee manasa se unake samhane a raha tha..
1Samuel9:15 shaaul ke ane se aek din pahile yahova ne shamooael ko yah chita rakha tha
1Samuel9:16 ki kal isee samay maain tere pas binyameen ke desh se aek puroosh ko bhejoonga
1Samuel9:17 fir jab shamooael ko shaaul dekh pada
1Samuel9:18 tab shaaul faattk men shamooael ke nikatt jakar kahane laga

1Samuel9:23 fir shamooael ne rasoiye se kaha
1Samuel9:24 to rasoiye ne jangha ko mans samet uttakar shaaul ke age dhar diya tab shamooael ne kaha
1Samuel9:25 tab ve unche sthan se utarakar nagar men aa
1Samuel9:26 bihan ko ve tadke utte
1Samuel9:27 aur nagar ke sire kee utarai par chalate chalate shamooael ne shaaul se kaha
1Samuel10:1 tab shamooael ne aek kuppee tel lekar usake sir par undela
1Samuel10:2 aj jab too mere pas se chala jaaega
1Samuel10:3 fir vahan se age baddhkar jab too tabor ke banjavraksha ke pas pahunchega
1Samuel10:4 aur ve tera kushal poochhenge
1Samuel10:5 tab too parameshvar ke pahad par pahunchega jahan palishtaiyon kee chaukee haai aur jab too vahan nagar men pravesh kare
1Samuel10:6 tab yahova ka atma tujh par bal se utarega
1Samuel10:7 aur jab ye chinh tujhe dekh padenge
1Samuel10:8 aur too mujh se paahile gilagal ko jana aur maain homabali aur melabali chaddhane ke liye tere pas aunga. too sat din tak meree batt johate rahana
1Samuel10:9 jyonhee us ne shamooael ke pas se jane ko peett faeree tyonhee parameshvar ne usake man ko parivartan kiya aur ve sab chinh usee din pragatt huae..
1Samuel10:10 jab ve udhar us pahad ke pas aa
1Samuel10:11 jab un sabhon ne jo use paahile se janate the yah dekha ki vah nabiyon ke beech men naboovat kar raha haai
1Samuel10:12 vahan ke aek manushy ne uttr diya
1Samuel10:13 jab vah naboovat kar chuka
1Samuel10:14 tab shaaul ke chacha ne us se aur usake sevak se poochha
1Samuel10:15 shaaul ke chacha ne kaha
1Samuel10:16 shaaul ne apane chacha se kaha
1Samuel10:17 tab shamooael ne praja ke logon ko mispa men yahova ke pas bulavaya
1Samuel10:18 tab us ne israaeliyon se kaha
1Samuel10:19 parantu tum ne aj apane parameshvar ko jo sab vipaatiayon aur kashtton se tumhara chhudanevala haai tuchchh jana aur us se kaha haai
1Samuel10:20 tab shamooael sare israaelee gotraiyon ko sameep laya
1Samuel10:21 tab vah binyameen ke gotra ke kul kul karake sameep laya
1Samuel10:22 tab unhon ne fir yahova se poochha
1Samuel10:23 tab ve daudkar use vahan se laae aur vah logon ke beech men khda hua
1Samuel10:24 shamooael ne sab logon se kaha
1Samuel10:25 tab shamooael ne logon se rajaneeati ka varnn kiya
1Samuel10:26 aur shaaul giba ko apane ghar chala gaya
1Samuel10:27 parantu kai luchche logon ne kaha
1Samuel11:1 tab ammonee nahash ne chaddhai karake gilad ke yabes ke virooddh chhavanee dalee aur yabesh ke sab purooshaen ne nahash se kaha
1Samuel11:2 ammonee nahash ne un se kaha
1Samuel11:3 yabesh ke vraddh logon ne us se kaha
1Samuel11:4 dooton ne shaaulavale giba men akar logon ko yah sandesh sunaya
1Samuel11:5 aur shaaul baailon ke peechhe peechhe maaidan se chala ata tha aur shaaul ne poochha

1Samuel17:3 paalishtee to aek or ke pahad par aur israaelee doosaree or ke pahad par aur israaelee doosaree or ke pahad par khde rahe aur donon ke beech tarai thee.
1Samuel17:4 tab paalishtaiyon kee chhavanee men se aek veer goliyat nam nikala

1Samuel19:1 aur shaaul ne apane putra yonatan aur apane sab karmachariyon se daud ko mar dalane kee charcha kee. parantu shaaul ka putra yonatan daud se bahut prasann tha.
1Samuel19:2 aur yonatan ne daud ko bataya
1Samuel19:3 aur maain maaidan men jahan too hoga vahan jakar apane pita ke pas khda hokar us se teree charcha karoonga aur yaadi mujhe kuchh maloom ho to tujhe bataunga.
1Samuel19:4 aur yonatan ne apane pita shaaul se daud kee prashansa karake us se kaha
1Samuel19:5 us ne apane praan par khelakar us palishtee ko mar dala
1Samuel19:6 tab shaaul ne yonatan kee bat manakar yah shapath khai
1Samuel19:7 tab yonatan ne daud ko bulakar ye samast baten usako batai. fir yonatan daud ko shaaul ke pas le gaya
1Samuel19:8 tab fir ladai hone lagee aur daud jakar paalishtaiyon se lada
1Samuel19:9 aur jab shaaul hath men bhala liae huae ghar men baaitta tha aur daud hath se baja raha i
1Samuel19:10 aur shaaul ne chaha
1Samuel19:11 aur shaaul ne daud ke ghar par doot isaliye bheje ki ve usakee ghaat men rahe
1Samuel19:12 tab meekal ne daud ko khaidkee se utar diya aur vah bhag kar bach nikala.
1Samuel19:13 tab meekal ne grahadevataon ko le charapai par littaya
1Samuel19:14 jab shaaul ne daud ko pakad lane ke liye doot bheje
1Samuel19:15 tab shaaul ne dooton ko daud ke dekhne ke liye bheja
1Samuel19:16 jab doot bheetar gaa
1Samuel19:17 so shaaul ne meekal se kaha
1Samuel19:18 aur daud bhagakar bach nikala
1Samuel19:19 jab shaaul ne daud ke pakad lane ke liye doot bheje aur jab shaaul ke dooton ne naabiyon ke dal ko naboovat karate huae dekha
1Samuel19:20 tab shaaul ne daud ke pakad lane ke liye doot bheje aur jab shaaul ke dooton ne naabiyon ke dal ko naboovat karate hua
1Samuel19:21 isaka samachar pakar shaaul ne aur doot bheje
1Samuel19:22 tab vah ap hee rata ko chala
1Samuel19:23 tab vah udhar
1Samuel19:24 aur us ne bhee apane vasr utare
1Samuel20:1 fir daud rama ke nabayot se bhaga
1Samuel20:2 us ne us se kaha
1Samuel20:3 fir daud ne shapath khakar kaha
1Samuel20:4 yonatan ne daud se kaha
1Samuel20:5 daud ne yonatan se kaha
1Samuel20:6 yaadi tera pita meree kuchh chinta kare
1Samuel20:7 yaadi vah yon kahe
1Samuel20:8 aur too apane das se krapa ka vyavahar karana
1Samuel20:9 yonatan ne kaha
1Samuel20:10 daud ne yonatan se kaha
1Samuel20:11 yonatan ne daud se kaha
1Samuel20:12 tab yonatan daud se kahane laga israael ke parameshvar yahova kee shapat
1Samuel20:13 yaadi mere pita ka man teree burai karane ka ho
1Samuel20:14 aur n keval jab tak maain jeevit rahoo
1Samuel20:15 parantu mere gharane par se bhee apanee krapadraashtti kabhee n hattana! varan jab yahova daud ke har aek shatra ko prathvee par se nash kar chukega
1Samuel20:16 is prakar yonatan ne daud ke gharane se yah kahakar vacha bandhaai
1Samuel20:17 aur yonatan daud se praem rakhta tha
1Samuel20:18 tab yonatan ne us se kaha
1Samuel20:19 aur too teen din ke beetane par turant ana
1Samuel20:20 tab maain usakee alang
1Samuel20:21 fir maain apane tthaluae chhokare ko yah kahakar bhejoonga
1Samuel20:22 parantu yadi maain chhokare se yon kahoo
1Samuel20:23 aur us bat ke vishay jisakee charcha maain ne aur too ne apas men kee haai
1Samuel20:24 isaliye daud maaidan men ja chhpaia aur jab naya chad hua
1Samuel20:25 raja to pahile kee nain apane us asan par baaitta jo bheet ke pas tha aur yonatan khda hua
1Samuel20:26 us din to shaaul yah sochakar chup raha
1Samuel20:27 fir naye chad ke doosare din ko daud ka sthan khalee raha. aur shaaul ne apane putra yonatan se poochha
1Samuel20:28 yonatan ne shaaul se kaha
1Samuel20:29 aur kaha
1Samuel20:30 tab shaaul ka kop yonatan par bhdk utta
1Samuel20:31 kyonaki jab tak yishau ka putra boomi par jeevit rahega
1Samuel20:32 yonatan ne apane pita shaaul ko uttr dekar us se kaha
1Samuel20:33 tab shaaul ne usako marane ke liye us par bhala chalaya isase yonatan ne jan liya
1Samuel20:34 tab yonatan krodha se jalata hua mej par se utt gaya
1Samuel20:35 bihan ko yonatan aek chhotta ladka sang liae huae maaidan men daud ke sath ttharaae huae sthan ko gaya.
1Samuel20:36 tab us ne apane chhokare se kaha
1Samuel20:37 jab chhokara yonatan ke chalaae teer ke sthan par pahuncha
1Samuel20:38 fir yonatan ne chhokare ke peechhe se pukarakar kaha
1Samuel20:39 isaka bhed chhokara to kuchh n janata tha keval yonatan aur daud is bat ko janate the.
1Samuel20:40 aur yonatan ne apane haathaiyar apane chhokare ko dekar kaha
1Samuel20:41 jyonhee chhokara chala gaya
1Samuel20:42 tab yonatan ne daud se kaha
1Samuel21:1 aur daud nob ko aheemelek yajak ke pas aya aur aheemelek daud se bhentt karane ko thrathrata hua nikala
1Samuel21:2 daud ne aheemelek yajak se kaha
1Samuel21:3 ab tere hath men kya haai? panch rottee
1Samuel21:4 yajak ne daud se kaha
1Samuel21:5 daud ne yajak ko uttr dekar us se kaha
1Samuel21:6 tab yajak ne usako pavitra rottee dee kyonki doosaree rottee vahan n thee
1Samuel21:7 usee din vahan doeg nam shaaul ka ek karmacharee yahova ke age rooka hua tha vah edomee aur shaaul ke charavahon ka muakhaiya tha.
1Samuel21:8 fir daud ne aheemelek se poochha
1Samuel21:9 yajak ne kaha
1Samuel21:10 tab daud chala
1Samuel21:11 aur akeesh ke karmachaariyon ne akeesh se kaha
1Samuel21:12 daud ne ye baten apane man men rakhee
1Samuel21:13 tab vah unake samhane doosaree chal chalee
1Samuel21:14 tab akeesh ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha
1Samuel21:15 kya mere pas bavalon kee kuchh ghattee haai
1Samuel22:1 aur daud vahan se chala
1Samuel22:2 aur jitane sankatt men pade the
1Samuel22:3 vahan se daud ne moab ke misape ko jakar moab ke raja se kaha
1Samuel22:4 aur vah unako moab ke raja ke sammukh le gaya
1Samuel22:5 fir gad nam aek nabee ne daud se kaha
1Samuel22:6 tab shaaul ne suna ki daud aur usake sangiyon ka pata lag gaya haain us samay shaaul giba ke unche sthan par
1Samuel22:7 tab shaaul apane karmachaariyon se jo usake asapas khde the kahane laga
1Samuel22:8 tum sabhon ne mere virooddh kyon rajadraeh kee goshttee kee haai? aur jab mere putra ne yishau ke putra se vacha bandhae
1Samuel22:9 tab aedomee doaeg ne
1Samuel22:10 aur us ne usake liye yahova se poochha
1Samuel22:11 aur raja ne aheetoob ke putra aheemelek yajak ko aur usake pita ke samast gharane ko
1Samuel22:12 tab shaaul ne kaha
1Samuel22:13 shaaul ne us se puchha
1Samuel22:14 aheemelek ne raja ko uttr dekar kaha
1Samuel22:15 kya maain ne aj hee usake liye parameshvar se poochhna arambh kiya haai? vah mujh se door rahe! raja n to apane das par aeesa koi dosh lagaa
1Samuel22:16 raja ne kaha
1Samuel22:17 fir raja ne un paharooon se jo usake asapas khde the agyaa dee
1Samuel22:18 tab raja ne doaeg se kaha
1Samuel22:19 aur yajakon ke nagar nob ko us ne striayon-purooshae
1Samuel22:20 parantu aheetoob ke putra aheemelek ka aebyatar nam aek putra bach nikala
1Samuel22:21 tab aebyatar ne daud ko bataya
1Samuel22:22 aur daud ne aebyatar se kaha
1Samuel22:23 isaliye too mere sath nidr raha jo mere praan ka graahak haai vahee tere praan ka bhee graahak haai parantu meere sath rahane se teree raksha hogee..
1Samuel23:1 aur daud ko yah samachar mila ki palishtee log keela nagar se yuddh kar rahe haai
1Samuel23:2 tab daud ne yahova se poochha
1Samuel23:3 parantu daud ke janon ne us se kaha
1Samuel23:4 tab daud ne yahova se fir poochha
1Samuel23:5 isaliye daud apane janon ko sang lekar keela ko gaya
1Samuel23:6 jab aheemelek ka putra aebyatar daud ke pas keela ko bhag gaya tha
1Samuel23:7 tab shaaul ko yah samachar mila ki daud keela ko gaya haai. aur shaaul ne kaha
1Samuel23:8 tab shaaul ne apanee saree sena ko ladai ke liye bulavaya
1Samuel23:9 tab daud ne jan liya ki shaaul meree haani ki yuktai kar raha haai isaaliye us ne aebyatar yajak se kaha
1Samuel23:10 tab daud ne kaha
1Samuel23:11 kya keela ke log mujhe usake vash men kar denge? kya jaaise tere das ne suna haai
1Samuel23:12 fir daud ne poochha
1Samuel23:13 tab daud aur usake jan jo koi chh: sau the keela se nikal gaa
1Samuel23:14 jab daud jo jangal ke gaddhon men rahane laga
1Samuel23:15 aur daud ne jan liya ki shaaul mere praan kee khoj men nikala haai. aur daud jeep nam jangal ke horesh nam sthan men tha
1Samuel23:16 ki shaaul ka putra yonatan uttkar usake pas horesh men gaya
1Samuel23:17 us ne us se kaha
1Samuel23:18 tab un donon ne yahova kee shapath khakar apas men vacha bandhaee tab daud horesh men rah gaya
1Samuel23:19 tab jeepee log giba men shaaul ke pas jakar kahane lage
1Samuel23:20 isaliye ab
1Samuel23:21 shaaul ne kaha
1Samuel23:22 tum chalakar aur bhee nishchay kar lo aur dekh bhalakar jan lo
1Samuel23:23 isaliye jahan kaheen vah chhpai karata haai un sab sthanon ko dekh dekhkar pahichano
1Samuel23:24 tab ve chalakar shaaul se paahile jeep ko gaae. parantu daud apane janon samet maon nam jangal men chala gaya tha
1Samuel23:25 tab shaaul apane janon ko sath lekar usakee khoj men gaya. isaka samachar pakar daud parvat par se utarake maon jangal men rahane laga. yah sun shaaul ne maon jangal men daud ka peechha kiya.
1Samuel23:26 shaaul to pahad kee aek or
1Samuel23:27 ki aek doot ne shaaul ke pas akar kaha

1Samuel24:1 jab shaaul paalishtaiyon ka peechha karake lautta
1Samuel24:2 tab shaaul samast israaeliyon men se teen hajar ko chhanttkar daud aur usake janon ko banaaile bakaron kee chattanon par khojane gaya.
1Samuel24:3 jab vah marga par ke bhedshaalon ke pas pahuncha jahan aek gufaa thee
1Samuel24:4 tab daud ke janon ne us se kaha
1Samuel24:5 isake peechhe daud shaaul ke bage kee chhor kattne se pachhtaya.
1Samuel24:6 aur apane janon se kahane laga
1Samuel24:7 aeesee baten kahakar daud ne apane janon ko ghaudkee lagai aur unhen shaaul kee haani karane ko uttne n diya. fir shaaul uttkar gufaa se nikala aur apana marga liya.
1Samuel24:8 usake peechhe daud bhee uttkar gufaa se nikala aur shaaul ko peechhe se pukar ke bola
1Samuel24:9 aur daud ne shaaul se kaha

1Samuel24:11 fir

1Samuel24:14 israael ka raja kis ka peechha karane ko nikala haai? aur kis ke peechhe pada haai? aek mare kutte ke peechhe! aek pissoo ke peechhe!
1Samuel24:15 isaliye yahova nyayee hokar mera tera vichar kare
1Samuel24:16 daud shaaul se ye baten kahee chuka tha
1Samuel24:17 fir us ne daud se kaha

1Samuel24:19 bhla! kya koi manushy apane shatra ko pakar kushal se jane deta haai? isaaliye jo too ne aj mere sath kiya haai
1Samuel24:20 aur ab
1Samuel24:21 ab mujh se yahova kee shapath kha
