1Samuel25:1 aur shamooael mar gaya aur samast israaeliyon ne ikatthe hokar usake liye chhatee peettee
1Samuel25:2 maon men aek puroosh rahata tha jisaka mal karmel men tha. aur vah puroosh bahut bada tha
1Samuel25:3 us puroosh ka nam nabal
1Samuel25:4 jab daud ne jangal men samachar paya
1Samuel25:5 tab daud ne das javanon ko vahan bhej diya
1Samuel25:6 aur us se yon kaho
1Samuel25:7 maain ne suna haai
1Samuel25:8 apane javanon se yah bat poochh le
1Samuel25:9 aeesee aeesee baten daud ke javan jakar usake nam se nabal ko sunakar chup rahe.
1Samuel25:10 nabal ne daud ke janon ko uttr dekar un se kaha
1Samuel25:11 kya maain apanee rottee-panee aur jo pashu maain ne apane kataranevalon ke liye mare haain lekar aeese logon ko de doo
1Samuel25:12 tab daud ke javanon ne lauttkar apana marga liya
1Samuel25:13 tab daud ne apane janon se kaha

1Samuel25:15 parantu ve manushy ham se bahut achchha bartav rakhte the
1Samuel25:16 jab tak ham un ke sath bhed-bakaariyan charate rahe
1Samuel25:17 isaliye ab soch vichar kar ki kya karana chaahiae kyonaki unhon ne hamare svamee kee or usake samast gharane kee hani ttanee hogee
1Samuel25:18 ab abeegaail ne faurtee se do sau rottee
1Samuel25:19 aur us ne apane javanon se kaha

1Samuel25:21 daud ne to socha tha

1Samuel25:24 fir vah usake panv par girake kahane lagee

1Samuel25:26 aur ab
1Samuel25:27 aur ab yah bhentt jo teree dasee apane prabhu ke pas lai haai
1Samuel25:28 apanee dasee ka aparadha kshama kara kyonaki yahova nishchay mere prabhu ka ghar basaaega aur sthiar karega
1Samuel25:29 aur yadhypi aek manushy tera peechha karaneaur tere praan ka graahak hone ko utta haai

1Samuel25:32 daud ne abeegaail se kaha
1Samuel25:33 aur tera vivek dhany haai
1Samuel25:34 kyonaki sachamuch israael ka parameshvar yahova
1Samuel25:35 tab daud ne use grahan kiya jo vah usake liye lai thee fir us se us ne kaha

1Samuel25:37 bihan ko jab nabal ka nasha utar gaya
1Samuel25:38 aur das din ke pashchata yahova ne nabal ko aeesa mara

1Samuel25:40 to jab daud ke sevak karmel ko abeegaail ke pas pahunche

1Samuel26:1 fir jeepee log giba men shaaul ke pas jakar kahane lage
1Samuel26:2 tab shaaul uttkar israael keteen hajar chhantte huae yoddha sang liae huae gaya ki daud ko jeep ke jangal men khoje.
1Samuel26:3 aur shaaul ne apanee chhavanee marga ke pas hakeela nam pahadee par jo yashaeemon ke samhane haai dalee. parantu daud jangal men raha aur us ne jan liya
1Samuel26:4 tab daud ne bhediyon ko bhejakar nishchay kar liya ki shaaul sachamuch a gaya haai.
1Samuel26:5 tab shaaul uttkar us sthan par gaya jahan shaaul pada tha aur daud ne us sthan ko dekha jahan shaaul apane senapati ner ke putra abner samet pada tha
1Samuel26:6 tab daud ne hittee aheemelek aur jarooyah ke putra yoab ke bhai abeeshau se kaha
1Samuel26:7 so daud aur abeeshau raton rat un logon ke pas gaa
1Samuel26:8 tab abeeshau ne daud se kaha
1Samuel26:9 daud ne abeeshau se kaha

1Samuel26:11 yahave n kare ki maain apana hath yahova ke aabhaishaikt par baddhau ab usake sirahane se bhala aur panee kee jharee utta le
1Samuel26:12 tab daud ne bhale aur panee kee jharee ko shaaul ke sirahane se utta liya aur ve chale gaae. aur kisee ne ise n dekha
1Samuel26:13 tab daui paralee or jakar door ke pahad kee chottee par khda hua
1Samuel26:14 aur daud ne un logon ko
1Samuel26:15 daud ne abner se kaha
1Samuel26:16 jo kam too ne kiya haai vah achchha naheen. yahova ke jeevan kee shapath tum log mare jane ke yogy ho
1Samuel26:17 tab shaaul ne daud ka bol pahichanakar kaha
1Samuel26:18 fir us ne kaha

1Samuel27:1 और दाऊद सोचने लगा
1Samuel27:2 तब दाऊद अपके छ: सौ संगी पुरूषोंको लेकर चला गया
1Samuel27:3 और दाऊद और उसके जन अपके अपके परिवार समेत गत में आकीश के पास रहने लगे। दाऊद तो अपक्की दो स्त्रियोंके साय
1Samuel27:4 जब शाऊल को यह समाचार मिला कि दाऊद गत को भाग गया है
1Samuel27:5 दाऊद ने आकीश से कहा
1Samuel27:6 जब आकीश ने उसे उसी दिन सिकलग बस्ती दी; इस कारण से सिकलग आज के दिन तक यहूदा के राजाओं का बना है।।
1Samuel27:7 पलिश्तियोंके देश में रहते रहते दाऊद को एक वर्ष चार महीने बीत गए।
1Samuel27:8 और दाऊद ने अपके जनोंसमेत जाकर गशूरियों
1Samuel27:9 दाऊद ने उस देश को नाश किया
1Samuel27:10 आकीश ने पूछा
1Samuel27:11 दाऊद ने स्त्री पुरूष किसी को जीवित न छोड़ा कि उन्हें गत में पहुंचाए; उस ने सोचा या
1Samuel27:12 तब आकीश ने दाऊद की बात सच मानकर कहा

1Samuel28:6 aur jab shaaul ne yahova se poochha
1Samuel28:7 tab shaaul ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha
1Samuel28:8 tab shaaul ne apana bhesh badala
1Samuel28:9 sree ne us se kaha

1Samuel28:12 jab sree ne shamooael ko dekha
1Samuel28:13 raja ne us sekaha
1Samuel28:14 us ne us se poochha us ka kaaisa roop ha? us ne kaha

1Samuel28:16 shamooael ne kaha
1Samuel28:17 yahova ne to jaaise mujh se kahalavaya tha vaaisa hee us ne vyavahar kiya haai arthata us ne tere hath se rajy chheenakar tere padosee daud ko de diya haai.
1Samuel28:18 too ne jo yahova kee bat n manee
1Samuel28:19 fir yahova tujh samet israaeliyon ko paalishtaiyon ke hath men kar dega aur too apane betton samet kal mere sath hoga aur israaelee sena ko bhee yahova paalishtaiyon ke hath men kar dega.
1Samuel28:20 tab shaaul turant munh ke bal boomi par gir pada
1Samuel28:21 tab vah sree shaaul ke pas gai
1Samuel28:22 toab too bhee apanee dasee kee bat mana aur maain tere samhane aek ttukada rottee rakoon too use kha
1Samuel28:23 us ne inakar karake kaha
1Samuel28:24 sree ke ghar men to aek taaiyar kiya hua bachhda tha

1Samuel29:1 paalishtaiyon ne apanee samast sena ko apek men ikattha kiya aur israaelee yijrael ke nikatt ke sote ke pas dere dale huae the.
1Samuel29:2 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradar apane apane saaikadon aur hajaron samet age baddh gaa
1Samuel29:3 tab paalishtee hakimon ne poochha
1Samuel29:4 tab paalishtee hakim us se krodhait hue aur us se kaha
1Samuel29:5 kya yah vahee daud naheen haai
1Samuel29:6 tab akeesh ne daud ko bulakar us se kaha
1Samuel29:7 isaliye ab too kushal se lautt ja aeesa n ho ki palishtee saradar tujh se aprasann hon.
1Samuel29:8 daud ne akeesh se kaha
1Samuel29:9 akeesh ne daud ko uttr dekar kaha
1Samuel29:10 isaliye ab too apane prabhu ke sevakon ko lekar jo tere sath aae haain bihan ko tadke uttna aur tum bihan ko ladke uttkar ujiyala hote hee chale jana.
1Samuel29:11 isaliye bihan ko daud apane janon samet tadke uttkar paalishtaiyon ke desh ko lau gaya. aur paalishtee yijrael ko chaddh gaae..
1Samuel30:1 teesare din jab daud apane janon samet sikalag pahuncha
1Samuel30:2 aur us men kee sree aadi chhotte bade jitane the
1Samuel30:3 isaliye jab daud apane janon samet us nagar men pahuncha
1Samuel30:4 tab daud aur ve log jo usake sath the chillakar itana roa
1Samuel30:5 aur daud kee do striaya
1Samuel30:6 aur daud bade sankatt men pada kyonki log apane bette-beattyaien ke karan bahut shaekit hokar us par patthravah karane kee charcha kar rahe the. parantu daud ne apane parameshvar yahova ko smaran karake hiyav bandhaa..
1Samuel30:7 tab daud ne aheemelek ke putra aebyatar yajak se kaha
1Samuel30:8 aur daud ne yahova se poochha
1Samuel30:9 tab daud apanechh: sau sathee janon ko lekar basor nam nale tak pahuncha vahan kuchh log chhode jakar rah gaae.
1Samuel30:10 daud to char sau purooshaen samet peechha kiae chala gaya parantu dausau jo aeese thk gaae the
1Samuel30:11 unako ek misree puroosh maaidan men mila
1Samuel30:12 fir unhon ne usako anjeer kee ttiikaya ka aek ttukada aur do guchchhe kishaamish diae. aur jab us ne khaya
1Samuel30:13 tab daud ne us se poochha
1Samuel30:14 ham logon ne kareatiyon kee daakkhian disha me
1Samuel30:15 daud ne us se poochha
1Samuel30:16 jab us ne use pahunchaya
1Samuel30:17 isaliye daud unhen rat ke pahile pahar se lekar doosare din kee sanjh tak marata raha yahan tak ki char sau javan ko chhod
1Samuel30:18 aur jo kuchh amalekee le gaae the vah sab daud ne chhudaya aur daud ne apanee donon striayon ko bhee chhuda liya.
1Samuel30:19 varan unake kya chhotte
1Samuel30:20 aur daud ne sab bhedbakariya
1Samuel30:21 tab daud un do sau purushaen ke pas aya
1Samuel30:22 tab un logon men se jo daud ke sang gaae the sab dushtt aur ochhe logon ne kaha
1Samuel30:23 parantu daud ne kaha
1Samuel30:24 aur is vishay men tumharee kaun sunega? ladai men janevale ka jaaisa bhag ho
1Samuel30:25 aur daud ne israaeliyon ke liye aeesee hee vidhai aur niyam ttharaya
1Samuel30:26 sikalag men pahunchakar daud ne yahoodee puraaniyon ke pas jo usake mitra the loott ke mal men se kuchh kuchh bheja
1Samuel30:27 arthatabetel ke dakkhian desh ke ramot

1Samuel30:30 horma

1Samuel31:2 aur paalishtee shaaul aur usake putraen ke peechhe lage rahe aur paalishtaiyon ne shaaul ke putra yonatan
1Samuel31:3 aur shaaul ke sath dhamasan yuddh ho raha tha

1Samuel31:5 yah dekhkar ki shaaul mar gaya
1Samuel31:6 yon shaaul

1Samuel31:8 doosare din jab palishtee mare huon ke mal ko loottne aa
1Samuel31:9 tab unhon ne shaaul ka sir katta
1Samuel31:10 tab unhon ne usake haathaiyar to ashtoret nam deviyon ke maandair men rakhe
1Samuel31:11 jab giladavale yabesh ke nivaasiyon ne suna ki palishtaiyon ne shaaul se kya kya kiya haai
1Samuel31:12 tab sab shooraveer chale
1Samuel31:13 tab unhon ne unakee haaddiyan lekar yabesh ke jha ke ped ke neeche gad dee

2Samuel1:2 tab teesare din aeesa hua ki chhavanee men se shaaul ke pas se aek purush kapade faade sir par dhoolee dale huae aya. aur jab vah daud ke pas pahuncha
2Samuel1:3 daud ne us se poochha
2Samuel1:4 daud ne us se poochha

2Samuel2:1 isake bad daud ne yahova se poochha
2Samuel2:2 tab daud yijraelee aheenoam
2Samuel2:3 aur daud apane sathaiyon ko bhee aek aek ke gharane samet vahan le gaya aur ve hebraen ke ganvon men rahane lage.
2Samuel2:4 aur yahoodee log gaa
2Samuel2:5 aur daud ko yah samachar mila
2Samuel2:6 isaliye ab yahova tum se krapa aur sachchai ka barttav kare aur maain bhee tumharee is bhlai ka badala tum ko doonga
2Samuel2:7 aur ab hiyav bandhae
2Samuel2:8 parantu ner ka putra abner jo shaaul ka pradhaan senapaati tha
2Samuel2:9 aur use gilad ashooriyon ke desh yijrael
2Samuel2:10 shaaul ka putra ishaboshot chalees varsha ka tha jab vah israaael par rajy karane laga
2Samuel2:11 aur daud ke hebraen men yahooda ke gharane par rajy karane ka samay saddhe sat varsha tha.
2Samuel2:12 aur ner ka putra abner
2Samuel2:13 tab saruyah ka putra yoab
2Samuel2:14 tab abner ne yoab se kaha
2Samuel2:15 tab ve utte
2Samuel2:16 aur unhon ne aek doosare ka sir pakadkar apanee apanee talavar aek doosare ke panjar men bhonk dee aur ve aek hee sang mare. is se us sthan ka nam helkathssooreem pada
2Samuel2:17 aur us din bada ghaer se yuddh hua aur abner aur israaael ke purush daud ke janon se har gaae.
2Samuel2:18 vahan to yoab

2Samuel2:21 abner ne us se kaha

2Samuel2:25 aur binyameenee ababner ke peechhe hokar aek dal ho gaa
2Samuel2:26 tab abner yoab ko pukarake kahane laga
2Samuel2:27 yoab ne kaha
2Samuel2:28 tab yoab ne naraasinga foonka aur sab log tthar gaa
2Samuel2:29 aur abner apane janon samet usee din ratonrat araba se hokar gaya aur yaradan ke par ho samast bitraen desh men hokar mahanaaim men pahuncha.
2Samuel2:30 aur yoab abner ka peechha chhodkar lautta aur jab us ne sab logon ko ikatta kiya

2Samuel2:32 aur unhon ne asahel ko uttakar usake pita ke kabirstan me
2Samuel3:1 shaaul ke gharane aur daud ke gharane ke madhy bahut din tak ladai hotee rahee parantu daud prabal hota gaya
2Samuel3:2 aur hebraen men daud ke putra utpann huae usaka jetta betta amnon tha
2Samuel3:3 aur usaka doosara kilav tha

2Samuel3:5 chhttvan yitraam
2Samuel3:6 jab shaaul aur daud donon ke gharanon ke madhy ladai ho rahee thee
2Samuel3:7 shaaul kee aek rakhelee thee jisaka nam rispa tha
2Samuel3:8 ishaboshot kee baton ke karan abner ati krodhait hokar kahane laga
2Samuel3:9 yaadi maain daud ke sath ishvar kee shapath ke anusar bartav n karu
2Samuel3:10 arthata maain rajy ko shaaul ke gharane se chheenoonga
2Samuel3:11 aur vah abner ko koi uttar n de saka

2Samuel3:14 fir daud ne shaaul ke putra ishaboshot ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja
2Samuel3:15 tab ishaboshot ne logon ko bhejakar use laaish ke putra palateeael ke pas se chheen liya.

2Samuel3:19 fir abner ne binyameen se bhee baten keen tab abner hebraen ko chala gaya
2Samuel3:20 tab abner bees purush sang lekar hebraen men aya
2Samuel3:21 tab abner ne daud se kaha

2Samuel3:26 yoab ne daud ke pas se nikalakar daud ke anajane abner ke peechhe doot bheje
2Samuel3:27 jab abner hebraen ko lautt aya

2Samuel3:30 yoab aur usake bhai abeeshau ne abner ko is karan ghaat kiya
2Samuel3:31 tab daud ne yoab aur apane sab sangee lagon se kaha

2Samuel3:36 aur sab logon ne is par vichar kiya aur is se prasann hua
2Samuel3:37 tab un sab logon ne

2Samuel4:1 jab shaaul ke putra ne suna
2Samuel4:2 shaaul ke putra ke do jan the jo dalon ke pradhaan the aek ka nam bana
2Samuel4:3 aur berotee log gitaaim ko bhag gaa
2Samuel4:4 shaaul ke putra yonatan ke aek lagada betta tha. jab yijrael se shaaul aur yonatan ka samachar aya tab vah panch varsha ka tha us samay usakee dhaai use uttakar bhagee aur usake utavalee se bhagane ke karan vah girake langada ho gaya. aur usaka nam mapeeboshot tha.
2Samuel4:5 us berotee rimmon ke putra rekab aur bana kade ghaam ke samay ishaboshot ke ghar men jab vah dopahar ko vishraam kar raha tha ae.
2Samuel4:6 aur gehoon le jane ke bahane me ghar men ghaus gaae aur usake pett men mara tab rekab aur usaka bhai bana bhag nikale.
2Samuel4:7 jab ve ghar men ghause
2Samuel4:8 aur ve ishaboshot ka sir hebraen men daud ke pas le jakar raja se kahane lage

2Samuel4:11 fir jab dushtt manushyon ne aek nirdosh manushy ko usee ke ghar me

2Samuel5:1 daud ke yarooshalem men rajy karane ka arambh tab israaael ke sab gotra daud ke pas hebraen men akar kahane lage
2Samuel5:2 fir bootakal men jab shaaul hamara raja tha
2Samuel5:3 so sab israaaelee puraniye hebraen men raja ke pas aae aur daud raja ne unake sath hebraen men yahova ke samhane vacha bandhae
2Samuel5:4 daud tees varsha ka hokar rajy karane laga
2Samuel5:5 saddhe sat varsha tak to us ne hebraen men yahooda par rajy kiya

2Samuel5:8 us din daud ne kaha

2Samuel6:1 pavitra sandook ka yarooshalem men pahunchaya jana fir daud ne aek aur bar israaael men se sab bade veeron ko
2Samuel6:2 tab daud aur jitane log usake sang the
2Samuel6:3 tab unhon ne parameshvar ka sandook aek nai gadee par chaddhakar tteele par rahanevale abeenadab ke ghar se nikala aur abeenadab ke ujja aur ahao nam do putra us nai gadee ko hankane lage.
2Samuel6:4 aur unhon ne usako parameshvar ke sandook samet tteele par rahanevale abeenadab ke ghar se bahar nikala aur ahao sandook ke age age chala.
2Samuel6:5 aur daud aur israaael ka samast gharana yahova ke age sanauvar kee lakadee ke bane huae sab prakar ke baje aur veena
2Samuel6:6 jab ve nakon ke khlihan tak aa
2Samuel6:7 tab yahova ka kop ujja par bhdk utta aur parameshvar ne usake doesh ke karan usako vahan aeesa mara
2Samuel6:8 tab daud aprasann hua
2Samuel6:9 aur us din daud yahova se drakar kahane laga
2Samuel6:10 isaliye daud ne yahova ke sandook ko apane yahan daudapur men pahunchana n chaha parantu gatavasee obededom ke yahan pahunchaya.
2Samuel6:11 aur yahova ka sandook gatee obededom ke ghar men teen maheene raha aur yahova ne obededom aur usake samast gharane ko ashaish dee.
2Samuel6:12 tab daud raja ko yah bataya gaya
2Samuel6:13 jab yahova ke sandook ke uttanevale chh kadam chal chuke
2Samuel6:14 aur daud sanee ka aepod kamar men kase huae yahova ke sammukh tan man se nachata raha.
2Samuel6:15 yon daud aur israaael ka samast gharana yahova ke sandook ko jay jayakar karate aur naraasinga foonkate huae le chala.
2Samuel6:16 jab yahova ka sandook daudapur men a raha tha
2Samuel6:17 aur log yahova ka sandook bheetar le aa
2Samuel6:18 jab daud homabali aur melabali chaddha chuka
2Samuel6:19 tab us ne samast praja ko

2Samuel6:22 aur is se bhee maain adhaik tuchchh banoonga
2Samuel6:23 aur shaaul kee bettee meekal ke marane ke din tak usake koi santan n hua.

2Samuel7:2 tab raja natan nam bhavishyadvkta se kahane laga
2Samuel7:3 natan ne raja se kaha

2Samuel7:5 ki jakar mere das daud se kah
2Samuel7:6 jis din se maain israaaliaeyon ko misra se nikal laya aj ke din tak maain kabhee ghar men naheen raha

2Samuel7:9 aur jahan kaheen too aya gaya

2Samuel7:12 jab teree ayu pooree ho jaaegee
2Samuel7:13 mere nam ka ghar vahee banavaaega
2Samuel7:14 maain usaka pita ttharoonga

2Samuel7:19 parantu taubhee

2Samuel8:1 isake bad daud ne palishtaiyon ko jeetakar apane adhaeen kar liya
2Samuel8:2 fir us ne moaabiyon ko bhee jeeta
2Samuel8:3 fir jab soba ka raja rahob ka putra hadadejer mahanad ke pas apana rajy fir jyon ka tyon karane ko ja raha tha
2Samuel8:4 aur daud ne us se aek hajar sat sau savar
2Samuel8:5 aur jab daamishk ke aramee soba ke raja hadadejer kee sahayata karane ko aa
2Samuel8:6 tab daud ne damishk men aram ke sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai is prakar aramee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt le ane lage. aur jahan jahan daud jata tha vahan vahan yahova usako jayavant karata tha.
2Samuel8:7 aur hadadejer ke karmachariyon ke pas sone kee jo ddhalen theen unhen daud lekar yarooshalem ko aya.
2Samuel8:8 aur betah aur barautaai nam hadadejer ke nagaron se daud raja bahut sa peetal le aya.
2Samuel8:9 aur jab hamat ke raja toi ne suna ki daud ne hadadejer kee samast sena ko jeet liya haai
2Samuel8:10 tab toi ne yoram nam apane putra ko daud raja ke pas usaka kushal kshom poochhne
2Samuel8:11 inako daud raja ne yahova ke liye paavitra karake rakha aur vaaisa hee apane jeetee hui sab jatiyon ke sone chandee se bhee kiya
2Samuel8:12 arthata aramiyo
2Samuel8:13 aur jab daud lomavalee tarai men attarah hajar araamiyon ko marake lautt aya
2Samuel8:14 fir us ne aedom men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai poore aedom men us ne sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan. baaittai
2Samuel8:15 daud ke karmachaariyon kee namavalee daud to samast israaael par rajy karata tha
2Samuel8:16 aur pradhaan senapaati sarooyah ka putra yoab tha itihas ka likhnevala aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat tha
2Samuel8:17 pradhaan yajak aheetoob ka putra sadok aur aebyatar ka putra aheemelek the mantraee sarayah tha
2Samuel8:18 karetiyo aur paletiyon ka pradhaan yahoyada ka putra banayah tha aur daud ke putra bhee mantraee the.

2Samuel9:2 shaaul ke gharane ka seeba nam aek karmacharee tha
2Samuel9:3 raja ne poochha
2Samuel9:4 raja ne us se poochha
2Samuel9:5 tab raja daud ne doot bhejakar usako lodabar se
2Samuel9:6 jab mapeeboshot
2Samuel9:7 daud ne us se kaha
2Samuel9:8 us ne dandvata karake kaha
2Samuel9:9 tab raja ne shaaul ke karmacharee seeba ko bulavakar us se kaha
2Samuel9:10 ab se too apane betton aur sevakon samet usakee boomi par khetee karake usakee upaj le aya karana
2Samuel9:11 seeba ne raja se kaha
2Samuel9:12 mapeeboshot ke bhee meeka nam aek chhotta betta tha. aur seeba ke ghar men jitane rahate the ve sab mapeeboshot kee seva karate the.
2Samuel9:13 aur mapeeboshot yarooshalem men rahata tha kyonaki vah raja kee mej par nity bhojan kiya karata tha. aur vah donon panvon ka pangula tha.
2Samuel10:1 isake bad ammoniyon ka raja mar gaya
2Samuel10:2 tab daud ne yah socha
2Samuel10:3 parantu ammoniyon ke haakim apane svamee hanoon se kahane lage
2Samuel10:4 isaliye hanoon ne daud ke karmachariyon ko pakada
2Samuel10:5 isaka samachar pakar daud ne logon ko un se milane ke liye bheja
2Samuel10:6 jab ammaaniyon ne dekha ki ham se daud aprasann haai
2Samuel10:7 yah sunakar daud ne yoab aur shooraveeron kee samast sena ko bheja.
2Samuel10:8 tab ammonee nikale aur faattk hee ke pas pantee bandhaee aur soba aur rahob ke aramee aur tob aur maka ke poorush un se nyare maaidan men the.
2Samuel10:9 yah dekhkar ki age peechhe donon or hamare virud panti bandhaee haai
2Samuel10:10 aur aur logon ko apane bhai abeeshau ke hath saunp diya
2Samuel10:11 fir us ne kaha
2Samuel10:12 too hiyab bandha
2Samuel10:13 tab yoab aur jo log usake sath the araamiyon se yud karane ko nikatt gaae aur ve usake samhane se bhage.
2Samuel10:14 yah dekhkar ki aramee bhag gaae haain ammonee bhee abeeshau ke samhane se bhagakar nagar ke bheetar ghause. tab yoab ammoniyon ke pas se lauttkar yarooshalem ko aya.
2Samuel10:15 fir yah dekhkar ki ham israaaeliyon se har gaae aramee ikatthe huae.
2Samuel10:16 aur hadadejer ne doot bhejakar mahanad ke par ke aramiyon ko bulavaya aur ve hadadejer ke senapaati shaevak ko apana pradhaan banakar helam ko aae.
2Samuel10:17 isaka samachar pakar daud ne samast israaaeliyon ko ikattha kiya
2Samuel10:18 parantu aramee israaaeliyon se bhage
2Samuel10:19 yah dekhkar ki ham israaael se har gaae haai
2Samuel11:1 fir jis samay raja log yuddh karane ko nikala karate haai
2Samuel11:2 sanjh ke samay daud palang par se uttkar rajabhvan kee chht par tthal raha tha
2Samuel11:3 jab daud ne bhejakar us sree ko puchhvaya
2Samuel11:4 tab daud ne doot bhejakar use bulava liya aur vah daud ke pas ai
2Samuel11:5 aur vah sree garbhvatee hui
2Samuel11:6 tab daud ne yoab ke pas kahala bheja
2Samuel11:7 jab uriyyah usake pas aya
2Samuel11:8 tab daud ne uriyyah se kaha
2Samuel11:9 parantu uriyyah apate svamee ke sab sevakon ke sang rajabhvan ke dar men lett gaya
2Samuel11:10 jab daud ko yah samachar mila
2Samuel11:11 uriyyah ne daud se kaha
2Samuel11:12 daud ne uriyyah se kaha
2Samuel11:13 tab daud ne use nevata diya
2Samuel11:14 bihan ko daud ne yoab ke nam par aek chitthee likhkar uriyyah ke hath se bhejadee.
2Samuel11:15 us chitthee men yah likha tha
2Samuel11:16 aur yoab ne nagar ko achchhee reeati se dekh bhalakar jis sthan men vah janata tha ki veer haai

2Samuel11:19 aur doot ko agyaa dee
2Samuel11:20 tab yaadi raja jalakar kahane lage
2Samuel11:21 yarubbeshot ke putra abeemelek ko kisane mar dala? kya aek sree ne shaharapanah par se chakkee ka uparala patt us par aeesa n dala ki vah tebes men mar gaya? fir tum haharapanah ke aese nikatt kyon gaae? to too yon kahana

2Samuel12:1 tab yahova ne daud ke pas natan ko bheja
2Samuel12:2 dhanee ke pas to bahut see bhed-bakaariyan aur gay baail the
2Samuel12:3 parantu nirdhan ke pas bhed kee aek chhottee bachchee ko chhod aur kuchh bhee n tha
2Samuel12:4 aur dhanee ke pas aek battohee aya
2Samuel12:5 tab daud ka kop us manushy par bahut bhdka aur us ne natan se kaha
2Samuel12:6 aur usako vah bhed kee bachchee ka auguna bhr dena hoga
2Samuel12:7 tab natan ne daud se kaha
2Samuel12:8 fir maain ne tere svamee ka bhvan tujhe diya
2Samuel12:9 too ne yahova kee agyaa tuchchh janakar kyon vah kam kiya

2Samuel12:12 too ne to vah kam chhpaiakar kiya par maain yah kam sab israaaeliyon ke samhane din dupaharee karaunga.

2Samuel12:18 sataven din bachcha mar gaya

2Samuel13:1 isake bad tamar nam aek sundaree jo daud ke putra abashaalom kee baahin thee

2Samuel13:3 amnon ke yonadab nam aek mitra tha
2Samuel13:4 aur us ne amnon se kaha
2Samuel13:5 yonadab ne us se kaha
2Samuel13:6 aur amnon lettkar beemar bana aur jab raja use dekhne aya
2Samuel13:7 aur daud ne apane ghar tamar ke pas yah kahala bheja

2Samuel13:9 tab us ne thal lekar unako usake liye parosa

2Samuel14:1 aur sarooyah ka putra yoab tad gaya ki raja ka man abashaalom kee or laga haai.

2Samuel17:1 fir aheetopel ne abashaalom se kaha
2Samuel17:2 aur jab vah thakit aur nirbal hoga
2Samuel17:3 aur maain sab logon ko tere pas lautta launga jis manushy ka too khojee haai usake milane me samast praja ka milana ho jaaega
2Samuel17:4 yah bat abashaalom aur sab israaaelee puraniyon ko uchit maloom padee.

2Samuel17:7 hooshau ne abashaalom se kaha

2Samuel17:9 is samay to vah kisee gaddhhe

2Samuel18:7 vahan israaaelee log daud ke janon se har gaa

2Samuel19:1 tab yoab ko yah samachar mila
2Samuel19:2 isaliye us din ka vijay sab logon kee samajh men vilap hee ka karan ban gaya kyonaki logon ne us din suna
2Samuel19:3 aur us din log aeesa munh churakar nagar men ghause
2Samuel19:4 aur raja munh ddhanpe huae chilla chillakar pukarata raha
2Samuel19:5 tab yoab ghar men raja ke pas jakar kahane laga
2Samuel19:6 isaliye ki too apane baaiariyon se praem aur apane praeamiyon se baair rakhta haai. too ne aj yah pragatt kiya ki tujhe haakimon aur karmachaariyon kee kuchh chinta naheen varan maain ne aj jan liya
2Samuel19:7 isaliye ab uttkar bahar ja
2Samuel19:8 tab raja uttkar faattk men ja baaitta. aur jab sab logon ko yah bataya gaya
2Samuel19:9 aur israaael ke sab gotron men sab log apas men yah kahakar ddhgadte the
2Samuel19:10 aur abashaalom jisako ham ne apana raja hone ko abhaishok kiya tha
2Samuel19:11 tab raja daud ne sadok aur aebyatar yajakon ke pas kahala bheja
2Samuel19:12 tum log to mere bhai
2Samuel19:13 fir amasa se yah kaho
2Samuel19:14 is prakar us ne sab yahoodee purushaen ke man aeese apanee or kheench liya ki manon aek hee purush tha aur unhon ne raja ke pas kahala bheja
2Samuel19:15 tab raja lauttkar yaradan tak a gaya aur yahoodee log gilagal tak gaae ki us se milakar use yaradan par le aae.
2Samuel19:16 yahoodiyon ke sang gera ka putra binyameenee shaimee bhee jo bahooreemee tha fauta karake raja daud se bhentt karane ko gaya
2Samuel19:17 usake sang hajaar binyameenee purush the. aur shaaul ke gharane ka karmacharee seeba apane pandrah putraen aur bees dason samet tha
2Samuel19:18 aur aek beda raja ke parivar ko par le ane
2Samuel19:19 raja se kahane laga
2Samuel19:20 kyonaki tera das janata haai ki maain ne pap kiya dek
2Samuel19:21 tab sarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne kaha
2Samuel19:22 daud ne kaha
2Samuel19:23 fir raja ne shaimee se kaha
2Samuel19:24 tab shaaul ka pota mapeeboshot raja se bhentt karane ko aya us ne raja ke chale jane ke din se usake kushal kshom se fir ane ke din tak n apane pavon ke nakoon katte
2Samuel19:25 to jab yarooshalemee raja se milane ko gaa
2Samuel19:26 us ne kaha
2Samuel19:27 aur mere karmacharee ne mere prabhu raja ke samhane meree chugalee khai. parantu mera prabhu raja parameshvar ke doot ke saman haai aur jo kuchh tujhe bhaae vahee kara.
2Samuel19:28 mere pita ka samast gharana teree or se praan dand ke yogy tha parantu too ne apane das ko apanee mej par khanevalon men gina haai. mujhe kya hak haai ki maain raja kee or dohai doon?

2Samuel19:30 mapeeboshot ne raja se kaha

2Samuel19:32 baarjillaai to vraddh purush tha

2Samuel19:34 baarjillaai ne raja se kaha
2Samuel19:35 aj maain assee varsha ka hoo kya maain bhle-bure ka vivek kar sakata hoo? kya tera das jo kuchh khata peeta haai usaka svad paahichan sakata haai? kya mujhe gavaaiyyon va gayikaon ka shabd ab sun padta haai? tera das ab apane prabhu raja ke liye kyon bojh ka karan ho?
2Samuel19:36 tere das raja ke sang yaradan par hee tak jaaega. raja isaka aeesa bada badala mujhe kyon de?
2Samuel19:37 apane das ko lauttne de
2Samuel19:38 raja ne kaha

2Samuel20:3 tab daud yarooshalem ko apane bhvan men aya aur raja ne un das rakhealiyon ko

2Samuel20:11 aur usake pas yaab ka aek javan khda hokar kahane laga

2Samuel20:13 usake sadk par se sarakaae jane par
2Samuel20:14 aur vah sab israaaelee gotron men hokar abel aur betamaka aur beariyon ke desh tak pahuncha aur ve bhee ikatthe hokar usake peechhe ho liae.
2Samuel20:15 tab unhon ne usako betamaka ke abel men ghor liya aur nagar ke samhane aeesa damadama bandha ki vah shaharapanah se satt gaya aur yoab ke sang ke sab log shaharapanah ko girane ke liye dhakka dene lage.
2Samuel20:16 tab aek buaddhiman rootraee ne nagar men se pukara

2Samuel20:21 bat aeesee naheen haai. shoba nam aepraaim ke pahadee desh ka aek purush jo bikree ka putra haai
2Samuel20:22 tab sree apanee buaddhimanee se sab logon ke pas gai. tab unhon ne bikree ke putra shoba ka sir kattkar yoab ke pas faenk diya. tab yoab ne naraasinga foonka

2Samuel22:8 tab prathvee hil gai aur dol uttee aur akash kee neven kanpakar bahut hee hil gai

1Kings1:4 vah kanya bahut hee sundar thee aur vah raja kee dasee hokar usakee seva karatee rahee parantu raja us se sahabas n hua.
1Kings1:5 tab haggeet ka putra adoniyyah sir uncha karake kahane laga ki maain raja hoonga so us ne rath aur savar aur apane age age daudne ko pachas purush rakh liae.

1Kings1:35 aur tum usake peechhe peechhe idhar ana
1Kings1:36 tab yahoyada ke putra banayah ne kaha
1Kings1:37 jis reeti yahova mere prabhu raja ke sang raha

1Kings2:1 jab daud ke marane ka samay nikatt aya
1Kings2:2 ki maain lok kee reeati par kooch karanevala hoo isaaliye too hiyab bandhakar purushaarth dikha.
1Kings2:3 aur jo kuchh tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe saunpa haai
1Kings2:4 aur yahova apana vah vachan poora kare jo us ne mere vishay men kaha tha
1Kings2:5 fir too svayan janata haai
1Kings2:6 isaliye too apanee buaddhi se kam lena aur us pakke balavale ko adhaelok men shaanti se utarane n dena.
1Kings2:7 fir giladee barjillaai ke putraen par krapa rakhna
1Kings2:8 fir sun

1Kings2:10 tab daud apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur daudamur men use mittee dee gai.

1Kings2:12 tab sulaaiman apane pita daud kee gaee par virajaman hua aur usaka rajy bahut draddh hua.
1Kings2:13 aur haggeet ka putra adoniyyah
1Kings2:14 us ne uttar diya
1Kings2:15 us ne kaha
1Kings2:16 isaliye ab maain tujh se aek bat mangata hoo
1Kings2:17 us ne kaha

1Kings2:20 tab vah kahane lagee

1Kings2:23 aur raja sulaaiman ne yahova kee shapath khakar kaha
1Kings2:24 ab yahova jis ne pujhe sthiar kiya
1Kings2:25 aur raja sulaaiman ne yahoyada ke putra banayah ko bhej diya aur us ne jakar
1Kings2:26 aur aebyatar yajak se raja ne kaha
1Kings2:27 aur sulaaiman ne aebyatar ko yahova ke yajak hone ke pad se utar diya
1Kings2:28 isaka samachar yoab tak pahuncha yoab abashaalom ke peechhe to naheen ho liya tha
1Kings2:29 jab raja sulaaiman ko yah samachar mila
1Kings2:30 tab banayah ne yahova ke tamboo ke pas jakar usase kaha
1Kings2:31 raja ne us se kaha
1Kings2:32 aur yahova usake sir vah koon lautta dega kyonaki us ne mere pita daud ke bina jane apane se adhaik dhama aur bhle do purushaen par
1Kings2:33 yon yoab ke sir par aur usakee santan ke sir par koon sada tak rahega
1Kings2:34 tab yahoyada ke putra banayah ne jakar yoab ko mar dala aur usako jangal men usee ke ghar men mittee dee gai.
1Kings2:35 tab raja ne usake sthan par yahoyada ke putra banayah ko pradhaan senapaati ttharaya aur aebyatar ke sthan par sadok yajak ko ttharaya.
1Kings2:36 aur raja ne shaimee ko bulava bheja
1Kings2:37 too nishchay jan rakh ki jis din too nikalakar kidraen nale ke par utare
1Kings2:38 shaimee ne raja se kaha
1Kings2:39 parantu teen varsha ke vyateet hone par shaimee ke do das
1Kings2:40 tab shaimee uttkar apane gadahe par kattee kasakar
1Kings2:41 jab sulaaiman raja ko isaka samachar mila
1Kings2:42 tab us ne shaimee ko bulava bheja
1Kings2:43 fir too ne yahova kee shapath aur meree draddh agyaa kyon naheen manee?
1Kings2:44 aur raja ne shaimee se kaha
1Kings2:45 parantu raja sulaaiman dhany rahega
1Kings2:46 tab raja ne yahoyada ke putra banayah ko agyaa dee
1Kings3:1 fir raja sulaaiman misra ke raja firaun kee bettee ko byah kar usaka damad ban gaya
1Kings3:2 kyonaki praja ke log to unche sthanon par baali chaddhate the aur un dinon tak yahova ke nam ka koi bhpan naheen bana tha.
1Kings3:3 sulaaiman yahova se praem rakhta tha aur apane pita daud kee vidhaiyon par chalata to raha
1Kings3:4 aur raja gibon ko baali chaddhane gaya
1Kings3:5 gibon men yahova ne rat ko svapn ke dara sulaaiman ko darshan dekar kaha
1Kings3:6 sulaaiman ne kaha
1Kings3:7 aur ab he mere parameshvar yahova! toone apane das ko mere pita daud ke sthan par raja kiya haai
1Kings3:8 fir tera das teree chunee hui praja ke bahut se logon ke madhy men haai
1Kings3:9 too apane das ko apanee praja ka nyay karane ke liye samajhne kee aeesee shaaktai de
1Kings3:10 is bat se prabhu prasann hua
1Kings3:11 tab parameshvar ne us se kaha
1Kings3:12 maain tere vachan ke anusar karata hoo
1Kings3:13 fir jo too ne naheen manga
1Kings3:14 fir yadi too apane pita daud kee nai mere magan men chalata hua
1Kings3:15 tab sulaaiman jag utta aur dekha ki yah svapn tha fir vah yarooshalem ko gaya
1Kings3:16 us samay do veshyaen raja ke pas akar usake sammukh khdee hui.
1Kings3:17 un men se ek stree kahane lagee
1Kings3:18 fir mere jachcha ke teen din ke bad aeesa hua ki yah sree bhee jachcha ho gai ham to sang hee sang thee
1Kings3:19 aur rat men is sree ka balak isake neeche dabakar mar gaya.
1Kings3:20 tab is ne adhaee rat ko uttkar
1Kings3:21 bhor ko jab maain apana balak doodha pilane ko uttee
1Kings3:22 tab doosaree sree ne kaha
1Kings3:23 raja ne kaha
1Kings3:24 fir raja ne kaha
1Kings3:25 tab raja bola
1Kings3:26 tab jeeavit balak kee mata ka man apane bette ke sneh se bhr aya
1Kings3:27 tab raja ne kaha
1Kings3:28 jo nyay raja ne chukaya tha
1Kings4:1 raja sulaaiman to samast israaael ke upar raja niyukt hua tha.
1Kings4:2 aur usake haakim ye the
1Kings4:3 aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat
1Kings4:4 fir yahoyada ka putra banayah pradhaan senapati tha
1Kings4:5 aur natan ka putra ajaryah bhndaariyon ke upar tha
1Kings4:6 aur aheeshaar rajaparivar ke upar tha
1Kings4:7 aur sulaaiman ke barah bhndaree the
1Kings4:8 aur unake nam ye the
1Kings4:9 aur makas
1Kings4:10 arubbot men benhesed jisake adhaikar men sauko aur heper ka samast desh tha.
1Kings4:11 dor ke samast unche desh men benabeenadab jisakee sree sulaaiman kee bettee napat thee.
1Kings4:12 aur aheelood ka putra bana jisake adhaikar men tanak
1Kings4:13 aur gila ke ramot men benageber tha
1Kings4:14 aur ia ke putra aheenadab ke hath men mahanaaim tha.
1Kings4:15 naptalee men aheemas tha
1Kings4:16 aur ashor aur alot men hooshau ka putra bana
1Kings4:17 issakar men paruh ka putra yahoshaapat
1Kings4:18 aur binyameen men aela ka putra shaimee tha.
1Kings4:19 uree ka putra geber gilad men arthata emoriyon ke raja seehan aur bashaan ke raja og ke desh men tha
1Kings4:20 yahooda aur israaael ke log bahut the
1Kings4:21 sulaaiman to mahanad se lekar paalishtaiyon ke desha
1Kings4:22 aur sulaaiman kee aek din kee rasoi men itana uttta tha
1Kings4:23 satt kor atta
1Kings4:24 haarin
1Kings4:25 aur dan se beshba tak ke sab yahoodee aur israaaelee apanee apanee dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha tale sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr nidr rahate the.
1Kings4:26 fir usake rath ke ghaedon ke liye sulaaiman ke chalees hajaar than the
1Kings4:27 aur ve bhndaree apane apane maheene men raja sulaaiman ke liye aur jitane usakee meja par ate the
1Kings4:28 aur ghaedon aur veg chalanevale ghaedon ke liye jav aur pual jahan prayojan padta tha vahan agyaa ke anusar aek aek jan pahunchaya karata tha.
1Kings4:29 aur parameshvar ne sulaaiman ko buddhi dee
1Kings4:30 aur sulaaiman kee buddhi poorva desh ke sab nivaasiyon aur misiryon kee bhee buddhi se baddhkar buaddhi thee.
1Kings4:31 vah to aur sab manushyon se varan aetan
1Kings4:32 us ne teen hajaar neeativachan kahe
1Kings4:33 fir us ne labanon ke devadaruon se lekar bheet men se ugate hu joofaa tak ke sab pedon kee charcha aur pashuuon paakshiayon aur renganevale jantuon aur machhaliyon kee charcha kee.
1Kings4:34 aur desh desh ke log prathvee ke sab rajaon kee or se jinhon ne sulaaiman kee buaddhi kee keettair sunee thee
1Kings5:1 aur sor nagar ke heeram raja ne apane doot sulaaiman ke pas bheje
1Kings5:2 aur sulaaiman ne heeram ke pas yon kahala bheja
1Kings5:3 ki mera pita daud apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan isaliye n banava saka ki vah charon or ladaiyon men tab tak bajha raha
1Kings5:4 parantu ab mere parameshvar yahova ne mujhe charon or se vishraam diya haai aur n to koi virodhaee haai
1Kings5:5 maain ne apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banavane ko ttana haai arthata us ban ke anusar jo yahova ne mere pita daud se kahee thee ki tera putra jise maain tere sthan men gaee par baaittaunga
1Kings5:6 isaliye ab too mere liye labanon par se devadaru kattne kee agyaa de
1Kings5:7 sulaaiman kee ye baten sunakar
1Kings5:8 tab heeram ne sulaaipan ke pas yon kahala bheja ki jo too ne mere pas kahala bheja haai vah meree samajh men a gaya
1Kings5:9 mere das lakadee ko labanon se samudra tak pahunchaaenge
1Kings5:10 is prakar heeram sulaaiman kee ichchha ke anusar usako devadaroo aur sanovar kee lakadee dene laga.
1Kings5:11 aur sulaaiman ne heeram ke paarivar ke khane ke liye use bees hajaar kor gehoon aur bees kor pera hua tel diya is prakar sulaaiman heeram ko prati varsha diya karata tha.
1Kings5:12 aur yahova ne sulaaiman ko apane vachan ke anusar buaddhi dee
1Kings5:13 aur raja sulaaiman ne poore israaael men se teen hajaar purush begar lagaa
1Kings5:14 aur unhen labanon pahad par paree paree karake
1Kings5:15 aur sulaaiman ke sattar hajaar bojh ddhonevale aur pahad par assee hajaar vraksha kattnevale aur patthr nikalanevale the.
1Kings5:16 inako chhod sulaaiman ke teen hajaar teen sau muakhaiye the
1Kings5:17 fir raja kee agyaa se bade bade anamol patthr isaaliye khodakar nikale gaae ki bhvan kee nev
1Kings5:18 aur sulaaiman ke kareegaron aur heeram ke kareegaron aur gabaliyon ne unako gaddha
1Kings6:1 israaaeliyon ke misra desh se nikalane ke char sau asseeven varsha ke bad jo sulaaiman ke israaael par rajy karane ka chautha varsha tha
1Kings6:2 aur jo bhvan raja sulaaiman ne yahova ke liye banaya usakee lambai satt hat
1Kings6:3 aur bhvan ke mandair ke samhane ke osare kee lambai bees hath kee thee
1Kings6:4 fir us ne bhvan men sthiar jhlaimileedar khaidkiyan banai.
1Kings6:5 aur us ne bhvan ke asapas kee bheeton se satte huae arthata maandair aur darshana-sthan donon bheeton ke asapas us ne manjilen aur kottriyan banai.
1Kings6:6 sab se neechevalee manajil kee chaudai panch hat
1Kings6:7 aur banate samay bhpan aeese patthron ka banaya gaya
1Kings6:8 bahar kee beechavalee kottriyon ka dar bhvan kee dahinee alang men tha
1Kings6:9 us ne bhvan ko banakar poora kiya
1Kings6:10 aur poore bhvan se lagee hui jo manajilen us ne banai vah panch hath unchee thee
1Kings6:11 tab yahova ka yah vachan sulaaiman ke pas pahuncha
1Kings6:12 yaadi too meree vidhaiyon par chalega
1Kings6:13 aur maain israaaeliyon ke madhy men nivas karoonga
1Kings6:14 so sulaaiman ne bhvan ko banakar poora kiya.
1Kings6:15 aur us ne bhvan kee bheeton par bheetaravar devadaru kee takhtabandee kee aur bhvan ke farsha se chht tak bheeton men bheetaravar lakadee kee takhtabandee kee
1Kings6:16 aur bhvan kee pichhlee alang men bhee us ne bees hath kee dooree par farsha se le bheeton ke upar tak devadaru kee takhtabandee kee is prakar us ne paramapavitra sthan ke liye bhvan kee aek bheetaree kottree banai.
1Kings6:17 usake samhane ka bhvan arthata maandair kee lambai chalees hath kee thee.
1Kings6:18 aur bhvan kee bheeton par bheetaravar devadaru kee lakadee kee takhtabandee thee
1Kings6:19 bhvan ke bheetar us te aek darshan sthan yahova kee vacha ka sandook rakhne ke liye taaiyar kiya.
1Kings6:20 aur us darshana-sthan kee lambai chaudai aur unchai bees bees hath kee thee aur us ne us par chokha sona maddhvaya aur vedee kee takhtabandee devadaru se kee.
1Kings6:21 fir sulaaiman ne bhvan ko bheetar bheetar chokhe sone se maddhvaya
1Kings6:22 aur us ne poore bhvan ko sone se maddhvakar usaka poora kam nipatta diya. aur darshana-sthan kee pooree vedee ko bhee us ne sone se maddhvaya.
1Kings6:23 darshana-sthan men us ne das das hath unche jalapai kee lakadee ke do karoob bana rakhe.
1Kings6:24 aek karoob ka aek pankh panch hath ka tha
1Kings6:25 aur doosara karoob bhee das hath ka tha donon karoob aek hee nap aur aek hee akar ke the.
1Kings6:26 aek karoob kee unchai das hath kee
1Kings6:27 aur us ne karoobon ko bheetaravale sthan men dharava diya aur karoobon ke pankh aeese faaile the
1Kings6:28 aur karoobon ko us ne sone se maddhvaya.
1Kings6:29 aur us ne bhvan kee bheeton men bahar aur bheetar charon or karoob
1Kings6:30 aur bhvan ke bheetar aur baharavale farsha us ne sone se maddhvaae.
1Kings6:31 aur darshana-sthan ke dar par us ne jalapai kee lakadee ke kivad lagaae aur chaukhtt ke sirahane aur bajuon kee ka panchavan bhag thee.
1Kings6:32 donon kivad jalapai kee lakadee ke the
1Kings6:33 asee kee reeti us ne mandair ke dar ke liye bhee jalapai kee lakadee ke chaukhtt ke bajoo banaae aur vah bhvan kee chaudai kee chauthai thee.
1Kings6:34 donon kivad sanovar kee lakadee ke the
1Kings6:35 aur un par bhee us ne karoob aur khjoor ke vraksha aur khaile huae fool khudavaae aur khude huae kam par us ne sona maddhvaya.
1Kings6:36 aur us ne bheetaravale angan ke ghore ko gaddhe huae patthron ke teen rae
1Kings6:37 chauthe varsha ke jeev nam maheene men yahova ke bhvan kee nev dalee gai.
1Kings6:38 aur gyarahaven varsha ke bool nam attven maheene me
1Kings7:1 aur sulaaiman ne apane mahal ko banaya
1Kings7:2 aur us ne labanonee van nam mahal banaya jisakee lambai sau hat
1Kings7:3 aur khmbhon ke upar devadaru kee chhtavalee paaintalees kottriyan arthata aek aek mahal men pandrah kottariyan baneen.
1Kings7:4 teenon mahalon men kadiyan dharee gai
1Kings7:5 aur sab dar aur bajuon kee kaadiyan bhee chaukor thee
1Kings7:6 aur us ne aek khmbhevala osara bhee banaya jisakee lambai pachas hath aur chaudai tees hath kee thee
1Kings7:7 fir us ne nyay ke sinhasan ke liye bhee aek osara banaya
1Kings7:8 aur usee ke rahane ka bhvan jo us osare ke bheetar ke aek aur angan men bana
1Kings7:9 ye sab ghar bahar bheetar tev se munddher tak aeese anamol aur gaddhe huae patthron ke bane jo napakar
1Kings7:10 usakee nev to bade mol ke bade bade arthata das das aur att att hath ke patthron kee dalee gai thee.
1Kings7:11 aur upar bhee bade mol ke patthr the
1Kings7:12 aur bade angan ke charon or ke ghore men gaddhe huae patthron ke teen rae
1Kings7:13 fir raja sulaaiman ne sor se heeram ko bulava bheja.
1Kings7:14 vah naptalee ke gotra kee kisee vidhava ka betta tha
1Kings7:15 us ne peetal ddhalakar attarah attahee hath unche do khmbhe banaa
1Kings7:16 aur us ne khmbhon ke siron par lagane ko peetal ddhalakar do kanganee banai aek aek kanganee kee unchai
1Kings7:17 aur khmbhon ke siron par kee kangaaniyon ke liye charakhane kee sat sat jaliya
1Kings7:18 aur us ne khmbhon ko bhee is prakar banaya ki khmbhon ke siron par kee aek aek kanganee ke ddhanpane ko charon aer jaaliyon kee aek aek panti par anaron kee do panatiyan hon.
1Kings7:19 aur jo kangaaniyan osaron men khmbho ke siron par banee
1Kings7:20 aur aek aek khmbhe ke sire par
1Kings7:21 un khmbhon ko us ne maandair ke osare ke pas khda kiya
1Kings7:22 aur khmbhon ke siron par sosan ke fool ka kam bana tha khmbhon ka kam isee reeati hua.
1Kings7:23 fir us ne aek ddhala hua aek bada hauja banaya
1Kings7:24 aur usake charon or mohade ke neeche aek aek hath men das das indraayan bane
1Kings7:25 aur vah barah bane huae baailon par rakha gaya jin men se teen uttar
1Kings7:26 aur usaka dal chauba bhr ka tha
1Kings7:27 fir us ne peetal ke das paye banaa
1Kings7:28 un payon kee banavatt is prakar thee anake pattriyan thee
1Kings7:29 aur jodon ke beechon beech kee pattariyon par sinh
1Kings7:30 aur aek aek paye ke liye peetal ke char pahiye aur peetal kee dhauriyan banee aur aek aek ke charon konon se lage huae kandho bhee ddhalakar banaae gaae jo haudee ke neeche tak pahunchate the
1Kings7:31 au haudee ka mohada jo paye kee kanganee ke bheetar aur upar bhee tha vah aek hath uncha tha
1Kings7:32 aur charon pahiye
1Kings7:33 paahiyon kee banavat
1Kings7:34 aur aek aek paye ke charon konon par char kandho the
1Kings7:35 aur aek aek paye ke sire par adha hath unchee charon or golai thee
1Kings7:36 aur ttekon ke patton aur pattriyon par jitanee jagah jis par thee
1Kings7:37 isee prakar se us ne dason payon ko banaya sabhon ka aek hee sancha aur aek hee nap
1Kings7:38 aur us ne peetal kee das haudee banai. aek aek haudee men chalees chalees bat kee samai thee aur aek aek
1Kings7:39 aur us ne panch haudee shavan kee dakkhian kee or
1Kings7:40 aur heeram ne haudiyo
1Kings7:41 arthata do khmbhe
1Kings7:42 arthata khmbhon ke siron par jo golaiyan thee
1Kings7:43 das paye aur in par kee das haudee
1Kings7:44 aek hauja aur usake neeche ke barah baail
1Kings7:45 aur kattore bane. ye sab patra jinhen heeram ne yahova ke bhvan ke nimitt raja sulaaiman ke liye banaya
1Kings7:46 raja ne unako yaradan kee tarai men arthata sukkot aur saratan ke madhy kee chikanee mittavalee boomi men ddhala.
1Kings7:47 aur sulaaiman ne sab patraen ko bahut aadhaik hone ke karan bina taule chhod diya
1Kings7:48 yahova ke bhvan ke jitane patra the sulaaiman ne sab banaa
1Kings7:49 aur chokhe sone kee deevatten jo bheetaree kottree ke age panch to daakkhian kee or
1Kings7:50 deepak aur chimatte
1Kings7:51 nidan jo jo kam raja sulaaiman ne yahova ke bhvan ke liye kiya
1Kings8:1 tab sulaaiman ne israaaelee puraaniyon ko aur gotraen ke sab mukhy purush jo israaaeliyon ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke pradhaan the
1Kings8:2 so sab israaaelee purush aetaneem nam sataven maheene ken parva ke samay raja sulaaiman ke pas ikatthe huae.
1Kings8:3 jab sab israaaelee puraniye aa
1Kings8:4 aur yahova ka sandook
1Kings8:5 aur raja sulaaiman aur samast israaaelee mandlee
1Kings8:6 tab yajakon ne yahova kee vacha ka sandook usake sthan ko arthata bhvan ke darshana-sthan me
1Kings8:7 karoob to sandook ke sthan ke upar pankh aeese faailaae huae the
1Kings8:8 dnde to aeese lambe the
1Kings8:9 sandook men kuchh naheen tha
1Kings8:10 jab yajak pavitrasthan se nikale
1Kings8:11 aur badal ke karan yajak seva tthal karane ko khde n rah sake
1Kings8:12 tab sulaaiman kahane laga
1Kings8:13 sachamuch maain ne tere liye aek vasasthan
1Kings8:14 aur raja ne israaael kee pooree sabha kee or munh faerakar usako ashaeervad diya aur pooree sabha khdee rahee.
1Kings8:15 aur us ne kaha
1Kings8:16 ki jis din se maain apanee praja israaael ko misra se nikal laya
1Kings8:17 mere pita daud kee yah manasa to thee ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banaae.
1Kings8:18 parantu yahova ne mere pita daud se kaha
1Kings8:19 taubhee too us bhvan ko n banaaega tera jo nij putra hoga
1Kings8:20 yah jo vachan yahova ne kaha tha
1Kings8:21 aur is men maain ne aek sthan us sandook ke liye ttharaya haai
1Kings8:22 tab sulaaiman israaael kee pooree sabha ke dekhte yahova kee vedee ke samhane khda hua
1Kings8:23 he israaael ke parameshvar! tere saman n to upar svarga me
1Kings8:24 jo vachan too ne mere pita daud ko diya tha
1Kings8:25 isaliye ab he israaael ke parameshvar yahova! is vachan ko bhee poora kar
1Kings8:26 isaliye ab he israaael ke parameshvar apana jo vachan too ne apane das mere pita daud ko diya tha use sachcha siddh kara.
1Kings8:27 kya parameshvar sachamuch prathvee par vas karega
1Kings8:28 taubhee he mere parameshvar yahova! apane das kee praarthna aur gidgidahatt kee or kan lagakar
1Kings8:29 ki teree ankh is bhvan kee or arthata isee sthan kee or jisake vishay too ne kaha haai
1Kings8:30 aur too apane das
1Kings8:31 jab koi kisee doosare ka aparadha kare
1Kings8:32 tab too svarga men sun kar
1Kings8:33 fir jab neree praja israaael tere viruddh pap karane ke karan apane shatrauon se har jaa
1Kings8:34 tab too svarga men se sunakar apanee praja israaael ka pap kshama karana aur unhen is desh men lautta le ana
1Kings8:35 jab ve tere viruddh pap kare
1Kings8:36 aur apane daso
1Kings8:37 jab is desh men kal va maree va jhulas ho va gerui va ttiiddayan va keede lagen va unake shatra unake desh ke faattkon men unhen ghor rakhe
1Kings8:38 tab yaadi koi manushy va teree praja israaael apane apane man ka dukh jan le
1Kings8:39 to too apane svagay nivasasthan men se sunakar kshama karuna
1Kings8:40 tab ve jitane din is desh men rahe
1Kings8:41 fir paradeshaee bhee jo teree praja israaael ka n ho
1Kings8:42 vah to tere bade tam aur balavant hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ka samachar paae isaaliye jab aeesa koi akar is bhvan kee or praarthna kare
1Kings8:43 tab too apane svagay nivasasthan men se sun
1Kings8:44 jab teree praja ke log jahan kaheen too unhen bheje
1Kings8:45 tab too svarga men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunakar unaka nyay kara.
1Kings8:46 nishpap to koi manushy naheen haai yaadi ye bhee tere viruddh pap kare
1Kings8:47 to yaadi ve bandhauai ke desh men soch vichar kare
1Kings8:48 aur yaadi ve apane un shatrauon ke desh men jo unhen bandhaua karake le gaae ho
1Kings8:49 to too apane svagay nivasasthan men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunana aur unaka nyay karana
1Kings8:50 aur jo pap teree praja ke log tere viruddh karenge
1Kings8:51 kyonaki ve to teree praja aur tera nij bhag haain jinhen too lohe ke bhtthe ke madhy men se arthata misra se nikal laya haai.
1Kings8:52 isaliye teree ankhen tere day kee gidgidahatt aur teree praja israaael kee gidgidahatt kee or aeesee khulee rahe
1Kings8:53 kyonaki he prabhu yahova apane us vachan ke anusar
1Kings8:54 jab sulaaiman yahova se yah sab praarthna gidgidahatt ke sath kar chuka
1Kings8:55 aur khda ho
1Kings8:56 jis ne tteek apane kathn ke anusar apanee praja israaael ko vishraam diya haai
1Kings8:57 hamara parameshvar yahova jaaise hamare purakhaon ke sang rahata tha
1Kings8:58 vah hamare man apanee or aeesa firaae rakhe
1Kings8:59 aur meree ye baten jinakee maain ne yahova ke samhane binatee kee haai
1Kings8:60 aur is se prathvee kee sab jaatiyan yah jan le
1Kings8:61 to tumhara man hamare parameshvar yahova kee or aeesee pooree reeati se laga rahe
1Kings8:62 tab raja samast israaael samet yahova ke sammukh melabali chaddhane laga.
1Kings8:63 aur jo pashu sulaaiman ne melabaali men yahova ko chaddhaa
1Kings8:64 us din raja ne yahova ke bhvan ke samhanevale angan ke madhy bhee ek sthan paavitra kiya aur homabaali
1Kings8:65 aur sulaaiman ne aur usake sang samast israaael kee aek badee sabha ne jo hamat kee ghaattee se lekar misra ke nale tak ke sab deshaen se iatthee hui thee
1Kings8:66 aur ve raja ko dhany
1Kings9:1 jab sulaaiman yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ko bana chuka
1Kings9:2 tab yahova ne jaaise gibon men usako darshan diya tha
1Kings9:3 aur yahova ne us se kaha
1Kings9:4 aur yade too apane pita daud kee nai man kee khrai aur sidhaai se apane ko mere samhane janakar chalata rahe
1Kings9:5 jaaise ki maain ne tere pita daud ko vachan diya tha
1Kings9:6 parantu yadi tum log va tumhare vansh ke log mere peechhe chalana chhod den aur meree un agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ko jo maain ne tum ko dee haai
1Kings9:7 to maain israaael ko is desh men se jo maain ne unako diya haai
1Kings9:8 aur yah bhvan jo unche par rahega
1Kings9:9 tab log kahenge
1Kings9:10 sulaaiman ko to yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan donon ke banane men bees varsha lag gaae.
1Kings9:11 tab sulaaiman ne sor ke raja heeram ko jis ne usake manamane devadaroo aur sanovar kee lakadee aur sona diya tha
1Kings9:12 jab heeram ne sor se jakar un nagaron ko dekha
1Kings9:13 tab us ne kaha
1Kings9:14 aur yahee nam aj ke din tak pada haai. fir heeram ne raja ke pas satt kikkar sona bhej diya.
1Kings9:15 raja sulaaiman ne logon ko jo begaree men rakha
1Kings9:16 gejer par to misra ke raja firaun ne chaddhai karake use le liya aur ag lagakar foonk diya
1Kings9:17 so sulaaiman ne gejer aur neechevale bathoren
1Kings9:18 balat aur tamar ko jo jangal men haai
1Kings9:19 fir sulaaiman ke jitane bhndar ke nagar the
1Kings9:20 aemoree
1Kings9:21 unake vansh jo unake bad desh men rah gaa
1Kings9:22 parantu israaaeliyon men se sulaaiman ne kisee ko das n banaya ve to yoddha aur usake karmacharee
1Kings9:23 jo mukhy hakim sulaaiman ke kamon ke upar tthar ke kam karanevalon par prabhuta karate the
1Kings9:24 jab firaun kee bettee daudapur men se apane us bhvan ko a gai
1Kings9:25 aur sulaaiman us vedee par jo us ne yahova ke liye banai thee
1Kings9:26 fir raja sulaaiman ne aesyonageber men jo aedom desh me lal samudra ke teer aelot ke pas haai
1Kings9:27 aur jahajon men heeram ne apane adhaikar ke mallahon ko
1Kings9:28 unhon ne opor ko jakar vahan se char sau bees kikkar sona
1Kings10:1 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne yahova ke nam ke vishay sulaaiman kee keett sunee
1Kings10:2 vah to bahut bharee dal
1Kings10:3 sulaaiman ne usake sab prashnon ka uttar diya
1Kings10:4 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne sulaaiman kee sab buaddhimanee aur usaka banaya hua bhvan
1Kings10:5 aur usake karmacharee kis reeti baaittte
1Kings10:6 tab us ne raja se kaha
1Kings10:7 parantu jab tak maain ne ap hee akar apanee ankhon se yah n dekha
1Kings10:8 dhany haain tere jan! dhany haain tere ye sevak! jo nity tere sammukh upaasthiat rahakar teree buddhi kee baten sunate haain.
1Kings10:9 dhany haai tera parameshvar yahova! jo tujh se aeesa prasann hua ki tujhe israaael kee rajagaee par virajaman kiya yahova israaael se sada praem rakhta haai
1Kings10:10 aur us ne raja ko aek sau bees kikkar sona
1Kings10:11 fir heeram ke jahaj bhee jo opeer se sona late the
1Kings10:12 aur raja ne chandan kee lakadee se yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke liye jangale aur gavaaiyon ke liye veena aur sarangiyan banavai aeesee chandan kee lakadee aj tak fir naheen ai
1Kings10:13 aur shaeeba kee ranee ne jo kuchh chaha
1Kings10:14 jo sona prati varsha sulaaiman ke pas pahuncha karata tha
1Kings10:15 is se aadhaik saudagaron se
1Kings10:16 aur raja sulaaiman ne sona gaddhbakar do sau badee badee ddhalen banavai aek aek ddhal men chh chh sau shokel sona laga.
1Kings10:17 fir us ne sona gaddhvakar teen sau chhottee ddhalen bhee banavai aek aek chhottee ddhal me
1Kings10:18 aur raja ne hatheedant ka aek bada sinhasan banavaya
1Kings10:19 us sinhasan men chh seeaddhiyan theen aur sinhasan ka sirahana pichhadee kee or gol tha
1Kings10:20 aur chhhon seeddhiyon kee donon alang aek aek sinh khda hua bana tha
1Kings10:21 aur raja sulaaiman ke peene ke sab patra sone ke bane the

1Kings11:1 parantu raja sulaaiman firaun kee bettee
1Kings11:2 ve un jaatiyon kee thee
1Kings11:3 aur usake sat sau raaniya
1Kings11:4 so jab sulaaiman booddha hua
1Kings11:5 sulaaiman to seedoniyon kee ashatoret nam devee
1Kings11:6 aur sulaaiman ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai
1Kings11:7 un dinon sulaaiman ne yarooshalem ke samhane ke pahad par moaabiyon ke kamosh nam gharanait devata ke liye aur ammoniyon ke molek nam gharaanait devata ke liye ek ek uncha sthan banaya.
1Kings11:8 aur apanee sab paraye striayon ke liye bhee jo apane apane devataon ko dhoop jalateen aur baalidan karatee thee
1Kings11:9 tab yahova ne sulaaiman par krodha kiya
1Kings11:10 aur us ne isee bat ke vishay men agyaa dee thee
1Kings11:11 aur yahova ne sulaaiman se kaha
1Kings11:12 taubhee tere pita daud ke karan tere dino men to aeesa n karoonga parantu tere putra ke hath se rajy chheen loonga.
1Kings11:13 fir bhee maain poorn rajy to n chheen loonga
1Kings11:14 so yahova ne aedomee hadad ko jo aedomee rajavansh ka tha
1Kings11:15 kyonaki jab daud aedom men tha
1Kings11:16 yoab to samast israaael samet vahan chh maheene raha
1Kings11:17 tab hadad jo chhotta ladka tha
1Kings11:18 aur ve midhan se hokar paran ko aa
1Kings11:19 aur hadad par firaun kee bade anugrah kee draashtti hui
1Kings11:20 aur tahapanes kee bahin se ganoobat utpann hua aur isaka doodha tahapanes ne firaun ke bhvan men chhudaya tab banoobat firaun ke bhvan men usee ke putraen ke sath rahata tha.
1Kings11:21 jab hadad ne misra men rahate yah suna
1Kings11:22 firaun ne us se kaha
1Kings11:23 fir parameshvar ne usaka aek aur shatra kar diya
1Kings11:24 aur jab daud ne soba ke janon ko ghaat kiya
1Kings11:25 aur us haani ko chhod jo hadad ne kee
1Kings11:26 fir nabat ka aur sarooah nam aek vidhava ka putra yarobam nam aek aepraaimee saredabasee jo sulaaiman ka karmacharee tha
1Kings11:27 usaka raja ke viruddh sir attane ka yah karan hua
1Kings11:28 yarobam bada hooraveer tha
1Kings11:29 unheen dinon men yarobam yarooshalem se nikalakar ja raha tha
1Kings11:30 apaair aahiyyah ne apanee us nai char ko le liya
1Kings11:31 tab us ne yarobam se kaha
1Kings11:32 parantu mere das daud ke karan aur yarooshalem ke karan jo maain ne israaael ke sab gotraen men se chuna haai
1Kings11:33 isaka karan yah haai ki unhon ne mujhe tyag kar seedoniyon kee devee ashtoret aur moabiyon ke devata kamosha
1Kings11:34 taubhee maain usake hath se poorn rajy n le loonga
1Kings11:35 parantu usake putra ke hath se maain rajy arthata das gotra lekar tujhe de doonga.
1Kings11:36 aur usake putra ko maain aek gotra doonga
1Kings11:37 parantu tujhe maain tthara loonga
1Kings11:38 aur yaadi too mere das daud kee nai meree sab agyaaae
1Kings11:39 is pap ke karan maain daud ke vansh ko dukh doonga
1Kings11:40 aur sulaaiman ne yarobam ko mar dalana chaha

1Kings11:43 aur sulaaiman apane purakhaon ke sang soya
1Kings12:1 rahoobiyam to shakem ko gaya
1Kings12:2 aur jab nabat ke putra yarobam ne yah suna
1Kings12:3 so un logon ne usako bulava bheja tab yarobam aur israaael kee samast sabha rahoobiyam ke pas jakar yon kahane lagee
1Kings12:4 ki tere pita ne to ham logon par bharee jooa dal rakha tha
1Kings12:5 us ne kaha
1Kings12:6 tab raja rahoobiyam ne un booddhon se jo usake pita sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr usake samhane upaasthiat raha karate the sammati lee
1Kings12:7 unhon ne usako yah uttar diya
1Kings12:8 rahoobiyam ne us sammaati ko chhod diya
1Kings12:9 un se us ne poochha
1Kings12:10 javanon ne jo usake sang bade huae the usako yah uttar diya
1Kings12:11 mere pita ne tum par jo bharee jooa rakha tha
1Kings12:12 teesare din
1Kings12:13 tab raja ne praja se kadee baten kee
1Kings12:14 aur booddhon kee dee hui sammaati chhodkar
1Kings12:15 so raja ne praja kee ban naheen manee
1Kings12:16 jab sab israaael ne dekha ki raja hamaree naheen sunata
1Kings12:17 so israaael apane apane dere ko chale gaae. keval jitane israaaelee yahooda ke nagaron men base huae the un par rahoobiyam rajy karata raha.
1Kings12:18 tab raja rahoobiyam ne adoram ko jo sab begaron par aadhaikaree tha
1Kings12:19 aur israaael daud ke gharane se fir gaya
1Kings12:20 yah sunakar ki yarobam lautt aya haai
1Kings12:21 jab raoobiyam yarooshalem ko aya
1Kings12:22 tab parameshvan ka yah vachan parameshvar ke jan shamayah ke pas pahuncha ki yahooda ke raja sulaaiman ke pu
1Kings12:23 aur yahooda aur binyameen ke sab gharane se
1Kings12:24 ki apane bhai israaaeliyon par chaddhai karake yuddh n karo tum apane apane ghar lautt jao
1Kings12:25 tab yarobam aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke shakem nagar ko draddh karake us men rahane laga fir vahanse nikalakar panooael ko bhee draddh kiya.
1Kings12:26 tab yarobam sochane laga
1Kings12:27 yaadi praja ke log yarooshalem men bali karane ko jaae
1Kings12:28 to raja ne sammati lekar sone ke do bachhde banaae aur logon se kaha
1Kings12:29 to us ne aek bachhde ko betel
1Kings12:30 aur yah bat pap ka karan hui kyonaki log us aek ke samhane dandvat karane ko dan tak jane lage.
1Kings12:31 aur us ne unche sthanon ke bhvan banaa
1Kings12:32 fir yarobam ne attven maheene ke pandrahaven din yahooda ke parva ke saman aek parva ihara diya
1Kings12:33 aur jis maheene kee us ne apane man men kalpana kee thee arthata attven maheene ke pandrahaven din ko vah betel men apanee banai hui vedee ke pas chaddh gaya. us ne israaaeliyon ke liye aek pabrva tthara diya
1Kings13:1 tab yahova se vachan pakar parameshvar ka bak jan yahooda se betel ko aya
1Kings13:2 us jan ne yahova se vachan pakar vedee ke viruddh yon pukara
1Kings13:3 aur us ne

1Kings13:7 tab raja ne parameshvar ke jan se kaha

1Kings13:9 kyonaki yahova ke vachan ke dara mujhe yon agyaa milee haai
1Kings13:10 isaliye vah us marga se jise betel ko gaya tha n lauttkar

1Kings13:20 aur jab ve mej par baaitte hee the
1Kings13:21 aur us ne parameshvar ke us jan ko jo yahooda se aya tha
1Kings13:22 parantu jis sthan ke vishay us ne tujh se kaha tha
1Kings13:23 jab yah kha pee chuka
1Kings13:24 jab vah marga men chal raha tha
1Kings13:25 jo log udhar se chale a rahe the unhon ne yah dekh kar ki marga par aek loth padee haai
1Kings13:26 yah sunakar us nabee ne jo usako marga par se lautta le aya tha
1Kings13:27 tab us ne apane betton se kaha
1Kings13:28 tab us ne jakar us jan kee loth marga par padee hui
1Kings13:29 tab us booddhe nabee ne parameshvar ke jan kee loth uttakar gadahe par lad lee
1Kings13:30 aur us ne usakee loth ko apane kaabirstan men rakha
1Kings13:31 fir use mittee dekar us ne apane betton se kaha
1Kings13:32 kyonaki jo vachan us ne yahova se pakar betel kee vedee aur shaenmaron ke nagaron ke sab unche sthanon ke bhvanon ke viruddh pukar ke kaha haai
1Kings13:33 isake bad yarobam apanee buree chal se n fira. us ne fir sab prakar ke logo men se unche sthanon ke yajak banaa
1Kings13:34 aur yah bat yarobam ke gharane ka pap ttharee
1Kings14:1 us samay yarobam ka betta aabiyyah rogee hua.
1Kings14:2 tab yarobam ne apanee sree se kaha
1Kings14:3 usake pas too das rottee
1Kings14:4 yarobam kee sree ne vaaisa hee kiya
1Kings14:5 aur yahova ne aahiyyah se kaha
1Kings14:6 jab aahiyyah ne dar men ate huae usake panv kee ahatt sunee tab kaha
1Kings14:7 too jakar yarobam se kah ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova tujh se yon kahata haai
1Kings14:8 aur daud ke gharane se rajy chheenakar tujh ko diya
1Kings14:9 too ne un sabhon se baddhkar jo tujh se paahile the burai
1Kings14:10 is karan maain yarobam ke gharane par vipaattai daloonga
1Kings14:11 yarobam ke gharane ka jo koi nagar men mar jaa
1Kings14:12 isaliye too utt aur apane ghar ja
1Kings14:13 use to samast israaelee chhatee peettkar mittee denge yarobam ke santanon men se keval usee ko kabar milegee
1Kings14:14 fir yahova israaael ke liye aek aeesa raja khda karega jo usee din yarobam ke gharane ko nash kar dalega
1Kings14:15 yah abhee hoga. kyonaki yahova israaael ko aeesa marega
1Kings14:16 aur un papon ke karan jo yarobam ne kiae aur israaael se karaae the
1Kings14:17 tab yarobam kee sree bida hokar chalee aur tirajaa ko ai
1Kings14:18 tab yahova ke vachan ke anusar jo us ne apane das ahiyyah nabee se kahalaya tha
1Kings14:19 yarobam ke aur kam arthata us ne kaaisa kaaisa yuddh kiya
1Kings14:20 yarobam bais varsha tak rajy karake apane purakhaon ke sath so gaya aur nadab nam usaka putra usake sthan par raja hua.
1Kings14:21 aur sulaaiman ka putra rahoobiyam yahooda men rajy karane laga. rahoobiyam ikatalees varsha ka hokar rajy karane laga aur yarooshalem jisako yahova ne sare israaaelee gotraen men se apana nam rakhne ke liye chun liya tha
1Kings14:22 aur yahoodee log vah karane lage jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai
1Kings14:23 unhon ne to sab unche tteelon par
1Kings14:24 aur unake desh men purushagamee bhee the nidan ve un jaatiyon ke se sab ghainaune kam karate the jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se nikal diya tha.
1Kings14:25 raja sahoobiyam ke panchaven varsha men misra ka raja shaeeshak
1Kings14:26 yahova ke bhvan kee anamol vastuen aur rajabhvan kee anamol vastuae
1Kings14:27 isaliye raja rahoobiyam ne unake badale peetal kee ddhalen banavai aur unhen paharuon ke pradhaanon ke hath saunp diya jo rajabhvan ke dar kee rakhvalee karate the.
1Kings14:28 aur jab jab raja yahova ke bhvan men jata tha tab tab paharuae unhen utta le chalate
1Kings14:29 rahoobiyam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kiae vah kya yahooda ke rajao ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?
1Kings14:30 rahoobiyam aur yarobam men to sada ladai hotee rahee.
1Kings14:31 aur rahoobiyam jisakee mata nama nam aek ammonin thee
1Kings15:1 nabat ke putra yarobam ke rajy ke attarahaven varsha men aabiyyam yahooda par rajy karane laga.
1Kings15:2 aur vah teen varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam maka tha jo abashaalom kee putraee thee
1Kings15:3 vah vaaise hee papon kee leek par chalata raha jaaise usake pita ne us se paahile kiae the aur usaka man apane parameshvar yahova kee or apane paradada daud kee nai pooree reeati se siddh n tha
1Kings15:4 taubhee daud ke karan usake parameshvar yahova ne yarooshalem men use aek deepak diya arthata usake putra ko usake bad ttharaya aur yarooshalem ko banaae rakha.
1Kings15:5 kyonaki daud vah kiya karata tha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha aur hittee uriyyah kee bat ke sivay aur kisee bat men yahova kee kisee agyaa se jeevan bhr kabhee n muda.
1Kings15:6 rahoobiyam ke jeevan bhr to usake aur yarobam ke beech ladai hotee rahee.
1Kings15:7 aabiyyam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
1Kings15:8 nidan aabiyyam apane purakhaon ke sang soya
1Kings15:9 israaael ke raja yarobam ke beesaven varsha men asa yahooda par rajy karane laga
1Kings15:10 aur yarooshalem men ikatalees varsha tak rajy karata raha
1Kings15:11 aur asa ne apane moolapurush daud kee nai vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha.
1Kings15:12 us ne to purushagamiyon ko desh se nikal diya
1Kings15:13 varan usakee mata maka jis ne ashora ke liye aek ghainaunee moorat banai thee usako us ne rajamata ke pad se utar diya
1Kings15:14 parantu unche sthan to ddhaae n gaae taubhee asa ka man jeevan bhr yahova kee or pooree reeti se laga raha.
1Kings15:15 aur jo sona chandee aur patra usake pita ne arpan kiae the
1Kings15:16 aur asa aur israaael ke raja basha ke beech unake jeevan bhr yuddh hota raha
1Kings15:17 aur israaael ke raja basha ne yahooda par chaddhai kee
1Kings15:18 tab asa ne jitana sona chandee yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men rah gaya tha us sab ko nikal apane karmachaariyon ke hath sonpakar
1Kings15:19 dek
1Kings15:20 raja asa kee yah bat manakar benhadad ne apane dalon ke pradhaanon se israaaelee nagaron par chaddhai karavakar iyyon
1Kings15:21 yah sunakar basha ne rama ko draddh karana chhod diya
1Kings15:22 tab raja asa ne sare yahooda men prachar karavaya aur koi anasuna n raha
1Kings15:23 asa ke aur kam aur usakee veerata aur jo kuchh us ne kiya
1Kings15:24 parantu usake buddhape men to use panvon ka rog lag gaya. nidan asa apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya
1Kings15:25 yahooda ke raja asa ke doosare varsha men yarobam ka putra nadab israaael par rajy karane laga aur do varsha tak rajy karata raha.
1Kings15:26 us ne vah kam kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha aur apane pita ke marga par vahee pap karata hua chalata raha jo us ne israael se karavaya tha.
1Kings15:27 nadab sab israaael samet palishtaiyon ke desh ke gibbaton nagar ko ghore tha. aur ussakar ke gotra ke aahiyyah ke putra basha ne usake viruddh rajadraeh kee goshttee karake gibbaton ke pas usako mar dala.
1Kings15:28 aur yahooda ke raja asa ke teesare varsha men basha ne nadab ko mar dala
1Kings15:29 raja hote hee basha ne yarobam ke samast gharane ko mar dala us ne yarobam ke vansh ko yahan tak nashtt kiya ki aek bhee jeevit n raha. yah sab yahova ke us vachan ke anusar hua jo us ne apane das shaeelovasee ahiyyah se kahavaya tha.
1Kings15:30 yah is karan hua ki yarobam ne svayan pap kia
1Kings15:31 nadab ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
1Kings15:32 asa aur israaael ke raja basha ke madhy men to unake jeevan bhr yuddh hota raha.

1Kings21:8 tab us ne ahab ke nam se chitthee likhkar usakee angoottee kee chhap lagakar
1Kings21:9 us chitthee men us ne yon likha

1Kings21:12 aur nabot ko logon ke samhane unche sthan par baaittaya.

1Kings21:14 tab unhon ne ijaebel ke pas yah kahala bheja ki nabot patthravah karake mar dala gaya haai.

1Kings22:1 aur teen varsha tak aramee aur israaaelee bina yuddh rahe.
1Kings22:2 teesare varsha men yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat israaael ke raja ke pas gaya.
1Kings22:3 tab israaael ke raja ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha
1Kings22:4 aur us ne yahoshaapat se poochha
1Kings22:5 fir yahoshaapat ne israaael ke raja se kaha
1Kings22:6 ki aj yahova kee ichchha maloom kar le
1Kings22:7 parantu yahoshaapat ne poochha
1Kings22:8 israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha
1Kings22:9 yahoshaapat ne kaha
1Kings22:10 israaael ka raja aur yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat
1Kings22:11 tab kanana ke putra sidaakiyyah ne lohe ke seeng banakar kaha
1Kings22:12 aur sab naabiyon ne isee ashay kee bhavishyadanee karake kaha
1Kings22:13 aur jo doot meekayah ko bulane gaya tha us ne us se kaha

1Kings22:15 jab vah raja ke pas aya

1Kings22:18 tab israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha
1Kings22:19 meekayah ne kaha is karan too yahova ka yah vachan sun! mujhe sinhasan par virajaman yahova aur usake pas daahine banyen khdee iui svarga kee samast sena dikhai dee haai.
1Kings22:20 tab yahova ne poochha

1Kings22:22 us ne kaha

1Kings22:26 tab israaael ke raja ne kaha
1Kings22:27 aur un se kah

1Kings22:30 aur israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha

1Kings22:32 to jab rathon ke pradhaanon ne yahoshaapat ko dekha
1Kings22:33 yah dekhakar ki vah israaael ka raja naheen haai

1Kings22:35 aur us din yuddh baddhta gaya aur raja apane rath men auron ke sahare araamiyon ke sammukh khda raha
1Kings22:36 soorya oobate huae sena men yah pukar hui
1Kings22:37 jab raja mar gaya
1Kings22:38 aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar jab usaka rath shaemaron ke pokhre men dhaeya gaya
1Kings22:39 ahab ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
1Kings22:40 nidan ahab apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra ahajyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga.
1Kings22:41 israaael ke raja ahab ke chauthe varsha men asa ka putra yahoshaapat yahooda par rajy karane laga.
1Kings22:42 jab yahoshaapat rajy karane laga
1Kings22:43 aur usakee chal sab prakar se usake pita asa kee see thee
1Kings22:44 yahoshaapat ne israaael ke raja se mel kiya.
1Kings22:45 aur yahoshaapat ke kam aur jo veerata us ne dikhai
1Kings22:46 purushagamiyon men se jo usake pita asa ke dinon men rah gaae the
1Kings22:47 us samay edam men koi raja n tha ek nayab rajakaj ka kam karata tha.
1Kings22:48 fir yahoshaapat ne tashash ke jahaj sona lane ke liye opeer jane ko banava lia
1Kings22:49 tab ahab ke putra ahajyah ne yahoshaapat se kaha
1Kings22:50 nidan yahoshaapat apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usako usake purakhaon ke sath usake moolapurush daud ke nabar men mittee dee gai. aur usaka putra yahoram usake sthan par rajy karane laga.
1Kings22:51 yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke satrahaven varsha men ahab ka putra ahajyah shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga aur do varsha tak israaael par rajy karata raha.
1Kings22:52 aur us ne vah kiya
1Kings22:53 jaaise usaka pita bal kee upasane aur use dandvat karane se israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko krodhait karata raha vaaise hee ahajyah bhee karata raha.
2Kings1:1 ahab ke marane ke bad moab israaael ke viruddh ho gaya.
2Kings1:2 aur ahajyah aek jhlaimileedar khaidkee men se
2Kings1:3 tab yahova ke doot ne tishabee aeliyyah se kaha
2Kings1:4 isaliye ab yahova tujh se yon kahata haai
2Kings1:5 jab ahajyah ke doot usake pas lautt aa
2Kings1:6 unhon ne us se kaha
2Kings1:7 us ne un se poochha
2Kings1:8 unhon ne usako uttar diya
2Kings1:9 tab us ne usake pas pachas sipaahiyon ke aek pradhaan ko usake pachason sipaahiyon samet bheja. pradhaan ne usake pas jakar kya dekha ki vah pahad kee chottee par baaitta haai. aur us ne us se kaha
2Kings1:10 aeliyyah ne us pachas sipaahiyon ke pradhaan se kaha
2Kings1:11 fir raja ne usake pas pachas sipaahiyon ke aek aur pradhaan ko
2Kings1:12 aeliyyah ne uttar dekar un se kaha
2Kings1:13 fir raja ne teesaree bar pachas sipaahiyon ke aek aur pradhaan ko
2Kings1:14 pachas pachas sipaahiyon ke jo do pradhaan apane apane pachason samet pahile aae the
2Kings1:15 tab yahova ke doot ne uliyyah se kaha
2Kings1:16 aur us se kaha
2Kings1:17 yahova ke is vachan ke anusar jo aeliyyah ne kaha tha
2Kings1:18 ahajyah ke aur kam jo us ne kiae vah kya israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?
2Kings2:1 jab yahova aeliyyah ko bavandr ke dara svarga men utta lene ko tha
2Kings2:2 aeliyyah ne aeleesha se kaha
2Kings2:3 aur betelavasee bhavishyadvktaon ke chele aeleesha ke pas akar kahane lage
2Kings2:4 aur aeliyyah ne us se kaha
2Kings2:5 aur yareehovasee bhavishyadvktaon ke chele aeleesha ke pas akar kahane lage
2Kings2:6 fir aeliyyah ne us se kaha
2Kings2:7 aur bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se pachas jan jakar unake samhane door khde hua
2Kings2:8 tab aeliyyah ne apanee char pakadkar aeentt lee
2Kings2:9 unake par pahunchane par ealiyyah ne eleesha se kaha
2Kings2:10 aeliyyah ne kaha
2Kings2:11 ve chalate chalate baten kar rahe the
2Kings2:12 aur use aeleesha dekhta aur mukarata raha
2Kings2:13 fir us ne aeliyyah kee char uttai jo us par se giree thee
2Kings2:14 aur us ne aeliyyah kee vah char jo us par se giree thee
2Kings2:15 use dekhkar bhvishyadvktaon ke chele jo yareeho men usake samhane the
2Kings2:16 tab unhon ne us se kaha
2Kings2:17 jab unhon ne usako yahan tak dabaya ki vah lajjait ho gaya
2Kings2:18 us samay tak vah yareeho men tthara raha
2Kings2:19 us nagar ke nivaasiyon ne eleesha se kaha
2Kings2:20 us ne kaha
2Kings2:21 tab vah jal ke sote ke pas nikal gaya
2Kings2:22 aeleesha ke is vachan ke anusar panee tteek ho gaya
2Kings2:23 vahan se vah betel ko chala
2Kings2:24 tab us ne peechhe kee or fir kar un par drashtti kee aur yahova ke nam se unako shaap diya
2Kings2:25 vahan se vah kamrmel ko gaya
2Kings3:1 yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke attarahaven varsha men ahab ka putra yahoram shaimaron men rajy karane laga
2Kings3:2 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai naubhee us ne apane mata-pita ke barabar naheen kiya varan apane pita kee banavai hui bal kee latt ko door kiya.
2Kings3:3 taubhee vah nabat ke putra yarobam ke aeese papon men jaaise us ne israaael se bhee karaae lipatta raha aur un se n fira.
2Kings3:4 moab ka raja mesha bahut see bhed-bakaariyan rakhta tha
2Kings3:5 jab ahab mar gaya
2Kings3:6 us samay raja yahoram ne shaemaron se nikalakar sare israael kee ginatee lee.
2Kings3:7 aur us ne jakar yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke pas yon kahala bheja
2Kings3:8 fir us ne poochha
2Kings3:9 tab israaael ka raja
2Kings3:10 aur israaael ke raja ne kaha
2Kings3:11 parantu sahoshaapat ne kaha
2Kings3:12 tab yahoshaapat ne kaha
2Kings3:13 tab aeleesha ne israaael ke raja se kaha
2Kings3:14 aeleesha ne kaha
2Kings3:15 ab koi bajavaaiyya mere pas le ao. jab bajavaaiyya bajane laga
2Kings3:16 aur us ne kaha
2Kings3:17 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai
2Kings3:18 aur isako halakee see bat janakar yahova moab ko bhee tumhare hath men kar dega.
2Kings3:19 tab tum sab gaddhvale aur uttam nagaron ko nash karana
2Kings3:20 vihan ko annabaali chaddhane ke samay aedom kee or se jal bah aya
2Kings3:21 yah sunakar ki rajaon ne ham se yuddh karate ke liye chaddhai kee haai
2Kings3:22 bihan ko jab ve utte us samay soorya kee kiranon us jal par aeesee padeen ki vah moaabiyon kee paralee or se lohoo sa lal dikhai pada.
2Kings3:23 to ve kahane lage vah to lohoo hoga
2Kings3:24 aur jab ve israaael kee chhavanee ke pas aae hee the
2Kings3:25 aur unhon ne nagaron ko ddha diya
2Kings3:26 yah dekhkar ki ham yuddh men har chale
2Kings3:27 tab us ne apane jette putra ko jo usake sthan men rajy karanevala tha pakadkar shaharapanah par homabaali chaddhaya. is karan israaael par bada hee krodha hua

2Kings4:5 tab vah usake pas se chalee gai

2Kings4:7 tab us ne jakar parameshvar ke bhkt ko yah bata diya. or us ne kaha

2Kings4:11 aek din kee bat haai

2Kings4:23 us ne kaha
2Kings4:24 tab us sree ne gadahee par kattee bandha kar apane sevak se kaha

2Kings4:35 aur vah use chhodkar ghar men idhar udhar tthalane laga

2Kings5:1 aram ke raja ka naman nam senapati apane svamee kee drashtti men bada aur pratishttit pumsh tha
2Kings5:2 aramee loeg dal bandhakar israaael ke desh men jakar vahan se aek chhottee ladkee bandhauvai men le aae the aur vah naman kee patnee kee seva karatee thee.
2Kings5:3 us ne apanee svamin se kaha
2Kings5:4 to kisee ne usake prabhu ke pas jakar kah diya
2Kings5:5 aram ke raja ne kaha
2Kings5:6 aur vah israaael ke raja ke pas vah patra le gaya jis men yah likha tha
2Kings5:7 is patra ke paddhne par israaael ka raja apane vasr faadkar bola
2Kings5:8 yah sunakar ki israaael ke raja ne apane vasr faade haai
2Kings5:9 tab naman dhaedon aur rathon samet aeleesha ke dar par akar khda hua.
2Kings5:10 tab aeleesha ne aek doot se usake pas yah kahala bheja
2Kings5:11 parantu naman krodhait ho yah kahata hua chala gaya
2Kings5:12 kya damishk kee abana aur parpar nadiyan israaael ke sab jalashayon se attam naheen haain? kya maain un men snan karake shuuddh naheen ho sakata hoo? isaaliye vah jalajalahatt se bhra hua lauttkar chala gaya.
2Kings5:13 tab usake sevak pas akar kahane lage
2Kings5:14 tab us ne parameshvar ke bhkt ke vachan ke anusar yaradan ko jakar us men sat bar dubakee maree
2Kings5:15 tab vah apane sab dal bal samet parameshvar ke bhkt ke yahan lautt aya
2Kings5:16 aeleesha ne kaha
2Kings5:17 tab naman ne kaha
2Kings5:18 aek bat to yahova tere das ke liye kshama kare
2Kings5:19 us ne us se kaha
2Kings5:20 vah usake yahan se thodee door jala gaya tha
2Kings5:21 tab gehajee naman ke peechhe dauda
2Kings5:22 us ne kaha
2Kings5:23 naman ne kaha
2Kings5:24 jab vah tteele ke pas pahuncha
2Kings5:25 aur vah bheetar jakar
2Kings5:26 us ne us se kaha
2Kings5:27 is karan se naman ka koddh tujhe aur tere vansh ko sada laga rahega. tab vah him sa shvet koddhee hokar usake samhane se chala gaya.
2Kings6:1 aur bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se kisee ne aeleesha se kaha
2Kings6:2 isaliye ham yaradan tak jaae
2Kings6:3 tab kisee ne kaha
2Kings6:4 to vah unake sang chala aur ve yaradan ke teer pahunchakar lakadee kattne lage.

2Kings6:10 tab israaael ke raja ne us sthan ko
2Kings6:11 is karan aram ke raja ka man bahut ghabara gaya so us ne apane karmachariyon ko bulakar un se poochha
2Kings6:12 aeleesha jo israaael men bhvishyadvkta haai
2Kings6:13 raja ne kaha
2Kings6:14 tab us ne vahan ghaedon aur rathon samet aek bharee dal bheja
2Kings6:15 bhor ko parameshvar ke bhkt ka tthalua utta aur nikalakar kya dekhta haai ki ghaedon aur rathon samet aek dal nagar ko ghore huae pada haai. aur usake sevak ne us se kaha
2Kings6:16 us ne kaha
2Kings6:17 tab aeleesha ne yah praarthna kee
2Kings6:18 jab aramee usake pas aa
2Kings6:19 tab aeleesha ne un se kaha
2Kings6:20 jab ve shaemaron men a gaa
2Kings6:21 unako dekhkar israael ke raja ne eleesha se kaha
2Kings6:22 us ne uttar diya
2Kings6:23 tab us ne unake liye badee jevanar kee
2Kings6:24 parantu isake bad aram ke raja bennhadad ne apanee samast sena ikatthee karake
2Kings6:25 tab shaemaron men bada akal pada aur vah aeesa ghaira raha
2Kings6:26 aur israaael ka raja shaharapanah par tthal raha tha
2Kings6:27 us ne kaha
2Kings6:28 fir raja ne us se poochha
