2Kings6:30 us sree kee ye baten sunate hee
2Kings6:31 tab vah bol utta
2Kings6:32 aeleesha apane ghar men baaitta hua tha
2Kings6:33 vah un se yon baten kar hee raha tha ki doot usake pas a pahuncha. aur raja kahane laga
2Kings7:1 tab aeleesha ne kaha
2Kings7:2 tab us saradar ne jisake hath par raja taakiya karata t
2Kings7:3 aur char koddhee faattk ke bahar the ve apas men kahane lage
2Kings7:4 yaadi ham kahe
2Kings7:5 tab ve sanjh ko aram kee chhavanee men jane ko chale
2Kings7:6 kyonaki prabhu ne aram kee sena ko rathon aur ghaedon kee aur bharee sena kee see ahatt sunai thee
2Kings7:7 isaliye ve sanjh ko uttkar aeese bhag gaa
2Kings7:8 to jab ve koddhee chhavanee kee chhor ke deron ke pas pahunche
2Kings7:9 tab ve apas men kahane lage
2Kings7:10 tab ve chale aur nagar ke chaukeedaron ko bulakar bataya
2Kings7:11 tab chaukeedaron ne pukar ke rajabhvan ke bheetar samachar diya.
2Kings7:12 aur raja rat hee ko utta
2Kings7:13 parantu raja ke kisee karmacharee ne uttar dekar kaha
2Kings7:14 so unhon ne do rath aur unake ghaede liye
2Kings7:15 tab ve yaradan tak unake peechhe chale gaa
2Kings7:16 tab logon ne nikalakar aram ke deron ko loott liya aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar aek saa maaida aek shokel me
2Kings7:17 aur raja ne us saradar ko jisake hath par vah takiya karata tha faattk ka adhaikaree ttharaya tab vah faattk men logon ke pavon ke neeche dabakar mar gaya. yah parameshvar ke bhkt ke us vachan ke anusar hua jo us ne raja se usake yahan ane ke yamay kaha tha.
2Kings7:18 parameshvar ke bhkt ne jaaisa raja se yah kaha tha
2Kings7:19 aur us saradar ne parameshvar ke bhkt ko
2Kings7:20 so usake sath tteek vaaisa hee hua
2Kings8:1 jis sree ke bette ko aeleesha ne jilaya tha
2Kings8:2 parameshvar ke bhkt ke is vachan ke anusar vah sree apane gharane samet palishtaiyon ke desh men jakar sat varsha rahee.
2Kings8:3 sat varsha ke beetane par vah palishtaiyon ke desh se lautt ai
2Kings8:4 raja parameshvar ke bhkt ke sevak gehajee se baten kar raha tha
2Kings8:5 jab vah raja se yah varnn kar hee raha tha ki aeleesha ne aek murde ko jilaya
2Kings8:6 jab raja ne stree se moochha
2Kings8:7 aur aeleesha daamishak ko gaya. aur jab aram ke raja benhadad ko jo rogee tha yah samachar mila
2Kings8:8 tab us ne hajaael se kaha
2Kings8:9 tab hajaael bhentt ke liye daamishk kee sab uttam uttam vastuon se chalees untt ladavakar
2Kings8:10 aeleesha ne us se kaha
2Kings8:11 aur vah usakee or ttkattkee bandha kar dekhta raha
2Kings8:12 tab hajaael ne poochha
2Kings8:13 hajaael ne kaha
2Kings8:14 tab vah aeleesha se bida hokar apane svamee ke pas gaya
2Kings8:15 doosare din us ne rajai ko lekar jal se bhaigo diya
2Kings8:16 israaael ke raja ahab ke putra yoram ke panchaven varsha me
2Kings8:17 jab vah raja hua
2Kings8:18 vah israaael ke rajaon kee see chal chala
2Kings8:19 taubhee yahova ne yahooda ko nash karana n chaha
2Kings8:20 usake dinon men edom ne yahooda kee adhaeenata chhodkar apana ek raja bana liya.
2Kings8:21 tab yoram apane sab rath sath liye huae sair ko gaya
2Kings8:22 yon aedom yahooda ke vash se choott gaya
2Kings8:23 yoram ke aur sab kam aur jo kuchh us ne kiya
2Kings8:24 nidan yoram apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur unake beech daudapur men use mittee dee gai aur usaka putra ahajjah usake sthan par rajy karane laga.
2Kings8:25 ahab ke putra israaael ke raja yoram ke barahaven varsha men yahooda ke raja yahoram ka putra ahajyah rajy karane laga.
2Kings8:26 jab ahajyah raja bana
2Kings8:27 vah ahab ke gharane kee see chal chala
2Kings8:28 aur vah ahab ke putra yoram ke sang gilad ke ramot men aram ke raja hajaael se ladne ko gaya
2Kings8:29 so raja yoram isaliye lautt gaya
2Kings9:1 tab aeleesha bhavishyadvkta ne bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se aek ko bulakar us se kaha
2Kings9:2 aur vahan pahoonchakar yehoo ko jo yahoshaapat ka putra aur nimashaee ka pota haai
2Kings9:3 tab tel kee yah kuppee lekar tel ko usake sir par yah kah kar dalana
2Kings9:4 tab vah javan bhvishyadvkta gilad ke ramot ko gaya.
2Kings9:5 vahan pahunchakar us ne kya dekha
2Kings9:6 tab vah uttkar ghar men gaya aur us ne yah kahakar usake sir par tel dala ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
2Kings9:7 to too apane svamee ahab ke gharane ko mar dalana
2Kings9:8 kyonaki ahab ka samast gharana nash ho jaaega
2Kings9:9 aur maain ahab ka gharana nabat ke putra yarobam ka sa
2Kings9:10 aur ijaebel ko yijraail kee boomi men kutte khaaenge
2Kings9:11 tab yehoo apane svamee ke karmachariyon ke pas nikal aya
2Kings9:12 unhon ne kaha joott haai
2Kings9:13 tab unhon ne jhtt apana apana vasr utar kar usake teeche seeddhee hee par bichhaya
2Kings9:14 yon yehoo jo nimashaee ka pota aur yahoshaapat ka putra tha
2Kings9:15 parantu raja yoram ap apane ghaav ka jo aram ke raja hajaael se yuddh karane ke samay usako aramiyon se lage the
2Kings9:16 tab yehoo rath par chaddhkar
2Kings9:17 yijraail ke gummatt par
2Kings9:18 tab bak savar us se milane ko gaya
2Kings9:19 tab usane doosara savar bheja
2Kings9:20 tab paharuae ne kaha
2Kings9:21 yoram ne kaha
2Kings9:22 yehoo ko dekhte hee yoram ne poochha
2Kings9:23 tab yaram ras faer ke
2Kings9:24 tab yehoo ne dhanush ko kan tak kheenchakar yoram ke pakhaudon ke beech aeesa teer mara
2Kings9:25 tab yehoo ne bidakar nam apane aek saradar se kaha
2Kings9:26 ki nabot aur usake putraen ka jo koon hua
2Kings9:27 yah dekhkar yahooda ka raja ahajyah baree ke bhvan ke marga se bhag chala. aur yehoo ne usaka peechha karake kaha
2Kings9:28 tab usake karmachaariyon ne use rath par yarooshalem ko pahunchakar daudapur men usake purakhaon ke beech mittee dee.
2Kings9:29 ahajyah to ahab ke putra yoram ke gyarahaven varsha men yahooda par rajy karane laga tha.
2Kings9:30 jab yehoo yijraail ko aya
2Kings9:31 jab yehoo faattk men hokar a raha tha tab us ne kaha
2Kings9:32 tab us ne khaidkee kee or munh uttakar poochha
2Kings9:33 tab us ne kaha
2Kings9:34 tab vah bheetar jakar khane peene laga aur kaha
2Kings9:35 jab ve use mittee dene gaa
2Kings9:36 so unhon ne lauttkar us se kah diya tab us ne kaha
2Kings9:37 aur ijaebel kee loth yijraail kee boomi par khad kee nai padee rahegee
2Kings10:1 ahab ke to sattar bette
2Kings10:2 ki tumhare svamee ke bette
2Kings10:3 apane svamee ke betton men se jo sab se achchha aur yogy ho
2Kings10:4 parantu ve nipatt dr gaa
2Kings10:5 tab jo raj gharane ke kam par tha
2Kings10:6 tab us ne doosara patra likhkar unake pas bheja
2Kings10:7 yah patra unake hath lagate hee
2Kings10:8 aur aek doot ne usake pas jakar bata diya
2Kings10:9 bihan ko us ne bahar ja khde hokar sab logon se kaha
2Kings10:10 ab jan lo ki jo vachan yahova ne apane das aeliyyah ke dara kaha tha
2Kings10:11 tab ahab ke gharane ke jitane log yijraail men rah gaa
2Kings10:12 tab vah vahan se chalakar shaemaron ko gaya. aur marga men charavahon ke un katarane ke sthan par pahuncha hee tha
2Kings10:13 ki yahooda ke raja ahayyah ke bhi yehoo se mile aur jab us ne poochha
2Kings10:14 tab us ne kaha
2Kings10:15 jab vah vahan se chala
2Kings10:16 ki mere sang chala. aur dek
2Kings10:17 shaemaron ko pahunchakar us ne yahova ke us vachan ke anusar jo us ne aeliyyah se kaha tha
2Kings10:18 tab yehoo ne sab logon ko ikattha karake kaha
2Kings10:19 isaliye ab bal ke sab naabiyo
2Kings10:20 tab yehoo ne kaha
2Kings10:21 aur yehoo ne sare israaael men doot bheje tab val ke sab upasak aa
2Kings10:22 tab us ne us manushy se jo vasr ke ghar ka adhaikaree tha
2Kings10:23 tab yehoo rekab ke putra yahonadab ko sang lekar bal ke bhpan men gaya
2Kings10:24 tab ve melabaali aur homabali chaddhane ko bheetar gaae. yehoo ne to assee purush bahar tthara kar un se kaha tha
2Kings10:25 fir jab homabali chaddh chuka
2Kings10:26 aur unhon ne bal ke bhvan men kee latten nikalakar foonk deen.
2Kings10:27 aur bal kee latt ko unhon ne tod dala aur bal ke bhvan ko ddhakar payakhana bana diya aur vah aj tak aeesa hee haai.
2Kings10:28 yon yehoo ne bal ko israaael men se nash karake door kiya.
2Kings10:29 aitaubhee nabat ke putra yarobam
2Kings10:30 aur yahova ne yehoo se kaha
2Kings10:31 parantu yehoo ne israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee yyavastha par poorn man se chalane kee chaukasee n kee
2Kings10:32 un dinon yahova israael ko ghattane laga
2Kings10:33 yaradan se poorab kee or gilad ka sara desha
2Kings10:34 yehoo ke aur sab kam aur jo kuchh us ne kiya
2Kings10:35 nidan yehoo apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya
2Kings10:36 yehoo ke shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane ka samay to atthais varsha ka tha.
2Kings11:1 jab ahajyah kee mata atalyah ne dekha
2Kings11:2 parantu yahoshoba jo raja yoram kee bettee
2Kings11:3 aur vah usake pas yahova ke bhvan men chhvarsha chhpai raha
2Kings11:4 sataven varsha men yahoyada ne jalladon aur paharuon ke shatapaatiyon ko bula bheja
2Kings11:5 aur us ne unhen agyaa dee
2Kings11:6 aur aek tihai log soor nam faattk men tthare rahe
2Kings11:7 aur tumhare do dal arthata jitane vishraam din ko bahar janevale hon vah raja ke asapas hokar yahova ke bhvan kee chaukasee karen.
2Kings11:8 aur tum apane apane hath men haathaiyar liye huae raja ke charon or rahana
2Kings11:9 yahayada yajak kee in sab agyaaon ke anusar shatapaatiyon ne kiya. ve vishraamadin ko anevale aur janevale donon dalon ke apane apane janon ko sang lekar yahoyada yajak ke pas gaae.
2Kings11:10 tab yajak ne shatapatiyon ko raja daud ke barchhe
2Kings11:11 isaliye ve paharuae apane apane hath men haathaiyar liae huae bhvan ke dakkhianee kone se lekar uttaree kone tak vedee aur bhvan ke pas raja ke charon or usakee ad karake khde huae.
2Kings11:12 tab us ne rajakumar ko bahar lakar usake sir par mukut
2Kings11:13 jab atalyah ko paharuon aur logon ka halachal sun pada
2Kings11:14 aur us ne kya dekha ki raja reeati ke anusar khmbhe ke pas khda haai
2Kings11:15 tab yahoyada yajak ne dal ke aadhaikaree shatapatiyon ko agyaa dee ki use apanee pantiyon ke beech se nikal le jao aur jo koi usake peechhe chale use talavar se mar dalo. kyonaki yajak ne kaha
2Kings11:16 isaliye unhon ne donon or se usako jagah dee
2Kings11:17 tab yahoyada ne yahova ke
2Kings11:18 tab sab logon ne bal ke bhvan ko jakar ddha diya
2Kings11:19 tab vah shatapaatiyo
2Kings11:20 tab sab log anandait hua
2Kings11:21 jab yoash raja hua
2Kings12:1 yehoo ke sataven varsha men yoash rajy karane laga
2Kings12:2 aur jab tak yahoyada yajak yoash ko shaiksha deta raha
2Kings12:3 taubhee unche sthan giraae n gaae praja ke log tab bhee unche sthan par bali chaddhate aur dhoop jalate rahe.
2Kings12:4 aur yoash ne yajakon se kaha
2Kings12:5 in sab ko yajak log apanee jan pahachan ke logon se liya karen aur bhvan men jo kuchh tootta footta ho usako sudhaar den.
2Kings12:6 taubhee yajakon ne bhvan men jo tootta footta tha
2Kings12:7 isaliye raja yoash ne yahoyada yajak
2Kings12:8 tab yajakon ne manaliya ki n to ham praja se aur rupaya len aur n bhvan ko sudhaaren.
2Kings12:9 tab yahoyada yajak ne aek sandook le
2Kings12:10 jab unhon ne dekha
2Kings12:11 tab unhon ne us taule huae rupaye ko un kam karanevalon ke hath men diya
2Kings12:12 aur lakadee aur gaddhe huae patthr mol lene me
2Kings12:13 marantu jo rupaya yahova ke bhvan men ata tha
2Kings12:14 parantu vah kam karanevale ko diya gaya
2Kings12:15 aur jinake hath men kam karanevalon ko dene ke liye rupaya diya jata tha
2Kings12:16 jo rupaya doshabaaliyon aur papabaaliyon ke liye diya jata tha
2Kings12:17 tab aram ke raja hajaael ne gat nagar par chaddhai kee
2Kings12:18 tab yahooda ke raja yoash ne un sab paavitra vastuon ko jinhen usake purakha yahoshaapat yahoram aur ahajyah nam yahooda ke rajaon ne pavitra kiya tha
2Kings12:19 yoash ke aur sab kam jo us ne kiya
2Kings12:20 yoash ke karmachaariyon ne rajadraeh kee goshttee karake

2Kings13:1 ahajyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yoash ke teisaven varsha men yanhoo ka mutra yahoahaj shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga
2Kings13:2 aur us ne vah kiya
2Kings13:3 isaliye yahova ka krodha israaaeliyon ke viruddh bhdk utta
2Kings13:4 tab yahoahaj yahova ke samhane gidgidaya aur yahova ne usakee sun lee kyonaki us ne israaael par andhor dekha ki aram ka raja un par kaaisa andhor karata tha.
2Kings13:5 isaliye yahova ne israaael ko aek chhudanevala diya aur ve aram ke vash se choott gaae aur israaaelee agale dinon kee nai fir apane apane dere men rahane lage.
2Kings13:6 taubhee ve aeese papon se n fire

2Kings14:1 israaael ke raja yahoahaj ke putra soash ke doosare varsha men yahooda ke raja yoash ka mutra asasyah raja hua.

2Kings14:3 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha taubhee apane mool purush daud kee nai n kiya us ne tteek apane pita yoash ke se kam kie.
2Kings14:4 usake dinon men unche sthan giraae n gae log tab bhee un par bali chaddhate
2Kings14:5 jab rajy usake hath men sthiar ho gaya
2Kings14:6 parantu un kooniyon ke ladkevalon ko us ne n mar dala

2Kings14:15 yoash ke aur kam jo us ne kia

2Kings14:18 amasyah ke aur kam kya yahooda ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?
2Kings14:19 jab yarooshalem men usake viruddh rajadraeh kee goshttee kee gai

2Kings15:1 israaael ke raja yarobam ke sataisaven varsha men yahooda ke raja amasyah ka putra ajaryah raja hua.

2Kings18:1 aela ke putra israaael ke raja hosho ke teesare varsha men yahooda ke raja ahaj ka putra hijaakiyyah raja hua.
2Kings18:2 jab vah rajy karane laga tab pachchees varsha ka tha
2Kings18:3 jaaise usake moolapurush daud ne kiya tha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai vaaisa hee us ne bhee kiya.
2Kings18:4 us ne unche sthan gira dia
2Kings18:5 vah israaael ke parameshvar yahova par bhrosa rakhta tha
2Kings18:6 aur vah yahova se lipatta raha aur usake peechhe chalana n chhoda aur jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee thee
2Kings18:7 isaliye yahova usake sang raha aur jahan kaheen vah jata tha
2Kings18:8 us ne paalishtaiyon ko gajjaa aur usake sivanon tak
2Kings18:9 raja hijaakiyyah ke chauthe varsha men jo aela ke putra israaael ke raja hosho ka satavan varsha tha
2Kings18:10 aur teen varsha ke beetane par unhon ne usako le liya. is prakar hijaakiyyah ke chhttven varsha men jo israaael ke raja hosho ka nauvan varsha tha
2Kings18:11 tab ashshoor ka raja israaael ko bandhaua karake ashshoor men le gaya

2Kings18:15 tab jitanee chandee yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men milee

2Kings18:24 fir too mere svamee ke chhotte se chhotte karmacharee ka bhee kaha n man kar kyon rathon aur savaron ke liye misra par bhrosa rakhta haai?
2Kings18:25 kya maain ne yahova ke bina kahe

2Kings18:32 tab maain akar tum ko aeese desh men le jaunga

2Kings19:2 aur us ne aelyakeem ko jo rajagharane ke kam par tha
2Kings19:3 unhon ne us se kaha
2Kings19:4 kadachit tera parameshvar yahova rabashaake kee sab baten sune
2Kings19:5 jab hijaakiyyah raja ke karmacharee yashaayah ke pas aa
2Kings19:6 tab yashaayah ne un se kaha
2Kings19:7 sun
2Kings19:8 tab rabashaake ne lauttkar ashshoor ke raja ko libna nagar se yuddh karate paya
2Kings19:9 aur jab us ne koosh ke raja tirhaka ke vishy yah suna
2Kings19:10 tum yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah se yon kahana tera parameshvar jisaka too bhrosa karata haai
2Kings19:11 dek

2Kings19:14 tab yahova ke bhvan men jakar usako yahova ke samhane faaila diya.
2Kings19:15 aur yahova se yah praarthna kee
2Kings19:16 he yahova! kan lagakar sun
2Kings19:17 he yahova
2Kings19:18 aur unake devataon ko ag men jhenka haai
2Kings19:19 isaliye ab he hamare parameshvar yahova too hamen usake hath se bacha
2Kings19:20 tab amos ke putra yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah ke pas yah kahala bheja
2Kings19:21 usake vishay men yahova ne yah vachan kaha haai
2Kings19:22 too ne jo namadharai aur ninda kee haai
2Kings19:23 apane dooton ke dara too ne prabhu kee ninda karake kaha haai
2Kings19:24 maain ne to khudavakar paradesh ka panee piya aur misra kee naharon men panv dharate hee unhen sukha daloonga.
2Kings19:25 kya too ne naheen suna
2Kings19:26 isee karan unake rahanevalon ka bal ghatt gaya ve vismait aur lajjait hue ve maaidan ke chhotte chhotte pedon aur haree ghaas aur chht par kee ghaas
2Kings19:27 maain to tera baaitta rahana
2Kings19:28 is karan ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata aur tere aabhaiman kee baten mere kanon men padee haain maain teree nak men apanee nakel dalakar aur tere munh men apana lagam lagakar
2Kings19:29 aur tere liye yah chinh hoga
2Kings19:30 aur yahooda ke gharane ke bache huae log fir jad pakadenge
2Kings19:31 kyonaki yarooshalem men se bache huae aur siyyon parvat ke bhage huae log nikalenge. yahova yah kam apanee jalan ke karan karega.
2Kings19:32 isaliye yahova ashshoor ke raja ke vishay men yon kahata haai ki vah is nagar men pravesh karane
2Kings19:33 jis marga se vah aya
2Kings19:34 aur maain apane nimitt aur apane das daud ke nimitt is nagar kee raksha karake ise bachaunga.
2Kings19:35 usee rat men kya hua
2Kings19:36 tab ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb chal diya
2Kings19:37 vahan vah apane devata nisraek ke mandair men dandvat kar raha tha
2Kings20:1 un dinon men hijaakiyyah aeesa rogee hua ki marate par tha
2Kings20:2 tab us ne bheet kee or munh faer
2Kings20:3 maain bintee karata hoo
2Kings20:4 aur aeesa hua ki yashaayah nagar ke beech tak jane bhee n paya tha ki yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha
2Kings20:5 ki lauttkar meree praja ke pradhaan hijaakiyyah se kah
2Kings20:6 aur maain teree ayoo pandrah varsha aur baddha doonga. aur ashshoor ke raja ke hath se tujhe aur is nagar ko bachaunga
2Kings20:7 tab yashaayah ne kaha
2Kings20:8 hijaakiyyah ne yashaayah se poochha
2Kings20:9 yashaayah ne kaha
2Kings20:10 hijaakiyyah ne kaha
2Kings20:11 tab yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ne yahova ko pukara
2Kings20:12 us samay baladan ka putra barodakabaladan jo babel ka raja tha
2Kings20:13 unake lanevalon kee manakar hijaakiyyah ne unako apane anamol padathn ka sab bhndar
2Kings20:14 tab yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ne hijaakiyyah raja ke pas jakar puchha
2Kings20:15 fir us ne poochha
2Kings20:16 yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah se kaha
2Kings20:17 aeese din anevale haai
2Kings20:18 aur jo putra tere vansh men utpann ho
2Kings20:19 hijaakiyyah ne yashaayah se kaha
2Kings20:20 hijaakiyyah ke aur sab kam aur usakee saree veerata aur kis reeti us ne aek pokhra aur nalee khudavakar nagar men panee pahuncha diya
2Kings20:21 nidan hijaakiyyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra manashsho usake sthan par rajy karane laga.
2Kings21:1 jab manashsho rajy karane laga
2Kings21:2 us ne un jaatiyon ke ghainaune kamon ke anusar
2Kings21:3 us ne un unche sthanon ko jinako usake pita hijaakiyyah ne nash kiya tha
2Kings21:4 aur us ne yahova ke us bhvan men vediyan banai jisake vishay yahova ne kaha tha
2Kings21:5 varan yahova ke bhvan ke donon anganon men bhee us ne akash ke kul gan ke liye veadiyan banai.
2Kings21:6 fir us ne apane bette ko ag men hom karake chaddhaya aur shuubhashuubh muhuttanko manata
2Kings21:7 aur ashora kee jo moorat us ne khudavai
2Kings21:8 aur yaadi ve meree sab agyaaon ke aur mere das moosa kee dee hui pooree yyavastha ke anusar karane kee chaukasee kare
2Kings21:9 parantu unhon ne n mana
2Kings21:10 isaliye yahova ne apane das bhavishyadvktaon ke dara kaha
2Kings21:11 ki yahooda ke raja manashsho ne jo ye gharanait kam kia
2Kings21:12 is karan israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki suno
2Kings21:13 aur jo mapane kee doree maain ne shaemaron par dalee haai aur jo sahul maain ne ahab ke gharane par lattkaya haai vahee yarooshalem par daloonga. aur maain yarooshalem ko aeesa pochoonga jaaise koi thalee ko ponchhta haai aur use ponchhkar ulatt deta haai.
2Kings21:14 aur maain apane nij bhag ke bache huon ko tyagakar shatrauon ke hath kar doonga aur ve apane sab shatrauon ke liae loott aur dhan ban jaaenge.
2Kings21:15 isaka karan yah haai
2Kings21:16 manashsho ne to n keval vah kam karake yahoodiyon se pap karaya
2Kings21:17 manashsho ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
2Kings21:18 nidan manashsho apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use usake bhvan kee baree men jo ujjar kee baree kahalatee thee mittee dee gai aur usaka putra amon usake sthan par raja hua.
2Kings21:19 jab amon rajy karane laga
2Kings21:20 aur us ne apane pita manashsho kee nai vah kiya
2Kings21:21 aur vah apane pita ke saman pooree chal chala
2Kings21:22 aur us ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko tyag diya
2Kings21:23 aur amon ke karmachariyon ne draeh kee goshttee karake raja ko usee ke bhvan men mar dala.
2Kings21:24 tab sadhaaran logon ne un sabhon ko mar dala
2Kings21:25 amon ke aur kam jo us ne kia
2Kings21:26 use bhee ujjar kee baree men usakee nij kabar men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra yoshaiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga.
2Kings22:1 jab yoshaiyyah rajy karane laga
2Kings22:2 us ne vah kiya
2Kings22:3 apane rajy ke attarahaven varsha men raja yoshaiyyah ne asalyah ke putra shaapan mantraee ko jo mashuullam ka pota tha
2Kings22:4 ki jo chandee yahova ke bhvan men lai gai haai
2Kings22:5 usako jodkar
2Kings22:6 arthata baddhiyo
2Kings22:7 parantu jinake hath men vah chandee saunpee gai
2Kings22:8 aur hilaakiyyah mahayajak ne shaapan mantraee se kaha
2Kings22:9 tab shaapan mantraee ne raja ke pas lauttkar yah sandesh diya
2Kings22:10 fir shapan mantraee ne raja ko yah bhee bata diya
2Kings22:11 yyavastha kee us pustak kee baten sunakar raja ne apane vasr faade.
2Kings22:12 fir us ne hilaakiyyah yajak
2Kings22:13 ki yah pustak jo milee haai
2Kings22:14 hilaakiyyah yajak aur aheekam
2Kings22:15 us ne un se kaha
2Kings22:16 yahova yon kahata haai
2Kings22:17 un logon ne mujhe tyag kar paraye devataon ke liye dhoop jalaya aur apanee banai hui sab vastuon ke dara mujhe krodha dilaya haai
2Kings22:18 parantu yahooda ka raja jis ne tumhen yahova se poochhne ko bheja haai us se tum yon kaho
2Kings22:19 isaliye ki too ve baten sunakar deen hua
2Kings22:20 isaliye dek
2Kings23:1 raja ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke sab puraaniyon ko apane pas ikattha bulavaya.
2Kings23:2 aur raja
2Kings23:3 tab raja ne khmbhe ke pas khda hokar yahova se is ashay kee vacha bandhae
2Kings23:4 tab raja ne hilaakiyyah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke yajakon aur darapalon ko agyaa dee ki jitane patra bal aur ashora aur akash ke sab gan ke liye bane haai
2Kings23:5 aur jin pujaariyon ko yahooda ke rajaon ne yahooda ke nagaron ke unche sthanon men aur yarooshalem ke as pas ke sthanon men dhoop jalane ke liye ttharaya tha
2Kings23:6 aur vah ashora ko yahova ke bhvan men se nikalakar yarooshalem ke bahar kidraen nale men livale gaya aur vaheen usako foonk diya
2Kings23:7 fir purushagaamiyon ke ghar jo yahova ke bhvan men the
2Kings23:8 aur us ne yahooda ke sab nagaron se yajakon ko bulavakar geba se beshba tak ke un unche sthanon ko
2Kings23:9 taubhee unche sthanon ke yajak yarooshalem men yahova kee bedee ke pas n aa
2Kings23:10 fir us ne topet ko jo hinnomavanshaiyon kee tarai men tha
2Kings23:11 aur jo ghaede yahooda ke rajaon ne soorya ko arpan karake
2Kings23:12 aur ahaj kee attaree kee chht par jo vediyan yahooda ke rajaon kee banai hui thee
2Kings23:13 aur jo unche sthan israaael ke raja sulaaiman ne yarooshalem kee poorva or aur vikaree nam pahadee kee daakkhian alang
2Kings23:14 aur us ne latton ko tod diya aur ashoron ko katt dala
2Kings23:15 fir betel men jo vedee thee
2Kings23:16 aur yoshaiyyah ne fir kar vahan ke pahad kee kabaron ko dekha
2Kings23:17 tab us ne poochha
2Kings23:18 tab us ne kaha
2Kings23:19 fir unche sthan ke jitane bhpan shaemaron ke nagaron men the
2Kings23:20 aur un unche sthanon ke jitane yajak vahan the un sabhon ko us ne unhee veadiyon par baali kiya aur un par manushyon kee haddiyan jalakar yarooshalem ko lautt gaya.
2Kings23:21 aur raja ne saree praja ke logon ko agyaa dee
2Kings23:22 nishchay aeesa fasah n to nyayiyon ke dinon men mana gaya tha jo israaael ka nyay karate the
2Kings23:23 raja yoshaiyyah ke attarahaven varsha men yahova ke liye yarooshalem men yah fasah mana gaya.
2Kings23:24 fir ojhe
2Kings23:25 aur usake tuly n to us se paahile koi aeesa raja hua aur n usake bad aeesa koi raja utta
2Kings23:26 taubhee yahova ka bhdka hua bada kop shaant n hua
2Kings23:27 aur yahova ne kaha tha jese maain ne israaael ko apane samhane se door kiya
2Kings23:28 yoshaiyyah ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
2Kings23:29 usake dinon men firauna-nako nam misra ka raja ashshoor ke raja ke viruddh parat mahanad tak gaya to yoshaiyyah raja bhee usaka samhana karane ko gaya
2Kings23:30 tab usake karmachaariyon ne usakee loth aek rath par rakh maagio se le jakar yarooshalem ko pahunchai aur usakee nij kabar men rakh dee. tab sadhaaran logon ne yoshaiyyah ke putra yahoahaj ko lekar usaka aabhaishok karake
2Kings23:31 jab yahoahaj rajy karane laga
2Kings23:32 us ne ieek apane purakhaon kee nai vahee kiya
2Kings23:33 usako firauna-nako ne hamat desh ke ribala nagar men bandha rakha
2Kings23:34 tab firauna-nako ne yoshaiyyah ke putra aelyakeem ko usake pita yoshaiyyah ke sthan par raja niyukt kiya
2Kings23:35 yahoyakeem ne firaun ko vah chandee aur sona to diya parantu desh par isaliye kar lagaya ki firaun kee agyaa ke anusar use de sake
2Kings23:36 jab sahoyakeem rajy karane laga
2Kings23:37 us ne tteek apane purakhaon kee nai vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai.
2Kings24:1 usake dinon men babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne chaddhai kee aur yahoyakeem teen varsha tak usake adhaeen raha tab us ne fir kar us se balava kiya.
2Kings24:2 tab yahava ne usake viruddh aur yahooda ko nash karane ke liye kasadiyo
2Kings24:3 nisandeh yah yahooda par yahova kee agyaa se hua
2Kings24:4 aur nidashaen ke us koon ke karan jo us ne kiya tha kyonaki us ne yarooshalem ko nidashaen ke koon se bhr diya tha
2Kings24:5 yahoyakeem ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia
2Kings24:6 nidan yahoyakeem apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra yahoyakeen usake sthan par raja hua.
2Kings24:7 aur misra ka raja apane desh se bahar fir kabhee n aya
2Kings24:8 jab yahoyakeen rajy karane laga
2Kings24:9 us ne tteek apane pita kee nai vah kiya
2Kings24:10 usake dinon men babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke karmachariyon ne yarooshalem par chaddhai karake nagar ko ghor liya.
2Kings24:11 aur jab babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke karmacharee nagar ko ghore huae the
2Kings24:12 aur yahooda ka raja yahoyakeen apanee mata aur karmachaariyo
2Kings24:13 tab us ne yahova ke bhvan men aur rajabhvan men rakha hua poora dhan vahan se nikal liya aur sone ke jo patra israaael ke raja sulaaiman ne banakar yahova ke mandair men rakhe the
2Kings24:14 fir vah poore yarooshalem ko arthata sab haakimon aur sab dhanavanon ko jo milakar das hajar the
2Kings24:15 aur vah yahoyakeen ko babel men le gaya aur usakee mata aur striayon aur khojon ko aur desh ke bade logon ko vah bandhaua karake yarooshalem se babel ko le gaya.
2Kings24:16 aur sab dhanavan jo sat hajar the
2Kings24:17 aur babel ke raja ne usake sthan par usake chacha mattanyah ko raja niyukt kiya aur usaka nam badalakar sidaakiyyah rakha.
2Kings24:18 jab sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga
2Kings24:19 us ne tteek yahoyakeem kee leek par chalakar vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai.
2Kings24:20 kyonaki yahova ke kop ke karan yarooshalem aur yahooda ko aeesee dasha hui
2Kings25:1 aur sidaakiyyah ne babel ke raja se balava kiya. usake rajy ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke dasaven din ko babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne apanee pooree sena lekar yarooshalem par chaddhai kee
2Kings25:2 aur nagar sidaakiyyah raja ke gyarahaven varsha tak ghaira hua raha.
2Kings25:3 chauthe maheene ke nauven din se nagar men mahangee yahan tak baddh gai
2Kings25:4 tab nagar kee shaharapanah men darar kee gai
2Kings25:5 tab kasadiyon kee sena ne raja ka peechha kiya
2Kings25:6 tab ve raja ko pakadkar ribala men babel ke raja ke pas le gaa
2Kings25:7 aur unhon ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usake samhane ghaat kiya aur sidaakiyyah kee ankhen faod daleen aur use peetal kee bediyon se jakadkar babel ko le gaae.
2Kings25:8 babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke unneesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke sataven din ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan jo babel ke raja ka aek karmacharee t
2Kings25:9 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan aur yarooshalem ke sab gharon ko arthata har aek bade ghar ko ag lagakar foonk diya.
2Kings25:10 aur yarooshalem ke charon or kee sab shaharapanah ko kasadiyo kee pooree sena ne jo jalladon ke pradhaan ke sang thee ddha diya.
2Kings25:11 aur jo log nagar men rah gaae the
2Kings25:12 parantu jalladon ke pradhaan ne desh ke kangalon men se kitanon ko dakh kee bariyon kee seva aur kashtakaree karane ko chhod diya.
2Kings25:13 aur yahova ke bhvan men jo peetal ke khmbhe the aur kuarsiyan aur peetal ka haud jo yahova ke bhvan men tha
2Kings25:14 aur haandiyo
2Kings25:15 aur karachhe aur kattoriyan jo sone kee thee
2Kings25:16 donon khmbhe
2Kings25:17 aek aek khmbhe kee unchai attarah attarah hath kee thee aur aek aek khmbhe ke upar teen teen hath unchee peetal kee aek aek kanganee thee
2Kings25:18 aur jalladon ke pradhaan ne sarayah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke yajak sapanyah aur teenon darapalon ko pakad liya.
2Kings25:19 aur nagar men se us ne aek hakim ko pakada jo yodaon ke upar tha
2Kings25:20 inako jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan pakadkar ribala ke raja ke pas le gaya.
2Kings25:21 tab babel ke raja ne unhen hamat desh ke ribala men aeesa mara ki ve mar gaae. yon yahoodee bandhaua banake apane desh se tikal diae gaae.
2Kings25:22 aur jo log yahooda desh men rah gaa
2Kings25:23 jab dalon ke sab pradhaanon ne arthata natanyah ke putra ishmaael karehoo ke putra yohanan
2Kings25:24 aur gadalyah ne un se aur unake janon se shapath khakar kaha
2Kings25:25 parantu sataven maheene men natanyah ka putra ishmaael
2Kings25:26 tab kya chhotte kya bade saree praja ke log aur dalon ke pradhaan kasadiyon ke dr ke mare uttkar misra men jakar rahane lage.
2Kings25:27 fir yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen kee bandhauai ke taainteesaven varsha men arthata jis varsha men babel ka raja aeveelmarodak rajagaee par virajaman hua
2Kings25:28 aur us se madhaur madhaur vachan kahakar jo raja usake sang babel men bandhauae the unake sinhasanon se usake sinhasan ko aadhaik uncha kiya
2Kings25:29 aur usake bandeegrah ke vasr badal diae aur us ne jeevan bhr nity raja ke sammukh bhojan kiya.
2Kings25:30 aur praatidin ke khrcha ke liye raja ke yahan se nity ka ksharcha ttharaya gaya jo usake jeevan bhr lagatar use milata raha.

1Chronicles10:10 tab unhon ne usake haathaiyar apane devalay men rakhe

1Chronicles18:1 isake bad daud ne palishtaiyon ko jeetakar apane adhaeen kar liya
1Chronicles18:2 fir us ne moaabiyon ka bhee jeet liya
1Chronicles18:3 fir jab soba ka raja hadarejer parat mahanad ke pas apane rajy sthiar karane ko ja raha tha
1Chronicles18:4 aur daud ne usase aek hajar rat
1Chronicles18:5 aur jab daamishk ke aramee
1Chronicles18:6 tab daud ne damishk ke aram men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai so aramee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt le ane lage. aur jahan jahan daud jata
1Chronicles18:7 aur hadarejer ke karmachariyon ke pas sone kee jo ddhalen thee
1Chronicles18:8 aur hadarejer ke tibht aur koon nam nagaron se daud bahut sa peetal le aya aur usee se suleman ne peetal ke haud aur khmbhon aur peetal ke patraen ko banavaya.
1Chronicles18:9 jab hamat ke raja to ne suna
1Chronicles18:10 tab us ne hadoram nam apane putra ko daud raja ke pas usaka kushal kshom poochhne aur use badhaai dene ko bheja
1Chronicles18:11 inako daud raja ne yahova ke liye paavitra karake rakha
1Chronicles18:12 fir yarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne lan kee tarai men attarah hajar aedomiyon ko mar liya.
1Chronicles18:13 tab us ne aedom men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai aur sab aedomee daud ke adhaeen ho gaae. aur daud jahan jahan jata tha vahan vahan yahova usako jay dilata tha.
1Chronicles18:14 daud to sare israaael par rajy karata tha
1Chronicles18:15 aur pradhaan senapaati sarooyah ka putra yoab tha itihas ka likhnevala aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat tha.

1Chronicles19:18 parantu aramee israaaeliyon se bhage
1Chronicles19:19 yah dekhkar ki ve israaaeliyon se har gaae haai
1Chronicles20:1 fir naye varsha ke arambh men jab raja log yuddh karane ko nikala karate haai
1Chronicles20:2 tab daud ne unake raja ka mukutt usake sir se utarakar kya deekha
1Chronicles20:3 aur us ne usake rahanevalon ko nikalakar aron aur lohe ke hengon aur kulhaadiyon se kattvaya aur ammoniyon ke sab nagaron ke sath bhee daud ne vaaisa hee kiya. tab daud sab logon samet yarooshalem ko lautt gaya.
1Chronicles20:4 isake bad gejer men palishtaiyon ke sath yuddh hua us samay hooshaai sibbakaai ne sippaai ko
1Chronicles20:5 aur paalishtaiyon ke sath fir yuddh hua us men yair ke putra aelhanan ne gatee golyat ke bhai lahamee ko mar dala
1Chronicles20:6 fir gat men bhee yuddh hua
1Chronicles20:7 jab us ne israaaeliyon ko lalakara
1Chronicles20:8 ye hee gat men rapa se utpann huae the
1Chronicles21:1 aur shautan ne israaael ke viruddh uttkar
1Chronicles21:2 tab daud ne yoab aur praja ke hakimon se kaha

1Chronicles21:4 taubhee raja kee agyaa yoab par prabal hui. tab yoab vida hokar sare israaael men dhoomakar yarooshalem ko lautt aya.
1Chronicles21:5 tab yoab ne praja kee ginatee ka jod
1Chronicles21:6 parantu un men yoab ne levee aur binyameen ko n gina

1Chronicles21:11 tab gad ne daud ke pas jakar us se kaha

1Chronicles21:16 aur daud ne ankhen uttakar dekha
1Chronicles21:17 tab daud ne parameshvar se kaha
1Chronicles21:18 tab yahova ke doot ne gad ko daud se yah kahane kee agyaa dee
1Chronicles21:19 gad ke is vachan ke anusar jo us ne yahova ke nam se kaha tha
1Chronicles21:20 tab ornan ne peechhe fir ke doot ko dekha
1Chronicles21:21 jab daud ornan ke pas aya
1Chronicles21:22 tab daud ne ornan se kaha
1Chronicles21:23 ornan ne daud se kaha
1Chronicles21:24 raja daud ne ornan se kaha

1Chronicles21:26 tab daud ne vahan yahova kee aek vedee banai aur homabali aur melabali chaddhakar yahova se praarthna kee
1Chronicles21:27 tab yahova ne doot ko agyaa dee aur us ne apanee talavar fir myan men kar lee.
1Chronicles21:28 yah dekhkar ki yahova ne yaboosee ornan ke khlihan men meree sun lee haai
1Chronicles21:29 yahova ka nivas jo moosa ne jangal men banaya tha

1Chronicles27:1 israaaeliyo kee ginatee
1Chronicles27:2 paahile maheene ke liye paahile dal ka aadhaikaree jabdeeael ka putra yashaebam niyukt hua aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:3 vah peres ke vansh ka tha aur pahile maheene men sab senapaatiyon ka aadhaikaree tha.
1Chronicles27:4 aur doosare maheene ke dal ka adhaikaree dodaai nam aek ahohee tha
1Chronicles27:5 teesare maheene ke liye teesara senapaati yahoyada yajak ka putra banayah tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:6 yah vahee banayah haai
1Chronicles27:7 chauthe maheene ke liye chautha senapati yoab ka bhai asahel tha
1Chronicles27:8 panchaven maheene ke liye panchavan senapati yijraahee shamhoot tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:9 chhttven maheene ke liye chhttvan senapaati takoi ikkesh ka putra ira tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:10 sataven maheene ke liye satavan senapaati aepraaim ke vansh ka heles palonee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:11 attven maheene ke liye attvan senapaati jerah ke vansh men se hooshaai sibbakaai tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:12 nauven maheene ke liye nauvan senapati binyameenee abeeaejer anatotavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:13 dasaven maheene ke liye dasavan senapaati jerahee maharaai natopavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:14 gyarahaven maheene ke liye gyarahavan senapaati aepraaim ke vansh ka banayah piratonavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:15 barahaven maheene ke liye barahavan senapati otneeael ke vansh ka heldaai natopavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the.
1Chronicles27:16 fir israaaelee gotron ke ye aadhaikaree the arthata roobeniyon ka pradhaan jikree ka putra aeleeajara shaimoniyon se maka ka putra shapatyaha.
1Chronicles27:17 levee se kamooael ka putra hashabyaha haroon kee santan ka sadoka.
1Chronicles27:18 yahooda ka aeleehoo nam daud ka aek bhai

1Chronicles27:26 aur jo boomi ko jotakar bokar khetee karate the
1Chronicles27:27 aur dakh kee baariyon ka aadhaikaree ramai shaimee aur dakh kee baariyon kee upaj jo dakhmadha ke bhndaron men rakhne ke liye thee
1Chronicles27:28 or neeche ke desh ke jalapai aur goolar ke vrakshaen ka adhaikaree gaderee balhanan tha aur tel ke bhndaron ka adhaikaree yoash tha.

1Chronicles27:30 aur untton ka aadhaikaree ishmaaelee obeel aur gadaahiyon ka aadhaikaree meronotavasee yehadayaha.
1Chronicles27:31 aur bhaid-bakaariyon ka aadhaikaree hagraee yajeej tha. ye hee sab raja daud ke dhan sammattai ke adhaikaree the.

1Chronicles29:12 dhan aur maahima teree or se milatee haai
1Chronicles29:13 isaliye ab he hamare parameshvar! ham tera dhnyavad aur tere maahimayukt nam kee stuti karate haain.
1Chronicles29:14 maain kya hoo? aur meree praja kya haai? ki ham ko is reeti se apanee ichchha se tujhe bhentt dene kee shaaktai mile? tujhee se to sab kuchh milata haai
1Chronicles29:15 teree drashtti men ham to apane sab purakhaon kee nai paraae aur paradeshaee haain prathvee par hamare din chhaya kee nai beete jate haai
1Chronicles29:16 he hamare parameshvar yahova! vah jo bada sanchay ham ne tere paavitra nam ka aek bhvan banane ke liye kiya haai
1Chronicles29:17 aur he mere parameshvar! maain janata hoo ki too man ko janchata haai aur sidhaai se prasann rahata haai maain ne to yah sab kuchh man kee sidhaai aur apanee ichchha se diya haai aur ab maain ne anand se dekha haai
1Chronicles29:18 he yahova! he hamare purakha ibraaheem
1Chronicles29:19 aur mere putra sulaaiman ka man aeesa khra kar de ki vah teree agyaaon chitauaniyon aur vidhaiyon ko manata rahe aur yah sab kuchh kare
1Chronicles29:20 tab daud ne saree sabha se kaha
1Chronicles29:21 aur doosare din unhon ne yahova ke liye baalidan kia

1Chronicles29:27 aur usake israaael par rajy karane ka samay chalees varsha ka tha us ne sat varsha to hebraen men aur taaintees varsha yarooshalem men rajy kiya.

2Chronicles11:3 ki yahooda ke raja sulaaiman ke putra rahoobiyam se aur yahooda aur binyameen ke sab israaaeliyon se kah
2Chronicles11:4 yahova yon kahata haai
2Chronicles11:5 so rahoobiyam yarooshalem men rahane laga
2Chronicles11:6 arthata betalehem
2Chronicles11:7 betsoor
2Chronicles11:8 gat
2Chronicles11:9 adoraaim
2Chronicles11:10 sora
2Chronicles11:11 aur us ne draddh nagaron ko aur bhee draddh karake un men pradhaan ttharaa
2Chronicles11:12 fir aek aek nagar men us ne ddhalen aur bhale rakhvakar unako atyant draddh kar diya. yahooda aur binyameen to usake the.
2Chronicles11:13 aur sare israaael ke yajak aur leveey bhee apane sab desh se uttkar usake pas gaae.
2Chronicles11:14 yon leveey apanee charaiyon aur nij boomi chhodkar
2Chronicles11:15 aur us ne unche sthanon aur bakaron aur apane banaae huae bachhdon ke liye
2Chronicles11:16 aur leaviyon ke bad israaael ke sab gotraen men se jitane man lagakar israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke khojee the ve apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko bali chaddhane ke liye yarooshalem ko aae.
2Chronicles11:17 aur unhon ne yahooda ka rajy sthiar kiya aur sulaaiman ke putra rahoobiyam ko teen varsha tak draddh karaya
2Chronicles11:18 aur rahoobiyam ne aek sree ko byah liya
2Chronicles11:19 aur us se yoosha
2Chronicles11:20 aur usake bad us ne abashalom kee bettee maka ko byah liya
2Chronicles11:21 rahoobiyam ne attarah raaniyan byah leen aur satt rakhealiyan rakhee
2Chronicles11:22 so rahoobiyam ne maka ke bette aabiyyah ko mukhy aur sab bhaiyon men pradhaan is manasa se tthara diya
2Chronicles11:23 aur vah samajh boojhkar kam karata tha
2Chronicles12:1 parantu jab rahoobiyam ka rajy draddh ho gaya
2Chronicles12:2 unhon ne jo yahova se vishvasaghaat kiya
2Chronicles12:3 barah sau rath aur satt hajar savar liye huae yarooshalem par chaddhai kee
2Chronicles12:4 aur us ne yahooda ke gaddhvale nagaron ko le liya
2Chronicles12:5 tab shamayah nabee rahoobiyam aur yahooda ke hakimon ke pas jo shaeeshak ke dr ke mare yarooshalem men iatthe huae the
2Chronicles12:6 tab israaael ke hakim aur raja deen ho gaa
2Chronicles12:7 jab yahova ne dekha ki ve deen huae haai
2Chronicles12:8 taubhee ve usake adhaeen to rahenge
2Chronicles12:9 tab misra ka raja shaeeshak yarooshalem par chaddhai karake yahova ke bhvan kee anamol vastuaen aur rajabhvan kee anamol vastuen utta le gaya. vah sab kuchh utta le gaya
2Chronicles12:10 tab raja rahoobiyam ne unake badale peetal kee ddhalen banavai aur unhen paharuon ke pradhaanon ke hath saunp diya
2Chronicles12:11 aur jab jab raja yahova ke bhvan men jata
2Chronicles12:12 jab rahoobiyam deen hua
2Chronicles12:13 so raja rahoobiyam yarooshalem men draddh hokar rajy karata raha. jab rahoobiyam rajy karane laga
2Chronicles12:14 us ne vah karma kiya jo bura haai
2Chronicles12:15 aadi se ant tak rahoobiyam ke kam kya shamayah nabee aur io dasha kee pustakon men vanshaavaliyon kee reeati par naheen likhe haain? rahoobiyam aur yarobam ke beech to ladai sada hotee rahee.
2Chronicles12:16 aur rahoobiyam apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur daudapur men usako mittee dee gai. aur usaka putra aabiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga.

2Chronicles22:1 tab yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne usake lahure putra ahajyah ko usake sthan par raja banaya kyonaki jo dal araabiyon ke sang chhavanee men aya tha
2Chronicles22:2 jab ahajyah raja hua
2Chronicles22:3 vah ahab ke gharane kee see chal chala
2Chronicles22:4 aur vah ahab ke gharane kee nai vah kam karata tha jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai
2Chronicles22:5 aur vah unakee sammaati ke anusar chalata tha
2Chronicles22:6 so raja yahoram isaaliye lautt gaya ki yijrael men un ghaavon ka itaj karaae jo usako aramiyon ke hath se us samay lage the jab vah hajaael ke sath lad raha tha. aur ahab ka putra yahoram jo yijrael men rogee tha
2Chronicles22:7 aur ahajyah ka vinash yahova kee or se hua
2Chronicles22:8 aur jab yehoo ahab ke gharane ko dand de raha tha
2Chronicles22:9 tab us ne ahajyah ko ddoonddha. vah shaemaron men chhpai tha
2Chronicles22:10 jab ahajyah kee mata atalyah ne dekh ki mera putra mar gaya
2Chronicles22:11 parantu yahoshavat jo raja kee bettee thee
2Chronicles22:12 aur vah usake pas parameshvar ke bhvan men chh varsha chhpai raha
2Chronicles23:1 sataven varsha men yahoyada ne hiyab bandhakar yaroham ke putra ajaryah
2Chronicles23:2 tab ve yahooda men ghoomakar yahooda ke sab nagaron men se leaviyon ko aur israaael ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen ko ikattha karake yarooshalem ko le aae.
2Chronicles23:3 aur us saree maaedlee ne parameshvar ke bhvan men raja ke sath vacha bandhae
2Chronicles23:4 to tum aek kam karo
2Chronicles23:5 aur aek tihai log rajabhvan men rahen aur aek tihai log nev ke faattk ke pas rahen aur sab log yahova ke bhvan ke anganon men rahen.
2Chronicles23:6 parantu yajakon aur seva tthal karanevale leviyon ko chhod aur koi yahova ke bhvan ke bheetar n ane paae ve to bheetar aae
2Chronicles23:7 aur leveey log apane apane hath men hathaiyar liye huae raja ke charon or rahen aur jo koi bhvan ke bheetar ghause
2Chronicles23:8 yahoyada yajak kee in sab agyaaon ke anusar leaviyon aur sab yahoodiyon ne kiya. unhon ne vishraamadin ko anevale aur vishraamadin ko janevale donon dalon ke
2Chronicles23:9 tab yahoyada yajak ne shatapaatiyon ko raja daud ke barchhe aur bhale aur ddhalen jo parameshvar ke bhvan men thee
2Chronicles23:10 fir us ne un sab logon ko apane apane hath men haathaiyar liye huae bhvan ke daakkhianee kone se lekar
2Chronicles23:11 tab unhon ne rajakumar ko bahar la
2Chronicles23:12 jab atalyah ko un logon ka halla
2Chronicles23:13 aur us ne kya dekha
2Chronicles23:14 tab yahoyada yajak ne dal ke aadhaikaree shatapatiyon ko bahar lakar un se kaha
2Chronicles23:15 tab unhon ne donon or se usako jagah dee
2Chronicles23:16 tab yahoyada ne apane aur saree praja ke aur raja ke beech yahova kee praja hone kee vacha bandhavai.
2Chronicles23:17 tab sab logon ne bal ke bhvan ko jakar ddha diya aur usakee veadiyon aur mooraton ko ttukade ttukade kiya
2Chronicles23:18 tab yahoyada ne yahova ke bhvan kee seva ke liye un leveey yajakon ko tthara diya
2Chronicles23:19 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan ke faattkon par darapalon ko isaliye khda kiya
2Chronicles23:20 aur vah shatapaatiyon aur raison aur praja par prabhuta karanevalon aur desh ke sab logon ko sath karake raja ko yahova ke bhvan se neeche le gaya aur unche faattk se hokar rajabhvan men aya
2Chronicles23:21 tab sab log anandait huae aur nagar men shaaantai hui. atalyah to talavar se mar hee dalee gai thee.
2Chronicles24:1 jab yoash raja hua
2Chronicles24:2 aur jab tak yahoyada yajak jeeavit raha
2Chronicles24:3 aur yahaseyada ne usake do byah karaae aur us se bette-beattyaian utpann hui.
2Chronicles24:4 isake bad yoash ke man men yahova ke bhvan kee marammat karane kee manasa upajee.
2Chronicles24:5 tab us ne yajakon aur leaviyon ko ikattha karake kaha
2Chronicles24:6 tab raja ne yahoyada mahayajak ko bulava kar poochha
2Chronicles24:7 us dushtt stree atalyah ke betton ne to parameshvar ke bhvan ko tod diya aur yahova ke bhvan kee sab pavitra kee hui vastuen bal devataon ko de dee theen.
2Chronicles24:8 aur raja ne aek sandook banane kee agyaa dee aur vah yahova ke bhvan ke faattk ke pas bahar rakha gaya.
2Chronicles24:9 tab yahooda aur yarooshalem men yah prachar kiya gaya ki jis chande ka niyam parameshvar ke das moosa ne jangal men israaael men chalaya tha
2Chronicles24:10 to sab haakim aur praja ke sab log anandait ho rupaae lakar jab tak chanda poora n hua tab tak sandook men dalate gaae.
2Chronicles24:11 aur jab jab vah sandook leviyon ke hath se raja ke pradhaanon ke pas pahunchaya jata aur yah jan padta tha ki us men rupaae bahut haai
2Chronicles24:12 tab raja aur yahoyada ne vah rupaae yahova ke bhvan men kam karanevalon ko de dia
2Chronicles24:13 aur kareegar kam karate gaae aur kam poora hota gaya aur unhon ne parameshvar ka bhvan jaaisa ka taaisa banakar draddh kar diya.
2Chronicles24:14 jab unhon ne vah kam nipatta diya
2Chronicles24:15 parantu yahoyada booddha ho gaya aur deegharayu hokar mar gaya. jab vah mar gaya tab aek sau tees varsha ka tha.
2Chronicles24:16 aur daudapur men rajaon ke beech usako mittee dee gai
2Chronicles24:17 yahoyada ke marane ke bad yahooda ke haakimon ne raja ke pas jakar use dandvat kee
2Chronicles24:18 tab ve apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ka bhvan chhodkar ashoron aur mooraton kee upasana karane lage. so unake aeese doshaee hone ke karan parameshvar ka kroedha yahooda aur yarooshalem par bhdka.
2Chronicles24:19 taubhee us ne unake pas nabee bheje ki unako yahova ke pas faer laaen aur inhon ne unhen chita diya
2Chronicles24:20 aur parameshvar ka atma yahoyada yajak ke putra jakaryah men sama gaya
2Chronicles24:21 tab logon ne us se draeh kee goshttee karake

2Chronicles25:1 jab amasyah rajy karane laga tab vah vachees varsha ka tha
2Chronicles25:2 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai
2Chronicles25:3 jab rajy usake hath men sthiar ho gaya
2Chronicles25:4 parantu us ne unake ladkevalon ko n mara kyonaki us ne yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar kiya
2Chronicles25:5 aur amasyah ne yahooda ko varan sare yahoodiyon aur binyameeaniyon ko ikattha karake unako
2Chronicles25:6 fir us ne aek lakh israaaelee shooraveeron ko bhee aek sau kikkar chandee dekar bulava rakha.
2Chronicles25:7 parantu parameshvar ke aek jan ne usake pas akar kaha
2Chronicles25:8 yaadi too jakar purushaarth kare aur yuddh ke liye hiyav vandho
2Chronicles25:9 amasyah ne parameshvar ke bhkt se poochha
2Chronicles25:10 tab amasyah ne unhen arthata us dal ko jo aepraaim kee or se usake pas aya tha
2Chronicles25:11 parantu amasyah hiyab bandhakar apane logon ko le chala
2Chronicles25:12 aur yahooliyon ne das hajar ko bandhaua karake chattan kee chottee par le gaye
2Chronicles25:13 parantu us dal ke purush jise amasyah ne lautta diya ki ve usake sath yuddh karane ko n jaae
2Chronicles25:14 jab amasyah aedoniyon ka sanhar karake lautt aya
2Chronicles25:15 tab yahova ka krodha amasyah par bhdk utta aur us ne usake pas aek nabee bheja jis ne us se kaha
2Chronicles25:16 vah us se kah hee raha tha ki us ne us se poochha
2Chronicles25:17 tab yahooda ke raja amasyah ne sammati lekar
2Chronicles25:18 israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ke pas yon kahala bheja
2Chronicles25:19 too kahata haai
2Chronicles25:20 parantu amasyah ne n mana. yah to parameshvar kee or se hua
2Chronicles25:21 tab israaael ke raja yoash ne chaddhai kee aur us ne aur yahooda ke raja amasyah ne yahooda desh ke betashomesh men aek doosare ka samhana kiya.
2Chronicles25:22 aur yahooda israaael se har gaya
2Chronicles25:23 tab israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ko
2Chronicles25:24 aur jitana sona chandee aur jitane patra parameshvar ke bhvan men obededom ke pas mile
2Chronicles25:25 yahoahaj ke putra israaael ke raja yoash ke marane ke bad yoash ka putra yahooda ka raja amasyah pandrah varsha tak jeevit raha.
2Chronicles25:26 aadi se ant tak amasyah ke aur kam
2Chronicles25:27 jis samay apasyah yahova ke peechhe chalana chhodkar fir gaya tha us samay se yarooshalem men usake viruddh draeh kee goshttee hone lagee
2Chronicles25:28 tab vah ghaedon par rakhkar pahunchaya gaya aur use usake purakhaon ke beech yahooda ke nagar men mittee dee gai.

2Chronicles31:1 jab yah sab ho chuka
2Chronicles31:2 aur hijaakiyyah ne yajakon ke dalon ko aur leaviyon ko varan yajakon aur leviyon donon ko
2Chronicles31:3 fir us ne apanee sampattai men se rajabhasha ko homabaaliyon ke liye tthara diya arthta sabere aur sanjh kee homabali aur vishraam aur naye chand ke dinon aur niyat samayon kee homabaali ke liye jaaisa ki yahova kee vyavastha men likha haai.

2Chronicles31:6 aur jo israaaelee aur yahoodee
2Chronicles31:7 is prakar ddher ka lagana unhon ne teesare maheene men arambh kiya aur sataven maheene men poora kiya.

2Chronicles31:9 tab hijaakiyyah ne yajakon aur leviyon se un ddheron ke vishay poochha.

2Chronicles31:12 tab logon ne uttai hui bhentte

2Chronicles31:14 aur parameshvar ke liye svechchhabaaliyon ka aadhaikaree yimna leveey ka putra kore tha
2Chronicles31:15 aur usake aadhaikar men aeden
2Chronicles31:16 aur unake alava unako bhee de

Ezra4:1 jab yahooda aur binyameen ke shatrauon ne yah suna ki bandhauai se chootte huae log israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye maandair bana rahe haai
Ezra4:2 tab ve jarubbabel aur poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen ke pas akar un se kahane lage
Ezra4:3 jarubbabel
Ezra4:4 tab us desh ke log yahoodiyon ke hath ddheela karane aur unhen drakar mandair banane men rukavatt dalane lage.
Ezra4:5 aur faaras ke raja kusraoo ke jeevan bhr varan faaras ke raja dara ke rajy ke samay tak unake manorath ko nishfal karane ke liye vakeelon ko rupaya dete rahe.
Ezra4:6 shraayarsha ke rajy ke pahile dinon men unhon ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ka doshapatra use likh bheja.
Ezra4:7 fir artashratra ke dinon men bishalam
Ezra4:8 arthata rahoom rajamantraee aur shailashau mantraee ne yarooshalem ke viruddh raja artashratra ko is ashay kee chitthee likhee.
Ezra4:9 us samay rahoom rajamantraee aur shaimashau mantraee aur unake aur sahachariyon ne
Ezra4:10 aadi jatiyon ne jinhen mahan aur pradhaan osnappar ne par le akar shaemaron nagar men aur mahanad ke is par ke shosh desh men basaya tha
Ezra4:11 jo chitthee unhon ne artashratra raja ko likhee
Ezra4:12 raja ko yah vidit ho
Ezra4:13 ab raja ko vidit ho ki yadi vah nagar bas gaya aur usakee shaharapanah ban chukee
Ezra4:14 ham log to rajamaandair ka namak khate haain aur uchit naheen ki raja ka anadar hamare dekhte ho
Ezra4:15 tere purakhaon ke iatihas kee pustak men khoj kee jaae tab iatihas kee pustak men too yah pakar jan lega ki vah nagar balava karanevala aur rajaon aur praanton kee hani karanevala haai
Ezra4:16 ham raja ko nishchay kara dete haain ki yadi vah nagar basaya jaae aur usakee shaharapanah ban chuke
Ezra4:17 tab raja ne rahoom rajamantraee aur shaimashau mantraee aur shaemaron aur mahanad ke is par rahanevale unake aur sahachaariyon ke pas yah uttar bheja
Ezra4:18 jo chitthee tum logon ne hamare pas bhejee vah mere samhane paddh kar safa safa sunai gai.
Ezra4:19 aur meree agyaa se khoj kiye jane par jan pada haai
Ezra4:20 yarooshalem ke samath raja bhee huae jo mahanad ke par se samast desh par rajy karate the
Ezra4:21 isaliye ab is agyaa ka prachar kar ki ve manushy roke jaaen aur jab tak meree or se agyaa n mile
Ezra4:22 aur chaukas raho
Ezra4:23 jab raja artashratra kee yah chitthee rahoom aur shaimashau mantraee aur unake sahachariyon ko paddhkar sunai gai
Ezra4:24 tab parameshvar ke bhvan ka kam jo yarooshalem men haai
Ezra5:1 tab haggaai namak nabee aur io ka pota jakaryah yahooda aur yarooshalem ke yahoodiyon se naboovat karane lage
Ezra5:2 tab shaalateeael ka putra jarubbabel aur yosadak ka putra yeshoo
Ezra5:3 usee samay mahanad ke is par ka tattanaai nam adhaipaati aur shatabajanaai apane sahachariyon samet unake pas jakar yon poochhne lage
Ezra5:4 tab ham logon se yah kaha
Ezra5:5 parantu yahoodiyon ke puraniyon ke parameshvar kee draashtti un par rahee
Ezra5:6 jo chitthee mahanad ke is par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai aur shatabajanaai aur mahanad ke is par ke unake sahacharee aparsaakiyon ne raja dana ke pas bhejee usakee nakal yah haai
Ezra5:7 unhon ne usako ek chitthee likhee
Ezra5:8 raja ko vidit ho
Ezra5:9 isaliye ham ne un puraniyon se yon poochha
Ezra5:10 aur ham ne unake nam bhee poochhe
Ezra5:11 aur unhon ne hamen yon uttar diya
Ezra5:12 jab hamare purakhaon ne svarga ke parameshvar ko ris dilai thee
Ezra5:13 parantu babel ke raja kusraoo ke paahile varsha men usee kusraoo raja ne parameshvar ke is bhvan ke banane kee agyaa dee
Ezra5:14 aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke jo sone aur chandee ke patra nabookadanessar yarooshalem ke mandair men se nikalavakar babel ke maandair men le gaya tha
Ezra5:15 aur us ne usase kaha
Ezra5:16 tab usee shoshabassar ne akar parameshvar ke bhvan kee jo yarooshalem men haai nev dalee aur tab se ab tak yah ban raha haai
Ezra5:17 ab yaadi raja ko achchha lage to babel ke rajabhndar men is bat kee khoj kee jaa
Ezra6:1 tab raja dara kee agyaa se babel ke pustakalay men jahan khjana bhee rahata tha
Ezra6:2 aur made nam praant ke ahamata nagar ke rajagaddh men aek pustak milee
Ezra6:3 ki raja kusraoo ke pahile varsha men usee kusraoo raja ne yah agyaa dee
Ezra6:4 us men teen rae bharee bharee patthron ke ho
Ezra6:5 aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke jo sone or chandee ke patra nabookadanessar ne yarooshalem ke mandair men se nikalavakar babel ko pahuncha diae the vah lauttakar yarooshalem ke maandair men apane apane sthan par pahunchaae jaae
Ezra6:6 ab he mahanad ke par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai! he shatabajanaai! tum apane sahacharee mahanad ke par ke aparsakiyon samet vahan se alag raho
Ezra6:7 parameshvar ke us bhvan ke kam ko rahane do yahoodiyon ka aadhaipaati aur yahoodiyon ke puraniye parameshvar ke us bhvan ko usee ke sthan par banaaen.
Ezra6:8 varan maain agyaa deta hoon ki tumhen yahoodiyon ke un puraniyon se aeesa bartav karana hoga
Ezra6:9 aur kya bachhde! kya meddhe! kya memne! svarga ke parameshvar ke homabaliyon ke liye jis jis vastu ka unhen prayojan ho
Ezra6:10 isaliye ki ve svarga ke parameshvar ko sukhdayak sugandhavale bali chaddhakar
Ezra6:11 fir maain ne agyaa dee haai
Ezra6:12 aur parameshvar jis ne vahan apane nam ka nivas ttharaya haai
Ezra6:13 tab mahanad ke is par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai aur shatabajanaai aur unake sahachariyon ne dara raja ke chitthee bhejane ke kara
Ezra6:14 tab yahoodee puraaniye
Ezra6:15 is prakar vah bhvan raja dara ke rajy ke chhttven varsha men adar maheene ke teesare din ko banakar samapt hua.
Ezra6:16 israaaelee
Ezra6:17 aur us bhvan kee pratishtta men unhon ne aek sau baail aur do sau meddhe aur char sau memne aur fir sab israaael ke nimitt papabaali karake israaael ke gotron kee ginatee ke anusar barah bakare chaddhaae.
Ezra6:18 tab jaaise moosa kee pustak men likha haai
Ezra6:19 fir pahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko bandhauai se aae huae logon ne fasah mana.
Ezra6:20 kyonaki yajakon aur leviyon ne aek man hokar
Ezra6:21 tab bandhauai se lautte huae israaaelee aur jitane aur desh kee any jatiyon kee ashuuddhata se isaliye alag ho gaae the ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj kare
Ezra6:22 aur akhmeeree rottee ka varva sat din tak anand ke sath manate rahe kyonaki yahova ne unhen anaandait kiya tha

Ezra8:20 aur nateen logon men se jinhen daud aur haakimon ne leaviyon kee seva karane ko ttharaya tha do sau bees naatinon ko le aae. in sabhon ke nam likhe huae the.
Ezra8:21 tab maain ne vahan arthata ahava nadee ke teer par upavas ka prachar is ashay se kiya
Ezra8:22 kyonaki maain marga ke shatrauon se vachane ke liye sipaahiyon ka dal aur savar raja se mangane se lajata t

Ezra8:27 sau kikkar sona

Ezra8:32 nidan ham yarooshalem ko pahunche aur vahan teen din rahe.
Ezra8:33 fir chauthe din vah vandee-sona aur patra hamare parameshvar ke bhvan men ureeyah ke putra maremot yajak ke hath men taulakar diae gaae. aur usake sang peenahas ka putra aeleeajar tha
Ezra8:34 ve sab vastuaen ginee aur taulee gai
Ezra8:35 jo bandhauai se aae the

Ezra9:1 tab ye kam ho chuke
Ezra9:2 kyonaki unhon ne unakee bettyaien men se apane aur apane betton ke liye striayan kar lee haain aur pavitra vansh is or ke deshaen ke logon men mil gaya haai. varan haakim aur saradar is vishvasaghaat men mukhy huae haain.
Ezra9:3 yah bat sunakar maain ne apane vasr aur bage ko faada
Ezra9:4 tab jitane log israaael ke parameshvar ke vachan sunakar bandhauai se aae huae logon ke vishvasaghaat ke karan thrathrate the
Ezra9:5 parantu sanjh kee bhentt ke samay maain vasr aur baga faade huae upavas kee dasha men utta
Ezra9:6 he mere parameshvar! mujhe teree or apana munh uttate laj atee haai
Ezra9:7 apane purakhaon ke dinon se lekar aj ke din tak ham bade doshaee haai

Ezra9:13 aur us sab ke bad jo hamare bure kamon aur bade dosh ke karan ham par beeta haai
Ezra9:14 to kya ham teree agyaaon ko fir se ullanghan karake in ghainaune kam karanevale logon se samadhaiyana ka sambandha karen? kya too ham par yahan tak kop n karega lis se ham mitt jaaen aur n to koi bache aur n koi rah jaae?
Ezra9:15 he israaael ke parameshvar yahova! too to dhama haai

Ezra10:7 tab unhon ne yahooda aur yarooshalem men rahanevale bandhauai men se aae huae sab logon men yah prachar karaya
Ezra10:8 aur jo koi hakimon aur puraniyon kee sammaati n manega aur teen din ke bheetar n aae to usakee samast dhana-sampattai nashtt kee jaaegee aur vah ap bandhauai se aae huon kee sabha se alag kiya jaaega.
Ezra10:9 tab yahooda aur binyameen ke sab manushy teen din ke bheetar yarooshalem men ikatthe hue yah nauven maheene ke beesaven din men hua aur sab log parameshvar ke bhvan ke chauk men us vishay ke karan aur jhdee ke mare kanpate huae baaitte rahe.

Ezra10:11 so ab apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ke samhane apana pap man lo

Nehemiah1:1 hakalyah ke putra nahemayah ke vachana. beesaven varsha ke kisalave nam maheene me
Nehemiah1:2 tab hananee nam mera aek bhai aur yahooda se aae huae kai aek purush aae tab maain ne un se un bache huae yahoodiyon ke vishay jo bandhauai se choott gaae the
Nehemiah1:3 unhon ne mujh se kaha
Nehemiah1:4 ye baten sunate hee maain baaittkar rone laga aur kitane din tak vilap karata aur svarga ke parameshvar ke sammukh upavas karata aur yah kahakar praarthna karata raha.
Nehemiah1:5 he svarga ke parameshvar yahova
Nehemiah1:6 too kan lagaae aur ankhen khole rah
Nehemiah1:7 ham ne tere samhane bahut burai kee haai
Nehemiah1:8 us vachan kee sudhai le
Nehemiah1:9 parantu yadi tum meree or firo
Nehemiah1:10 ab ve tere das aur teree praja ke log haain jinako too ne apanee badee samarth aur balavant hath ke dara chhuda liya haai.
Nehemiah1:11 he prabhu binatee yah haai
Nehemiah2:1 artakshatra raja ke beesaven varsha ke neesan nam maheene me
Nehemiah2:2 tab raja ne mujh se poochha
Nehemiah2:3 tab maain atyant dr gaya. aur raja se kaha
Nehemiah2:4 raja ne mujh se poochha
Nehemiah2:5 yaadi raja ko bhaa
Nehemiah2:6 tab raja ne jisake pas ranee bhee baaittee thee
Nehemiah2:7 fir maain ne raja se kaha
Nehemiah2:8 aur sarakaree jangal ke rakhvale asap ke liye bhee is ashay kee chitthee mujhe dee jaae taaki vah mujhe bhvan se lage huae rajagaddh kee kaadiyon ke liye
Nehemiah2:9 tab maain ne mahanad ke par ke adhaipaatiyon ke pas jakar unhen raja kee chitthiyan deen. ija ne mere sang senapaati aur savar bhee bheje the.
Nehemiah2:10 yah sunakar ki aek manushy israaaeliyon ke kalyan ka upay karane ko aya haai
Nehemiah2:11 jab maain yarooshalem pahunch gaya
Nehemiah2:12 tab maain thode purushaeen ko lekar rat ko utta maain ne kisee ko naheen bataya ki mere parameshvar ne yarooshalem ke hit ke liye mere man men kya upajaya tha. aur apanee savaree ke pashu ko chhod koi pashu mere sang n tha.
Nehemiah2:13 maain rat ko tarai ke faattk men hokar nikala aur ajagar ke sote kee or
Nehemiah2:14 tab maain age baddhkar sote ke faattk aur raja ke kund ke pas gaya parantu meree savaree ke pashu ke liye age jane ko sthan n tha.
Nehemiah2:15 tab maain rat hee rat nale se hokar shaharapanah ko dekhta hua chaddh gaya fir ghoomakar taii ke faattk se bheetar aya
Nehemiah2:16 aur haakim n janate the ki maain kahan gaya aur kya karata tha varan maain ne tab tak n to yahoodiyon ko kuchh bataya tha aur n yajakon aur n raison aur n hakimon aur n doosare kam karanevalon ko.
Nehemiah2:17 tab maain ne un se kaha
Nehemiah2:18 fir maain ne unako batalaya
Nehemiah2:19 yah sunakar horonee samballat aur tobiyah nam karmacharee jo ammonee tha
Nehemiah2:20 kya tum raja ke viruddh balava karoge? tab maain ne unako uttar dekar un se kaha
Nehemiah3:1 tab aelyashaeeb mahayajak ne apane bhai yajakon samet kamar bandhakar bhedfaattk ko banaya. unhon ne usakee pratishtta kee
Nehemiah3:2 us se age yareeho ke manushyon ne banaya. aur in se age imraee ke putra jakkoor ne banaya.
Nehemiah3:3 fir machhleefaattk ko hassana ke betton ne banaya unhon ne usakee kadiyan lagai
Nehemiah3:4 aur un se age maremot ne jo hakkos ka pota aur uriyah ka putra tha
Nehemiah3:5 aur in se age takoiyon ne marammat kee parantu unake raison ne apane prabhu kee seva ka jooa apanee gardan par n liya.
Nehemiah3:6 fir purane faattk kee marammat paseh ke putra yoyada aur basodayah ke putra mashuullam ne kee unhon ne usakee kadiyan lagai
Nehemiah3:7 aur un se age gibonee malatyah aur meronotee yadon ne aur gibon aur mispa ke manushyon ne mahanad ke par ke aadhaipaati ke sinhasan kee or se marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:8 un se age harhayah ke putra ujeeel ne aur aur sunaron ne marammat kee. aur is se age hananyah ne
Nehemiah3:9 aur un se age hoor ke putra rapayah ne
Nehemiah3:10 aur un se age harumap ke putra yadayah ne apane hee ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur is se age hashabnayah ke putra hattoosh ne marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:11 hareem ke putra maalkaiyah aur pahattoab ke putra hashshoob ne aek aur bhag kee
Nehemiah3:12 is se age yarooshalem ke adho jile ke haakim hallohesh ke putra shalloom ne apanee bettyaien samet marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:13 tarai ke faattk kee marammat hanoon aur janoh ke nivaasiyon ne kee unhon ne usako banaya
Nehemiah3:14 aur koodafaattk kee marammat rekab ke putra maalkaiyah ne kee
Nehemiah3:15 aur sotafaattk kee marammat kolhoje ke putra shalloom ne kee
Nehemiah3:16 usake bad aj ajabook ke putra nahemayah ne jo betasoor ke adho jile ka haakim tha
Nehemiah3:17 isake bad banee ke putra rahoom ne kitane leviyon samet marammat kee. is se age keela ke adho jile ke haakim hashabyah ne apane jile kee or se marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:18 usake bad unake bhaiyon samet keela ke adho jile ke haakim henadad ke putra bavvaai ne marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:19 us se age ek aur bhag kee marammat jo shaharapanah ke mod ke pas shasren ke ghar kee chaddhai ke samhane haai
Nehemiah3:20 fir aek aur bhag kee arthata usee mod se le aelyashaeeb mahayajak ke ghar ke dar tak kee marammat jabbaai ke putra barook ne tan man se kee.
Nehemiah3:21 isake bad aek aur bhag kee arthata aelyashaeeb ke ghar ke dar se le usee ghar ke sire tak kee marammat
Nehemiah3:22 usake bad un yajakon ne marammat kee jo tarai ke manushy the.
Nehemiah3:23 unake bad binyameen aur hashshoob ne apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur inake peechhe ajaryah ne jo maseyah ka putra aur ananyah ka pota tha apane ghar ke pas marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:24 tab aek aur bhag kee
Nehemiah3:25 fir usee mod ke samhane jo uncha gummatt rajabhvan se bahar nikala hua bandeegrah ke angan ke pas haai
Nehemiah3:26 nateen log to opel men poorab kee or jalafaattk ke samhane tak aur bahar nikale huae gummatt tak rahate the.
Nehemiah3:27 padayah ke bad takoiyon ne aek aur bhag kee marammat kee
Nehemiah3:28 fir ghaedafaattk ke upar yajakon ne apane apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:29 inake bad immer ke putra sadok ne apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur tab pooravee faattk ke rakhvale shakanyah ke putra samayah ne marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:30 isake bad sholemyah ke putra hananyah aur salap ke chhttven putra hanoon ne aek aur bhag kee marammat kee. tab berekyah ke putra mashuullam ne apanee kottree ke samhane marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:31 usake bad maalkaiyah ne jo sunar tha natinon aur vyapaariyon ke sthan tak ttharaae huae sthan ke faattk ke samhane aur kone ke kotte tak marammat kee.
Nehemiah3:32 aur konevale kotte se lekar bhedfaattk tak sunaron aur vyapariyon ne marammat kee.
Nehemiah4:1 jab samballat ne suna ki yahoodee log shaharapanah ko bana rahe haai
Nehemiah4:2 vah apane bhaiyon ke aur shaemaron kee sena ke samhane yon kahane laga
Nehemiah4:3 usake pas to ammonee tobiyah tha
Nehemiah4:4 he hamare parameshvar sun le
Nehemiah4:5 aur unaka adharma too n ddhanp
Nehemiah4:6 aur ham logon ne shaharapanah ko banaya aur saree shaharapanah adhaee unchai tak jud gai. kyonaki logon ka man us kam men nit laga raha.
Nehemiah4:7 jab samballat aur tobiyah aur arabiyo
Nehemiah4:8 aur sabhon ne aek man se goshttee kee
Nehemiah4:9 parantu ham logon ne apane parameshvar se praarthna kee
Nehemiah4:10 aur yahoodee kahane lage
Nehemiah4:11 aur hamare shatra kahane lage
Nehemiah4:12 fir jo yahoodee unake as pas rahate the
Nehemiah4:13 is karan maain ne logon ko talavare
Nehemiah4:14 tab maain dekhkar utta
Nehemiah4:15 jab hamare shatrauon ne suna
Nehemiah4:16 aur us din se mere adho sevak to us kam me lage rahe aur adho barchhrie
Nehemiah4:17 shaharapanah ke bananevale aur bojh ke ddhonevale donon bhar uttate the
Nehemiah4:18 aur raj apanee apanee jangha par talavar lattkaae huae banate the. aur narasinge ka foonkanevala mere pas rahata tha.

Nehemiah4:20 isaliye jidhar se narasinga tumhen sunai de
Nehemiah4:21 yon ham kam men lage rahe
Nehemiah4:22 fir usee samay maain ne logon se yah bhee kaha

Nehemiah5:1 tab log aur unakee striayon kee or se unake bhai yahoodiyon ke kiruddh badee chillahatt machee.

Nehemiah9:24 so yah santan jakar usakee adhaikaarin ho gai

Nehemiah13:1 usee din moosa kee pustak logon ko paddhkar sunai gai aur us men yah likha hua mila
Nehemiah13:2 kyonaki unhon ne ann jal lekar israaaeliyon se bhentt naheen kee
Nehemiah13:3 yah vyavastha sunakar
Nehemiah13:4 is se paahile aelyashaeeb yajak jo hamare parameshvar ke bhvan kee kottriyon ka aadhaikaree aur tobiyyah ka sambandhaee tha.
Nehemiah13:5 us ne tobiyyah ke liye ek badee kottree taaiyar kee thee jis men pahile annabaali ka saman aur loban aur patra aur anaj
Nehemiah13:6 parantu maain is samay yarooshalem men naheen tha
Nehemiah13:7 aur maain yarooshalem ko aya
Nehemiah13:8 ise maain ne bahut bura mana

Nehemiah13:11 tab maain ne hakimon ko danttkar kaha
Nehemiah13:12 tab se sab yahoodee anaj

Nehemiah13:16 fir us men soree log rahakar machhlee aur bhanti bhanati ka sauda le akar
Nehemiah13:17 tab maain ne yahooda ke raison ko danttkar kaha

Esther1:1 kshayarsha nam raja ke dinon men ye baten hui yah vahee kshayarsha haai
Esther1:2 unheen dinon men jab kshayarsha raja apanee us rajagaee par virajaman tha jo shooshan nam rajagaddh men thee.
Esther1:3 vahan us ne apane rajy ke teesare varsha men apane sab hakimon aur karmachaariyon kee jevanar kee. faaras aur madaai ke senapati aur praanta- praant ke pradhaan aur haakim usake sammukh a gaae.
Esther1:4 aur vah unhen bahut din varan aek sau assee din tak apane rajaavibhv ka dhan aur apane mahatmy ke anamol padarth dikhata raha.
Esther1:5 itane dinon ke beetane par raja ne kya chhotte ky bade un sabhon kee bhee jo shooshan nam rajagaddh men ikatthe huae the
Esther1:6 vahan ke parde shvet aur neele soot ke the
Esther1:7 us jevanar men raja ke yogy dakhmadha bhainn bhainn roop ke sone ke patron men dalakar raja kee udarata se bahutayat ke sath pilaya jata tha.
Esther1:8 peena to niyam ke anusar hota tha
Esther1:9 ranee bashatee ne bhee raja kshayarsha ke bhvan men striyon kee jevanar kee.
Esther1:10 sataven din
Esther1:11 ki ranee vashatee ko rajamukutt dhaaran kiae huae raja ke sammukh le ao jis se ki desh desh ke logon aur haakimon par usakee sundarata pragatt ho jaae kyonki vah dekhne men sundar thee.
Esther1:12 khojon ke dara raja kee yah agyaa pakar ranee vashatee ne ane se inakar kiya. is par raja bade krodha se jalane laga.
Esther1:13 tab raja ne samay samay ka bhed jananevale panaidton se puchha raja to neeti aur nyay ke sab gyaaaniyon se aeesa hee kiya karata tha.
Esther1:14 aur usake pas karshana
Esther1:15 raja ne poochha ki ranee vashatee ne raja kshayarsha kee khojon dara dilai hui agyaa ka ulanghan kiya
Esther1:16 tab mamookan ne raja aur haakimon kee upasthiaati men uttar diya
Esther1:17 kyonaki ranee ke is kam kee charcha sab striayon men hogee aur jab yah kaha jaaega
Esther1:18 aur aj ke din faarasee aur madee hakimon kee striayan jinhon ne ranee kee yah bat sunee haai to ve bhee raja ke sab haakimon se aeesa hee kahane lagengee is prakar bahut hee gharana aur krodha utpann hoga.
Esther1:19 yaadi raja ko sveekar ho
Esther1:20 aur jab raja kee yah agyaa usake sare rajy men sunai jaaegee

Esther1:22 arthta pratyek praant ke aksharon men aur pratyek jaati kee bhasha men chitthiyan bhejee

Job1:1 uja desh men ayyoob nam ek purush tha vah khra aur seedha tha aur parameshvar ka bhy manata aur burai se pare rahata tha.
Job1:2 usake sat bette aur teen bettyaian utpann hui.
Job1:3 fir usake sat hajar bhed-bakaariya
Job1:4 usake bette upane apane din par ek doosare ke ghar men khane-peene ko jaya karate the aur apanee teenon baahinon ko apane sang khane-peene ke liye bulava bhejate the.
Job1:5 aur jab jab jevanar ke din poore ho jate
Job1:6 aek din yahova parameshvar ke putra usake samhane upaasthiat hua
Job1:7 yahova ne shautan se poochha
Job1:8 yahova ne shautan se poochha
Job1:9 shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya
Job1:10 kya too ne usakee
Job1:11 parantu ab apana hath baddhakar jo kuchh usaka haai
Job1:12 yahova ne shautan se kaha
Job1:13 aek din ayyoob ke bette-bettyaian bade bhai ke ghar men khate aur dakhmadha pee rahe the
Job1:14 tab aek doot ayyoob ke pas akar kahane laga
Job1:15 ki shaba ke log dhaava karake unako le gaa
Job1:16 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha ki doosara bhee akar kahane laga
Job1:17 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha
Job1:18 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha
Job1:19 ki jangal kee or se badee prachand vayu chalee
Job1:20 tab ayyoob utta
Job1:21 maain apanee man ke pett se nanga nikala aur vaheen nanga lautt jaunga yahova ne diya aur yahova hee ne liya yahova ka nam dhany haai.
Job1:22 in sab baton men bhee ayyoob ne n to pap kiya
Job2:1 fir aek aur din yahova parameshvar ke putra usake samhane upaasthiat hua
Job2:2 yahova ne shautan se poochha
Job2:3 yahova ne shautan se poochha
Job2:4 shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya
Job2:5 so keval apana hath baddhakar usakee haaddiyan aur mans cho
Job2:6 yahova ne shautan se kaha
Job2:7 tab shautan yahova ke samhane se nikala
Job2:8 tab ayyoob khujalane ke liye aek tteekara lekar rakh par baaitt gaya.
Job2:9 tab usakee sree us se kahane lagee
Job2:10 us ne us se kaha

Job3:2 aur kahane laga

Job3:4 vah din andhiayara ho jaae! upar se ishvar usakee sudhai n le
Job3:5 aandhiayara aur mratyu kee chhaya us par rahe. badal us par chhaae rahen aur din ko andhora kar denevalee cheejon use draaen.

Job6:1 fir ayyoob ne kaha
Job6:2 bhla hota ki mera khed taula jata

Job6:4 kyonaki sarvashaktaiman ke teer mere andar chubhe haain aur unaka vish meree atma men baaitt gaya haai ishvar kee bhyankar bat mere viruddh panti bandho haain.

Job6:7 jin vastuon ko maain choona bhee naheen chahata vahee mano mere liye ghainauna ahar ttharee haain.
Job6:8 bhla hota ki mujhe munh manga var milata aur jis bat kee maain asha karata hoo vah ishvar mujhe de deta!

Job6:10 yahee meree shaantai ka karan varan bharee peeda men bhee maain is karan se uchhl padta kyonaki maain ne us paavitra ke vachanon ka kabhee inkar naheen kiya.

Job6:15 mere bhai nale ke saman vishvasaghaatee ho gaae haai
