Job14:1 manushy jo sree se utmann hota haai
Job14:2 vah fool kee nai khailata
Job14:3 fir kya too aeese par drashtti lagata haai? kya too mujhe apane sath kachaharee men ghaseettta haai?
Job14:4 ashuuddh vastu se shuuddh vastu ko kaun nikal sakata haai? koi naheen.
Job14:5 manushy ke din niyukt kiae gaae haai
Job14:6 is karan us se apana munh faer le
Job14:7 vuksha kee to asha rahatee haai
Job14:8 chahe usakee jad boomi men puranee bhee ho jaa
Job14:9 taubhee vashara kee gandha pakar vah fir panapega
Job14:10 parantu purush mar jata
Job14:11 jaaise neel nadee ka jal ghatt jata haai
Job14:12 vaaise hee manushy lett jata aur fir naheen uttta jab tak akash bana rahega tab tak vah n jagega
Job14:13 bhla hota ki too mujhe adhaelok men chhpai leta
Job14:14 yaadi manushy mar jaae to kya vah fir jeevit hoga? jab tak mera choottkara n hota tab tak maain apanee kaattnai seva ke sare din asha lagaae rahata.
Job14:15 too mujhe bulata
Job14:16 parantu ab too mere pag pag ko ginata haai
Job14:17 mere aparadha chhap lagee hui thailee men haai
Job14:18 aur nishchay pahad bhee girate girate nash ho jata haai
Job14:19 aur patthr jal se ghais jate haai
Job14:20 too sada us par prabal hota
Job14:21 usake putraen kee badai hotee haai
Job14:22 keval apane hee karan usakee deee ko dukh hota haai aur apane hee karan usaka praan andar hee andar shaeakit rahata haai.
Job15:1 tab temanee aeleepaj ne kaha
Job15:2 kya buddhiman ko uchit haai ki agyaanata ke sath uttar de
Job15:3 kya vah nishfal vachanon se
Job15:4 varan too bhy manana chhod deta
Job15:5 too apane munh se apana adharma pragatt karata haai
Job15:6 maain to naheen parantu tera munh hee tujhe doshaee ttharata haai aur tere hee vachan tere viruddh sakshaee dete haain.
Job15:7 kya pahila matushy too hee utpann hua? kya teree utpattai pahadon se bhee paahile hui?
Job15:8 kya too ishvar kee sabha men baaitta sunata tha? kya buddhi ka tteeka too hee ne le rakha haai?
Job15:9 too aeesa kya janata haai jise ham naheen janate? tujh men aeesee kaun see samajh haai jo ham men naheen?
Job15:10 ham logon men to pakke balavale aur aati puraaniye manushy haai
Job15:11 ishvar kee shaantaidayak bate
Job15:12 tera man kyon tujhe kheench le jata haai? aur too ankh se kyon saain karata haai?
Job15:13 too bhee apanee atma ishvar ke viruddh karata haai
Job15:14 manushy haai kya ki vah nishkalank ho? aur jo sree se utpann hua vah haai kya ki nidash ho sake?
Job15:15 dek
Job15:16 fir manushy adhaik ghainauna aur maleen haai jo kuattlaita ko panee kee nai peeta haai.
Job15:17 maain tujhe samajha doonga
Job15:18 ve hee baten jo buddhimanon ne apane purakhaon se sunakar bina chhpaiaae bataya haai.
Job15:19 keval unheen ko desh diya gaya tha
Job15:20 dushtt jan jeevan bhr peeda se tadpata haai
Job15:21 usake kan men dravana shabd goonjata rahata haai
Job15:22 use andhiyare men se fir nikalane kee kuchh asha naheen hotee
Job15:23 vah rottee ke liye mara mara firata haai
Job15:24 sankatt aur durghattna se asako dr lagata rahata haai
Job15:25 us ne to ishvar ke viruddh hath baddhaya haai
Job15:26 aur sir uttakar aur apanee mottee mottee ddhalen dikhata hua ghamand se us par dhaava karata haai
Job15:27 isaliye ki usake munh par chikanai chha gai haai
Job15:28 aur vah ujade huae nagaron men bas gaya haai
Job15:29 vah dhanee n rahega
Job15:30 vah aandhiayare se kabhee n nikalega
Job15:31 vah apane ko dhaekha dekar vyarth baton ka bhrosa n kare
Job15:32 vah usake niyat din se pahile poora ho jaaega usakee daliyan haree n rahengee.
Job15:33 dakh kee nai usake kachche fal jhd jaaenge
Job15:34 kyonaki bhktaiheen ke paarivar se kuchh ban n padega
Job15:35 unake upadrav ka pett rahata
Job16:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha
Job16:2 aeesee bahut see baten maain sun chuka hoo
Job16:3 kya vyarth baton ka ant kabhee hoga? too kaun see bat se jhdikakar uttar deta.
Job16:4 jo tumharee dasha meree see hotee
Job16:5 varan maain apane vachanon se tum ko hiyav dilata
Job16:6 chahe maain boloon taubhee mera shaek n ghattega
Job16:7 parantu ab us ne pujhe ukata diya haai us ne mere sare parivar ko ujad dala haai.
Job16:8 aur us ne jo mere shareer ko sukha dala haai
Job16:9 us ne krodha men akar mujh ko faada aur mere peechhe pada haai vah mere viruddh dant peesata aur mera vaairee mujh ko ankhen dikhata haai.
Job16:10 ab log mujh par munh pasarate haai
Job16:11 ishvar ne mujhe kuttlaien ke vash men kar diya
Job16:12 maain sukh se rahata tha
Job16:13 usake teer mere charon or ud rahe haai
Job16:14 vah shoor kee nai mujh par dhaava karake mujhe chott par chott pahunchakar ghaayal karata haai.
Job16:15 maain ne apanee khal par ttatt ko see liya haai
Job16:16 rote rote mera munh sooj gaya haai
Job16:17 taubhee mujh se koi upadrav naheen hua haai
Job16:18 he prathvee
Job16:19 ab bhee svarga men mera sakshaee haai
Job16:20 mere mitra mujh se gharana karate haai
Job16:21 ki koi ishvar ke viruddh sajjan ka
Job16:22 kyonaki thode hee vashan ke beetane par maain us marga se chala jaunga
Job17:1 mera praan nash hua chahata haai
Job17:2 nishchay jo mere sang haain vah ttttha karanevale haai
Job17:3 jamanat de apane aur mere beech men too hee jamin ho kaun haai jo mere hath par hath mare?
Job17:4 too ne inaka man samajhne se roka haai
Job17:5 jo apane mitraen ko chugalee khakar lootta deta
Job17:6 us ne aeesa kiya ki sab log meree upama dete haain aur log mere munh par tookate haain.
Job17:7 khed ke mare meree ankhon men ghaunghalapan chha gaya haai
Job17:8 ise dekhkar seedho log chaakit hote haai
Job17:9 taubhee dhama log apana marga pakade rahenge
Job17:10 tum sab ke sab mere pas ao to ao
Job17:11 mere din to beet chuke
Job17:12 ve rat ko din ttharate ve kahate haai
Job17:13 yaadi meree ash yah ho ki adhaelok mera dhaam hoga
Job17:14 yaadi maain ne sadahatt se kaha ki too mera pita haai
Job17:15 to meree asha kahan rahee? aur meree asha kis ke dekhne men aaegee?
Job17:16 vah to adhaelok men utar jaaegee
Job18:1 tab shoohee bildad ne kaha
Job18:2 tum kab tak fande laga lagakar vachan pakadte rahoge? chitt lagao
Job18:3 ham log tumharee drashtti men kyon pashu ke tuly samajhe jate
Job18:4 he apane ko krodha men faadnevale kya tere nimitt prathvee ujad jaaegee
Job18:5 taubhee dushtton ka deepak bujh jaaega
Job18:6 usake dere men ka ujiyala andhora ho jaega
Job18:7 usake bade bade faal chhotte ho jaenge aur vah apanee hee yuktai ke dara girega.
Job18:8 vah apana hee panv jal men fansaaega
Job18:9 usakee edee fande men fans jaegee
Job18:10 fande kee raassaiyan usake liye boomi me
Job18:11 charon or se dravanee vastuaen use draaengee aur usake peechhe padkar usako bhgaaengee.
Job18:12 usaka bal dukh se ghatt jaega
Job18:13 vah usake ang ko kha jaaegee
Job18:14 apane jis dere ka bhrosa vah karata haai
Job18:15 jo usake yahan ka naheen haai vah usake dere men vas karega
Job18:16 usakee jad to sookh jaegee
Job18:17 prathvee par se usaka smaran mitt jaaega
Job18:18 vah ujiyale se andhiayare men ddhkel diya jaaega
Job18:19 usake kuttumbaiyon men usake koi putrapautra n rahega
Job18:20 usaka din dekhkar poorabee log chaakit honge
Job18:21 nisandeh kuattlai logon ke nivas aeese ho jate haai
Job19:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha
Job19:2 tum kab tak mere praan ko dukh dete rahoge aur baton se mujhe choor choor karoge?
Job19:3 in dason bar tum log meree ninda hee karate rahe
Job19:4 man liya ki mujh se bool hui
Job19:5 yaadi tum sachamuch mere viruddh apanee badai karate ho aur praman dekar meree tinda karate ho
Job19:6 to yah jan lo ki ishvar ne mujhe gira diya haai
Job19:7 dekho
Job19:8 us ne mere marga ko aeesa roondha haai ki maain age chal naheen sakata
Job19:9 mera vibhv us ne har liya haai
Job19:10 us ne charon or se mujhe tod diya
Job19:11 us ne mujh par apana krodha bhdkaya haai aur apane shatrauon men mujhe ginata haai.
Job19:12 usake dal ikatthe hokar mere viruddh morcha bandhate haai
Job19:13 us ne mere bhaiyon ko mujh se door kiya haai
Job19:14 mere kuttunbee mujhe chhod gaae haai
Job19:15 jo mere ghar men raha karate the
Job19:16 jab maain apane das ko bulata hoo
Job19:17 meree sans meree sree ko aur meree gandha mere bhaiyon kee drashtti men ghainaunee lagatee haai.
Job19:18 ladke bhee mujhe tuchchh janate haain aur jab maain uttne lagata
Job19:19 mere sab param mitra mujh se desh rakhte haai
Job19:20 meree khal aur mans meree haddiyon se satt gaae haai
Job19:21 he mere mitrae! mujh par daya karo
Job19:22 tum ishvar kee nai kyon mere peechhe pade ho? aur mere mans se kyon trapt naheen hue?
Job19:23 bhla hota
Job19:24 aur lohe kee ttankee aur shaeesho se ve sada ke liye chattan par khodee jateen.
Job19:25 mujhe to nishchay haai
Job19:26 aur apanee khal ke is prakar nash ho jane ke bad bhee
Job19:27 usaka darshan maain ap apanee ankhon se apane liye karoonga
Job19:28 taubhee mujh men to dharma ka mool paya jata haai! aur tum jo kahate ho ham isako kyonkar sataaen!
Job19:29 to tum talavar se dro
Job20:1 tab namatee sopar ne kaha
Job20:2 mera jee chahata haai ki uttar doo
Job20:3 maain ne aeesee chitaunee sunee jis se meree ninda hui
Job20:4 kya too yah niyam naheen janata jo praacheen aur us samay ka haai
Job20:5 ki dushtton ka talee bajana jaldee band ho jata aur bhaktaiheenon ka anand pal bhr ka hota haai?
Job20:6 chahe aeese manushy ka mahatmy akash tak pahunch jaa
Job20:7 taubhee vah apanee vishtta kee nai sada ke liye nash ho jaaega aur jo usako dekhte the ve poochhenge ki vah kahan raha?
Job20:8 vah svapn kee nai lop ho jaaega aur kisee ko fir n milega rat men dekhe huae roop kee nai vah rahane n paaega.
Job20:9 jis ne usako dekha ho fir use n dekhega
Job20:10 usake ladkebale kangalon se bhee binatee karenge
Job20:11 usakee haaddiyon men javanee ka bal bhra hua haai parantu vah usee ke sath mittee men mil jaega.
Job20:12 chahe burai usako meettee lage
Job20:13 aur vah use bacha rakhe aur n chhode
Job20:14 taubhee usaka bhojan usake pett men palattega
Job20:15 us ne jo dhan nigal liya haai use vah fir ugal dega ishvar use usake pett men se nikal dega.
Job20:16 vah nagon ka vish choos lega
Job20:17 vah naadiyon arthata madha aur dahee kee naadiyon ko dekhne n paaega.
Job20:18 jisake liye us ne paarishram kiya
Job20:19 kyonaki us ne kangalon ko peesakar chhod diya
Job20:20 lalasa ke mare usako kabhee shaantai naheen milatee thee
Job20:21 koi vastu usaka kaur bina huae n bachatee thee isaliye usaka kushal bana n rahega
Job20:22 pooree sampaattai rahate bhee vah saketee men padega tab sab dukhaiyon ke hath us par uttenge.
Job20:23 aeesa hoga
Job20:24 vah lohe ke hathaiyar se bhagega
Job20:25 vah us teer ko kheenchakar apane pett se nikalega
Job20:26 usake gade huae dhan par ghaer andhakar chha jaega. vah aeesee ag se bhsm hoga
Job20:27 akash usaka athrma pragatt karega
Job20:28 usake ghar kee baddhtee jatee rahegee
Job20:29 parameshvar kee or se dushtt manushy ka ansha
Job21:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha
Job21:2 chitt lagakar meree bat suno aur tumharee shaaantai yahee tthare.
Job21:3 meree kuchh to saho
Job21:4 kya maain kisee manushy kee dohai deta hoo? fir maain adhaeer kyon n houn?
Job21:5 meree or chitt lagakar chaakit ho
Job21:6 jab maain smaran karata tab maain ghabara jata hoo
Job21:7 kya karan haai ki dushtt log jeeavit rahate haai
Job21:8 unakee santan unake sang
Job21:9 unake ghar men bhyaraahit kushal rahata haai
Job21:10 unaka sand gaabhain karata aur chookata nahee
Job21:11 ve apane ladkon ko jhund ke jhund bahar jane dete haai
Job21:12 ve dfa aur veena bajate huae gate
Job21:13 ve apane din sukh se bitate
Job21:14 taubhee ve ishvar se kahate the
Job21:15 sarvashaaktaiman kya haai
Job21:16 dekho
Job21:17 kitanee bar dushtton ka deepak bujh jata haai
Job21:18 aur ve vayu se udaae huae boose kee
Job21:19 ishvar usake adharma ka dand usake ladkebalon ke liye rakh chhodta haai
Job21:20 dushtt apana nash apanee hee ankhon se dekhe
Job21:21 kyonaki jab usake maheenon kee ginatee katt chukee
Job21:22 kya ishvar ko koi gyaan sikhaaega? vah to unche pad par rahanevalon ka bhee nyay karata haai.
Job21:23 koi to apane poore bal men bade chaain aur sukh se rahata hua mar jata haai.
Job21:24 usakee dohaniyan doodha se aur usakee haaddiyan goode se bhree rahatee haain.
Job21:25 aur koi apane jeev men kuddh kuddhkar bina sukh bhoge mar jata haai.
Job21:26 ve donon barabar mittee men mil jate haai
Job21:27 dekho
Job21:28 tum kahate to ho ki rais ka ghar kahan raha? dushtton ke nivas ke dere kahan rahe?
Job21:29 parantu kya tum ne battohiyon se kabhee naheen poochha? kya tum unake is vishay ke pramanon se anajan ho
Job21:30 ki vipaattai ke din ke liye durjan rakha jata haai aur mahapralay ke samay ke liye aeese log bachaae jate haain?
Job21:31 usakee chal usake munh par kaun kahega? aur us ne jo kiya haai
Job21:32 taubhee vah kabra ko pahunchaya jata haai
Job21:33 nale ke ddhele usako sukhdayak lagate haain aur jaaise poorvakal ke log anaginit ja chuke
Job21:34 tumhare uttaron men to joott hee paya jata haai
Job22:1 tab temanee aeleepaj ne kaha
Job22:2 kya purush se ishvar ko labh pahunch sakata haai? jo buaddhiman haai
Job22:3 kya tere dhama hone se sarvashaaktaiman sukh pa sakata haai? teree chal kee khrai se kya use kuchh labh ho sakata haai?
Job22:4 vah to tujhe danttta haai
Job22:5 kya teree burai bahut naheen? tere adharma ke kamon ka kuchh ant naheen.
Job22:6 too ne to apane bhai ka bandhak akaran rakh liya haai
Job22:7 thke huae ko too ne panee n pilaya
Job22:8 jo balavan tha usee ko boomi milee
Job22:9 too ne vidhavaon ko choochhe hath lautta diya. aur anathon kee bahen tod dalee gai.
Job22:10 is karan tere charon or fande lage haai
Job22:11 kya too andhiayare ko naheen dekhta
Job22:12 kya ishvar svarga ke unche sthan men naheen haai? unche se unche taron ko dekh ki ve kitane unche haain..
Job22:13 fir too kahata haai ki ishvar kya janata haai? kya vah ghaer andhakar kee ad men hokar nyay karega?
Job22:14 kalee ghattaon se vah aeesa chhpai rahata haai ki vah kuchh naheen dekh sakata
Job22:15 kya too us purane raste ko pakade rahega
Job22:16 ve apane samay se pahale utta liae gaae aur unake ghar kee nev nadee baha le gai.
Job22:17 unhon ne ishvar se kaha tha
Job22:18 taubhee us ne unake ghar achchhe achchhe padathnse bhr diae-- parantu dushtt logon ka vichar mujh se door rahe.
Job22:19 dhama leg dekhkar anaandait hote haain aur nidash log unakee hansee karate haai
Job22:20 jo hamare viruddh utte the
Job22:21 us se melamilap kar tab tujhe shaaantai milegee aur is se teree bhlai hogee.
Job22:22 usake munh se shaiksha sun le
Job22:23 yaadi too sarvashaktaiman kee or firake sameep jaa
Job22:24 too apanee anamol vastuon ko dhooli par
Job22:25 tab sarvashaaktaiman ap teree anamol vastu aur tere liye chamakeelee chandee hoga.
Job22:26 tab too sarvashaaktaiman se sukh paaega
Job22:27 aur too us se praarthna karega
Job22:28 jo bat too ttane vah tujh se ban bhee padegee
Job22:29 chahe durbhagy ho taubhee too kahega ki subhagy hoga
Job22:30 varan jo nidash n ho usako bhee vah bachata haai tere shuuddh kamon ke karan too chhudaya jaaega.
Job23:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha
Job23:2 meree kudkudahatt ab bhee naheen ruk sakatee
Job23:3 bhla hota
Job23:4 maain usake samhane apana mukama pesh karata
Job23:5 maain jan leta ki vah mujh se uttar men kya kah sakata haai
Job23:6 kya vah apana bada bal dikhakar mujh se mukama ladta? nahee
Job23:7 sajjan us se vivad kar sakate
Job23:8 dekho
Job23:9 jab vah bai or kam karata haai tab vah mujhe dikhai naheen deta vah to dahinee or aeesa chhpai jata haai
Job23:10 parantu vah janata haai
Job23:11 mere paair usake magan men sthiar rahe aur maain usee ka marga bina mude thame raha.
Job23:12 usakee agyaa ka palan karane se maain n hatta
Job23:13 parantu vah aek hee bat par ada rahata haai
Job23:14 jo kuchh mere liye us ne ttana haai
Job23:15 is karan maain usake sammukh ghabara jata hoo jab maain sochata hoo tab us se thrathra uttta hoo.
Job23:16 kyonaki mera man ishvar hee ne kachcha kar diya
Job23:17 isaliye ki maain is andhayare se paahile katt dala n gaya
Job24:1 sarvashaaktaiman ne samay kyon naheen ttharaya
Job24:2 kuchh log boomi kee seema ko baddhate
Job24:3 ve anathon ka gadaha hank le jate
Job24:4 ve daaridra logon ko marga se hatta dete
Job24:5 dekho
Job24:6 unako khet men chara kattna
Job24:7 rat ko unhen bina vasr nange pade rahana aur jade ke samay bina oddhe pade rahana padta haai.
Job24:8 ve pahadon par kee jhdiyon se bheege rahate
Job24:9 kuchh log anath balak ko ma kee chhatee par se chheen lete haai
Job24:10 jis se ve bina vasr nange firate haain aur bookh ke mare
Job24:11 ve unakee bheeton ke bheetar tel perate aur unake kundon men dakh raundate huae bhee pyase rahate haain.
Job24:12 ve bade nagar men karahate haai
Job24:13 fir kuchh log ujiyale se baair rakhte
Job24:14 koonee
Job24:15 vyabhaicharee yah sochakar ki koi mujh ko dekhne n paa
Job24:16 ve aandhiayare ke samay gharon men sendha marate aur din ko chhpai rahate haain ve ujiyale ko janate bhee naheen.
Job24:17 isaliye un sabhon ko bhor ka prakash ghaer andhakar sa jan padta haai
Job24:18 ve jal ke upar halakee vastu ke sareekhe haai
Job24:19 jaaise sookhe aur ghaam se him ka jal sookh jata haai vaaise hee papee log adhaelok men sookh jate haain.
Job24:20 mata bhee usako bool jatee
Job24:21 vah banjh sree ko jo kabhee naheen janee loottta
Job24:22 balatkariyon ko bhee ishvar apanee shaaktai se kheench leta haai
Job24:23 unhen aeese bekhttke kar deta haai
Job24:24 ve baddhte haai
Job24:25 kya yah sab sach naheen! kaun mujhe jhuttlaaega? kaun meree baten nikammee ttharaaega?
Job25:1 tab shoohee bildad ne kaha
Job25:2 prabhuta karana aur drana yah usee ka kam haai vah apane unche unche sthanon men shaantai rakhta haai.
Job25:3 kya usakee senaon kee ginatee ho sakatee? aur kaun haai jis par usaka prakash naheen padta?
Job25:4 fir manushy ishvar kee drashtti men dhama kyonkar tthar sakata haai? aur jo sree se utpann hua haai vah kyonkar nirmal ho sakata haai?
Job25:5 dek
Job25:6 fir manushy kee kya ginatee jo keeda haai
Job26:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha
Job26:2 nirbal jan kee too ne kya hee badee sahayata kee
Job26:3 nirbuaddhi manushy ko too ne kya hee achchhee sammaati dee
Job26:4 too ne kisake hit ke liye baten kahee? aur kisake man kee baten tere munh se nikaleen?
Job26:5 bahut din ke mare huae log bhee jalaanidhai aur usake nivaasiyon ke tale tadpate haain.
Job26:6 adhaelok usake samhane udhada rahata haai
Job26:7 vah uttar disha ko niradhaar faailaae rahata haai
Job26:8 vah jal ko apanee kalee ghattaon men bandha rakhta
Job26:9 vah apane sinhasan ke samhane badal faailakar usako chhpaiaae rakhta haai.
Job26:10 ujiyale aur andhiayare ke beech jahan sivana bandha haai
Job26:11 usakee ghaudkee se akash ke khmbhe thrathrakar chaakit hote haain.
Job26:12 vah apane bal se samudra ko uchhalata
Job26:13 usakee atma se akashamandl svachchh ho jata haai
Job26:14 dekho
Job27:1 ayyoob ne aur bhee apanee gooddh bat uttai aur kaha
Job27:2 maain ishvar ke jeevan kee shapath khata hoo jis ne mera nyay bigad diya
Job27:3 kyonaki ab tak meree sans barabar atee haai
Job27:4 maain yah kahata hoo ki mere munh se koi kuattlai bat n nikalegee
Job27:5 ishvar n kare ki maain tum logon ko sachcha ttharau
Job27:6 maain apana dharma pakade huae hoo aur usako hath se jane n doonga kyonaki mera man jeevan bhr mujhe doshaee naheen ttharaaega.
Job27:7 mera shatra dushtton ke saman
Job27:8 jab ishvar bhaktaiheen manushy ka praan le le

Psalms11:3 yaadi neven ddha dee jaaen to dharmee kya kar sakata haai?
Psalms11:4 parameshvar apane paavitra bhvan men haai parameshvar ka sinhasan svarga men haai usakee ankhen manushy kee santan ko nit dekhtee rahatee haain aur usakee palaken unako janchatee haain.
Psalms11:5 yahova dharmeen ko parakhta haai
Psalms11:6 vah dushtton par fande barasaaega ag aur gandhak aur prachand looh unake kattoron men bantt dee jaaengee.
Psalms11:7 kyonaki yahova dharmee haai

Psalms18:8 usake nathnon se dhauan nikala
Psalms18:9 aur vah svarga ko neeche jhukakar utar aya aur usake panvon tale ghaer andhakar tha.
Psalms18:10 aur vah karoob par savar hokar uda
Psalms18:11 us ne aandhiayare ko apane chhpaine ka sthan aur apane charon or meghaen ke andhakar aur akash kee kalee ghattaon ka mandp banaya.

Psalms18:19 aur us ne mujhe nikalakar chaude sthan men pahunchaya

Psalms18:25 dayavant ke sath too apane ko dayavant dikhata aur khre puroosh ke sath too apane ko khra dikhata haai.
Psalms18:26 shuuddh ke sath too apane ko shuuddh dikhata

Psalms18:28 ha
Psalms18:29 kyonaki teree sahayata se maain sena par dhaava karata hoon aur apane parameshvar kee sahayata se shaharapanah ko langha jata hoon.

Psalms18:34 vah mere hathon ko yuddh karana sikhata haai

Psalms18:39 kyonaki too ne yuddh ke liye meree kamar men shaaktai ka pattuka bandha haai aur mere virodhaiyon ko mere sammukh neecha kar diya.
Psalms18:40 too ne mere shatrauon kee peett meree or faer dee

Psalms28:9 he yahova apanee praja ka uddhar kar
Psalms29:1 he parameshvar ke putraen yahova ka
Psalms29:2 yahova ke nam kee maahima karo pavitrata se shaebhayaman hokar yahova ko dandvata karo.
Psalms29:3 yahova kee vanee meghaen ke upar sun padtee haai pratamee ishvar garajata haai
Psalms29:4 yahova kee vanee shaktaishaalee haai
Psalms29:5 yahova kee vanee devadaron ko tod dalatee haai yahova labanon ke devadaron ko bhee tod dalata haai.
Psalms29:6 vah unhen bachhde kee nai aur labanon aur shairyon ko jangalee bachhde ke saman uchhalata haai..
Psalms29:7 yahova kee vanee ag kee lapatton ko cheeratee haai.
Psalms29:8 yahova kee vanee van ko hila detee haai
Psalms29:9 yahova kee vanee se harinaiyon ka garbhpat ho jata haai. aur arany men patajhd hotee haai aur usake mandair men sab koi maahima hee maahima bolata rahata haai..
Psalms29:10 jalapralay ke samay yahova virajaman tha aur yahova sarvada ke liye raja hokar virajaman rahata haai.
Psalms29:11 yahova apanee praja ko bal dega yahova apanee praja ko shaaantai kee ashaeesh dega..

Psalms31:2 apana kan meree or lagakar turant mujhe chhuda le!
Psalms31:3 kyonaki too ne mere liye chattan aur mera gaddh haai isaliye apane nam ke nimitt meree aguvai kar

Psalms31:5 maain apanee atma ko tere hee hath men saunp deta hoon he yahova
Psalms31:6 jo vyarth vastuon par man lagate haai

Psalms31:8 aur too ne mujhe shatra ke hath men padne naheen diya too ne mere panvon ko chaude sthan men khda kiya haai..

Psalms31:13 maain ne bahuton ke munh se apana apavad suna
Psalms31:14 parantu he yahova maain ne to tujhee par bhrosa rakha haai
Psalms31:15 mere din tere hath men haai too mujhe mere shatrauon aur mere satanevalon ke hath se chhuda.

Psalms31:22 maain ne to ghabarakar kaha tha ki maain yahova kee draashtti se door ho gaya. taubhee jab maain ne teree dohai dee

Ecclesiastes8:2 maain tujhe sammaati deta hoon ki parameshvar kee shapath ke karan raja kee agyaa mana.

Ecclesiastes8:4 kyonaki raja ke vachan men to samathrya rahatee haai

Ecclesiastes8:6 kyonaki har aek vishay ka samay aur niyam hota haai
Ecclesiastes8:7 vah naheen janata ki kya honevala haai
Ecclesiastes8:8 aeesa koi manushy naheen jisaka vash praan par chale ki vah use nikalate samay rok le

Ecclesiastes8:11 bure kam ke dand kee agyaa faurtee se naheen dee jatee is karan manushyon ka man bura kam karane kee ichchha se bhra rahata haai.

Isaiah1:22 tere dakhmadha men panee mil gaya haai.

Isaiah1:25 aur maain tum par hath baddhakar tumhara dhaatu ka maail pooree reeati se door karoonga.

Isaiah5:1 ab maain apane piry ke liye aur usakee dakh kee baree ke vishay men geet gaunga: aek ati upaja tteele par mere piry kee aek dakh kee baree thee.
Isaiah5:2 us ne usakee mittee khodee aur usake patthr beenakar us men uttm jaati kee ek dakhlata lagai usake beech men us ne ek gummatt banaya
Isaiah5:3 ab he yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon aur he yahooda ke manushyo
Isaiah5:4 meree dakh kee baree ke liye aur kya karana rah gaya jo maain ne usake liye n kiya ho? fir kya karan haai ki jab maain ne dakh kee asha kee tab us men nikammee dakhen lageen?
Isaiah5:5 ab maain tum ko jatata hoon ki apanee dakh kee baree se kya karoonga. maain usake kanttevale bade ko ukhad doonga ki vah chatt kee jaa
Isaiah5:6 maain use ujad doonga vah n to fir chhanttee aur n khodee jaaegee aur us men bhanti bhanati ke katteele ped ugenge maain meghaen ko bhee agyaa doonga ki us par jal n barasaaen..
Isaiah5:7 kyonaki senaon ke yahova kee dakh kee baree israael ka gharana
Isaiah5:8 hay un par jo ghar se ghar
Isaiah5:9 senaon ke yahova ne mere sunate kaha haai: nishchay bahut se ghar sunasan ho jaaenge
Isaiah5:10 kyonaki das beegho kee dakh kee baree se aek hee bat dakhmadha milega
Isaiah5:11 hay un par jo bade tadke uttkar maadira peene lagate haain aur badee rat tak dakhmadha peete rahate haain jab tak unako garmee n chaddh jaae!
Isaiah5:12 unakee jevanaron men veena
Isaiah5:13 isaliye agyaanata ke karan meree praja bandhauai men jatee haai
Isaiah5:14 isaliye adhaelok ne atyant lalasa karake apana munh bepaariman pasara haai
Isaiah5:15 sadhaaran manushy dabaae jate aur bade manushy neeche kiae jate haai
Isaiah5:16 parantu senaon ka yahova nyay karane ke karan mahan ttharata
Isaiah5:17 tab bhedon ke bachche mano apane khet men charenge
Isaiah5:18 hay un par jo adharma ko anarth kee raassaiyon se aur pap ko mano gadee ke rasse se kheench le ate haai
Isaiah5:19 jo kahate haai
Isaiah5:20 hay un par jo bure ko bhla aur bhle ko bura kahate
Isaiah5:21 hay un par jo apanee draashtti men gyaanee aur apane lekhe buddhmaian haain!
Isaiah5:22 hay un par jo dakhmadha peene men veer aur maadira ko tej banane men bahadur haai
Isaiah5:23 jo ghoos lekar dushtton ko nirdosha
Isaiah5:24 is karan jaaise agnai kee lau se koonttee bhsm hotee haai aur sookhee ghaas jalakar baaitt jatee haai
Isaiah5:25 is karan yahova ka krodha apanee praja par bhdka haai
Isaiah5:26 vah door door kee jaatiyon ke liye jhnda khda karega
Isaiah5:27 un men koi thka naheen n koi ttokar khata haai koi unghane va sonevala nahee
Isaiah5:28 unake teer chokhe aur dhanush chaddhaae huae haai
Isaiah5:29 ve sinh va javan sinh kee nai garajate haain ve gurrakar aher ko pakad lete aur usako le bhagate haai
Isaiah5:30 us samay ve un par samudra ke garjan kee nai garjenge aur yaadi koi desh kee or dekhe
Isaiah6:1 jis varsha ujjaiyyah raja mara
Isaiah6:2 us se unche par sarap dikhai die unake chh: chh: pankh the do pankhon se ve apane munh ko ddhanpe the aur do se apane panvon ko
Isaiah6:3 aur ve aek doosare se pukar pukarakar kah rahe the: senaon ka yahova paavitra
Isaiah6:4 aur pukaranevale ke shabd se devaddhiyon kee neven dol uttee

Isaiah6:6 tab aek sarap hath men angara liae hua

Isaiah6:9 us ne kaha

Isaiah6:11 tab maain ne poochha
Isaiah6:12 aur yahova manushyon ko us men se door kar de
Isaiah6:13 chahe usake nivaasiyon ka dasavan ansh bhee rah jaa
Isaiah7:1 yahooda ka raja ahaj jo yotam ka putra aur ujjaiyyah ka pota tha
Isaiah7:2 jab daud ke gharane ko yah samachar mila ki araamiyon ne aepraaiamiyon se saandhi kee haai
Isaiah7:3 tab yahova ne yashaayah se kaha
Isaiah7:4 aur us se kah
Isaiah7:5 kyanaki araamiyon aur ramalyah ke putra samet aepraaimiyon ne yah kahakar tere virooddh buree yuktai ttanee haai ki ao
Isaiah7:6 ham yahooda par chaddhai karake usako ghabara de
Isaiah7:7 isaliye prabhu yahova ne yah kaha haai ki yah yuktai n to safal hogee aur n pooree.
Isaiah7:8 kyeanki aram ka sir damishk
Isaiah7:9 paainsatt varsha ke bheetar aepraaim ka bal itana toott jaaega ki vah jati banee n rahegee. yadi tum log is bat kee prateeati n karo to nishchay tum sthiar n rahoge..
Isaiah7:10 fir yahova ne ahaj se kaha
Isaiah7:11 apane parameshvar yahova se koi chinh manga chahe vah gahire sthan ka ho
Isaiah7:12 ahaj ne kaha
Isaiah7:13 tab us ne kaha
Isaiah7:14 is karan prabhu ap hee tum ko aek chinh dega. suno
Isaiah7:15 aur jab tak vah bure ko tyagana aur bhle ko grahan karana n jane tab tak vah makkhn aur madha khaaega.
Isaiah7:16 kyonaki us se pahile ki vah ladka bure ko tyagana aur bhle ko grahan karana jane
Isaiah7:17 yahova tujh par
Isaiah7:18 us samay yahova un makkhiayon ko jo misr kee nadiyon ke siron par rahatee haai
Isaiah7:19 aur ve sab kee sab akar is desh ke pahadee nalon me
Isaiah7:20 usee samay prabhu mahanad ke paravale ashshoor ke rajaroopee bhade ke choore se sir aur panvon ke ronen moondega
Isaiah7:21 us samay aeesa hoga ki manushy keval ek kalor aur do bhedon ko palega
Isaiah7:22 aur ve itana doodha dengee ki vah makkhn khaya karega kyonaki jitane is desh men rah jaaenge vah sab makkhn aur madha khaya karenge..
Isaiah7:23 us samay jin jin sthanen men hajar ttukade chandee kee hajar dakhlataen haai
Isaiah7:24 teer aur dhanush lekar log vahan jaya karenge
Isaiah7:25 un sabhon par katteele pedon ke dr ke mare koi n jaega
Isaiah8:1 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha
Isaiah8:2 aur maain vishvasayogy purooshaen ko arthata uriyyah yajak aur jeberekyah ke putra jakaryah ko is bat kee sakshaee karoonga.
Isaiah8:3 aur maain apanee patnee ke pas gaya
Isaiah8:4 kyonaki is se pahile ki vah ladka bapoo aur ma pukaran jane
Isaiah8:5 yahova ne fir mujh se doosaree bar kaha
Isaiah8:6 isaliye ki log shaeeloh ke dhaeere dhaeere bahanevale sote ko nikamma janate haai
Isaiah8:7 is karan sun
Isaiah8:8 aur vah yahooda par bhee chaddh aaega

Isaiah8:10 tum yuaktai karo to karo

Isaiah8:14 aur vah sharansthan hoga
Isaiah8:15 aur bahut se log ttokar khaaenge ve girenge aur chakanachoor honge ve fande men fasenge aur pakade jaaenge.
Isaiah8:16 chitaunee ka patra band kar do

Isaiah8:18 dek
Isaiah8:19 jab log tum se kahen ki ojhaon aur ttonhon ke pas jakar poochho jo gunagunate aur fausafausate haai
Isaiah8:20 vyavastha aur chitaunee hee kee charcha kiya karo! yadi ve log is vachanon ke anusar n bolen to nishchay unake liye pau n fattegee
Isaiah8:21 ve is desh men kleashait aur bookhe firate rahenge aur jab ve bookhe honge
Isaiah8:22 tab ve prathvee kee or draashtti karenge parantu unhen saketee aur andhiayara arthata sankatt bhra andhakar hee dekh padega aur ve ghaer andhakar men ddhkel diae jaaenge..
Isaiah9:1 taubhee sankatt-bhra andhakar jata rahega. pahile to us ne jabooloon aur naptalee ke deshaen ka apaman kiya
Isaiah9:2 jo log aandhiayare men chal rahe the unhon ne bada ujiyala dekha aur jo log ghaer andhakar se bhre huae mratyu ke desh men rahate the
Isaiah9:3 too ne jaati ko baddhaya
Isaiah9:4 kyonaki too ne usakee gardan par ke bharee jooae aur usake bahange ke bans
Isaiah9:5 kyonaki yuddh men ladnevale sipaahiyon ke joote aur lohoo men lathde huae kapade sab ag ka kaur ho jaaenge.
Isaiah9:6 kyeanki hamare liye aek balak utpann hua
Isaiah9:7 usakee prabhuta sarvada baddhtee rahegee
Isaiah9:8 prabhu ne yakoob ke pas aek sandesh bheja haai
Isaiah9:9 aur saree praja ko
Isaiah9:10 parantu ham gaddhen huae patthron se ghar banaaenge goolar ke vraksha to katt gaae haain parantu ham unakee santee devadaron se kam lenge.
Isaiah9:11 is karan yahova un par raseen ke baairiyon ko prabal karega
Isaiah9:12 aur unake shatrauon ko arthata pahile aram ko aur tab palishtaiyon ko ubharega
Isaiah9:13 taubhee ye log apane maranevale kee or naheen fire aur n senaon ke yahova kee khoj karate haain.
Isaiah9:14 is karan yahova israael men se sir aur poonchh ko
Isaiah9:15 puraniya aur praatishttit puroosh to sir haai

Isaiah9:17 is karan prabhu n to inake javanon se prasann hoga

Isaiah10:1 hay un par jo dushttta se nyay karate
Isaiah10:2 ki ve kangalon ka nyay bigaden aur meree praja ke dee logon ka hak mare
Isaiah10:3 tum dand ke din aur us apaati ke din jo door se aaegee kya karoge? tum sahayata ke liye kisake pas bhag kar jaoge?
Isaiah10:4 aur tum apane vibhv ko kahan rakha chhodoge? ve keval bandhauon ke paairon ke pas gir padenge aur mare huon ke neeche dabe pade rahenge. itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai..
Isaiah10:5 ashshoor par hay
Isaiah10:6 maain usako aek bhktaiheen jaati ke virooddh bhejoonga
Isaiah10:7 parantu usakee aeesee manasa n hogee
Isaiah10:8 kayonaki vah kahata haai
Isaiah10:9 kya kalano karkameesh ke saman naheen haai? kya hamat arpad ke aur shaemaron damishk ke saman naheen?
Isaiah10:10 jis prakar mera hath mooraton se bhre huae un rajyon par pahuncha jinakee mooraten yarooshalem aur shaemaron kee mooraton se baddhkar thee
Isaiah10:11 kya usee prakar maain yarooshalem se aur usakee mooraton se bhee n karoon?
Isaiah10:12 is karan jab prabhu siyyon parvat par aur yarooshalem men apana sab kam ka chukega
Isaiah10:13 us ne kaha haai
Isaiah10:14 desh desh ke logon kee dhanasampati
Isaiah10:15 kya kulhada usak virooddh jo us se kattta ho deeng mare
Isaiah10:16 is karan prabhu arthata senaon ka prabhu us raja ke shttpushtt yoddhaon ko dubala kar dega
Isaiah10:17 israael kee jyoti to ag ttharegee
Isaiah10:18 aur jaaise rogee ke kshaeen ho jane par usakee dasha hotee haai vaaisee hee vah usake van aur faladai baree kee shaebha pooree reeti se nash karega.
Isaiah10:19 us van ke vraksha itane thode rah jaenge ki ladka bhee unako gin kar likh lega..
Isaiah10:20 us samay israel ke bache huae log aur yakoob ke gharane ke bhage hua
Isaiah10:21 yakoob men se bache huae log parakramee parameshvar kee or firenge.
Isaiah10:22 kyonaki he israael
Isaiah10:23 kyonaki prabhu senaon ke yahova ne sare desh ka satyanash kar dena ttana haai..
Isaiah10:24 isaliye prabhu senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai
Isaiah10:25 kyonaki ab thodee hee der haai ki meree jalan aur krodha unaka satyanash karake shaant hoga
Isaiah10:26 aur senaon ka yahova usake virooddh koda uttakar usako aeesa marega jaaisa us ne oreb nam chattan par midhaaniyon ko mara tha aur jeya us ne misriyon ke virooddh samudra par lattee baddhai
Isaiah10:27 us samay aeesa hoga ki usaka bojh tere kandho par se aur usaka jooa teree gardan par se utta liya jaega

Isaiah10:29 ve ghaattee se par ho gaa

Isaiah11:3 or usako yahova ka bhy sugandha sa bhaaega.. vah munh dekha nyay n karega aur n apane kanon ke sunane ke anusar nirny karega

Isaiah14:6 jis se ve manushyon ko lagatar rosh se marate rahate the
Isaiah14:7 ab saree prathvee ko vishraam mila haai
Isaiah14:8 sanauvar aur labanon ke devadar bhee tujh par anand karake kahate haai
Isaiah14:9 patal ke neeche adhaelo men tujh se milane ke liye halachal ho rahee haai vah tere liye mudorn ko arthataprathvee ke sab saradaron ko jagata haai
Isaiah14:10 ve sab tujh se kahenge
Isaiah14:11 tera vibhv aur teree sarangiyon ko shabd adhaelok men utara gaya haai keede tera bichhauna aur kechuae tera oddhna haain..
Isaiah14:12 he bhor ke chamakanevale tare too kyonkar akash se gir pada haai? too jo jaati jati ko hara deta tha
Isaiah14:13 too man men kahata to tha ki maain svarga par chaddoonga maain apane sinhasan ko ishvar ke taragan se aadhaik uncha karoonga aur uttr disha kee chhor par sabha ke parvat par birajoonga
Isaiah14:14 maain meghaen se bhee unche unche sthanon ke upar chaddoonga
Isaiah14:15 parantu too adhaelok men us gadhe kee tah tak utara jaaega.
Isaiah14:16 jo tujhe dekhenge tujh ko takate huae tere vishay men soch sochakar kahenge
Isaiah14:17 jo jagat ko jangal banata aur usake nagaron ko ddha deta tha
Isaiah14:18 jaati jati ke sab raja apane apane ghar par maahima ke sath aram se pade haain
Isaiah14:19 parantu too nikammee shaakh kee nain apanee kabar men se faenka gaya too un mare huon kee lothon se ghaira haai jo talavar se bidhakar gadhe men patthron ke beech men latadee hui loth ke saman pade haai.
Isaiah14:20 too unake sath kabra men n gada jaaega
Isaiah14:21 unake poorvajon ke adharma ke karan putraen ke ghaat kee taaiyaree karo
Isaiah14:22 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain unake virooddh utoonga
Isaiah14:23 maain usako sahee kee mand aur jal kee jheelen kar doonga
Isaiah14:24 senaon ke yahova ne yah shapath khai haai
Isaiah14:25 ki maain ashshoor ko apane hee desh men tod doonga
Isaiah14:26 yahee yuktai saree prathvee ke liye ttharai gai haai aur yah vahee hath haai jo sab jaatiyon par baddha hua haai.
Isaiah14:27 kyonaki senaon ke yahova ne yuktai kee haai aur kaun usaka ttal sakata haai? usaka hath baddhaya gaya haai
Isaiah14:28 jis varsha men ahaj raja mar gaya usee varsha yah bharee bhavishyadanee hui:
Isaiah14:29 he sare palishteen too isaaliye anand n kar

Isaiah14:31 he faattk
Isaiah14:32 tab anyajatiyon ke dooton ko kya uttr diya jaaega? yah ki yahova ne siyyon kee nev dalee haai
Isaiah15:1 moab ke vishay bharee bhvishyadanee. nishchay moab ka ar nagar aek hee rat men ujad aur nash ho gaya haai nishchay moab ka keer nagar aek hee rat men ujad aur nash ho gaya haai.
Isaiah15:2 baait aur deebon unche sthanon par rone ke liye chaddh gaae haain nabo aur medaba ke upar moab hay hay karata haai. un sabhon ke sir mude hua
Isaiah15:3 sadkon men log ttatt paahine haain chhton par aur chaukon men sab koi ansoo bahate huae hay hay karate haain.
Isaiah15:4 heshabon aur aelale chilla rahe haai
Isaiah15:5 mera man moab ke liye dohai deta haai usake rais soar aur aeglatashaleeshaiyya tak bhage jate haain. dekho
Isaiah15:6 nimraeem ka jal sookh gaya ghaas kumhala gai aur haariyalee murjha gai
Isaiah15:7 isaliye jo dhan unhon ne bacha rakha
Isaiah15:8 is karan moab ke charon or ke sivane men chillahatt ho rahee haai
Isaiah15:9 kyonaki deemon ka sota lohoo se bhra hua haai taubhee maain deemon par aur du:kh daloonga
Isaiah16:1 jangal kee or se sela nagar se siyyon kee bettee ke parvat par desh ke haakim ke liye bhedon ke bachchon ko bhejo.
Isaiah16:2 moab kee bettyaian anorn ke ghaatt par ujade huae bachchon ke saman haain.
Isaiah16:3 sammaati karo
Isaiah16:4 mere log jo nikale huae haain ve tere beech men rahen nash karanevale se moab ko bachao. peesanevala naheen raha
Isaiah16:5 tab daya ke sath aek sinhasan sthiar kiya jaaega aur us par daud ke tamboo men sachchai ke sath aek virajaman hoga jo soch vichar kar sachcha nyay karega aur dharma ke kam par tatpar rahega..
Isaiah16:6 ham ne moab ke garva ke vishay suna haai ki vah atyant aabhaimanee tha usake abhaiman aur garva aur rosh ke sambandha men bhee suna haai parantu usaka bada bol vyarth haai.
Isaiah16:7 kyonaki moab hay hay karega sab ke sab moab ke liye hahakar karenge. keeraharasat kee dakh kee ttiikayon ke liye ve aati nirash hokar lambee lambee sans liya karenge..
Isaiah16:8 kyonaki heshabon ke khet aur sibama kee dakh lataaen murjha gain anyajaatiyon ke aadhaikaariyon ne unakee uttm uttm lataon ko katt kattkar gira diya haai
Isaiah16:9 maain yajer ke sath sibama kee dakhlataon ke liye bhee rounga he heshabon aur aelale
Isaiah16:10 aur faladai bariyon men se anand aur maganata jatee rahee dakh kee bariyon men geet n gaya jaaega
Isaiah16:11 isaliye mera man moab ke karan aur mera day keerahaaires ke karan veena ka sa krandan karata haai..
Isaiah16:12 aur jab moab unche sthan par munh dikhate dikhate thk jaa
Isaiah16:13 yahee vah bat haai jo yahova ne is se pahile moab ke vishay men kahee thee.

Isaiah30:9 kyonaki ve balava karanevale log aur joott bolanevale ladke haain jo yahova kee shaiksha ko sunana naheen chahate.
Isaiah30:10 ve daashairyon se kahate haai
Isaiah30:11 marga se mudo
Isaiah30:12 is karan israael ka paavitra yon kahata haai
Isaiah30:13 is karan yah adharma tumhare liye unchee bheet ka tootta hua bhag hoga jo fattkar girane par ho
Isaiah30:14 aur kumhar ke bartan kee nai foottkar aeesa chakanachoor hoga ki usake ttukadon ka aek tteekara bhee n milega jis se angettee men se ag lee jaae va haud men se jal nikala jaae..
Isaiah30:15 prabhu yahova
Isaiah30:16 tum ne kaha
Isaiah30:17 aek hee kee dhamakee se aek hajar bhagenge
Isaiah30:18 taubhee yahova isaaliye vilamb karata haai ki tum par anugrah kare
Isaiah30:19 he siyyon ke logon tum yarooshalem men base raho tum fir kabhee n rooge
Isaiah30:20 aur chahe prabhu tumhen vipaati kee rottee aur du:kh ka jal bhee de
Isaiah30:21 aur jab kabhee tum dahinee va bai or mudne lago
Isaiah30:22 tab tum vah chandee jis se tumharee khudee hui mootiayan maddhee haai
Isaiah30:23 aur vah tumhare liye jal barasaaega ki tum khet men beej bo sako
Isaiah30:24 aur baail aur gadahe jo tumharee khetee ke kam men aaenge
Isaiah30:25 aur us mahasanhar ke samay jab gummatt gir padenge
Isaiah30:26 us samay yahova apanee praja ke logon ka ghaav bandhoga aur unakee chott changa karega tab chandrama ka prakash soorya ka sa
Isaiah30:27 dekho
Isaiah30:28 usakee sans aeesee umandnevalee nadee ke saman haai jo gale tak pahunchatee haai vah sab jaatiyon ko nash ke soop se fattkega
Isaiah30:29 tab tum paavitra parva kee rat ka sa geet gaoge

Isaiah34:5 kyonaki meree talavar akash men peekar trapt hui haai dekho

Isaiah34:9 aur aedom kee nadiyan ral se aur usakee mittee gandhak se badal jaaegee usakee boomi jalatee hui ral ban jaaegee.
Isaiah34:10 vah rata-adin n bujhegee usaka dhoona sadaaiv uttta rahega. yug yug vah ujad pada rahega koi us men se hokar kabhee n chalega.
Isaiah34:11 us men dhaneshapakshaee aur sahee paae jaenge aur vah ulloo aur kauve ka basera hoga. vah us par gadbad kee doree aur sunasanee ka sahool tanega.

Isaiah34:15 vahan udnevalee sanpin ka bil hoga ve ande dekar unhen sevengee aur apanee chhaya men battor lengee vahan giddh apanee sathain ke sath ikatthe rahenge.

Isaiah36:1 hijaakiyyah raja ke chaudahaven varsha me
Isaiah36:2 aur ashshoor ke raja ne rabashaake kee badee sena dekar lakeesh se yarooshalem ke pas hijaakiyyah raja ke virooddh bhej diya. aur vah uttree pokhre kee nalee ke pas dhaeabiyon ke khet kee sadk par jakar khda hua.
Isaiah36:3 tab hilkaiyyah ka putra aelyakeem jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt tha
Isaiah36:4 rabashaake ne un se kaha
Isaiah36:5 mera kahana haai ki kya munh se baten banana hee yuddh ke liye parakram aur yuaktai haai? too kis par bhrosa rakhta haai ki too ne mujh se balava kiya haai?
Isaiah36:6 sun
Isaiah36:7 fir yadi too mujh se kahe
Isaiah36:8 isaliye ab mere svamee ashshoor ke raja ke sath vacha bandha tab maain tujhe do hajar ghaede doonga yaadi too un par savar chaddha sake.
Isaiah36:9 fir too rathon aur savaron ke liye misr par bhrosa rakhkar mere svamee ke chhotte se chhotte karmacharee ko bhee kaaise hatta sakega?
Isaiah36:10 kya maain ne yahova ke bina kahe is desh ko ujadne ke liye chaddhai kee haai? yahova ne mujh se kaha haai
Isaiah36:11 tab aelyakeem
Isaiah36:12 rabashaake ne kaha
Isaiah36:13 tab rabashaake ne khde hokar yahoodee bhasha men unche shabd se kaha

Isaiah36:15 aeesa n ho ki hijaakiyyah tum se yah kahakar bhulava de ki yahova nishchay ham ko bachaaega ki yah nagar ashshoor ke raja ke vash men n padega.
Isaiah36:16 hijaakiyyah kee mat suno ashshoor ka raja kahata haai
Isaiah36:17 jab tak maain akar tum ko aeese desh men n le jaun jo tumhare desh ke saman anaj aur naye dakhmadha ka desh aur rottee aur dakh kee baariyon ka desh haai.
Isaiah36:18 aeesa n ho ki hijaakiyyah yah kahakar tum ko bahakaae ki yahova ham ko bachaaega. kya aur jaatiyon ke devataon ne apane apane desh ko ashshoor ke raja ke hath se bachaya haai?
Isaiah36:19 hamat aur arpad ke devata kahan rahe? sapavaraim ke devata kahan rahe? kya unhon ne shaemaron ko mere hath se bachaya?

Isaiah37:1 jab hijaakiyyah raja ne yah suna
Isaiah37:2 aur us ne aelyakeem ko jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt tha aur shobna mantraee ko aur yajakon ke puraaniyon ko jo sab ttatt oddhe huae the
Isaiah37:3 unhon ne us se kaha
Isaiah37:4 sambhv haai ki tere parameshvar yahova ne rabashaake kee baten sunee jise usake svamee ashshoor ke raja ne jeevate parameshvar kee ninda karane ko bheja haai

Isaiah37:6 tab yashaayah ne un se kaha
Isaiah37:7 sun
Isaiah37:8 tab rabashaake ne lauttkar ashshoor ke raja ko libna nagar se yuddh karate paya kyonki us ne suna tha ki vah lakeesh ke pas se utt gaya haai.
Isaiah37:9 us ne koosh ke raja tirhaka ke vishay yah suna ki vah us se ladne ko nikala haai. tab us ne hijaakiyyah ke pas dooton ko yah kahakar bheja.
Isaiah37:10 ki tum yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah se yon kahana
Isaiah37:11 dek
Isaiah37:12 fir kya too bach jaaega? gojaan aur haran aur resep men rahanevalee jin jatiyon ko aur talassar men rahanevale aedenee logon ko mere purakhaon ne nash kiya

Isaiah37:14 is patraee ko hijaakiyyah ne dooton ke hath se lekar paddha tab us ne yahova ke bhvan men jakar us patraee ko yahova ke samhane faaila diya.
Isaiah37:15 aur yahova se yah praarthna kee

Isaiah37:17 he yahova

Isaiah37:21 tab amos ke putra yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah ke pas yah kahala bheja
Isaiah37:22 usake vishay yahova ne yah vachan kaha haai
Isaiah37:23 too ne kis kee namadharai aur ninda kee haai? aur too jo bada bol bola aur ghamand kiya haai
Isaiah37:24 apane karmachaariyon ke dara too ne prabhu kee ninda karake kaha haai ki bahut se rath lekar maain parvaton kee chottyaien par varan labanon ke beech tak chaddh aya hoon maain usake unche unche devadaron aur achchhe achchhe sanaubaron ko katt daloonga aur usake door door ke unche sthanon men aur usake van kee faladai bariyon men pravesh karoonga.
Isaiah37:25 maain ne khudavakar panee piya aur misr kee naharon men panv dharate hee unhen sukha diya.
Isaiah37:26 kya too ne naheen suna ki praacheenakal se maain ne yahee ttana aur poorvakal se isakee taaiyaree kee thee? isaliye ab maain ne yah poora bhee kiya haai ki too gaddhvale nagaron ko khndhar kee khndhar kar de.
Isaiah37:27 isee karan unake rahanevalon ka bal ghatt gaya aur ve vismait aur lajjait hue: ve maaidan ke chhotte chhotte pedon aur haree ghaas aur chht par kee ghaas aur aeese anaj ke saman ho gaae jo baddhne se paahile hee sookh jata haai..
Isaiah37:28 maain to tera baaittna
Isaiah37:29 is karan ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata aur tere aabhaiman kee baten mere kanon men padee haai
Isaiah37:30 aur tere liye yah chinh hoga ki is varsha to tum use khaoge jo ap se ap uge
Isaiah37:31 aur yahooda ke gharane ke bache huae log fir jad pakadenge aur foolen-falenge
Isaiah37:32 kyonaki yarooshalem se bache huae aur siyyon parvat se bhage huae log nikalenge. senaon ka yahova apanee jalan ke karan yah kam karega..
Isaiah37:33 isaliye yahova yashshoor ke raja ki vishay yon kahata haai ki vah is nagar men pravesh karane
Isaiah37:34 jis marga se vah aya haai usee se vah lautt bhee jaaega aur is nagar men pravesh n karane paaega
Isaiah37:35 kyonaki maain apane nimitt aur apane das daud ke nimit
Isaiah37:36 b yahova ke doot ne nikalakar ashshooriyon kee chhavanee men aek lakh pachasee hajar purooshaen ko mara aur bhor ko jab log savere utte tab kya dekha ki loth hee loth padee haain.
Isaiah37:37 tab ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb chal diya aur lauttkar neenave men rahane laga.
Isaiah37:38 vahan vah apane devata nisrok ke maandair men dandvata kar raha tha ki itane men usake putra adrammelek aur sharesen ne usako talavar se mara aur ararat desh men bhag gaae. aur usaka putra aesarhaon usake sthan par rajy karane laga..

Isaiah38:11 maain ne kaha

Isaiah38:13 maain bhor tak apane man ko shaant karata raha vah sinh kee nain meree sab haaddiyon ko todta haai aek hee din men too mera ant kar dalata haai.
Isaiah38:14 maain soopabene va saras kee nai chyoon chyoon karata
Isaiah38:15 maain kya kahoon? usee ne mujh se praatigyaa kee aur poora bhee kiya haai. maain jeevan bhr kaduahatt ke sath dhaeere dhaeere chalata rahoonga..

Isaiah40:1 tumhara parameshvar yah kahata haai

Isaiah40:14 us ne kis se sammati lee aur kis ne use samajhakar nyay ka path bata diya aur gyaan sikhakar buddh ika marga jata diya haai?

Isaiah40:20 jo kangal itana arpan naheen kar sakata

Isaiah40:22 yah vah haai jo prathvee ke ghore ke upar akashamandl par virajaman haai aur prathvee ke rahanevale ttddaiee ke tuly haai jo akash ko malamal kee nain faailata aur aeesa tan deta haai jaaisa rahane ke liye tamboo tana jata haai
Isaiah40:23 jo bade bade haakimon ko tuchchh kar deta haai
Isaiah40:24 ve rope hee jate
Isaiah40:25 so tum mujhe kis ke saman bataoge ki maain usake tuly ttharoon? us paavitra ka yahee vachan haai.

Isaiah42:15 pahadon aur pahaadiyon ko maain sukha daloonga aur unakee sab haariyalee jhulasa doonga maain nadiyon ko deep kar doonga aur talon ko sukha daloonga.

Isaiah53:5 parantu vah hamare hee aparadhae ke karan ghaayal kiya gaya

Isaiah53:12 is karan maain use mahan logon ke sang bhag doonga

Isaiah56:5 ki maain apane bhvan aur apanee shahara-panah ke bheetar unako aeesa nam doonga jo putra-puatraiyon se kaheen uttm hoga maain unaka nam sada banaae rakoonga aur vah kabhee n mittaya jaaega.

Isaiah60:21 aur tere log sab ke sab dharmee honge ve sarvada desh ke adhaikaree rahenge

Isaiah66:18 kyonaki maain unake kam aur unakee kalpanaae
Isaiah66:19 aur maain un se aek chinh pragatt karoonga aur unake bache huon ko maain un anyajaatiyon ke pas bhejoonga jinhon ne n to mera samachar suna haai aur n meree maahima dekhee haai
Isaiah66:20 aur jaaise israaelee log annabaali ko shuuddh patra men dharakar yahova ke bhvan men le ate haai
Isaiah66:21 aur un men se maain kitane logon ko yajak aur leveey pad ke liye bhee chun loonga..
Isaiah66:22 kyeanki jis prakar naya akash aur nai prathvee
Isaiah66:23 fir aeesa hoga ki aek naye chand se doosare naye chand ke din tak aur aek vishraam din se doosare vishraam din tak samast praanee mere samhane dandvata karane ko aya karenge yahova ka yahee vachan haai..
Isaiah66:24 tab ve nikalakar un logon kee lothon par jinhon ne mujh se balava kiya draashtti dalenge kyonaki un men pade huae keede kabhee n marenge

Jeremiah2:16 aur nop aur tahapathes ke nivasee bhee tere desh kee upaj chatt kar gaae haain.

Jeremiah18:16 is se unaka desh aeesa ujad ho gaya haai ki log us par sada talee bajate rahenge aur jo koi usake pas se chale vah chaakit hoga aur sir hilaaega.

Jeremiah19:1 yahova ne yon kaha
Jeremiah19:2 hinnomiyon kee tarai kee or us faattk ke nikatt chala ja jahan tteekare faenk diae jate haain aur jo vachan maain kahoo
Jeremiah19:3 too yah kahana
Jeremiah19:4 kyonaki yahan ke logon ne mujhe tyag diya
Jeremiah19:5 aur bal kee pooja ke unche sthanon ko banakar apane ladkebalon ko bal ke liye hom kar diya
Jeremiah19:6 is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai ki aeese din ate haain ki yah sthan fir topet va hinnomiyon kee tarai n kahalaaega
Jeremiah19:7 aur maain is sthan men yahooda aur yarooshalem kee yuaktaiyon ko nishfal kar doonga aur unhen unake praanon ke shatrauon ke hath kee talavar chalavakar gira doonga. unakee lothon ko maain akash ke pakshiayon aur boomi ke jeevajantuon ka ahar kar doonga.
Jeremiah19:8 aur maain is nagar ko aeesa ujad doonga ki log ise dekhkar drenge jo koi isake pas se hokar jaae vah isakee sab vipaattaiyon ke karan chakit hoga aur ghabaraaega.
Jeremiah19:9 aur ghair jane aur us saketee ke samay jis men unake praan ke shatra unhen dal denge
Jeremiah19:10 tab too us surahee ko un manushyon ke samhane tod dena jo tere sang jaaenge
Jeremiah19:11 aur un se kahana

Jeremiah19:13 aur yarooshalem ke ghar aur yahooda ke rajaon ke bhvan
Jeremiah19:14 tab yirmayah topet se lauttkar
Jeremiah19:15 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata he
Jeremiah20:1 jab yirmayah yah bhvishyadanee kar raha tha
Jeremiah20:2 so pashahoor ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko mara aur use us katt men dal diya jo yahova ke bhvan ke upar binyameen ke faattk ke pas haai.
Jeremiah20:3 bihan ko jab pashahoor ne yirmayah ko katt men se nikalavaya
Jeremiah20:4 kyonaki yahova ne yon kaha haai
Jeremiah20:5 fir maain is nagar ke sare dhan ko aur is men kee kamai aur sab anamol vastuon ko aur yahooda ke rajaon ka jitana rakha hua dhan haai
Jeremiah20:6 aur
Jeremiah20:7 he yahova
Jeremiah20:8 kyonaki jab maain baten karata hoo
Jeremiah20:9 yaadi maain kahoo
Jeremiah20:10 maain ne bahuton ke munh se apana apavad suna haai. charon or bhy hee bhy haai! meree jan pahachan ke sab jo mere ttokar khane kee batt johate haai
Jeremiah20:11 parantu yahova mere sath haai
Jeremiah20:12 he senaon ke yahova
Jeremiah20:13 yahova ke liye gao yahova kee stuati karo! kyonki vah daridra jan ke praan ko kukaarmiyon ke hath se bachata haai.
Jeremiah20:14 sraapit ho vah din jis men maain utpann hua! jis din meree mata ne mujh ko janm diya vah dhany n ho!
Jeremiah20:15 sraapit ho vah jan jis ne mere pita ko yah samachar dekar usako bahut anandait kiya ki tere ladka utpann hua haai.
Jeremiah20:16 us jan kee dasha un nagaron kee see ho jinhen yahova ne bin daya ddha diya use savere to chillahatt aur dopahar ko yuddh kee lalakar sunai diya kare
Jeremiah20:17 kyonaki us ne mujhe garbh hee men n mar dala ki meree mata ka garbhashay hee meree kabra hotee
Jeremiah20:18 maain kyon utpat aur shaek bhogane ke liye janma aur ki apane jeevan men paarishram aur ducha dekoo
Jeremiah21:1 yah vachan yahova kee or se yirmayah ke pas us samay pahuncha jab sidaakiyyah raja ne usake pas maalkaiyyah ke putra pashahoor aur maseyah yajak ke putra sapanyah ke hath se yah kahala bheja ki
Jeremiah21:2 hamare liye yahova se pooch
Jeremiah21:3 tab yirmayah ne un se kaha
Jeremiah21:4 dekho
Jeremiah21:5 aur maain svayan hath baddhakar aur balavant bhuja se
Jeremiah21:6 aur maain is nagar ke rahanevalon ko kya manushy
Jeremiah21:7 aur usake bad
Jeremiah21:8 aur is praja ke logon se kah ki yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah21:9 jo koi is nagar men rahe vah talavar
Jeremiah21:10 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ne is nagar kee or apana mukh bhlai ke liye nahee
Jeremiah21:11 or yahooda ke rajakul ke logon se kah
Jeremiah21:12 he daud ke gharane! yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah21:13 he tarai men rahanevalee aur samathr desh kee chattana tum jo kahate ho ki ham par kaun chaddhai kar sakega
Jeremiah21:14 aur yahova kee vanee haai ki maain tumhen dand dekar tumhare kamon ka fal tumhen bhugataunga. maain usake van men ag lagaunga
Jeremiah22:1 yahova ne yon kaha
Jeremiah22:2 he daud kee gaee par virajaman yahooda ke raja
Jeremiah22:3 yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah22:4 dekho
Jeremiah22:5 parantu
Jeremiah22:6 kyonaki yahova yahooda ke raja ke is bhvan ke vishay men yon kahata haai
Jeremiah22:7 maain nash karanevalon ko haathaiyar dekar tere viruddh bhejoonga ve tere sundar devadaron ko kattkar ag men jhonk denge.
Jeremiah22:8 aur jaati jati ke log jab is nagar ke pas se nikalenge tab aek doosare se poochhenge
Jeremiah22:9 tab log kahenge
Jeremiah22:10 mare huon ke liye mat roo
Jeremiah22:11 kyonaki yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ka putra shalloom
Jeremiah22:12 vah jis sthan men bandhaua hokar gaya haai usee men mar jaaega
Jeremiah22:13 us par hay jo apane ghar ko adharma se aur apanee uparauttee kottariyon ko anyay se banavata haai jo apane padosee se begaree men kam karata haai aur usakee majadooree naheen deta.
Jeremiah22:14 vah kahata haai
Jeremiah22:15 too jo devadar kee lakadee ka abhailashaee haai
Jeremiah22:16 vah is karan sukh se rahata tha kyonki vah deen aur daridra logon ka nyay chukata tha. kya yahee mera gyaan rakhna naheen haai? yahova kee yah vanee haai.
Jeremiah22:17 parantu too keval apana hee labh dekhta haai
Jeremiah22:18 isaliye yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men yahova yah kahata haai
Jeremiah22:19 varan usako gadahe kee nai mittee dee jaaegee
Jeremiah22:20 labanon par chaddhkar hay hay kar
Jeremiah22:21 tere sukh ke samay maain ne tujh ko chitaya tha
Jeremiah22:22 tere sab charavahe vayu se udaae jaaenge
Jeremiah22:23 he labanon kee rahanevalee
Jeremiah22:24 yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah22:25 maain tujhe tere praan ke khojiyon ke hat
Jeremiah22:26 maain tujhe teree jananee samet aek paraae desh men jo tumharee janmaboomi naheen haai faenk doonga
Jeremiah22:27 parantu jis desh men ve lauttne kee badee lalasa karate haai
Jeremiah22:28 kya
Jeremiah22:29 he prathvee
Jeremiah22:30 yahova yon kahata haai ki is purush ko nirvash likho
Jeremiah23:1 un charavahon par hay jo meree charai kee bhed-bakaariyon ko titara-abitar karate or nash karate haai
Jeremiah23:2 isaliye israaael ka parameshvar yahova apanee praja ke charavahon se yon kahata haai
Jeremiah23:3 tab meree bhed-bakaariyan jo bachee haai
Jeremiah23:4 maain unake liye aeese charavahe niyukt karoonga jo unhen charaaenge aur tab ve n to fir drengee
Jeremiah23:5 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai
Jeremiah23:6 usake dinon men yahoodee log bache rahenge
Jeremiah23:7 so dek
Jeremiah23:8 parantu ve yah kahenge
Jeremiah23:9 bhavishyadvktaon ke vishay mera day bheetar hee bheetar fatta jata haai
Jeremiah23:10 kyonaki yah desh vyabhaichaariyon se bhra haai is par aeesa shaap pada haai ki yah vilap kar raha haai van kee charaiyan bhee sookh gai. log badee daud to daudte haai
Jeremiah23:11 kyonaki bhvishyadvkta aur sajak donon bhaktaiheen ho gaae haain apane bhvan men bhee maain ne unakee burai pai haai
Jeremiah23:12 is karan unaka marga andhora aur fisalaha hoga jis men ve ddhkelakar gira diae jaaenge kyonki
Jeremiah23:13 shaemaron ke bhvishyadvktaon men maain ne yah moorkhta dekhee thee ki ve bal ke nam se bhvishyadanee karate aur meree praja israaael ko bhttka dete the.
Jeremiah23:14 parantu yarooshalem ke naabiyon men maain ne aeese kam dekhe haai
Jeremiah23:15 is karan senaon ka yahova yarooshalem ke bhavishyadvktaon ke vishay men yon kahata haai
Jeremiah23:16 senaon ke yahova ne tum se yon kaha haai
Jeremiah23:17 jo log mera tiraskar karate haain un me ye bhvishyadvkta sada kahate rahate haain ki yahova kahata haai
Jeremiah23:18 bhla kaun yahova kee gupt sabha men khda hokar usaka vachan sunane aur samajhne paya haai?
Jeremiah23:19 va kis ne dhyan dekar mera vachan suna haai? dekho
Jeremiah23:20 jab tak yahova apana kam aur apanee yuaktaiyon ko pooree n kar chuke
Jeremiah23:21 ye bhavishyadvkta bina mere bheje daud jate aur bina mere kuchh kahe bhavishyadanee karane lagate haain.
Jeremiah23:22 yaadi ye meree shaiksha men sthiar rahate
Jeremiah23:23 yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah23:24 fir yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah23:25 maain ne in bhvishyadvktaon kee baten bhee suneen haain jo mere nam se yah kahakar joottee bhvishyadanee karate haain ki maain ne svapn dekha haai
Jeremiah23:26 jo bhavishyadvkta joottmoott bhavishyadanee karate aur apane man hee ke chhl ke bhvishyadvkta haai
Jeremiah23:27 jaaise meree praja ke logon ke purakha mera nam boolakar bal ka nam lene lage the
Jeremiah23:28 yaadi kisee bhavishyadvkta ne svapn dekha ho
Jeremiah23:29 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai ki kya mera vachan ag sa naheen haai? fir kya vah aeesa hathauda naheen jo patthr ko faod dale?
Jeremiah23:30 yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah23:31 fir yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai ki jo bhvishyadvkta usakee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah23:32 yahava kee yah bhee vanee haai ki jo bina mere bheje va bina meree agyaa paae svapn dekhne ka jootta dava karake bhavishyadanee karate haai
Jeremiah23:33 yaadi sadhaaran logon men se koi jan va koi bhvishyadvkta va yajak tum se poochhe ki yahova ne kya prabhvashaalee vachan kaha haai
Jeremiah23:34 aur jo bhavishyadvkta va yajak va sadhaaran manushy yahova ka kaha hua bharee vachana aeesa kahata rahe
Jeremiah23:35 tum log aek doosare se aur apane apane bhai se yon puchhna
Jeremiah23:36 va
Jeremiah23:37 too bhavishyadvkta se yan poochh ki yahova ne tujhe kya uttar diya?
Jeremiah23:38 va
Jeremiah23:39 is karan dekho
Jeremiah23:40 tyagakar apane samhane se door kar doonga. aur maain aeesa karoonga ki tumharee namadharai aur anadar sada bana rahega aur kabhee boola n jaaega.
Jeremiah24:1 jab babul ka raja nabookadanessar
Jeremiah24:2 aek ttokare men to paahile se pake achchhe achchhe anjeer the
Jeremiah24:3 fir yahova ne mujh se poochha
Jeremiah24:4 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha
Jeremiah24:5 ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah24:6 maain un par krapadrashtti rakoonga aur unako is desh men lautta le aunga aur unhen nash n karoonga
Jeremiah24:7 maain unaka aeesa man kar doonga ki ve mujhe janenge ki maain yahova hoo aur ve meree praja ttharenge aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoonga
Jeremiah24:8 parantu jese nikamme anjeer
Jeremiah24:9 is karan ve prathvee ke rajy rajy men mare mare firate huae hukh bhogate rahenge aur jitane sthanon men maain unhen barabas nikal doonga
Jeremiah24:10 aur maain un men talavar chalaunga
Jeremiah25:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe varsha men jo babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke rajy ka paahila varsha tha
Jeremiah25:2 yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah nabee ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah25:3 amon ke putra yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ke rajy ke terahaven varsha se lekar aj ke din tak arthata teis varsha se yahova ka vachan mere pas pahunchata aya he aur maain use bade yatn ke sath tum se kahata aya hoo parantu tum ne use naheen suna.
Jeremiah25:4 aur yadhypi yahova tumhare pas apane sare dason athva bhavishyadvktaon ko bhee yah kahane ke liye bade yatn se bhejata aya haai
Jeremiah25:5 ki apanee apanee buree chal aur apane apane bure kamon se firo tab jo desh yahova ne praacheenakal men tumhare pitaron ko aur tum ko bhee sada ke liye diya haai us par base rahane paoge parantu tum ne n to suna aur n kan lagaya haai.
Jeremiah25:6 aur doosare devataon ke peechhe hokar unakee upasana aur unako dandvata mat karo
Jeremiah25:7 yah sunane par bhee tum ne meree naheen manee
Jeremiah25:8 isaliye senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ne jo mere vachan naheen mane
Jeremiah25:9 jasaliye suno
Jeremiah25:10 aur maain aeesa karoonga ki in men n to harsha aur n anand ka shabd sunai padega
Jeremiah25:11 saree jatiyon ka yah desh ujad hee ujad hoga
Jeremiah25:12 jab sattar varsha beet chuke
Jeremiah25:13 maain us desh men apane ve sab vachan poore karoonga jo maain ne usake vishay men kahe haai
Jeremiah25:14 kyonaki bahut see jaatiyon ke log aur bade bade raja bhee un se apanee seva karaaenge aur maain unako unakee karanee ka fal bhugataunga.
Jeremiah25:15 israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne mujh se yon kaha
Jeremiah25:16 ve use peekar us talavar ke karan jo maain unake beech men chalaunga ladkhdaaenge aur bavale ho jaaenge.
Jeremiah25:17 so maain ne yahova ke hath se vah kattora lekar un sab jaatiyon ko jinake pas yahova ne mujhe bheja
Jeremiah25:18 arthata yarooshalem aur yahooda ke nagaron ke nivaasiyon ko
Jeremiah25:19 aur misra ke raja firaun aur usake karmachaariyo
Jeremiah25:20 aur sab dogale manushyon kee jatiyon ko aur us desh ke sab rajaon ko aur palishtaiyon ke desh ke sab rajaon ko aur ashkalon ajja aur aekron ke aur ashadod ke bache huae logon ko
Jeremiah25:21 aur aedoniyo
Jeremiah25:22 aur seedon ke sab rajaon ko
Jeremiah25:23 fir dadaaniyo
Jeremiah25:24 aur arab ke sab rajaon ko aur jangal men rahanevale dogale manushyon ke sab rajaon ko
Jeremiah25:25 aur jimrae
Jeremiah25:26 aur kya nikatt kya door ke uttar disha ke sab rajaon ko aek sang pilaya
Jeremiah25:27 tab too un se yah kahana
Jeremiah25:28 aur yaadi ve tere hath se yah kattora lekar peene se inakar karen to un se kahana
Jeremiah25:29 dekho
Jeremiah25:30 itanee baten bhvishyadanee kee reeti par un se kahakar yah bhee kahana
Jeremiah25:31 prathvee kee chhor lon bhee kolahal hoga
Jeremiah25:32 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah25:33 us samay yahova ke mare huon kee lothen prathvee kee ek chhor se doosaree chhor tak padee rahengee. unake liye koi rone-peettnevala n rahega
Jeremiah25:34 he charavaho
Jeremiah25:35 us samay n to charavahon ke bhagane ke liye koi sthan rahega
Jeremiah25:36 charavahon kee chillahatt aur balavant meddhon aur bakaron ke mimiyane ka shabd sunai padta haai! kyonki yahova unakee charai ko nash karega
Jeremiah25:37 aur yahova ke krodha bhdkane ke karan shaantai ke sthan nashtt ho jaaenge
Jeremiah25:38 yuva sinh kee nai vah apane ttauair ko chhodkar nikalata haai
Jeremiah26:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajay ke arambh me
Jeremiah26:2 yahova ke bhvan ke angan men khda hokar
Jeremiah26:3 sambhv haai ki ve sunakar apanee apanee buree chal se firen aur maain unakee hani karane se pachhtaun jo unake bure kamon ke karan maain ne ttana tha.
Jeremiah26:4 isaliye too un se kah
Jeremiah26:5 aur n mere das bhavishyadvktaon ke vachanon par kan lagaoge
Jeremiah26:6 to maain is bhvan ko shaeelo ke saman ujad doonga
Jeremiah26:7 jab yirmayah ye vachan yahova ke bhvan men kah raha tha
Jeremiah26:8 aur jab yirmayah sab kuchh jise saree praja se kahane kee agyaa yahova ne dee thee kah chuka
Jeremiah26:9 too ne kyon yahova ke nam se yah bhvishyadanee kee ki yah bhvan shaeelo ke saman ujad ho jaaega
Jeremiah26:10 yahooda ke hakim ye baten sunakar
Jeremiah26:11 tab yajakon aur bhavishyadvktaon ne hakimon aur sab logon se kaha
Jeremiah26:12 tab yirmayah ne sab hakimon aur sab logon se kaha
Jeremiah26:13 isaliye ab apana chalachalan aur apane kam sudhaaro
Jeremiah26:14 dekho
Jeremiah26:15 par yah nishchay jano
Jeremiah26:16 tab haakimon aur sab logon ne yajakon aur nabiyon se kaha
Jeremiah26:17 aur desh ke puraaniyon men se kitanon ne uttkar praja kee saree mandlee se kaha
Jeremiah26:18 yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ke dinon men morasetee meekayah bhvishyadanee kahata tha
Jeremiah26:19 kya yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ne va kisee yahoodee ne usako kaheen marava dala? kya us raja ne yahova ka bhy n mana or us se binatee n kee? aur tab yahova ne jo vipaattai un par dalane ke liye kaha tha
Jeremiah26:20 fir shamayah ka putra uriyyah nam kiryatyareem ka aek purush jo yahova ke nam se bhvishyadanee kahata tha us ne bhee is nagar aur is desh ke viruddh tteek aeesee hee bhvishyadanee kee jaaisee yirmayah ne abhee kee haai.
Jeremiah26:21 aur jab yahoyakeem raja aur usake sab veeron aur sab hakimon ne usake vachan sune
Jeremiah26:22 tab yahoyakeem raja ne misra ko log bheje arthata akabor ke putra aelanatan ko kitane aur purushaen ke sath misra ko bheja.
Jeremiah26:23 aur ve uriyyah ko misra se nikalakar yahoyakeem raja ke pas le aae aur us ne use talavar se maravakar usakee loth ko sadhaaran logon kee kabaron men finkava diya.
Jeremiah26:24 parantu shaapan ka putra aheekam yirmayah kee sahayata karane laga aur vah logon ke vash men vadha hone ke liye naheen diya gaya.
Jeremiah27:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra
Jeremiah27:2 yahova ne mujh se yah kaha
Jeremiah27:3 tab unhen aedom aur moab aur ammon aur sor aur seedon ke rajaon ke pas
Jeremiah27:4 aur unako unake svamiyon ke liye yah kahakar agyaa dena
Jeremiah27:5 apane apane svamee se yon kaho ki prathvee ko aur prathvee par ke manushyon aur pashuuon ko apanee badee shaktai aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara maain ne banaya
Jeremiah27:6 ab maain ne ye sab desha
Jeremiah27:7 ye sab jaatiyan usake aur usake bad usake bette aur pote ke adhaeen us samay tak rahengee jab tak usake bhee desh ka din n aae tab bahut see jaatiyan aur bade bade raja us se bhee apanee seva karavaaenge.
Jeremiah27:8 so jo jaati va rajy babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke adhaeen n ho aur usaka jooa apanee gardan par n le le
Jeremiah27:9 isaliye tum log apane bhavishyadvktaon aur bhavee kahanevalon aur ttonahon aur tantraikon kee or chitt mat lagao jo tum se kahate haain ki tum ko babul ke raja ke adhaeen naheen hona padega.
Jeremiah27:10 kyonaki ve tum se joottee bhvishyadanee karate haai
Jeremiah27:11 parantu jo jati babul ke raja ka jooa apanee gardan par lekar usake adhaeen rahegee usako maain usee ke desh men rahane doonga aur vah us men khetee karatee hui basee rahegee
Jeremiah27:12 aur yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah se bhee maain ne ye baten kahee
Jeremiah27:13 jab yahova ne us jaati ke vishay jo babul ke raja ke adhaeen n ho
Jeremiah27:14 jo bhavishyadvkta tujh se kahate haain ki tujh ko babul ke raja ke adhaeen n hona padega
Jeremiah27:15 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ne unhen naheen bheja
Jeremiah27:16 tab yajakon aur sadhaaran logon se bhee maain ne kaha
Jeremiah27:17 unakee mat suno
Jeremiah27:18 yah nagar kyon ujad ho jaae? yaadi ve bhvishyadvkta bhee ho
Jeremiah27:19 kyonaki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jo khmbhe aur peetal kee nand
Jeremiah27:20 jinhen babul ka raja nabookadanessar us samay n le gaya jab vah yahoyakeem ke putra yahooda ke raja yakonyah ko aur yahooda aur yarooshalem ke sab kuleenon ko bandhaua karake yarooshalem se babul ko le gaya tha
Jeremiah27:21 jo patra yahova ke bhvan men aur yahooda ke raja ke bhvan men aur yarooshalem men rah gaae haai
Jeremiah27:22 aur jab tak maain unakee sudhai n loon tab tak vaheen rahenge
Jeremiah28:1 fir usee varsha
Jeremiah28:2 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki maain ne babul ke raja ke jooae ko tod dala haai.
Jeremiah28:3 yahova ke bhvan ke jitane patra babul ka raja nabookadanessar is sthan se uttakar babul le gaya
Jeremiah28:4 aur maain yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ka putra yakonyah aur sab yahoodee bandhauae jo babul ko gaae haai
Jeremiah28:5 tab yirmayah nabee ne hananyah nabee se
Jeremiah28:6 ameen! yahova aeesa hee kare jo baten too ne bhvishyadanee karake kahee haain ki yahova ke bhvan ke patra aur sab bandhauae babul se is sthan men fir aaenge
Jeremiah28:7 taubhee mera yah vachan sun
Jeremiah28:8 jo bhavishyadvkta praacheenakal se mere aur tere paahile hote aae the
Jeremiah28:9 parantu jo bhvishyadvkta kushal ke vishay bhavishyadanee kare
Jeremiah28:10 tab hananyah bhvishyadvkta ne us jooae ko jo yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee gardan par tha
Jeremiah28:11 aur hananyah ne sab logon ke samhane kaha
Jeremiah28:12 jab hananyah bhvishyadvkta ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee gardan par se jooa utarakar tod diya
Jeremiah28:13 jakar hananyah se yah kah
Jeremiah28:14 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar
Jeremiah28:15 aur yirmayah nabee ne hananyah nabee se yah bhee kaha
Jeremiah28:16 isaliye yahova tujh se yon kahata haai
Jeremiah28:17 is vachan ke anusar hananyah usee varsha ke sataven maheene men mar gaya.
Jeremiah29:1 usee varsha yirmayah nabee ne is ashay kee patrae
Jeremiah29:2 yah patraee us samay bhejee gai
Jeremiah29:3 yah patraee shaapan ke putra aelasa aur hilkaiyyah ke putra gamaryah ke hath bhejee gai
Jeremiah29:4 us men likha tha ki jitane logon ko maain ne yarooshalem se bandhaua karake babul men pahunchava diya haai
Jeremiah29:5 ghar banakar un men bas jao bariyan lagakar unake fal khao.
Jeremiah29:6 byah karake bettebettyaian janmao aur apane betton ke liye striayan byah lo aur apanee beattyaian purushaen ko byah do
Jeremiah29:7 parantu jis nagar men maain ne tum ko bandhaua karake bheej diya haai
Jeremiah29:8 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar
Jeremiah29:9 kyonaki ve mere nam se tum ko joottee bhavishyadanee sunate haain maain ne unhen naheen bheja
Jeremiah29:10 yahova yon kahata haai ki vabul ke sattar varsha poore hone par maain tumharee suadhai loonga
Jeremiah29:11 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah29:12 tab us samay tum mujh ko pukaroge aur akar mujh se praarthna karoge aur maain tumharee sunoonga.
Jeremiah29:13 tum mujhe ddoonddhoge aur paoge bhee kyonaki tum apane sampoorn man se mere pas aoge.
Jeremiah29:14 maain tumhen miloonga
Jeremiah29:15 tum kahate to ho ki yahova ne hamare liye babul men bhvishyadvkta pragatt kiae haain.
Jeremiah29:16 parantu jo raja daud kee baee par virajaman haai
Jeremiah29:17 suno
Jeremiah29:18 maain talavar
Jeremiah29:19 kyonaki jo vachan maain ne apane das bhvishyadvktaon ke dara unake pas bada yatn karake kahala bheje haai
Jeremiah29:20 isaliye he sare bandhauo
Jeremiah29:21 kolayah ka putra ahab aur maseyah ka putra sidaakiyyah jo mere nam se tum ko joottee bhavishyadanee sunate haai
Jeremiah29:22 aur sab yahoodee bandhauae jo babul men rahate haai
Jeremiah29:23 kyonaki unhon ne israaaeliyon men mooddhta ke kam kia
Jeremiah29:24 aur nehelamee shamayah se too yah kah
Jeremiah29:25 isaliye ki too ne yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalon aur sab yajakon ko aur yaseyah ke putra sapanyah yajak ko apane hee nam kee is ashay kee patraee bhejee
Jeremiah29:26 ki
Jeremiah29:27 so yirmayah anatotee jo tumhara bhvishyadvkta ban baaitta haai
Jeremiah29:28 us ne to ham logon ke pas babul men yah kahala bheja haai ki bandhauai to bahut kal tak rahegee
Jeremiah29:29 yah patraee sapanyah yajak ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko paddh sunai.
Jeremiah29:30 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha ki sab bandhauon ke pas yah kahala bhej
Jeremiah29:31 yahova nehelamee shamayah ke vishay yon kahata haai ki shamayah ne mere bina bheje tum se jo bhvishyadanee kee aur tum ko joott par bhrosa dilaya haai
Jeremiah29:32 isaliye yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah30:1 yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha vah yah haai
Jeremiah30:2 israaael ka parameshvar yahova tujh se yon kahata haai
Jeremiah30:3 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah30:4 jo vachan yahova ne israaaeliyon aur yahoodiyon ke vishay kahe the
Jeremiah30:5 yahova yon kahata haai thrathra denevala shabd sunai de raha haai

Jeremiah30:7 hay
Jeremiah30:8 aur senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah30:9 parantu ve apane parameshvar yahova aur apane raja daud kee seva karenge jisako maain un par rajy karane ke liye ttharaunga.
Jeremiah30:10 isaliye he mere das yakoob
Jeremiah30:11 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah30:12 yahova yon kahata haai tere dukh kee koi aushadha nahee
Jeremiah30:13 tera mukama ladne ke liye koi nahee
Jeremiah30:14 tere sab mitra tujhe bool gaae ve tumharee suadhai naheen lete kyonki tere bade adharma aur bharee papon ke kara
Jeremiah30:15 too apane ghaav ke mare kyon chillatee haai? teree peeda kee koi aushadha naheen. tere bade adharma aur bharee papon ke karan maain ne tujh se aeesa vyavahar kiya haai.
Jeremiah30:16 parantu jitane tujhe ab khaae lete haai
Jeremiah30:17 maain tera ilaj karake tere ghaavon ko changa karoonga
Jeremiah30:18 yahova kahata haai maain yakoob ke tamboo ko bandhauai se lauttata hoo aur usake gharon par daya karoonga or nagar apane hee khndhar par fir basega
Jeremiah30:19 tab un men se dhany kahane
Jeremiah30:20 maain unaka vibhv baddhaunga

Jeremiah30:24 jab tak yahova apana kam n kar chuke aur apanee yuaktaiyon ko pooree n kar chuke
Jeremiah31:1 un dinon men maain sare israaelee kulon ka parameshvar ttharoonga aur ve meree praja ttharenge
Jeremiah31:2 yahova yon kahata haai jo praja talavar se bach nikalee
Jeremiah31:3 yahova ne mujhe door se darshan dekar kaha haai. maain tujh se sada praem rakhta aya hoo is karan maain ne tujh par apanee karuna banaae rakhee haai.
Jeremiah31:4 he israaaelee kumaree kanya! maain tujhe fir basaunga vahan too fir singar karake dfa bajane lagegee
Jeremiah31:5 too shaemaron ke pahadon par angoor kee bariyan fir lagaaegee aur jo unhen lagaaenge
Jeremiah31:6 kyonaki aeesa din aaega
Jeremiah31:7 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai yakoob ke karan anand se jayajayakar karo jaatiyon men jo shraeshtt haai usake liye unche shabad se stuati karo
Jeremiah31:8 dekho
Jeremiah31:9 ve ansoo bahate huae aaenge aur gidgidate huae mere dara pahunchaae jaaenge
Jeremiah31:10 he jaati jati ke logo
Jeremiah31:11 kyonaki yahova ne yakoob ko chhuda liya
Jeremiah31:12 isaliye ve siyyon kee chottee par akar jayajayakar karenge
Jeremiah31:13 us samay unakee kumaariyan nachatee hui harsha karengee
Jeremiah31:14 maain yajakon ko chikanee vastuon se aati trapt karoonga
Jeremiah31:15 yahova yah bhee kahata haai sun
Jeremiah31:16 yahova yon kahata he rone-peettne aur ansoo bahane se ruk ja kyonki tere paarishram ka fal milanevala haai
Jeremiah31:17 ant men teree asha pooree hogee
Jeremiah31:18 nishchay maain ne aepraaim ko ye baten kahakar vilap karate suna haai ki too ne meree tadna kee
Jeremiah31:19 bhttk jane ke bad maain pachhtaya aur sikhaae jane ke bad maain ne chhatee peettee purane papon ko smasan kar maain laajjait hua aur mera munh kala ho gaya.

Jeremiah31:22 he bhttkanevalee kanya

Jeremiah31:34 aur tab unhen fir aek doosare se yah n kahana padega ki yahova ko jano

Jeremiah31:39 aur mapane kee rassee fir age baddhkar seedhaee gareb pahadee tak

Jeremiah32:1 yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke dasaven varsha men jo nabookadanessar ke rajy ka attarahavan varsha tha
Jeremiah32:2 us samay babul ke raja kee sena ne yarooshalem ko ghor liya tha aur yirmayah bhvishyadvkta yahooda ke raja ke pahare ke bhvan ke angan men kaaidee tha.
Jeremiah32:3 kyonaki yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ne yah kahakar use kaaid kiya tha
Jeremiah32:4 aur yahooda ka raja sidaakiyyah kasaadiyon ke hath se n bachega parantu vah babul ke raja ke vash men avashy hee padega
Jeremiah32:5 aur vah sidaakiyyah ko babul men le jaaega
Jeremiah32:6 yirmayah ne kaha
Jeremiah32:7 dek
Jeremiah32:8 so yahova ke vachan ke anusar mera chachera bhai hanamel pahare ke angan men mere pas akar kahane laga
Jeremiah32:9 isaliye maain ne us anatot ke khet ko apane chachere bhai hanamel se mol le liya
Jeremiah32:10 aur maain ne dastaveja men dastakht aur muhar ho jane par
Jeremiah32:11 tab maain ne mol lene kee donon dastabejen jin men sab shatan likhee hui thee
Jeremiah32:12 unhen lekar apane chachere bhai hanamel ke aur un gavahon ke samhane jinhon ne dastaveja men dastakht kiae the
Jeremiah32:13 tab maain ne unake samhane barook ko yah agyaa dee
Jeremiah32:14 ki israaael ke parameshvar senaon ke yahova yon kahata haai

Jeremiah32:17 he prabhu yahova
Jeremiah32:18 too hajaron par karuna karata rahata parantu poorvajon ke adharma ka badala unake bad unake vansh ke logon ko bhee deta haai
Jeremiah32:19 too badee yuaktai karanevala aur samarth ke kam karanevala haai teree drashtti manushyon ke sare chalachalan par lagee rahatee haai
Jeremiah32:20 too ne misra desh men chinh aur chamatkar kia
Jeremiah32:21 too apanee praja israaael ko misra desh men se chinhon aur chamatkaron aur samath hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara
Jeremiah32:22 fir too ne yah desh unhen diya jisake dene kee shapath too ne unake poorvajon se khai thee jisamen doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai

Jeremiah32:32 kyonaki israaael aur yahooda apane rajaon hakimo
Jeremiah32:33 unhon ne meree or munh naheen varan peett hee faer dee haai yadhyapi maain unhen bade yatn se sikhata aya hoo
Jeremiah32:34 varan jo bhvan mera kahalata haai

Jeremiah32:44 aur binyameen ke desh me
Jeremiah33:1 jis samay yirmayah pahare ke angan men band tha
Jeremiah33:2 yahova jo prathvee ka rachanevala haai
Jeremiah33:3 mujh se praarthna kar aur maain teree sunakar tujhe baddhee-badee aur kaattnai baten bataunga jinhen too abhee naheen samajhta.
Jeremiah33:4 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar yahova is nagar ke gharon aur yahooda ke rajaon ke bhvanon ke vishay men jo isaliye giraae jate haain ki damadamon aur talavar ke sath subheete se lad sake
Jeremiah33:5 kasadiyon se yuddh karane ko ve log ate to haai
Jeremiah33:6 dek
Jeremiah33:7 maain yahooda aur israaael ke bandhauon ko lautta le aunga
Jeremiah33:8 maain unako unake sare adharma aur pap ke kam se shuuddh karoonga jo unhon ne mere viruddh kiae haain aur unhon ne jitane adharma aur aparadha ke kam mere viruddh kiae haai
Jeremiah33:9 kyonaki ve vah sab bhlai ke kam sunenge jo maain unake liye karoonga aur ve sab kalyan aur shaaantai kee charcha sunakar jo maain un se karoonga
Jeremiah33:10 yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah33:11 inheen men harsha aur anand ka shabd
Jeremiah33:12 senaon ka yahova kahata haai sab ganvon samet yah sthan jo aeesa ujad haai ki is men n to manushy rah gaya haai aur n pashu
Jeremiah33:13 pahadee desh men aur neeche ke desh me
Jeremiah33:14 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai
Jeremiah33:15 un dinon men aur un samayon men maain daud ke vansh men dharma kee ek dal ugaunga aur vah is desh men nyay aur dharma ke kam karega.
Jeremiah33:16 un dinon men yahooda bacha rahega aur yarooshalem nidr basa rahega aur usaka nam yah rakha jaega athraata yahova hamaree dhaarmikata.
Jeremiah33:17 yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah33:18 aur leveey yajakon ke kulon men praatidin mere liye homabaali chaddhanevale aur annabaali jalanevale aur melabali chaddhanevale sadaaiv bane rahenge.
Jeremiah33:19 fir yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah33:20 maain ne din aur rat ke vishay men jo vacha bandhaee haai

Jeremiah33:22 jaaisa akash kee sena kee ginatee aur samudra kee baloo ke kinakon ka pariman naheen ho sakata haai usee prakar maain apane das daud ke vansh aur apane sevak leaviyon ko baddhakar anaaginit kar doonga.
