Jeremiah34:1 jab babul ka raja nabookadanessar apanee saree sena samet aur prathvee ke jitane rajy usake vash men the
Jeremiah34:2 israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah34:3 aur too usake hath se n bachega
Jeremiah34:4 taubhee he yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah
Jeremiah34:5 too shaantai ke sath marega. aur jaaisa tere pitaron ke liye arthata jo tujh se paahile raja the
Jeremiah34:6 ye sab vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ne yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah se yarooshalem men us samay kahe
Jeremiah34:7 jab babul ke raja kee sena yarooshalem se aur yahooda ke jitane nagar bach gaae the
Jeremiah34:8 yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas us samay aya jab sidaakiyyah raja ne saree praja se jo yarooshalem men thee yah vacha bandhaai ki dason ke svadhaeen hone ka prachar kiya jaa
Jeremiah34:9 ki sab log apane apane dasa-dasee ko jo ibraee va iabirn hon svadhaeen karake jane de
Jeremiah34:10 tab sab haakimon aur saree praja ne yah pran kiya ki ham apane apane dasa-daasiyon ko svatantra kar denge aur fir un se apanee seva n karaaenge so us pran ke anusar unako svatantra kar diya.
Jeremiah34:11 parantu isake bad ve fir gaae aur jin dasa-daasiyon ko unhon ne svatatra karake jane diya tha unako fir apane vash men lakar das aur dasee bana liya.
Jeremiah34:12 tab yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah34:13 israaael ka parameshvar yahova tum se yon kahata haai
Jeremiah34:14 ki tumhara jo ibraee bhai tumhare hath men becha jaae usako tum sataven baras men chhod dena chh baras to vah tumharee seva kare parantu isake bad tum usako svatantra karake apane pas se jane dena. parantu tumhare pitaron ne meree n sunee
Jeremiah34:15 tum abhee fire to the aur apane apane bhai ko svatantra kar dene ka prachar karake jo kam meree draashtti men bhla he use tum ne kiya bhee tha
Jeremiah34:16 par tum bhttk gaae aur mera nam is reeati se ashuuddh kiya ki jin dasa-daasiyon ko tum svatantra karake unakee ichchha par chhod chuke the unhen tum ne fir apane vash men kar liya haai
Jeremiah34:17 is karan yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ne jo meree agyaa ke anusar apane apane bhai ke svatantra hone ka prachar naheen kiya
Jeremiah34:18 aur jo log meree vacha ka ullanghan karate haain aur jo pran unhon ne mere samhane aur bachhde ko do bhag karake usake donon bhagon ke beech hokar kiya parantu use poora n kiya
Jeremiah34:19 arthata yahooda desh aur yarooshalem nagar ke haakim
Jeremiah34:20 unako maain unake shatrauon arthata unake praan ke khojiyon ke vash men kar doonga aur unakee loth akash ke paakshiayon aur maaidan ke pashuuon ka ahar ho jaengee.
Jeremiah34:21 aur maain yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah aur usake hakimon ko unake shatrauon aur unake praan ke khojiyon arthata babul ke raja kee sena ke vash men kar doonga jo tumhare samhane se chalee gai haai.
Jeremiah34:22 yahova ka yah vachan haai ki dekho
Jeremiah35:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy men yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah35:2 rekabiyon ke gharane ke pas jakar un se baten kar aur unhen yahova ke bhvan kee aek kottree men le jakar dakhmadha pila.
Jeremiah35:3 tab maain ne yajanyah ko jo habassainyah ka pota aur yirmayah ka putra tha
Jeremiah35:4 aur maain unako parameshvar ke bhvan me
Jeremiah35:5 tab maain ne rekaabiyon ke gharane ko dakhmadha se bhre huae hande aur kattore dekar kaha
Jeremiah35:6 unhon ne kaha
Jeremiah35:7 n ghar banana
Jeremiah35:8 isaliye ham rekab ke putra apane purakha yonadab kee bat manakar
Jeremiah35:9 aur n ham ghar banakar un men rahate haain. ham n dakh kee baree
Jeremiah35:10 ham tambuon hee men raha karate haai
Jeremiah35:11 parantu jab babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne is desh par chaddhai kee
Jeremiah35:12 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha.
Jeremiah35:13 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jakar yahooda desh ke logon aur yarooshalem nagar ke nivaasiyon se kah
Jeremiah35:14 dekho
Jeremiah35:15 maain tumhare pas apane sare das nabiyon ko bada yatn karake yah kahane ko bhejata aya hoo ki apanee buree chal se firo
Jeremiah35:16 dekho rekab ke putra yonadab ke vansh ne to apane purakha kee agyaa ko man liya par tum ne meree naheen sunee.
Jeremiah35:17 isaliye senaon ka parameshvar yahova
Jeremiah35:18 aur rekabiyon ke gharane se yirmayah ne kaha
Jeremiah35:19 isaliye israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah36:1 fir yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe baras men yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah36:2 aek pustak lekar jitane vachan maain ne tujh se yoshaiyyah ke dinon se lekar arthata jab maain tujh se baten karane laga us samay se aj ke din tak israaael aur yahooda aur sab jatiyon ke vishay men kahe haai
Jeremiah36:3 kya jane yahooda ka gharana us saree vipaattai ka samachar sunakar jo maain un par dalane kee kalpana kar raha hoo apanee buree chal se fire aur maain unake adharma aur pap ko kshama karoon.
Jeremiah36:4 to yirmayah ne neriyyah ke putra barook ko bulaya
Jeremiah36:5 fir yirmayah ne barook ko agyaa dee aur kaha
Jeremiah36:6 so tu upavas ke din yahova ke bhvan men jakar usake jo vachan too ne mujh se sunakar likhe haai
Jeremiah36:7 kya jane ve yahova se gidgidakar praarthna karen aur apanee apanee buree chal se firen kyonki jo krodha aur jalajalahatt yahova ne apanee is praja par bhdkane ko kaha haai
Jeremiah36:8 yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee is agyaa ke anusar neriyyah ke putra barook ne
Jeremiah36:9 aur yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke panchaven baras ke nauven maheene men yarooshalem men jitane log the
Jeremiah36:10 tab barook ne yahova ke bhvan men sab logon ko shaapan ke putra gamaryah jo pradhaan tha
Jeremiah36:11 tab shaapan ke putra gamaryah ke bette meekayah ne yahova ke sare vachan pustak men se sune.
Jeremiah36:12 aur vah rajabhvan ke pradhaan kee kottree men utar gaya
Jeremiah36:13 aur meekayah ne jitane vachan us samay sune
Jeremiah36:14 unhen sunakar sab haakimon ne yahoodee kee jo natanyah ka putra or sholemyah ka pota aur kooshaee ka parapota tha
Jeremiah36:15 tab unhon ne us se kaha
Jeremiah36:16 jab ve un sab vachanon ko sun chuke
Jeremiah36:17 fir unhon ne barook se kaha
Jeremiah36:18 barook ne un se kaha
Jeremiah36:19 tab haakimon ne barook se kaha
Jeremiah36:20 tab ve pustak ko aeleeshama pradhaan kee kottree men rakhkar raja ke pas angan men aae aur raja ko ve sab vachan kah sunaae.
Jeremiah36:21 tab raja ne yahoodee ko pustak le ane ke liye bheja
Jeremiah36:22 raja shaeetakal ke bhvan men baaitta hua tha
Jeremiah36:23 jab yahoodee teen char prashtt paddh chuka
Jeremiah36:24 parantu n koi dra aur n kisee ne apane kapade faade
Jeremiah36:25 aelanatan
Jeremiah36:26 or raja ne rajaputra yarahamel ko aur ajraeeael ke putra sarayah ko aur abdel ke putra sholemyah ko agyaa dee ki barook lekhk aur yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko pakad le
Jeremiah36:27 jab raja ne un vachanon kee pustak ko jo barook ne yirmayah ke mukh se sun sunakar likhee thee
Jeremiah36:28 fir aek aur pustak lekar us men yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem kee jalai hai paahilee pustak ke sab vachan likh de.
Jeremiah36:29 aur yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men kah ki yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah36:30 isaliye yahova yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men yon kahata haai
Jeremiah36:31 aur maain usako aur usake vansh aur karmachariyon ko unake adharma ka dand doonga aur jitanee vipaattai maain ne un par aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon aur yahooda ke sab logon par dalane ko kaha haai
Jeremiah36:32 tab yirmayah ne doosaree pustak lekar neriyyah ke putra barook lekhk ko dee
Jeremiah37:1 aur yahoyakeem ke putra konyah ke sthan par yoshaiyyah ka putra sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga
Jeremiah37:2 parantu n to us ne
Jeremiah37:3 sidaakiyyah raja ne sholemyah ke putra yahookal or maseyah ke putra samanyah yajak ko yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas yah kahala bheja
Jeremiah37:4 us samay yirmayah bandeegrah men n dala gaya tha
Jeremiah37:5 us samay firaun kee sena chaddhai ke liye misra se nikalee tab kasadee jo yarooshalem ko ghore huae the
Jeremiah37:6 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas pahuncha
Jeremiah37:7 israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah37:8 aur kasadee fir vapis akar is nagar se ladenge ve isako le lenge aur foonk denge.
Jeremiah37:9 yahova yon kahata haai
Jeremiah37:10 kyonaki yadi tum ne kasaadiyon kee saree sena ko jo tum se ladtee haai
Jeremiah37:11 jab kasadiyon kee sena firaun kee sena ke dr ke mare yarooshalem ke pas se kooch kar gai
Jeremiah37:12 tab yirmayah yarooshalem se nikalakar binyameen ke desh kee or isaaliye ja nikala ki vahan se aur logon ke sang apana ansh le.
Jeremiah37:13 jab vah binyameen ke faattk men pahuncha
Jeremiah37:14 tab nirmayah ne kaha
Jeremiah37:15 tab haakimon ne yirmayah se krodhait hokar use pittvaya
Jeremiah37:16 yirmayah us talaghar men jis men kai aek kottriyan thee
Jeremiah37:17 usake bahut din beetane par sidaakiyyah raja ne usako bulava bheja
Jeremiah37:18 fir yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah raja se kaha
Jeremiah37:19 tumhare jo bhvishyadvkta tum se bhavishyadanee karake kaha karate the ki babul ka raja tum par aur is desh par chaddhai naheen karega
Jeremiah37:20 ab
Jeremiah37:21 tab sidaakiyyah raja kee agyaa se yirmayah pahare ke angan men rakha gaya

Jeremiah38:2 ki

Jeremiah38:5 sidaakiyyah raja ne kaha

Jeremiah38:11 so aebedamelek utane purushaen ko sath lekar rajabhvan ke bhndar ke talaghar men gaya aur vahan se fattepurane kapade aur chithde lekar yirmayah ke pas us gadhe men raassaiyon se utar diae.
Jeremiah38:12 aur aebedamelek kooshaee ne yirmayah se kaha
Jeremiah38:13 tab unhon ne yirmayah ko rassaiyon se kheenchakar

Jeremiah38:15 yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah se kaha

Jeremiah38:17 yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah se kaha

Jeremiah39:1 yahooda ke raja sidaakiysah ke rajy ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene me
Jeremiah39:2 aur sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke gyarahaven varsha ke chauthe maheene ke nauven din ko us nagar kee shaharapanah todee gai.
Jeremiah39:3 so jab yarooshalem le liya gaya
Jeremiah39:4 jab yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah aur sab yodaon ne unhen dekha tab rat hee rat raja kee baree ke marga se donon bheeton ke beech ke faattk se hokar nagar se nikalakar bhag chale aur araba ka marga liya.
Jeremiah39:5 parantu kasaadiyon kee sena ne unako khdedkar sidaakiyyah ko yareeho ke araba men ja liya aur unako babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke pas hamat desh ke ribala men le gaae aur us ne vahan usake dand kee agyaa dee.
Jeremiah39:6 tab babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usakee ankhon ke samhane ribala men ghaat kiya aur sab kuleen yahoodiyon ko bhee ghaat kiya.
Jeremiah39:7 us ne sidaakiyyah kee ankhon ko faudva dala aur usako babul le jane ke liye beadiyon se jakadva rakha.
Jeremiah39:8 kasadiyon ne rajabhvan aur praja ke gharon ko ag lagakar foonk diya

Jeremiah39:12 ki usako lekar us par krapadraashtti banaae rakhna aur usakee kuchh hani n karana jaaisa vah tujh se kahe vaaisa hee us se vyavahar karana.

Jeremiah40:16 yaheekam ke putra gadalyah ne kareh ke putra yohanan se kaha

Jeremiah44:5 par unhon ne meree n sunee aur n meree or kan lagaya ki apanee burai se firen aur doosare devataon ke liye dhoom n jalaaen.
Jeremiah44:6 is karan meree jalajalahatt aur kop kee ag yahooda ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon par bhdk gai aur ve aj ke din tak ujad aur sunasan pade haain.

Jeremiah44:23 kyonaki tum dhoop jalakar yahova ke virud pap karate aur usakee naheen sunate the

Jeremiah48:1 moab ke vishay israaael ka parameshvar
Jeremiah48:2 moab kee prashansa jatee rahee. heshabon men usakee haani kee kalpana kee gai haai ao
Jeremiah48:3 horonaaim se chillahatt ka shabd suno! nash aur bade dakh ka shabd sunai deta haai!
Jeremiah48:4 moab ka satyanash ho raha haai usake nanhe bachchon kee chillahatt sun padee.
Jeremiah48:5 kyonaki looheet kee chaddhai men log lagatar rote huae chaddhenge aur horonaaim kee utar men nash kee chillahatt ka sankatt hua haai.
Jeremiah48:6 bhago! apana apana praan bachao! us adhamooae ped ke saman ho jao jangal men hota haai!
Jeremiah48:7 kyonaki too jo apane kamon aur sampaattai par bhrosa rakhta haai

Jeremiah48:9 moab ke pankh laga do taki vah udkar door ho jaae kyonaki usake nagar aeese ujad ho jaaenge ki un men koi bhee n basane paaega.
Jeremiah48:10 shaapit haai vah jo yahova ka kam alasy se karata haai aur vah bhee jo apanee talavar lohoo bahane se rok rakhta haai.
Jeremiah48:11 moab bachapan hee se sukhee haai
Jeremiah48:12 is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai
Jeremiah48:13 tab jaaise israaael ke gharane ko betel se laajjait hona pada
Jeremiah48:14 tum kaaise kah sakate ho ki ham veer aur parakramee yoda haain?

Jeremiah48:17 usake as pas ke sab rahanevalo
Jeremiah48:18 he deebon kee rahanevalee too apana vibhv chhodkar pyasee baaittee rah! kyonki moab ke nash karanevale ne tujh par chaddhai karake tere draddh gaddhon ko nash kiya haai.
Jeremiah48:19 he aroaer kee rahanevalee too marga men khdee hokar takatee rah! jo bhagata haai us se

Jeremiah52:1 jab sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga
Jeremiah52:2 aur us ne yahoyakeem ke sab kamon ke anusar vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai.
Jeremiah52:3 nishchay yahova ke kop ke karan yarooshalem aur yahooda kee aeesee dasha hui ki ant men us ne unako apane samhane se door kar diya. aur sidaakiyyah ne babul ke raja se balava kiya.
Jeremiah52:4 aur usake rajay ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke dasaven din ko babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne apanee saree sena lekar yarooshalem par chaddhai kee
Jeremiah52:5 yon nagar ghora gaya
Jeremiah52:6 chauthe maheene ke nauven din se nagar men mahangee yahan tak baddh gai
Jeremiah52:7 tab nagar kee shaharapanah men darar kee gai

Jeremiah52:9 so ve raja ko pakadkar hamat desh ke ribala men babul ke raja ke pas le gaa
Jeremiah52:10 babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usake samhane ghaat kiya
Jeremiah52:11 fir babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah kee ankhon ko faudva dala
Jeremiah52:12 fir usee varsha arthata babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke rajy ke unneesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke dasaven din ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan jo babul ke raja ke sammukh khda rahata tha yarooshalem men aya.
Jeremiah52:13 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan aur yarooshalem ke sab bade bade gharon ko ag lagavakar faunkava diya.

Jeremiah52:23 kangaaniyon ke charon alangon par chhyaianave anar bane the
Jeremiah52:24 aur jalladon ke pradhaan ne sarayah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke sapanyah yajak
Jeremiah52:25 aur nagar men se us ne aek khoja pakad liya
Jeremiah52:26 in sab ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan ribala men babul ke raja ke pas le gaya.

Jeremiah52:28 yo yahoodee apane desh se bandhauae hokar chale gaae. jin logon ko nabookadanessar bandhaua karake le gaya
Jeremiah52:29 fir apane rajy ke attarahaven varsha men nabookadanessar yarooshalem se att sau battees praanaieeyon ko bandhaua karake le gaya
Jeremiah52:30 fir nabookadanessar ke rajy ke teisaven varsha men jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan sat sau paaintalees yahoodee janon ko bandhauae karake le gaya sab praanee milakar char hajar chhsau huae.
Jeremiah52:31 fir yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen kee bandhauai ke saainteesaven varsha men arthata jis varsha babul ka raja aebeelamarodak rajagaee par virajaman hua
Jeremiah52:32 aur us se madhaur madhaur vachan kahakar
Jeremiah52:33 aur usake bandeegrah ke vasr badal diae aur vah jeevan bhr nity raja ke sammukh bhojan karata raha
Jeremiah52:34 aur praati din ke khrcha ke liye babul ke raja ke yahan se usako nity kuchh milane ka prabandha hua. yah prabandha usakee mratyu ke din tak usake jeevan bhr lagatar bana raha.
Lamentations1:1 jo nagaree logon se bhrapoor thee vah ab kaaisee akelee baaittee hui haai! vah kyon aek vidhava ke saman ban gai? vah jo jatiyon kee draashtti men mahan aur praanton men ranee thee
Lamentations1:2 rat ko vah foott foott kar rotee haai
Lamentations1:3 yahooda dukh aur kattnai dasatv se bachane ke liye paradesh chalee gai parantu anyajatiyon men rahatee hui vah chaain naheen patee usake sab khdednevalon ne usakee saketee men use pakad liya haai.
Lamentations1:4 siyyon ke marga vilap kar rahe haai
Lamentations1:5 usake draehee pradhaan ho gaa
Lamentations1:6 siyyon kee putraee ka sara pratap jata raha haai. usake hakim aeese haarinon ke saman ho gaae haain jo kuchh charai naheen pate ve khdednevalon ke samhane se balaheen hokar bhagate haain.
Lamentations1:7 yarooshalem ne
Lamentations1:8 yarooshalem ne bada pap kiya
Lamentations1:9 usakee ashuuddhata usake vasr par haai us ne apane ant ka smaran n rakha isaaliye vah bhyankar reeti se girai gai
Lamentations1:10 draehiyon ne usakee sab manabhavanee vastuon par hath baddhaya haai ha
Lamentations1:11 usake sab nivasee karahate huae bhojanavastu ddoonddh rahe haain unhon ne apana praan bachan ke liaee apanee manabhavanee vastuen bechakar bhojan mol liya haai. he yahova
Lamentations1:12 he sab battohiyo
Lamentations1:13 us ne upar se meree haaddiyon men ag lagai haai
Lamentations1:14 us ne jooae kee rassaiyon kee nai mere aparadhaen ko apane hath se kasa haai us ne unhen battkar meree gardan par chaddhaya
Lamentations1:15 yahova ne mere sab parakramee purushaen ko tuchchh jana us ne niyat parva ka prachar karake logon ko mere viruddh bulaya ki mere javanon ko pees dalen yahooda kee kumaree kanya ko yahova ne mano kolhoo men pera haai.
Lamentations1:16 in baton ke karan maain rotee hoo meree ankhon se ansoo kee dhaara bahatee rahatee haai kyonki jis shaaantaidata ke karan mera jee hara bhra ho jata tha

Lamentations2:1 yahova ne siyyon kee putraee ko kis prakar apane kop ke badalon se ddhanp diya haai! us ne israaael kee shaebha ko akash se dharatee par pattk diya aur kop ke din apane panvon kee chaukee ko smaran naheen kiya.
Lamentations2:2 yahova ne yakoob kee sab baastaiyon ko nitturata se nashtt kiya haai us ne rosh men akar yahooda kee putraee ke draddh gaddhon ko ddhakar mittee men mila diya haai us ne hakimon samet rajy ko apavitra ttharaya haai.
Lamentations2:3 us ne krodha men akar israael ke seeng ko jad se katt dala haai us ne shatra ke samhane unakee sahayata karane se apana daahina hath kheench liya he us ne charon or bhsm karatee hui lau kee nai yakoob ko jala diya haai.
Lamentations2:4 us ne shatra banakar dhanush chaddhaya
Lamentations2:5 yahova shatra ban gaya
Lamentations2:6 us ne apana mandp baree ke machan kee nai achanak gira diya
Lamentations2:7 yahova ne apanee vedee man se utar dee

Lamentations2:16 tere sab shatrauon ne tujh par munh pasara haai

Ezekiel1:3 yahova ka vachan boojee ke putra yahejakel yajak ke pas pahucha aur yahova kee shaaktai us par vaheen pragatt hui.

Ezekiel1:5 fir usake beech se char jeevadhaaariyon ke saman kuchh nikale. aur unaka roop manushy ke saman tha
Ezekiel1:6 parantu un men se har aek ke char char mukh aur char char pankh the.
Ezekiel1:7 unake panv seedho the

Ezekiel1:15 jab maain jeevadhaaariyon ko dekh hee raha tha

Ezekiel1:19 aur jab jeevadhaaree chalate the
Ezekiel1:20 jidhar atma jana chahatee thee

Ezekiel1:22 jeevadhaariyon ke siron ke upar akashmandl sa kuchh tha jo barfa kee nai bhyanak reeati se chamakta tha

Ezekiel27:2 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel27:3 he samudra ke paaittav par rahanevalee
Ezekiel27:4 tere sivane samudra ke beech haain tere bananevale ne tujhe sarvang sundar banaya.
Ezekiel27:5 teree sab pattariyan saneer parvat ke sanauvar kee lakadee kee banee haain tere mastool ke liye labanon ke devadar liae gaae haain.
Ezekiel27:6 tere dand bashaan ke banjavrakshaen ke bane tere jahajaon ka pattav kittaiyon ke deepon se laae huae seedho sanauvar kee hatheedant jadee hui lakadee ka bana.
Ezekiel27:7 tere jahajaon ke pal misra se laae huae boottedar san ke kapade ke bane ki tere liye jhnde ka kam den teree chandanee aeleesha ke deepon se laae huae neele aur baainjanee rang ke kapadon kee banee.
Ezekiel27:8 tere khenevale seedon aur arbad ke rahanevale the he sor
Ezekiel27:9 tere kareegar jodai karanevale gabal nagar ke puraniye aur buaddhmaian log the tujh men vyopar karane ke liye mallahon samet samudra par ke sab jahaj tujh men a gaae the.
Ezekiel27:10 teree sena men faarasee
Ezekiel27:11 teree shaharapanah par teree sena ke sath arbad ke log charon or the
Ezekiel27:12 apanee sab prakar kee sampattai kee bahutayat ke karan tashashaee log tere vyoparee the unhon ne chandee
Ezekiel27:13 yavan
Ezekiel27:14 togarma ke gharane ke logon ne teree sampaattai lekar ghaede
Ezekiel27:15 dadanee tere vyoparee the bahut se deep tere hatt bane the ve tere pas hatheedant kee seeng aur abanoos kee lakadee vyopar men late the.
Ezekiel27:16 teree bahut kareegaree ke karan aram tera vyoparee tha marakat
Ezekiel27:17 yahooda aur israaael bhee tere vyoparee the unhon ne minneet ka gehoo
Ezekiel27:18 tujh men bahut kareegaree hui aur sab prakar ka dhan ikatta hua
Ezekiel27:19 badan aur yavan ne tere mal ke badale men soot diya aur unake karan faaulad
Ezekiel27:20 savaree ke chara-jame ke liye dadan tera vyoparee hua.
Ezekiel27:21 arab aur kedar ke sab pradhaan tere vyoparee tthare unhon ne memne
Ezekiel27:22 shaba aur rama ke vyoparee tere vyoparee tthare unhon ne uttam uttam jati ka sab bhanati ka masala
Ezekiel27:23 haran
Ezekiel27:24 inhon ne uttam uttam vastuaen arthata oddhne ke neele aur boottedar vasr aur doriyon se bandhaee aur devadar kee banee hui chi?a vichitra kapadon kee pettyaian lakar tere sath lena-den kiya.
Ezekiel27:25 tashash ke jahaja tere vyopar ke mal ke ddhonevale huae. unake dara too samudra ke beech rahakar bahut dhanavana aur pratapee ho gai thee.
Ezekiel27:26 tere khaivaaiyon ne tujhe gahire jal men pahuncha diya haai
Ezekiel27:27 jis din too oobegee
Ezekiel27:28 tere manajhyaien kee chillahatt ke shabd ke mare tere as pas ke sthan kanp uttenge.
Ezekiel27:29 aur sab khenevale aur mallah
Ezekiel27:30 aur ve boomi par khde hokar tere pishay men unche shabd se bilak bilakakar roaenge. ve apane apane sir par dhooli udakar rakh men lottenge
Ezekiel27:31 aur tere shaek men apane sir mundva denge
Ezekiel27:32 ve vilap karate huae tere vishay men vilap ka yah geet banakar gaaenge
Ezekiel27:33 jab tera mal samudra par se nikalata tha
Ezekiel27:34 jis samay too athah jal men laharon se toottee
Ezekiel27:35 ttapuon ke sab rahanevale tere karan vismait hue aur unake sab rajaon ke roaen khde ho gaa
Ezekiel27:36 desh desh ke vyoparee tere viruddh hathaudee baja rahe haain too bhy ka karan ho gai haai aur fir sthiar n rah sakegee.
Ezekiel28:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha
Ezekiel28:2 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel28:3 too daaniyyel se adhaik buddhmaian to haai koi bhed tujh se chhpai n hoga
Ezekiel28:4 too ne apanee buaddh iddh aur samajh ke dara dhan praapt kiya
Ezekiel28:5 too ne badee buaddh ise lena-den kiya jis se tera dhan baddha
Ezekiel28:6 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel28:7 isaliye dek
Ezekiel28:8 ve tujhe kabar men utarenge
Ezekiel28:9 tab

Ezekiel28:11 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha
Ezekiel28:12 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel28:13 too parameshvar kee aeden nam baree men tha tere pas aboosha
Ezekiel28:14 too chhanevala abhaishaikt karoob tha
Ezekiel28:15 jis din se too siraja gaya
Ezekiel28:16 parantu lena-den kee bahutayat ke karan too upadrav se bhrakar papee ho gaya isee se maain ne tujhe apaavitra janakar parameshvar ke parvat par se utara
Ezekiel28:17 sundarata ke karan tera man fool utta tha aur vibhv ke karan teree buaddh ibigad gai thee. maain ne tujhe boomi par pattk diya aur rajaon ke samhane tujhe rakha ki ve tujh ko dekhen.
Ezekiel28:18 tere adharma ke kamo kee bahutayat se aur tere lena-den kee kuttlaita se tere pavitrasthan apavitra ho gaae so maain ne tujh men se aeesee ag utpann kee jis se too bhsm hua
Ezekiel28:19 desh desh ke logon men se jitane tujhe janate haain sab tere karan vismait hue too bhy ka karan hua haai aur fir kabhee paya n jaaega.

Ezekiel28:21 he manushy ke santan

Ezekiel28:25 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel28:26 ve us men nidr base rahenge ve ghar banakar aur dakh kee baariyan lagakar nidr rahenge tab maain unake charon or ke sab logon ko dand doonga jo un se aabhaiman ka bartav karate haai
Ezekiel29:1 dasaven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke barahaven din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha

Ezekiel29:6 tab misra ke sare nivasee jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. ve to israaael ke gharane ke liye narakatt kee ttek tthare the.
Ezekiel29:7 jab unhon ne tujh par hath ka bal diya tab too toott gaya aur unake pakhaude ukhd hee gaae aur jab unhon ne tujh par ttek lagai
Ezekiel29:8 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel29:9 tab misra desh ujad hee ajad hoga aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. ds ne kaha haai ki meree nadee meree apanee hee haai
Ezekiel29:10 is karan dek
Ezekiel29:11 chalees varsha tak us men manushy va pashu ka panv tak n padega aur n us men koi basega.
Ezekiel29:12 chalees varsha tak maain misra desh ko ujade huae deshaen ke beech ujad kar rakoonga aur usake nagar ujade huae nagaron ke beech khndhar hee rahenge. maain misiryon ko jati jati men chhnnai-abhainn kar doonga
Ezekiel29:13 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki chalees varsha ke beetane par maain misiryon ko un jatiyon ke beech se ikattha karoonga
Ezekiel29:14 aur maain misiryon ko bandhauai se chhudakar patraas desh me
Ezekiel29:15 vah sab rajyon men se chhotta hoga
Ezekiel29:16 aur vah fir israaael ke gharane ke bhrose ka karan n hoga

Ezekiel36:18 so jo hatya unhon ne desh men kee
Ezekiel36:19 aur maain ne unhen jati-jati men titara-abitar kiya
Ezekiel36:20 parantu jab ve un jatiyon men pahunche jin men ve pahunchaae gaa
Ezekiel36:21 parantu maain ne apane paavitra nam kee suadhai lee
Ezekiel36:22 is karan too israaael ke gharane se kah
Ezekiel36:23 aur maain apane bade nam ko pavitra ttharaunga
Ezekiel36:24 maain tum ko jatiyon men se le loonga
Ezekiel36:25 maain tum par shuuddh jal chhdikoonga
Ezekiel36:26 maain tum ko naya man doonga
Ezekiel36:27 aur maain apana atma tumhare bheetar dekar aeesa karoonga ki tum meree vidhaiyon par chaloge aur mere niyamon ko manakar unake anusar karoge.
Ezekiel36:28 tum us desh men basoge jo maain ne tumhare pitaron ko diya tha aur tum meree praja ttharoge
Ezekiel36:29 aur maain tum ko tumharee saree ashuuddhta se chhudaunga
Ezekiel36:30 maain vrakshaen ke fal aur khet kee upaj baddhaunga
Ezekiel36:31 tab tum apane bure chalachalan aur apane kamon ko jo achchhe naheen the
Ezekiel36:32 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
Ezekiel36:33 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel36:34 aur tumhara desh jo sab ane janevalon ke samhane ujad haai
Ezekiel36:35 aur log kaha karenge
Ezekiel36:36 tab jo jaatiyan tumhare as pas bachee rahengee
Ezekiel36:37 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel36:38 jaaise paavitra samayon kee bhed-bakaariya
Ezekiel37:1 yahova kee shaaktai mujh par hui
Ezekiel37:2 tab us ne mujhe unake charon or ghaumaya
Ezekiel37:3 tab us ne mujh se poochha
Ezekiel37:4 tab us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel37:5 parameshvar yahova tum haaddiyon se yon kahata he
Ezekiel37:6 aur maain tumharee nasen upajakar mans chaddhaunga
Ezekiel37:7 is agyaa ke anusar maain bhavishyadanee karane laga aur maain bhvishyadanee kar hee raha tha
Ezekiel37:8 aur maain dekhta raha
Ezekiel37:9 tab us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel37:10 usakee is agyaa ke anusar maain ne bhavishyadanee kee
Ezekiel37:11 fir us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel37:12 is karan bhvishyadanee karake un se kah
Ezekiel37:13 so jab maain tumaharee kabaren kholoo
Ezekiel37:14 aur maain tum men apana atma samavaunga
Ezekiel37:15 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha
Ezekiel37:16 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel37:17 fir un lakaadiyon ko aek doosaree se jodkar aek hee kar le ki ve tere hath men aek hee lakadee ban jaaen.
Ezekiel37:18 aur jab tere log tujh se poochhe
Ezekiel37:19 tab un se kahana
Ezekiel37:20 aur jin lakaadiyon par too aeesa likhega
Ezekiel37:21 aur too un logon se kah
Ezekiel37:22 aur maain unako us desh arthata israaael ke pahadon par aek hee jaati kar doonga aur un sabhon ka aek hee raja hoga aur ve fir do n rahenge aur n do rajyon men kabhee battenge.
Ezekiel37:23 ve fir apanee moorato
Ezekiel37:24 mera das daud unaka raja hoga so un sabhon ka aek hee charavaha hoga. ve mere niyamon par chalenge aur meree vidhaiyon ko manakar unake anusar chalenge.
Ezekiel37:25 ve us desh men rahenge jise maain ne apane das yakoob ko diya tha aur jis men tumhare purakha rahate the
Ezekiel37:26 maain unake sath shaaantai kee vacha bandhoonga vah sada kee vacha ttharegee aur maain unhen sthan dekar ginatee men baddhaunga
Ezekiel37:27 mere nivas ka tamboo unake upar tana rahega aur maain unaka parameshvar hoonga
Ezekiel37:28 aur jab mera pavitrasthan unake beech sada ke liye rahega
Ezekiel38:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha
Ezekiel38:2 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel38:3 aur yah kah
Ezekiel38:4 maain tujhe ghauma le aunga
Ezekiel38:5 aur unake sang faaras
Ezekiel38:6 aur gomer aur usake sare dalon ko
Ezekiel38:7 isaliye too taaiyar ho ja too aur jitanee bheed tere pas ikatthee ho
Ezekiel38:8 bahut dinon ke beetane par teree sudhai lee jaaegee aur ant ke vashan men too us desh men aaega
Ezekiel38:9 too chaddhai karega
Ezekiel38:10 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel38:11 aur too kahega ki maain bin shaharapanah ke ganvon ke desh par chaddhai karoonga maain un logon ke pas jaunga jo chaain se nidr rahate haain jo sab ke sab bina shaharapanah or bina bedon aur pallon ke base huae haain
Ezekiel38:12 taaki chheenakar too unhen lootte aur apana hath un khndharon par baddhaae jo fir basaae gaa
Ezekiel38:13 shaba aur dadan ke log aur tashash ke vyoparee apane desh ke sab javan sinhon samet tujh se kahenge
Ezekiel38:14 is kara
Ezekiel38:15 aur too uttar disha ke door door sthanon se aaega too aur tere sath bahut see jaatiyon ke log
Ezekiel38:16 aur jaaise badal boomi par chha jata haai
Ezekiel38:17 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel38:18 aur jis din israaael ke desh par gog chaddhai karega
Ezekiel38:19 aur maain ne jalajalahatt aur krodha kee ag men kaha ki nisandeh us din israaael ke desh men bada bhuidol hoga.
Ezekiel38:20 aur mere darshan se samudra kee machhliyan aur akash ke pakshae
Ezekiel38:21 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain usake viruddh talavar chalane ke liye apane sab pahadon ko pukaroonga aur har aek kee talavar usake bhai ke viruddh uttegee.
Ezekiel38:22 aur maain maree aur oon ke dara us se mukama ladoonga aur us par aur usake dalon par
Ezekiel38:23 is prakar maain apane ko mahan aur pavitra ttharaunga aur bahut see jaatiyon ke samhane apane ko pragatt karoonga. tab ve jan lengee ki maain yahova hoo.
Ezekiel39:1 fir he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel39:2 maain tujhe ghauma le aunga
Ezekiel39:3 vahan maain tera dhanush tere baaen hath se giraunga
Ezekiel39:4 too apane sare dalon aur apane sath kee saree jatiyon samet israaael ke pahadon par mar dala jaaega maain tujhe bhanati bhanati ke mansaharee pakshiyon aur vanapashuuon ka ahar kar doonga.
Ezekiel39:5 too khet men girega
Ezekiel39:6 maain magog men aur deepon ke nidr rahanevalon ke beech ag lagaunga aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo.
Ezekiel39:7 aur maain apanee praja israaael ke beech apana nam pragatt karoonga aur apana pavitra nam fir apaavitra n hone doonga tab jati-jati ke log bhee jan lenge ki maain yahova
Ezekiel39:8 yah ghattna hua chahatee haai aur vah ho jaaegee
Ezekiel39:9 tab israaael ke nagaron ke rahanevale nikalenge aur hathaiyaron men ag lagakar jala denge
Ezekiel39:10 aur isake karan ve maaidan men lakadee n beenenge
Ezekiel39:11 us samay maain gog ko israael ke desh men kaabirstan doonga
Ezekiel39:12 israaael ka gharana unako sat maheene tak mittee deta rahega taki apane desh ko shuuddh kare.
Ezekiel39:13 desh ke sab log milakar unako mittee denge aur jis samay meree mahima hogee
Ezekiel39:14 tab ve manushyon ko niyukt karenge
Ezekiel39:15 aur desh men ane janevalon men se jab koi manushy kee haddee dekhe
Ezekiel39:16 vahan ke nagar ka nam bhee hamona haai. yon desh shuuddh kiya jaaega.
Ezekiel39:17 fir he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel39:18 tum shooraveeron ka mans khaoge
Ezekiel39:19 aur mere us bhoj kee chaba se jo maain tumhare liye karata hoo
Ezekiel39:20 tum meree meja par ghaado
Ezekiel39:21 aur maain jati-jati ke beech apanee mahima pragatt karoonga
Ezekiel39:22 us din se age israael ka gharana jan lega ki yahova hamara parameshvar haai.
Ezekiel39:23 aur jaati-jati ke log bhee jan lenge ki israaael ka gharana apane adharma ke karan bandhauai men gaya tha kyonki unhon ne mujh se aeesa vishvasaghaat kiya ki maain ne apana munh un se faer liya aur anako unake vaaiariyon ke vash kar diya
Ezekiel39:24 maain ne unakee ashuuddhta aur aparadhaen hee ke anusar un se bartav karake un se apana munh faer liya tha.
Ezekiel39:25 isaliye parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel39:26 tab us sare vishvasaghaat ke karan jo unhon ne mere viruddh kiya ve laajjait honge aur apane desh men nidr rahenge aur koi unako n draaega.
Ezekiel39:27 aur jab maain unako jati-jati ke beech se faer launga
Ezekiel39:28 aur tab ve jan lenge ki yahova hamara parameshvar haai
Ezekiel39:29 aur un se apana munh fir kabhee n faer loonga
Ezekiel40:1 hamaree bandhauai ke pachcheesaven varsha arthata yarooshalem nagar ke le liae jane ke bad chaudahaven varsha ke paahile maheene ke dasaven din ko
Ezekiel40:2 apane darshanon men parameshvar ne mujhe israaael ke desh men pahunchaya aur vahan aek bahut unche pahad par khda kiya
Ezekiel40:3 jab vah mujhe vahan le gaya
Ezekiel40:4 us purush ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel40:5 aur dekho
Ezekiel40:6 tab vah us faattk ke pas aya jisaka munh poorva kee or tha
Ezekiel40:7 aur paharevalee kottriyan bans bhr lambee aur bans bhr chaudee thee aur do kottriyon ka antar panch hath ka tha aur faattk kee devaddhee jo faattk ke osare ke pas bhvan kee or thee
Ezekiel40:8 tab us ne faattk ka vah osara jo bhvan ke samhane tha
Ezekiel40:9 aur us ne faattk ka osara mapakar att hath ka paya
Ezekiel40:10 aur poova faattk kee donon or teen teen paharevalee kottriyan theen jo sab aek hee map kee thee
Ezekiel40:11 fir us n faattk ke dar kee chaudai mapakar das hath kee pai aur faattk kee lambai mapakar terah hath kee pai.
Ezekiel40:12 aur donon or kee paharevalee kottariyon ke age hath bhr ka sthan tha aur donon or kottariyan chhchh hath kee theen.
Ezekiel40:13 fir us ne faattk ko aek or kee paharevalee kottree kee chht se lekar doosaree or kee paharevalee kottree kee chht tak mapakar pachchees hath kee dooree pai
Ezekiel40:14 fir us ne satt hath ke khmbhe mape
Ezekiel40:15 or faattk ke baharee dar ke age se lekar usake bheetaree osare ke age tak pachas hath ka antar tha.
Ezekiel40:16 aur paharevalee kottriyon me
Ezekiel40:17 tab vah mujhe baharee angan men le gaya aur us angan ke charon or kottariyan theen aur aek farsha bana hua tha jis par tees kottariyan banee theen.
Ezekiel40:18 aur yah farsha arthata nichala farsha faattkon se laga hua tha aur unakee lambai ke anusar tha.
Ezekiel40:19 fir us ne nichale faattk ke age se lekar bheetaree angan ke bahar ke age tak mapakar sau hath paae vah poorva aur uttar donon or aeesa hee tha.
Ezekiel40:20 tab baharee angan ke uttaramukhee faattk kee lambai aur chaudai us ne mapee.
Ezekiel40:21 aur usakee donon or teen teen paharevaalee kottriyan thee
Ezekiel40:22 aur isakee bhee khaidkiyon aur khmbhon ke osare aur khjooron kee map poorvamukhee faattk kee see thee aur is par chaddhne ko sat seeaddhiyan theen aur unake samhane isaka osara tha.
Ezekiel40:23 aur bheetaree angan kee uttar aur poorva or doosare faattkon ke samhane faattk the aur us ne faattkon kee dooree mapakar sau hath kee pai.
Ezekiel40:24 fir vah mujhe daakkhian or le gaya
Ezekiel40:25 aur un khaidkiyon kee nai isake aur isake khmbhon ke osaron ke charon or bhee khaidkiyan theen isakee bhee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee.
Ezekiel40:26 aur is men bhee chaddhne ke liye sat seeaddhiyan theen aur unake samhane khmbhon ka osara tha aur usake donon or ke khmbhon par khjoor ke ped khude huae the.
Ezekiel40:27 aur daakkhian or bhee bheetaree angan ka aek faattk tha
Ezekiel40:28 tab vah daakkhianee faattk se hokar mujhe bheetaree angan men le gaya
Ezekiel40:29 arthata isakee bhee paharevalee kottriya
Ezekiel40:30 aur isake charon or ke khmbhon ka osar bhee pachchees hath lamba
Ezekiel40:31 aur isaka khmbhon ka osara baharee angan kee or tha
Ezekiel40:32 fir vah purush mujhe poorva kee or bheetaree angan men le gaya
Ezekiel40:33 aur isakee bhee paharevalee kottriyan aur khmbhe aur khmbhon ka osara
Ezekiel40:34 isaka osara bhee baharee angan kee or tha
Ezekiel40:35 fir us purush ne mujhe uttaree faattk ke pas le jakar use mapa
Ezekiel40:36 usake bhee paharevalee kottriyan aur khmbhe aur unaka osara tha aur usake bhee charon or khaidkiyan theen usakee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee.
Ezekiel40:37 usake khmbhe baharee angan kee or the
Ezekiel40:38 fir faattkon ke pas ke khmbhon ke nikatt dar samet kottree thee
Ezekiel40:39 aur homabaali
Ezekiel40:40 aur faattk kee aek baharee alang par arthata uttaree faattk ke dar kee chaddhai par do mejaen theen aur usakee doosaree baharee alang par bhee
Ezekiel40:41 faattk kee donon alangon par char char mejen thee
Ezekiel40:42 fir homabali ke liye tarasho huae patthr kee char mejaen thee
Ezekiel40:43 bheetar charon or chauve bhr kee ankadiyan lagee thee
Ezekiel40:44 aur bheetaree angan kee uttaree faattk kee alang ke bahar ganevalon kee kottriyan theen jinake dar dakkhian or the aur poova faattk kee alang par aek kottree thee
Ezekiel40:45 us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel40:46 aur jis kottree ka dar uttar or haai
Ezekiel40:47 fir us ne angan ko mapakar use chaukona arthata sau hath lamba aur sau hath chauda paya aur bhvan ke samhane vedee thee.
Ezekiel40:48 fir vah mujhe bhvan ke osare men le gaya
Ezekiel40:49 osare kee lambai bees hath aur chaudai gyarah hath kee thee aur us par chaddhne ko seeaddhiyan theen aur donon or ke khmbhon ke pas latten theen.
Ezekiel41:1 fir vah mujhe maandair ke pas le gaya
Ezekiel41:2 aur dar kee chaudai das hath kee thee
Ezekiel41:3 tab us ne bheetar jakar dar ke khmbhon ko mapa
Ezekiel41:4 tab us ne bheetar ke bhvan kee lambai aur chaudai maandair ke samhane mapakar bees bees hath kee pai aur us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel41:5 fir us ne bhvan kee bheet ko mapakar chh hath kee paya
Ezekiel41:6 aur ye baharee kottriyan timahalee theen aur aek aek mahal men tees tees kottriyan theen. bhvan ke as pas kee bheet isaliye thee ki baharee kottariyan usake sahare men ho aur usee men kottariyon kee kaadiyan paaittai hui theen aur bhvan kee bheet ke sahare men n theen.
Ezekiel41:7 aur bhvan ke as pas jo kottariyan bahar thee
Ezekiel41:8 fir maain ne bhvan ke as pas unchee boomi deshae
Ezekiel41:9 baharee kottriyon ke liye jo bheet thee
Ezekiel41:10 baharee kottriyon ke beech beech bhvan ke as pas bees hath ka antar tha.
Ezekiel41:11 aur baharee kottriyon ke dar us sthan kee or the
Ezekiel41:12 fir jo bhvan maandair ke pashchaimee angan ke samhane tha
Ezekiel41:13 tab us n bhvan kee lambai mapakar sau hath kee pai aur bheeton samet angan kee bhee lambai mapakar sau hath kee pai.
Ezekiel41:14 aur bhvan ka poova samhana aur usaka angan sau hath chauda tha.
Ezekiel41:15 fir us ne peechhe ke angan ke samhane kee bheet kee lambai jisake donon or chhjje the
Ezekiel41:16 tab us ne devaddhiyon aur jhlaimileedar khaidkiyo
Ezekiel41:17 fir us ne dar ke upar ka sthan bheetaree bhvan tak or usake bahar bhee aur as pas kee saree bheet ke bheetar aur bahar bhee mapa.
Ezekiel41:18 aur us men karoob aur khjoor ke ped aeese hude huae the ki do do karoobon ke beech aek aek khjoor ka ped tha aur karoobon ke do do mukh the.
Ezekiel41:19 is prakar se aek aek khjoor kee aek or manushy ka mukh banaya hua tha
Ezekiel41:20 boomi se lekar dar ke upar tak karoob aur khjoor ke ped khude huae the
Ezekiel41:21 bhvan ke daron ke khmbhe chaupahal the
Ezekiel41:22 vedee katt kee banee thee
Ezekiel41:23 aur maandair aur pavitrasthan ke daron ke do do kivad the.
Ezekiel41:24 aur har aek kivad men do do mudnevale palle the
Ezekiel41:25 aur jaaise maandair kee bheeton men karoob aur khjoor ke ped khude huae the
Ezekiel41:26 aur osare ke donon or jhlaimileedar khaidkiyan theen aur khjoor ke ped khude the aur bhvan kee baharee kottariyan aur mottee mottee dharanen bhee theen.

Ezekiel42:5 aur uparalee kottariyan chhottee thee
Ezekiel42:6 kyonaki ve simahalee thee

Ezekiel43:1 fir vah mujh ko us faattk ke pas le gaya jo poorvamukhee tha.
Ezekiel43:2 tab israaael ke parameshvar ka tej poorva disha se aya aur usakee vanee bahut se jal kee gharagharahatt see hui aur usake tej se prathvee prakashait hui.
Ezekiel43:3 aur yah darshan us darshan ke tuly tha
Ezekiel43:4 tab yahova ka tej us faattk se hokar jo poorvamukhee tha
Ezekiel43:5 tab atma ne mujhe uttakar bheetaree angan men pahunchaya aur yahova ka tej bhvan men bhra tha.
Ezekiel43:6 tab maain ne aek jan ka shabd suna
Ezekiel43:7 us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel43:8 ve apanee devaddhee meree devaddhee ke pas
Ezekiel43:9 ab ve apana vyabhaichar aur apane rajaon kee lothen mere sammukh se door kar de
Ezekiel43:10 he manushy ke santan
Ezekiel43:11 aur yaadi ve apane sare kamon se lajjait ho
Ezekiel43:12 bhvan ka niyam yah haai ki pahad kee chottee ke charon or ka sampoorn bhag paramapavitra haai. dekh bhvan ka niyam yahee haai.
Ezekiel43:13 aur aeese hath ke map se jo sadhaaran hath se chauva bhr adhaik ho
Ezekiel43:14 boomi par dhare huae adhaar se lekar nichalee kusa tak do hath kee unchai rahe
Ezekiel43:15 aur uparala bhag char hath uncha ho aur vedee par jalane ke sthan ke char seeng upar kee or nikale hon.
Ezekiel43:16 aur vedee par jalane ka sthan chaukor arthata barah hath lamba aur barah hath chauda ho.
Ezekiel43:17 aur nichalee kusa chaudah hath lambee aur chaudah chaudee ho
Ezekiel43:18 fir us ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel43:19 arthata leveey yajak log
Ezekiel43:20 tab too usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar vedee ke charon seengon aur kusa ke charon konon aur charon or kee pattree par lagana is prakar se usake liye praayaashchaitt karane ke dara usako pavitra karana.
Ezekiel43:21 tab papabaali ke bachhde ko lekar
Ezekiel43:22 aur doosare din aek nidash bakara papabaali karake chaddhana aur jaaise bachhde ke dara vedee pavitra kee jaa
Ezekiel43:23 jab too use pavitra kar chooke
Ezekiel43:24 too unhen yahova ke samhane le ana
Ezekiel43:25 sat din tak noo prati din papabali ke liye aek bakara taaiyar karana
Ezekiel43:26 sat din tak yajak log vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt karake use shuuddh karate rahen isee bhanati usaka sanskar ho.
Ezekiel43:27 aur jab ve din samapt ho

Ezekiel44:2 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha

Ezekiel44:4 fir vah uttaree faattk ke pas hokar mujhe bhvan ke samhane le gaya tab maain ne desh ki yahova ka bhvan yahova ke tej se bhr gaya haai aur maain munh ke bal gir pada.
Ezekiel44:5 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha
Ezekiel44:6 aur un balavaiyon arthata israaael ke gharane se kahana
Ezekiel44:7 jab tum mera bhojan arthata chaba aur lohoo chaddhate the
Ezekiel44:8 aur toom ne meree paavitra vastuon kee raksha n kee
Ezekiel44:9 isaliye parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai
Ezekiel44:10 parantu leveey log jo us samay mujh se door ho gaae the
Ezekiel44:11 parantu ve mere paavitrasthan men tthaluae hokar bhvan ke faattkon ka pahara denevale aur bhvan ke tthalug rahen ve homabali aur melabali ke pashu logon ke liye vadha kare
Ezekiel44:12 kyonaki israaael ke gharane kee seva tthal ve unakee mooraton ke samhane karate the
Ezekiel44:13 ve mere sameep n aae
Ezekiel44:14 us men seva ka jitana kam ho
Ezekiel44:15 fir leveey yajak jo sadok kee santan haai
Ezekiel44:16 ve mere pavitrasthan men aya kare

Ezekiel47:1 fir vah mujhe bhvan ke dar par lautta le gaya aur bhvan kee devaddhee ke neeche se aek sota nikalakar poorva or bah raha tha. bhvan ka dar to poorvamukhee tha

Ezekiel48:1 gotron ke bhag ye hon uttar sivane se laga hua hetalon ke marga ke pas se hamat kee ghaattee tak
Ezekiel48:2 dan ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pashchaim tak ashor ka aek bhag ho.
Ezekiel48:3 ashor ke sivane se laga hua
Ezekiel48:4 taptalee ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pashchaim tak manashsho ka aek bhaga.
Ezekiel48:5 manashsho ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak aepraaim ka aek bhag ho.
Ezekiel48:6 aepraaim ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak rooben ka aek bhag ho.
Ezekiel48:7 aur rooben ke sivane se laga hua
Ezekiel48:8 yahooda ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak vah arpan kiya hua bhag ho
Ezekiel48:9 jo bhag tumhen yahova ko arpan karana hoga
Ezekiel48:10 yah arpan kiya hua pavitra bhag yajakon ko mile vah uttar or pachchees hajar bans lamba
Ezekiel48:11 yah vishosh pavitra bhag sadok kee santan ke un yajakon ka ho jo meree agyaaon ko palate rahe
Ezekiel48:12 so desh ke arpan kiae huae bhag men se yah unake liye arpan kiya hua bhag
Ezekiel48:13 aur yajakon ke sivane se laga hua leviyon ka bhag ho
Ezekiel48:14 ve us men se n to kuchh beje
Ezekiel48:15 aur chaudai ke pachchees hajar bans ke samhane jo panch hajar bacha rahega
Ezekiel48:16 or nagar kee yah map ho
Ezekiel48:17 aur nagar ke pas uttar
Ezekiel48:18 aur arpan kiae huae paavitra bhag ke pas kee lambai men se jo kuchh bache
Ezekiel48:19 aur israaael ke sare gotraen men se jo tagar men parishram kare
Ezekiel48:20 sara arpan kiya hua bhag pachchees hajar bans lamba aur pachchees hajar bans chauda ho tumhen chaukona pavitra bhag arpan karana hoga jis men nagar kee vishosh boomi ho.
Ezekiel48:21 aur jo bhag rah jaa
Ezekiel48:22 jo pradhaan ka bhag hoga
Ezekiel48:23 any gotron ke bhag is prakar hon poorva se paachchhim tak binyameen ka aek bhag ho.
Ezekiel48:24 binyameen ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak shaimon ka aek bhaga.
Ezekiel48:25 shaimon ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak issakar ka aek bhaga.
Ezekiel48:26 issakar ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak jabooloon ka aek bhaga.
Ezekiel48:27 jabooloon ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak gad ka aek bhaga.
Ezekiel48:28 aur gad ke sivane ke pas dakkhian or ka sivana tamar se lekar kadesh ke mareebot nam sote tak

Daniel8:1 belashassar raja ke rajy ke teesare varsha men us pahile darshan ke bad aek aur bat mujh daniyyel ko darshan ke dara dikhai gai.

Daniel8:6 vah us do seengavale meddhe ke pas jakar

Hosea5:11 aepraaim par andhor kiya gaya haai
Hosea5:12 isaliye maain aepraaim ke liye keede ke saman aur yahooda ke gharane ke liye sadahatt ke saman hoonga..
Hosea5:13 jab aepraaim ne apana rog
Hosea5:14 kyonaki maain aepraaim ke liye sinh
Hosea5:15 jab tak ve apane ko aparadhaee manakar mere darshan ke khojee n honge tab tak maain apane sthan ko lautoonga
Hosea6:1 chalo
Hosea6:2 do din ke bad vah ham ko jilaaega aur teesare din vah hamako uttakar khda karega tab ham usake sammukh jeevit rahenge.
Hosea6:3 ao
Hosea6:4 he aepraaim
Hosea6:5 is karan maain ne bhavishyadvktaon ke dara mano un par kulhadee chalakar unhen katt dala
Hosea6:6 kyonaki maain baalidan se nahee
Hosea6:7 parantu un logon ne adam kee nai vacha ko tod diya unhon ne vahan mujh se vishvasaghaat kiya haai.
Hosea6:8 gilad nam gaddhee to anarthkariyon se bhree haai
Hosea6:9 jaaise dakuon ke dal kisee kee ghaat men baaittte haai
Hosea6:10 israael ke gharane men maain ne roaen khde hone ka karan dekha haai us men aepraaim ka chhnaiala aur israael kee ashuuddhta pai jatee haai..
Hosea6:11 aur he yahooda
Hosea7:1 jab maain israael ko changa karata hoon tab aepraaim ka adharma aur shaemaron kee buraiyan pragatt ho jatee haain ve chhl se kam karate haai
Hosea7:2 taubhee ve naheen sochate ki yahova hamaree saree burai ko smaran rakhta haai. isaaliye ab ve apane kamon ke jal men fasenge
Hosea7:3 ve raja ko burai karane se
Hosea7:4 ve sab ke sab vyabhaicharee haain ve us tandoor ke saman haain jisako pakanevala garma karata haai
Hosea7:5 hamare raja ke janm din men hakim dakhmadha peekar choor huae us ne ttttha karanevalon se apana hath milaya.
Hosea7:6 jab tak ve ghaat lagaae rahate haai
Hosea7:7 ve sab ke sab tandoor kee nai dhadhakate
Hosea7:8 aepraaim desh desh ke logon se milajula rahata haai aepraaim aeesee chapatee tthara haai jo ulattee n gai ho.
Hosea7:9 paradeashaiyon ne usaka bal tod dala
Hosea7:10 israael ka garva usee ke virood sakshaee deta haai in sab baton ke rahate huae bhee ve apane parameshvar yahova kee or naheen fire
Hosea7:11 aepraaim aek bholee pandukee ke saman ho gaya haai jis ke kuchh buddh inaheen ve misriyon kee dohai dete
Hosea7:12 jab ve jaae
Hosea7:13 un par hay
Hosea7:14 ve man se meree dohai naheen dete
Hosea7:15 maain unako shaiksha deta raha aur unakee bhujaon ko balavant karata aya hoo
Hosea7:16 ve firate to haai
Hosea8:1 apane munh men naraasinga laga. vah ukab kee nain yahova ke ghar par jhpattega
Hosea8:2 ve mujh se pukarakar kahenge
Hosea8:3 parantu israael ne bhlai ko man se utar diya haai shatra usake peechhe padega..
Hosea8:4 ve rajaon ko ttharate rahe
Hosea8:5 he shaemaron
Hosea8:6 yah israael se hua haai.. aek kareegar ne use banaya vah parameshvar naheen haai. is karan shaemaron ka vah bachhda ttukade ttukade ho jaaega..
Hosea8:7 ve vayu bote haai
Hosea8:8 israael nigala gaya ab ve anyajatiyon men aeese nikamme tthare jaaise tuchchh baratan ttharata haai.
Hosea8:9 kyonaki ve ashshoor ko aeese chale gaa
Hosea8:10 yadhypi ve anyajaatiyon men se majadoor banakar rakhe
Hosea8:11 aepraaim ne pap karane ko bahut see vediyan banai haai
Hosea8:12 maain to unake liye apanee vyavastha kee lakhon baten likhta aya hoo
Hosea8:13 ve mere liye baalidan to karate haai
Hosea8:14 kyonaki israael ne apane kartta ko bisara kar mahal banaa
Hosea9:1 he israael
Hosea9:2 ve n to khlihan ke ann se trapt honge
Hosea9:3 ve yahova ke desh men rahane n paaenge parantu aepraaim misr men lautt jaaega
Hosea9:4 ve yahova ke liye dakhmadha ka ardha n denge
Hosea9:5 niyat samay ke parva aur yahova ke utsav ke din tum kya karoge?
Hosea9:6 dekho
Hosea9:7 dand ke din aae haain badala lene ke din aae haain aur israael yah jan lega. unake bahut se adharma aur bade desh ke karan bhvishyadvkta to moorkh
Hosea9:8 aepraaim mere parameshvar kee or se paharooa haai bhvishyadvkta sab magorn men bahealiye ka fanda haai
Hosea9:9 ve giba ke dinon kee bhanti atyant bigade haain so vah unake adharma kee suadhai lekar unake pap ka dand dega..
Hosea9:10 maain ne israael ko aeesa paya jaaise koi jangal men dakh paae aur tumahare purakhaon par aeese draashtti kee jaaise anjeer ke pahile falon par drashtti kee jatee haai. parantu unhon ne por ke bal ke pas jakar apane tai lajja ka karan hone ke liye arpan kar diya
Hosea9:11 aepraaim ka vibhv pakshaee kee nain ud jaaega n to kisee ka janm hoga
Hosea9:12 chahe ve apane ladkebalon ka palanaposhan kar bade bhee kare
Hosea9:13 jaaisa maain ne sor ko dekha
Hosea9:14 he yahova
Hosea9:15 unakee saree burai gilgal men haai vaheen maain ne un se gharana kee. unake bure kamon ke karan maain unako apane ghar se nikal doonga. aur un se fir praeeati n rakoonga
Hosea9:16 aepraaim mara hua haai
Hosea9:17 mera parameshvar unako nikamma ttharaaega
Hosea10:1 israael aek lahalahatee hui dakhlata see haai
Hosea10:2 unaka man batta hua haai ab ve doshaee ttharenge. vah unakee veadiyon ko tod dalega
Hosea10:3 ab ve kahenge
Hosea10:4 ve baten banate aur joottee shapath khakar vacha bandhate haain is karan khet kee reghaaariyon men dhatoore kee nain dand foole falega.
Hosea10:5 samariya ke nivasee betaven ke bachhde ke liye drate rahenge
Hosea10:6 vah yareb raja kee bhentt ttharane ke liye ashshoor desh men pahunchaya jaaega. aepraaim lajjait hoga
Hosea10:7 samariya apane raja samet jal ke bulabule kee nain mitt jaaega.
Hosea10:8 aur aven ke unche sthan jo israael k pap haai
Hosea10:9 he israael
Hosea10:10 jab meree ichchha hogee tab maain unhen tadna doonga
Hosea10:11 aepraaim seekhee hui baachhyai haai
Hosea10:12 apane liye dharma ka beej boo
Hosea10:13 tum ne dushttta ke liye hal jota aur anyay ka khet katta haai aur tum ne dhaekhe ka fal khaya haai. aur yah isaaliye hua kyonki tum ne apane kuvyavahar par
Hosea10:14 is karan tumhare logon men hullad uttega
Hosea10:15 tumharee atyant burai ke karan betel se bhee isee prakar ka vyavahar kiya jaaega. bhor hote hee israael ka raja pooree reeati se mitt jaaega..

Hosea12:1 aepraaim panee peettta aur puravaira ka peechha karata rahata haai vah lagatar joott aur utpat ko baddhata rahata haai ve ashshoor ke sath vacha bandhate aur misr men tel bhejate haain.
Hosea12:2 yahooda ke sath bhee yahova ka mukama haai
Hosea12:3 apanee mata kee kokh hee men us ne apane bhai ko adnga mara
Hosea12:4 vah doot se lada
Hosea12:5 yahova
Hosea12:6 isaliye too apane parameshvar kee or fira krapa aur nyay ke kam karata rah
Hosea12:7 vah vyoparee haai
Hosea12:8 aepraaim kahata haai
Hosea12:9 maain yahova
Hosea12:10 maain ne bhvishyadvktaon ke dara baten kee
Hosea12:11 kya gilad kukarmee naheen? ve poore chhlee ho gaae haain. gilgal men baail baali kiae jate haai
Hosea12:12 yakoob aram ke maaidan men bhag gaya tha vahan israael ne aek patnee ke liye seva kee
Hosea12:13 aek bhavishyadvkta ke dara yahova israael ko misr se nikal le aya

Hosea13:5 maain ne us samay tujh par man lagaya jab too jangal men varan atyant sookhe desh men tha.
Hosea13:6 parantu jab israaelee charaae jate the aur ve trapt ho gaa
Hosea13:7 so maain unake liye sinh sa bana hoon maain cheete kee nain unake marga men ghaat lagaae rahoonga.
Hosea13:8 maain bachche chheenee hui reechhnee ke saman banakar unako miloonga

Hosea13:10 ab tera raja kahan raha ki tere sab nagaron men vah tujhe bachaae? aur tere nyayee kahan rahe
Hosea13:11 maain ne krodha men akar tere liye raja banaye
Hosea13:12 aepraaim ka adharma gatta hua haai
Hosea13:13 usako jachcha kee see peedaae uttengee

Joel2:15 siyyon men naraasinga foonko

Amos5:8 jo kachapaachiya aur mragashaira ka bananevala haai
Amos5:9 vah turant hee balavant ko vinash kar deta
Amos5:10 jo sabha se ulahana deta haai us se ve baair rakhte haai
Amos5:11 tum jo kangalon ko latada karate
Amos5:12 kyonaki maain janata hoon ki tumhare pap bharee haain. tum dharmee ko satate aur ghoos lete

Amos5:16 is karan senaon ka parameshvar

Amos5:26 nahee
Amos5:27 is karan maain tum ko daamishk ke us par bandhauai men kar doonga
Amos6:1 hay un par jo siyyon men sukh se rahate
Amos6:2 kalane nagar ko jakar dekho
Amos6:3 tum bure din ko door kar dete
Amos6:4 tum hathee dant ke palangon par lettte
Amos6:5 tum sarangee ke sath geet gate
Amos6:6 aur kattoron men se dakhmadha peete
Amos6:7 is karan ve ab bandhauai men paahile jaaenge
Amos6:8 senaon ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
Amos6:9 aur yaadi kisee ghar men das puroosh bache rahe
Amos6:10 aur jab kisee ka chacha
Amos6:11 kyonaki yahova kee agyaa se bade ghar men chhech
Amos6:12 kya ghaede chattan par dauden? kya koi aeese sthan men baailon se joten jahan tum logon ne nyay ko vish se
Amos6:13 tum aeesee vastu ke karan anand karate ho jo vyarth haai aur kahate ho
Amos6:14 is karan senaon ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
Amos7:1 parameshvar yahova ne mujhe yah dikhaya
Amos7:2 jab ve ghaas kha chukee
Amos7:3 isake vishay men yahova pachhtaya
Amos7:4 parameshvar yahova ne mujhe yah dikhaya: aur kya dekhta hoon ki parameshvar yahova ne ag ke dara mukama ladne ko pukara
Amos7:5 tab maain ne kaha
Amos7:6 isake vishay men bhee yahova pachhtaya aur parameshvar yahova ne kaha
Amos7:7 us ne mujhe yah bhee dikhaya: maain ne dekha ki prabhu sahul lagakar banai hui kisee bheet par khda haai
Amos7:8 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha
Amos7:9 maain ab unako n chhooonga. isahak ke unche sthan ujad
Amos7:10 tab betel ke yajak amasyah ne israael ke raja yarobam ke pas kahala bheja
Amos7:11 kyonaki amos yon kahata haai
Amos7:12 aur amasyah ne amos se kaha
Amos7:13 parantu betel men fir kabhee bhavishyadanee n karana
Amos7:14 amos ne uttr dekar amasyah se kaha
Amos7:15 aur yahova ne mujhe bhed-bakaariyon ke peechhe peechhe firane se bulakar kaha
Amos7:16 isaliye ab too yahova ka vachan sun
Amos7:17 is karan yahova yon kahata haai
Amos8:1 parameshvar yahova ne mujh ko yon dikhaya: ki
Amos8:2 aur us ne kaha
Amos8:3 parameshvar yahova kee vanee haai
Amos8:4 yah suno
Amos8:5 jo kahate ho naya chand kab beetega ki ham ann bech saken? aur vishraamadin kab beetega
Amos8:6 ki ham kangalon ke roopaya dekar
Amos8:7 yahova
Amos8:8 kya is karan boomi n kanpegee? aur kya un par ke sab rahanevale vilap n karenge? yah desh sab ka sab misr kee neel nadee ke saman hoga
Amos8:9 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
Amos8:10 maain tumhare pavorn ke utsav door karake vilap karaunga
Amos8:11 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai
Amos8:12 aur log yahova ke vachan kee khoj men samudra se samudra tab aur uttr se poorab tak mare mare firenge
Amos8:13 us samay sundar kumaariyan aur javan puroosh donon pyas ke mare moorchha khaenge.
Amos8:14 jo log samariya ke pap mool devata kee shapath khate haai

Amos9:2 kyonaki chahe ve khodakar adhaelok men utar jaae
Amos9:3 chahe ve kamrmel men chhpai jaae
Amos9:4 aur chahe shatra unhen hankakar bandhauai men le jaae
Amos9:5 senaon ke parameshvar yahova ke sparsha karane se prathvee pighalatee haai

Amos9:7 he israaeliyo
Amos9:8 dekho

Amos9:11 us samay maain daud kee giree hui jhopadee ko khda karoonga

Obadiah1:1 obadhah ka darshana.. ham logon ne yahova kee or se samachar suna haai
Obadiah1:2 utto! ham us se ladne ko utten! maain tujhe jaatiyon men chhotta kar doonga
Obadiah1:3 he pahadon kee dararon men basanevale
Obadiah1:4 kaun mujhe boomi par utar dega? parantu chahe too ukab kee nain uncha udta ho
Obadiah1:5 yaadi chora-dakoo rat ko tere pas ate
Obadiah1:6 parantu aesav ka dhan kaaise khojakar lootta gaya haai
Obadiah1:7 jitanon ne tujh se vacha bandhaee thee
Obadiah1:8 yahova kee yah vanee haai
Obadiah1:9 aur he teman
Obadiah1:10 he aesav
Obadiah1:11 jis din paradeshaee log usakee dhan sampaati chheenakar le gaa
Obadiah1:12 parantu tujhe uchit n tha ki too apane bhai ke din me
Obadiah1:13 tujhe uchit n tha ki meree praja kee vipaati ke din too usake faattk se ghausata
Obadiah1:14 tujhe uchit n tha ki tiramuhane par usake bhaganevalon ko mar dalane ke liye khda hota
Obadiah1:15 kyonaki saree anyajatiyon par yahova ke din ka ana nikatt haai. jaaisa tu ne kiya haai
Obadiah1:16 jis prakar too ne mere pavitra parvat par piya
Obadiah1:17 parantu us samay siyyon parvat par bache huae log rahenge

Obadiah1:19 daakkhian desh ke log aesav ke pahad ke aadhaikaree ho jaaenge

Obadiah1:21 aur uddhar karanevale aesav ke pahad ka nyay karane ke liye siyyon parvat par chaddh aaenge
Jonah1:1 yahova ka yah vachan amitaai ke putra yona ke pas pahuncha
Jonah1:2 uttkar us bade nagar neenave ko ja
Jonah1:3 parantu yona yahova ke sammukh se tashareesh ko bhag jane ke liye utta
Jonah1:4 tab yahova ne samudra men aek prachand andhaee chalai
Jonah1:5 tab mallah log drakar apane apane devata kee dohai dene lage aur jahaj men jo vyopar kee samagraee thee use samudra men faenkane lage ki jahaj halka ho jaae. parantu yona jahaj ke nichale bhag men utarakar so gaya tha
Jonah1:6 tab manjhee usake nikatt akar kahane laga
Jonah1:7 tab unhon ne apas men kaha
Jonah1:8 tab unhon ne us se kaha
Jonah1:9 us ne un se kaha
Jonah1:10 tab ve nipatt dr gaa
Jonah1:11 tab unhon ne us se poochha
Jonah1:12 us ne un se kaha
Jonah1:13 taubhee ve bade yatn se khete rahe ki usako kinare par lagaae
Jonah1:14 tab unhon ne yahova ko pukarakar kaha
Jonah1:15 tab unhon ne yona ko uttakar samudra men faenk diya aur samudra kee bhyanak laharen thm gain.
Jonah1:16 tab un manushyon ne yahova ka bahut hee bhy mana
Jonah1:17 yahova ne aek bada sa magaramachchh ttharaya tha ki yona ko nigal le aur yona us magaramachchh ke pett men teen din aur teen rat pada raha..
Jonah2:1 tab yona ne usake pett men se apane parameshvar yahova se praarthna karake kaha
Jonah2:2 maain ne sankatt men pade huae yahova kee dohai dee
Jonah2:3 too ne mujhe gahire sagar men samudra kee thah tak dal diya aur maain dhaaraon ke beech men pada tha
Jonah2:4 tab maain ne kaha
Jonah2:5 maain jal se yahan tak ghaira hua tha ki mere praan nikale jate the gaahira sagar mere charon or tha
Jonah2:6 maain pahadon kee jad tak pahunch gaya tha maain sada ke liye boomi men band ho gaya tha taubhee he mere parameshvar yahova
Jonah2:7 jab maain moorchha khane laga
Jonah2:8 jo log dhaekhe kee vyarth vastuon par man lagate haai
Jonah2:9 parantu maain unche shabd se dhanyavad karake tujhe balidan chaddhaunga jo mannat maain ne manee
Jonah2:10 aur yahova ne magaramachchh ko agyaa dee

Jonah3:2 uttkar us bade nagar neenave ko ja
Jonah3:3 tab yona yahova ke vachan ke anusar neenave ko gaya. neenave aek bahut bada lagar tha
Jonah3:4 aur yona ne nagar men pravesh karake aek din kee yatra pooree kee
Jonah3:5 tab neenave ke manushyon ne parameshvar ke vachan kee prateeti kee aur upavas ka prachar kiya gaya aur bade se lekar chhotte tak sabhon ne ttatt oddha.
Jonah3:6 tab yah samachar neenave ke raja ke kan men pahuncha aur us ne sinhasan par se ut
Jonah3:7 aur raja ke pradhaanon se sammaati lekar neenave men is agyaa ka ddheenddhora pittvaya

Micah1:1 yahova ka vachan
Micah1:2 he jaati-jati ke sab logo
Micah1:3 kayonaki dek
Micah1:4 aur pahad usake neeche gal jaaenge
Micah1:5 yah sab yakoob ke aparadha
Micah1:6 is karan maain samariya ko maaidan ke khet ka ddher kar doonga
Micah1:7 usakee sab khudee hui mooraten ttukade ttukade kee jaengee aur jo kuchh us ne chhnaiala karake kamaya haai vah ag se bhsm kiya jaega
Micah1:8 is karan maain chhatee peettkar hay
Micah1:9 kyonaki usaka ghaav asadhy haai aur vipaati yahooda par bhee a padee
Micah1:10 gat nagar men isakee charcha mat karo
Micah1:11 he shaapeer kee rahanevalee nangee hokar nirlaj chalee ja sanan kee rahanevalee naheen nikal sakatee betasel ke rone peettne ke karan usaka sharansthan tum se le liya jaaega.
Micah1:12 kyonaki marot kee rahanevalee to kushal kee batt johate-johate tadp gai haai
Micah1:13 he lakeesh kee rahanevalee apane rathon men veg chalanevale ghaede jota tujhee se siyyon kee praja ke pap ka arambh hua
Micah1:14 is karan too gat ke moreshot ko dan dekar door kar dega akajeeb ke ghar se israael ke raja dhaesha hee khaaenge.
Micah1:15 he maresha kee rahanevalee maain fir tujh par aek adhaikaree ttharaunga
Micah1:16 apane dulare ladkon ke liye apana kesh kattvakar sir munda

Nahum1:1 neenave ke vishay men bharee vachana. aelkoshaee nahoom ke darshan kee pustaka..
Nahum1:2 yahova jal uttnevala aur badala lenevala ishvar haai yahova badala lenevala aur jalajalahatt karanevala haai yahova apane draehiyon se badala leta haai
Nahum1:3 yahova vilamb se krodha karanevala aur bada shaaktaiman haai vah doshaee ko kisee prakar nirdosh n ttharaaega.. yahova bavandr aur andhaee men hokar chalata haai
Nahum1:4 usake ghaudkane se mahanad sookh jate haai
Nahum1:5 usake sparsha se pahad kanp uttte haain aur pahadiyan gal jatee haain usake pratap se prathvee varan sara sansar apane sab rahanevalon samet thrathra uttta haai..
Nahum1:6 usake krodha ka samhana kaun kar sakata haai? aur jab usaka krodha bhdkata haai
Nahum1:7 yahova bhla haai sankatt ke din men vah draddh gaddh ttharata haai
Nahum1:8 parantu vah umadtee hui dhaara se usake sthan ka ant kar dega
Nahum1:9 tum yahova ke virooddh kya kalpana kar rahe ho? vah tumhara ant kar dega vipaati doosaree bar padne n paaegee.
Nahum1:10 kyeanki chahe ve kantton se ulajhe huae ho

Nahum1:14 yahova ne tere vishay men yah agyaa dee haai ki age ko tera vansh n chale maain tere devalayon men se ddhlee aur gaddhee hui mooraton ko katt daloonga
Nahum1:15 dekho

Habakkuk1:1 bharee vachan jisako habakkook nabee ne darshan men paya..
Habakkuk1:2 he yahova maain kab tak teree dohai deta rahoonga
Habakkuk1:3 too mujhe anarth kam kyon dikhata haai? aur kya karan haai ki too utpat ko dekhta hee rahata haai? mere samhane loott-patt aur upadrav hote rahate haain aur jhgada hua karata haai aur vadaavivad baddhta jata haai.
Habakkuk1:4 isaliye vyavastha ddheelee ho gai aur nyay kabhee naheen pragatt hota. dushtt log dharmee ko ghor lete haain so nyay ka koon ho raha haai..

Habakkuk1:14 too kyon manushyon ko samudra kee machhliyon ke saman aur un renganevale jantuon ke saman banata haai jin par koi shaasan karanevala naheen haai.
Habakkuk1:15 vah un sab manushyon ko bansee se pakadkar utta leta aur jal men ghaseettta aur mahajal men fansa leta haai is karan vah anandait aur magan haai.
Habakkuk1:16 iseeliye vah apane jal ke samhane bali chaddhata aur apane mahajal ke age dhoop jalata haai kyonaki inheen ke dara usaka bhag pushtt hota
Habakkuk1:17 parantu kya vah jal ko khalee karane aur jati jati ke logon ko lagatar nirdayata se ghaat karane se hath n rokega?

Malachi1:5 tumharee ankhe ise dekhengee
Malachi1:6 putra pita ka

Malachi1:8 jab tum andho pashu ko bali karane ke liye sameep le ate ho to kya yah bura naheen? aur jab tum langade va rogee pashu ko le ate ho
Malachi1:9 aur ab maain tum se kahata hoo
Malachi1:10 bhla hota ki tum men se koi maandair ke kivadon ko band karata ki tum meree vedee par vyarth ag jalane n pate! senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan haai

Malachi1:13 fir tum yah bhee kahate ho

Matthew1:1 ibraaheem kee santan
Matthew1:2 ibraaheem se isahak utpann hua isahak se yakoob utpann hua aur yakoob se yahooda aur usake bhai utpann hue.
Matthew1:3 yahooda se firis
Matthew1:4 aur aeram se ammeenadab utpann hua aur ammeenadab se nahashaen aur nahashaen se salamon utpann hua.
Matthew1:5 aur salamon aur rahab se boaj utpann hua. aur boaj aur root se obed utpann hua aur obed se yishau utpann hua.
Matthew1:6 aur yishau se daud raja utpann hua..
Matthew1:7 aur daud se sulaaiman us sree se utpann hua jo pahile uriyyah kee patnee thee.
Matthew1:8 aur sulaaiman se rahabam utpann hua aur rahabam se aabiyyah utpann hua aur aabiyyah se asa utpann hua aur asa se yahoshafaat utpann hua aur yahoshaafaat se yoram utpann hua
Matthew1:9 aur ujjaiyah se yotam utpann hua aur yotam se ahaj utpann hua aur ahaj se hijaakiyyah utpann hua.
Matthew1:10 aur hijikiyyah se manaashshiah utpann hua. aur manaashshiah se amon utpann hua aur amon se yoshaiyyah utpann hua.
Matthew1:11 aur bandee hokar babool jane ke samay men yoshaiyyah se yakunyah
Matthew1:12 bandee hokar babul pahunchaae jane ke bad yakunyah se shaalaatiael utpann hua aur shaalatiael se jaroobbabil utpann hua.
Matthew1:13 aur jaroobbabil se abeehood utpann hua
Matthew1:14 aur ajor se sadok utpann hua aur sadok se akheem utpann hua aur akheem se ileehood utpann hua.
Matthew1:15 aur ileehood se iliyajar utpann hua aur ialiyajar se mattan utpann hua aur mattan se yakoob utpann hua.
Matthew1:16 aur yakoob se yoosufa utpann hua jo mariyam ka paati tha jis se yeeshu jo maseeh kahalata haai utpann hua..
Matthew1:17 ibraaheem se daud tak sab chaudah peeddhee hui aur daud se babul ko bandee hokar pahunchaae jane tak chaudah peeddhee aur bandee hokar babul ko pahunchaae jane ke samay se lekar maseeh tak chaudah peeddhee hui..
Matthew1:18 ab yeeshu maseeh ka janm is prakar se hua
Matthew1:19 so usake paati yoosufa ne jo dharmee tha aur use badanam karana naheen chahata tha
Matthew1:20 jab vah in baton ke soch hee men tha to prabhu ka svargadoot use svapn men dikhai dekar kahane laga he yoosufa daud kee santan
Matthew1:21 vah putra janegee aur too usaka nam yeeshu rakhna kyonaki vah apane logon ka un ke papon se udar karega.
Matthew1:22 yah sab kuchh isaliye hua ki jo vachan prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha vah poora ho.
Matthew1:23 ki
Matthew1:24 so yoosufa neend se jagakar prabhu ke doot kee agyaa anusar apanee patnee ko apane yahan le aya.
Matthew1:25 aur jab tak vah putra n janee tab tak vah usake pas n gaya: aur us ne usaka nam yeeshu rakha..

Matthew2:12 aur svapn men yah chitaunee pakar ki herodes ke pas fir n jana
Matthew2:13 un ke chale jane ke bad dekho
Matthew2:14 vah rat hee ko uttkar balak aur us kee mata ko lekar misr ko chal diya.
Matthew2:15 aur herodes ke marane tak vaheen raha isaliye ki vah vachan jo prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha ki maain ne apane putra ko misr se bulaya poora ho.

Matthew5:31 yah bhee kaha gaya tha
Matthew5:32 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoon ki jo koi apanee patnee ko vyabhaichar ke siva kisee aur karan se chhod de
Matthew5:33 fir tum sun chuke ho
Matthew5:34 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo
Matthew5:35 n dharatee kee
Matthew5:36 apane sir kee bhee shapath n khana kyonaki too aek bal ko bhee n ujala
Matthew5:37 parantu tumharee bat han kee ha
Matthew5:38 tum sun chuke ho
Matthew5:39 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo
Matthew5:40 aur yaadi koi tujh par naalish karake tera kurata lena chahe
Matthew5:41 aur jo koi tujhe kos bhr begar men le jaae to usake sath do kos chala ja.
Matthew5:42 jo koi tujh se mange
Matthew5:43 tum sun chuke ho
Matthew5:44 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo
Matthew5:45 jis se tum apane svargeey pita kee santan ttharoge kyonki vah bhlon aur buron dono par apana soorya uday karata haai
Matthew5:46 kyonaki yadi tum apane praem rakhnevalon hee se praem rakho
Matthew5:47 aur yaadi tum keval apane bhaiyon kee ko namaskar karo
Matthew5:48 isaliye chaahiye ki tum siddh bano
Matthew6:1 savadhaan raho! tum manushyon ko dikhane ke liye apane dharma ke kam n karo
Matthew6:2 isaliye jab too dan kare
Matthew6:3 parantu jab too dan kare
Matthew6:4 taaki tera dan gupt rahe aur tab tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai
Matthew6:5 aur jab too praarthna kare
Matthew6:6 parantu jab too praarthna kare
Matthew6:7 praarthna karate samay anyajatiyon kee nai bak bak n karo kyonki ve samajhte haain ki unake bahut bolane se un kee sunee jaaegee.
Matthew6:8 so tum un kee nai n bano
Matthew6:9 so tum is reeati se praarthna kiya karo he hamare pita
Matthew6:10 tera rajy aae teree ichchha jaaisee svarga men pooree hotee haai
Matthew6:11 hamaree din bhr kee rottee aj hamen de.
Matthew6:12 aur jis prakar ham ne apane aparaadhaiyon ko kshama kiya haai
Matthew6:13 aur hamen pareeksha men n la
Matthew6:14 isaliye yaadi tum manushy ke aparadha kshama karoge
Matthew6:15 aur yaadi tum manushyon ke aparadha kshama n karoge
Matthew6:16 jab tum upasana karo
Matthew6:17 parantu jab too upavas kare to apane sir par tel mal aur munh dhae.
Matthew6:18 taaki log naheen parantu tera pita jo gupt men haai
Matthew6:19 apane liye prathvee par dhan ikattha n karo jahan keeda aur kai bigadte haai
Matthew6:20 parantu apane liye svarga men dhan ikattha karo
Matthew6:21 kyonaki jahan tera dhan haai vahan tera man bhee laga rahega.
Matthew6:22 shareer ka diya ankh haai: isaliye yaadi teree ankh nirmal ho
Matthew6:23 parantu yadi teree ankh buree ho
Matthew6:24 koi manushy do svaamiyon kee seva naheen kar sakata
Matthew6:25 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew6:26 akash ke paakshiayon ko dekho! ve n bote haai
Matthew6:27 tum men kaun haai
Matthew6:28 aur vasr ke liye kyon chinta karate ho? jangalee sosanon par dhyan karo
Matthew6:29 taubhee maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew6:30 isaliye jab parameshvar maaidan kee ghaas ko
Matthew6:31 isaliye tum chinta karake yah n kahana
Matthew6:32 kyonaki anyajaati in sab vastuon kee khoj men rahate haai
Matthew6:33 isaliye paahile tum use rajy aur dharma kee khoj karo to ye sab vastuaen tumhen mil jaaengee.
Matthew6:34 so kal ke liye chinta n karo
Matthew7:1 dosh mat lagao
Matthew7:2 kyonaki jis prakar tum dosh lagate ho
Matthew7:3 too kyon apane bhai kee ankh ke tinake ko dekhta haai
Matthew7:4 aur jab teree hee ankh me lattha haai
Matthew7:5 he kapattee
Matthew7:6 paavitra vastu kuton ko n do
Matthew7:7 mongo
Matthew7:8 kyonaki jo koi mangata haai
Matthew7:9 tum men se aeesa kaun manushy haai
Matthew7:10 va machhlee mange
Matthew7:11 so jab tum bure hokar
Matthew7:12 is karan jo kuchh tum chahate ho
Matthew7:13 saket faattk se pravesh karo
Matthew7:14 kyonaki saket haai vah faattk aur sakara haai vah marga jo jeevan ko pahunchata haai
Matthew7:15 jootte bhavishyadvktaon se savadhaan raho
Matthew7:16 un ke falon se tum unhen pahachan loge kya jhadiyon se angoor
Matthew7:17 isee prakar har aek achchha ped achchha fal lata haai aur nikamma ped bura fal lata haai.
Matthew7:18 achchha ped bura fal naheen la sakata
Matthew7:19 jo jo ped achchha fal naheen lata
Matthew7:20 so un ke falon se tum unhen pahachan loge.
Matthew7:21 jo mujh se
Matthew7:22 us din bahutere mujh se kahenge he prabhu
Matthew7:23 tab maain un se khulakar kah doonga ki maain ne tum ko kabhee naheen jana
Matthew7:24 isaliye jo koi meree ye baten sunakar unhen manata haai vah us budiman manushy kee nai ttharega jis ne apana ghar chattan par banaya.
Matthew7:25 aur menh barasa aur baddhen ai
Matthew7:26 parantu jo koi meree ye baten sunata haai aur un par naheen chalata vah us nirbuaddh imanushy kee nain ttharega jis ne apana ghar baloo par banaya.
Matthew7:27 aur menh barasa
Matthew7:28 jab yeeshu ye baten kah chuka
Matthew7:29 kyonaki vah un ke shaaastriayon ke saman naheen parantu aadhaikaree kee nai unhen upadesh deta tha..
Matthew8:1 jab vah us pahad se utara
Matthew8:2 aur dekho
Matthew8:3 yeeshu ne hath baddhakar use chooa
Matthew8:4 yeeshu ne us se kaha dek
Matthew8:5 aur jab vah kafaranahoom men aya to aek soobedar ne usake pas akar us se binatee kee.
Matthew8:6 ki he prabhu
Matthew8:7 us ne us se kaha maain akar use changa karoonga.
Matthew8:8 soobedar ne uttr diya ki he prabhu maain is yogy nahee
Matthew8:9 kyonaki maain bhee paradhaeen manushy hoo
Matthew8:10 yah sunakar yeeshu ne achambha kiya
Matthew8:11 aur maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew8:12 parantu rajy ke santan bahar andhiayare men dal diae jaaenge: vahan rona aur danton ka peesana hoga.
Matthew8:13 aur yeeshu ne soobedar se kaha
Matthew8:14 aur yeeshu ne pataras ke ghar men akar us kee sans ko jvar men padee dekha.
Matthew8:15 us ne usaka hath chooa aur usaka jvar utar gaya aur vah uttkar us kee seva karane lagee.
Matthew8:16 jab sandhya hui tab ve usake pas bahut se logon ko laae jin men dushttatmaaen theen aur us ne un atmaon ko apane vachan se nikal diya
Matthew8:17 taaki jo vachan yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara ka gaya tha vah poora ho
Matthew8:18 yeeshu ne apanee charon or aek badee bheed dekhkar us par jane kee agyaa dee.
Matthew8:19 aur aek shaasree ne pas akar us se kaha
Matthew8:20 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Matthew8:21 aek aur chele ne us se kaha
Matthew8:22 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Matthew8:23 jab vah nav par chaddha
Matthew8:24 aur dekho
Matthew8:25 tab unhon ne pas akar use jagaya
Matthew8:26 us ne un se kaha he alpavishvasiyo
Matthew8:27 aur log achambha karake kahane lage ki yah kaaisa manushy haai
Matthew8:28 jab vah us par gadareaniyon ke desh men pahuncha
Matthew8:29 aur dekho
Matthew8:30 un se kuchh door bahut se sooaron ka jhund char raha tha.
Matthew8:31 dushttatmaon ne us se yah kahakar binatee kee
Matthew8:32 us ne un se kaha
Matthew8:33 aur charavahe bhage
Matthew8:34 aur dekho
Matthew9:1 fir vah nav par chaddhkar par gaya aur apane nagar men aya.
Matthew9:2 aur dekho
Matthew9:3 aur dekho
Matthew9:4 yeeshu ne un ke man kee baten maloom karake kaha
Matthew9:5 sahaj kya haai
Matthew9:6 parantu isaaliye ki tum jan lo ki manushy ke putra ko prathvee par pap kshama karane ka adhaikar haai us ne jhole ke mare huae se kaha utt: apanee khatt utta
Matthew9:7 vah uttkar apane ghar chala gaya.
Matthew9:8 log yah dekhkar dr gaae aur parameshvar kee maahima karane lage jis ne manushyon ko aeesa adhaikar diya haai..
Matthew9:9 vahan se age baddhkar yeeshu ne mattee nam aek manushy ko mahasool kee chaukee par baaitte dekha
Matthew9:10 aur jab vah ghar men bhojan karane ke liye baaitta to bahutere mahasool lenevalon aur papee akar yeeshu aur usake chelon ke sath khane baaitte.
Matthew9:11 yah dekhkar fareesiyon ne usake chelon se kaha tumhara guroo mahasool lenevalon aur papiyon ke sath kyon khata haai?
Matthew9:12 us ne yah sunakar un se kaha
Matthew9:13 so tum jakar is ka arth seekh lo
Matthew9:14 tab yoohanna ke chelon ne usake pas akar kaha kya karan haai ki ham aur fareesee itana upavas karate haai
Matthew9:15 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya baratee
Matthew9:16 kore kapade ka paaiband purane pahiravan par koi naheen lagata
Matthew9:17 aur naya dakhras puranee mashakon men naheen bhrate haain kyonaki aeesa karane se mashken fatt jatee haai
Matthew9:18 vah un se ye baten kah hee raha tha
Matthew9:19 yeeshu uttkar apane chelon samet usake peechhe ho liya.
Matthew9:20 aur dekho
Matthew9:21 kyonaki vah apane man men kahatee thee ki yadi maain usake vasr hee ko choo loonbee to changee ho jaungee.
Matthew9:22 yeeshu ne firakar use dekha
Matthew9:23 jab yeeshu us saradar ke ghar men pahuncha aur bansalee bajanevalon aur bheed ko hullad machate dekha tab kaha.
Matthew9:24 hatt jao
Matthew9:25 parantu jab bheed nikal dee gai
Matthew9:26 aur is bat kee charcha us sare desh men faail gai.
Matthew9:27 jab yeeshu vahan se age baddha
Matthew9:28 jab vah ghar men pahuncha
Matthew9:29 tab us ne un kee ankhe chookar kaha
Matthew9:30 aur un kee ankhe khul gai aur yeeshu ne unhen chitakar kaha savadhaan
Matthew9:31 par unhon ne nikalakar sare desh men usaka yash faaila diya..
Matthew9:32 jab ve bahar ja rahe the
Matthew9:33 aur jab dushttatma nikal dee gai
Matthew9:34 parantu fareeasiyon ne kaha
Matthew9:35 aur yeeshu sab nagaron aur ganvon men firata raha aur un kee sabhaon men upadesh karata
Matthew9:36 jab us ne bheed ko dekha to us ko logon par taras aya
Matthew9:37 tab us ne apane chelon se kaha
Matthew9:38 isaliye khet ke svamee se binatee karo ki vah apane khet kattne ke liye majadoor bhej de..
Matthew10:1 fir us ne apane barah chelon ko pas bulakar
Matthew10:2 aur barah praeariton ke nam ye haain: paahila shamaun
Matthew10:3 firaalippus aur bara-tulmaai thoma aur mahasool lenevala mattee
Matthew10:4 shamaun kananee
Matthew10:5 in barahon ko yeeshu ne yah agyaa dekar bheja ki anyajaatiyon kee or n jana
Matthew10:6 parantu israael ke gharane hee kee khoi hui bhedon ke pas jana.
Matthew10:7 aur chalate chalate prachar kar kaho ki svarga ka rajy nikatt a gaya haai.
Matthew10:8 beemaron ko changa karo: mare huon ko jilao: koddhiyon ko shuuddh karo: dushttatmaon ko nikalo: tum ne sentament paya haai
Matthew10:9 apane pattukon men n to sona
Matthew10:10 marga ke liye n jholee rakho
Matthew10:11 jis kisee nagar ya ganv men jao to pata lagao ki vahan kaun yogy haai? aur jab tak vahan se n nikalo
Matthew10:12 aur ghar men pravesh karate huae us ko ashaeesh dena.
Matthew10:13 yaadi us ghar ke log yogy honge to tumhara kalyan un par pahunchega parantu yaadi ve yogay n hon to tumhara kalyan tumhare pas lautt aaega.
Matthew10:14 aur jo koi tumhen grahan n kare
Matthew10:15 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew10:16 dekho
Matthew10:17 parantu logon se savadhaan raho
Matthew10:18 tum mere liye haakimon or rajaon ke samhane un par
Matthew10:19 jab ve tumhen pakadvaaenge to yah chinta n karata
Matthew10:20 kyonaki bolanevale tum naheen ho parantu tumhare pita ka atma tum men bolata haai.
Matthew10:21 bhai
Matthew10:22 mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge
Matthew10:23 jab ve tumhen aek nagar men sataae
Matthew10:24 chela apane guroo se bada naheen aur n das apane svamee se.
Matthew10:25 chele ka guroo ke
Matthew10:26 so un se mat drana
Matthew10:27 jo maain tum se andhiayare me kahata hoo
Matthew10:28 jo shareer ko ghaat karate haai
Matthew10:29 kya paaise me do gauraaiye naheen bikatee? taubhee tumhare pita kee ichchha ke bina un men se aek bhee boomi par naheen gir sakatee.
Matthew10:30 tumhare sir ke bal bhee sab gine huae haain.
Matthew10:31 isaliye
Matthew10:32 jo koi manushyon ke samhane mujhe man lega
Matthew10:33 par jo koi manushyon ke samhane mera inkar karega us se maain bhee apane svargeey pita ke samhane inkar karoonga.
Matthew10:34 yah n samajho
Matthew10:35 maain to aya hoo
Matthew10:36 manushy ke baairee usak ghar hee ke log honge.
Matthew10:37 jo mata ya pita ko mujh se aadhaik piry janata haai
Matthew10:38 aur jo apana kroos lekar mere peechhe n chale vah mere yogy naheen.
Matthew10:39 jo apane praan bachata haai
Matthew10:40 jo tumhen grahan karata haai
