Matthew11:1 jab yeeshu apane barah chelon ko agyaa de chuka
Matthew11:2 yoohanna ne bandeegrah men maseeh ke kamon ka samachar sunakar apane chelon ko us se yah poochhne bheja.
Matthew11:3 ki kya anevala too hee haai: ya ham doosare kee batt johen?
Matthew11:4 yeeshu ne uttr diya
Matthew11:5 ki andho dekhte haain aur langade chalate firate haain koddhee shuuddh kiae jate haain aur bahire sunate haai
Matthew11:6 aur dhany haai vah
Matthew11:7 jab ve vahan se chal dia
Matthew11:8 fir tum kya dekhne gaae the? dekho
Matthew11:9 to fir kyon gaae the? kya kisee bhavishyadvkta ko dekhne ko? han maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew11:10 yah vahee haai
Matthew11:11 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew11:12 yoohanna bapaatisma denevale ke dinon se ab tak svarga ke rajy par jor hota raha haai
Matthew11:13 yoohanna tak sare bhavishyadvkta aur vyavastha bhavishyadvvanee karate rahe.
Matthew11:14 aur chaho to mano
Matthew11:15 jis ke sunane ke kan ho
Matthew11:16 maain is samay ke logon kee upama kis se doon? ve un balakon ke saman haai
Matthew11:17 ki ham ne tumhare liye bansalee bajai
Matthew11:18 kyonaki yoohanna n khata aya aur n peeta
Matthew11:19 manushy ka putra khata-peeta aya
Matthew11:20 tab vah un nagaron ko ulahana dene laga
Matthew11:21 hay
Matthew11:22 parantu maain tum se kahata hoon ki nyay ke din tumharee dasha se soor aur saaida kee dasha adhaik sahane yogy hogee.
Matthew11:23 aur he kafaranahoom
Matthew11:24 par maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew11:25 usee samay yeeshu ne kaha
Matthew11:26 ha
Matthew11:27 mere pita ne mujhe sab kuchh saunpa haai
Matthew11:28 he sab paarishram karanevalon aur bojh se dabe logo
Matthew11:29 mera jooa apane upar utta lo aur mujh se seekho kyonaki maain namra aur man men dee hoon: aur tum apane man men vishraam paoge.
Matthew11:30 kyonaki mera jooa sahaj aur mera bojh halka haai..
Matthew12:1 us samay yeeshu sabt ke din kheton men se hokar ja raha tha

Matthew12:3 us ne un se kaha kya tum ne naheen paddha
Matthew12:4 vah kyonkar parameshvar ke ghar men gaya
Matthew12:5 ya tum ne vyavastha men naheen paddha
Matthew12:6 par maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew12:7 yaadi tum is ka arth janate ki maain daya se prasann hoo
Matthew12:8 manushy ka putra to sabt ke din ka bhee prabhu haai..
Matthew12:9 vahan se chalakar vah un kee sabha ke ghar men aya.
Matthew12:10 aur dekho
Matthew12:11 us ne un se kaha tum men aeesa kaun haai
Matthew12:12 bhla
Matthew12:13 us ne baddhaya
Matthew12:14 tab fareesiyon ne bahar jakar usake virodha men sammati kee
Matthew12:15 yah janakar yeeshu vahan se chala gaya aur bahut lage usake peechhe ho liye aur us ne sab ko changa kiya.
Matthew12:16 aur unhen chitaya
Matthew12:17 ki jo vachan yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha
Matthew12:18 ki dekho
Matthew12:19 vah n jhgada karega
Matthew12:20 vah kuchale huae sarakande ko n todega aur dhooan detee hui battee ko n bujhaaega
Matthew12:21 aur anyajatiyan usake nam par asha rakhengee.
Matthew12:22 tab log aek andho-goonge ko jis men dushttatma thee
Matthew12:23 is par sab log chaakit hokar kahane lage
Matthew12:24 parantu fareeasiyon ne yah sunakar kaha
Matthew12:25 us ne un ke man kee bat janakar un se kaha jis kisee rajy men foott hotee haai
Matthew12:26 aur yaadi shautan hee shautan ko nikale
Matthew12:27 bhla
Matthew12:28 par yaadi maain parameshvar ke atma kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata hoo
Matthew12:29 ya kyonkar koi manushy kisee balavant ke ghar men ghausakar usaka mal loott sakata haai jab tak ki pahile us balavant ko n bandha le? aur tab vah usaka ghar loott lega.
Matthew12:30 jo mere sath nahee
Matthew12:31 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew12:32 jo koi manushy ke putra ke virodha men koi bat kahega
Matthew12:33 yaadi ped ko achchha kaho
Matthew12:34 he sanp ke bachcho
Matthew12:35 bhla
Matthew12:36 aur maai tum se kahata hoo
Matthew12:37 kyonaki too apanee baton ke karan nirdosh aur apanee baton hee ke karan doshaee ttharaya jaaega..
Matthew12:38 is par kitane shaaastriayon aur fareeasiyon ne us se kaha
Matthew12:39 us ne unhen uttr diya
Matthew12:40 yoonus teen raj din jal jantu ke pett men raha
Matthew12:41 neenave ke log nyay ke din is yug ke logon ke sath uttkar unhen doshaee ttharaaenge
Matthew12:42 daakkhian kee ranee nyay ke din is yug ke logon ke sath uttkar unhen doshaee ttharaaegee
Matthew12:43 jab ashuuddh atma manushy men se nikal jatee haai
Matthew12:44 tab kahatee haai
Matthew12:45 tab vah jakar apane se aur buree sat atmaon ko apane sath le atee haai
Matthew12:46 jab vah bheed se baten kar hee raha tha
Matthew12:47 kisee ne us se kaha dekh teree mata aur tere bhai bahar khde haai
Matthew12:48 yah sun us ne kahanevale ko uttr diya kaun haai meree mata?
Matthew12:49 aur kaun haai mere bhai? aur apane chelon kee or apana hath baddha kar kaha dekho
Matthew12:50 kyonaki jo koi mere svargeey pita kee ichchha par chale
Matthew13:1 usee din yeeshu ghar se nikalakar jheel ke kinare ja baaitta.
Matthew13:2 aur usake pas aeesee badee bheed ikatthee hui ki vah nav par chaddh gaya
Matthew13:3 aur us ne un se drashttanton men bahut see baten kahee
Matthew13:4 bote samay kuchh beej marga ke kinare gire aur paakshiayon ne akar unhen chug liya.
Matthew13:5 kuchh patthreelee boomi par gire
Matthew13:6 par sooraj nikalane par ve jal gaa
Matthew13:7 kuchh jhaadiyon men gire
Matthew13:8 par kuchh achchhee boomi par gire
Matthew13:9 jis ke kan hon vah sun le..
Matthew13:10 aur chelon ne pas akar us se kaha
Matthew13:11 us ne uttr diya
Matthew13:12 kyonaki jis ke pas haai
Matthew13:13 maain un se drashttanton men isaaliye baten karata hoo
Matthew13:14 aur un ke vishay men yashaayah kee yah bhvishyadvvanee pooree hotee haai
Matthew13:15 kyonaki in logon ka man motta ho gaya haai
Matthew13:16 par dhany haai tumharee ankhe
Matthew13:17 kyonaki maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew13:18 so tum banevale ka drashttant suno.
Matthew13:19 jo koi rajy ka vachan sunakar naheen samajhta
Matthew13:20 aur jo patthreelee boomi par boya gaya
Matthew13:21 par apane men jad n rakhne ke karan vah thode hee din ka haai
Matthew13:22 jo jhaadiyon men boya gaya
Matthew13:23 jo achchhee boomi men boya gaya
Matthew13:24 us ne unhen ek aur drashttant diya ki svarga ka rajy us manushy ke saman haai jis ne apane khet men achchha beej boya.
Matthew13:25 par jab log so rahe the to usaka baairee akar gehoon ke beech jangalee beej bokar chala gaya.
Matthew13:26 jab ankur nikale aur balen lagee
Matthew13:27 is par grahasth ke dason ne akar us se kaha
Matthew13:28 us ne un se kaha
Matthew13:29 us ne kaha
Matthew13:30 kattnee tak donon ko aek sath baddhne do
Matthew13:31 us ne unhen ek aur drashttant diya ki svarga ka rajy rai ke ek dane ke saman haai
Matthew13:32 vah sab beejon se chhotta to haai par jab baddh jata haai tab sab sag pat se bada hota haai aur aeesa ped ho jata haai
Matthew13:33 us ne ek aur drashttant unhen sunaya ki svarga ka rajy khmeer ke saman haai jis ko kisee sree ne lekar teen paseree atte men mila diya aur hote hote vah sab khmeer ho gaya..
Matthew13:34 ye sab baten yeeshu ne drashttanton men logon se kahee
Matthew13:35 ki jo vachan bhavishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha
Matthew13:36 tab vah bheed ko chhodkar ghar men aya
Matthew13:37 us ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew13:38 khet sansar haai
Matthew13:39 jis baairee ne un ko boya vah shautan haai kattnee jagat ka ant haai: aur kattnevale svargadoot haain.
Matthew13:40 so jaaise jangalee dane battore jate aur jalaae jate haain vaaisa hee jagat ke ant men hoga.
Matthew13:41 manushy ka putra apane svargadooton ko bhejega
Matthew13:42 aur unhen ag ke kund men dalenge
Matthew13:43 us samay dharmee apane pita ke rajy men soorya kee nai chamakenge jis ke kan hon vah sun le..
Matthew13:44 svarga ka rajy khet men chhpai huae dhan ke saman haai
Matthew13:45 fir svarga ka rajy aek vyoparee ke saman haai jo achchhe motiyon kee khoj men tha.
Matthew13:46 jab use aek bahumooly motee mila to us ne jakar apana sab kuchh bech dala aur use mol le liya..
Matthew13:47 fir svarga ka rajy us bade jal ke saman haai
Matthew13:48 aur jab bhr gaya
Matthew13:49 jagat ke ant men aeesa hee hoga: svargadoot akar dushtton ko dharmiyon se alag karenge
Matthew13:50 vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga.
Matthew13:51 kya tum ne ye sab baten samajheen?
Matthew13:52 unhon ne us se kaha
Matthew13:53 jab yeeshu ne sab drashttant kah chuka
Matthew13:54 aur apane desh men akar un kee sabha men unhen aeesa upadesh dene laga ki ve chakit hokar kahane lage ki is ko yah gyaan aur samarth ke kam kahan se mile?
Matthew13:55 kya yah baddhi ka betta naheen? aur kya is kee mata ka nam mariyam aur is ke bhaiyon ke nam yakoob aur yoosufa aur shamaun aur yahooda naheen?
Matthew13:56 aur kya is kee sab bahinen hamare beech men naheen rahatee? fir is ko yah sab kahan se mila?
Matthew13:57 so unhon ne usake karan ttokar khai
Matthew13:58 aur us ne vahan un ke avishvas ke karan bahut samarth ke kam naheen kiae..
Matthew14:1 us samay chauthai desh ke raja herodes ne yeeshu kee charcha sunee.
Matthew14:2 aur apane sevakon se kaha
Matthew14:3 kyonaki herodes ne apane bhai filippus kee patnee herodiyas ke kara
Matthew14:4 kyonaki yoohanna ne us se kaha tha
Matthew14:5 aur vah use mar dalana chahata tha
Matthew14:6 par jab herodes ka janm din aya
Matthew14:7 isaliye us ne shapath khakar vachan diya
Matthew14:8 vah apanee mata kee uskai hui bolee
Matthew14:9 raja dukhait hua
Matthew14:10 aur jelakhane men logon ko bhejakar yoohanna ka sir kattva diya.
Matthew14:11 aur usaka sir thal men laya gaya
Matthew14:12 aur usake chelon ne akar aur us kee loth ko le jakar gaddh diya aur jakar yeeshu ko samachar diya..
Matthew14:13 jab yeeshu ne yah suna
Matthew14:14 us ne nikalakar badee bheed dekhee aur un par taras khaya aur us ne un ke beemaron ko changa kiya.
Matthew14:15 jab sanjh hui
Matthew14:16 yeeshu ne un se kaha un ka jana avashyak naheen! tum hee inhen khane ko do.
Matthew14:17 unhon ne us se kaha yahan hamare pas panch rottee aur do machhliyon ko chhod aur kuchh naheen haai.
Matthew14:18 us ne kaha
Matthew14:19 tab us ne logon ko ghaas par baaittne ko kaha
Matthew14:20 aur sab khakar trapt ho gaa
Matthew14:21 aur khanevale striayon aur balakon ko chhodkar panch hajar purooshaen ke attkal the..
Matthew14:22 aur us ne turant apane chelon ko barabas nav par chaddhaya
Matthew14:23 vah logon ko vida karake
Matthew14:24 us samay nav jheel ke beech laharon se dgamaga rahee thee
Matthew14:25 aur vah rat ke chauthe pahar jheel par chalate huae un ke pas aya.
Matthew14:26 chele us ko jheel par chalate huae dekhkar ghabara gaae! aur kahane lage
Matthew14:27 yeeshu ne turant un se baten kee
Matthew14:28 pataras ne us ko uttr diya
Matthew14:29 us ne kaha
Matthew14:30 par hava ko dekhkar dr gaya
Matthew14:31 yeeshu ne turant hath baddhakar use tham liya
Matthew14:32 jab ve nav par chaddh gaa
Matthew14:33 is par jo nav par the
Matthew14:34 ve par utarakar gannesarat desh men pahunche.
Matthew14:35 aur vahan ke logon ne use pahachanakar as pas ke sare desh men kahala bheja
Matthew14:36 aur us se binatee karane lage
Matthew15:1 tab yarooshalem se kitane fareesee aur shaasree yeeshu ke pas akar kahane lage.
Matthew15:2 tere chele puraniyon kee reeton ko kyon ttalate haai
Matthew15:3 us ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew15:4 kyonaki parameshvar ne kaha tha
Matthew15:5 par tum kahate ho
Matthew15:6 to vah apane pita ka adar n kare
Matthew15:7 he kapattyaie
Matthew15:8 ki ye log hotton se to mera adar karate haai
Matthew15:9 aur ye vyarth meree upasana karate haai
Matthew15:10 aur us ne logon ko apane pas bulakar un se kaha
Matthew15:11 jo munh men jata haai
Matthew15:12 tab chelon ne akar us se kaha
Matthew15:13 us ne uttr diya
Matthew15:14 un ko jane do ve andho marga dikhanevale haain: aur andha yadi andho ko marga dikhaa
Matthew15:15 yah sunakar
Matthew15:16 us ne kaha
Matthew15:17 kya naheen samajhte
Matthew15:18 par jo kuchh munh se nikalata haai
Matthew15:19 kyonaki kuchinta
Matthew15:20 yahee haain jo manushy ko ashuuddh karatee haai
Matthew15:21 yeeshu vahan se nikalakar
Matthew15:22 aur dekho
Matthew15:23 par us ne use kuchh uttr n diya
Matthew15:24 us ne uttr diya
Matthew15:25 par vah ai
Matthew15:26 us ne uttr diya
Matthew15:27 us ne kaha
Matthew15:28 is par yeeshu ne us ko uttr dekar kaha
Matthew15:29 yeeshu vahan se chalakar
Matthew15:30 aur bheed par bheed langado
Matthew15:31 so jab logon ne dekha
Matthew15:32 yeeshu ne apane chelon ko bulakar kaha
Matthew15:33 chelon ne us se kaha
Matthew15:34 yeeshu ne un se poochha
Matthew15:35 tab us ne logon ko boomi par baaittne kee agyaa dee.
Matthew15:36 aur un sat rottyaien aur machhliyon ko le dhanyavad karake toda aur apane chelon ko deta gaya aur chele logon ko.
Matthew15:37 so sab khakar trapt ho gaae aur bache huae ttukadon se bhre huae sat ttokare uttaae.
Matthew15:38 aur khanevale striayon aur balakon ko chhod char hajar puroosh the.
Matthew15:39 tab vah bheed ko vida karake nav par chaddh gaya
Matthew16:1 aur fareesiyon aur sadookiyon ne pas akar use parakhne ke liye us se kaha
Matthew16:2 us ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew16:3 aur bhor ko kahate ho
Matthew16:4 is yug ke bure aur vyaabhaicharee log chinh ddoonddhte haain par yoonus ke chinh ko chhod koi aur chinh unhen n diya jaaega
Matthew16:5 aur chele par jate samay rottee lena bool gaae the.
Matthew16:6 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew16:7 ve apas men vichar karane lage
Matthew16:8 yah janakar
Matthew16:9 kya tum ab tak naheen samajhe? aur un panch hajar kee panch rottee smaran naheen karate
Matthew16:10 aur n un char hajar kee sat rottee aur n yah ki kitane ttokare uttaae gaae the?
Matthew16:11 tum kyon naheen samajhte ki maain ne tum se rottyaien ke vishay men naheen kaha? fareesiyon aur sadookiyon ke khmeer se chaukas rahana.
Matthew16:12 tab un ko samajh men aya
Matthew16:13 yeeshu kaaisariya filippee ke desh men akar apane chelon se poochhne laga
Matthew16:14 unhon ne kaha
Matthew16:15 us ne un se kaha parantu tum mujhe kya kahate ho?
Matthew16:16 shamaun pataras ne uttr diya
Matthew16:17 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya
Matthew16:18 aur maain bhee tujh se kahata hoo
Matthew16:19 maain tujhe svarga ke rajy kee kunajiyan doonga: aur jo kuchh too prathvee par bandhoga
Matthew16:20 tab us ne chelon ko chitaya
Matthew16:21 us samay se yeeshu apane chelon ko batane laga
Matthew16:22 is par pataras use alag le jakar jhdikane laga ki he prabhu
Matthew16:23 us ne firakar pataras se kaha
Matthew16:24 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon se kaha yadi koi mere peechhe ana chahe
Matthew16:25 kyonaki jo koi apana praan bachana chahe
Matthew16:26 yaadi manushy sare jagat ko praapt kare
Matthew16:27 manushy ka putra apane svargadooton ke sath apane pita kee maahima men aaega
Matthew16:28 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew17:1 chh: din ke bad yeeshu ne pataras aur yakoob aur usake bhai yoohanna ko sath liya
Matthew17:2 aur unake samhane usaka roopantar hua aur usaka munh soorya kee nai chamaka aur usaka vasr jyoti kee nain ujala ho gaya.
Matthew17:3 aur dekho
Matthew17:4 is par pataras ne yeeshu se kaha
Matthew17:5 vah bol hee raha tha
Matthew17:6 chele yah sunakar munh ke bal gir gaae aur atyant dr gaae.
Matthew17:7 yeeshu ne pas akar unhen chooa
Matthew17:8 tab unhon ne apanee ankhe uttakar yeeshu ko chhod aur kisee ko n dekha.
Matthew17:9 jab ve pahad se utar rahe the tab yeeshu ne unhen yah agyaa dee ki jab tak manushy ka putra mare huon men se n jee utte tab tak jo kuchh tum ne dekha haai kisee se n kahana.
Matthew17:10 aur usake chelon ne us se poochha
Matthew17:11 us ne uttr diya
Matthew17:12 parantu maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew17:13 tab chelon ne samajha ki us ne ham se yoohanna bapatisma denevale ke vishay men kaha haai.
Matthew17:14 jab ve bheed ke pas pahunche
Matthew17:15 he prabhu
Matthew17:16 aur maain us ko tere chelon ke pas laya tha
Matthew17:17 yeeshu ne uttr diya
Matthew17:18 tab yeeshu ne use ghaudka
Matthew17:19 tab chelon ne aekant men yeeshu ke pas akar kaha ham ise kyon naheen nikal sake?
Matthew17:20 us ne un se kaha
Matthew17:21 jab ve galeel men the
Matthew17:22 aur ve use mar dalenge
Matthew17:23 is par ve bahut udas huae..
Matthew17:24 jab ve kafaranahoom men pahunche
Matthew17:25 jab vah ghar men aya
Matthew17:26 yeeshu n us se kaha
Matthew17:27 taubhee isaaliye ki ham unhen ttokar n khailaae
Matthew18:1 usee ghadee chele yeeshu ke pas akar poochhne lage
Matthew18:2 is par us ne aek balak ko pas bulakar un ke beech men khda kiya.
Matthew18:3 aur kaha
Matthew18:4 jo koi apane ap ko is balak ke saman chhotta karega
Matthew18:5 aur jo koi mere nam se aek aeese balak ko grahan karata haai vah mujhe grahan karata haai.
Matthew18:6 par jo koi in chhotton men se jo mujh par vishvas karate haain aek ko ttokar khailaa
Matthew18:7 ttokaron ke karan sansar par haya! ttokaron ka lagana avashy haai par hay us manushy par jis ke dara ttokar lagatee haai.
Matthew18:8 yaadi tera hath ya tera panv tujhe ttokar khailaa
Matthew18:9 aur yaadi teree ankh tujhe ttokar khailaa
Matthew18:10 kana hokar jeevan men pravesh karana tere liye is se bhla haai
Matthew18:11 dekho
Matthew18:12 tum kya samajhte ho? yaadi kisee manushy kee sau bheden ho
Matthew18:13 aur yaadi aeesa ho ki use paa
Matthew18:14 aeesa hee tumhare pita kee jo svarga men haai yah ichchha nahee
Matthew18:15 yaadi tera bhai tera aparadha kare
Matthew18:16 aur yaadi vah n sune
Matthew18:17 yaadi vah un kee bhee n mane
Matthew18:18 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew18:19 fir maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew18:20 kyonaki jahan do ya teen mere nam par ikatthe hote haain vahan maain un ke beech men hota hoon..
Matthew18:21 tab pataras ne pas akar
Matthew18:22 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Matthew18:23 isaliye svarga ka rajy us raja ke saman haai
Matthew18:24 jab vah lekha lene laga
Matthew18:25 jab ki chukane ko usake pas kuchh n tha
Matthew18:26 is par us das ne girakar use pranam kiya
Matthew18:27 tab us das ke svamee ne taras khakar use chhod diya
Matthew18:28 parantu jab vah das bahar nikala
Matthew18:29 is par usaka sangee das girakar
Matthew18:30 us ne n mana
Matthew18:31 usake sangee das yah jo hua tha dekhkar bahut udas hua
Matthew18:32 tab usake svamee ne us ko bulakar us se kaha
Matthew18:33 so jaaisa maain ne tujh par daya kee
Matthew18:34 aur usake svamee ne krodha men akar use dand denevalon ke hath men saunp diya
Matthew18:35 isee prakar yaadi tum men se har aek apane bhai ko man se kshama n karega
Matthew19:1 jab yeeshu ye baten kah chuka
Matthew19:2 aur badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee
Matthew19:3 tab fareesee us kee pareeksha karane ke liye pas akar kahane lage
Matthew19:4 us ne uttr diya
Matthew19:5 ki is karan manushy apane mata pita se alag hokar apanee patnee ke sath rahega aur ve donon aek tan honge?
Matthew19:6 so v ab do nahee
Matthew19:7 unhon ne us se kaha
Matthew19:8 us ne un se kaha
Matthew19:9 aur maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew19:10 chelon ne us se kaha
Matthew19:11 us ne un se kaha
Matthew19:12 kyonaki kuchh napunsak aeese haain jo mata ke garbh hee se aeese janmen aur kuchh nanpusak aeese haai
Matthew19:13 tab log balakon ko usake pas laa
Matthew19:14 yeeshu ne kaha
Matthew19:15 aur vah un par hath rakhkar
Matthew19:16 aur dekho
Matthew19:17 us ne us se kaha
Matthew19:18 us ne us se kaha
Matthew19:19 apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana
Matthew19:20 us javan ne us se kaha
Matthew19:21 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Matthew19:22 parantu vah javan yah bat sun udas hokar chala gaya
Matthew19:23 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon se kaha
Matthew19:24 fir tum se kahata hoo
Matthew19:25 yah sunakar
Matthew19:26 yeeshu ne un kee or dekhkar kaha

Matthew19:28 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew19:29 aur jis kisee ne gharon ya bhaiyon ya bahinon ya pita ya mata ya ladkebalon ya kheton ko mere nam ke liye chhod diya haai
Matthew19:30 parantu bahutere jo paahile haai
Matthew20:1 svarga ka rajy kisee grahasth ke saman haai
Matthew20:2 aur us ne majadooron se aek deenar raj par ttharakar
Matthew20:3 fir pahar aek din chaddhe
Matthew20:4 un se kaha
Matthew20:5 fir us ne doosare aur teesare pahar ke nikatt nikalakar vaaisa hee kiya.
Matthew20:6 aur aek ghantta din rahe fir nikalakar auron ko khde paya
Matthew20:7 us ne un se kaha
Matthew20:8 sanjh ko dakh baree ke svamee ne apane bhndaree se kaha
Matthew20:9 so jab ve aa
Matthew20:10 jo paahile aa
Matthew20:11 jab mila
Matthew20:12 ki in pichhlon ne aek hee ghantta kam kiya
Matthew20:13 us ne un men se ek ko uttr diya
Matthew20:14 jo tera haai

Matthew20:16 isee reeti se jo pichhle haai
Matthew20:17 yeeshu yarooshalem ko jate huae barah chelon ko aekant men le gaya
Matthew20:18 ki dekho

Matthew20:27 aur jo tum men pradhaan hona chahe vah tumhara das bane.
Matthew20:28 jaaise ki manushy ka putra
Matthew20:29 jab ve yareeho se nikal rahe the
Matthew20:30 aur dekho

Matthew20:32 tab yeeshu ne khde hokar

Matthew21:1 jab ve yarooshalem ke nikatt pahunche aur jaaitoon pahad par baaitafage ke pas aa
Matthew21:2 ki apane samhane ke ganv men jao
Matthew21:3 yaadi tum men se koi kuchh kahe
Matthew21:4 yah isaliye hua
Matthew21:5 ki siyyon kee bettee se kaho
Matthew21:6 chelon ne jakar
Matthew21:7 aur gadahee aur bachche ko lakar
Matthew21:8 aur bahutere logon ne apane kapade marga men bichhaa
Matthew21:9 aur jo bheed age age jatee aur peechhe peechhe chalee atee thee
Matthew21:10 jab us ne yarooshalem men pravesh kiya
Matthew21:11 logon ne kaha
Matthew21:12 yeeshu ne parameshvar ke mandair men jakar
Matthew21:13 aur un se kaha
Matthew21:14 aur andho aur langade
Matthew21:15 parantu jab mahayajakon aur shaaastriayon ne in adabhut kamon ko
Matthew21:16 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew21:17 tab vah unhen chhodkar nagar ke bahar baaitaaniyyah ko gaya
Matthew21:18 bhor ko jab vah nagar ko lautt raha tha
Matthew21:19 aur anjeer ke ped sadk ke kinare dekhkar vah usake pas gaya
Matthew21:20 yah dekhkar chelon ne achambha kiya
Matthew21:21 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew21:22 aur jo kuchh tum praarthna men vishvas se mangoge vah sab tum ko milega..
Matthew21:23 vah maandair men jakar upadesh kar raha tha
Matthew21:24 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew21:25 yoohanna ka bapaatisma kahan se tha? svarga kee or se ya manushyon kee or se tha? tab ve apas men vivad karane lage
Matthew21:26 aur yaadi kahen manushyon kee or se to hamen bheed ka dr haai kyonaki ve sab yuhanna ko bhvishyadvkta janate haain.
Matthew21:27 so unhon ne yeeshu ko uttr diya
Matthew21:28 tum kya samajhte ho? kisee manushy ke do putra the us ne pahile ke pas jakar kaha he putra aj dakh kee baree men kam kara.
Matthew21:29 us ne uttr diya
Matthew21:30 fir doosare ke pas jakar aeesa hee kaha
Matthew21:31 in donon men se kis ne pita kee ichchha pooree kee? unhon ne kaha
Matthew21:32 kyonaki yoohanna dharma ke marga se tumhare pas aya
Matthew21:33 aek aur drashttant suno: aek grahasth tha
Matthew21:34 jab fal ka samay nikatt aya
Matthew21:35 par kisanon ne usake dason ko pakad ke
Matthew21:36 fir us ne aur dason ko bheja
Matthew21:37 ant men us ne apane putra ko un ke pas yah kahakar bheja
Matthew21:38 parantu kisanon ne putra ko dekhkar apas men kaha
Matthew21:39 aur unhon ne use pakada aur dakh kee baree se bahar nikalakar mar dala.
Matthew21:40 isaliye jab dakh kee baree ka svamee aaega
Matthew21:41 unhonne us se kaha
Matthew21:42 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew21:43 yah prabhu kee or se hua
Matthew21:44 jo is patthr par girega
Matthew21:45 mahayajak aur fareesee usake drashttanton ko sunakar samajh gaa
Matthew21:46 aur unhon ne use pakadna chaha
Matthew22:1 is par yeeshu fir un se drashttanton men kahane laga.
Matthew22:2 svarga ka rajy us raja ke saman haai
Matthew22:3 aur us ne apane dason ko bheja
Matthew22:4 fir us ne aur dason ko yah kahakar bheja
Matthew22:5 parantu ve beparavai karake chal diae: koi apane khet ko
Matthew22:6 auron ne jo bach rahe the usake dason ko pakadkar un ka anadar kiya aur mar dala.
Matthew22:7 raja ne krodha kiya
Matthew22:8 tab us ne apane dason se kaha
Matthew22:9 isaliye chaurahon men jao
Matthew22:10 so un dason ne sadkon par jakar kya bure
Matthew22:11 jab raja jevanaharon ke dekhne ko bheetar aya to us ne vahan aek manushy ko dekha
Matthew22:12 us ne usase poochha he mitra too byah ka vasr paahine bina yahan kyon a gaya? usaka munh band ho gaya.
Matthew22:13 tab raja ne sevakon se kaha
Matthew22:14 kyonaki bulaae huae to bahut parantu chune huae thode haain..
Matthew22:15 tab fareesiyon ne jakar apas men vichar kiya
Matthew22:16 so unhon ne apane chelon ko herodiyon ke sath usake pas yah kahane ko bheja
Matthew22:17 is liye hamen bata too kya samajhta haai? kaaisar ko kar dena uchit haai
Matthew22:18 yeeshu ne un kee dushttta janakar kaha
Matthew22:19 kar ka sikka mujhe dikhao: tab ve usake pas aek deenar le aae.
Matthew22:20 us ne
Matthew22:21 unhon ne us se kaha
Matthew22:22 yah sunakar unhon ne achambha kiya
Matthew22:23 usee din sadookee jo kahate haain ki mare huon ka punarootthan haai hee naheen usake pas aa
Matthew22:24 ki he guroo moosa ne kaha tha
Matthew22:25 ab hamare yahan sat bhai the paahila byah karake mar gaya aur santan n hone ke karan apanee patnee ko apane bhai ke liye chhod gaya.
Matthew22:26 isee prakar doosare aur teesare ne bhee kiya
Matthew22:27 sab ke bad vah sree bhee mar gai.
Matthew22:28 so jee uttne par
Matthew22:29 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
Matthew22:30 kyonaki jee uttne par byah shaadee n hogee parantu ve svarga men parameshvar ke dooton kee nai honge.
Matthew22:31 parantu mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men kya tum ne yah vachan naheen paddha jo parameshvar ne tum se kaha.
Matthew22:32 ki maain ibraaheem ka parameshvar
Matthew22:33 yah sunakar log usake upadesh se chakit hue.
Matthew22:34 jab fareesiyon ne suna
Matthew22:35 aur un men se aek vyavasthapak ne parakhne ke liye
Matthew22:36 he guroo vyavastha men kaun see agyaa badee haai?
Matthew22:37 us ne us se kaha
Matthew22:38 badee aur mukhy agyaa to yahee haai.
Matthew22:39 aur usee ke saman yah doosaree bhee haai
Matthew22:40 ye hee do agyaaaen saree vyavastha aur bhvishyadvktaon ka adhaar haai..
Matthew22:41 jab fareesee ikatthe the
Matthew22:42 ki maseeh ke vishay men tum kya samajhte ho? vah kis ka santan haai? unhon ne us se kaha
Matthew22:43 us ne un se poochha
Matthew22:44 ki prabhu ne
Matthew22:45 bhla
Matthew22:46 usake uttr men koi bhee ek bat n kah saka parantu us din se kisee ko fir us se kuchh poochhne ka hiyav n hua..
Matthew23:1 tab yeeshu ne bheed se aur apane chelon se kaha.
Matthew23:2 shaasree aur fareesee moosa kee gaee par baaitte haain.
Matthew23:3 isaliye ve tum se jo kuchh kahen vah karana
Matthew23:4 ve aek aeese bharee bojh ko jin ko uttana kattnai haai
Matthew23:5 ve apane sab kam logon ko dikhane ke liye karate haain: ve apane taveejon ko chaude karate
Matthew23:6 jevanaron men mukhy mukhy jagahe
Matthew23:7 aur bajaron men namaskar aur manushy men rabbee kahalana unhen bhata haai.
Matthew23:8 parantu
Matthew23:9 aur prathvee par kisee ko apana pita n kahana
Matthew23:10 aur svamee bhee n kahalana
Matthew23:11 jo tum men bada ho
Matthew23:12 jo koi apane ap ko bada banaaega
Matthew23:13 he kapattee shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon tum par haya! tum manushyon ke virodha men svarga ke rajy ka dar band karate ho
Matthew23:14 
Matthew23:15 he kapattee shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon tum par haya! tum aek jan ko apane mat men lane ke liye sare jal aur thl men firate ho
Matthew23:16 he andho aguvo
Matthew23:17 he moorkho
Matthew23:18 fir kahate ho ki yadi koi vedee kee shapath khaae to kuchh nahee
Matthew23:19 he andhae
Matthew23:20 isaliye jo vedee kee shapath khata haai
Matthew23:21 aur jo maandair kee shapath khata haai
Matthew23:22 aur jo svarga kee shapath khata haai
Matthew23:23 he kapattee shaastriayo
Matthew23:24 he andho aguvo
Matthew23:25 he kapattee shaastriayo
Matthew23:26 he andho fareesee
Matthew23:27 he kapattee shaastriayo
Matthew23:28 isee reeti se tum bhee upar se manushyon ko dharmee dikhai dete ho
Matthew23:29 he kapattee shaastriayo
Matthew23:30 aur kahate ho
Matthew23:31 is se to tum apane par ap hee gavahee dete ho

Matthew23:33 he sanpo
Matthew23:34 isaliye dekho

Matthew24:1 jab yeeshu mandair se nikalakar ja raha tha
Matthew24:2 us ne un se kaha
Matthew24:3 aur jab vah jaaitoon pahad par baaitta tha
Matthew24:4 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya
Matthew24:5 kyonaki bahut se aeese honge jo mere nam se akar kahenge
Matthew24:6 tum ladaiyon aur ladaiyon kee charcha sunoge dekho ghabara n jana kyonaki in ka hona avashy haai
Matthew24:7 kyonaki jati par jati
Matthew24:8 ye sab baten peedaon ka arambh hongee.
Matthew24:9 tab ve klesh dilane ke liye tumhen pakadvaaenge
Matthew24:10 tab bahutere ttokar khaaenge
Matthew24:11 aur bahut se jootte bhvishyadvkta utt khde honge
Matthew24:12 aur adharma ke baddhne se bahuton ka praem ttnda ho jaaega.
Matthew24:13 parantu jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega
Matthew24:14 aur rajy ka yah susamachar sare jagat men prachar kiya jaaega
Matthew24:15 so jab tum us ujadnevalee gharanait vastu ko jis kee charcha daaniyyel bhvishyadvkta ke dara hui thee
Matthew24:16 tab jo yahoodiya men hon ve pahadon par bhag jaaen.
Matthew24:17 jo kotte par ho
Matthew24:18 aur jo khet men ho
Matthew24:19 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee
Matthew24:20 aur praarthna karo ki tumhen jade men ya sabt ke din bhagana n pade.
Matthew24:21 kyonaki us samay aeesa bharee klesh hoga
Matthew24:22 aur yaadi ve din ghattaae n jate
Matthew24:23 us samay yadi koi tum se kahe
Matthew24:24 kyonaki jootte maseeh aur jootte bhavishyadvkta utt khde honge
Matthew24:25 dekho
Matthew24:26 isaliye yaadi ve tum se kahe
Matthew24:27 kyonaki jaaise bijalee poorva se nikalakar paashchaim tak chamakatee jatee haai
Matthew24:28 jahan loth ho
Matthew24:29 un dinon ke klesh ke bad turant soorya aandhiayara ho jaega
Matthew24:30 tab manushy ke putra ka chinh akash men dikhai dega
Matthew24:31 aur vah turahee ke bade shabd ke sat
Matthew24:32 anjeer ke ped se yah drashttant seekho: jab us kee dalee komal ho jatee aur patte nikalane lagate haai
Matthew24:33 isee reeti se jab tum in sab baton ko dekho
Matthew24:34 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew24:35 akash aur prathvee ttl jaaenge
Matthew24:36 us din aur us ghadee ke vishay men koi naheen janata
Matthew24:37 jaaise nooh ke din the
Matthew24:38 kyonaki jaaise jala-pralay se pahile ke dinon me
Matthew24:39 aur jab tak jala-pralay akar un sab ko baha n le gaya
Matthew24:40 us samay do jan khet men honge
Matthew24:41 do striayan chakkee peesatee rahengee
Matthew24:42 isaliye jagate raho
Matthew24:43 parantu yah jan lo ki yadi ghar ka svamee janata hota ki chor kis pahar aaega
Matthew24:44 isaliye tum bhee taaiyar raho
Matthew24:45 so vah vishvasayogy aur buaddhmaian das kaun haai
Matthew24:46 dhany haai
Matthew24:47 maain tum se sach kahata hoon vah use apanee saree sanpati par saradar ttharaaega.
Matthew24:48 parantu yadi vah dushtt das sochane lage
Matthew24:49 aur apane sathee dason ko peettne lage
Matthew24:50 to us das ka svamee aeese din aaega
Matthew24:51 aur aeesee ghadee ki vah n janata ho
Matthew25:1 tab svarga ka rajy un das kunvariyon ke saman hoga jo apanee mashaalen lekar doolhe se bhentt karane ko nikaleen.
Matthew25:2 un men panch moorkh aur panch samajhdar theen.
Matthew25:3 moorkhon ne apanee mashaalen to lee
Matthew25:4 parantu samajhdaron ne apanee mashaalon ke sath apanee kuappaiyon men tel bhee bhr liya.
Matthew25:5 jab dulhe ke ane men der hui
Matthew25:6 adhaee rat ko dhoom machae
Matthew25:7 tab ve sab kunvaariyan uttkar apanee apanee mashalen tteek karane lageen.
Matthew25:8 aur moorkhon ne samajhdaron se kaha
Matthew25:9 parantu samajhdaron ne uttr diya ki kadaachit hamare aur tumhare liye poora n ho bhla to yah haai
Matthew25:10 jab ve mol lene ko ja rahee thee
Matthew25:11 isake bad ve doosaree kunvariyan bhee akar kahane lagee
Matthew25:12 us ne uttr diya
Matthew25:13 isaliye jagate raho
Matthew25:14 kyonaki yah us manushy kee see dasha haai jis ne paradesh ko jate samay apane dason ko bulakar
Matthew25:15 us ne ek ko panch tod
Matthew25:16 tab jis ko panch tode mile the
Matthew25:17 isee reeti se jis ko do mile the
Matthew25:18 parantu jis ko aek mila tha
Matthew25:19 bahut dinon ke bad un dason ka svamee akar un se lekha lene laga.
Matthew25:20 jis ko panch tode mile the
Matthew25:21 usake svamee ne usase kaha
Matthew25:22 aur jis ko do tode mile the
Matthew25:23 usake svamee ne us se kaha
Matthew25:24 tab jis ko aek toda mila tha
Matthew25:25 so maain dr gaya aur jakar tera toda mittee men chhpai diya dek
Matthew25:26 usake svamee ne use uttr diya
Matthew25:27 to tujhe chahiae tha
Matthew25:28 isaliye vah toda us se le lo
Matthew25:29 kyonaki jis kisee ke pas haai
Matthew25:30 aur is nikamme das ko bahar ke andhore men dal do
Matthew25:31 jab manushy ka putra apanee mahima men aaega
Matthew25:32 aur sab jaatiyan usake samhane ikatthee kee jaaengee aur jaaisa charavaha bhedon ko bakariyon se alag kar deta haai
Matthew25:33 aur vah bhedon ko apanee daahinee or aur bakariyon ko bai aur khdee karega.
Matthew25:34 tab raja apanee dahinee or valon se kahega
Matthew25:35 kayonaki maai. bookha tha
Matthew25:36 maain nanga tha
Matthew25:37 tab dharmee us ko uttr denge ki he prabhu
Matthew25:38 ham ne kab tujhe paradeshaee dekha aur apane ghar men ttharaya ya nanga dekha
Matthew25:39 ham ne kab tujhe beemar ya bandeegrah men dekha aur tujh se milane aae?
Matthew25:40 tab raja unhen uttr dega maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew25:41 tab vah bain or valon se kahega
Matthew25:42 kyonaki maain bookha tha
Matthew25:43 maain paradeshaee tha
Matthew25:44 tab ve uttr denge
Matthew25:45 tab vah unhen uttr dega
Matthew25:46 aur yah anant dand bhogenge parantu dharmee anant jeevan men pravesh karenge.
Matthew26:1 jab yeeshu ye sab baten kah chuka
Matthew26:2 tum janate ho
Matthew26:3 tab mahayajak aur praja ke puraniae kaifaa nam mahayajak ke angan men ikatthe huae.
Matthew26:4 aur apas men vichar karane lage ki yeeshu ko chht se pakadkar mar dalen.
Matthew26:5 parantu ve kahate the
Matthew26:6 jab yeeshu baaitaniyyah men shamaun koddhee ke ghar men tha.
Matthew26:7 to aek sree sangamaramar ke patra men bahumol itra lekar usake pas ai
Matthew26:8 yah dekhkar
Matthew26:9 yah to achchhe dam par bikakar kangalon ko bantta ja sakata tha.
Matthew26:10 yah janakar yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew26:11 kangal tumhare sath sada rahate haai
Matthew26:12 us ne meree deh par jo yah itra undela haai
Matthew26:13 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Matthew26:14 tab yahooda iskariyotee nam barah chelon men se aek ne mahayajakon ke pas jakar kaha.
Matthew26:15 yaadi maain use tumhare hath pakadva doo
Matthew26:16 aur vah usee samay se use pakadvane ka avasar ddoonddhne laga..
Matthew26:17 akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ke paahile din
Matthew26:18 us ne kaha
Matthew26:19 so chelon ne yeeshu kee agyaa manee
Matthew26:20 jab sanjh hui
Matthew26:21 jab ve kha rahe the
Matthew26:22 is par ve bahut udas hua
Matthew26:23 us ne uttr diya
Matthew26:24 manushy ka putra to jaaisa usake vishay men likha haai
Matthew26:25 tab usake pakadvanevale yahooda ne kaha ki he rabbee
Matthew26:26 us ne us se kaha
Matthew26:27 fir us ne kattora lekar
Matthew26:28 kyonaki yah vacha ka mera vah lohoo haai
Matthew26:29 maain tum se kahata hoo
Matthew26:30 fir ve bhjan gakar jaaitoon pahad par gaae..
Matthew26:31 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha tum sab aj hee rat ko mere vishay men ttokar khaoge kyonki likha haai
Matthew26:32 parantu maain apane jee uttne ke bad tum se pahale galeel ko jaunga.
Matthew26:33 is par pataras ne us se kaha
Matthew26:34 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Matthew26:35 pataras ne us se kaha
Matthew26:36 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon ke sath gatasamanee nam aek sthan men aya aur apane chelon se kahane laga ki yaheen baaitte rahana
Matthew26:37 aur vah pataras aur jabdee ke donon putraen ko sath le gaya
Matthew26:38 tab us ne un se kaha mera jee bahut udas haai
Matthew26:39 fir vah thoda aur age baddhkar munh ke bal gira
Matthew26:40 fir chelon ke pas akar unhen sote paya
Matthew26:41 jagate raho
Matthew26:42 fir us ne doosaree bar jakar yah praarthna kee ki he mere pita
Matthew26:43 tab us ne akar unhen fir sote paya
Matthew26:44 aur unhen chhodkar fir chala gaya
Matthew26:45 tab us ne chelon ke pas akar un se kaha ab sote raho
Matthew26:46 utto
Matthew26:47 vah yah kah hee raha tha
Matthew26:48 usake pakadvanevale ne unhen yah pata diya tha ki jis ko maain choom loon vahee haai use pakad lena.
Matthew26:49 aur turant yeeshu ke pas akar kaha he rabbee namaskara aur us ko bahut chooma.
Matthew26:50 yeeshu ne us se kaha he mitra
Matthew26:51 aur dekho
Matthew26:52 tab yeeshu ne us se kaha apanee talavar kattee men rakh le kyonki jo talavar chalate haai
Matthew26:53 kya too naheen samajhta
Matthew26:54 parantu pavitra shaasr kee baten ki aeesa hee hona avashy haai
Matthew26:55 usee ghadee yeeshu ne bheed se kaha kya tum talavaren aur laattyaian lekar mujhe dakoo ke saman pakadne ke liye nikale ho? maain har din mandair men baaittkar upadesh diya karata tha
Matthew26:56 parantu yah sab isaaliye hua haai
Matthew26:57 aur yeeshu ke pakadnevale us ko kaifaa nam mahayajak ke pas le gaa
Matthew26:58 aur pataras door se usake peechhe peechhe mahayajak ke angan tak gaya
Matthew26:59 mahayajak aur saree mahasabha yeeshu ko mar dalane ke liye usake virodha men joottee gavahee kee khoj men the.
Matthew26:60 parantu bahut se jootte gavahon ke ane par bhee n pai.
Matthew26:61 ant men do janon ne akar kaha
Matthew26:62 tab mahayajak ne khde hokar us se kaha
Matthew26:63 maain tujhe jeevate parameshvar kee shapath deta hoo
Matthew26:64 yeeshu ne us se kaha too ne ap hee kah diya: baran maain tum se yah bhee kahata hoo
Matthew26:65 tab mahayajak ne apane vasr faadkar kaha
Matthew26:66 dekho
Matthew26:67 tab unhon ne us se munh par tooka
Matthew26:68 he maseeh
Matthew26:69 aur pataras bahar angan men baaitta hua tha: ki aek laundee ne usake pas akar kaha too bhee yeeshu galeelee ke sath tha.
Matthew26:70 us ne sab ke samhane yah kah kar inkar kiya aur kaha
Matthew26:71 jab vah bahar devaddhee men chala gaya
Matthew26:72 us ne shapath khakar fir inkar kiya ki maain us manushy ko naheen janata.
Matthew26:73 thodee der ke bad
Matthew26:74 tab vah dhaikkar dene aur shapath khane laga
Matthew26:75 tab pataras ko yeeshu kee kahee hui bat smaran ai kee murga ke bang dene se pahile too teen bar mera inkar karega aur vah bahar jakar foott foott kar rone laga..
Matthew27:1 jab bhor hui
Matthew27:2 aur unhon ne use bandha aur le jakar peelatus haakim ke hath men saunp diya..
Matthew27:3 jab usake pakadvanevale yahooda ne dekha ki vah doshaee ttharaya gaya haai to vah pachhtaya aur ve tees chandee ke sikke mahayajakon aur puraaniyon ke pas faer laya.
Matthew27:4 aur kaha
Matthew27:5 tab vah un sikkon ko mandair men faenkakar chala gaya
Matthew27:6 mahayajakon ne un sikkon ko lekar kaha
Matthew27:7 so unhon ne sammaati karake un sikkon se paradeshaiyon ke gadne ke liye kumhar ka khet mol le liya.
Matthew27:8 is karan vah khet aj tak lohoo ka khet kahalata haai.
Matthew27:9 tab jo vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha vah poora hua ki unhon ne ve tees sikke arthata us ttharaae huae mooly ko jise israael kee santan men se kitanon ne ttharaya tha le liae.
Matthew27:10 aur jaaise prabhu ne mujhe agyaa dee thee vaaise hee unhen kumhar ke khet ke mooly men de diya..
Matthew27:11 jab yeeshu hakim ke samhane khda tha
Matthew27:12 jab mahayajak aur puraaniae us par dosh laga rahe the
Matthew27:13 is par peelatus ne us se kaha: kya too naheen sunata
Matthew27:14 parantu us ne us ko aek bat ka bhee uttr naheen diya
Matthew27:15 aur haakim kee yah reeti thee
Matthew27:16 us samay baraabba nam unheen men ka ek namee bandhaua tha.
Matthew27:17 so jab ve ikatthe hua
Matthew27:18 kyonaki vah janata tha ki unhon ne use dah se pakadvaya haai.
Matthew27:19 jab vah nyay kee gaee par baaitta hua tha to us kee patnee ne use kahala bheja
Matthew27:20 mahayajakon aur puraniyon ne logon ko ubhara
Matthew27:21 haakim ne un se poochha
Matthew27:22 peelatus ne un se poochha fir yeeshu ko jo maseeh kahalata haai
Matthew27:23 haakim ne kaha kyon us ne kya burai kee haai? parantu ve aur bhee chilla
Matthew27:24 jab peelatus ne dekha
Matthew27:25 sab logon ne uttr diya
Matthew27:26 is par us ne baraabba ko un ke liye chhod diya
Matthew27:27 tab haakim ke sipaahiyon ne yeeshu ko kile men le jakar saree palattn usake chahun or ikatthee kee.
Matthew27:28 aur usake kapade utarakar use kiraamijee baga pahinaya.
Matthew27:29 aur katton ko mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha aur usake daahine hath men sarakanda diya aur usake age ghauttne ttekakar use tttthe men udane lage
Matthew27:30 aur us par tooka aur vahee sarakanda lekar usake sir par marane lage.
Matthew27:31 jab ve usaka ttttha kar chuke
Matthew27:32 bahar jate huae unhen shamaun nam aek kurenee manushy mila
Matthew27:33 aur us sthan par jo gulaguta nam kee jagah arthata khopadee ka sthan kahalata haai pahunchakara.
Matthew27:34 unhon ne pitt milaya hua dakhras use peene ko diya
Matthew27:35 tab unhon ne use kroos par chaddhaya aur chitthiyan dalakar usake kapade bantt liae.
Matthew27:36 aur vahan baaittkar usaka pahara dene lage.
Matthew27:37 aur usaka doshapatra
Matthew27:38 tab usake sath do dakoo aek dahine aur aek baaen krooson par chaddhaae gaae.
Matthew27:39 aur ane jane vale sir hila hilakar us kee ninda karate the.
Matthew27:40 aur yah kahate the
Matthew27:41 isee reeti se mahayajak bhee shaastriayon aur puraaniyon samet ttttha kar karake kahate the
Matthew27:42 yah to israael ka raja haai. ab kroos par se utar aa
Matthew27:43 us ne parameshvar ka bhrosa rakha haai
Matthew27:44 isee prakar dakoo bhee jo usake sath krooson par chaddhaae gaae the us kee ninda karate the..
Matthew27:45 dopahar se lekar teesare pahar tak us sare desh men andhora chhaya raha.
Matthew27:46 teesare pahar ke nikatt yeeshu ne bade shabd se pukarakar kaha
Matthew27:47 jo vahan khde the
Matthew27:48 un men se ek turant dauda
Matthew27:49 auron ne kaha
Matthew27:50 tab yeeshu ne fir bade shabd se chillakar praan chhod diae.
Matthew27:51 aur dekho mandair ka parada upar se neeche tak fatt kar do ttukade ho gaya: aur dharatee dol gai aur chattanen tadkar gain.
Matthew27:52 aur kabraen khul gain aur soae huae pavitra logon kee bahut lothen jee utteen.
Matthew27:53 aur usake jee uttne ke bad ve kabraen men se nikalakar paavitra nagar men gaa
Matthew27:54 tab soobedar aur jo usake sath yeeshu ka pahara de rahe the
Matthew27:55 vahan bahut see striayan jo galeel se yeeshu kee seva karatee huin usake sath ain thee
Matthew27:56 un men maariyam magadaleelee aur yakoob aur yoses kee mata maariyam aur jabdee ke putraen kee mata theen.
Matthew27:57 jab sanjh hui to yoosufa nam aarimaatiyah ka aek dhanee manushy jo ap hee yeeshu ka chela tha aya: us ne peelatus ke pas jakar yeeshu kee loth mangee.
Matthew27:58 is par peelatus ne de dene kee agyaa dee.
Matthew27:59 yoosufa ne loth ko lekar use ujjaval chadar men lapetta.
Matthew27:60 aur use apanee nai kabra men rakha
Matthew27:61 aur maariyam magadaleenee aur doosaree mariyam vahan kabra ke samhane baaittee theen..
Matthew27:62 doosare din jo taaiyaree ke din ke bad ka din tha
Matthew27:63 he maharaj
Matthew27:64 so agyaa de ki teesare din tak kabra kee rakhvalee kee jaa
Matthew27:65 peelatus ne un se kaha
Matthew27:66 so ve paharooon ko sath le kar gaa
Matthew28:1 sabt ke din ke bad saptaah ke paahile din pah fattte hee mariyam magadaleenee aur doosaree mariyam kabra ko dekhne ai.
Matthew28:2 aur dekho aek bada bhuindol hua
Matthew28:3 usaka roop bijalee ka sa aur usaka vasr pale kee nai ujjval tha.
Matthew28:4 usake bhy se paharooae kanp utte
Matthew28:5 svargadoot ne striyon se kaha
Matthew28:6 vah yaha naheen haai
Matthew28:7 aur shaeegha jakar usake chelon se kaho
Matthew28:8 aur ve bhy aur bade anand ke sath kabra se shaeegha lauttkar usake chelon ko samachar dene ke liye daud gai.
Matthew28:9 aur dekho
Matthew28:10 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha
Matthew28:11 ve ja hee rahee thee
Matthew28:12 tab unhon ne puraniyon ke sath ikatthe hokar sammati kee
Matthew28:13 ki yah kahana
Matthew28:14 aur yaadi yah bat hakim ke kan tak pahunchegee
Matthew28:15 so unhon ne roopaae lekar jaaisa sikhaae gaae the
Matthew28:16 aur gyarah chele galeel men us pahad par gaa
Matthew28:17 aur unhon ne usake darshan pakar use pranam kiya
Matthew28:18 yeeshu ne un ke pas akar kaha
Matthew28:19 isaliye tum jakar sab jatiyon ke logon ko chela banao aur unhen pita aur putra aur pavitraatma ke nam se bapaatisma do.
Matthew28:20 aur unhen sab baten jo maain ne tumhen agyaa dee haai
Mark1:1 parameshvar ke putra yeeshu maseeh ke susamachar ka arambh.
Mark1:2 jaaise yashaayah bhvishyadvkata kee pustak men likha haai ki dekh maain apane doot ko tere age bhejata hoo
Mark1:3 jangal men aek pukaranevale ka shabd sunai de raha haai ki prabhu ka marga taaiyar karo
Mark1:4 yoohanna aya
Mark1:5 aur sare yahoodiya desh ke
Mark1:6 yoohanna untt ke rom ka vasr pahine aur apanee kamar men chamaden ka pattuka bandho rahata tha or ttiiddayan aur van madha khaya karata tha.
Mark1:7 aur yah prachar karata tha
Mark1:8 maain ne to tumhen panee se bapatisma diya haai par vah tumhen paavitra atma se bapatisma dega..
Mark1:9 un dinon men yeeshu ne galeel ke nasarat se akar
Mark1:10 aur jab vah panee se nikalakar upar aya
Mark1:11 aur yah akashavanee hai
Mark1:12 tab atma ne turant us ko jangal kee or bheja.
Mark1:13 aur jangal men chalees din tak shautan ne us kee pareeksha kee aur vah van pashuuon ke sath raha aur svargadoot un kee seva karate rahe..
Mark1:14 yoohanna ke pakadvaae jane ke bad yeeshu ne galeel men akar parameshvar ke rajy ka susamachar prachar kiya.
Mark1:15 aur kaha
Mark1:16 galeel kee jheel ke kinare kinare jate hua
Mark1:17 aur yeeshu ne un se kaha mere peechhe chale ao maain tum ko manushyon ke machhuve banaunga.
Mark1:18 ve turant jalon ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae.
Mark1:19 aur kuchh age baddhkar
Mark1:20 us ne turant unhen bulaya aur ve apane pita jabadee ko majadooree ke sath nav par chhodkar
Mark1:21 aur ve kafaranahoom men aa
Mark1:22 aur log usake upadesh se chakit hue kyonki vah unhen shaaastriayon kee nain nahee
Mark1:23 aur usee samay
Mark1:24 us ne chillakar kaha
Mark1:25 yeeshu ne use danttkar kaha
Mark1:26 tab ashuuddh atma us ko marodkar
Mark1:27 is par sab log ashcharya karate huae apas men vada-vivad karane lage ki yah kya bat haai? yah to koi naya upadesh haai! vah adhaikar ke sath ashuuddh atmaon ko bhee agyaa deta haai
Mark1:28 so usaka nam turant galeel ke as pas ke sare desh men har jagah faail gaya..
Mark1:29 aur vah turant aradhanalay men se nikalakar
Mark1:30 aur shamaun kee sas jvar se peeadit thee
Mark1:31 tab us ne pas jakar usaka hath pakad ke use uttaya aur usaka jvar us par se utar gaya
Mark1:32 sandhya ke samay jab soorya oob gaya to log sab beemaron ko aur unhen jin men dushttatma bheen usake pas laae.
Mark1:33 aur sara nagar dar par ikattha hua.
Mark1:34 aur us ne bahuton ko jo nana prakar kee beemariyon se dukhee the
Mark1:35 aur bhor ko din nikalane se bahut pahile
Mark1:36 tab shamaun aur usake sathee us kee khoj men gaae.
Mark1:37 jab vah mila
Mark1:38 us n un se kaha
Mark1:39 so vah sare galeel men un kee sabhaon men ja jakar prachar karata aur dushttatmaon ko nikalata raha..
Mark1:40 aur aek koddhee ne usake pas akar
Mark1:41 us ne us par taras khakar hath baddhaya
Mark1:42 aur turant usaka koddh jata raha
Mark1:43 tab us ne use chitakar turant vida kiya.
Mark1:44 aur us se kaha
Mark1:45 parantu vah bahar jakar is bat ko bahut prachar karane aur yahan tak faailane laga
Mark2:1 kai din ke bad vah fir kafaranahoom men aya aur suna gaya
Mark2:2 fir itane log ikatthe hua
Mark2:3 aur log aek jhole ke mare huae ko char manushyon se uttvakar usake pas le aae.
Mark2:4 parantu jab ve bheed ke karan usake nikatt n panhuch sake
Mark2:5 yeeshu n
Mark2:6 tab kai aek shaasree jo vahan baaitte the
Mark2:7 ki yah manushy kyon aeesa kahata haai? yah to parameshvar kee ninda karata haai
Mark2:8 yeeshu ne turant apanee atma men jan liya
Mark2:9 sahaj kya haai? kya jhole ke mare se yah kahata ki tere pap kshama hua
Mark2:10 parantu jis se tum jan lo ki manushy ke putra ko prathvee par pap kshama karane ka bhee adhaikar haai us ne us jhole ke mare huae se kaha.
Mark2:11 maain tujh se kahata hoon ut
Mark2:12 aur vah utta
Mark2:13 vah fir nikalakar jheel ke kinare gaya
Mark2:14 jate huae us ne halafai ke putra levee ko chungee kee chaukee par baaitte dekha
Mark2:15 aur vah uttkar
Mark2:16 aur shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon ne yah dekhkar
Mark2:17 yeeshu ne yah sunakar
Mark2:18 yoohanna ke chele
Mark2:19 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Mark2:20 parantu ve din aaenge

Mark4:32 parantu jab boya gaya

Mark10:1 fir vah vahan se uttkar yahoodiya ke sivanon men aur yaradan ke par aya
Mark10:2 tab fareesiyon ne usake pas akar us kee pareeksha karane ko us se poochha
Mark10:3 us ne un ko uttr diya
Mark10:4 unhon ne kaha
Mark10:5 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Mark10:6 par sraashtti ke arambh se parameshvar ne nar aur naree karake un ko banaya haai.
Mark10:7 is karan manushy apane mata-pita se alag hokar apanee patnee ke sath rahega
Mark10:8 isaliye ve ab do naheen par aek tan haain.
Mark10:9 isaliye jise parameshvar ne joda haai use manushy alag n kare.
Mark10:10 aur ghar men chelon ne is ke vishay men us se fir poochha.
Mark10:11 us ne un se kaha
Mark10:12 aur yaadi patnee apane pati ko chhodkar doosare se byah kare
Mark10:13 fir log balakon ko usake pas lane lage
Mark10:14 yeeshu ne yah dekh krudha hokar un se kaha
Mark10:15 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Mark10:16 aur us ne unhen god men liya
Mark10:17 aur jab vah nikalakar marga men jata tha
Mark10:18 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Mark10:19 too agyaaon ko to janata haai hatya n karana
Mark10:20 us ne us se kaha
Mark10:21 yeeshu ne us par drashtti karake us se praem kiya
Mark10:22 is bat se usake chihare par udasee chha gai
Mark10:23 yeeshu ne charon or dekhkar apane chelon se kaha
Mark10:24 yeeshu ne charon aur dekhkar apane chelon se kaha
Mark10:25 chele us kee baton se achambhiat hua
Mark10:26 ve bahut hee chakit hokar apas men kahane lage to fir kis ka uddhar ho sakata haai.
Mark10:27 yeeshu ne un kee or dekhkar kaha
Mark10:28 pataras us se kahane laga
Mark10:29 yeeshu ne kaha
Mark10:30 aur ab is samay sau guna n paa
Mark10:31 par bahutere jo pahile haai
Mark10:32 aur ve yarooshalem ko jate huae marga men the
Mark10:33 ki dekho
Mark10:34 aur ve us ko tttthon men udaaenge
Mark10:35 tab jabadee ke putra yakoob aur yoohanna ne usake pas akar kaha
Mark10:36 us ne un se kaha
Mark10:37 unhon ne us se kaha
Mark10:38 yeeshu n un se kaha
Mark10:39 unhon ne us se kaha
Mark10:40 par jin ke liye taaiyar kiya gaya haai
Mark10:41 yah sunakar dason yakoob aur yoohanna par risiyane lage.
Mark10:42 aur yeeshu ne un ko pas bula kar un se kaha
Mark10:43 par tum men aeesa naheen haai
Mark10:44 aur jo koi tum men pradhaan hona chahe
Mark10:45 kyonaki manushy ka putra isaliye naheen aya
Mark10:46 aur ve yareeho men aa
Mark10:47 vah yah sunakar ki yeeshu nasaree haai
Mark10:48 bahuton ne use dantta ki chup rahe
Mark10:49 tab yeeshu ne ttharakar kaha
Mark10:50 vah apana kapada faenkakar shaeegha utta
Mark10:51 is par yeeshu ne us se kaha too kya chahata haai ki maain tere liye karoon? andho ne us se kaha
Mark10:52 yeeshu ne us se kaha chala ja
Mark11:1 jab ve yarooshalem ke nikatt jaaitoon pahad par baaitafage aur baaitaniyyah ke pas aa
Mark11:2 ki apane samhane ke ganv men jao
Mark11:3 yaadi tum se koi poochhe
Mark11:4 unhon ne jakar us bachche ko bahar dar ke pas chauk men bandha hua paya
Mark11:5 aur un men se jo vahan khde the
Mark11:6 unhon ne jaaisa yeeshu ne kaha tha
Mark11:7 aur unhon ne bachche ko yeeshu ke pas lakar us par apane kapade dale aur vah us par baaitt gaya.
Mark11:8 aur bahuton ne apane kapade marga men bichhaae aur auron ne kheton men se daaliyan katt katt kar faaila deen.
Mark11:9 aur jo usake age age jate aur peechhe peechhe chale ate the
Mark11:10 hamare pita daud ka rajy jo a raha haai dhany haai: akash men hoshaana..
Mark11:11 aur vah yarooshalem pahunchakar mandair men aya
Mark11:12 doosare din jab ve baaitaniyyah se nikale to us ko bookh lagee.
Mark11:13 aur vah door se anjeer ka aek hara ped dekhkar nikatt gaya
Mark11:14 is par us ne us se kaha ab se koi tera fal kabhee n khaae. aur usake chele sun rahe the.
Mark11:15 fir ve yarooshalem men aa
Mark11:16 aur maandair men se hokar kisee ko baratan lekar ane jane n diya.
Mark11:17 aur upadesh karake un se kaha
Mark11:18 yah sunakar mahayajak aur shaasree usake nash karane ka avasar ddoonddhne lage kyonki us se drate the
Mark11:19 aur praati din sanjh hote hee vah nagar se bahar jaya karata tha.
Mark11:20 fir bhor ko jab ve udhar se jate the to unhon ne us anjeer ke ped ko jad tak sookha hua dekha.
Mark11:21 pataras ko vah bat smaran ai
Mark11:22 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya
Mark11:23 maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki jo koi is pahad se kahe ki too ukhd ja
Mark11:24 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo
Mark11:25 aur jab kabhee tum khde huae praarthna karate ho
Mark11:26 aur yaadi tum kshama n karo to tumhara pita bhee jo svarga men haai
Mark11:27 ve fir yarooshalem men aa
Mark11:28 ki too ye kam kis adhaikar se karata haai? aur yah adhaikar tujhe kis ne diya haai ki too ye kam kare?
Mark11:29 yeeshu ne us se kaha: maain bhee tum se aek bat poochhta hoon mujhe uttr do: to maain tumhen bataunga ki ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon.
Mark11:30 yoohanna ka bapaatisma kya svarga kee or se tha va manushyon kee or se tha? mujhe uttr do.
Mark11:31 tab ve apas men vivad karane lage ki yadi ham kahe
Mark11:32 aur yaadi ham kahe
Mark11:33 so unhon ne yeeshu ko uttr diya
Mark12:1 fir vah drashttant men un se baten karane laga: ki kisee manushy ne dakh kee baree lagai
Mark12:2 fir fal ke mausam men us ne kisanon ke pas aek das ko bheja ki kisan se dakh kee baree ke falon ka bhag le.
Mark12:3 par unhon ne use pakadkar peetta aur choochhe hath lautta diya.
Mark12:4 fir us ne aek aur das ko un ke pas bheja aur unhon ne usaka sir faod dala aur usaka apaman kiya.
Mark12:5 fir us ne aek aur ko bheja
Mark12:6 ab aek hee rah gaya tha
Mark12:7 par un kisanon ne apas men kaha yahee to vaaris haai ao
Mark12:8 aur unhon ne use pakadkar mar dala
Mark12:9 isaliye dakh kee baree ka svamee kya karega? vah akar un kisanon ko nash karega
Mark12:10 kya tum ne pavitra shaasr men yah vachan naheen paddha
Mark12:11 yah prabhu kee or se hua
Mark12:12 tab unhon ne use pakadna chaha kyonki samajh gaae the
Mark12:13 tab unhon ne use baton men fansane ke liye kai aek fareeasiyon aur herodiyon ko usake pas bheja.
Mark12:14 aur unhon ne akar us se kaha he guro
Mark12:15 to kya kaaisa ko kar dena uchit haai
Mark12:16 ve le aa
Mark12:17 yeeshu ne un se kaha jo kaaisar ka haai vah kaaisar ko
Mark12:18 fir sadookiyon ne bhee
Mark12:19 ki he guro
Mark12:20 paahila bhai byah karake bina santan mar gaya.
Mark12:21 tab doosare bhai ne us sree ko byah liya aur bina santan mar gaya aur vaaise hee teesare ne bhee.
Mark12:22 aur saton se santan n hui: sab ke peechhe vah sree bhee mar gai.
Mark12:23 so jee uttne par vah un men se kis kee patnee hogee? kyonaki vah saton kee patnee ho chukee thee.
Mark12:24 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tum is karan se bool men naheen pade ho
Mark12:25 kyonaki jab ve mare huon men se jee uttenge
Mark12:26 mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men kya tum ne moosa kee pustak men jhadee kee katha men nahee paddha
Mark12:27 parameshvar mare huon ka nahee
Mark12:28 aur shaastriayon men se aek ne akar unhen vivad karate suna
Mark12:29 yeeshu ne use uttr diya
Mark12:30 aur too prabhu apane parameshvar se apane sare man se aur apane sare praan se
Mark12:31 aur doosaree yah haai
Mark12:32 shaasree ne us se kaha he guro
Mark12:33 aur us se sare man aur saree buaddh iddh aur sare praan aur saree shaktai ke sath praem rakhna aur padosee se apane saman praem rakhna
Mark12:34 jab yeeshu ne dekha ki us ne samajh se uttr diya
Mark12:35 fir yeeshu ne maandair men upadesh karate huae yah kaha
Mark12:36 daud ne apahee pavitra atma men hokar kaha haai
Mark12:37 daud to ap hee use prabhu kahata haai
Mark12:38 us ne apane upadesh men un se kaha
Mark12:39 aur bajaron men namaskar
Mark12:40 ve vidhavaon ke gharon ko kha jate haai
Mark12:41 aur vah maandair ke bhndar ke samhane baaittkar dekh raha tha
Mark12:42 itane men aek kangal vidhava ne akar do damadiya
Mark12:43 tab us ne apane chelon ko pas bulakar un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Mark12:44 kyonaki sab ne apane dhan kee baddhtee men se dala haai
Mark13:1 jab vah maandair se nikal raha tha
Mark13:2 yeeshu ne us se kaha kya tum ye bade bade bhvan dekhte ho: yahan patthr par patthr bhee bacha n rahega jo ddhaya n jaaega..
Mark13:3 jab vah jaaitoon ke pahad par mandair ke samhane baaitta tha
Mark13:4 ki hamen bata ki ye baten kab hongee? aur jab ye sab baten pooree hone par hongee us samay ka kya chinh hoga?
Mark13:5 yeeshu un se kahane laga chaukas raho ki koi tumhen n bhramaae.
Mark13:6 bahutere mere nam se akar kahenge
Mark13:7 aur jab tum ladaiya

Mark13:10 par avashy haai ki pahile susamachar sab jatiyon men prachar kiya jaae.
Mark13:11 jab ve tumhen le jakar saunpenge
Mark13:12 aur bhai ko bhai
Mark13:13 aur mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge par jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega
Mark13:14 so jab tum us ujadnevalee gharanait vastu ko jahan uchit naheen vahan khdee dekho
Mark13:15 so kotte par ho
Mark13:16 aur jo khet men ho
Mark13:17 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee
Mark13:18 aur praarthna kiya karo ki yah jade men n ho.
Mark13:19 kyonaki ve din aeese klesh ke honge
Mark13:20 aur yaadi prabhu un dinon ko n ghattata
Mark13:21 us samay yadi koi tum se kahe dekho
Mark13:22 kyonaki jootte maseeh aur jootte bhavishyadvkta utt khde honge
Mark13:23 par tum chaukas raho: dekho
Mark13:24 un dinon me
Mark13:25 aur akash se taragan girane lagenge: aur akash kee shaaktaiyan hilai jaaengeee.

Mark13:27 us samay vah apane dooton ko bhejakar
Mark13:28 anjeer ke ped se yah drashttant seekho: jab us kee dalee komal ho jatee aur patte nikalane lagate haain to tum jan lete ho
Mark13:29 isee reeti se jab tum in baton ko hote dekho
Mark13:30 maain tum se sach kahata hoo

Mark14:1 do din ke bad fasah aur akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva honevala tha: aur mahayajak aur shaasree is bat kee khoj men the ki use kyonkar chhl se pakad kar mar dalen.
Mark14:2 parantu kahate the
Mark14:3 jab vah baaitaaniyyah men shamaun koddhee ke ghar bhojan karane baaitta hua tha jab aek sree sangamaramar ke patra men jattamansee ka bahumooly shuuddh itra lekar ai aur patra tod kar itra ko usake sir par undela.
Mark14:4 parantu koi koi apane man men risiyakar kahane lage
Mark14:5 kyoki yah itra to tee sau deenar se adhaik mooly men bechakar kangalon ko bantta ja sakata tha
Mark14:6 yeeshu ne kaha use chhod do use kyon satate ho? us ne to mere sath bhalai kee haai.
Mark14:7 kangal tumhare sath sada rahate haain: aur tum jab chaho tab un se bhlai kar sakate ho par maain tumhare sath sada n rahoonga.
Mark14:8 jo kuchh vah kar sakee
Mark14:9 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Mark14:10 tab yahooda isakariyotee jo barah men se aek tha
Mark14:11 ve yah sunakar anandait hua
Mark14:12 akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ke paahile din
Mark14:13 us ne apane chelon men se do ko yah kahakar bheja
Mark14:14 aur vah jis ghar men jaae us ghar ke svamee se kahana guroo kahata haai
Mark14:15 vah tumhen aek sajee sajai
Mark14:16 so chele nikalakar nagar men aye aur jaaisa us ne un se kaha tha
Mark14:17 jab sanjh hui
Mark14:18 aur jab ve baaitte bhojan kar rahe the
Mark14:19 un par udasee chha gai aur ve ek ek karake us se kahane lage kya vah maain hoon?
Mark14:20 us ne un se kaha
Mark14:21 kyonaki manushy ka putra to
Mark14:22 aur jab ve kha hee rahe the to us ne rottee lee
Mark14:23 fir us ne kattora lekar dhanyavad kiya
Mark14:24 aur us ne un se kaha
Mark14:25 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Mark14:26 fir ve bhjan gakar bahar jaaitoon ke pahad par gaae..
Mark14:27 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha tum sab ttokar khaoge
Mark14:28 parantu maain apane jee uttne ke bad tum se paahile galeel ko jaunga.
Mark14:29 pataras ne us se kaha yadi aek ttokar khaaen to khana
Mark14:30 yeeshu ne us se kaha maain tujh se sach kahata hoo
Mark14:31 par us ne aur bhee jor dekar kaha
Mark14:32 fir ve gatasamane nam aek jagah men aa
Mark14:33 aur vah pataras aur yakoob aur yoohanna ko apane sath le gaya: aur bahut hee adhaeer
Mark14:34 aur un se kaha mera man bahut udas haai
Mark14:35 aur vah thoda age baddha
Mark14:36 aur kaha
Mark14:37 fir vah aya
Mark14:38 jagate aur praarthna karate raho ki tum pareeksha men n pado: atma to taaiyar haai
Mark14:39 aur vah fir chala gaya
Mark14:40 aur fir akar unhen sote paya
Mark14:41 fir teesaree bar akar un se kaha ab sote raho aur vishraam karo
Mark14:42 utto
Mark14:43 vah yah kah hee raha tha
Mark14:44 aur usake pakadnevale ne unhen yah pata diya tha
Mark14:45 aur vah aya
Mark14:46 tab unhon ne us par hath dalakar use pakad liya.
Mark14:47 un men se jo pas khde the
Mark14:48 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tum dakoo janakar mere pakadne ke liye talavaren aur lattyaian lekar nikale ho?
Mark14:49 maain to har din mandair men tumhare sath rahakar upadesh diya karata tha
Mark14:50 is par sab chele use chhodkar bhag gaae..
Mark14:51 aur aek javan apanee nangee deh par chadar oddhe huae usake peede ho liya aur logon ne use pakada.
Mark14:52 par vah chadar chhodkar nanga bhag gaya..
Mark14:53 fir ve yeeshu ko mahayajak ke pas le gaae aur sab mahayajak aur puraaniae aur shaasree usake yahan ikatthe ho gaae.
Mark14:54 pataras door hee door se usake peechhe peechhe mahayajak ke angan ke bheetar tak gaya
Mark14:55 mahayajak aur saree mahasabha yeeshu ke mar dalane ke liye usake virodha men gavahee kee khoj men the
Mark14:56 kyonaki bahutere usake virodha men joottee gavahee de rahe the
Mark14:57 tab kitanon ne uttkar us par yah joottee gavahee dee.
Mark14:58 ki ham ne ise yah kahate suna haai ki maain is hath ke banaae huae mandair ko ddha doonga
Mark14:59 is par bhee un kee gavahee aek see n nikalee.
Mark14:60 tab mahayajak ne beech men khde hokar yeeshu se poochha ki too koi uttr naheen deta? ye log tere virodha men kya gavahee dete haain?
Mark14:61 parantu vah maun sadho raha
Mark14:62 yeeshu ne kaha han maain hoon: aur tum manushy ke putra ko sarvashaaktaiman kee daahinee aur baaitte
Mark14:63 tab mahayajak ne apane vasr faadkar kaha ab hamen gavahon ka kya prayojan haai?
Mark14:64 tum ne yah ninda sunee: tumharee kya ray haai un sab ne kaha
Mark14:65 tab koi to us par tookane
Mark14:66 jab pataras neeche angan men tha
Mark14:67 aur pataras ko ag tapate dekhkar us par ttkattkee lagakar dekha aur kahane lagee
Mark14:68 vah mukar gaya
Mark14:69 vah laundee use dekhkar un se jo pas khde the
Mark14:70 parantu vah fir mukar gaya aur thodee der bad unhon ne jo pas khde the fir pataras se kaha nishchay too un men se aek haai kyonaki too galeelee bhee haai.
Mark14:71 tab vah dhaikkar den aur shapath khane laga
Mark14:72 tab turant doosaree bar murga ne bang dee: pataras ko yah bat jo yeeshu ne us se kahee thee smaran ai

Mark15:2 aur peelatus ne us se poochha
Mark15:3 aur mahayajak us par bahut baton ka dosh laga rahe the.
Mark15:4 peelatus ne us se fir poochha
Mark15:5 yeeshu ne fir kuchh uttr naheen diya yahan tak ki peelatus ko bada ashcharya hua..
Mark15:6 aur vah us pavrva men kisee aek bandhauae ko jise ve chahate the
Mark15:7 aur baraabba nam aek manushy un balavaiyon ke sath bandhaua tha

Mark15:10 kyonaki vah janata tha

Mark15:12 yah soon peelatus ne un se fir poochha to jise tum yahoodiyon ka raja kahate ho

Mark15:23 aur use murra mila hua dakhras dene lage

Mark15:33 aur dopahar hone par

Mark15:35 jo pas khde the

Mark15:38 aur maandair ka parda upar se neeche tak fattkar do ttukade ho gaya.
Mark15:39 jo soobedar usake samhane khda tha
Mark15:40 kai striayan bhee door se dekh rahee theen: un men maariyam magadaleenee aur chhotte yakoob kee aur yoses kee mata mariyam aur shalomee theen.
Mark15:41 jab vah galeel men t

Mark15:46 tab us ne aek patalee chadar mol lee

Mark16:1 jab sabt ka din beet gaya
Mark16:2 aur saptah ke paahile din badee bhor
Mark16:3 aur apas men kahatee thee
Mark16:4 jab unhon ne ankh uttai
Mark16:5 aur kabra ke bheetar jakar
Mark16:6 us ne un se kaha
Mark16:7 parantu tum jao
Mark16:8 aur ve nikalakar kabra se bhag gain kyonki kapakapee aur ghabarahatt un par chha gai theen aur unhon ne kisee se kuchh n kaha
Mark16:9 saptah ke paahile din bhor hote hee vah jee utt kar paahile paahil mariyam magadaleenee ko jis men se us ne sat dushttatmaaen nikalee thee
Mark16:10 us ne jakar usake sathaiyon ko jo shaek men oobe huae the aur ro rahe the
Mark16:11 aur unhon ne yah sunakar kee vah jeeavit haai
Mark16:12 is ke bad vah doosare roop men un men se do ko jab ve ganv kee or ja rahe the
Mark16:13 unhon ne bhee jakar auron ko samachar diya
Mark16:14 peechhe vah un gyarahon ko bhee
Mark16:15 aur us ne un se kaha
Mark16:16 jo vishvas kare aur bapatisma le usee ka uddhar hoga
Mark16:17 aur vishvas karanevalon men ye chinh honge ki ve mere nam se dushttatmaon ko nikalenge.
Mark16:18 nai nai bhasha bolenge
Mark16:19 nidan prabhu yeeshu un se baten karane ke bad svarga par utta liya gaya
Mark16:20 aur unhon ne nikalakar har jagah prachar kiya
Luke1:1 isaliye ki bahuton ne un baton ko jo hamare beech men hotee haain iatihas likhne men hath lagaya haai.
Luke1:2 jaaisa ki unhon ne jo pahile hee se in baton ke dekhnevale aur vachan ke sevak the ham tak pahunchaya.
Luke1:3 isaliye he shraeeman thaiyuafilus mujhe bhee yah uchit maloom hua ki un sab baton ka sampoorn hal arambh se tteek tteek janch karake unhen tere liye kramanusar likoon.
Luke1:4 ki too yah jan le
Luke1:5 yahoodiyon ke raja herodes ke samay aabiyyah ke dal men jakarayah nam ka aek yajak tha
Luke1:6 aur ve donon parameshvar ke samhane dharmee the: aur prabhu kee saree agyaaon aur vidhaiyon par nirdosh chalanevale the. un ke koi santan n thee
Luke1:7 kyonaki ileeashaiba banjh thee
Luke1:8 jab vah apane dalakee paree par parameshvar ke samhane yajak ka kam karata tha.
Luke1:9 to yajakon kee reeati ke anusar usake nam par chitthee nikalee
Luke1:10 aur dhoop jalane ke samay logon kee saree mandlee bahar praarthna kar rahee thee.
Luke1:11 ki prabhu ka aek svargadoot dhoop kee vedee kee dahinee or khda hua us ko dikhai diya.
Luke1:12 aur jakarayah dekhkar ghabaraya aur us par bada bhy chha gaya.
Luke1:13 parantu svargadoot ne us se kaha
Luke1:14 aur tujhe anand aur harsha hoga: aur bahut log usake janm ke karan anandait honge.
Luke1:15 kyonaki vah prabhu ke samhane mahan hoga aur dakhras aur madira kabhee n piaega aur apanee mata ke garbh hee se pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho jaaega.
Luke1:16 aur israaeliyon men se bahuteron ko un ke prabhu parameshvar kee or faerega.
Luke1:17 vah aeliyyah kee atma aur samarth men ho kar usake age age chalega
Luke1:18 jakarayah ne svargadoot se poochha yah maain kaaise janoon? kyonki maain to booddha hoon aur meree patnee bhee booddhee ho gai haai.
Luke1:19 svargadoot ne us ko uttr diya
Luke1:20 aur dekh jis din tak ye baten pooree n ho le
Luke1:21 aur log jakarayah kee batt dekhte rahe aur achambha karane lage ki use maandair men aeesee der kyon lagee?
Luke1:22 jab vah bahar aya
Luke1:23 jab us kee seva ke din poore hua
Luke1:24 in dinon ke bad us kee patnee ileeshaiba garbhvatee hui aur panch maheene tak apane ap ko yah kah ke chhpaiaae rakha.
Luke1:25 ki manushyon men mera apaman door karane ke liye prabhu ne in dinon men krapadraashtti karake mere liye aeesa kiya haai..
Luke1:26 chhttven maheene men parameshvar kee or se jibraail svargadoot galeel ke nasarat nagar men aek kunvaree ke pas bheja gaya.
Luke1:27 jis kee manganee yoosufa nam daud ke gharane ke aek puroosh se hui thee: us kunvaree ka nam mariyam tha.
Luke1:28 aur svargadoot ne usake pas bheetar akar kaha anand aur jay teree ho
Luke1:29 vah us vachan se bahut ghabara gai
Luke1:30 svargadoot ne us se kaha
Luke1:31 aur dek
Luke1:32 vah mahan hoga aur paramapradhaan ka putra kahalaaega aur prabhu parameshvar usake pita daud ka sinhasan us ko dega.
Luke1:33 aur vah yakoob ke gharane par sada rajy karega aur usake rajy ka ant n hoga.
Luke1:34 maariyam ne svargadoot se kaha
Luke1:35 svargadoot ne us ko uttr diya ki pavitra atma tujh par utarega
Luke1:36 aur dek
Luke1:37 kyonaki jo vachan parameshvar kee or se hota haai vah prabhavaraahit naheen hota.
Luke1:38 maariyam ne kaha
Luke1:39 un dinon men maariyam uttkar shaeegha hee pahadee desh men yahooda ke ek nagar ko gai.
Luke1:40 aur jakarayah ke ghar men jakar ileeshaiba ko namaskar kiya.
Luke1:41 jyonhee ileeashaiba ne maariyam ka namaskar suna
Luke1:42 aur us ne bade shabd se pukar kar kaha
Luke1:43 aur yah anugrah mujhe kahan se hua
Luke1:44 aur dekh jyonhee tere namaskar ka shabd mere kanon men pada tyonhee bachcha mere pett men anand se uchhl pada.
Luke1:45 aur dhany haai
Luke1:46 tab maariyam ne kaha
Luke1:47 aur meree atma mere uddhar karanevale parameshvar se anaandait hui.
Luke1:48 kyonaki us ne apanee dasee kee deenata par draashtti kee haai
Luke1:49 kyonaki us shaktaiman ne mere liye bade bade kam kiae haai
Luke1:50 aur us kee daya un par
Luke1:51 us ne apana bhujabal dikhaya
Luke1:52 us ne balavanon ko sinhasanon se gira diya aur deenon ko uncha kiya.
Luke1:53 us ne bookhon ko achchhee vastuon se trapt kiya
Luke1:54 us ne apane sevak israel ko sambhal liya.
Luke1:55 ki apanee us daya ko smaran kare
Luke1:56 maariyam lagabhg teen maheene usake sath rahakar apane ghar lott gai..
Luke1:57 tab ileeshaiba ke janane ka samay poora hua
Luke1:58 usake padosiyon aur kuttumbaiyon ne yah sun kar
Luke1:59 aur aeesa hua ki attven din ve balak ka khtana karane aae aur usaka nam usake pita ke nam par jakarayah rakhne lage.
Luke1:60 aur us kee mata ne uttr diya ki naheen baran usaka nam yoohanna rakha jaae.
Luke1:61 aur unhon ne us se kaha
Luke1:62 tab unhon ne usake pita se sanket karake poochha.
Luke1:63 ki too usaka nam kya rakhna chahata haai? aur us ne likhne kee pattee mangakar likh diya
Luke1:64 tab usaka munh aur jeebh turant khul gai aur vah bolane aur parameshvar ka dhanyavad karane laga.
Luke1:65 aur usake as pas ke sab rahanevalon par bhy chha gaya aur un sab baton kee charcha yahoodaya ke sare pahadee desh men faail gai.
Luke1:66 aur sab sunanevalon ne apane apane man men vichar karake kaha
Luke1:67 aur usaka pita jakarayah pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho gaya
Luke1:68 ki prabhu israael ka parameshvar dhany ho
Luke1:69 or apane sevak daud ke gharane men hamare liye aek uddhar ka seeng nikala.
Luke1:70 jaaise us ne apane paavitra bhavishyadvktaon ke dara jo jagat ke adi se hote aae haai
Luke1:71 arthata hamare shatrauon se
Luke1:72 ki hamare bapa-dadon par daya karake apanee paavitra vacha ka smaran kare.
Luke1:73 aur vah shapath jo us ne hamare pita ibraaheem se khai thee.
Luke1:74 ki vah hamen yah dega
Luke1:75 usake samhane pavitrata aur dhaaarmikata se jeevan bhr nidr rahakar us kee seva karate rahen.
Luke1:76 aur too he balak
Luke1:77 ki usake logon ko uddhar ka gyaan de
Luke1:78 yah hamare parameshvar kee usee badee karoona se hoga jis ke karan upar se ham par bhor ka prakash uday hoga.
Luke1:79 ki andhakar aur mratyu kee chhaya men baaittnevalon ko jyoti de
Luke1:80 aur vah balak baddhta aur atma men balavant hota gaya
Luke2:1 un dinon men augoostus kaaisar kee or se agyaa nikalee
Luke2:2 yah paahilee nam likhai us samay hui
Luke2:3 aur sab log nam likhvane ke liye apane apane nagar ko gaae.
Luke2:4 so yoosufa bhee isaliye ki vah daud ke gharane aur vansh ka tha
Luke2:5 ki apanee mangetar maariyam ke sath jo garbhvatee thee nam likhvaae.
Luke2:6 us ke vahan rahate huae usake janane ke din poore hue.
Luke2:7 aur vah apana paahilautta putra janee aur use kapade men lapettkar charanee men rakha: kyonki un ke liye saray men jagah n thee.
Luke2:8 aur us desh men kitane gaderiye the
Luke2:9 aur prabhu ka aek doot un ke pas a khda hua aur prabhu ka tej un ke charon or chamaka
Luke2:10 tab svargadoot ne un se kaha
Luke2:11 ki aj daud ke nagar men tumhare liye aek uddharakarta janma haai
Luke2:12 aur is ka tumhare liye yah pata haai
Luke2:13 tab aekaaek us svargadoot ke sath svargadooton ka dal parameshvar kee stuti karate huae aur yah kahate dikhai diya.
Luke2:14 ki akash men parameshvar kee mahima aur prathvee par un manushyon men jinase vah prasann haai shaaantai ho..
Luke2:15 jab svargadoot un ke pas se svarga ko chale gaa
Luke2:16 aur unhon ne turant jakar mariyam aur yoosufa ko aur charanee men us balak ko pada dekha.
Luke2:17 inhen dekhkar unhon ne vah bat jo is balak ke vishay men un se kahee gai thee
Luke2:18 aur sab sunanevalon ne un baton se jo gadriyon ne un se kaheen ashcharya kiya.
Luke2:19 parantu mariyam ye sab baten apane man men rakhkar sochatee rahee.
Luke2:20 aur gadriye jaaisa un se kaha gaya tha
Luke2:21 jab att din poore hua
Luke2:22 aur jab moosa ko vyavastha ke anusar un ke shuuddh hone ke din poore huae to ve use yarooshalem men le gaa
Luke2:23 jaaisa ki prabhu kee vyavastha men likha haai ki har aek pahilautta prabhu ke liye paavitra ttharega.
Luke2:24 aur prabhu kee vyavastha ke vachan ke anusar pandukon ka aek joda
Luke2:25 aur dekho
Luke2:26 aur paavitra atma se us ko chitavanee hui thee
Luke2:27 aur vah atma ke sikhane se mandair men aya aur jab mata-apita us balak yeeshu ko bheetar laa
Luke2:28 to us ne use apanee god men liya aur parameshvar ka dhanyavad karake kaha
Luke2:29 he svamee
Luke2:30 kyonaki meree ankho ne tere uddhar ko dekh liya haai.
Luke2:31 jise too ne sab deshaen ke logon ke samhane taaiyar kiya haai.
Luke2:32 ki vah any jaatiyon ko prakash dene ke liye jyoti
Luke2:33 aur usaka pita aur us kee mata in baton se jo usake vishay men kahee jatee thee
Luke2:34 tab shamaun ne un ko ashaeesh dekar
Luke2:35 varan tera praan bhee talavar se var par chhdai jaaega-- is se bahut dayon ke vichar pragatt honge.
Luke2:36 aur ashor ke gotra men se hannah nam fanooael kee bettee aek bhavishyadvaktain thee: vah bahut booddhee thee
Luke2:37 vah chaurasee varsha se vidhava thee: aur mandair ko naheen chhodtee thee par upavas aur praarthna kar karake rata-din upasana kiya karatee thee.
Luke2:38 aur vah us ghadee vahan akar prabhu ka dhanyavad karane lagee
Luke2:39 aur jab ve prabhu kee vyavastha ke anusar sab kuchh nipatta chuke to galeel men apane nagar nasarat ko fir chale gaae..
Luke2:40 aur balak baddhta
Luke2:41 usake mata-apita praati varsha fasah ke pabrba men yarooshalem ko jaya karate the.
Luke2:42 jab vah barah varsha ka hua
Luke2:43 aur jab ve un dinon ko poora karake lauttne lage
Luke2:44 ve yah samajhkar
Luke2:45 par jab naheen mila
Luke2:46 aur teen din ke bad unhon ne use maandair men upadeshakon ke beech men baaitte
Luke2:47 aur jitane us kee sun rahe the
Luke2:48 tab ve use dekhkar chakit huae aur us kee mata ne us se kaha he putra
Luke2:49 us ne un se kaha tum mujhe kyon ddoonddhte the? kya naheen janate the
Luke2:50 parantu jo bat us ne un se kahee
Luke2:51 tab vah un ke sath gaya
Luke2:52 aur yeeshu buddh iddh aur deela-daul men aur parameshvar aur manushyon ke anugrah men baddhta gaya..

Luke3:3 aur vah yaradan ke as pas ke sare desh men akar
Luke3:4 jaaise yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke kahe huae vachanon kee pustak men likha haai
Luke3:5 har aek ghaattee bhr dee jaaegee
Luke3:6 aur har praanee parameshvar ke uddhar ko dekhega..

Luke3:8 so man firav ke yogy fal lao: aur apane apane man men yah n socho

Luke3:20 isaliye herodes ne un sab se baddhkar yah kukarma bhee kiya

Luke4:3 aur shautan ne us se kaha yaadi too parameshvar ka putra haai
Luke4:4 yeeshu ne use uttr diya ki likha haai
Luke4:5 tab shautan use le gaya aur us ko pal bhr men jagat ke sare rajy dikhaae.
Luke4:6 aur us se kaha maain yah sab aadhaikar
Luke4:7 isaliye
Luke4:8 yeeshu ne use uttr diya likha haai ki too prabhu apane parameshvar ko pranam kara aur keval usee kee upasana kara.
Luke4:9 tab us ne use yarooshalem men le jakar mandair ke kangoore par khda kiya
Luke4:10 kyonaki likha haai
Luke4:11 aur ve tujhe hathon hath utta lenge aeesa n ho ki tere panv men patthr se ttes lage.
Luke4:12 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya yah bhee kaha gaya haai
Luke4:13 jab shautan sab pareeksha kar chuka
Luke4:14 fir yeeshu atma kee samarth se bhra hua galeel ko lautta
Luke4:15 aur vah un hee aradhanalayon men upadesh karata raha
Luke4:16 aur vah nasarat men aya jahan pala posa gaya tha aur apanee reeti ke anusar sabt ke din aradhanalay men ja kar paddhne ke liye khda hua.
Luke4:17 yashaayah bhvishyadvkta kee pustak use dee gai
Luke4:18 ki prabhu ka atma mujh par haai
Luke4:19 aur prabhu ke prasann rahane ke varsha ka prachar karoon.
Luke4:20 tab us ne pustak band karake sevak ke hath men de dee
Luke4:21 tab vah un se kahane laga
Luke4:22 aur sab ne use saraha
Luke4:23 us ne us se kaha tum mujh par yah kahavat avashy kahoge
Luke4:24 aur us ne kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Luke4:25 aur maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Luke4:26 par aeliyyah un men se kisee ke pas naheen bheja gaya
Luke4:27 aur ileesha bhavishyadvkta ke samay israael men bahut se koddhee the
Luke4:28 ye baten sunate hee jitane aradhanalay men the
Luke4:29 aur uttkar use nagar se bahar nikala
Luke4:30 par vah un ke beech men se nikalakar chala gaya..
Luke4:31 fir vah galeel ke kafaranahoom nagar men gaya
Luke4:32 ve us ke upadesh se chakit ho gaae kyonki usaka vachan aadhaikar saahit tha.
Luke4:33 aradhanalay men aek manushy tha
Luke4:34 vah unche shabd se chilla utta
Luke4:35 yeeshu ne use danttkar kaha
Luke4:36 is par sab ko achambha hua
Luke4:37 so charon or har jagah us kee dhoom mach gai..
Luke4:38 vah aradhanalay men se uttkar shamaun ke ghar men gaya aur shamaun kee sas ko jvar chaddha hua tha
Luke4:39 us ne usake nikatt khde hokar jvar ko dantta aur vah us par se utar gaya aur vah turant uttkar un kee seva tthal karane lagee..
Luke4:40 sooraj oobate samay jin jin ke yahan log nana prakar kee beemariyon men pade huae the
Luke4:41 aur dushttatma chillatee aur yah kahatee hui ki too parameshvar ka putra haai
Luke4:42 jab din hua to vah nikalakar aek jangalee jagah men gaya

Luke4:44 aur vah galeel ke aradhanalayon men prachar karata raha..

Luke5:5 shamaun ne usako uttr diya
Luke5:6 jab unhon ne aeesa kiya
Luke5:7 is par unhon ne apane saathaiyon ko jo doosaree nav par the

Luke5:9 kyonaki itanee machhaliyon ke pakade jane se use aur usake sathaiyon ko bahut achambha hua.
Luke5:10 aur vaaise hee jabadee ke putra yakoob aur yoohanna ko bhee
Luke5:11 aur v navon ko kinare par le aae aur sab kuchh chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae..

Luke5:22 yeeshu ne un ke man kee baten janakar
Luke5:23 sahaj kya haai? kya yah kahana

Luke6:6 aur aeesa hua ki kisee aur sabt ke din ko vah aradhanalay men jakar upadesh karane laga aur vahan aek manushy tha
Luke6:7 shaasree aur fareesee us par dosh lagane ka avasar pane ke liye us kee tak men the

Luke7:2 aur kisee soobedar ka aek das jo usaka piry tha

Luke7:5 kyonaki vah hamaree jati se praem rakhta haai

Luke7:17 aur usake vishay men yah bat sare yahoodiya aur as pas ke sare desh men faail gai..
Luke7:18 aur yoohanna ko usake chelon ne in sab baton ka samachar diya.

Luke7:21 usee ghadee us ne bahuton ko beemaariyon aur peedao
Luke7:22 aur us ne un se kaha jo kuchh tum ne dekha aur suna haai
Luke7:23 aur dhany haai vah

Luke7:27 yah vahee haai
Luke7:28 maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke7:29 aur sab sadhaaran logon ne sunakar aur chungee lenevalon ne bhee yoohanna ka bapaatisma lekar parameshvar ko sachcha man liya.
Luke7:30 par fareesiyon aur vyavasthapakon ne us se bapatisma n lekar parameshvar kee manasa ko apane vishay men ttal diya.
Luke7:31 so maain is yug ke logon kee upama kis se doon ki ve kis ke saman haain?
Luke7:32 ve un balakon ke saman haain jo bajar men baaitte huae aek doosare se pukarakar kahate haai
Luke7:33 kyonaki yoohanna bapaatisma denevala ne rottee khata aya
Luke7:34 manushy ka putra khata-peeta aya haai aur tum kahate ho
Luke7:35 par gyaan apanee sab santanon se sachcha ttharaya gaya haai..
Luke7:36 fir kisee fareesee ne us se binatee kee
Luke7:37 aur dekho
