Luke13:28 vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga: jab tum ibraaheem aur isahak aur yakoob aur sab bhvishyadvktaon ko parameshvar ke rajy men baaitte
Luke13:29 aur poorva aur paachchhima uttr aur dakkhian se log akar parameshvar ke rajy ke bhoj men bhagee honge.
Luke13:30 aur dekho
Luke13:31 usee ghadee kitane fareeasiyo ne akar us se kaha
Luke13:32 us ne un se kaha jakar us lomadee se kah do
Luke13:33 taubhee mujhe aj aur kal aur parason chalana avashy haai
Luke13:34 he yarooshalem! he yarooshalem! too jo bhavishyadvktaon ko mar dalatee haai
Luke13:35 dekho
Luke14:1 fir vah sabt ke din fareeasiyon ke saradaron men se kisee ke ghar men rottee khane gaya: aur ve us kee ghaat men the.
Luke14:2 aur dekho
Luke14:3 is par yeeshu ne vyavasthapakon aur fareeasiyon se kaha kya sabt ke din achchha karana uchit haai
Luke14:4 tab us ne use hath laga kar changa kiya
Luke14:5 aur un se kaha ki tum men se aeesa kaun haai
Luke14:6 ve in baton ka kuchh uttr n de sake..
Luke14:7 jab us ne dekha
Luke14:8 jab koi tujhe byah men bulaa
Luke14:9 aur jis ne tujhe aur use donon ko nevata diya haai: akar tujh se kahe
Luke14:10 par jab too bulaya jaa
Luke14:11 aur jo koi apane ap ko bada banaaega
Luke14:12 tab us ne apane nevata denevale se bhee kaha
Luke14:13 parantu jab too bhoj kare
Luke14:14 tab too dhany hoga
Luke14:15 usake sath bhojan karanevalon men se ek ne ye baten sunakar us se kaha
Luke14:16 us ne us se kaha kisee manushy ne badee jevanar kee aur bahuton ko bulaya.
Luke14:17 jab bhojan taaiyar ho gaya
Luke14:18 par ve sab ke sab kshama mangane lage
Luke14:19 doosare ne kaha
Luke14:20 aek aur ne kaha maai ne byah kiya haai
Luke14:21 us das ne akar apane svamee ko ye baten kah sunai
Luke14:22 das ne fir kaha he svamee
Luke14:23 svamee ne das se kaha
Luke14:24 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke14:25 aur jab badee bheed usake sath ja rahee thee
Luke14:26 yaadi koi mere pas aa
Luke14:27 aur jo koi apana kroos n uttaae aur mere peechhe n aae vah bhee mera chela naheen ho sakata.
Luke14:28 tum men se kaun haai ki gaddh banana chahata ho
Luke14:29 kaheen aeesa n ho
Luke14:30 ki yah manushy banane to laga
Luke14:31 ya kaun aeesa raja haai
Luke14:32 naheen to usake door rahate hee
Luke14:33 isee reeti se tum men se jo koi apana sab kuchh tyag n de
Luke14:34 namak to achchha haai
Luke14:35 vah n to boomi ke aur n khad ke liye kam men ata haai: use to log bahar faenk dete haain: jis ke sunane ke kan hon vah sun le..
Luke15:1 sab chungee lenevale aur papee usake pas aya karate the taki us kee sunen.
Luke15:2 aur fareesee aur shaasree kudkudakar kahane lage
Luke15:3 tab us ne un se yah drashttant kaha.
Luke15:4 tum men se kaun haai jis kee sau bheden ho
Luke15:5 aur jab mil jatee haai
Luke15:6 aur ghar men akar mitraen aur padosiyon ko ikatthe karake kahata haai
Luke15:7 maain tum se kahata hoon ki isee reeati se aek man firanevale papee ke vishay men bhee svarga men itana hee anand hoga
Luke15:8 ya kaun aeesee sree hogee
Luke15:9 aur jab mil jata haai
Luke15:10 maain tum se kahata hoon ki isee reeati se aek man firanevale papee ke vishay men parameshvar ke svargadooton ke samhane anand hota haai..
Luke15:11 fir us ne kaha
Luke15:12 un men se chhuttke ne pita se kaha ki he pita sanpaati men se jo bhag mera ho
Luke15:13 aur bahut din n beete the ki chhuttka putra sab kuchh ikattha karake aek door desh ko chala gaya aur vahan kukarma men apanee sanpati uda dee.
Luke15:14 jab vah sab kuchh khrcha kar chuka
Luke15:15 aur vah us desh ke nivaasiyon men se aek ke yahana jo pada: us ne use apane kheton men sooar charane ke liye bheja.
Luke15:16 aur vah chahata tha
Luke15:17 jab vah apane ape men aya
Luke15:18 maain ab uttkar apane pita ke pas jaunga aur us se kahoonga ki pita jee maain ne svarga ke virodha men aur teree draashtti men pap kiya haai.
Luke15:19 ab is yogy naheen raha ki tera putra kahalau
Luke15:20 tab vah uttkar
Luke15:21 putra n us se kaha pita jee
Luke15:22 parantu pita ne apane dason se kaha jhtt achchhe se achchha vasr nikalakar use pahinao
Luke15:23 aur pala hua bachhda lakar maro taki ham khanae aur anand manaven.
Luke15:24 kyonaki mera yah putra mar gaya tha
Luke15:25 parantu usaka jetta putra khet men tha: aur jab vah ate huae ghar ke nikatt pahuncha
Luke15:26 aur us ne aek das ko bulakar poochha yah kya ho raha haai?
Luke15:27 us ne us se kaha
Luke15:28 yah sunakar vah krodha se bhr gaya
Luke15:29 us ne pita ko uttr diya
Luke15:30 parantu jab tera yah putra
Luke15:31 us ne us se kaha putra
Luke15:32 parantu ab anand karana aur magan hona chahiae kyonki yah tera bhai mar gaya tha fir jee gaya haai kho gaya tha
Luke16:1 fir us ne chelon se bhee kaha kisee dhanavan ka aek bhndaree tha
Luke16:2 so us ne use bulakar kaha
Luke16:3 tab bhndaree sochane laga
Luke16:4 maain saman gaya
Luke16:5 aur us ne apane svamee ke denadaro men se aek aek ko bulakar pahile se poochha
Luke16:6 us ne kaha
Luke16:7 fir doosare se poochha tujh par kya ata haai? us ne kaha
Luke16:8 svamee ne us adharmee bhndaree ko saraha
Luke16:9 aur maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke16:10 jo thode se thode men sachcha haai
Luke16:11 isaliye jab tum adharma ke dhan men sachche n tthare
Luke16:12 aur yaadi tum paraye dhan men sachche n tthare
Luke16:13 koi das do svaamiyon kee seva naheen kar sakata: kyonaki vah to aek se baair aur doosare se praem rakhega ya aek se mil rahega aur doosare ko tuchchh janega: tum parameshvar aur dhan donon kee seva naheen kar sakate..
Luke16:14 fareesee jo lobhee the
Luke16:15 us ne un se kaha tum to manushyon ke samhane apane ap ko dharmee ttharate ho: parantu parameshvar tumhare man ko janata haai
Luke16:16 vyavastha aur bhavishyadvkta yoohanna tak rahe
Luke16:17 akash aur prathvee ka ttl jana vyavastha ke aek bindu ke mitt jane se sahaj haai.
Luke16:18 jo koi apanee patnee ko tyagakar doosaree se byah karata haai
Luke16:19 aek dhanavan manushy tha jo baainjanee kapade aur malamal pahinata aur prati din sukh-vilas aur dhooma-dhaam ke sath rahata tha.
Luke16:20 aur lajar nam ka aek kangal ghaavon se bhra hua us kee devaddhee par chhod diya jata tha.
Luke16:21 aur vah chahata tha
Luke16:22 aur aeesa hua ki vah kangal mar gaya
Luke16:23 aur adhaelok men us ne peeda men pade huae apanee ankhen uttai
Luke16:24 aur us ne pukar kar kaha
Luke16:25 parantu ibraaheem ne kaha he putra smaran kar
Luke16:26 aur in sab baton ko chhod hamare aur tumhare beech aek bharee gadha ttharaya gaya haai ki jo yahan se us par tumhare pas jana chahe
Luke16:27 us ne kaha to he pita maain tujh se binatee karata hoo
Luke16:28 kyonaki mere panch bhai haai
Luke16:29 ibraaheem ne us se kaha
Luke16:30 us ne kaha nahee
Luke16:31 us ne us se kaha
Luke17:1 fir us ne apane chelon se kaha ho naheen sakata ki ttokaren n lage
Luke17:2 jo in chhotton men se kisee aek ko ttokar khailata haai
Luke17:3 sachet raho yaadi tera bhai aparadha kare to use samajha
Luke17:4 yaadi din bhr men vah sat bar tera aparadha kare aur saton bar tere pas fir akar kahe
Luke17:5 tab praeriton ne prabhu se kaha
Luke17:6 prabhu ne kaha ki yadi tum ko rai ke dane ke barabar bhee vishvas hota
Luke17:7 par tum men se aeesa kaun haai
Luke17:8 aur yah n kahe
Luke17:9 kya vah us das ka nihora manega
Luke17:10 isee reeti se tum bhee
Luke17:11 aur aeesa hua ki vah yarooshalem ko jate huae samariya aur galeel ke beech se hokar jo raha tha.
Luke17:12 aur kisee ganv men pravesh karate samay use das koddhee mile.
Luke17:13 aur unhon ne door khde hokar
Luke17:14 us ne unhen dekhkar kaha
Luke17:15 tab un men se aek yah dekhkar ki maain changa ho gaya hoo
Luke17:16 aur yeeshu ke panvon par munh ke bal girakar
Luke17:17 is par yeeshu ne kaha
Luke17:18 kya is paradeshaee ko chhod koi aur n nikala
Luke17:19 tab us ne us se kaha uttkar chala ja tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kiya haai..
Luke17:20 jab fareesiyon ne us se poochha
Luke17:21 aur log yah n kahenge
Luke17:22 aur us ne chelon se kaha ve din aaenge
Luke17:23 log tum se kahenge
Luke17:24 kyonaki jaaise bijalee akash kee aek or se kaundhakar akash kee doosaree or chamakatee haai
Luke17:25 parantu pahile avashy haai
Luke17:26 jaaisa nooh ke dinon men hua tha
Luke17:27 jis din tak nooh jahaj par n chaddha
Luke17:28 aur jaaisa loot ke dinon men hua tha
Luke17:29 parantu jis din loot sadom se nikala
Luke17:30 manushy ke putra ke pragatt hone ke din bhee aeesa hee hoga.
Luke17:31 us din jo kotte par ho aur usaka saman ghar men ho
Luke17:32 loot kee patnee ko smaran rakho.
Luke17:33 jo koi apana praan bachana chahe vah use khoaega
Luke17:34 maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke17:35 do striayan aek sath chakkee peesatee hongee
Luke17:36 do jan khet men honge aek le liya jaaega aur doosara chhoda jaaega.
Luke17:37 yah sun unhon ne us se poochha
Luke18:1 fir us ne is ke vishay men ki nity praarthna karana aur hiyav n chhodna chaahiae un se yah drashttant kaha.
Luke18:2 ki kisee nagar men aek nyayee rahata tha jo n parameshvar se drata th aur n kisee manushy kee paravah karata tha.
Luke18:3 aur usee nagar men aek vidhava bhee rahatee thee: jo usake pas a akar kaha karatee thee
Luke18:4 us ne kitane samay tak to n mana parantu ant men man men vicharakar kaha
Luke18:5 taubhee yah vidhava mujhe satatee rahatee haai
Luke18:6 prabhu ne kaha
Luke18:7 so kya parameshr apane chune huon ka nyay n chukaaega
Luke18:8 maain tum se kahata hoon vah turant un ka nyay chukaaega taubhee manushy ka putra jab aaega
Luke18:9 aur us ne kitano se jo apane upar bhrosa rakhte the
Luke18:10 ki do manushy mandair men praarthna karane ke liye gaae aek fareesee tha aur doosara chungee lenevala.
Luke18:11 fareesee khda hokar apane man men yon praarthna karane laga
Luke18:12 maain saptah men do bar upavas karata hoon maain apanee sab kamai ka dasavan ansh bhee deta hoon.
Luke18:13 parantu chungee lenevale ne door khde hokar
Luke18:14 maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke18:15 fir log apane bachchon ko bhee usake pas lane lage
Luke18:16 yeeshu n bachchon ko pas bulakar kaha
Luke18:17 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Luke18:18 kisee saradar ne us se poochha
Luke18:19 yeeshu ne us se kaha too mujhe uttm kyon kahata haai? koi uttm nahee
Luke18:20 too agyaaon ko to janata haai
Luke18:21 us ne kaha
Luke18:22 yah sun
Luke18:23 vah yah sunakar bahut udas hua
Luke18:24 yeeshu ne use dekhkar kaha dhanavanon ka parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana kaaisa kattnai haai?
Luke18:25 parameshvar ke rajy men dhanavan ke pravesh karane se untt ka sooi ke nake men se nikal jana sahaj haai.
Luke18:26 aur sunanevalon ne kaha
Luke18:27 us ne kaha jo manushy se naheen ho sakata
Luke18:28 pataras ne kaha dek
Luke18:29 us ne un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Luke18:30 aur is samay kai guna adhaik n paae aur paralok men anant jeevana..
Luke18:31 fir us ne barahon ko sath lekar un se kaha dekho
Luke18:32 kyonaki vah anyajaatiyon ke hath men saunpa jaaega
Luke18:33 aur use kode marenge
Luke18:34 aur unhon ne in baton men se koi bat n samajhee: aur yah bat un men chhpaiee rahee
Luke18:35 jab vah yareeho ke nikatt pahuncha
Luke18:36 aur vah bheed ke chalane kee ahatt sunakar poochhne laga
Luke18:37 unhon ne us ko bataya
Luke18:38 tab us ne pukar ke kaha
Luke18:39 jo age jate the

Luke18:41 too kya chahata haai
Luke18:42 yeeshu ne kaha dekhne lag
Luke18:43 aur vah turant dekhne laga aur parameshvar kee badai karata hua usake peechhe ho liya
Luke19:1 vah yareeho men pravesh karake ja raha tha.
Luke19:2 aur dekho
Luke19:3 vah yeeshu ko dekhna chahata tha ki vah kon sa haai? parantu bheed ke karan dekh n sakata tha. kyonaki vah natta tha.
Luke19:4 tab us ko dekhne ke liye vah age daudkar aek goolar k ped par chaddh gaya
Luke19:5 jab yeeshu us jagah pahuncha
Luke19:6 vah turant utarakar anand se use apane ghar ko le gaya.
Luke19:7 yah dekhkar sab loge kudkudakar kahane lage
Luke19:8 jakkai ne khde hokar prabhu se kaha he prabhu
Luke19:9 tab yeeshu ne us se kaha aj is ghar men uddhar aya haai
Luke19:10 kyonaki manushy ka putra khoae huon ko ddoonddhne aur un ka uddhar karane aya haai..

Luke19:12 so us ne kaha

Luke19:14 parantu usake nagar ke rahanevale us se baair rakhte the

Luke19:16 tab paahile ne akar kaha
Luke19:17 us ne us se kaha dhany he uttm das
Luke19:18 doosare ne akar kaha he svamee teree mohar se panch aur moharen kamai haain.
Luke19:19 us ne kaha
Luke19:20 teesare ne akar kaha he svamee dek
Luke19:21 kyonaki maain tujh se drata tha
Luke19:22 us ne us se kaha he dushtt das
Luke19:23 to too ne mere roopaye kottee men kyon naheen rakh dia
Luke19:24 aur jo log nikatt khde the
Luke19:25 unhon ne us se kaha he svamee
Luke19:26 maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke19:27 parantu mere un baairiyon ko jo naheen chahate the ki maain un par rajy karoo
Luke19:28 ye baten kahakar vah yarooshalem kee or un ke age age chala..
Luke19:29 aur jab vah jaaitoon nam pahad par baaitafage aur baaitaniyah ke pas pahuncha
Luke19:30 ki samhane ke ganv men jao
Luke19:31 aur yaadi koi tum se poochhe
Luke19:32 jo bheje gaae the unhon ne jakar jaaisa us ne un se kaha tha
Luke19:33 jab ve gadahe ke bachche ko khol rahe the
Luke19:34 unhon ne kaha
Luke19:35 ve us ko yeeshu ke pas le aae aur apane kapade us bachche par dalakar yeeshu ko us par savar kiya.
Luke19:36 jab vah ja raha tha
Luke19:37 aur nikatt ate huae jab vah jaaitoon pahad kee ddhlan par pahuncha
Luke19:38 ki dhany haai vah raja
Luke19:39 tab bheed men se kitane fareesee us se kahane lage
Luke19:40 us ne uttr diya
Luke19:41 jab vah nikatt aya to nagar ko dekhkar us par roya.
Luke19:42 aur kaha
Luke19:43 kyonaki ve din tujh par aaenge ki tere baairee morcha bandhakar tujhe ghor lenge
Luke19:44 aur tujhe aur tere balakon ko jo tujh men haai
Luke19:45 tab vah maandair men jakar bechanevalon ko bahar nikalane laga.
Luke19:46 aur un se kaha
Luke19:47 aur vah praati din mandair men upadesh karata tha: aur mahayajak aur shaasree aur loagon ke rais use nash karane ka avasar ddoonddhte the.
Luke19:48 parantu koi upay n nikal sake ki yah kis prakar karen kyonki sab log badee chah se us kee sunate the.
Luke20:1 aek din aeesa hua ki jab vah mandair men logon ko upadesh deta aur susamachar suna raha tha
Luke20:2 aur kahane lage
Luke20:3 us ne un ko uttr diya
Luke20:4 yoohanna ka bapatisma svarga kee or se tha ya manushyon kee or se tha?
Luke20:5 tab ve apas men kahane lage
Luke20:6 aur yaadi ham kahe
Luke20:7 so unhon ne uttr diya
Luke20:8 yeeshu ne un se kaha
Luke20:9 tab vah logon se yah drashttant kahane laga
Luke20:10 samay par us ne kisanon ke pas aek das ko bheja
Luke20:11 fir us ne aek aur das ko bheja
Luke20:12 fir us ne teesara bheja
Luke20:13 tab dakh kee baree ke svamee ne kaha
Luke20:14 jab kisanon ne use dekha to apas men vichar karane lage
Luke20:15 aur unhon ne use dakh kee baree se bahar nikalakar mar dala: isaaliye dakh kee baree ka svamee un ke sath kya karega?
Luke20:16 vah akar un kisanon ko nash karega
Luke20:17 us ne un kee or dekhkar kaha fir yah kya
Luke20:18 jo koi us patthr par girega vah chakanachoor ho jaaega
Luke20:19 usee ghadee shaaastriayon aur mahayajakon ne use pakadna chaha
Luke20:20 aur ve us kee tak men lage aur bhediye bheje
Luke20:21 unhon ne us se yah poochha
Luke20:22 kya hamen kaaisar ko kar dena uchit haai
Luke20:23 us ne un kee chaturai ko tadkar un se kaha ek deenar mujhe dikhao.
Luke20:24 is par kis kee mootira aur nam haai? unhon ne kaha
Luke20:25 us ne un se kaha to jo kaaisar ka haai

Luke20:27 fir sadookee jo kahate haai

Luke20:31 isee reeti se saton bina santan mar gaae.
Luke20:32 sab ke peechhe vah sree bhee mar gai.
Luke20:33 so jee uttne par vah un men se kis kee patnee hogee
Luke20:34 yeeshu ne un se kaha ki is yug ke santanon men to byah shaadee hotee haai.
Luke20:35 par jo log is yogy ttharenge
Luke20:36 ve fir marane ke bhee naheen kyonki ve svargadooton ke saman honge
Luke20:37 parantu is bat ko ki mare huae jee uttte haai
Luke20:38 parameshvar to muradon ka naheen parantu jeevaton ka parameshvar haai: kyonki usake nikatt sab jeeavit haain.
Luke20:39 tab yah sunakar shaastriayon men se kitanon ne kaha
Luke20:40 aur unhen fir us se kuchh aur poochhne ka hiyav n hua..
Luke20:41 fir us ne un se poochha
Luke20:42 daud ap bhjanasanhita kee pustak men kahata haai
Luke20:43 mere dahine baait
Luke20:44 daud to use prabhu kahata haai to fir vah us kee santan kyonkar tthara?
Luke20:45 jab sab log sun rahe the
Luke20:46 shaastriayon se chaukas raho
Luke20:47 ve vidhavaon ke ghar kha jate haai
Luke21:1 fir us ne ankh uttakar dhanavanon ko apana apana dan bhndar men dalate dekha.
Luke21:2 aur us ne aek kangal vidhava ko bhee us men do damaadiyan dalate dekha.
Luke21:3 tab us ne kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki is kangal vidhava ne sab se baddhkar dala haai.
Luke21:4 kyonaki un sab ne apanee baddhtee men se dan men kuchh dala haai
Luke21:5 jab kitane log mandair ke vishay men kah rahe the
Luke21:6 ve din aaenge
Luke21:7 unhon ne us se poochha
Luke21:8 us ne kaha chaukas raho
Luke21:9 aur jab tum ladaiyon aur balavon kee charcha suno
Luke21:10 tab us ne un se kaha
Luke21:11 aur baden baden booidol honge
Luke21:12 parantu in sab baton se paahile ve mere nam ke karan tumhen pakadenge
Luke21:13 par yah tumhare liye gavahee dene ka avasar ho jaaega.
Luke21:14 isaliye apane apane man men ttan rakho ki ham pahile se uttr dene kee chinta n karenge.
Luke21:15 kyonaki maain tumhen aeesa bol aur buddh idoonga
Luke21:16 aur tumhare mata pita aur bhai aur kuttumb
Luke21:17 aur mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge.
Luke21:18 parantu tumhare sir ka aek bal bhee banka n hoga.
Luke21:19 apane dhaeeraj se tum apane praanon ko bachaae rakhoge..
Luke21:20 jab tum yarooshalem ko senaon se ghaira hua dekho
Luke21:21 tab jo yahoodiya men hon vah pahadon par bhag jaae
Luke21:22 kyonaki yah palatta lene ke aeese din honge
Luke21:23 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee
Luke21:24 ve talavar ke kaur ho jaaenge
Luke21:25 aur sooraj aur chand aur taron men chinh dikhai denge
Luke21:26 aur bhy ke karan aur sansar par anevalee ghattnaon kee bantt dekhte dekhte logon ke jee men jee n rahega kyonaki akash kee shaktaiyon hilai jaaengee.
Luke21:27 tab ve manushy ke putra ko samarth aur badee mahima ke sath badal par ate dekhenge.
Luke21:28 jab ye baten hone lage
Luke21:29 us ne un se ek drashttant bhee kaha ki anjeer ke ped aur sab pedon ko dekho.
Luke21:30 jyonahi un kee konpalen nikalatee haai
Luke21:31 isee reeti se jab tum ye baten hote dekho
Luke21:32 maain tum se sach kahata hoo
Luke21:33 akash aur prathvee ttl jaaenge
Luke21:34 isaliye savadhaan raho
Luke21:35 kyonaki vah saree prathvee ke sab rahanevalon par isee prakar a padega.
Luke21:36 isaliye jagate raho aur har samay praarthna karate raho ki tum in sab anevalee ghattnaon se bachane
Luke21:37 aur vah din ko mandair men upadesh karata tha aur rat ko bahar jakar jaaitoon nam pahad par raha karata tha.
Luke21:38 aur bhor ko tadke sab log us kee sunane ke liye maandair men usake pas aya karate the.
Luke22:1 akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva jo fasah kahalata haai
Luke22:2 aur mahayajak aur shaasree is bat kee khoj men the ki us ko kyonkar mar dale
Luke22:3 aur shautan yahooda men samaya
Luke22:4 us ne jakar mahayajakon aur paharooon ke saradaron ke sath batacheet kee
Luke22:5 ve anandait hua
Luke22:6 us ne man liya
Luke22:7 tab akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ka din aya
Luke22:8 aur yeeshu ne pataras aur yoohanna ko yah kahakar bheja
Luke22:9 unhon ne us se poochha
Luke22:10 us ne un se kaha dekho
Luke22:11 aur us ghar ke svamee se kaho
Luke22:12 vah tumhen aek sajee sajai badee attaree dikha dega vahan taaiyaree karana.
Luke22:13 unhon ne jakar
Luke22:14 jab ghadee pahunchee
Luke22:15 aur us ne un se kaha mujhe badee lalasa thee
Luke22:16 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke22:17 tab us ne kattora lekar dhanyavad kiya
Luke22:18 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke22:19 fir us ne rottee lee
Luke22:20 isee reeti se us ne biyaree ke bad kattora mere us lohoo men jo tumhare liye bahaya jata haai nai vacha haai.
Luke22:21 par dekho
Luke22:22 kyonaki manushy ka putra to jaaisa usake liye ttharaya gaya jata hee haai
Luke22:23 tab ve apas men poochh pachh karane lage
Luke22:24 un men yah vada-avivad bhee hua ki ham men se kaun bada samajha jata haai?
Luke22:25 us ne un se kaha
Luke22:26 parantu tum aeese n hona varan jo tum men bada haai
Luke22:27 kyonaki bada kaun haai vah jo bhojan par baaitta ya vah jo seva karata haai? kya vah naheen jo bhojan par baaitta haai? par maain tumhare beech men sevak kee nain hoon.
Luke22:28 parantu tum vah ho
Luke22:29 aur jaaise mere pita ne mere liye aek rajy ttharaya haai
Luke22:30 vaaise hee maain bhee tumhare liye ttharata hoo
Luke22:31 shamaun
Luke22:32 parantu maain ne tere liye binatee kee
Luke22:33 us ne us se kaha he prabhu
Luke22:34 us ne kaha he pataras maain tujh se kahata hoo
Luke22:35 aur us ne un se kaha
Luke22:36 us ne un se kaha
Luke22:37 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo
Luke22:38 unhon ne kaha he prabhu
Luke22:39 tab vah bahar nikalakar apanee reeati ke anusar jaaitoon ke pahad par gaya
Luke22:40 us jagah pahunchakar us ne un se kaha praarthna karo
Luke22:41 aur vah ap un se alag aek ddhela faenkane ke ttppe bhr gaya
Luke22:42 ki he pita yaadi too chahe to is kattore ko mere pas se hatta le
Luke22:43 tab svarga se aek doot us ko dikhai diya jo use samarth deta tha.
Luke22:44 aur vah atyant sankatt men vyakul hokar aur bhee day vedana se praarthna karane laga aur usaka paseena mano lohoo kee badee badee boondon kee nai boomi par gir raha tha.
Luke22:45 tab vah praarthna se utta aur apane chelon ke pas akar unhen udasee ke mare sota paya aur un se kaha
Luke22:46 utto
Luke22:47 vah yah kah hee raha tha
Luke22:48 yeeshu ne us se kaha
Luke22:49 usake saathaiyon ne jab dekha ki kya honevala haai
Luke22:50 aur un men se aek ne mahayajak ke das par chalakar usaka dahina kan uda diya.
Luke22:51 is par yeeshu ne kaha ab bas karo: aur usaka kan chookar use achchha kiya.
Luke22:52 tab yeeshu ne mahayajakon aur maandair ke paharooon ke saradaron aur puraaniyon se
Luke22:53 jab maain mandair men har din tumhare sath tha
Luke22:54 fir ve use pakadkar le chale
Luke22:55 aur jab ve angan men ag sulagakar ikatthe baaitte
Luke22:56 aur aek laundee use ag ke ujiyale men baaitte dekhkar aur us kee or takakar kahane lagee
Luke22:57 paranatu us ne yah kahakar inkar kiya
Luke22:58 thodee der bad kisee aur ne use dekhkar kaha
Luke22:59 koi ghantte bhr ke bad aek aur manushy draddhta se kahane laga
Luke22:60 pataras ne kaha
Luke22:61 tab prabhu ne ghoomakar pataras kee or dekha
Luke22:62 aur vah bahar nikalakar foott foott kar rone laga..
Luke22:63 jo manushy yeeshu ko pakade huae the
Luke22:64 aur us kee ankhe ddhanpakar us se poochha
Luke22:65 aur unhon ne bahut see aur bhee ninda kee baten usake virodha men kaheen..
Luke22:66 jab din hua to logon ke puraaniae aur mahayajak aur shaasree ikatthe hua
Luke22:67 yaadi too maseeh haai
Luke22:68 aur yaadi poonchoo
Luke22:69 paranatu ab se manushy ka putra sarvashaaktaiman parameshvar kee daahinee aur baaitta rahega.
Luke22:70 is par sab ne kaha
Luke22:71 tab unhon ne kaha ab hamen gavahee ka kya prayojan haai kyonaki ham ne ap hee usake munh se sun liya haai..
Luke23:1 tab saree sabha uttkar use peelatus ke pas le gai.
Luke23:2 aur ve yah kahakar us par dosh lagane lage
Luke23:3 peelatus ne us se poochha
Luke23:4 tab peelatus ne mahayajakon aur logon se kaha
Luke23:5 par ve aur bhee draddhta se kahane lage
Luke23:6 yah sunakar peelatus ne poochha
Luke23:7 aur yah janakar ki vah herodes kee riyasat ka haai
Luke23:8 herodes yeeshu ko dekhkar bahut hee prasann hua
Luke23:9 vah us ne bahuteree baten poochhta raha
Luke23:10 aur mahayajak aur shaasree khde huae tan man se us par dosh lagate rahe.
Luke23:11 tab herodes ne apane sipaahiyon ke sath usaka apaman karake tttthon men udaya
Luke23:12 usee din peelatus aur herodes mitra ho gae. isake pahile ve ek doosare ke baairee the..
Luke23:13 peelatus ne mahayajakon aur saradaron aur logon ko bulakar un se kaha.
Luke23:14 tum is manushy ko logon ka bahakanevala ttharakar mere pas laae ho
Luke23:15 n herodes ne
Luke23:16 isaliye maain use pittvakar chhod deta hoon.
Luke23:17 
Luke23:18 tab sab milakar chilla utte
Luke23:19 yahee kisee balave ke karan jo nagar men hua tha
Luke23:20 par peelatus ne yeeshu ko chhodne kee ichchha se logon ko fir samajhaya.
Luke23:21 parantu unhon ne chillakar kaha: ki use kroos par chaddha
Luke23:22 us ne teesaree bar un se kaha kyon us ne kaun see burai kee haai? maain ne us men mratyu dand ke yogy kortt bat naheen pai! isaaliye maain use pittvakar chhod deta hoon.
Luke23:23 parantu ve chilla-achillakar peechhe pad gaa
Luke23:24 so peelatus ne agyaa dee
Luke23:25 aur us ne us manushy ko jo balave aur hatya ke karan bandeegrah men dala gaya tha
Luke23:26 jab ve use liae jate i
Luke23:27 aur logon kee badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee: aur bahut see striayan bhee
Luke23:28 yeeshu ne un kee or firakar kaha he yarooshalem kee putraiyo
Luke23:29 kyonaki dekho
Luke23:30 us samay ve pahadon se kahane lagenge
Luke23:31 kyonaki jab ve hare ped ke sath aeesa karate haai
Luke23:32 ve aur do manushyon ko bhgyaee jo kukarmee the usake sath ghaat karane ko le chale..
Luke23:33 jab ve us jagah jise khopadee kahate haain pahunche
Luke23:34 tab yeeshu ne kaha he pita
Luke23:35 log khde khde dekh rahe the
Luke23:36 sipahee bhee pas akar aur siraka dekar usaka ttttha karake kahate the.
Luke23:37 yaadi too yahoodiyon ka raja haai
Luke23:38 aur usake upar aek patra bhee laga tha
Luke23:39 jo kukarmee lattkaae gaae the
Luke23:40 is par doosare ne use danttkar kaha
Luke23:41 aur ham to nyayanusar dand pa rahe haai
Luke23:42 tab us ne kaha he yeeshu
Luke23:43 us ne us se kaha
Luke23:44 aur lagabhg do pahar se teesare pahar tak sare desh men aandhiayara chhaya raha.
Luke23:45 aur soorya ka ujiyala jata raha
Luke23:46 aur yeeshu ne bade shabd se pukar kar kaha he pita
Luke23:47 soobedar ne
Luke23:48 aur bheed jo yah dekhne ko ikatthee hui bhee
Luke23:49 aur usake sab jan pahachan
Luke23:50 aur dekho yoosufa nam aek mantraee jo sajjan aur dharmee puroosh tha.
Luke23:51 aur un ke vichar aur un ke is kam se prasann n tha aur vaa yaihoodiyon ke nagar arimateeya ka rahanevala aur parameshvar ke rajy kee batt johanevala tha.
Luke23:52 us ne peelatus ke pas jakar yeeshu kee loth mang lee.
Luke23:53 aur use utarakar chadar men lapetta
Luke23:54 vah taaiyaree ka din tha
Luke23:55 aur un striayon ne jo usake sath galeel se ai thee
Luke23:56 aur lauttkar sugandhiat vastuaen aur itra taaiyar kiya: aur sabt ke din to unhon ne agyaa ke anusar vishraam kiya..
Luke24:1 parantu saptah ke pahile din bade bhor ko ve un sugaandhiat vastuon ko jo unhon ne taaiyar kee thee
Luke24:2 aur unhon ne patthr ko kabra par se luddhka hua paya.
Luke24:3 aur bheetar jakar prabhu yeeshu kee loth n pai.
Luke24:4 jab ve is bat se bhauchakkee ho rahee theen to dekho
Luke24:5 jab ve dr gai
Luke24:6 vah yahan nahee
Luke24:7 ki avashy haai
Luke24:8 tab us kee baten un ko smaran ain.
Luke24:9 aur kabra se lauttkar unhon ne un gyarahon ko
Luke24:10 jinhon ne praeariton se ye baten kahee
Luke24:11 parantu un kee baten unahen kahanee see samajh padee
Luke24:12 tab pataras uttkar kabra par daud gaya
Luke24:13 dekho
Luke24:14 aur ve in sab baton par jo huin thee
Luke24:15 aur jab ve apas men batacheet aur poochhtachh kar rahe the
Luke24:16 paranatu un kee ankhe aeesee band kar dee gain thee
Luke24:17 us ne un se poochha ye kya baten haai
Luke24:18 yah sunakar
Luke24:19 us ne un se poochha kaun see baten? unhon ne us se kaha yeeshu nasaree ke vishay men jo parameshvar aur sab logon ke nikatt kam aur vachan men samarthee bhvishyadvkta tha.
Luke24:20 aur mahayajakon aur hamare saradaron ne use pakadva diya
Luke24:21 parantu hamen asha thee
Luke24:22 aur ham men se kai striayon ne bhee hamen ashcharya men dal diya haai
Luke24:23 aur jab us kee loth n pai
Luke24:24 tab hamare saathaiyon men se kai aek kabra par gaa
Luke24:25 tab us ne un se kaha he nirbuaddhyaie
Luke24:26 kya avashy n tha
Luke24:27 tab us ne moosa se aur sab bhavishyadvktaon se arambh karake sare paavitra shaasren men se
Luke24:28 itane men ve us ganv ke pas pahunche
Luke24:29 parantu unhon ne yah kahakar use roka
Luke24:30 jab vah un ke sath bhojan karane baaitta
Luke24:31 tab un kee ankhe khul gain aur unhon ne use pahachan liya
Luke24:32 unhon ne apas men kaha jab vah marga men ham se baten karata tha
Luke24:33 ve usee ghadee uttkar yarooshalem ko lautt gaa
Luke24:34 ve kahate the
Luke24:35 tab unhon ne marga kee baten unhen bata deen aur yah bhee ki unhon ne use rottee todte samay kyonkar pahachana..
Luke24:36 ve ye baten kah hee rahe the
Luke24:37 parantu ve ghabara gaa
Luke24:38 us ne un se kaha kyon ghabarate ho? aur tumhare man men kyon sandeh uttte haain?
Luke24:39 mere hath aur mere panv ko dekho
Luke24:40 yah kahakar us ne unahen apane hath panv dikhaae.
Luke24:41 jab anand ke mare un ko prateeati n hui
Luke24:42 unhon ne use boonee machhlee ka ttukada diya.
Luke24:43 us ne lekar un ke samhane khaya.
Luke24:44 fir us ne un se kaha
Luke24:45 tab us ne paavitra shaasr boojhne ke liye un kee samajh khol dee.
Luke24:46 aur un se kaha
Luke24:47 aur yarooshalem se lekar sab jaatiyon men man firav ka aur papon kee kshama ka prachar
Luke24:48 tum in sab baten ke gavah ho.
Luke24:49 aur dekho

Luke24:51 aur unhen ashaeesh dete huae vah un se alag ho gaya aur svarga se utta liya gaya.
Luke24:52 aur ve us ko dandvata karake bade anand se yarooshalem ko lautt gaae.
Luke24:53 aur lagatar maandair men upaasthiat hokar parameshvar kee stuati kiya karate the..
John1:1 aadi men vachan tha
John1:2 yahee adi men parameshvar ke sath tha.
John1:3 sab kuchh usee ke dara utpann hua aur jo kuchh utpann hua haai
John1:4 us men jeevan tha aur vah jeevan munashyon kee jyoti thee.
John1:5 aur jyoti andhakar men chamakatee haai aur andhakar ne use grahan n kiya.
John1:6 aek manushy parameshvar kee or se a upasthiat hua jis ka nam yoohanna tha.
John1:7 yah gavahee dene aya
John1:8 vah ap to vah jyoti n tha
John1:9 sachchee jyoti jo har aek manushy ko prakaashait karatee haai
John1:10 vah jagat men tha

John1:33 aur maain to use paahichanata n tha

John1:36 aur us ne yeeshu par jo ja raha tha draashtti karake kaha
John1:37 tab ve donon chele us kee sunakar yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae.
John1:38 yeeshu ne firakar aur un ko peechhe ate dekhkar un se kaha
John1:39 tab unhon ne akar usake rahane ka sthan dekha
John1:40 un donon men se jo yoohanna kee bat sunakar yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae the
John1:41 us ne paahile apane sage bhain shamaun se milakar us se kaha
John1:42 vah use yeeshu ke pas laya: yeeshu ne us par draashtti karake kaha
John1:43 oodoosare din yeeshu ne galeel ko jana chaha aur filippus se milakar kaha
John1:44 filippus to andairyas aur pataras ke nagar baaitasaaida ka nivasee tha.

John1:49 natanaael ne us se kaha

John5:2 yarooshalem men bhed-faattk ke pas aek kund haai jo ibraanee bhasha men betahasada kahalata haai
John5:3 in men bahut se beemar
John5:4 kyonaki niyuaktai samay par parameshvar ke svargadoot kund men utarakar panee ko hilaya karate the: panee hilate hee jo koi paahile utarata vah changa ho jata tha chahe usakee koi beemaree kyon n ho.
John5:5 vahan aek manushy tha
John5:6 yeeshu ne use pada hua dekhkar aur janakar ki vah bahut dinon se is dasha men pada haai
John5:7 us beemar ne us ko uttr diya
John5:8 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John5:9 vah manushy turant changa ho gaya
John5:10 vah sabt ka din tha. isaaliye yahoodee us se
John5:11 us ne unhen uttr diya
John5:12 unhon ne us se poochha vah kaun manushy haai jis ne tujh se kaha
John5:13 parantu jo changa ho gaya tha
John5:14 in baton ke bad vah yeeshu ko maandair men mila
John5:15 us manushy ne jakar yahoodiyon se kah diya
John5:16 is karan yahoodee yeeshu ko satane lage
John5:17 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha
John5:18 is karan yahoodee aur bhee aadhaik usake mar dalane ka prayatn karane lage
John5:19 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha
John5:20 kyonaki pita putra se praeeati rakhta haai aur jo jo kam vah ap karata haai
John5:21 kyoki jaaisa pita mare huon ko uttata aur jilata haai
John5:22 aur pita kisee ka nyay bhee naheen karata
John5:23 isaliye ki sab log jaaise pita ka adar karate haain vaaise hee putra ka bhee adar karen: jo putra ka adar naheen karata
John5:24 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John5:25 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John5:26 kyonaki jis reeti se pita apane ap men jeevan rakhta haai
John5:27 baran use nyay karane ka bhee adhaikar diya haai
John5:28 is se achambha mat karo
John5:29 jinhon ne bhlai kee haai ve jeevan ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge aur jinhon ne burai kee haai ve dand ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge.
John5:30 maain apane ap se kuchh naheen kar sakata jaaisa sunata hoo
John5:31 yaadi maain ap hee apanee gavahee doon to meree gavahee sachchee naheen.
John5:32 aek aur haai jo meree gavahee deta haai vah sachchee haai.
John5:33 tum ne yoohanna se puchhvaya aur us ne sachchai kee gavahee dee haai.
John5:34 parantu maain apane vishay men manushy kee gavahee naheen chahata taubhee maain ye baten isaliye kahata hoo
John5:35 vah jo jalata aur chamakata hua deepak tha aur tumhen kuchh der tak us kee jyoti me
John5:36 parantu mere pas jo gavahee haai vah yoohanna kee gavahee se badee haai: kyonki jo kam pita ne mujhe poora karane ko saunpa haai arthata yahee kam jo maain karata hoo
John5:37 aur pita jis ne mujhe bheja haai
John5:38 aur usake vachan ko man men sthiar naheen rakhte kyonki jise us ne bheja us kee prateeati naheen karate.
John5:39 tum paavitra shaasr men ddoonddhte ho
John5:40 fir bhee tum jeevan pane ke liye mere pas ana naheen chahate.
John5:41 maain manushyon se adar naheen chahata.
John5:42 parantu maain tumhen janata hoo
John5:43 maain apane pita ke nam se aya hoo
John5:44 tum jo aek doosare se adar chahate ho aur vah adar jo advait parameshvar kee or se haai
John5:45 yah n samajho
John5:46 kyonaki yadi tum moosa kee prateeati karate
John5:47 parantu yadi tum us kee likhee hui baton kee prateeti naheen karate
John6:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu galeel kee jheel arthata tibiriyas kee jheel ke pas gaya.
John6:2 aur aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee kayonaki jo ashcharya karma vah beemaron par dikhata tha ve un ko dekhte the.
John6:3 tab yeeshu pahad par chaddhkar apane chelon ke sath vahan baaitta.
John6:4 aur yahoodiyon ke fasah ke pabrba nikatt tha.
John6:5 tab yeeshu ne apanee ankhe uttakar aek badee bheed ko apane pas ate dekha
John6:6 parantu us ne yah bat use parakhne ke liye kahee kyonki vah ap janata tha ki maain kya karoonga.
John6:7 filippus ne us ko uttr diya
John6:8 usake chelon men se shamaun pataras ke bhai andairyas ne us se kaha.
John6:9 yahan aek ladka haai jis ke pas jav kee panch rottee aur do machhaliyan haain parantu itane logon ke liye ve kya haain.
John6:10 yeeshu ne kaha
John6:11 tab yeeshu ne rottyaian lee
John6:12 jab ve khakar trapt ho gaae to us ne apane chelon se kaha
John6:13 so unhon ne battora
John6:14 tab jo ashcharya karma us ne kar dikhaya use ve log dekhkar kahane lage ki vah bhvishyadvkta jo jagat men anevala tha nishchay yahee haai.
John6:15 yeeshu yah janakar ki ve mujhe raja banane ke liye akar pakadna chahate haai
John6:16 fir jab sandhya hui
John6:17 aur nav par chaddhkar jheel ke par kafaranahoom ko jane lage: us samay andhora ho gaya tha
John6:18 aur andhaee ke karan jheel men lahare uttne lageen.
John6:19 so jab ve khete khete teen char meel ke lagabhg nikal gaa
John6:20 parantu us ne un se kaha
John6:21 so ve use nav par chaddha lene ke liye taaiyar huae aur turant vah nav ke sthan par ja pahunchee jahan vah jate the.
John6:22 doosare din us bheed ne
John6:23 taubhee aur chhottee naven tibiriyas se us jagah ke nikatt ai
John6:24 so jab bheed ne dekha
John6:25 aur jheel ke par us se milakar kaha
John6:26 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
John6:27 nashaman bhojan ke liye paarishram n karo
John6:28 unhon ne us se kaha
John6:29 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya parameshvar ka kayrya yah haai
John6:30 tab unhon ne us se kaha
John6:31 hamare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya jaaisa likha haai ki us ne unhen khane ke liye svarga se rottee dee.
John6:32 yeeshu ne un se kaha
John6:33 kyoki parameshvar kee rottee vahee haai
John6:34 tab unhon ne us se kaha
John6:35 yeeshu ne un se kaha
John6:36 parantu maain ne tum se kaha
John6:37 jo kuchh pita mujhe deta haai vah sab mere pas aaega
John6:38 kyonaki maain apanee ichchha nahee
John6:39 aur mere bhejanevale kee ichchha yah haai ki jo kuchh us ne mujhe diya haai
John6:40 kyonaki mere pita kee ichchha yah haai
John6:41 so yahoodee us par kudkudane lage
John6:42 aur unhon ne kaha kya yah yoosufa ka putra yeeshu nahee
John6:43 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya
John6:44 koi mere pas naheen a sakata
John6:45 bhavishyadvktaon ke lekhon men yah likha haai
John6:46 yah nahee
John6:47 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John6:48 jeevan kee rottee maain hoon.
John6:49 tumhare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya aur mar gaae.
John6:50 yah vah rottee haai jo svarga se utaratee haai taaki manushy us men se khaae aur n mare.
John6:51 jeevan kee rottee jo svarga se utaree maain hoon. yadi koi is rottee men se khaa
John6:52 is par yahoodee yah kahakar apas men jhgadne lage
John6:53 yeeshu ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon jab tak manushy ke putra ka mans n khao
John6:54 jo mera mans khata
John6:55 kyonaki mera mans vastav men khane kee vastu haai aur mera lohoo vastav men peen kee vastu haai.
John6:56 jo mera mans khata aur mera lohoo peeta haai
John6:57 jaaisa jeevate pita ne mujhe bheja aur maain pita ke karan jeevit hoon vaaisa hee vah bhee jo mujhe khaaega mere karan jeevit rahega.
John6:58 jo rottee svarga se utaree yahee haai
John6:59 ye baten us ne kafaranahoom ke aek aradhanalay men upadesh dete samay kaheen.
John6:60 isaliye usake chelon men se bahuton ne yah sunakar kaha
John6:61 yeeshu ne apane man men yah jan kar ki mere chele apas men is bat par kudkudate haai
John6:62 aur yaadi tum manushy ke putra ko jahan vah pahile tha
John6:63 atma to jeevanadayak haai
John6:64 parantu tum men se kitane aeese haain jo vishvas naheen karate: kyonaki yeeshu to paahile hee se janata tha ki jo vishvas naheen karate
John6:65 aur us ne kaha
John6:66 is par usake chelon men se bahutere ultte fir gaae aur usake bad usake sath n chale.
John6:67 tab yeeshu ne un barahon se kaha
John6:68 shamaun pataras ne us ko uttr diya
John6:69 aur ham ne vishvas kiya
John6:70 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
John6:71 yah us ne shamaun iskariyotee ke putra yahoodah ke vishay men kaha
John7:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu galeel men firata raha
John7:2 aur yahoodiyon ka mandpon ka pabrba nikatt tha.
John7:3 isaliye usake bhaiyon ne us se kaha
John7:4 kyonankai aeesa koi n hoga jo prasiddh hona chahe
John7:5 kyonaki usake bhai bhee us par vishvas naheen karate the.
John7:6 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha
John7:7 jagat tum se baair naheen kar sakata
John7:8 tum pabrba men jao: maain abhee is pabrba men naheen jata kyonki abhee tak mera samay poora naheen hua.
John7:9 vah un se ye baten kahakar galeel hee men rah gaya..
John7:10 parantu jab usake bhai pabrba men chale gaa
John7:11 to yahoodee pabrba men use yah kahakar ddoonddhne lage ki vah kahan haai?
John7:12 aur logon men usake vishay chupake chupake bahut see baten huin: kitane kahate the vah bhla manushy haai: aur kitane kahate the nahee
John7:13 taubhee yahoodiyon ke bhy ke mare koi vyaktai usake vishay men khulakar naheen bolata tha.
John7:14 aur jab pabrba ke adho din beet gaae to yeeshu mandair men jakar upadesh karane laga.
John7:15 tab yahoodiyon ne achambha karake kaha
John7:16 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
John7:17 yaadi koi us kee ichchha par chalana chahe
John7:18 jo apanee or se kuchh kahata haai
John7:19 kya moosa ne tumhen vyavastha naheen dee? taubhee tum men se kai vyavastha par naheen chalata. tum kyon mujhe mar dalana chahate ho?
John7:20 logon ne uttr diya ki tujh men dushttatma haai kaun tujhe mar dalana chahata haai?
John7:21 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya
John7:22 isee karan moosa ne tumhen khtane kee agyaa dee haai yah naheen ki vah moosa kee or se haai parantu bapa-dadon se chalee ai haai
John7:23 jab sabt ke din manushy ka khtana kiya jata haai taki moosa kee vyavastha kee agyaa ttl n jaa
John7:24 munh dekhkar nyay n chukao
John7:25 tab kitane yarooshalemee kahane lage kya yah vah nahee
John7:26 parantu dekho
John7:27 is ko to ham janate haai
John7:28 tab yeeshu ne mandair men upadesh dete huae pukar ke kaha
John7:29 maain use janata hoon kyonaki maain us kee or se hoon aur usee ne mujhe bheja haai.
John7:30 is par unhon ne use pakadna chaha taubhee kisee ne us par hath n dala
John7:31 aur bheed men se bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya
John7:32 fareesiyon ne logon ko usake vishay men ye baten chupake chupake karate suna aur mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne usake pakadne ko sipahee bheje.
John7:33 is par yeeshu ne kaha
John7:34 tum mujhe ddoonddhoge
John7:35 yahoodiyon ne apas men kaha
John7:36 yah kya bat haai jo us ne kahee
John7:37 fir pabrba ke anatim din
John7:38 jo mujh par vishvas karega
John7:39 us ne yah vachan us atma ke vishay men kaha
John7:40 tab bheed men se kisee kisee ne ye baten sun kar kaha
John7:41 auron ne kaha yah maseeh haai
John7:42 kya pavitra shaasr men naheen aya
John7:43 so usake karan logon men foott padee.
John7:44 un men se kitane use pakadna chahate the
John7:45 tab sipahee mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon ke pas aa
John7:46 sipaahiyon ne uttr diya
John7:47 fareesiyon ne un ko uttr diya
John7:48 kya saradaron ya fareesiyon men se kisee ne bhee us par vishvas kiya haai?
John7:49 parantu ye log jo vyavastha naheen janate
John7:50 neekudemus ne
John7:51 kya hamaree vyavastha kisee vyaktai ko jab tak pahile us kee sunakar jan n le
John7:52 unhon ne use uttr diya kya too bhee galeel ka haai ddoonddh aur dek
John7:53 tab sab koi apane apane ghar ko gaae..
John8:1 parantu yeeshu jaaitoon ke pahad par gaya.
John8:2 aur bhor ko fir mandair men aya
John8:3 tab shaasree aur fareesee aek sree ko laa
John8:4 he guro
John8:5 vyavastha men moosa ne hamen agyaa dee haai ki aeesee striayon kon patthravah karen: so too is sree ke vishay men kya kahata haai?
John8:6 unhon ne us ko parakhne ke liye yah bat kahee taki us par dosh lagane ke liye koi bat pae
John8:7 jab ve us se poochhte rahe
John8:8 aur fir jhukakar boomi par ungalee se likhne laga.
John8:9 parantu ve yah sunakar badon se lekar chhotton tak aek aek karake nikal gaa
John8:10 yeeshu ne seedho hokar us se kaha
John8:11 usa ne kaha
John8:12 tab yeeshu ne fir logon se kaha
John8:13 fareesiyon ne us se kaha too apanee gavahee ap deta haai teree gavahee tteek naheen.
John8:14 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya ki yadi maain apanee gavahee ap deta hoo
John8:15 tum shareer ke anusar nyay karate ho maain kisee ka nyay naheen karata.
John8:16 aur yaadi maain nyay karoon bhee
John8:17 aur tumharee vyavastha men bhee likha haai ki do janon kee gavahee milakar tteek hotee haai.
John8:18 aek to maain ap apanee gavahee deta hoo
John8:19 unhon ne us se kaha
John8:20 ye baten us ne mandair men upadesh dete huae bhndar ghar men kahee
John8:21 us ne fir un se kaha
John8:22 is par yahoodiyon ne kaha
John8:23 us ne un se kaha
John8:24 isaliye maain ne tum se kaha
John8:25 unhon ne us se kaha
John8:26 tumhare vishay men mujhe bahut kuchh kahana aur nirny karana haai parantu mera bhejanevala sachcha haai aur jo maain ne us se suna he
John8:27 ve n samajhe ki ham se pita ke vishay men kahata haai.
John8:28 tab yeeshu ne kaha
John8:29 aur mera bhejanevala mere sath haai us ne mujhe akela naheen chhoda kyonki maain sarvada vahee kam karata hoo
John8:30 vah ye baten kah hee raha tha
John8:31 tab yeeshu ne un yahoodiyon se jinhon ne un kee prateeati kee thee
John8:32 aur saty ko janoge
John8:33 unhon ne us ko uttr diya ki ham to ibraaheem ke vansh se haain aur kabhee kisee ke das naheen hue fir too kyonkar kahata haai
John8:34 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki jo koi pap karata haai
John8:35 aur das sada ghar men naheen rahata putra sada rahata haai.
John8:36 so yaadi putra tumhen svatantra karega
John8:37 maain janata hoon ki tum ibraaheem ke vansh se ho taubhee mera vachan tumhare day men jagah naheen pata
John8:38 maain vahee kahata hoo
John8:39 unhon ne un ko uttr diya
John8:40 parantu ab tum mujh aeese manushy ko mar dalana chahate ho
John8:41 tum apane pita ke saman kam karate ho: unhon ne us se kaha
John8:42 yeeshu ne un se kaha yaadi parameshvar tumhara pita hota
John8:43 tum meree bat kyon naheen samajhte? isaliye ki mera vachan sun naheen sakate.
John8:44 tum apane pita shautan se ho
John8:45 parantu maain jo sach bolata hoo
John8:46 tum men se kaun mujhe papee ttharata haai? aur yaadi maain sach bolata hoo
John8:47 jo parameshvar se hota he
John8:48 yah sun yahoodiyon ne us se kaha kya ham tteek naheen kahate
John8:49 yeeshu ne uttr diya
John8:50 parantu maain apanee praatishtta naheen chahata
John8:51 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John8:52 yahoodiyon ne us se kaha
John8:53 hamara pita ibraaheem to mar gaya
John8:54 yeeshu ne uttr diya yaadi maain ap apanee maahima karoo
John8:55 aur tum ne to use naheen jana: parantu maain use janata hoon aur yaadi kahoon ki maain use naheen janata
John8:56 tumhara pita ibraaheem mera din dekhne kee asha se bahut magan tha aur us ne dekha
John8:57 yahoodiyon ne us se kaha
John8:58 yeeshu ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki pahile isake ki ibraaheem utpann hua maain hoon.
John8:59 tab unhon ne use marane ke liye patthr uttaa
John9:1 fir jate huae us ne aek manushy ko dekha
John9:2 aur usake chelon ne us se poochha
John9:3 yeeshu ne uttr diya
John9:4 jis ne mujhe bheja haai hamen usake kam din hee din men karana avashy haai: vah rat anevalee haai jis men koi kam naheen kar sakata.
John9:5 jab tak maain jangal men hoo
John9:6 yah kahakar us ne boomi par tooka aur us took se mittee sanee
John9:7 us se kaha ja shaeeloh ke kund men dhae le
John9:8 tab padosee aur jinhon ne pihale use bheekh mangate dekha tha
John9:9 kitanon ne kaha
John9:10 tab ve us se poochhne lage
John9:11 us ne uttr diya
John9:12 unhon ne us se poochha vah kahan haai? us ne kaha maain naheen janata..
John9:13 log use jo pahile andha tha fareesiyon ke pas le gaae.
John9:14 jis din yeeshu ne mittee sanakar us kee ankhe kholee thee vah sabt ka din tha.
John9:15 fir fareeasiyon ne bhee us se poochha teree ankhen kis reeti se khul gai? us n eun se kaha us ne meree ankho par mittee lagai
John9:16 is par kai fareesee kahane lage yah manushy parameshvar kee or se nahee
John9:17 unhon ne us andho se fir kaha
John9:18 parantu yahoodiyon ko vishvas n hua ki yah andha tha aur ab dekhta haai jab tak unhon ne usake mata-pita ko jis kee ankhe khul gai thee
John9:19 un se n poochha
John9:20 usake mata-apita ne uttr diya ham to janate haain ki yah hamara putra haai
John9:21 parantu ham yah naheen janate haain ki ab kyonkar dekhta haai aur n yah janate haai
John9:22 ye baten usake mata-pita ne isaliye kaheen kyonki ve yahoodiyon se drate the kyoki yahoodee aeka kar chuke the
John9:23 isee karan usake mata-apita ne kaha
John9:24 tab unhon ne us manushy ko jo andha tha doosaree bar bulakar us se kaha
John9:25 us ne uttr diya: maain naheen janata ki vah papee haai ya naheen: maain ek bat janata hoon ki maain andha tha aur ab dekhta hoon.
John9:26 unhon ne us se fir kaha
John9:27 us ne un se kaha maain to tum se kah chuka
John9:28 tab ve use bura-bhla kahakar bole
John9:29 ham janate haain ki parameshvar ne moosa se baten keen parantu is manushy ko naheen janate kee kahan ka haai.
John9:30 us ne un ko uttr diya yah to achambhe kee bat haai ki tum naheen janate kee kahan ka haai taubhee us ne meree ankhen khol deen.
John9:31 ham janate haain ki parameshvar papiyon kee naheen sunata parantu yaadi koi parameshvar ka bhkt ho
John9:32 jagat ke arambh se yah kabhee sunane men naheen aya
John9:33 yaadi yah vyaaktai parameshvar kee or se n hota
John9:34 unhon ne us ko uttr diya
John9:35 yeeshu ne suna
John9:36 us ne uttr diya
John9:37 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John9:38 us ne kaha
John9:39 tab yeeshu ne kaha
John9:40 jo fareesee usake sath the
John9:41 yeeshu ne un se kaha
John10:1 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John10:2 parantu jo dar se bheetar pravesh karata haai vah bhedon ka charavaha haai.
John10:3 usake liye darapal dar khol deta haai
John10:4 aur jab vah apanee sab bhedon ko bahar nikal chukata haai
John10:5 parantu ve paraye ke peechhe naheen jaaengee
John10:6 yeeshu ne un se yah drashttant kaha
John10:7 tab yeeshu ne un se fir kaha
John10:8 jitane mujh se pahile aae ve sab chor aur dakoo haain parantu bhedon ne un kee n sunee.
John10:9 dar maain hoon: yadi koi mere dara bheetar pravesh kare to uddhar paaega aushra bheetar bahar aya jaya karega aur chara paaega.
John10:10 chor kisee aur kam ke liye naheen parantu keval choree karane aur ghaat karane aur nashtt karane ko ata haai. maain isaaliye aya ki ve jeevan paae
John10:11 achchha charavaha maain hoon achchha charavaha bhedon ke liye apana praan deta haai.
John10:12 majadoor jo n charavaha haai
John10:13 vah isaliye bhag jata haai ki vah majadoor haai
John10:14 achchha charavaha maain hoon jis tarah pita mujhe janata haai
John10:15 isee tarah maain apee bhedon ko janata hoo
John10:16 aur meree aur bhee bheden haai
John10:17 pita isaliye mujh se praem rakhta haai
John10:18 koi use mujh se chheenata nahee
John10:19 in baton ke karan yahoodiyon men fir foott padee.
John10:20 un men se bahutere kahane lage
John10:21 auron ne kaha
John10:22 yarooshalem men sthapan pabrba hua
John10:23 aur yeeshu mandair men sulaaiman ke osare men tthal raha tha.
John10:24 tab yahoodiyon ne use a ghora aur poochha
John10:25 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
John10:26 parantu tum isaaliye prateeti naheen karate
John10:27 meree bheden mera shabd sunatee haai
John10:28 aur maain unhen anant jeevan deta hoo
John10:29 mera pita
John10:30 maain aur pita aek haain.
John10:31 yahoodiyon ne use patthravah karate ko fir patthr uttaae.
John10:32 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha
John10:33 yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya
John10:34 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya
John10:35 yaadi us ne unhen ishvar kaha jin ke pas parameshvar ka vachan pahuncha aur paavitra shaasr kee bat lop naheen ho sakatee.
John10:36 to jise pita ne paavitra ttharakar jagat men bheja haai
John10:37 yaadi maain apane pita ke kam naheen karata
John10:38 parantu yadi maain karata hoo
John10:39 tab unhon ne fir use pakadne ka prayatn kiya parantu vah un ke hath se nikal gaya..
John10:40 fir vah yaradan ke par us sthan par chala gaya
John10:41 aur bahutere usake pas akar kahate the
John10:42 aur vahan bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya..
John11:1 maariyam aur us kee baahin maratha ke ganv baaitaaniyyah ka lajar nam aek manushy beemar tha.
John11:2 yah vahee mariyam thee jis ne prabhu par itra dalakar usake panvon ko apane balon se ponchha tha
John11:3 so us kee baahinon ne use kahala bheja
John11:4 yah sunakar yeeshu ne kaha
John11:5 aur yeeshu maratha aur us kee bahan aur lajar se praem rakhta tha.
John11:6 so jab us ne suna
John11:7 fir is ke bad us ne chelon se kaha
John11:8 chelon ne us se kaha
John11:9 yeeshu ne uttr diya
John11:10 parantu yadi koi rat ko chale
John11:11 us ne ye baten kahee
John11:12 tab chelon ne us se kaha
John11:13 yeeshu ne to us kee mratyu ke vishay men kaha tha: parantu ve samajhe ki us ne neend se so jane ke vishay men kaha.
John11:14 tab yeeshu ne un se safa kah diya
John11:15 aur maain tumhare karan anaandait hoon ki maain vahan n tha jis se tum vishvas karo
John11:16 tab thoma ne jo didumus kahalata haai
John11:17 so yeeshu ko akar yah maloom hua ki use kabra men rakhe char din ho chuke haain.
John11:18 baaitaaniyyah yarooshalem ke sameep koi do meel kee dooree par tha.
John11:19 aur bahut se yahoodee maratha aur maariyam ke pas un ke bhai ke vishay men shaantai dene ke liye aae the.
John11:20 so maratha yeeshu ke ane ka samachar sunakar us se bhentt karane ko gai
John11:21 maratha ne yeeshu se kaha
John11:22 aur ab bhee maain janatee hoo
John11:23 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John11:24 maratha ne us se kaha
John11:25 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John11:26 aur jo koi jeevata haai
John11:27 us ne us se kaha
John11:28 yah kahakar vah chalee gai
John11:29 vah sunate hee turant uttkar usake pas ai.
John11:30 yeeshu abhee ganv men naheen pahuncha tha
John11:31 tab jo yahoodee usake sath ghar men the
John11:32 jab maariyam vahan pahunchee jahan yeeshu tha
John11:33 jab yeeshu n us ko aur un yahoodiyon ko jo usake sath aae the rote huae dekha
John11:34 unhon ne us se kaha
John11:35 yeeshu ke ansoo bahane lage.
John11:36 tab yahoodee kahane lage
John11:37 parantu un men se kitanon ne kaha
John11:38 yeeshu man men fir bahut hee udas hokar kabra par aya
John11:39 yeeshu ne kaha patthr ko uttao: us mare huae kee baahin maratha us se kahane lagee
John11:40 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John11:41 tab unhon ne us patthr ko hattaya
John11:42 aur maai janata tha
John11:43 yah kahakar us ne bade shabd se pukara
John11:44 jo mar gaya tha
John11:45 tab jo yahoodee mariyam ke pas aae the
John11:46 parantu un men se kitanon ne fareeasiyon ke pas jakar yeeshu ke kamon ka samachar diya..
John11:47 is par mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne mukhy sabha ke logon ko ikattha karake kaha
John11:48 yaadi ham use yonhee chhod de
John11:49 tab un men se kaifaa nam aek vyaktai ne jo us varsha ka mahayajak tha
John11:50 aur n yah sochate ho
John11:51 yah bat us ne apanee or se n kahee
John11:52 aur n keval us jaati ke liye
John11:53 so usee din se ve usake mar dalane kee sammati karane lage..
John11:54 isaliye yeeshu us samay se yahoodiyon men pragatt hokar n fira parantu vahan se jangal ke nikatt ke dekh men iaim nam
John11:55 aur yahoodiyon ka fasah nikatt tha
John11:56 so ve yeeshu ko ddoonddhne aur maandair men khde hokar apas men kahane lage
John11:57 kya vah pabrba men naheen aaega? aur mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne bhee agyaa de rakhee thee
John12:1 fir yeeshu fatah se chh: din pahile baaitaaniyyah men aya
John12:2 vahan unhon ne usake liye bhojan taaiyar kiya
John12:3 tab maariyam ne jattamasee ka adha ser bahumol itra lekar yeeshu ke pavon par dala
John12:4 parantu usake chelon men se yahooda iskariyotee nam aek chela jo use pakadvane par tha
John12:5 yah itra teen sau deenar men bechakar kangalon ko kayon n diya gaya?
John12:6 us ne yah bat isaliye n kahee
John12:7 yeeshu ne kaha
John12:8 kyonaki kangal to tumhare sath sada rahate haai
John12:9 yahoodiyon men se sadhaaran log jan gaa
John12:10 tab mahayajakon ne lajar ko bhee mar dalane kee sammati kee.
John12:11 kyonaki usake karan bahut se yahoodee chale gaa
John12:12 doosare din bahut se logon ne jo pabrba men aae the
John12:13 khjoor kee
John12:14 jab yeeshu ko aek gadahe ka bachcha mila
John12:15 jaaisa likha haai
John12:16 usake chele
John12:17 tab bheed ke logon ne jo us samay usake sath the yah gavahee dee ki us ne lajar ko kabra men se bulakar
John12:18 isee karan log us se bhentt karane ko aae the kyonaki unhon ne suna tha
John12:19 tab fareesiyon ne apas men kaha
John12:20 jo log us pabrba men bhjan karane aae the un men se kai yoonanee the.
John12:21 unhon ne galeel ke baaitasaaida ke rahanevale filippus ke pas akar us se binatee kee
John12:22 filippus ne akar aadiryas se kaha tab aandairyas aur filippus ne yeeshu se kaha.
John12:23 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha
John12:24 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo
John12:25 jo apane praan ko piry janata haai
John12:26 yaadi koi meree seva kare
John12:27 jab mera jee vyakul ho raha haai. isaaliye ab maain kya kahoon? he pita
John12:28 he pita apane nam kee maahima kara: tab yah akashavanee hui
John12:29 tab jo log khde huae sun rahe the
John12:30 is par yeeshu ne kaha
John12:31 ab is jagat ka nyay hota haai
John12:32 aur maain yadi prathvee par se unche par chaddhaya jaunga
John12:33 aeesa kahakar us ne yah pragatt kar diya
John12:34 is par logon ne us se kaha
John12:35 yah manushy ka putra kaun haai? yeeshu ne un se kaha
John12:36 jab tak jyoti tumhare sath haai
John12:37 aur us ne un ke samhane itane chinh dikhaa
John12:38 taaki yashaayah bhavishyadvkta ka vachan poora ho jo us ne kaha ki he prabhu hamare samachar kee kis ne prateeati kee haai? aur prabhu ka bhujabal kis par pragatt hua?
John12:39 is karan ve vishvas n kar sake
John12:40 ki us ne un kee ankhen andhae
John12:41 yashaayah ne ye baten isaliye kahee
John12:42 taubhee saradaron men se bhee bahuton ne us par vishvas kiya

John12:44 yeeshu ne pukarakar kaha
John12:45 aur jo mujhe dekhta haai
John12:46 maain jagat men jyoti hokar aya hoon taaki jo koi mujh par vishvas kare
John12:47 yaadi koi meree baten sunakar n mane
John12:48 jo mujhe tuchchh janata haai aur meree baten grahan naheen karata haai us ko doshaee ttharanevala to aek haai: arthata jo vachan maain ne kaha haai
John12:49 kyonaki maain ne apanee or se baten naheen kee
John12:50 aur maain janata hoo
John13:1 fasah ke pabrba se pahile jab yeeshu ne jan liya

John13:4 bhojan par se uttkar apane kapade utar dia

John18:6 usake yah kahate hee

John18:15 shamaun pataras aur aek aur chela bhee yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae: yah chela mahayajak ka jana pahachana tha aur yeeshu ke sath mahayajak ke angat men gaya.

John19:1 is par peelatus ne yeeshu ko lekar kode lagavaae.
John19:2 aur sipaahiyon ne kantton ka mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha
John19:3 aur usake pas a akar kahane lage
John19:4 tak peelatus ne fir bahar nikalakar logon se kaha
John19:5 tak yeeshu kantton ka mukutt aur baainjanee vasr pahine huae bahar nikala aur peelatus ne un se kaha
John19:6 jab mahayajakon aur pyadon ne use dekha
John19:7 yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya
John19:8 jab peelatus ne yah bat sunee to aur bhee dr gaya.
John19:9 aur fir kile ke bheetar gaya aur yeeshu se kaha
John19:10 peelatus ne us se kaha
John19:11 yeeshu ne uttr diya
John19:12 is se peelatus ne use chhod dena chaha
John19:13 ye baten sunakar peelatus yeeshu ko bahar laya aur us jagah aek chabootara tha jo ibraanee men gabbata kahalata haai
John19:14 yah fasah kee taaiyaree ka din tha aur chhtte ghantte ke lagabhg tha: tab us ne yahoodiyon se kaha
John19:15 parantu ve chillaae ki le ja! le ja! use kroos par chaddha: peelatus ne un se kaha
John19:16 tab us ne use un ke hath saunp diya taaki vah kroos par chaddhaya jaae..
John19:17 tab ve yeeshu ko le gaae. aur vah apana kroos uttaae huae us sthan tak bahar gaya
John19:18 vahan unhon ne use aur usake sath aur do manushyon ko kroos par chaddhaya
John19:19 aur peelatus ne aek dosha-patra likhkar kroos par laga diya aur us men yah likha hua tha
John19:20 yah dosha-patra bahut yahoodiyon ne paddha kyonaki vah sthan jahan yeeshu kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha nagar ke pas tha aur patra ibraanee aur lateenee aur yoonanee men likha hua tha.
John19:21 tab yahoodiyon ke mahayajakon ne peelatus se kaha
John19:22 peelatus ne uttr diya
John19:23 jab sipahee yeeshu ko kroos par chaddha chuke
John19:24 yah isaliye hua
John19:25 parantu yeeshu ke kroos ke pas us kee mata aur us kee mata kee bahin mariyam
John19:26 yeeshu ne apanee mata se kaha he naree
John19:27 tab us chele se kaha
John19:28 is ke bad yeeshu ne yah janakar ki ab sab kuchh ho chuka isaliye ki pavitra shaasr kee bat pooree ho kaha
John19:29 vahan aek sirake se bhra hua bartan dhara tha
John19:30 jab yeeshu ne vah siraka liya
John19:31 aur isaliye ki vah taaiyaree ka din tha
John19:32 so sipaahiyon ne akar pahile kee ttangen todeen tab doosare kee bhee
John19:33 parantu jab yeeshu ke pas akar dekha ki vah mar chuka haai
John19:34 parantu sipaahiyon men se aek ne barachhe se usaka panjar bedha aur us men se turant lohoo aur panee nikala.
John19:35 jis ne yah dekha
John19:36 ye baten isaaliye huin ki pavitra shaasr kee yah bat pooree ho ki us kee koi haddee todee n jaaegee.
John19:37 fir aek aur sthan par yah likha haai
John19:38 in baton ke bad aramatiyah ke yoosufa ne
John19:39 nikudemus bhee jo paahile yeeshu ke pas rat ko gaya tha pachas ser ke lagabhg mila hua gandharas aur aelava le aya.
John19:40 tab unhon ne yeeshu kee loth ko liya aur yahoodiyon ke gadne kee reeati ke anusar use sugandha dravy ke sath kafan men lapetta.
John19:41 us sthan par jahan yeeshu kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha
John19:42 so yahoodiyon kee taaiyaree ke din ke kara
John20:1 saptah ke paahile din mariyam magadaleenee bhor ko andhora rahate hee kabra par ai
John20:2 tab vah daudee aur shamaun pataras aur us doosare chele ke pas jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha akar kaha
John20:3 tab pataras aur vah doosara chela nikalakar kabra kee or chale.
John20:4 aur donon sath sath daud rahe the
John20:5 aur jhukakar kapade pade dekhe: taubhee vah bheetar n gaya.
John20:6 tab shamaun pataras usake peechhe peechhe pahuncha aur kabra ke bheetar gaya aur kapade pade dekhe.
John20:7 aur vah angochha jo usake sir se bandha hua tha
John20:8 tab doosara chela bhee jo kabra par pahile pahuncha tha
John20:9 ve to ab tak paavitra shaasr kee vah bat n samajhte the
John20:10 tab ye chele apane ghar lautt gaae.
John20:11 parantu mariyam rotee hui kabra ke pas hee bahar khdee rahee aur rote rote kabra kee or jhukakar
John20:12 do svargadooton ko ujjavat kapade pahine huae aek ko sirahane aur doosare ko paaitane baaitte dekha
John20:13 unhon ne us se kaha
John20:14 yah kahakar vah peechhe firee aur yeeshu ko khde dekha aur n pahachana ki yah yeeshu haai.
John20:15 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John20:16 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John20:17 yeeshu ne us se kaha
John20:18 maariyam magadaleenee ne jakar chelon ko bataya
John20:19 usee din jo saptah ka pahila din tha
John20:20 aur yah kahakar us ne apana hath aur apana panjar un ko dikhaae: tab chele prabhu ko dekhkar anaandait hue.
John20:21 yeeshu ne fir un se kaha
John20:22 yah kahakar us ne un par foonka aur un se kaha
John20:23 jin ke pap tum kshama karo ve un ke liye kshama kiae gaae haain jin ke tum rakho
John20:24 parantu barahon men se aek vyaaktai arthata thoma jo didumus kahalata haai
John20:25 jab aur chele us se kahane lage ki ham ne prabhu ko dekha haai: tab us ne un se kaha
John20:26 att din ke bad us ke chele fir ghar ke bheetar the
John20:27 tab us ne thoma se kaha
John20:28 yah sun thoma ne uttr diya
John20:29 yeeshu ne us se kaha

John21:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu ne apane ap ko tibiriyas jheel ke kinare chelon par pragatt kiya aur is reeati se pragatt kiya.
John21:2 shamaun pataras aur thoma jo didumus kahalata haai
John21:3 shamaun pataras ne un se kaha
John21:4 bhor hote hee yeeshu kinare par khda hua taubhee chelon ne n pahachana ki yah yeeshu haai.
John21:5 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha
John21:6 us ne un se kaha
John21:7 isaliye us chele ne jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha pataras se kaha
John21:8 parantu aur chele dongee par machhliyon se bhra hua jal kheenchate huae aa
John21:9 jab kinare par utare
John21:10 yeeshu ne un se kaha

John21:12 yeeshu ne un se kaha

John21:14 yah teesaree bar haai

John21:17 us ne teesaree bar us se kaha

John21:20 pataras ne firakar us chele ko peechhe ate dekha
John21:21 use dekhkar pataras ne yeeshu se kaha

Acts1:1 he thaiyuafilus
Acts1:2 us din tak jab vah un prariton ko jinhen us ne chuna tha
Acts1:3 aur us ne du:kh uttane ke bad bahut se pakke pramanon se apane ap ko unhen jeeavit dikhaya
Acts1:4 or un se milakar unhen agyaa dee
Acts1:5 kyonaki yoohanna ne to panee men bapatisma diya haai parantu thode dinon ke bad tum paavitraatma se bapaatisma paoge.
Acts1:6 so unheen ne ikatthe hokar us se poochha
Acts1:7 us ne un se kaha un samayon ya kalon ko janana
Acts1:8 parantu jab pavitra atma tum par aaega tab tum samarth paoge aur yarooshalem aur sare yahoodiya aur samariya me
Acts1:9 yah kahakar vah un ke dekhte dekhte upar utta liya gaya aur badal ne use un kee ankhon se chhpai liya.
Acts1:10 aur usake jate samay jab ve akash kee or tak rahe the
Acts1:11 aur kahane lage he galeelee purooshae
Acts1:12 tab ve jaaitoon nam ke pahad se jo yarooshalem ke nikatt aek sabt ke din kee dooree par haai
Acts1:13 aur jab vahan pahunche to ve us attaree par gaa
Acts1:14 ye sab kai striayon aur yeeshu kee mata mariyam aur usake bhaiyon ke sath aek chitt hokar praarthna men lage rahe..
Acts1:15 aur unheen dinon men pataras bhaiyon ke beech men jo aek sau bees vyaktai ke lagabhg ikatthe the
Acts1:16 he bhaiyo
Acts1:17 kyonaki vah to ham men gina gaya
Acts1:18 us ne adharma kee kamai se ek khet mol liya aur sir ke bal gira
Acts1:19 aur is bat ko yarooshalem ke sab rahanevale jan gaa
Acts1:20 kyonaki bhjan saahinta men likha haai
Acts1:21 isaliye jitane din tak prabhu yeeshu hamare sath ata jata raha
Acts1:22 uchit haai ki un men se ek vyaaktai hamare sath usake jee uttne ka gavah ho jae.

Acts1:24 aur yah kahakar praarthna kee ki he prabhu

Acts1:26 tab unhon ne un ke bare men chitthiyan dalee
Acts2:1 jab pintekus ka din aya

Acts2:3 aur unhen ag kee see jeebhen fatttee hui dikhai deen aur un men se har aek par a tthareen.
Acts2:4 aur ve sab paavitra atma se bhr gaa
Acts2:5 aur akash ke neeche kee har aek jati men se bhkt yahoodee yarooshalem men rahate the.
Acts2:6 jab vah shabd hua to bheed lag gai aur log ghabara gaa
Acts2:7 aur ve sab chaakit aur achaambhiat hokar kahane lage dekho
Acts2:8 to fir kyon ham men se har aek apanee apanee janm boomi kee bhasha sunata haai?
Acts2:9 ham jo parathee aur medee aur aelamee log aur misuputaamiya aur yahoodiya aur kappadookiya aur puntus aur aasiya.

Acts2:17 ki parameshvar kahata haai

Acts2:19 aur maain upar akash men adabhut kam
Acts2:20 prabhu ke mahan aur praasiddh din ke ane se paahile soorya andhora aur chand lohoo ho jaaega.
Acts2:21 aur jo koi prabhu ka nam lega

Acts2:25 kyonaki daud usake vishay men kahata haai
Acts2:26 isee karan mera man anand hua
Acts2:27 kyonaki too mere praanon ko adhaelok men n chhodega aur n apane paavitra jan ko sadne hee dega!
Acts2:28 too ne mujhe jeevan ka marga bataya he too mujhe apane darshan ke dara anand se bhr dega.
Acts2:29 he bhaiyo
Acts2:30 so bhavishyadvkta hokar aur yah janakar ki parameshvar ne mujh se shapath khai haai
Acts2:31 us ne honahar ko paahile hee se dekhkar maseeh ke jee uttne ke vishay men bhavishyadanee kee ki n to usaka praan adhaelok men chhoda gaya
Acts2:32 isee yeeshu ko parameshvar ne jilaya
Acts2:33 is prakar parameshvar ke dahine hath se savorchch pad pakar

Acts2:35 mere dahine baait
Acts2:36 so ab israael ka sara gharana nishchay jan le ki parameshvar ne usee yeeshu ko jise tum ne kroos par chaddhaya

Acts2:39 kyonaki yah pratigyaa tum

Acts2:41 so jinhon ne usaka vachan grahan kiya unhon ne bapatisma liya aur usee din teen hajar manushyon ke lagabhg un men mil gaae.

Acts3:2 aur log aek janm ke langade ko la rahe the

Acts3:4 pataras ne yoohanna ke sath us kee or dhyan se dekhkar kaha
Acts3:5 so vah un se kuchh pane kee asha rakhte huae un kee or takane laga.
Acts3:6 tab pataras ne kaha
Acts3:7 aur us ne usaka daahina hath pakad ke use uttaya: aur turant usake pavon aur ttkhnon men bal a gaya.
Acts3:8 aur vah uchhlakar khda ho gaya
Acts3:9 sab logon ne use chalate firate aur parameshvar kee stuati karate dekhkara.
Acts3:10 us ko pahachan liya ki yah vahee haai
Acts3:11 jab vah pataras aur yoohanna ko pakade huae tha
Acts3:12 yah dekhkar pataras ne logon se kaha he israaeliyo

Acts4:1 jab ve logon se yah kah rahe the
Acts4:2 kyonaki ve bahut krodhait huae ki ve logon ko sikhate the aur yeeshu ka udaharan de dekar mare huon ke jee uttne ka prachar karate the.
Acts4:3 aur unhon ne unhen pakadkar doosare din tak havalat men rakha kyonaki sandhaya ho gai thee.
Acts4:4 parantu vachan ke sunanevalon men se bahuton ne vishvas kiya
Acts4:5 doosare din aeesa hua ki un ke saradar aur puraaniye aur shaasree.
Acts4:6 aur mahayajak hanna aur kaaifaa aur yoohanna aur sikandar aur jitane mahayajak ke gharane ke the
Acts4:7 aur unhen beech men khda karake poochhne lage
Acts4:8 tab pataras ne paavitra atma se paaripoorn hokar un se kaha.
Acts4:9 he logon ke saradaron aur puraniyo
Acts4:10 to tum sab aur sare israaelee log jan len ki yeeshu maseeh nasaree ke nam se jise tum ne kroos par chaddhaya
Acts4:11 yah vahee patthr haai jise tum rajamisriyon ne tuchchh jata aur vah kone ke sire ka patthr ho gaya.
Acts4:12 aur kisee doosare ke dara uddhar naheen kyonki svarga ke neeche manushyon men aur koi doosara nam naheen diya gaya

Acts4:14 aur us manushy ko jo achchha hua tha
Acts4:15 parantu unhen sabha ke bahar jane kee agyaa dekar
Acts4:16 ki ham in manushyon ke sath kya karen? kyonki yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalon par pragatt haai
Acts4:17 parantu isaaliye ki yah bat logon men aur aadhaik faail n jaa
Acts4:18 tab unhen bulaya aur chitaunee dekar yah kaha
Acts4:19 parantu pataras aur yoohanna ne un ko uttr diya
Acts4:20 kyonaki yah to ham men ho naheen sakata

Acts4:24 yah sunakar
Acts4:25 too ne paavitra atma ke dara apane sevak hamare pita daud ke mukh se kaha
Acts4:26 prabhu aur usake maseeh ke virodha men prathvee ke raja khde hua
Acts4:27 kyonaki sachamuch tere sevak yeeshu ke virodha me
Acts4:28 ki jo kuchh pahile se teree samarth aur mati se tthara tha vahee karen.
Acts4:29 ab

Acts5:1 aur hananyah nam aek manushy
Acts5:2 aur usake dam men se kuchh rakh chhoda aur yah bat us kee patnee bhee janatee thee
Acts5:3 uparantu pataras ne kaha he hananyaha! shautan ne tere man men yah bat kyon dalee haai ki too pavitra atma se joott bole
Acts5:4 jab tak vah tere pas rahee
Acts5:5 ye baten sunate hee hananyah gir pada
Acts5:6 fir javanon ne uttkar usakee arthee banai aur bahar le jakar gaddh diya..
Acts5:7 lagabhg teen ghantte ke bad us kee patnee
Acts5:8 tab pataras ne us se kaha mujhe bata kya tum ne vah boomi itane hee men bechee thee? us ne kaha ha
Acts5:9 pataras ne us se kaha yah kya bat haai
Acts5:10 tab vah turant usake panvon par gir padee
Acts5:11 aur saree kaleeasiya par aur in baton ke sab sunanevalon par
Acts5:12 aur praeriton ke hathon se bahut chinh aur adabhut kam logon ke beech men dikhaae jate the
Acts5:13 parantu auron men se kisee ko yah hiyav n hota tha
Acts5:14 aur vishvas karanevale bahutere puroosh aur striayan prabhu kee kaleesiya men aur bhee aadhaik akar milate rahe.
Acts5:15 yahan tak ki log beemaron ko sadkon par la lakar
Acts5:16 aur yarooshalem ke as pas ke nagaron se bhee bahut log beemaron aur ashuuddh atmaon ke sataae huon ka la lakar
Acts5:17 tab mahayajak aur usake sab sathee jo sadookiyon ke panth ke the
Acts5:18 aur praariton ko pakadkar bandeegrah men band kar diya.
Acts5:19 parantu rat ko prabhu ke aek svargadoot ne bandeegrah ke dar kholakar unhen bahar lakar kaha.
Acts5:20 ki jao
Acts5:21 ve yah sunakar bhor hote hee mandair men jakar upadesh dene lage: parantu mahayajak aur usake sathaiyon ne akar mahasabha ko aur israaeliyon ke sab puraniyon ko ikatthe kiya
Acts5:22 parantu pyadon ne vahan pahunchakar unhen bandeegrah men n paya
Acts5:23 ki ham ne bandeegrah ko badee chaukasee se band kiya hua
Acts5:24 jab maandair ke saradar aur mahayajakon ne ye baten sanee
Acts5:25 itane men kisee ne akar unhen bataya
Acts5:26 tak saradar
Acts5:27 unhon ne unhen fir lakar mahasabha ke samhane khda kar disha: aur mahayajak ne un se poochha.
Acts5:28 kya ham ne tumhen chitakar agyaa n dee thee
Acts5:29 tak pataras aur
Acts5:30 hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne yeeshu ko jilaya
Acts5:31 usee ko parameshvar ne prabhu aur uddharak ttharakar
Acts5:32 aur ham in baton ke gavah haai
Acts5:33 yah sunakar ve jal gaa
Acts5:34 parantu gamaleeael nam aek fareesee ne jo vyavasthapak aur sab logon men mananeey tha
Acts5:35 tak us ne kaha
Acts5:36 kyonaki in dinon se pahale thaiyoodas yah kahata hua utta
Acts5:37 usake bad nam likhai ke dinon men yahooda galeelee utta
Acts5:38 isaliye ab maain tum se kahata hoo
Acts5:39 parantu yadi parameshvar kee or se haai
Acts5:40 tab unhon ne us kee bat man lee aur praeriton ko bulakar pittvaya aur yah agyaa dekar chhod diya
Acts5:41 ve is bat se anandait hokar mahasabha ke samhane se chale gaa
Acts5:42 aur praati din mandair men aur ghar ghar men upadesh karane
