Acts6:2 tab un barahon ne chelon kee mandlee ko apane pas bulakar kaha
Acts6:3 isaliye he bhaiyo
Acts6:4 parantu ham to praarthna men aur vachan kee seva men lage rahenge.
Acts6:5 yah bat saree mandlee ko achchhee lagee
Acts6:6 aur inhen praeriton ke samhane khda kiya aur unhon ne praarthna karake un par hath rakhe.
Acts6:7 aur parameshvar ka vachan faailata gaya aur yarooshalem men chelon kee ginatee bahut baddhtee gai aur yajakon ka aek bada samaj is mat ke adhaeen ho gaya.
Acts6:8 staifaunus anugrah aur samarth men paripoorn hokar logon men bade bade adabhut kam aur chinh dikhaya karata tha.
Acts6:9 tab us aradhanalay men se jo libarateenon kee kahalatee thee
Acts6:10 parantu us gyaan aur un atma ka jis se vah baten karata tha
Acts6:11 is par unho ne kai logon ko ubhara jo kahane lage
Acts6:12 aur logon aur praacheenon aur shaastriayon ko bhdkakar chaddh aae aur use pakadkar mahasabha men le aae.
Acts6:13 aur jootte gavah khde kia
Acts6:14 kyonaki ham ne use yah kahate suna haai
Acts6:15 tab sab logon ne jo sabha men baaitte the
Acts7:1 tab mahayajak ne kaha
Acts7:2 us ne kaha he bhaiyo
Acts7:3 aur us se kaha ki too apane desh aur apane kuttumb se nikalakar us desh me chala ja
Acts7:4 tab vah kasadiyon ke desh se nikalakar haran men ja basa aur usake pita kee mratyu ke bad parameshvar ne usako vahan se is desh men lakar basaya jis men ab tum basate ho.
Acts7:5 aur usako kuchh meeras baran paair rakhne bhr kee bhee us men jagah n dee
Acts7:6 aur parameshvar ne yon kaha ki teree santan ke log paraye desh men paradeshaee honge
Acts7:7 fir parameshvar ne kaha jis jati ke ve das honge
Acts7:8 aur us ne us se khtane kee vacha bandhaee aur isee dasha men isahak us se utpann hua aur attven din usaka khtana kiya gaya aur isahak se yakoob aur yakoob se barah kulapaati utpann huae.
Acts7:9 aur kulapaatiyon ne yoosufa se dah karake use misar desh janevalon ke hath becha parantu parameshvar usake sath tha.
Acts7:10 aur use usake sab kleshaen se chhudakar misar ke raja firaun ke age anugrah aur buddh idee
Acts7:11 tab misar aur kanan ke sare desh men akal pada jis se bharee klesh hua
Acts7:12 parantu yakoob ne yah sunakar
Acts7:13 aur doosaree bar yoosufa apane bhaiyon par pragatt ko gaya
Acts7:14 tab yoosufa ne apane pita yakoob aur apane sare kuttumb ko
Acts7:15 tab yakoob misar men gaya aur vahan vah aur hamare bapadade mar gaae.
Acts7:16 aur ve shaikim men pahunchaae jakar us kabra men rakhe gaa
Acts7:17 parantu jab us pratigyaa ke poore hone ka samay nikatt aya
Acts7:18 jab tak ki misar men doosara raja n hua jo yoosufa ko naheen janata tha.
Acts7:19 us ne hamaree jaati se chaturai karake hamare bapadadon ke sath yahan tak kuvyohar kiya
Acts7:20 us samay moosa utpann hua jo bahut hee sundar tha aur vah teen maheene tak apane pita ke ghar men pala gaya.
Acts7:21 parantu jab faenk diya gaya to firaun kee bettee ne use utta liya
Acts7:22 aur moosa ko misaariyon kee saree vidha paddhai gai
Acts7:23 jab vah chalees varsha ka hua
Acts7:24 aur us ne aek vyaktai par anyay hone dekhkar
Acts7:25 us ne socha
Acts7:26 doosare din jab ve apas men lad rahe the
Acts7:27 parantu jo apane padosee par anyay kar raha tha
Acts7:28 kya jis reeti se too ne kal misaree ko mar dala mujhe bhee mar dalana chahata haai?
Acts7:29 yah bat sunakar
Acts7:30 jab poore chalees varsha beet gaa
Acts7:31 moosa ne us darshan ko dekhkar achambha kiya
Acts7:32 ki maain tere bapadado
Acts7:33 tab prabhu ne us se kaha apane pavon se jootee utar le
Acts7:34 maain ne sachamuch apane logon kee durdasha ko jo misar men haai
Acts7:35 jis moosa ko unhon ne yah kahakar nakara tha ki tujhe kis ne ham par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya haai usee ko parameshvar ne haakim aur chhudanevala ttharakar
Acts7:36 yahee vyaaktai misar aur lal samudra aur jangal men chalees varsha tak adabhut kam aur chinh dikha dikhakar unhen nikal laya.
Acts7:37 yah vahee moosa haai
Acts7:38 yah vahee haai
Acts7:39 parantu hamare bapadadon ne us kee manana n chaha baran use hattakar apane man misar kee or faere.
Acts7:40 aur haroon se kaha hamare liye aeesa devata bana
Acts7:41 un dinon men unhon ne ek bachhda banakar
Acts7:42 so parameshvar ne munh modkar unhen chhod diya
Acts7:43 aur tum molek ke tamboo aur rifaan devata ke tare ko liae firate the arthata un akaron ko jinhen tum ne dandvat karane ke liye banaya tha: so maain tumhen babur ke pare le jakar basaunga.
Acts7:44 sakshaee ka tamboo jangal men hamare bapadadon ke beech men tha jaaisa us ne ttharaya
Acts7:45 usee tamboo ko hamare bapadade poorvakal se pakar yahoshoo ke sath yahan le ae jis samay ki unhon ne un anyajaatiyon ka aadhaikar paya
Acts7:46 us par parameshvar ne anugrah kiya
Acts7:47 parantu sulaaiman ne usake liye ghar banaya.
Acts7:48 parantu param pradhaan hath ke banaae gharon men naheen rahata
Acts7:49 ki prabhu kahata haai
Acts7:50 kya ye sab vastuen mere hath kee banai naheen? he hatteele
Acts7:51 jaaisa tumhare bapadade karate the
Acts7:52 bhavishyadvktaon men se kis ko tumhare bapadadon ne naheen sataya
Acts7:53 tum ne svargadooton ke dara ttharai hui vyavastha to pai
Acts7:54 ye baten sunakar ve jal gaae aur us par dant peesane lage.
Acts7:55 parantu us ne pavitra atma se paaripoorn hokar svarga kee or dekha aur parameshvar kee maahima ko aur yeeshu ko parameshvar kee dahinee or khda dekhkara.
Acts7:56 kaha dekho
Acts7:57 tab unhon ne bade shabd se chillakar kan band kar lia
Acts7:58 aur use nagar ke bahar nikalakar patthravah karane lage
Acts7:59 aur ve staiufanus ko patthravah karate rahe
Acts7:60 fir ghauttne ttekakar unche shabd se pukara
Acts8:1 usee din yarooshalem kee kaleesiya par bada upadrav hone laga aur praeriton ko chhod sab ke sab yahoodiya aur samariya deshaen men tittr bittr ho gae.
Acts8:2 aur bhkton ne staifanus ko kabra men rakha aur usake liye bada vilap kiya.
Acts8:3 shaaul kaleesiya ko ujad raha tha aur ghar ghar ghausakar purooshaen aur striayon ko ghaseett ghaseettkar bandeegrah men dalata tha..
Acts8:4 jo tittr bittr huae the
Acts8:5 aur filippus samaariya nagar men jakar logon men maseeh ka prachar karane laga.
Acts8:6 aur jo baten filippus ne kaheen unhen logon ne sunakar aur jo chinh vah dikhata tha unhen dekh dekhkar
Acts8:7 kyonaki bahuton men se ashuuddh atmaaen bade shabd se chillatee hui nikal gai
Acts8:8 aur us nagar men bada anand hua..
Acts8:9 is se paahile us nagar men shamaun nam aek manushy tha
Acts8:10 aur sab chhotte se bade tak use man kar kahate the
Acts8:11 us ne bahut dinon se unhen apane ttone ke kamon se chaakit kar rakha tha
Acts8:12 parantu jab unhon ne filippus kee prateeati kee jo parameshvar ke rajy aur yeeshu ke nam ka susamachar sunata tha to log
Acts8:13 tab shamaun ne ap bhee prateeati kee aur bapaatisma lekar filippus ke sath rahane laga aur chinh aur bade bade samarth ke kam hote dekhkar chakit hota tha.
Acts8:14 jab praariton ne jo yarooshalem men the suna ki samaariyon ne parameshvar ka vachan man liya haai to pataras aur yoohanna ko un ke pas bheja.
Acts8:15 aur unhon ne jakar un ke liye praarthna kee ki pavitra atma paaen.
Acts8:16 kyonaki vah ab tak un men se kisee par n utara tha
Acts8:17 tab unhon ne un par hath rakhe aur unhon ne pavitra atma paya.
Acts8:18 jab shamaun ne dekha ki prariton ke hath rakhne se paavitra atma diya jata haai
Acts8:19 ki yah adhaikar mujhe bhee do
Acts8:20 pataras ne us se kaha tere roopaye tere sath nash ho
Acts8:21 is bat men n tera hissa haai
Acts8:22 isaliye apanee is burai se man firakar prabhu se praarthna kar
Acts8:23 kyonaki maain dekhta hoo
Acts8:24 shamaun ne uttr diya
Acts8:25 so ve gavahee dekar aur prabhu ka vachan sunakar
Acts8:26 fir prabhu ke aek svargadoot ne filippus se kaha uttkar daakkhian kee or us marga par ja
Acts8:27 vah uttkar chal diya
Acts8:28 aur vah apane rath par baaitta hua tha
Acts8:29 tab atma ne filippus se kaha
Acts8:30 filippus ne us or daudkar use yashaayah bhavishyadvkta kee pustak paddhte huae suna
Acts8:31 us ne kaha
Acts8:32 paavitra shaasr ka jo adhyay vah paddh raha tha
Acts8:33 us kee deenata men usaka nyay hone naheen paya
Acts8:34 is par khoje ne filippus se poochha maain tujh se binatee karata hoo
Acts8:35 tab filippus ne apana munh khola
Acts8:36 marga men chalate chalate ve kisee jal kee jagah pahunche
Acts8:37 filippus ne kaha
Acts8:38 tab us ne rath khda karane kee agyaa dee
Acts8:39 jab ve jal men se nikalakar upar aa
Acts8:40 aur filippus ashadod men a nikala
Acts9:1 aur shaaul jo ab tak prabhu ke chelon ko dhamakane aur ghaat karane kee dhaun men tha
Acts9:2 aur us se daamishk kee aradhanalayon ke nam par is abhaipraay kee chitthiyan mangee
Acts9:3 parantu chalate chalate jab vah damishk ke nikatt pahuncha
Acts9:4 aur vah boomi par gir pada
Acts9:5 us ne poochha he prabhu
Acts9:6 parantu ab uttkar nagar men ja
Acts9:7 jo manushy usake sath the
Acts9:8 tab shaaul boomi par se utta
Acts9:9 aur vah teen din tak n dekh saka
Acts9:10 daamishk men hananyah nam aek chela tha
Acts9:11 tab prabhu ne us se kaha
Acts9:12 aur us ne hananyah nam aek puroosh ko bheetar ate
Acts9:13 hananyah ne uttr diya
Acts9:14 aur yahan bhee is ko mahayajakon kee or se adhaikar mila haai
Acts9:15 parantu prabhu ne us se kaha
Acts9:16 aur maain use bataunga
Acts9:17 tab hananyah uttkar us ghar men gaya
Acts9:18 aur turant us kee ankhon se chhlaike se gire
Acts9:19 aur vah kai din un chelon ke sath raha jo damishk men the.
Acts9:20 aur vah turant aradhanalayon men yeeshu ka prachar karane laga
Acts9:21 aur sab sunanevale chaakit hokar kahane lage kya yah vahee vyaaktai naheen haai jo yarooshalem men unhen jo is nam ko lete the nash karata tha
Acts9:22 parantu shaaul aur bhee samarthee hota gaya
Acts9:23 jab bahut din beet gaa
Acts9:24 parantu un kee yuktai shaaul ko maloom ko gai: ve to usake mar dalane ke liye rat din faattkon par lage rahe the.
Acts9:25 parantu rat ko usake chelon ne use lekar ttokare men baaittaya
Acts9:26 yarooshalem men pahunchakar us ne chelon ke sath mil jane ka upay kiya: parantu sab us se drate the
Acts9:27 parantu baranaba use apane sath praeariton ke pas le jakar un se kaha
Acts9:28 vah un ke sath yarooshalem men ata jata raha.
Acts9:29 aur nidhadk hokar prabhu ke nam se prachar karata tha: aur yoonanee bhasha bolanevale yahoodiyon ke sath batacheet aur vada-avivad karata tha parant uve usake mar dalane ka yatn karane lage.
Acts9:30 yah janakar bhai use kaaisaariya men le aa
Acts9:31 so sare yahoodiya
Acts9:32 aur aeesa hua ki pataras har jagah firata hua
Acts9:33 vahan use aeeaniyas nam jhole ka mara hua aek manushy mila
Acts9:34 pataras ne us se kaha he aeeniyasa! yeeshu maseeh tujhe changa karata haai ut
Acts9:35 aur lua aur shaaron ke sab rahanevale use dekhkar prabhu kee or fire..
Acts9:36 yafaa men tabeeta arthata dorakas nam aek vishvasinee rahatee thee
Acts9:37 unheen dinon men vah beemar hokar mar gai aur unhon ne use nahalakar attaree par rakh diya.
Acts9:38 aur isaliye ki lua yafaa ke nikatt tha
Acts9:39 tab pataras uttkar un ke sath ho liya
Acts9:40 tab pataras ne sab ko bahar kar diya
Acts9:41 us ne hath dekar use uttaya aur paavitra logon aur vidhavaon ko bulakar use jeevit aur jagrat dikha diya.
Acts9:42 yah bat sare yafaa me faail gai: aur bahuteron ne prabhu par vishvas kiya.
Acts9:43 aur pataras yafaa men shamaun nam kisee chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan bahut din tak raha..
Acts10:1 kaaisaariya men kuranealiyus nam aeek manushy tha
Acts10:2 vah bhkt tha
Acts10:3 us ne din ke teesare pahar ke nikatt darshan men spashtt roop se dekha
Acts10:4 us ne use dhyan se dekha aur drakar kaha he prabhu kya haai? us ne us se kaha
Acts10:5 aur ab yafaa men manushy bhejakar shamaun ko
Acts10:6 vah shamaun chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan pahun haai
Acts10:7 jab vah svargadoot jis ne us se baten kee theen chala gaya
Acts10:8 aur unhen sab baten batakar yafaa ko bheja..
Acts10:9 doosare din
Acts10:10 aur use bookh lagee
Acts10:11 aur us ne dekha
Acts10:12 jis men prathvee ke sab prakar ke chaupaae aur renganevale jantu aur akash ke pakshaee the.
Acts10:13 aur use aek aeesa shabd sunai diya
Acts10:14 parantu pataras ne kaha
Acts10:15 fir doosaree bar use shabd sunai diya
Acts10:16 teen bar aeesa hee hua tab turant vah patra akash par utta liya gaya..
Acts10:17 jab pataras apane man men dubadha kar raha tha
Acts10:18 aur pukarakar poochhne lage
Acts10:19 pataras jo us darshan par soch hee raha tha
Acts10:20 so uttkar neeche ja
Acts10:21 tab pataras ne utarakar un manushyon se kaha dekho
Acts10:22 unhon ne kaha kuraneliyus soobedar jo dharmee aur parameshvar se dranevala aur saree yahoodee jaati men sunamee manushy haai
Acts10:23 tab us ne unhen bheetar bulakar un kee pahunai kee.. aur doosare din
Acts10:24 doosare din ve kaaisariya men pahunche
Acts10:25 jab pataras bheetar a raha tha
Acts10:26 parantu pataras ne use uttakar kaha
Acts10:27 aur usake sath batacheet karata hua bheetar gaya
Acts10:28 un se kaha
Acts10:29 isee liye maain jab bulaya gaya to bina kuchh kahe chala aya: ab maain poochhta hoon ki mujhe kis kam ke liye bulaya gaya haai?
Acts10:30 kuranealiyus ne kaha ki is ghadee poore char din hua
Acts10:31 aur kahane laga
Acts10:32 is liye kisee ko yafaa bhejakar shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai
Acts10:33 tab maain ne turant tere pas log bheje
Acts10:34 tab pataras ne munh kholakar kaha
Acts10:35 ab mujhe nishchay hua
Acts10:36 jo vachan us ne israaeliyon ke pas bheja
Acts10:37 vah bat tum janate ho jo yoohanna ke bapatisma ke prachar ke bad galeel se arambh karake sare yahoodiya men faail gai.
Acts10:38 ki parameshvar ne kis reeti se yeeshu nasaree ko paavitra atma aur samarth se aabhaishok kiya: vah bhlai karata
Acts10:39 aur ham un sab kamon ke gavah haain jo us ne yahoodiya ke desh aur yarooshalem men bhee kia
Acts10:40 us ko parameshvar ne teesare din jilaya
Acts10:41 sab logon ko naheen baran un gavahon ko jinhen parameshvar ne pahile se chun liya tha
Acts10:42 aur us ne hamen agyaa dee
Acts10:43 us kee sab bhavishyadvkta gavahee dete he
Acts10:44 pataras ye baten kah hee raha tha
Acts10:45 aur jitane khtana kiae huae vishvasee pataras ke sath aae the
Acts10:46 kyonaki unhon ne unhen bhanati bhanati kee bhasha bolate aur parameshvar kee badai karate suna.
Acts10:47 is par pataras ne kaha kya koi jal kee rok kar sakata haai
Acts10:48 aur us ne agyaa dee ki unhen yeeshu maseeh ne nam men bapaatisma diya jaae: tab unhon ne us se binatee kee ki kuchh din hamare sath raha..

Acts11:4 tab pataras ne unhen arambh se kramanusar kah sunaya
Acts11:5 ki maain yafaa nagar men praarthna kar raha tha
Acts11:6 jab maain ne us par dhyan kiya
Acts11:7 aur yah shabd bhee suna ki he pataras utt mar aur kha.
Acts11:8 maain ne kaha
Acts11:9 is ke uttr men akash se doosaree bar shabd hua
Acts11:10 teen bar aeesa hee hua tab sab kuchh fir akash par kheench liya gaya.
Acts11:11 aur dekho
Acts11:12 tab atma ne mujh se un ke sath bekhttke ho lene ko kaha
Acts11:13 aur us ne bataya

Acts11:25 tab vah shaaul ko ddoonddhne ke liye tarasus ko chala gaya.
Acts11:26 aur jab un se mila to use antakiya men laya

Acts11:28 un men se agabus nam ek ne khde hokar atma kee praerana se yah bataya

Acts11:30 aur unhon ne aeesa hee kiya aur baranabas aur shaaul ke hath praacheenon ke pas kuchh bhej diya..
Acts12:1 us samay herodes raja ne kaleesiya ke kai ek vyaaktaiyon ko dukh dene ke liye un par hath dale.
Acts12:2 us ne yoohanna ke bhai yakoob ko talavar se marava dala.
Acts12:3 aur jab us ne dekha
Acts12:4 aur us ne use pakad ke bandeegrah men dala
Acts12:5 so bandeegrah men pataras kee rakhvalee ho rahee thee parantu kaleesiya usake liye lau lagakar parameshvar se praarthna kar rahee thee.
Acts12:6 aur jab herodes use un ke samhane lane ko tha
Acts12:7 to dekho
Acts12:8 tab svargadoot ne us se kaha kamar bandha
Acts12:9 vah nikalakar usake peechhe ho liya parantu yah n janata tha
Acts12:10 tab ve paahil aur doosare pahare se nikalakar us lohe ke faattk par pahunche
Acts12:11 tab pataras ne sachet hokar kaha ab maain ne sach jan liya ki prabhu ne apana svargadoot bhejakar mujhe herodes ke hath se chhuda liya
Acts12:12 aur yah sochakar
Acts12:13 jab us ne faattk kee khaidkee khttkhttai to roode nam aek dasee sunane ko ai.
Acts12:14 aur pataras ka shabd pahachanakar
Acts12:15 unhon ne us se kaha too pagal haai
Acts12:16 parantu pataras khttkhttata hee raha: so unhon ne khaidkee kholee
Acts12:17 tab us ne unhen hath se saain kiya

Acts12:19 jab herodes ne us kee khoj kee
Acts12:20 aur vah soor aur saaida ke logon se bahut aprasann tha so ve aek chitt hokar usake pas aae aur balastus ko
Acts12:21 aur ttharaae huae din herodes rajavasr paahinakar sinhasan par baaitta aur un ko vyakhyan dene laga.
Acts12:22 aur log pukar utte

Acts13:1 antaakiya kee kaleesiya men kitane bhvishyadvkta aur upadeshak the arthata baranabas aur shamaun jo neegar kahalata haai aur lookiyus kurenee
Acts13:2 jab ve upavas saahit prabhu kee upasana kar rahe tha
Acts13:3 tab unhon ne upavas aur praarthna karake aur un par hath rakhkar unhen vida kiya..
Acts13:4 so ve paavitra atma ke bheje huae silookiya ko gaae aur vahan se jahaj par chaddhkar kupraus ko chale.
Acts13:5 aur salamees men pahunchakar
Acts13:6 aur us sare ttapoo men hote hua
Acts13:7 vah siraagiyus paulus soobe ke sath tha
Acts13:8 parantu ileemas ttonhe ne
Acts13:9 tab shaaul ne jis ka nam paulus bhee haai
Acts13:10 he sare kapatt aur sab chaturai se bhre huae shautan kee santan
Acts13:11 ab dek
Acts13:12 tab soobe ne jo kuchh hua tha
Acts13:13 paulus aur usake sathee pafaus se jahaj kholakar panfooliya ke piraga men aae: aur yoohanna unhen chhodkar yarooshalem ko lautt gaya.
Acts13:14 aur piraga se age baddhkar ke pisidiya ke antaakiya men pahunche aur sabt ke din aradhanalay men jakar baaitt gaae.
Acts13:15 aur vyavastha aur bhavishyadvktaon kee pustak ke paddhne ke bad sabha ke saradaron ne un ke pas kahala bheja
Acts13:16 tab paulus ne khde hokar aur hath se saain karake kaha he israaeliyo
Acts13:17 in israaelee logon ke parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon ko chun liya
Acts13:18 aur vah koi chalees varsha tak jangal men un kee sahata raha.
Acts13:19 aur kanan desh men sat jaatiyon ka nash karake un ka desh koi saddhe char sau varsha men in kee meeras men kar diya.
Acts13:20 is ke bad us ne samuel bhvishyadvkta tak un men nyayee ttharaae.
Acts13:21 usake bad unhon ne ek raja manga: tab parameshvar ne chalees vashau ke liye binyameen ke gotra men se ek manushy arthata keesh ke putra shaaul ko un par raja ttharaya.
Acts13:22 fir use alag karake daud ko un ka raja banaya jis ke vishay men us ne gavahee dee
Acts13:23 isee ke vansh men se parameshvar ne apanee pratigyaa ke anusar israael ke pas aek uddharakarta
Acts13:24 jis ke ane se paahile yoohanna ne sab israaeliyon ko man firav ke bapatisma ka prachar kiya.
Acts13:25 aur jab yoohanna apana daur poora karane par tha
Acts13:26 he bhaiyo
Acts13:27 kyonaki yarooshalem ke rahanevalon aur unake saradaron ne
Acts13:28 unhon ne mar dalane ke yogy koi dosh us men ne paya
Acts13:29 aur jab unhon ne usake vishay men likhee hui sab baten pooree kee
Acts13:30 parantu parameshvar ne use mare huon men se jilaya.
Acts13:31 aur vah unhen jo usake sath galeel se yarooshalem aae the
Acts13:32 aur ham tumhen us praatigyaa ke vishay me
Acts13:33 ki parameshvar ne yeeshu ko jilakar
Acts13:34 aur usake is reeati se mare huon men se jilane ke vishay men bhee
Acts13:35 isaliye us ne aek aur bhjan men bhee kaha haai ki too apane pavitra jan ko sadne n dega.
Acts13:36 kyonaki daud to parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar apane samay men seva karake so gaya aur apane bapadadon men ja mila aur sad bhee gaya.
Acts13:37 parantu jis ko parameshvar ne jilaya
Acts13:38 isaliye
Acts13:39 aur jin baton se tum moosa kee vyavastha ke dara nirdosh naheen tthar sakate the
Acts13:40 isaliye chaukas raho
Acts13:41 tum pr bhee a pade ki he ninda karanevalo
Acts13:42 un ke bahar nikalate samay log un se binatee karane lage
Acts13:43 aur jab sabha utt gai to yahoodiyon aur yahoodee mat men aae huae bhkton men se bahutere paulus aur baranabas ke peechhe ho liae aur unhon ne un se baten karake samajhaya
Acts13:44 agale sabt ke din nagar ke praaya: sab log parameshvar ka vachan sunane ko ikatthe ho gaae.
Acts13:45 parantu yahoodee bheed ko dekhkar dah se bhr gaa
Acts13:46 tab polus aur baranabas ne nidr hokar kaha
Acts13:47 kyonkai prabhu ne hamen yah agyaa dee haai ki maai. ne tujhe anyajaatiyon ke liye jyoti ttharaya haai taki too prathvee kee chhor tak uddhar ka dar ho.
Acts13:48 yah sunakar anyajati anaandait hua
Acts13:49 tab prabhu ka vachan us sare desh men faailane laga.

Acts21:31 jab ve usake mar dalata chahate the
Acts21:32 tab vah turant sipaahiyon aur soobedaron ko lekar un ke pas neeche daud aya aur unhon ne palattn ke saradar ko aur sipaahiyon ko dekh kar paaailus ko marane peettne se hath uttaya.
Acts21:33 tab palattn ke saradar ne pas akar use pakad liya aur do janjeeron se bandhane kee agyaa dekar poochhne laga
Acts21:34 parantu bheed men se koi kuchh aur koi kuchh chillate rahe aur jab hullad ke mare tteek sachchai n jan saka
Acts21:35 jab vah seeddhee par pahuncha
Acts21:36 kyonaki logon kee bheed yah chillatee hui usake peechhe padee
Acts21:37 jab ve paulus ko gaddh men le jane par the
Acts21:38 kya too vah misaree nahee
Acts21:39 paulus ne kaha
Acts21:40 jab us ne agyaa dee
Acts22:1 he bhaiyo
Acts22:2 ve yah sunakar ki vah ham se ibraanee bhasha men bolata haai
Acts22:3 maain to yahoodee manushy hoo
Acts22:4 aur maain ne puroosh aur sree donon ko bandha bandhakar
Acts22:5 is bat ke liye mahayajak aur sab puraaniye gavah haain ki un men se maain bhaiyon ke nam par chitthiyan lekar damishk ko chala ja raha tha
Acts22:6 jab maain chalate chalate damishk ke nikatt pahuncha
Acts22:7 aur maain boomi par gir pada: aur yah shabd suna
Acts22:8 us ne mujh se kaha maain yeeshu nasaree hoo
Acts22:9 aur mere sathaiyon ne jyoti to dekhee
Acts22:10 tab maai. ne kaha he prabhu maain kya karoon? prabhu ne mujh se kaha uttkar damishk men ja
Acts22:11 jab us jyoti ke tej ke mare mujhe kuchh dikhai n diya
Acts22:12 aur hananyah nam ka vyavastha ke anusar aek bhkt manushy
Acts22:13 aur khda hokar mujh se kaha he bhai shaaul fir dekhne laga: usee ghadee mere netra khul gaae aur maain ne use dekha.
Acts22:14 tab us ne kaha hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne tujhe isaaliye ttharaya haai
Acts22:15 kyonaki too us kee or se sab manushyon ke samhane un baton ka gavah hoga
Acts22:16 ab kyon der karata haai? ut
Acts22:17 jab maain fir yarooshalem men akar mandair men praarthna kar raha tha
Acts22:18 aur us ne dekha ki mujh se kahata haai jaldee karake yarooshalem se jhtt nikal ja: kyonaki ve mere vishay men teree gavahee n manenge.
Acts22:19 maain ne kaha he prabhu ve to ap janate haai
Acts22:20 aur jab tere gavah staifanus ka lohoo bahaya ja raha tha tab maain bhee vahan khda tha
Acts22:21 aur us ne mujh se kaha
Acts22:22 ve is bat tak us kee sunate rahe tab unche shabd se chillaa
Acts22:23 jab ve chillate aur kapade faenkate aur akash men dhool udate the
Acts22:24 to palattn ke soobedar ne kaha ki ise gaddh men le jao aur kode marakar jancho
Acts22:25 jab unhon ne use tasamon se bandha to paulus ne us soobedar se jo pas khda tha kaha
Acts22:26 soobedar ne yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ke pas jakar kaha too yah kya karata haai? yah to ramee haai.
Acts22:27 tab palattn ke saradar ne usake pas akar kaha mujhe bata
Acts22:28 yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ne kaha ki maain ne romee hone ka pad bahut roopaye dekar paya haai: paulus ne kaha
Acts22:29 tab jo log use janchane par the
Acts22:30 doosare din vah tteek tteek janane kee ichchha se ki yahoodee us par kyon dosh lagate haai
Acts23:1 paulus ne mahasabha kee or ttkattkee lagakar dekha
Acts23:2 hananyah mahayajak ne
Acts23:3 tab paulus ne us se kaha he choona firee hui bheet
Acts23:4 jo pas khde the
Acts23:5 paulus ne kaha he bhaiyo
Acts23:6 tab paulus ne yah janakar
Acts23:7 jab us ne yah bat kahee to fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon men jhgada hone laga aur sabha men foott pad gai.
Acts23:8 kyonaki sadookee to yah kahate haai
Acts23:9 tab bada halla macha aur kitane shaasree jo fareeasiyon ke dal ke the
Acts23:10 jab bahut jhgada hua
Acts23:11 usee rat prabhu ne usake pas a khde hokar kaha he paulus
Acts23:12 jab din hua
Acts23:13 jinhon ne apas men yah shapath khai thee
Acts23:14 unhon ne mahayajakon aur puraniyon ke pas akar kaha
Acts23:15 isaliye ab mahasabha samet palattn ke saradar ko samajhao
Acts23:16 aur paulus ke bhanje n suna
Acts23:17 paulus ne soobedaron men se aek ko apane pas bulakar kaha is javan ko palattn ke saradar ke pas le jao
Acts23:18 so us ne usako palattn ke saradar ke pas le jakar kaha paulus bandhauae ne mujhe bulakar binatee kee
Acts23:19 palattn ke saradar ne usaka hath pakadkar
Acts23:20 us ne kaha yahoodiyon ne ekasa kiya haai
Acts23:21 parantu un kee mat manana
Acts23:22 tab palattn ke saradar ne javan ko yah agyaa dekar vida kiya
Acts23:23 aur do soobedaron ko bulakar kaha do sau sipahee
Acts23:24 aur paulus kee savaree ke liye ghaede taaiyar rakho ki use faeliks haakim ke pas kushal se pahuncha den.
Acts23:25 us ne is prakar kee chitthee bhee likhee
Acts23:26 mahapratapee faeliks haakim ko klauadiyus loosiyas ko namaskara
Acts23:27 is manushy ke yahoodiyon ne pakadkar mar dalata chaha
Acts23:28 aur maain janana chahata tha
Acts23:29 tab maain ne jan liya
Acts23:30 aur jab mujhe bataya gaya
Acts23:31 so jaaise sipaahiyon ko agyaa dee gai thee vaaise hee paulus ko lekar raton-rat aantaipaatrais men laae.
Acts23:32 doosare din ve savaron ko usake sath jane ke liye chhodkar ap gaddh ko lautte.
Acts23:33 unhon ne kaaisaariya men pahunchakar haakim ko chitthee dee: aur paulus ko bhee usake samhane khda kiya.
Acts23:34 us ne paddhkar poochha yah kis desh ka haai?
Acts23:35 aur jab jan liya ki kilaakiya ka haai to us se kaha jab tere mui bhee aaege
Acts24:1 panch din ke bad hananyah mahayajak kai puraniyon aur tiratullus nam kisee vakeel ko sath lekar aya unhon ne hakim ke samhane paulus par nalish kee.
Acts24:2 jab vah bulaya gaya to tiratullus un par dosh lagakar kahane laga
Acts24:3 is ko ham har jagah aur har prakar se dhanyavad ke sath manate haain.
Acts24:4 parantu isaaliye ki tujhe aur dukh naheen dena chahata
Acts24:5 kyonaki ham ne is manushy ko upadravee aur jagat ke sare yahoodiyon men balava karanevala
Acts24:6 us ne maandair ko ashuuddh karana chaha
Acts24:7 in sab baton ko jin ke vishay men ham us par dosh lagate haai
Acts24:8 yahoodiyon ne bhee usaka sath dekar kaha
Acts24:9 jab haakim ne paulus ko bolane ke liye saain kiya to us ne uttr diya
Acts24:10 too ap jan sakata haai
Acts24:11 aur unhon ne mujhe n maandair men n sabha ke gharon me
Acts24:12 aur n to ve un baton ko
Acts24:13 parantu yah maain tere samhane sach tthara sakate haain.

Acts24:16 is se maain ap bhee yatan karata hoo
Acts24:17 bahut vasharen ke bad maain apane logon ko dan pahunchane
Acts24:18 unhon ne mujhe mandair me
Acts24:19 ki yadi mere virodha men un kee koi bat ho to yahan tere samhane akar mujh par dosh lagate.
Acts24:20 ya ye ap hee kahe
Acts24:21 is aek bat ko chhod jo maain ne un ke beech men khde hokar pukarakar kaha tha
Acts24:22 faeliks ne jo is panth kee baten tteek tteek janata tha

Acts24:26 use paulus se kuchh roopaye milane kee bhee as thee isaaliye aur bhee bula bulakar us se baten kiya karata tha.
Acts24:27 parantu jab do varsha beet gaa
Acts25:1 faestus un praant men pahunchakar teen din ke bar kaaisariya se yarooshalem ko gaya.
Acts25:2 tab mahayajakon ne

Acts25:5 fir kaha

Acts25:8 parantu paulus ne uttr diya

Acts25:10 paulus ne kaha maain kaaisar ke nyay asan ke samhane khda hoon: mere mukamen ka yaheen faaisala hona chahiae: jaaisa too achchhee tarah janata haai
Acts25:11 yaadi aparadhaee hoon aur mar dale jane yogy koi kam kiya haai to marane se naheen mukarata parantu jin baton ka ye mujh par dosh lagate haai

Acts25:14 aur un ke bahut din vahan rahane ke bad faestus ne paulus kee katha raja ko batai ki aek manushy haai

Acts25:17 so jab ve yahan ikatthe hua

Acts26:1 aagirppa ne paulus se kaha tujhe apane vishay men bolane kee agyaa haai: tab paulus hath baddhakar uttr dene laga
Acts26:2 he raja agirppa
Acts26:3 vishosh karake isaaliye ki too yahoodiyon ke sab vyavaharon aur vivadon ko janata haai
Acts26:4 jaaisa mera chal chalan arambh se apanee jaati ke beech aur yarooshalem men tha
Acts26:5 ve yaadi gavahee dena chahate haai
Acts26:6 aur ab us praatigyaa kee asha ke karan jo parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon se kee thee
Acts26:7 usee pratigyaa ke poore hone kee asha lagaae hua
Acts26:8 jab ki parameshvar mare huon ko jilata haai
Acts26:9 maain ne bhee samajha tha ki yeeshu nasaree ke nam ke virodha men mujhe bahut kuchh karana chahiae.
Acts26:10 aur maain ne yarooshalem men aeesa hee kiya aur mahayajakon se aadhaikar pakar bahut se paavitra logon ko bandeegrah men dal
Acts26:11 aur har aradhanalay men maain unhen tadna dila dilakar yeeshu kee ninda karavata tha
Acts26:12 isee dhaun men jab maain mahayajakon se adhaikar aur paravana lekar daamishk ko ja raha tha.
Acts26:13 to he raja
Acts26:14 aur jab ham sab boomi par gir pade
Acts26:15 maain ne kaha

Acts26:18 ki too un kee ankhe khole
Acts26:19 so he raja agirppa
Acts26:20 parantu pahile daamishk ke
Acts26:21 in baton ke karan yahoodee mujhe maandair men pakadke mar dalane ka yatan karate the.
Acts26:22 so parameshvar kee sahayata se maain aj tak bana hoon aur chhotte bade sabhee ke samhane gavahee deta hoon aur un baton ko chhod kuchh naheen kahata
Acts26:23 ki maseeh ko dukh uttana hoga
Acts26:24 jab vah is reeati se uttr de raha tha
Acts26:25 parantu us ne kaha he mahapratapee faestus
Acts26:26 raja bhee jis ke samhane maain nidr hokar bol raha hoo
Acts26:27 he raja agirppa
Acts26:28 ab aagirppa ne paulus se kaha too thode hee samajhane se mujhe maseehee banana chahata haai?
Acts26:29 paulus ne kaha

Acts26:31 aur alag jakar apas men kahane lage

Acts27:1 jab yah ttharaya gaya
Acts27:2 aur adramuatiayum ke aek jahaj par jo aasiya ke kinare kee jagahon men jane par tha
Acts27:3 doosare din ham ne saaida men langar dala aur yooliyus ne paulus par krapa karake use mitraen ke yahan jane diya ki usaka satkar kiya jaae.
Acts27:4 vahan se jahaj kholakar hava virooddh hone ke karan ham kupraus kee ad men hokar chale.
Acts27:5 aur kilikiya aur panfooliya ke nikatt ke samudra men hokar loosiya ke moora men utare.
Acts27:6 vahan soobedar ko sikandaariya ka aek jahaj itaaliya jata hua mila
Acts27:7 aur jab ham bahut dinon tak dhaeere dhaeere chalakar kaattnaita se kaanidus ke samhane pahunche

Acts27:10 ki he sajjano mujhe aeesa jan padta haai

Acts27:12 aur vah bandar sthan jada kattne ke liye achchha n tha isaaliye bahuton ka vichar hua

Acts27:15 jab yah jahaj par lagee
Acts27:16 tab kauda nam aek chhotte se ttapoo kee ad men bahate bahate ham kaattnaita se dongee ko vash me kar sake.
Acts27:17 mallahon ne use uttakar
Acts27:18 aur jab ham ne andhaee se bahut hichakole aur dhakke khaa

Acts27:20 aur jab bahut dien tak n soorya n tare dikhai dia
Acts27:21 jab ve bahut upavas kar chuke

Acts27:24 he paulus
Acts27:25 isaliye
Acts27:26 parantu hamen kisee ttapoo par ja ttkaina hoga..
Acts27:27 jab chaudahaveen rat hui
Acts27:28 aur thah lekar unhon ne bees purasa gahara paya aur thoda age baddhkar fir thah lee
Acts27:29 tab patthreelee jagahon par padne ke dr se unhon ne jahaj kee pichhadee char langar dale
Acts27:30 parantu jab mallah jahaj par se bhagana chahate the

Acts27:34 isaliye tumhen samajhata hoon ki kuchh kha lo
Acts27:35 aur yah kahakar us ne rottee lekar sab ke samhane parameshvar ka dhanyavad kiya aur todkar khane laga.
Acts27:36 tab ve sab bhee ddhaddhs bandhakar bhojan karane lage.

Acts27:44 aur bakee koi pattron par
Acts28:1 jab ham bach nikale
Acts28:2 aur un jangalee logon ne ham par anokhee krapa kee kyonki menh ke karan jo baras raha tha aur jade ke karan unhon ne ag sulagakar ham sab ko ttharaya.
Acts28:3 jab paulus ne lakaadiyon ka gattha battorakar ag par rakha

Acts28:8 pubaliyus ka pita jvar aur anv lohoo se rogee pada tha: so paulus ne usake pas ghar men jakar praarthna kee

Acts28:10 aur unhon ne hamara bahut adar kiya
Acts28:11 teen maheene ke bad ham sikandaariya ke aek jahaj par chal nikale
Acts28:12 surakoosa men langar dal karake ham teen din ttkai rahe.
Acts28:13 vahan se ham ghoomakar regiyum men aae: aur aek din putiyulee men aae.
Acts28:14 vahan ham ko bhai mile

Romans1:1 paulus kee or se jo yeeshu maseeh ka das haai
Romans1:2 jis kee us ne pahile hee se apane bhavishyadvktaon ke dara paavitra shaasr men.
Romans1:3 apane putra hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke vishay men praatigyaa kee thee
Romans1:4 aur paavitrata kee atma ke bhav se mare huon men se jee uttne ke karan samarth ke sath parameshvar ka putra tthara haai.
Romans1:5 jis ke dara hamen anugrah aur praearitai milee ki usake nam ke karan sab jaatiyon ke log vishvas karake us kee manen.
Romans1:6 jin men se tum bhee yeeshu maseeh ke hone ke liye bulaae gaae ho.
Romans1:7 un sab ke nam jo rom men parameshvar ke pyare haain aur pavitra hone ke liye bulaae gaae haain.. hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe..
Romans1:8 paahile maain tum sab ke liye yeeshu maseeh ke dara apane parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoo
Romans1:9 parameshvar jis kee seva maain apanee atma se usake putra ke susamachar ke vishay men karata hoo
Romans1:10 aur nity apanee praarthnaon men binatee karata hoo
Romans1:11 kyonaki maai. tum se milane kee lalasa karata hoo
Romans1:12 arthata yah
Romans1:13 aur he bhaiyo
Romans1:14 maain yoonaniyon aur anyabhashaiyon ka aur buaddhmaianon aur nirbuaddhyaien ka karjadan hoon.
Romans1:15 so maain tumhen bhee jo rom men rahate ho
Romans1:16 kyonaki maain susamachar se naheen lajata
Romans1:17 kyonaki us men parameshvar kee dhaaarmikata vishvas se aur vishvas ke liye pragatt hotee haai jaaisa likha haai
Romans1:18 parameshvar ka krodha to un logon kee sab abhktai aur adharma par svarga se pragatt hota haai
Romans1:19 isaliye ki paramashevar ke vishay men gyaan un ke manon men pragatt haai
Romans1:20 kyonaki usake anadekhe gu
Romans1:21 is karan ki parameshvar ko janane par bhee unhon ne parameshvar ke yogy badai aur dhanyavad n kiya
Romans1:22 ve apane ap ko buaddhmaian jatakar moorkh ban gaae.
Romans1:23 aur aavinashaee parameshvar kee mahima ko nashaman manushy
Romans1:24 is karan parameshvar ne unhen un ke man ke abhailashaen ke unasar ashuuddhta ke liye chhod diya
Romans1:25 kyonaki unhon ne parameshvar kee sachchai ko badalakar joott bana dala
Romans1:26 isaliye paramashevar ne unhen neech kamanaon ke vash men chhod diya yahan tak ki un kee striayon ne bhee svabhavik vyavahar ko
Romans1:27 vaaise hee puroosh bhee striayon ke sath svaabhaavik vyavahar chhodkar apas men kamatur hokar jalane lage
Romans1:28 aur jab unhon ne parameshvar ko paahichanana n chaha
Romans1:29 so ve sab prakar ke adharma
Romans1:30 badanam karanevale
Romans1:31 nirbuaddh
Romans1:32 ve to parameshvar kee yah vidhai janate haai
Romans2:1 so he dosh laganevale
Romans2:2 aur ham jatane haai
Romans2:3 aur he manushy
Romans2:4 kya too us kee krapa
Romans2:5 par apanee kattorata aur hatteele man ke anusar usake krodha ke din ke liye
Romans2:6 vah har aek ko usake kamon ke anusar badala dega.
Romans2:7 jo sukarma men sthiar rahakar maahima
Romans2:8 par jo vivadee haai
Romans2:9 aur klesh aur sankatt har aek manushy ke praan par jo bura karata haai
Romans2:10 par maahima aur adar or kalyan har aek ko milega
Romans2:11 kyonaki parameshvar kisee ka paksha naheen karata.
Romans2:12 isaliye ki jinhon ne bina vyavastha paae pap kiya
Romans2:13 kyonaki parameshvar ke yahan vyavastha ke sunanevale dharmee nahee
Romans2:14 fir jab anyajaati log jin ke pas vyavastha nahee
Romans2:15 ve vyavastha kee baten apane dayon men likhee hui dikhne haain aur un ke vivek bhee gavahee dete haai
Romans2:16 jis din parameshvar mere susamachar ke anusar yeeshu maseeh ke dara manushyon kee gupt baton ka nyay karega..
Romans2:17 yaadi too yahoodee kahalata haai
Romans2:18 aur us kee ichchha janata aur vyavastha kee shaiksha pakar uttm uttm baton ko piry janata haai.
Romans2:19 aur apane par bhrosa rakhta haai
Romans2:20 aur buaddhhaieenon ka sikhanevala
Romans2:21 so kya too jo auron ko sikhata haai
Romans2:22 too jo kahata haai
Romans2:23 too jo vyavastha ke vishay men ghamand karata haai
Romans2:24 kyonaki tumhare karan anyajaatiyon men parameshvar ke nam kee ninda kee jatee haai jaaisa likha bhee haai.
Romans2:25 yaadi too vyavastha par chale
Romans2:26 so yaadi khtanaraahit manushy vyavastha kee vidhaiyon ko mana kare
Romans2:27 aur jo manushy jaati ke karan bin khtana raha yaadi vah vyavastha ko poora kare
Romans2:28 kyonaki vah yahoodee nahee
Romans2:29 par yahoodee vahee haai
Romans3:1 so yahoodee kee kya badai
Romans3:2 har prakar se bahut kuchh. pahile to yah ki paramashevar ke vachan un ko saunpe gaae.
Romans3:3 yaadi kitane vishvasaghaatee nikale bhee to kya hua. kya unake vishvasaghaatee hone se parameshvar kee sachchai vyarth ttharegee?
Romans3:4 kadapi nahee
Romans3:5 so yaadi hamara adharma parameshvar kee dhaaarmikata tthara deta haai
Romans3:6 kadapi nahee
Romans3:7 yaadi mere joott ke karan parameshvar kee sachchai us ko mahima ke liye aadhaik karake pragatt hui
Romans3:8 aur ham kyon burai n kare
Romans3:9 to fir kya hua? kya ham un se achchhe haain? kabhee nahanee kyonki ham yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon donon par yah dosh laga chuke haain ki ve sab ke sab pap ke vash men haain.
Romans3:10 jaaisa likha haai
Romans3:11 koi samajhdar nahee
Romans3:12 sab bhttk gaae haai
Romans3:13 un ka gala khulee hui kabra haai: unheen ne apanee jeebhon se chhl kiya haai: un ke hotton men sapon ka vish haai.
Romans3:14 aur un ka munh shraap aur kadvahatt se bhra haai.
Romans3:15 un ke panv lohoo bahane ko faurteele haain.
Romans3:16 un ke magorn men nash aur klesh haai.
Romans3:17 unhon ne kushal ka marga naheen jana.
Romans3:18 un kee ankhon ke samhane parameshvar ka bhy naheen.
Romans3:19 ham janate haai
Romans3:20 kyeanki vyavastha ke kamon se koi praanee usake samhane dharmee naheen ttharega
Romans3:21 par ab bina vyavastha parameshvar kee dhaarmikata pragatt hui haai
Romans3:22 arthata parameshvar kee vah dhaarmikata
Romans3:23 isaliye ki sab ne pap kiya haai aur parameshvar kee maahima se raahit haai.
Romans3:24 parantu usake anugrah se us chhuttkare ke dara jo maseeh yeeshu men haai
Romans3:25 use parameshvar ne usake lohoo ke karan ek aeesa praayaashchaitt ttharaya
Romans3:26 baran isee samay us kee dhaaarmikata pragatt ho ki jis se vah ap hee dharmee tthare
Romans3:27 to ghamand karana kahan raha? us kee to jagah hee naheen: kaun see vyavastha ke karan se? kya karmon kee vyavastha se? nahee
Romans3:28 isaliye ham is paarinam par pahunchate haai
Romans3:29 kya parameshvar keval yahoodiyon heen ka haai? kya anyajatiyon ka naheen? ha
Romans3:30 kyonaki aek hee parameshvar haai
Romans3:31 te kya ham vyavastha ko vishvas ke dara vyarth ttharate haain? kadaapi naheen baran vyavastha ko sthiar karate haain..
Romans4:1 so ham kya kahe
Romans4:2 kyonaki yadi ibraaheem kamon se dharmee ttharaya jata
Romans4:3 paavitra shaasr kya kahata haai? yah ki ibraaheem ne parameshvar par vishvas kiya
Romans4:4 kam karanevale kee majadooree dena dan nahee
Romans4:5 parantu jo kam naheen karata baran bhktaiheen ke dharmee ttharanevale par vishvas karata haai
Romans4:6 jise parameshvar bina kamon ke dharmee ttharata haai
Romans4:7 ki dhany ve haai
Romans4:8 dhany haai vah manushy jise parameshvar papee n ttharaae.
Romans4:9 te yah dhany kahana
Romans4:10 to vah kyonkar gina gaya? khtane kee dasha men ya bina khtane kee dasha men? khtane kee dasha men naheen parantu bina khtane kee dasha men.
Romans4:11 aur us ne khtane ka chinh paya
Romans4:12 aur un khtana kiae huon ka pita ho
Romans4:13 kyonaki yah pratigyaa ki vah jagat ka vaaris hoga
Romans4:14 kyonaki yadi vyavasthavale varis haai
Romans4:15 vyavastha to krodha upajatee haai aur jahan vyavastha naheen vahan usaka ttalana bhee naheen.
Romans4:16 isee karan vah vishvas ke dara milatee haai
Romans4:17 jaaisa likha haai
Romans4:18 us ne nirasha men bhee asha rakhkar vishvas kiya
Romans4:19 aur vah jo aek sau varsha ka tha
Romans4:20 aur n avishvasee hokar parameshvar kee pratigyaa par sandeh kiya
Romans4:21 aur nishchay jana
Romans4:22 is kara
Romans4:23 aur yah vachan
Romans4:24 baran hamare liye bhee jin ke liye vishvas dhaaarmikata gina jaaega
Romans4:25 vah hamare aparadhaen ke liye pakadvaya gaya
Romans5:1 se jab ham vishvas se dharmee tthare
Romans5:2 jis ke dara vishvas ke karan us anugrah tak
Romans5:3 keval yahee nahee
Romans5:4 or dhaeeraj se khra nikalana
Romans5:5 aur asha se lajja naheen hotee
Romans5:6 kyonaki jab ham nirbal hee the
Romans5:7 kisee dharmee jan ke liye koi mare
Romans5:8 parantu parameshvar ham par apane praem kee bhlai is reeati se pragatt karata haai
Romans5:9 so jab ki ham
Romans5:10 kyonaki baairee hone kee dasha men to usake putra kee mratyu ke dara hamara mel parameshvar ke sath hua fir mel ho jane par usake jeevan ke karan ham uddhar kyon n paaenge?
Romans5:11 aur keval yahee nahee
Romans5:12 isaliye jaaisa aek manushy ke dara pap jagat men aya
Romans5:13 kyonaki vyavastha ke diae jane tak pap jagat men to tha
Romans5:14 taubhee adam se lekar moosa tak mratyu ne un logon par bhee rajy kiya
Romans5:15 par jaaisa aparadha kee dasha haai
Romans5:16 aur jaaisa aek manushy ke pap karane ka fal hua

Romans5:19 kyonaki jaaisa aek manushy ke agyaa n manane se bahut log papee tthare
Romans5:20 aur vyavastha beech men a gai
Romans5:21 ki jaaisa pap ne mratyu faailate huae rajy kiya
Romans6:1 so ham kya kahen? kya ham pap karate rahe
Romans6:2 kadapi nahee
Romans6:3 kya tum naheen janate
Romans6:4 so us mratyu ka bapatisma pane se ham usake sath gade gaa
Romans6:5 kyonaki yadi ham us kee mratyu kee samanata men usake sath jutt gaae haai
Romans6:6 kyonaki ham janate haain ki hamara purana manushyatv usake sath kroos par chaddhaya gaya
Romans6:7 kyonaki jo mar gaya
Romans6:8 so yaadi ham maseeh ke sath mar gaa
Romans6:9 kyonaki yah janate haai

Romans7:1 he bhaiyo

Romans7:4 so he mere bhaiyo
Romans7:5 kyonaki jab ham shaareerik the

Romans7:21 so maain yah vyavastha pata hoo
Romans7:22 kyonaki maain bheetaree manushyatv se to parameshvar kee vyavastha se bahut prasann rahata hoon.
Romans7:23 parantu mujhe apane ango men doosare prakar kee vyavastha dikhai padtee haai

Romans8:1 so ab jo maseeh yeeshu men haai
Romans8:2 kyonaki jeevan kee atma kee vyavastha ne maseeh yeeshu men mujhe pap kee
Romans8:3 kyonaki jo kam vyavastha shareer ke karan durbal hokar n kar sakee
Romans8:4 isaliye ki vyavastha kee vidhai ham men jo shareer ke anusar naheen baran atma ke anusar chalate haai
Romans8:5 kyonaki shareearik vyaaktai shareer kee baton par man lagate haain parantu adhyaatmaik atma kee baton par man lagate haain.
Romans8:6 shareer par man lagana to mratyu haai
Romans8:7 kyonaki shareer par man lagana to parameshvar se baair rakhna haai
Romans8:8 aur jo shaareearik dasha men haai
Romans8:9 parantu jab ki parameshvar ka atma tum men basata haai
Romans8:10 aur yaadi maseeh tum men haai
Romans8:11 aur yaadi usee ka atma jis ne yeeshu ko mare huon men se jilaya tum men basa hua haai to jis ne maseeh ko mare huon men se jilaya
Romans8:12 so he bhaiyo
Romans8:13 kyonaki yadi tum shareer ke anusar din kattoge
Romans8:14 isaliye ki jitane log parameshvar ke atma ke chalaae chalate haai
Romans8:15 kyonaki tum ko dasatv kee atma naheen milee
Romans8:16 atma ap hee hamaree atma ke sath gavahee deta haai
Romans8:17 aur yaadi santan haai
Romans8:18 kyonaki maain samajhta hoo
Romans8:19 aikyonki srashtti badee ashaabhree drashtti se parameshvar ke putraen ke pragatt hone kee batt joh rahee haai.
Romans8:20 kyonaki srashtti apanee ichchha se naheen par adhaeen karanevale kee or se vyarthta ke adhaeen is asha se kee gai.
Romans8:21 ki srashtti bhee ap hee vinash ke dasatv se chhuttkara pakar

Romans8:23 aur keval vahee naheen par ham bhee jin ke pas atma ka pahila fal haai
Romans8:24 asha ke dara to hamara uddhar hua haai parantu jis vastu kee asha kee jatee haai jab vah dekhne men aa
Romans8:25 parantu jis vastu ko ham naheen dekhte
Romans8:26 isee reeti se atma bhee hamaree durbalata men sahayata karata haai
Romans8:27 aur manon ka janchanevala janata haai
Romans8:28 aur ham janate haai
Romans8:29 kyonaki jinhen us ne pahile se jan liya haai unhen paahile se ttharaya bhee haai ki usake putra ke svaroop men hon taaki vah bahut bhaiyon men paahilautta tthare.
Romans8:30 fir jinhen un se pahile se ttharaya
Romans8:31 so ham in baton ke vishay men kya kahen? yadi parameshvar hamaree or haai
Romans8:32 jis ne apane nij putra ko bhee n rakh chhoda
Romans8:33 parameshvar ke chune huon par dosh kaun lagaaega? parameshvar vah haai jo unako dharmee ttharanevala haai.
Romans8:34 fir kaun haai jo dand kee agyaa dega? maseeh vah haai jo mar gaya baran murdon men se jee bhee utta
Romans8:35 kaun ham ko maseeh ke praem se alag karega? kya klesha

Romans9:23 aur daya ke baratanon par jinhen us ne mahima ke liye paahile se taaiyar kiya
Romans9:24 arthata ham par jinhen us ne n keval yahoodiyon men se baran anyajaatiyon men se bhee bulaya.

Romans10:6 parantu jo dhaaarmikata vishvas se haai

Romans10:9 ki yadi too apane munh se yeeshu ko prabhu janakar angeekar kare aur apane man se vishvas kare

Romans11:3 ki he prabhu

Romans11:5 so isee reeti se is samay bhee
Romans11:6 yaadi yah anugrah se hua haai
Romans11:7 so paarinam kya hua? yah ki israaelee jis kee khoj men haai

Romans11:10 un kee ankhon par andhora chha jaae taaki n dekhe

Romans11:12 so yaadi un ka girana jagat ke liye dhan aur un kee ghattee anyajaatiyon ke liye sampaati ka karan hua

Romans11:14 taaki kisee reeati se maain apane kuttumbaiyon se jalan karavakar un men se kai aek ka uddhar karaun.
Romans11:15 kyonaki jab ki un ka tyag diya jana jagat ke milap ka karan hua
Romans11:16 jab bhentt ka pahila peda paavitra tthara
Romans11:17 aur yaadi kai aek dalee tod dee gai
Romans11:18 to daaliyon par ghamand n karana: aur yadi too ghamand kare

Romans11:20 bhla

Romans11:23 aur ve bhee yaadi avishvas men n rahe
Romans11:24 kyonaki yadi too us jalapai se

Romans11:28 ve susamachar ke bhav se to tumhare baairee haai
Romans11:29 kyonaki parameshvar apane baradanon se
Romans11:30 kyonaki jaaise tum ne pahile parameshvar kee agyaa n manee parantu abhee un ke agyaa n manane se tum par daya hui.
Romans11:31 vaaise hee unhon ne bhee ab agyaa n manee ki tum par jo daya hotee haai is se un par bhee daya ho.
Romans11:32 aikyonki parameshvar ne sab ko agyaa n manane ke karan band kar rakha taaki vah sab par daya kare..
Romans11:33 aha! parameshvar ka dhan aur buddh iddh aur gyaan kya hee ganbheer haai! usake vichar kaaise athah
Romans11:34 prabhu ki buddh iko kis ne jana? ya usaka mantraee kaun hua?
Romans11:35 ya kis ne pahile use kuchh diya haai jis ka badala use diya jaae.
Romans11:36 kyonaki us kee or se
Romans12:1 isaliye he bhaiyo
Romans12:2 aur is sansar ke sadrash n bano parantu tumharee buaddh ike naye ho jane se tumhara chala-chalan bhee badalata jaa
Romans12:3 kyonaki maain us anugrah ke karan jo mujh ko mila haai
Romans12:4 kyonaki jaaise hamaree aek deh men bahut se ang haai
Romans12:5 vaaisa hee ham jo bahut haai
Romans12:6 aur jab ki us anugrah ke anusar jo hamen diya gaya haai
Romans12:7 yaadi seva karane ka dan mila ho
Romans12:8 jo upadeshak ho
Romans12:9 praem nishkapatt ho burai se gharana karo bhlai me lage raho.
Romans12:10 bhaichare ke praem se aek doosare par maya rakho paraspar adar karane men aek doosare se baddh chalo.
Romans12:11 prayatn karane men alasee n ho atmaik unmad men bhro raho prabhu kee seva karate raho.
Romans12:12 asha me anaandait raho klesh me sthiar raho praarthna me nity lage raho.
Romans12:13 paavitra logon ko jo kuchh avashy ho
Romans12:14 apane satanevalon ko ashaeesh do ashaeesh do srap n do.
Romans12:15 anand karanevalon ke sath anand karo aur ronevalon ke sath roo.
Romans12:16 apas men aek sa man rakho aabhaimanee n ho parantu deenon ke sath sangaati rakho apanee draashtti men buddhmaian n ho.
Romans12:17 burai ke badale kisee se burai n karo jo baten sab logon ke nikatt bhlee haai
Romans12:18 jahan tak ho sake
Romans12:19 he piryo apana palatta n lena parantu krodha ko avasar do
Romans12:20 parantu yadi tera baairee bookha ho to use khana khaila yaadi pyasa ho
Romans12:21 burai se n haro parantu bhlai se burai ka jeet lo..
Romans13:1 har aek vyaktai pradhaan adhaikaariyon ke adhaeen rahe kyonki koi aadhaikar aeesa nahee
Romans13:2 is se jo koi adhaikar ka virodha karata haai
Romans13:3 kyonaki hakim achchhe kam ke nahee
Romans13:4 kyonaki vah teree bhlai ke liye parameshvar ka sevak haai. parantu yadi too burai kare

Romans13:7 isaliye har aek ka hakk chukaya karo

Romans13:10 praem padosee kee kuchh burai naheen karata

Romans14:3 aur khanevala na-khanevale ko tuchchh n jane
Romans14:4 too kaun haai jo doosare ke sevak par dosh lagata haai? usak sthiar rahata ya gir jana usake svamee hee se sambandha rakhta haai
Romans14:5 koi to aek din ko doosare se baddhkar janata haai
Romans14:6 jo kisee din ko manata haai
Romans14:7 kyonaki ham men se n to koi paane liye jeeta haai
Romans14:8 kyonaki yadi ham jeevit haai
Romans14:9 kyonaki maseeh isee liye mara aur jee bhee utta ki vah mare huon aur jeevato
Romans14:10 too apane bhai par kyon dosh lagata haai? ya too fir kyon apane bhai ko tuchchh janata haai? ham sab ke sab parameshvar ke nyay sinhasan ke samhane khde honge.
Romans14:11 kyonaki likha haai
Romans14:12 so ham men se har aek parameshvar ko apana apana lekha dega..
Romans14:13 so age ko ham aek doosare par dosh n lagaaen par tum yahee ttan lo ki koi apane bhai ke samhane ttes ya ttokar khane ka karan n rakhe.
Romans14:14 maain janata hoo
Romans14:15 yaadi tera bhai tere bhojan ke karan udas hota haai
Romans14:16 ab tumharee bhlai kee ninda n hone paae.
Romans14:17 kyonaki paramashevar ka rajya khanapeena naheen parantu dharma aur milap aur vah anand haai
Romans14:18 jo paavitraatma se hota haai aur jo koi is reeti se maseeh kee seva karata haai
Romans14:19 isaliye ham un baton ka prayatn karen jinase mel milap aur aek doosare ka sudhaar ho.

Romans15:1 nidan ham balavanon ko chahia
Romans15:2 ham men se har aek apane padosee ko us kee bhlai ke liye sudhaarane ke nimitt prasann kare.
Romans15:3 kyonaki maseeh ne apane ap ko prasann naheen kiya
Romans15:4 jitanee baten paahile se likhee gai
Romans15:5 aur dhaeeraj
Romans15:6 taaki tum aek man aushra aek munh hokar hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ki pita parameshvar kee badai karo.
Romans15:7 isaliye
Romans15:8 maain kahata hoo
Romans15:9 aur anyajati bhee daya ke karan parameshvar kee badai kare
Romans15:10 fir kaha haai
Romans15:11 aur fir he jati jati ke sab lago
Romans15:12 aur fir yashaayah kahata haai
Romans15:13 so parameshvar jo asha ka data haai tumhen vishvas karane men sab prakar ke anand aur shaantai se paripoorn kare
Romans15:14 he mere bhaiyo maain ap bhee tumhare vishay men nishchay janata hoo
Romans15:15 taubhee maain ne kaheen kaheen yad dilane ke liye tumhen jo bahut hiyav karake likha
Romans15:16 ki maain anyajatiyon ke liye maseeh yeeshu ka sevak hokar parameshvar ke susamachar kee seva yajak kee nai karoon jis se anyajaatiyon ka manon chaddhaya jana
Romans15:17 so un baton ke vishay men jo parameshvar se sambandha rakhtee haai

Romans15:19 aur chinhon aur adabhuta kamon kee samarth se
Romans15:20 par mere man kee umang yah haai
Romans15:21 parantu jaaisa likha haai
Romans15:22 isee liye maain tumhare pas ane se bar bar rooka raha.
Romans15:23 parantu ab mujhe in deshaen men aur jagah naheen rahee
Romans15:24 isaliye jab isapaaniya ko jaunga to tumhare pas hota hua jaunga kyonki mujhe asha haai
Romans15:25 parantu abhee to paavitra logon kee seva karane ke liye yarooshalem ko jata hoon.
Romans15:26 kyonaki makiduaniya aur akhya ke logon ko yah achchha laga
Romans15:27 achchha to laga
Romans15:28 so maain yah kam poora karake aur un ko yah chanda saunpakar tumhare pas hota hua isapaniya ko jaunga.
Romans15:29 aur maain janata hoo
Romans15:30 aur he bhaiyon maain yeeshu maseeh ka jo hamara prabhu haai aur pavitra atma ke praem ka smaran dila kar
Romans15:31 ki maain yahoodiya ke aavishvasiyon se bacha rahoo
Romans15:32 aur maain parameshvar kee ichchha se tumhare pas anand ke sath akar tumhare sath vishraam paun.
Romans15:33 shaantai ka parameshvar tum sab ke sath rahe. ameena..

Romans16:15 filulugus aur yooliya aur neryus aur us kee bahin

Romans16:22 mujh patraee ke likhnevale tiraatiyus ka prabhu men tum ko namaskara.

Romans16:24 
Romans16:25 ab jo tum ko mere susamachar arthata yeeshu maseeh ke vishay ke prachar ke anusar sthiar kar sakata haai
Romans16:26 parantu ab pragatt hokar sanatan parameshvar kee agyaa se bhavishyadvktaon kee pustakon ke dara sab jatiyon ko bataya gaya haai
Romans16:27 usee advait buddhmaian parameshvar kee yeeshu maseeh ke dara yuganuyug maahima hotee rahe. ameena..
1Corinthians1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar kee ichchha se yeeshu maseeh ka praearit hone ke liye bulaya gaya aur bhai sosthianes kee or se.
1Corinthians1:2 parameshvar kee us kaleesiya ke niam jo kuarinthus men haai
1Corinthians1:3 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe..
1Corinthians1:4 maain tumhare vishay men apane parameshvar ka dhanyavad sada karata hoo
1Corinthians1:5 ki us men hokar tum har bat men arthata sare vachan aur sare gyaan men dhanee kiae gaae.
1Corinthians1:6 ki maseeh kee gavahee tum men pakkee nikalee.
1Corinthians1:7 yahan tak ki kisee baradan men tumhen ghattee nahee
1Corinthians1:8 vah tumhen ant tak draddh bhee karega
1Corinthians1:9 parameshvar sachcha haai jis ne tum ko apane putra hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee sangati men bulaya haai..

1Corinthians1:11 kyonaki he mere bhaiyo
1Corinthians1:12 mera kahana yah haai

1Corinthians1:17 kyonaki maseeh ne mujhe bapaatisma dene ko nahee

1Corinthians1:19 kyoki likha haai
1Corinthians1:20 kahan raha gyaanavana? kahan raha shaasree? kahan is sansar ka vivadee? kya parameshvar ne sansar ke gyaan ko moorkhta naheen ttharaya?

1Corinthians1:22 yahoodee to chinh chahate haai
1Corinthians1:23 parantu ham to us kroos par chaddhaae huae maseeh ka prachar karate haain jo yahoodiyon ke nikatt ttokar ka kara

1Corinthians1:25 kyonaki parameshvar kee moorkhta manushyon ke gyaan se gyaanavan haai aur parameshvar kee nirbalata manushyon ke bal se bahut balavan haai..

Galatians1:4 usee ne apane ap ko hamare papon ke liye de diya
Galatians1:5 us kee stuti aur badai. yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena..
Galatians1:6 mujhe ashcharya hota haai
Galatians1:7 parantu vah doosara susamachar haai hee naheen: par bat yah haai
Galatians1:8 parantu yadi ham ya svarga se koi doot bhee us susamachar ko chhod jo ham ne tum ko sunaya haai
Galatians1:9 jaaisa ham paahile kah chuke haai
Galatians1:10 yaadi maain ab tak manushyon ko prasann karata rahata
Galatians1:11 he bhaiyo
Galatians1:12 kyonaki vah mujhai manushy kee or se naheen pahuncha
Galatians1:13 yahoodee mat men jo pahile mera chal chalan tha
Galatians1:14 aur apane bahut se jativalon se jo meree avastha ke the yahoodee mat men baddhta jata tha aur apane bapadadon ke vyavaharon men bahut hee utteajit tha.
Galatians1:15 parantu parameshvar kee
Galatians1:16 jab ichchha hui
Galatians1:17 aur n yarooshalem ko un ke pas gaya jo mujh se pahile praerit the

Galatians1:19 parantu prabhu ke bhai yakoob ko chhod aur praeriton men se kisee se n mila.
Galatians1:20 jo baten maain tumhen likhta hoo

Galatians1:23 parantu yahee suna karatee thee
Galatians1:24 aur mere vishay men parameshvar kee maahima karatee theen..
Galatians2:1 chaudah varsha ke bad maain baranabas ke sath yarooshalem ko gaya aur titus ko bhee sath le gaya.
Galatians2:2 aur mera jana ishvareey prakash ke anusar hua: aur jo susamachar maain anyajatiyon men prachar karata hoo
Galatians2:3 parantu titus bhee jo mere sath tha aur jo yoonanee haai khtana karane ke liye vivash naheen kiya gaya.
Galatians2:4 aur yah un jootte bhaiyon ke karan hua
Galatians2:5 un ke adhaeen hona ham ne ek ghadee bhr n mana

Ephesians1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar kee ichchha se yeeshu maseeh ka praearit haai
Ephesians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe..
Ephesians1:3 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad ho
Ephesians1:4 jaaisa us ne hamen jagat kee utpaati se pahile us men chun liya
Ephesians1:5 aur apanee ichchha kee sumati ke anusar hamen apane liye paahile se ttharaya
Ephesians1:6 ki usake us anugrah kee mahima kee stuti ho
Ephesians1:7 ham ko us men usake lohoo ke dara chhuttkara
Ephesians1:8 jise us ne sare gyaan aur samajh saahit ham par bahutayat se kiya.
Ephesians1:9 ki us ne apanee ichchha ka bhed us sumaati ke anusar hamen bataya jise us ne apane ap men ttan liya tha.
Ephesians1:10 ki samayon ke poore hone ka aeesa prabandha ho ki jo kuchh svarga men haai
Ephesians1:11 usee men jis men ham bhee usee kee manasa se jo apanee ichchha ke mat ke anusar sab kuchh karata haai

Ephesians1:17 ki hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka parameshvar jo maahima ka pita haai

Philippians1:1 maseeh yeeshu ke das paulus aur teemuathaiyus kee or se sab paavitra logon ke nam
Philippians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe..
Philippians1:3 maain jab jab tumhen smaran karata hoo
Philippians1:4 aur jab kabhee tum sab ke liye binatee karata hoo
Philippians1:5 isaliye
Philippians1:6 aur mujhe is bat ka bhrosa haai
Philippians1:7 uchit haai
Philippians1:8 is men parameshvar mera gavah haai
Philippians1:9 aur maain yah praarthna karata hoo
Philippians1:10 yahan tak ki tum uttm se uttm baton ko piry jano
Philippians1:11 aur us dhaarmikata ke fal se jo yeeshu maseeh ke dara hote haai
Philippians1:12 he bhaiyo
Philippians1:13 yahan tak ki kaaisaree rajy kee saree palattn aur shosh sab logon men yah pragatt ho gaya haai ki maain maseeh ke liye kaaid hoon.
Philippians1:14 aur prabhu men jo bhai haai
Philippians1:15 kitane to dah aur jhgade ke karan maseeh ka prachar karate haain aur kitane bhlee manasa se.
Philippians1:16 kai aek to yah jan kar ki maain susamachar ke liye uttr dene ko ttharaya gaya hoon praem se prachar karate haain.
Philippians1:17 aur kai aek to seedhaai se naheen par virodha se maseeh kee katha sunate haai
Philippians1:18 so kya hua? keval yah
Philippians1:19 kyonaki maain janata hoo
Philippians1:20 maain to yahee haardik lalasa aur asha rakhta hoo
Philippians1:21 kyonaki mere liye jeeavit rahana maseeh haai
Philippians1:22 par yaadi shareer men jeeavit rahana hee mere kam ke liye labhdayak haai to maain naheen janata
Philippians1:23 kyonaki maain donon ke beech adhar men lattka hoon jee to chahata haai ki kooch karake maseeh ke pas ja rahoo
Philippians1:24 parantu shareer men rahana tumhare karan aur bhee avashyak haai.
Philippians1:25 aur isaliye ki mujhe is ka bhrosa haai so maain janata hoon ki maain jeeavit rahoonga
Philippians1:26 aur jo ghamand tum mere vishay men karate ho
Philippians1:27 keval itana karo ki tumhara chala-chalan maseeh ke susamachar ke yogy ho ki chahe maain akar tumhen dekoo
Philippians1:28 aur kisee bat men virodhaiyon se bhy naheen khate? yah un ke liye vinash ka spashtt chinh haai
Philippians1:29 kyonaki maseeh ke karan tum par yah anugrah hua ki n keval us par vishvas karo par usake liye dukh bhee uttao.
Philippians1:30 aur tumhen vaaisa hee paarishram karana haai
Philippians2:1 so yaadi maseeh men kuchh shaantai aur praem se ddhaddhs aur atma kee sahabhagita
Philippians2:2 to mera yah anand poora karo ki aek man raho aur aek hee praem
Philippians2:3 virodha ya joottee badai ke liye kuchh n karo par deenata se aek doosare ko apane se achchha samajho.
Philippians2:4 har aek apanee hee hit kee nahee
Philippians2:5 jaaisa maseeh yeeshu ka svabhav tha vaaisa hee tumhara bhee svabhav ho.
Philippians2:6 jis ne parameshvar ke svaroop men hokar bhee parameshvar ke tuly hone ko apane vash men rakhne kee vastu n samajha.
Philippians2:7 baran apane ap ko aeesa shoony kar diya
Philippians2:8 aur manushy ke roop men pragatt hokar apane ap ko deen kiya
Philippians2:9 is karan parameshvar ne usako ati mahan bhee kiya
Philippians2:10 ki jo svarga men aur prathvee par aur jo prathvee ke neeche haai ve sab yeeshu ke nam par ghauttna tteken.
Philippians2:11 aur parameshvar pita kee maahima ke liye har aek jeebh angeekar kar le ki yeeshu maseeh hee prabhu haai..
Philippians2:12 so he mere pyaro
Philippians2:13 kyonaki parameshvar hee haai
Philippians2:14 sab kam bina kudkudaae aur bina vivad ke kiya karo.
Philippians2:15 taaki tum nirdosh aur bhole hokar tteddhe aur hatteele logon ke beech parameshvar ke nishkalank santan bane raho
Philippians2:16 ki maseeh ke din mujhe ghamand karane ka karan ho
Philippians2:17 aur yaadi mujhe tumhare vishvas ke balidan aur seva ke sath apana lohoo bhee bahana pade taubhee maain anandait hoo
Philippians2:18 vaaise hee tum bhee anandait ho
Philippians2:19 mujhe prabhu yeeshu men asha haai
Philippians2:20 kyonaki mere pas aeese svabhav ka koi nahee
Philippians2:21 kyonaki sab apane svarth kee khoj men rahate haai
Philippians2:22 par usako to tum ne parakha aur jan bhee liya haai
Philippians2:23 so mujhe asha haai
Philippians2:24 aur mujhe prabhu men bhrosa haai
Philippians2:25 par maain ne ipadeetus ko jo mera bhai
Philippians2:26 kyonaki usaka man tum sab men laga hua tha
Philippians2:27 aur nishchay vah beemar to ho gaya tha
Philippians2:28 isaliye maain ne use bhejane ka aur bhee yatn kiya ki tum us se fir bhentt karake anandait ho jao aur mera shaek ghatt jaae.
Philippians2:29 isaliye tum prabhu men us se bahut anand ke sath bhentt karana
Philippians2:30 kyonaki vahee maseeh ke kam ke liye apane praanon par jokhaim uttakar marane ke nikatt ho gaya tha
Philippians3:1 nidan
Philippians3:2 kuton se chaukas raho
Philippians3:3 kyonaki khtanavale to ham hee haain jo parameshvar ke atma kee aguvai se upasana karate haai
Philippians3:4 par maain to shareer par bhee bhrosa rakh sakata hoon yadi kisee aur ko shareer par bhrosa rakhne ka vichar ho
Philippians3:5 attven din mera khtana hua
Philippians3:6 utsah ke vishay men yaadi kaho to kaleesiya ka satanevala aur vyavastha kee dhaarmikata ke vishay men yaadi kaho to nirdosh tha.
Philippians3:7 parantu jo jo baten mere labh kee thee
Philippians3:8 baran maain apane prabhu maseeh yeeshu kee pahichan kee uttmata ke karan sab baton ko hani samajhta hoon: jis ke karan maain ne sab vastuon kee haani uttai
Philippians3:9 aur us men paya jaun n ki apanee us dhaaarmikata ke sat
Philippians3:10 aur maain usako aur usake mratyunjay kee samarth ko
Philippians3:11 taaki maain kisee bhee reeati se mare huon men se jee uttne ke pad tak pahunchoon.
Philippians3:12 yah matalab nahee
Philippians3:13 he bhaiyo
Philippians3:14 nishaane kee or dauda chala jata hoo
Philippians3:15 so ham men se jitane siddh haai
Philippians3:16 so jahan tak ham pahunche haai
Philippians3:17 he bhaiyo
Philippians3:18 kyonaki bahutere aeesee chal chalate haai
Philippians3:19 un ka ant vinash haai
Philippians3:20 par hamara svadesh svarga par haai aur ham par uddharakarta prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke vahan se an hee batt joh rahe haain.
Philippians3:21 vah apanee shaaktai ke us prabhav ke anusar jis ke dara vah sab vastuon ko apane vash men kar sakata haai
Philippians4:1 isaliye he mere piry bhaiyo
Philippians4:2 maain yooadiya ko bhee samajhata hoo
Philippians4:3 aur he sachche sahakarmee maain tujh se bhee binatee karata hoo
Philippians4:4 prabhu men sada anandait raho maain fir kahata hoo
Philippians4:5 tumharee komalata sab manushyon par pragatt ho: prabhu nikatt haai.
Philippians4:6 kisee bhee bat kee chinta mat karo: parantu har aek bat men tumhare nivedan
Philippians4:7 tab parameshvar kee shaantai
Philippians4:8 nidan

Philippians4:11 yah naheen ki maain apanee ghattee ke karan yah kahata hoon kyonaki maain ne yah seekha haai ki jis dasha men hoo
Philippians4:12 maain deen hona bhee janata hoon aur baddhna bhee janata hoon: har aek bat aur sab dashaaon men trapt hona
Philippians4:13 jo mujhe samarth deta haai us men maain sab kuchh kar sakata hoon.
Philippians4:14 taubhee tum ne bhla kiya
Philippians4:15 aur he filippaiyo

Philippians4:18 mere pas sab kuchh haai
Philippians4:19 aur mera paramashevar bhee apane us dhan ke anusar jo mahima saahit maseeh yeeshu men haai tumharee har aek ghattee ko pooree karega.

Philippians4:23 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma ke sath rahe..
Colossians1:1 paulus kee or se
Colossians1:2 maseeh men un pavitra aur vishvasee bhaiyon ke nam jo kulusse men rahate haain.. hamare pita parameshvar kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaantai praapt hotee rahe..
Colossians1:3 ham tumhare liye nit praarthna karake apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke pita arthata parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate haain.
Colossians1:4 kyonaki ham ne suna haai
Colossians1:5 us asha kee hui vastu ke karan jo tumhare liye svarga men rakhee hui haai
Colossians1:6 jo tumhare pas pahuncha haai aur jaaisa jagat men bhee fal lata
Colossians1:7 usee kee shaiksha tum ne hamare piry sahakarmee ipaas se pai
Colossians1:8 usee ne tumhare praem ko jo atma men haai ham par pragatt kiya..
Colossians1:9 isee liye jis din se yah suna haai
Colossians1:10 taaki tumhara chala-chalan prabhu ke yogy ho
Colossians1:11 aur us kee maahima kee shaaktai ke anusar sab prakar kee samarth se balavant hote jao
Colossians1:12 aur pita ka dhanyavad karate raho
Colossians1:13 usee ne hamen andhakar ke vash se chhudakar apane piry putra ke rajy men pravesh karaya.
Colossians1:14 jis se hamen chhuttkara arthata papon kee kshama praapt hotee haai.
Colossians1:15 vah to adrashy parameshvar ka praatiroop aur saree srashtti men pahilautta haai.
Colossians1:16 kyonaki usee men saree vastuon kee sraashtti hui
Colossians1:17 aur vahee sab vastuon men prathm haai
Colossians1:18 aur vahee deh
Colossians1:19 kyonaki pita kee prasannata isee men haai ki us men saree paaripoornta vas kare.
Colossians1:20 aur usake kroos par bahe huae lohoo ke dara mel milap karake
Colossians1:21 aur us ne ab usakee shaareearik deh men mratyu ke dara tumhara bhee mel kar liya jo paahile nikale huae the aur bure kamon ke karan man se baairee the.
Colossians1:22 taaki tumhen apane sammukh pavitra aur nishkalank
Colossians1:23 yaadi tum vishvas kee nev par draddh bane raho
Colossians1:24 ab maain un dukhon ke karan anand karata hoo
Colossians1:25 jis ka maain parameshvar ke us prabandha ke anusar sevak bana
Colossians1:26 arthata us bhed ko samayon aur peeaddhiyon se gupt raha
Colossians1:27 jin par parameshvar ne pragatt karana chaha
Colossians1:28 jis ka prachar karake ham har aek manushy ko jata dete haain aur sare gyaan se har aek manushy ko sikhate haai
Colossians1:29 aur isee ke liye maain us kee us shaktai ke anusar jo mujh men samarth ke sath prabhav dalatee haai tan man lagakar paarishram bhee karata hoon.
Colossians2:1 maain chahata hoon ki tum jan lo
Colossians2:2 taaki un ke manon men shaantai ho aur ve praem se apas men gatte rahe
Colossians2:3 jis men buddh iddh aur gyaan se sare bhndar chhpai huae haain.
Colossians2:4 yah maain isaaliye kahata hoo
Colossians2:5 kyonaki maain yaadi shareer ke bhav se tum se door hoo
Colossians2:6 so jaaise tum ne maseeh yeeshu ko prabhu karake grahan kar liya haai
Colossians2:7 aur usee men jad pakadte aur baddhte jao aur jaaise tum sikhaae gaae vaaise hee vishvas men draddh hote jao
Colossians2:8 chaukas raho ki koi tumhen us tatva-gyaan aur vyarth dhaekhe ke dara aher n kare le
Colossians2:9 kyonaki us men ishvaratv kee saree paaripoornta sadeh vas karatee haai.
Colossians2:10 aur tum usee men bhrapoor ho gaae ho jo saree pradhaanata aur adhaikar ka shairomanai haai.
Colossians2:11 usee men tumhara aeesa khtana hua haai
Colossians2:12 aur usee ke sath bapaatisma men gade gaa
Colossians2:13 aur us ne tumhen bhee
Colossians2:14 aur vidhaiyon ka vah lekh jo hamare nam par aur hamare virodha men tha mitta dala aur us ko kroos par keelon se jadkar samhane se hatta diya haai.
Colossians2:15 aur us ne pradhaanataon aur adhaikaron ko apane upar se utar kar un ka khullamakhulla tamasha banaya aur kroos ke karan un par jaya-jaya-kar kee ghvaani sunai..
Colossians2:16 isaliye khane peene ya pabrba ya naae chand
Colossians2:17 kyonaki ye sab anevalee baton kee chhaya haai
Colossians2:18 koi manushy deenata aur svargadooton kee pooja karake tumhen dod ke pratifal se vanchit n kare. aeesa manushy dekhee hui baton men laga rahata haai aur apanee shaareearik samajh par vyarth foolata haai.
Colossians2:19 aur us shairomanai ko pakade naheen rahata jis se saree deh jodon aur patthon ke dara palana-poshan pakar aur aek sath gattkar
Colossians2:20 jab ki tum maseeh ke sath sansar kee aadi shaiksha kee or se mar gaae ho
Colossians2:21 aur aeesee vidhaiyon ke vash men kyon rahate ho? ki yah n choona
Colossians2:22 kyonaki ye sab vastu kam men late late nash ho jaaengee.
Colossians2:23 in vidhaiyon men apanee ichchha ke anusar gaddhee hui bhktai kee reeti

Colossians3:6 in hee ke karan parameshvar ka prakop agyaa n mananevalon par padta haai.

Colossians3:13 aur yaadi kisee ko kisee par dosh dene ko koi karan ho

Colossians4:16 aur jab yah patra tumhare yahan paddh liya jaa
Colossians4:17 fir akhairppus se kahana ki jo seva prabhu men tujhe saunpee gai haai
Colossians4:18 mujh paulus ka apane hath se likha hua namaskara. meree janjeeron ko smaran rakhna tum par anugrah hota rahe. ameena..
1Thessalonians1:1 paulus aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus kee or se thaissaluanikiyon kee kaleesiya ke nam jo parameshvar pita aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh men haai.. anugrah aur shaaantai tumhen milatee rahe..
1Thessalonians1:2 ham apanee praarthnaon men tumhen smaran karate aur sada tum sab ke vishay men parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate haain.
1Thessalonians1:3 aur apane parameshvar aur pita ke samhane tumhare vishvas ke kam
1Thessalonians1:4 aur he bhaiyo
1Thessalonians1:5 kyonaki hamara susamachar tumhare pas n keval vachan matra hee men baran samarth aur paavitra atma
1Thessalonians1:6 aur tum bade klesh men paavitra atma ke anand ke sath vachan ko manakar hamaree aur prabhu kee see chal chalane lage.
1Thessalonians1:7 yahan tak ki makiduaniya aur akhya ke sab vishvasiyon ke liye tum adarsha bane.
1Thessalonians1:8 kyonaki tumhare yahan se n keval makiduaniya aur akhya men prabhu ka vachan sunaya gaya
1Thessalonians1:9 kyonaki ve ap hee hamare vishay men batate haain ki tumhare pas hamara ana kaaisa hua aur tum kyonaki mooraton se parameshvar kee or firen taaki jeevate aur sachche parameshvar kee seva karo.
1Thessalonians1:10 aur usake putra ke svarga par se ane kee batt johate raho jise us ne mare huon men se jilaya

1Thessalonians5:20 bhavishyadaanaiyon ko tuchchh n jano.

1Thessalonians5:22 sab prakar kee burai se bache raho..

1Thessalonians5:26 sab bhaiyon ko paavitra chumban se namaskar karo.
1Thessalonians5:27 maain tumhen prabhu kee shapath deta hoo
1Thessalonians5:28 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tum par hota rahe..
2Thessalonians1:1 paulus aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus kee or se thaissaluneekiyon kee kaleesiya ke nam
2Thessalonians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh men tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe..
2Thessalonians1:3 he bhaiyo
2Thessalonians1:4 yahan tak ki ham ap parameshvar kee kaleeasiya men tumhare vishay men ghamand karate haai
2Thessalonians1:5 yah parameshvar ke sachche nyay ka spashtt praman haai ki tum parameshvar ke rajy ke yogy ttharo
2Thessalonians1:6 kyonaki parameshvar ke nikatt yah nyay haai
2Thessalonians1:7 aur tumhen jo klesh pate ho
2Thessalonians1:8 aur jo parameshvar ko naheen pahachanate
2Thessalonians1:9 ve prabhu ke samhane se
2Thessalonians1:10 yah us din hoga
2Thessalonians1:11 isee liye ham sada tumhare nimitt praarthna bhee karate haai
2Thessalonians1:12 ki hamare parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke anugrah ke anusar hamare prabhu yeeshu ka nam tum men maahima paa
2Thessalonians2:1 he bhaiyo
2Thessalonians2:2 ki kisee atma
2Thessalonians2:3 kisee reeati se kisee ke dhaekhe men n ana kyonaki vah din n aaega
2Thessalonians2:4 jo virodha karata haai
2Thessalonians2:5 kya tumhen smaran nahee
2Thessalonians2:6 aur ab tum us vastu ko janate ho
2Thessalonians2:7 kyonaki adharma ka bhed ab bhee kayrya karata jata haai
2Thessalonians2:8 tab vah adharmee pragatt hoga
2Thessalonians2:9 us adharmee ka ana shautan ke kayrya ke anusar sab prakar kee joottee samarth
2Thessalonians2:10 aur nash honevalon ke liye adharma ke sab prakar ke dhaekhe ke sath hoga kyonaki unhonne saty ke praem ko grahan naheen kiya jis se un ka uddhar hota.
2Thessalonians2:11 aur isee karan parameshvar un men aek bhttka denevalee samarth ko bhejega taki ve joott kee prateeti karen.
2Thessalonians2:12 aur jitane log saty kee prateeti naheen karate
2Thessalonians2:13 par he bhaiyo
2Thessalonians2:14 jis ke liye us ne tumhen hamare susamachar ke dara bulaya
2Thessalonians2:15 isaliye
2Thessalonians2:16 hamara prabhu yeeshu maseeh ap hee
2Thessalonians2:17 tumhare manon men shaantai de
2Thessalonians3:1 nidan
2Thessalonians3:2 aur ham tteddhe aur dushtt manushyon se bache rahen kyonaki har aek men vishvas naheen..
2Thessalonians3:3 parantu prabhu sachcha haai vah tumhen draddhta se sthiar karega: aur us dushtt se suraakshiat rakhega.
2Thessalonians3:4 aur hamen prabhu men tumhare upar bhrosa haai
2Thessalonians3:5 parameshvar ke praem aur maseeh ke dhaeeraj kee or prabhu tumhare man kee aguvai kare..
2Thessalonians3:6 he bhaiyo
2Thessalonians3:7 kyonaki tum ap janate ho
2Thessalonians3:8 aur kisee kee rottee sent men n khai par paarishram aur kashtt se rat din kam dhandha karate the
2Thessalonians3:9 yah nahee
2Thessalonians3:10 aur jab ham tumhare yahan the
2Thessalonians3:11 ham sunate haai
2Thessalonians3:12 aeeson ko ham prabhu yeeshu maseeh men agyaa dete aur samajhate haai
2Thessalonians3:13 aur tum
2Thessalonians3:14 yaadi koi hamaree is patraee kee bat ko n mane
2Thessalonians3:15 taubhee use baairee man samajho par bhai janakar chitao..
2Thessalonians3:16 ab prabhu jo shaaantai ka sota haai ap hee tumhen sada aur har prakar se shaantai de: prabhu tum sab ke sath rahe..
2Thessalonians3:17 maain paulus apane hath se namaskar likhta hoon: har patraee men mera yahee chinh haai: maain isee prakar se likhta hoon.
2Thessalonians3:18 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tum sab par hota rahe..
1Timothy1:1 paulus kee or se jo hamare uddharakarta parameshvar
1Timothy1:2 pita parameshvar
1Timothy1:3 jaaise maain ne makiduaniya ko jate samay tujhe samajhaya tha
1Timothy1:4 aur un aeesee kahaaniyon aur anant vanshaavaaliyon par man n lagaae
1Timothy1:5 agyaa ka saransh yah haai
1Timothy1:6 in ko chhodkar kitane log firakar bakavad kee or bhttk gaae haain.
1Timothy1:7 aur vyavasthapak to hona chahate haai
1Timothy1:8 par ham janate haai
1Timothy1:9 yah janakar ki vyavastha dharmee jan ke liye nahee
1Timothy1:10 vyabhaichaariyo
1Timothy1:11 yahee paramadhany parameshvar kee mahima ke us susamachar ke anusar haai
1Timothy1:12 aur maai

1Timothy1:15 yah bat sach aur har prakar se manane ke yogy haai
1Timothy1:16 par mujhpar isaliye daya hui
1Timothy1:17 ab sanatan raja arthata avinashaee anadekhe advait parameshvar ka adar aur mahima yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena..
1Timothy1:18 he putra teemuathaiyus

1Timothy2:4 vah yah chahata haai
1Timothy2:5 kyonaki parameshvar aek hee haai: aur parameshvar aur manushyon ke beech men bhee aek hee bichavai haai
1Timothy2:6 jis ne apane ap ko sab ke chhuttkare ke dam men de diya taaki us kee gavahee tteek samayon par dee jaae.

1Timothy2:8 so maain chahata hoo

1Timothy3:7 aur baharavalon men bhee usaka sunam ho aeesa n ho ki nindait hokar shautan ke fande men fans jaae.

1Timothy3:14 maain tere pas jald ane kee asha rakhne par bhee ye baten tujhe isaaliye likhta hoon.

2Timothy1:4 aur tere ansuon kee suadhai kar karake rat din tujh se bhentt karane kee lalasa rakhta hoon ki anand se bhr jaun.

2Timothy1:12 is karan maain in dukhon ko bhee uttata hoo

Titus1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar ka das aur yeeshu maseeh ka praearit haai
Titus1:2 us anant jeevan kee asha par
Titus1:3 par tteek samay par apane vachan ko us prachar ke dara pragatt kiya
Titus1:4 teetus ke nam jo vishvas kee sahabhagita ke vichar se mera sachcha putra haai: parameshvar pita aur hamare uddharakarta maseeh yeeshu se anugrah aur shaantai hotee rahe..
Titus1:5 maain isaaliye tujhe krete men chhod aya tha
Titus1:6 jo nirdosh aur aek hee patnee ke paati ho
Titus1:7 kyonaki adhyaksha ko parameshvar ka bhndaree hone ke karan nirdosh hona chahiae n hattee
Titus1:8 par pahunai karanevala
Titus1:9 aur vishvasayogy vachan par jo dharmopadesh ke anusar haai
Titus1:10 kyonaki bahut se log nirankush bakavadee aur dhaekha denevale haain vishosh karake khtanavalon men se.
Titus1:11 in ka munh band karana chaahiae: ye log neech kamai ke liye anuchit baten sikhakar ghar ke ghar bigad dete haain.
Titus1:12 unheen men se ek jan ne jo unheen bhavishyadakta haai
Titus1:13 yah gavahee sach haai
Titus1:14 aur ve yahoodiyon kee katha kahaaniyon aur un manushyon kee agyaaon par man n lagaae
Titus1:15 shuuddh logon ke liye sab vastu shuuddh haai
Titus1:16 ve kahate haai

Titus2:12 aur hamen chitata haai

Titus2:14 jis ne apane ap ko hamare liye de diya
Titus2:15 poore aadhaikar ke sath ye baten kah aur samajha aur sikhata raha: koi tujhe tuchd n janane paae..
