Titus3:3 kyonaki ham bhee pahile
Titus3:4 par jab hamare uddharakarta parameshvar kee krapa
Titus3:5 to us ne hamara uddhar kiya: aur yah dharma ke kamon ke karan nahee
Titus3:6 jise us ne hamare uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh ke dara ham par adhaikai se undela.
Titus3:7 jis se ham usake anugrah se dharmee ttharakar
Titus3:8 yah bat sach haai
Titus3:9 par moorkhta ke vivado
Titus3:10 kisee pakhndee ko aek do bar samajha bujhakar us se alag raha.
Titus3:11 yah janakar ki aeesa manushy bhttk gaya haai
Titus3:12 jab maain tere pas aratimas ya tuakhaikus ko bhejoo
Titus3:13 jenas vyavasthapak aur apullos ko yatn karake age pahuncha de
Titus3:14 aur hamare log bhee avashyakataon ko poora karane ke liye achchhe kamon men lage rahana seekhen taki nishfal n rahen..
Titus3:15 mere sab sathaiyon ka tujhe namaskar aur jo vishvas ke karan ham se praeeti rakhte haai
Philemon1:1 paulus kee or se jo maseeh yeeshu ka kaaidee haai
Philemon1:2 aur baahin afaafiya
Philemon1:3 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se anugrah aur shaaantai tumhen milatee rahe..
Philemon1:4 maain tere us praem aur vishvas kee charcha sunakar
Philemon1:5 sada parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoon aur apanee praarthnaon men bhee tujhe smaran karata hoon.
Philemon1:6 ki tera vishvas men sahabhagee hona tumharee saree bhlai kee pahichan men maseeh ke liye prabhavashaalee ho.
Philemon1:7 kyonaki he bhai
Philemon1:8 isaliye yadhypi mujhe maseeh men bada hiyav to haai
Philemon1:9 taubhee mujh booddhe paulus ko jo ab maseeh yeeshu ke liye kaaidee hoo
Philemon1:10 maain apane bachche uneasimus ke liye jo mujh se meree kaaid men janma haai tujh se binatee karata hoon.
Philemon1:11 vah to paahile tere kuchh kam ka n tha
Philemon1:12 usee ko arthata jo mere day ka ttukada haai
Philemon1:13 use maain apane hee pas rakhna chahata tha ki teree or se is kaaid men jo susamachar ke karan haai
Philemon1:14 par maain ne teree ichchha bina kuchh bhee karana n chaha ki teree yah krapa dabav se naheen par anand se ho.
Philemon1:15 kyonaki kya jane vah tujh se kuchh din tak ke liye isee karan alag hua ki sadaaiv tere nikatt rahe.
Philemon1:16 parantu ab se das kee nai nahee
Philemon1:17 so yaadi too mujhe sahabhagee samajhta haai
Philemon1:18 aur yaadi us ne teree kuchh haani kee haai
Philemon1:19 maain paulus apane hath se likhta hoo
Philemon1:20 he bhai yah anand mujhe prabhu men teree or se mile: maseeh men mere jee ko hara bhra kar de.
Philemon1:21 maain tere agyaakaree hone ka bhrosa rakhkar
Philemon1:22 aur yah bhee
Philemon1:23 ipaas jo maseeh yeeshu men mere sath kaaidee haai.
Philemon1:24 aur marakus aur aaristarkhus aur demas aur looka jo mere sahakarmee haai in ka tujhe namaskara..
Philemon1:25 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma par hota rahe. ameena..
Hebrews1:1 poorva yug men parameshvar ne bapadadon se thoda thoda karake aur bhanati bhanati se bhvishyadvktaon ke dara baten karake.
Hebrews1:2 in dinon ke ant men ham se putra ke dara baten kee
Hebrews1:3 vah us kee maahima ka prakasha
Hebrews1:4 aur svargadooton se utana hee uttm tthara
Hebrews1:5 kyonaki svargadooton men se us ne kab kisee se kaha
Hebrews1:6 aur jab paahilautte ko jagat men fir lata haai
Hebrews1:7 aur svargadooton ke vishay men yah kahata haai
Hebrews1:8 parantu putra se kahata haai
Hebrews1:9 too ne dharma se praem aur adharma se baair rakha is karan parameshvar tere parameshvar ne tere sathaiyon se baddhkar harsharoopee tel se tujhe aabhaishok kiya.
Hebrews1:10 aur yah ki
Hebrews1:11 ve to nash ho jaaenge parantu too bana rahega: aur ve sab vasr kee nai purane ho jaaenge.
Hebrews1:12 aur too unhen chadar kee nain lapettega
Hebrews1:13 aur svargadooton men se un ne kis se kab kaha
Hebrews1:14 kya ve sab seva tthal karanevalee atmaaen naheen jo uddhar panevalon ke liye seva karane ko bhejee jatee haain?
Hebrews2:1 is karan chahia
Hebrews2:2 kyonaki jo vachan svargadooton ke dara kaha gaya tha jab vah sthiar raha or har aek aparadha aur agyaa n manane ka tteek tteek badala mila.
Hebrews2:3 to ham log aeese bade uddhar se nishchaint rahakar kyonkar bach sakate haain? jis kee charcha paahile paahil prabhu ke dara hui
Hebrews2:4 aur sath hee parameshvar bhee apanee ichchha ke anusar chinho
Hebrews2:5 us ne us anevale jagat ko jis kee charcha ham kar rahe haai
Hebrews2:6 baran kisee ne kahee
Hebrews2:7 too ne use svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya too ne us par maahima aur adar ka mukutt rakha aur use apane hathon ke kamon par aadhaikar diya.
Hebrews2:8 too ne sab kuchh usake panvon ke neeche kar diya: isaliye jab ki us ne sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya
Hebrews2:9 par ham ko yeeshu jo svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya gaya tha
Hebrews2:10 kyonaki jis ke liye sab kuchh haai
Hebrews2:11 kyonaki pavitra karanevala aur jo paavitra kiae jate haai
Hebrews2:12 par kahata haai
Hebrews2:13 aur fir yah
Hebrews2:14 isaliye jab ki ladke mans aur lohoo ke bhagee haai
Hebrews2:15 aur jitane mratyu ke bhy ke mare jeevan bhr dasatv men fanse the
Hebrews2:16 kyonaki vah to svargadooton ko naheen baran ibraaheem ke vansh ko sanbhalata haai.
Hebrews2:17 is karan usako chahiae tha
Hebrews2:18 kyonaki jab us ne pareeksha kee dasha men dukh uttaya
Hebrews3:1 so he paavitra bhaiyon tum jo svargeey bulahatt men bhagee ho
Hebrews3:2 jo apane niyukt karanevale ke liye vishvasayogy tha
Hebrews3:3 kyonaki vah moosa se itana baddhkar maahima ke yogy samajha gaya haai
Hebrews3:4 kyonaki har aek ghar ka koi n koi bananevala hota haai
Hebrews3:5 moosa to usake sare ghar men sevak kee nai vishvasayogy raha
Hebrews3:6 par maseeh putra kee nai usake ghar ka adhaikaree haai
Hebrews3:7 so jaaisa paavitra atma kahata haai
Hebrews3:8 to apane man ko kattor n karo
Hebrews3:9 jahan tumhare bapadadon ne mujhe janchakar parakha aur chalees varsha tak mere kam dekhe.
Hebrews3:10 is karan maain us samay ke logon se rootta raha
Hebrews3:11 tab maain ne krodha men akar shapath khai

Hebrews3:14 kyonaki ham maseeh ke bhagee huae haai
Hebrews3:15 jaaisa kaha jata haai

Hebrews3:17 aur vah chalees varsha tak kin logon se rootta raha? kya unheen se nahee
Hebrews3:18 aur us ne kin se shapath khai
Hebrews3:19 so ham dekhte haai
Hebrews4:1 isaliye jab ki usake vishraam men pravesh karane kee praatigyaa ab tak haai
Hebrews4:2 kyonaki hamen unheen kee nai susamachar sunaya gaya haai
Hebrews4:3 aur ham jinhon ne vishvas kiya haai
Hebrews4:4 kyonaki sataven din ke vishay men us ne kaheen yon kaha haai
Hebrews4:5 aur is jagah fir yah kahata haai
Hebrews4:6 to jab yah bat bakee haai ki kitane aur haain jo us vishraam men pravesh kare
Hebrews4:7 to fir vah kisee vishosh din kee ttharakar itane din ke bad daud kee pustak men use aj ka din kahata haai
Hebrews4:8 aur yaadi yahoshoo unhen vishraam men pravesh kar leta
Hebrews4:9 so jan lo ki parameshvar ke logon ke liye sabt ka vishraam bakee haai.
Hebrews4:10 kyonaki jis ne usake vishraam men pravesh kiya haai
Hebrews4:11 so ham us vishraam men pravesh karane ka prayatn kare
Hebrews4:12 kyonaki parameshvar ka vachan jeeavit
Hebrews4:13 aur sraashtti kee koi vastu us se chhpaiee naheen haai baran jis se hamen kam haai

Hebrews6:16 manushy to apane se kisee bade kee shapath khaya karate haain aur un ke har aek vivad ka faaisala shapath se pakka hota haai.

Hebrews7:2 isee ko ibraaheem ne sab vastuon ka dasavan ansh bhee diya: yah paahile apane nam ke arth ke anusar
Hebrews7:3 jis ka n pita

Hebrews7:7 aur us men sandeh nahee

Hebrews7:10 kyonaki jis samay maalikisidak ne usake pita se bhentt kee
Hebrews7:11 tak yaadi leveey yajak pad ke dara siddh iho sakatee haai jis ke sahare se logon ko vyavastha milee thee to fir kya avashyakata thee
Hebrews7:12 kyonaki jab yajak ka pad badala jata haai? to vyavastha ka bhee badalana avashy haai.
Hebrews7:13 kyonaki jis ke vishay men ye baten kahee jatee haain ki vah doosare gotra ka haai
Hebrews7:14 to pragatt haai
Hebrews7:15 or jab maalikisidak ke saman aek aur aeesa yajak utpann honevala tha.
Hebrews7:16 jo shaareearik agyaa kee vyavastha ke anusar nahee
Hebrews7:17 kyonaki usake vishay men yah gavahee dee gai haai
Hebrews7:18 nidan
Hebrews7:19 isaliye ki vyavastha ne kisee bat kee siddh inaheen ki aur usake sthan par aek aeesee uttm asha rakhee gai haai jis ke dara ham parameshvar ke sameep ja sakate haain.
Hebrews7:20 aur isaliye ki maseeh kee niyuaktai bina shapath naheen hui.
Hebrews7:21 kyonaki ve to bina shapath yajak ttharaae gaae par yah shapath ke sath us kee or se niyukt kiya gaya jis ne usake vishay men kaha
Hebrews7:22 so yeeshu aek uttm vacha ka jamin tthara.
Hebrews7:23 ve to bahut se yajak banate aa
Hebrews7:24 par yah yuganuyug rahata haai is karan usaka yajak pad attl haai.

Hebrews7:26 so aeesa hee mahayajak hamare yogy tha
Hebrews7:27 aur un mahayajakon kee nai use avashyak naheen ki prati din pahile apane papon aur fir logon ke papon ke liye baalidan chaddhaae kyonki us ne apane ap ko balidan chaddhakar use aek hee bar nipatta diya.
Hebrews7:28 kyonaki vyavastha to nirbal manushyon ko mahayajak niyukt karatee haai parantu us shapath ka vachan jo vyavastha ke bad khai gai

Hebrews9:8 is se paavitra atma yahee dikhata haai

Hebrews10:1 kyonaki vyavastha jis men anevalee achchhee vastuon ka pratibimb haai
Hebrews10:2 naheen to un ka chaddhana band kyon n ho jata? isaliye ki jab seva karanevale aek hee bar shuuddh ho jate
Hebrews10:3 parantu un ke dara praati varsha papon ka smaran hua karata haai.
Hebrews10:4 kyonaki anahona haai
Hebrews10:5 isee karan vah jagat men ane samay kahata haai
Hebrews10:6 homa-baliyon aur papa-baliyon se too prasann naheen hua.
Hebrews10:7 tab maain ne kaha
Hebrews10:8 upar to vah kahata haai
Hebrews10:9 fir yah bhee kahata haai
Hebrews10:10 usee ichchha se ham yeeshu maseeh kee deh ke ek hee bar balidan chaddhaae jane ke dara paavitra kiae gaae haain.
Hebrews10:11 aur har aek yajak to khde hokar praati din seva karata haai
Hebrews10:12 par yah vyaktai to papon ke badale aek hee baalidan sarvada ke liye chaddhakar parameshvar ke dahine ja baaitta.
Hebrews10:13 aur usee samay se is kee batt joh raha haai
Hebrews10:14 kyonaki us ne aek hee chaddhave ke dara unhen jo pavitra kiae jate haai
Hebrews10:15 aur paavitra atma bhee hamen yahee gavahee deta haai kyonaki us ne pahile kaha tha
Hebrews10:16 ki prabhu kahata haai ki jo vacha maain un dinon ke bad un se bandhoonga vah yah haai ki maain apanee vyavasthaon ko unake day par likoonga aur maain un ke vivek men daloonga.

Hebrews10:18 aur jab in kee kshama ho gai haai

Hebrews10:25 aur aek doosare ke sath ikattha hona ne chhode

Hebrews11:1 ab vishvas asha kee hui vastuon ka nishchay
Hebrews11:2 kyonaki isee ke vishay men praacheenon kee achchhee gavahee dee gain.
Hebrews11:3 vishvas hee se ham jan jate haai
Hebrews11:4 vishvas kee se habil ne kaain se uttm balidan parameshvar ke liye chaddhaya aur usee ke dara usake dharmee hone kee gavahee bhee dee gai: kyonaki parameshvar ne us kee bhentton ke vishay men gavahee dee aur usee ke dara vah marane par bhee ab tak baten karata haai.
Hebrews11:5 vishvas hee se hanok utta liya gaya
Hebrews11:6 aur vishvas bina use prasann karana anahona haai
Hebrews11:7 vishvas hee se nooh ne un baton ke vishay men jo us samay dikhai n padtee thee
Hebrews11:8 vishvas hee se ibraaheem jab bulaya gaya to agyaa manakar aeesee jagah nikal gaya jise meeras men lenevala tha
Hebrews11:9 vishvas hee se us ne pratigyaa kiae huae desh men jaaise paraae desh men paradeshaee rahakar isahak aur yakoob samet jo usake sath usee pratigyaa ke vaaris the
Hebrews11:10 kyonaki vah us sthiar nevavale nagar kee batt johata tha
Hebrews11:11 vishvas se sara ne ap booddhee hone par bhee garbh dhaaran karane kee samarth pai kyonaki us ne pratigyaa karanevale ko sachcha jana tha.
Hebrews11:12 is karan aek hee jan se jo mara hua sa tha
Hebrews11:13 ye sab vishvas hee kee dasha men mare aur unhon ne pratigyaa kee hui vastuen naheen pai par unhen door se dekhkar anandait huae aur man liya
Hebrews11:14 jo aeesee aeesee baten kahate haai
Hebrews11:15 aur jis desh se ve nikal aae the
Hebrews11:16 par ve aek uttm arthata svargeey desh ke aabhailashaee haai
Hebrews11:17 vishvas hee se ibraaheem ne
Hebrews11:18 aur jis se yah kaha gaya tha
Hebrews11:19 kyonaki us ne vichar kiya
Hebrews11:20 vishvas hee se isahak ne yakoob aur aesav ko anevalee baton ke vishay me ashaeesh dee.
Hebrews11:21 vishvas hee se yakoob ne marate samay yoosufa ke donon putraen men se aek aek ko ashaeesh dee
Hebrews11:22 vishvas hee se yoosufa ne
Hebrews11:23 vishvas hee se moosa ke mata pita ne us ko
Hebrews11:24 vishvas hee se moosa ne sayana hokar firaun kee bettee ka putra kahalane se inkar kiya.
Hebrews11:25 isaliye ki use pap men thode din ke sukh bhogane se parameshvar ke logon ke sath dukh bhogana aur uttm laga.
Hebrews11:26 aur maseeh ke karan nindait hone ko misar ke bhndar se bada dhan samajha: kyonaki us kee ankhe fal pane kee or lagee theen.
Hebrews11:27 vishvas hee se raja ke krodha se n drakar us ne misar ko chhod diya
Hebrews11:28 vishvas hee se us ne fasah aur lohoo chhdikane kee vidhai manee
Hebrews11:29 vishvas hee se ve lal samudra ke par aeese utar gaa
Hebrews11:30 vishvas hee se yareeho kee shaharapanah
Hebrews11:31 vishvas hee se rahab veshya agyaa ne mananevalon ke sath nash naheen hui isaliye ki us ne bhediyon ko kushal se rakha tha.
Hebrews11:32 ab aur kya kahoo? kyonki samay naheen raha
Hebrews11:33 inhon ne vishvas hee ke dara rajy jeete dharma ke kam kiae praatigyaa kee hui vastuen praapt kee
Hebrews11:34 ag hee jvala ko ttnda kiya talavar kee dhaar se bach nikale
Hebrews11:35 striayon ne apane mare huon ko fir jeevate paya kitane to mar khate khate mar gaae aur chhuttkara n chaha isaaliye ki uttm punarootthan ke bhagee hon.
Hebrews11:36 kai aek tttthon men udaae jane aur kode khane varan bandho jane aur kaaid men padne ke dara parakhe gaae.
Hebrews11:37 patthravah kiae gaae are se cheere gaae un kee pareeksha kee gai talavar se mare gaae ve kangalee men aur klesh men aur dukh bhogate huae bhedon aur bakariyon kee khalen oddhe hua
Hebrews11:38 aur jangalo
Hebrews11:39 sansar un ke yogay n tha: aur vishvas hee ke dara in sab ke vishay men achchhee gavahee dee gai
Hebrews11:40 kyonaki parameshvar ne hamare liye paahile se aek uttm bat ttharai
Hebrews12:1 is karan jab ki gavahon ka aeesa bada badal ham ko ghore huae haai
Hebrews12:2 aur vishvas ke karta aur siddh karanevale yeeshu kee or se takate rahen jis ne us anand ke liye jo usake age dhara tha
Hebrews12:3 isaliye us par dhyan karo
Hebrews12:4 tum ne pap se ladte huae us se aeesee muttbhed naheen kee
Hebrews12:5 aur tum us upadesh ko jo tum ko putraen kee nai diya jata haai
Hebrews12:6 kyonaki prabhu
Hebrews12:7 tum dukh ko tadna samajhkar sah lo: parameshvar tumhen putra janakar tumhare sath bartav karata haai
Hebrews12:8 yaadi vah tadna jis ke bhagee sab hote haai
Hebrews12:9 fir jab ki hamare shaareerik pita bhee hamaree tadna kiya karate the
Hebrews12:10 ve to apanee apanee samajh ke anusar thode dinon ke liye tadna karate the
Hebrews12:11 aur vartaman men har prakar kee tadna anand kee nahee
Hebrews12:12 isaliye ddheele hathon aur nirbal ghauttnon ko seedho karo.
Hebrews12:13 aur apane panvon ke liye seedho marga banao
Hebrews12:14 sab se mel milap rakhne
Hebrews12:15 aur dhyan se dekhte raho
Hebrews12:16 aeesa n ho
Hebrews12:17 tum janate to ho
Hebrews12:18 tum to us pahad ke pas jo chooa ja sakata tha aur ag se prajvaalit tha
Hebrews12:19 aur turahee kee dhvani
Hebrews12:20 kyonaki ve us agyaa ko n sah sake
Hebrews12:21 aur vah darshan aeesa dravana tha
Hebrews12:22 par tum siyyon ke pahad ke pas
Hebrews12:23 aur lakhon svargadooton aur un paahilautton kee sadhaaran sabha aur kaleeasiya jin ke nam svarga men likhe huae haain: aur sab ke nyayee parameshvar ke pas
Hebrews12:24 aur nai vacha ke madhyasth yeeshu
Hebrews12:25 savadhaan raho
Hebrews12:26 us samay to usake shabd ne prathvee ko hila diya par ab us ne yah praatigyaa kee haai
Hebrews12:27 aur yah vaky 'aek bar firan is bat ko pragatt karata haai
Hebrews12:28 is karan ham is rajy ko pakar jo hilane ka nahee
Hebrews12:29 kyonaki hamara parameshvar bhsm karanevalee ag haai..
Hebrews13:1 bhaichare kee praeeati banee rahe.
Hebrews13:2 pahunai karana n boolana
Hebrews13:3 kaaidiyon kee aeesee sudhai lo
Hebrews13:4 vivah sab men adar kee bat samajhee jaa
Hebrews13:5 tumhara svabhav lobhrahit ho
Hebrews13:6 isaliye ham bedhadk hokar kahate haai
Hebrews13:7 jo tumhare aguve the
Hebrews13:8 yeeshu maseeh kal aur aj aur yuganuyug aekasa haai.
Hebrews13:9 nana prakar ke aur uparee upadeshaen se n bhramaae jao
Hebrews13:10 hamaree aek aeesee vedee haai
Hebrews13:11 kyonaki jin pashuuon ka lohoo mahayajak papa-bali ke liye paavitra sthan men le jata haai
Hebrews13:12 isee kara
Hebrews13:13 so ao us kee ninda apane upar liae huae chhavanee ke bahar usake pas nikal chalen.
Hebrews13:14 kyonaki yahan hamara koi sthiar rahanevala nagar nahee
Hebrews13:15 isaliye ham usake dara stuatiroopee balidan
Hebrews13:16 par bhlai karana
Hebrews13:17 apane aguvon kee mano aur unake adhaeen raho
Hebrews13:18 hamare liye praarthna karate raho
Hebrews13:19 aur is ke karane ke liye maain tumhen aur bhee samajhata hoo
Hebrews13:20 ab shaantaidata parameshvar jo hamare prabhu yeeshu ko jo bhedon ka mahan rakhvala haai sanatan vacha ke lohoo ke gun se mare huon men se jilakar le aya.
Hebrews13:21 tumhen har aek bhlee bat men siddh kare
Hebrews13:22 he bhaiyon maain tum se binatee karata hoo
Hebrews13:23 tum yah jan lo ki teemuathaiyus hamara bhai choott gaya haai aur yadi vah shaeegha a gaya
Hebrews13:24 apane sab aguvon aur sab paavitra logon ko namaskar kaho. itaaliyavale tumhen namaskar kahate haain..
Hebrews13:25 tum sab par anugrah hota rahe. ameena..
James1:1 parameshvar ke aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke das yakoob kee or se un barahon gotraen ko jo tittr bittr hokar rahate haain namaskar pahunche..
James1:2 he mere bhaiyo
James1:3 to ise poore anand kee bat samajho
James1:4 par dhaeeraj ko apana poora kam karane do
James1:5 par yaadi tum men se kisee ko buaddh ikee ghattee ho
James1:6 par vishvas se mange
James1:7 aeesa manushy yah n samajhe
James1:8 vah vyaktai duchitta haai
James1:9 deen bhai apane unche pad par ghamand kare.
James1:10 aur dhanavan apanee neech dasha para: kyonaki vah ghaas ke fool kee nai jata rahega.
James1:11 kyonaki soorya uday hote hee kadee dhoop padtee haai aur ghaas ko sukha detee haai
James1:12 dhany haai vah manushy
James1:13 jab kisee hee pareeksha ho
James1:14 parantu pratyek vyaaktai apanee hee abhailasha men khainchakar
James1:15 fir abhailasha garbhvatee hokar pap ko janata haai aur pap baddh jata haai to mratyu ko utpann karata haai.
James1:16 he mere piry bhaiyo
James1:17 kyonaki har aek achchha varadan aur har aek uttm dan upar hee se haai
James1:18 us ne apanee hee ichchha se hamen saty ke vachan ke dara utpann kiya
James1:19 he mere piry bhaiyo
James1:20 kyonaki manushy ka krodha parameshvar ke dharma ka nirvah naheen kar sakata haai.
James1:21 isaliye saree malinata aur baair bhav kee baddhtee ko door karake
James1:22 parantu vachan par chalanevale bano
James1:23 kyonaki jo koi vachan ka sunanevala ho
James1:24 isaliye ki vah apane ap ko dekhkar chala jata
James1:25 par jo vyaktai svatantrata kee siddh vyavastha par dhyan karata rahata haai
James1:26 yaadi koi apane ap ko bhkt samajhe
James1:27 hamare parameshvar aur pita ke nikatt shuuddh aur nirmal bhaktai yah haai
James2:1 he mere bhaiyo
James2:2 kyonaki yadi aek puroosh sone ke chhlle aur sundar vasr pahine huae tumharee sabha men aae aur aek kangal bhee maaile kuchaaile kapade paahine huae aae.
James2:3 aur tum us sundar vasrvale ka munh dekhkar kaho ki too vahan achchhee jagah baaitt aur us kangal se kaho
James2:4 to kya tum ne apas men bhed bhav n kiya aur kuavichar se nyay karanevale n tthare?
James2:5 he mere piry bhaiyon suno kya parameshvar ne is jagat ke kangalon ko naheen chuna ki vishvas men dharmee
James2:6 par tum ne us kangal ka apaman kiya: kya dhanee log tum par atyachar naheen karate aur kya ve hee tumhen kachahariyon men ghaseett ghaseett kar naheen le jate?
James2:7 kya ve us uttm nam kee ninda naheen karate jis ke tum kahalaae jate ho?
James2:8 taubhee yadi tum pavitra shaasr ke is vachan ke anusar
James2:9 par yaadi tum pakshapat karate ho
James2:10 kyonaki jo koi saree vyavastha ka palan karata haai parantu aek hee bat men chook jaae to vah sab baton me doshaee tthara.
James2:11 isaliye ki jis ne yah kaha
James2:12 tum un logon kee nai vachan bolo
James2:13 kyonaki jis ne daya naheen kee
James2:14 he mere bhaiyo
James2:15 yaadi koi bhai ya bahin nagen ughaade ho
James2:16 aur tum men se koi un se kahe
James2:17 vaaise hee vishvas bhee
James2:18 baran koi kah sakata haai ki tujhe vishvas haai
James2:19 tujhe vishvas haai ki aek hee parameshvar haai: too achchha karata haai: dushttatma bhee vishvas rakhte
James2:20 par he nikamme manushy kya too yah bhee naheen janata
James2:21 jab hamare pita ibraaheem ne apane putra isahak ko vedee par chaddhaya
James2:22 so too ne dekh liya ki vishvas ne us ke kamon ke sath milakar prabhav dala haai aur karmo se vishvas siddh hua.
James2:23 aur paavitra shaasr ka yah vachan poora hua
James2:24 so tum ne dekh liya ki manushy keval vishvas se hee nahee
James2:25 vaaise hee rahab veshya bhee jab us ne dooton ko apane ghar men utara
James2:26 nidan
James3:1 he mere bhaiyo
James3:2 isaliye ki ham sab bahut bar chook jate haain: jo koi vachan men naheen chookata
James3:3 jab ham apane vash men karane ke liye ghaedon ke munh men lagam lagate haai
James3:4 dekho
James3:5 vaaise hee jeebh bhee aek chhotta sa ang haai aur badee badee deenge maratee haai: dekho
James3:6 jeebh bhee aek ag haai: bhee hamare angon men adharma ka aek lok haai aur saree deh par kalank lagatee haai
James3:7 kyonaki har prakar ke bana-pashu
James3:8 par jeebh ko manushyon men se koi vash men naheen kar sakata vah aek aeesee bala haai jo kabhee rookatee hee naheen vah praan nashak vish se bhree hui haai.
James3:9 isee se ham prabhu aur pita kee stuti karate haain aur isee se manushyon ko jo parameshvar ke svaroop men utpann huae haain srap dete haain.
James3:10 aek hee munh se dhanyavad aur srap donon nikalate haain.
James3:11 he mere bhaiyo
James3:12 kya sote ke aek hee munh se meetta aur khara jal donon nikalata haai? he mere bhaiyo
James3:13 tum men gyaanavan aur samajhdar kaun haai? jo aeesa ho vah apane kamon ko achchhe chalachalan se us namrata sahit pragatt kare jo gyaan se utpann hotee haai.
James3:14 par yaadi tum apane apane man men kadvee dah aur virodha rakhte ho
James3:15 yah gyaan vah nahee
James3:16 isaliye ki jahan dah aur virodha hota haai
James3:17 par jo gyaan upar se ata haai vah paahile to paavitra hota haai fir milanasar
James3:18 aur milap karanevalon ke liye dhaarmikata ka fal mela-milap ke sath boya jata haai..

1Peter1:1 pataras kee or se jo yeeshu maseeh ka praerit haai
1Peter1:2 aur parameshvar pita ke bhavishy gyaan ke anusar
1Peter1:3 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad do
1Peter1:4 arthata aek aavinashaee aur nirmal
1Peter1:5 jo tumhare liye svarga men rakhee haai
1Peter1:6 aur is karan tum magan hote ho
1Peter1:7 aur yah isaliye haai ki tumhara parakha hua vishvas
1Peter1:8 us se tum bin dekhe praem rakhte ho
1Peter1:9 aur apane vishvas ka pratifal arthata atmaon ka uddhar praapt karate ho.
1Peter1:10 isee uddhar ke vishay men un bhavishyadvktaon ne bahut ddoonddh-ddhanddh aur jancha-padtal kee
1Peter1:11 unhon ne is bat kee khoj kee ki maseeh ka atma jo un men tha
1Peter1:12 un par yah pragatt kiya gaya
1Peter1:13 is karan apanee apanee buddh ikee kamar bandhakar
1Peter1:14 aur agyaakaree balakon kee nai apanee agyaanata ke samay kee puranee aabhailashaaon ke sadrash n bano.
1Peter1:15 par jaaisa tumhara bulanevala pavitra haai
1Peter1:16 kyonaki likha haai
1Peter1:17 aur jab ki tum
1Peter1:18 kyonaki tum janate ho
1Peter1:19 par nirdosh aur nishkalank memne arthata maseeh ke bahumooly lohoo ke dara hua.
1Peter1:20 usaka gyaan to jagat kee utpati ke pahile hee se jana gaya tha
1Peter1:21 jo usake dara us parameshvar par vishvas karate ho
1Peter1:22 so jab ki tum ne bhaichare kee nishkapatt praeeti ke nimitt saty ke manane se apane manon ko pavitra kiya haai
1Peter1:23 kyonaki tum ne nashaman naheen par aavinashaee beej se parameshvar ke jeevate aur sada ttharanevale vachan ke dara naya janm paya haai.
1Peter1:24 kyonaki har aek praanee ghaas kee nain haai
1Peter1:25 parantu prabhu ka vachan yuganuyug sthiar rahega: aur yah hee susamachar ka vachan haai jo tumhen sunaya gaya tha..
1Peter2:1 isaliye sab prakar ka baairabhav aur chhl aur kapatt aur dah aur badanamee ko door karake.
1Peter2:2 naye janmen huae bachchon kee nai nirmal aatmaik doodha kee lalasa karo
1Peter2:3 yaadi tum ne prabhu kee krapa ka svad chakh liya haai.
1Peter2:4 usake pas akar
1Peter2:5 tum bhee ap jeevate patthron kee nai aatmaik ghar banate jate ho
1Peter2:6 is karan pavitra shaasr men bhee aya haai
1Peter2:7 so tumhare liye jo vishvas karate ho
1Peter2:8 aur ttes lagane ka patthr aur ttokar khane kee chattan ho gaya haai: kyonki ve to vachan ko n manakar ttokar khate haain aur isee ke liye ve ttharaae bhee gaae the.
1Peter2:9 par tum aek chuna hua vansha
1Peter2:10 tum paahile to kuchh bhee naheen the
1Peter2:11 he piryon maain tum se binatee karata hoo
1Peter2:12 anyajatiyon men tumhara chalachalan bhla ho isaaliye ki jin jin baton men ve tumhen kukarmee janakar badanam karate haai
1Peter2:13 prabhu ke liye manushyon ke ttharaae huae har aek prabandha ke adhaeen men raho
1Peter2:14 aur haakimon ke
1Peter2:15 kyonaki parameshvar kee ichchha yah haai
1Peter2:16 aur apane ap ko svatantra jano par apanee is svatantrata ko burai ke liye ad n banao
1Peter2:17 sab ka adar karo
1Peter2:18 he sevako
1Peter2:19 kyonaki yadi koi parameshvar ka vichar karake anyay se dukh uttata hua klesh sahata haai
1Peter2:20 kyonaki yadi tum ne aparadha karake ghoose khaae aur dhaeeraj dhara
1Peter2:21 aur tum isee ke liye bulaae bhee gaae ho kyonaki maseeh bhee tumhare liye dukh uttakar
1Peter2:22 n to us ne pap kiya
1Peter2:23 vah galee sunakar galee naheen deta tha
1Peter2:24 vah ap hee hamare papon ko apanee deh par liae huae kroos par chaddh gaya jis se ham papon ke liye mar karake dhaarmikata ke liye jeevan bitaaen: usee ke mar khane se tum change hue.
1Peter2:25 kyonaki tum pahile bhttkee hui bhedon kee nain the

1Peter3:12 kyonaki prabhu kee ankhe dhaarmiyon par lagee rahatee haai

1Peter4:1 so jab ki maseeh ne shareer men hokar dukh uttaya to tum bhee us hee manasa ko dhaaran karake haathaiyar bandha lo kyonaki jis shareer men dukh uttaya
1Peter4:2 taaki bhvishy men apana shosh shaareerik jeevan manushyon kee abhailashaaon ke anusar naheen baran parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar vyateet karo.
1Peter4:3 kyonaki anyajaatiyon kee ichchha ke anusar kam karane
1Peter4:4 is se ve achambha karate haai
1Peter4:5 par ve us ko jo jeevaton aur mare huon ka nyay karane ko taaiyar haai
1Peter4:6 kyonaki mare huon ko bhee susamachar isee liye sunaya gaya
1Peter4:7 sab baton ka ant turant honevala haai isaliye sanyamee hokar praarthna ke liye sachet raho.
1Peter4:8 aur sab men shraeshtt bat yah haai ki aek doosare se aadhaik praem rakho kyonki praem anek papon ko ddhap deta haai.
1Peter4:9 bina kudkudaae aek doosare kee pahunai karo.

1Peter4:12 he piryo

1Peter4:15 tum men se koi vyaaktai hatyara ya chor
1Peter4:16 par yaadi maseehee hone ke karan dukh paa
1Peter4:17 kyonaki vah samay a pahuncha haai

1Peter4:19 isaliye jo parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar dukh uttate haai

1Peter5:2 ki parameshvar ke us jhund kee
1Peter5:3 aur jo log tumhen saunpe gaae haai

Revelation21:27 aur us men koi apaavitra vastu ya gharanait kam karanevala
Revelation22:1 fir us ne mujhe billaur kee see jhlakatee hui
Revelation22:2 aur nadee ke is para aur us par
Revelation22:3 aur fir srap n hoga aur parameshvar aur memne ka sinhasan us nagar men hoga
Revelation22:4 aur usaka munh dekhenge
Revelation22:5 aur fir rat n hogee
Revelation22:6 fir us ne mujh se kaha
Revelation22:7 dek
Revelation22:8 maain vahee yoohanna hoo
Revelation22:9 aur us ne mujh se kaha
Revelation22:10 fir us ne mujh se kaha
Revelation22:11 jo anyay karata haai
Revelation22:12 dek
Revelation22:13 maain alafaa aur omiga
Revelation22:14 dhany ve haai
Revelation22:15 par kutte
Revelation22:16 mujh yeeshu ne apane svargadoot ko isaaliye bheja
Revelation22:17 aur atma
Revelation22:18 maain har aek ko jo is pustak kee bhvishyadanee kee baten sunata haai
Revelation22:19 aur yaadi koi is bhavishyadanee kee pustak kee baton men se kuchh nikal dale
Revelation22:20 jo in baton kee gavahee deta haai
